title: CoME-VL: Scaling Complementary Multi-Encoder Vision-Language Learning
summary: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) typically rely on a single vision encoder trained with contrastive image-text objectives, such as CLIP-style pretraining. While contrastive encoders are effective for cross-modal alignment and retrieval, self-supervised visual encoders often capture richer dense semantics and exhibit stronger robustness on recognition and understanding tasks. In this work, we investigate how to scale the fusion of these complementary visual representations for vision-language modeling. We propose CoME-VL: Complementary Multi-Encoder Vision-Language, a modular fusion framework that integrates a contrastively trained vision encoder with a self-supervised DINO encoder. Our approach performs representation-level fusion by (i) entropy-guided multi-layer aggregation with orthogonality-constrained projections to reduce redundancy, and (ii) RoPE-enhanced cross-attention to align heterogeneous token grids and produce compact fused visual tokens. The fused tokens can be injected into a decoder-only LLM with minimal changes to standard VLM pipelines. Extensive experiments across diverse vision-language benchmarks demonstrate that CoME-VL consistently outperforms single-encoder baselines. In particular, we observe an average improvement of 4.9% on visual understanding tasks and 5.4% on grounding tasks. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on RefCOCO for detection while improving over the baseline by a large margin. Finally, we conduct ablation studies on layer merging, non-redundant feature mixing, and fusion capacity to evaluate how complementary contrastive and self-supervised signals affect VLM performance.

AI.tldr: CoME-VL提出了一种融合对比学习和自监督视觉编码器的多编码器视觉语言模型框架，通过熵引导多层聚合和RoPE增强交叉注意力实现互补视觉表征的融合，在视觉理解和定位任务上显著超越单编码器基线。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型通常依赖单一的对比学习视觉编码器（如CLIP），虽然这类编码器在跨模态对齐和检索方面表现良好，但自监督视觉编码器（如DINO）往往能捕获更丰富的密集语义并在识别理解任务上具有更强的鲁棒性。研究如何有效融合这两种互补的视觉表征来提升视觉语言模型性能。
AI.method: 提出CoME-VL框架，融合对比学习编码器和自监督DINO编码器。采用两种关键技术：1）熵引导的多层聚合，通过正交约束投影减少冗余；2）RoPE增强的交叉注意力，对齐异构令牌网格并生成紧凑的融合视觉令牌。融合后的令牌可以最小化修改地注入到仅解码器的LLM中。
AI.result: 在多样化视觉语言基准测试中，CoME-VL持续超越单编码器基线。具体而言，在视觉理解任务上平均提升4.9%，在定位任务上平均提升5.4%。在RefCOCO检测任务上达到最先进性能，相比基线有大幅提升。消融研究验证了层合并、非冗余特征混合和融合容量对性能的影响。
AI.conclusion: 融合对比学习和自监督视觉编码器的互补表征能显著提升视觉语言模型性能。CoME-VL框架通过有效的表征级融合机制，在保持标准VLM流程最小修改的同时，实现了视觉理解和定位任务的实质性改进，证明了多编码器融合策略的价值。

title: VOSR: A Vision-Only Generative Model for Image Super-Resolution
summary: Most of the recent generative image super-resolution (SR) methods rely on adapting large text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models pretrained on web-scale text-image data. While effective, this paradigm starts from a generic T2I generator, despite that SR is fundamentally a low-resolution (LR) input-conditioned image restoration task. In this work, we investigate whether an SR model trained purely on visual data can rival T2I-based ones. To this end, we propose VOSR, a Vision-Only generative framework for SR. We first extract semantically rich and spatially grounded features from the LR input using a pretrained vision encoder as visual semantic guidance. We then revisit classifier-free guidance for training generative models and show that the standard unconditional branch is ill-suited to restoration models trained from scratch. We therefore replace it with a restoration-oriented guidance strategy that preserves weak LR anchors. Built upon these designs, we first train a multi-step VOSR model from scratch and then distill it into a one-step model for efficient inference. VOSR requires less than one-tenth of the training cost of representative T2I-based SR methods, yet in both multi-step and one-step settings, it achieves competitive or even better perceptual quality and efficiency, while producing more faithful structures with fewer hallucinations on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Our results, for the first time, show that high-quality generative SR can be achieved without multimodal pretraining. The code and models can be found at https://github.com/cswry/VOSR.

AI.tldr: VOSR是一个纯视觉的生成式超分辨率框架，无需多模态预训练，通过视觉语义引导和恢复导向的指导策略，在训练成本仅为T2I方法的十分之一情况下，达到竞争甚至更好的感知质量和效率。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式超分辨率方法主要依赖预训练的大型文本到图像扩散模型，但这些方法从通用T2I生成器开始，而超分辨率本质上是低分辨率输入条件下的图像恢复任务。本研究旨在探索纯视觉数据训练的SR模型是否能与T2I方法相媲美。
AI.method: 提出VOSR框架：1）使用预训练视觉编码器从LR输入提取语义丰富且空间接地的特征作为视觉语义引导；2）重新审视无分类器指导，发现标准无条件分支不适合从头训练的恢复模型，因此替换为保留弱LR锚点的恢复导向指导策略；3）先训练多步VOSR模型，然后蒸馏为单步模型以实现高效推理。
AI.result: VOSR的训练成本不到代表性T2I方法的十分之一，但在多步和单步设置下均达到竞争甚至更好的感知质量和效率，在合成和真实世界基准测试中产生更忠实结构且幻觉更少。
AI.conclusion: 首次证明高质量生成式超分辨率可以在无需多模态预训练的情况下实现，纯视觉方法能够与基于T2I的方法竞争甚至超越，为SR研究提供了更高效、更忠实的替代方案。

title: ProtoFlow: Mitigating Forgetting in Class-Incremental Remote Sensing Segmentation via Low-Curvature Prototype Flow
summary: Remote sensing segmentation in real deployment is inherently continual: new semantic categories emerge, and acquisition conditions shift across seasons, cities, and sensors. Despite recent progress, many incremental approaches still treat training steps as isolated updates, which leaves representation drift and forgetting insufficiently controlled. We present ProtoFlow, a time-aware prototype dynamics framework that models class prototypes as trajectories and learns their evolution with an explicit temporal vector field. By jointly enforcing low-curvature motion and inter-class separation, ProtoFlow stabilizes prototype geometry throughout incremental learning. Experiments on standard class- and domain-incremental remote sensing benchmarks show consistent gains over strong baselines, including up to 1.5-2.0 points improvement in mIoUall, together with reduced forgetting. These results suggest that explicitly modeling temporal prototype evolution is a practical and interpretable strategy for robust continual remote sensing segmentation.

AI.tldr: ProtoFlow：一种时间感知的原型动力学框架，通过将类别原型建模为轨迹并学习其演化，用于鲁棒的连续遥感分割
AI.motivation: 遥感分割在真实部署中本质上是连续的：新的语义类别不断出现，采集条件随季节、城市和传感器而变化。现有增量方法将训练步骤视为孤立更新，导致表示漂移和遗忘问题控制不足。
AI.method: 提出ProtoFlow框架，将类别原型建模为轨迹，通过显式时间向量场学习其演化。通过联合强制执行低曲率运动和类间分离，在整个增量学习过程中稳定原型几何结构。
AI.result: 在标准类别增量和域增量遥感基准测试中，相比强基线方法获得一致提升，mIoUall指标提高1.5-2.0个百分点，同时减少了遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模时间原型演化是鲁棒连续遥感分割的实用且可解释策略，原型轨迹提供了对表示漂移的直观理解。

title: PR3DICTR: A modular AI framework for medical 3D image-based detection and outcome prediction
summary: Three-dimensional medical image data and computer-aided decision making, particularly using deep learning, are becoming increasingly important in the medical field. To aid in these developments we introduce PR3DICTR: Platform for Research in 3D Image Classification and sTandardised tRaining. Built using community-standard distributions (PyTorch and MONAI), PR3DICTR provides an open-access, flexible and convenient framework for prediction model development, with an explicit focus on classification using three-dimensional medical image data. By combining modular design principles and standardization, it aims to alleviate developmental burden whilst retaining adjustability. It provides users with a wealth of pre-established functionality, for instance in model architecture design options, hyper-parameter solutions and training methodologies, but still gives users the opportunity and freedom to ``plug in'' their own solutions or modules. PR3DICTR can be applied to any binary or event-based three-dimensional classification task and can work with as little as two lines of code.

AI.tldr: PR3DICTR是一个用于三维医学图像分类研究的开源平台，基于PyTorch和MONAI构建，提供灵活框架以简化深度学习模型开发
AI.motivation: 三维医学图像数据和基于深度学习的计算机辅助决策在医疗领域日益重要，但缺乏标准化、易用的开发平台，现有工具开发负担重且灵活性不足
AI.method: 基于社区标准分发（PyTorch和MONAI）构建开源平台，采用模块化设计原则和标准化，提供预建功能（模型架构选项、超参数解决方案、训练方法），同时允许用户插入自定义解决方案
AI.result: 开发了PR3DICTR平台，支持任何二元或事件型三维分类任务，仅需两行代码即可使用，减轻开发负担同时保持可调整性
AI.conclusion: PR3DICTR为三维医学图像分类研究提供了标准化、灵活且便捷的开发框架，有望促进该领域的研究进展和模型开发效率

title: The Compression Gap: Why Discrete Tokenization Limits Vision-Language-Action Model Scaling
summary: Scaling Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models by upgrading the vision encoder is expected to improve downstream manipulation performance--as it does in vision-language modeling. We show that this expectation fails when actions are represented as discrete tokens, and explain why through an information-theoretic principle we call the Compression Gap: in any visuomotor pipeline, scaling behavior is governed by the location of the tightest information bottleneck. When actions are continuous (e.g., Diffusion Policy), the vision encoder is the binding constraint, and upgrading it directly improves performance. When actions are discretized through a fixed-capacity codebook (e.g., OAT), the codebook becomes the binding constraint, and encoder improvements cannot propagate past it--regardless of how rich the upstream representation is. We validate this principle on the LIBERO benchmark with three lines of evidence: a factorial experiment showing that encoder upgrades improve Diffusion Policy by over 21 percentage points while OAT gains are substantially attenuated across model scales; an encoder quality gradient across four encoders confirming that Diffusion Policy tracks encoder quality monotonically while OAT remains flat; and a codebook size experiment demonstrating that relaxing codebook capacity partially recovers encoder sensitivity, providing causal evidence for the bottleneck hypothesis. Our findings reveal that scaling in Physical AI requires identifying where information bottlenecks lie in the pipeline, rather than uniformly increasing model or data size.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在视觉-语言-动作模型中，当动作表示为离散标记时，升级视觉编码器并不能像预期那样提升操作性能，原因在于"压缩间隙"这一信息论原理：系统的扩展受限于最紧的信息瓶颈位置。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为，在视觉-语言-动作模型中，像视觉-语言建模那样升级视觉编码器应该能提升下游操作性能。但本文发现当动作表示为离散标记时，这一预期并不成立，需要探究其原因。
AI.method: 提出了"压缩间隙"的信息论原理来解释这一现象，并在LIBERO基准上通过三个实验验证：1）因子实验比较不同模型规模下视觉编码器升级对Diffusion Policy和OAT的影响；2）使用四个不同质量的编码器验证编码器质量梯度；3）通过改变码本容量的实验提供因果证据。
AI.result: 实验表明：Diffusion Policy（连续动作）的视觉编码器升级能带来超过21个百分点的性能提升，而OAT（离散动作）的增益显著减弱；Diffusion Policy的性能与编码器质量单调相关，而OAT保持平坦；放松码本容量能部分恢复编码器敏感性，验证了瓶颈假设。
AI.conclusion: 在物理AI中扩展模型需要识别管道中的信息瓶颈位置，而不是简单地统一增加模型或数据规模。当动作被离散化时，码本成为约束瓶颈，视觉编码器的改进无法越过这一瓶颈传播。

title: Multi-View Video Diffusion Policy: A 3D Spatio-Temporal-Aware Video Action Model
summary: Robotic manipulation requires understanding both the 3D spatial structure of the environment and its temporal evolution, yet most existing policies overlook one or both. They typically rely on 2D visual observations and backbones pretrained on static image--text pairs, resulting in high data requirements and limited understanding of environment dynamics. To address this, we introduce MV-VDP, a multi-view video diffusion policy that jointly models the 3D spatio-temporal state of the environment. The core idea is to simultaneously predict multi-view heatmap videos and RGB videos, which 1) align the representation format of video pretraining with action finetuning, and 2) specify not only what actions the robot should take, but also how the environment is expected to evolve in response to those actions. Extensive experiments show that MV-VDP enables data-efficient, robust, generalizable, and interpretable manipulation. With only ten demonstration trajectories and without additional pretraining, MV-VDP successfully performs complex real-world tasks, demonstrates strong robustness across a range of model hyperparameters, generalizes to out-of-distribution settings, and predicts realistic future videos. Experiments on Meta-World and real-world robotic platforms demonstrate that MV-VDP consistently outperforms video-prediction--based, 3D-based, and vision--language--action models, establishing a new state of the art in data-efficient multi-task manipulation.

AI.tldr: MV-VDP是一种多视角视频扩散策略，通过联合建模环境的3D时空状态，实现数据高效、鲁棒、可泛化的机器人操作
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作策略通常依赖2D视觉观测和静态图像-文本对预训练，忽略了环境的3D空间结构和时间演化，导致数据需求高且对环境动态理解有限
AI.method: 提出多视角视频扩散策略(MV-VDP)，同时预测多视角热图视频和RGB视频，将视频预训练表示格式与动作微调对齐，并预测机器人动作及环境响应演化
AI.result: 仅需10个演示轨迹且无需额外预训练，MV-VDP能成功执行复杂真实世界任务，在模型超参数范围内表现出强鲁棒性，能泛化到分布外设置，并预测真实未来视频
AI.conclusion: MV-VDP在Meta-World和真实机器人平台上持续优于基于视频预测、3D基础以及视觉-语言-动作模型，为数据高效多任务操作建立了新的技术标杆

title: Understanding the Role of Hallucination in Reinforcement Post-Training of Multimodal Reasoning Models
summary: The recent success of reinforcement learning (RL) in large reasoning models has inspired the growing adoption of RL for post-training Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to enhance their visual reasoning capabilities. Although many studies have reported improved performance, it remains unclear whether RL training truly enables models to learn from visual information. In this work, we propose the Hallucination-as-Cue Framework, an analytical framework designed to investigate the effects of RL-based post-training on multimodal reasoning models from the perspective of model hallucination. Specifically, we introduce hallucination-inductive, modality-specific corruptions that remove or replace essential information required to derive correct answers, thereby forcing the model to reason by hallucination. By applying these corruptions during both training and evaluation, our framework provides a unique perspective for diagnosing RL training dynamics and understanding the intrinsic properties of datasets. Through extensive experiments and analyses across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks, we reveal that the role of model hallucination for RL-training is more significant than previously recognized. For instance, we find that RL post-training under purely hallucination-inductive settings can still significantly improve models' reasoning performance, and in some cases even outperform standard training. These findings challenge prevailing assumptions about MLLM reasoning training and motivate the development of more modality-aware RL-based training designs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"幻觉作为线索"分析框架，通过引入诱导幻觉的模态特定干扰来研究RL后训练对多模态大语言模型视觉推理能力的影响，发现幻觉在RL训练中的作用比先前认识更为重要。
AI.motivation: 尽管强化学习在多模态大语言模型后训练中应用日益广泛且报告了性能提升，但尚不清楚RL训练是否真正让模型从视觉信息中学习。本文旨在从模型幻觉角度研究RL后训练对多模态推理模型的影响。
AI.method: 提出"幻觉作为线索"分析框架，引入幻觉诱导的模态特定干扰，移除或替换推导正确答案所需的关键信息，迫使模型通过幻觉进行推理。在训练和评估阶段应用这些干扰，为诊断RL训练动态和理解数据集内在特性提供独特视角。
AI.result: 在多个多模态推理基准测试上的广泛实验和分析表明，模型幻觉在RL训练中的作用比先前认识更为重要。在纯幻觉诱导设置下的RL后训练仍能显著提升模型推理性能，在某些情况下甚至超越标准训练。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现挑战了关于MLLM推理训练的普遍假设，并推动开发更具模态感知的基于RL的训练设计。幻觉在RL训练中扮演着比预期更重要的角色，需要重新思考多模态模型的训练方法。

title: EffiMiniVLM: A Compact Dual-Encoder Regression Framework
summary: Predicting product quality from multimodal item information is critical in cold-start scenarios, where user interaction history is unavailable and predictions must rely on images and textual metadata. However, existing vision-language models typically depend on large architectures and/or extensive external datasets, resulting in high computational cost. To address this, we propose EffiMiniVLM, a compact dual-encoder vision-language regression framework that integrates an EfficientNet-B0 image encoder and a MiniLM-based text encoder with a lightweight regression head. To improve training sample efficiency, we introduce a weighted Huber loss that leverages rating counts to emphasize more reliable samples, yielding consistent performance gains. Trained using only 20% of the Amazon Reviews 2023 dataset, the proposed model contains 27.7M parameters and requires 6.8 GFLOPs, yet achieves a CES score of 0.40 with the lowest resource cost in the benchmark. Despite its small size, it remains competitive with significantly larger models, achieving comparable performance while being approximately 4x to 8x more resource-efficient than other top-5 methods and being the only approach that does not use external datasets. Further analysis shows that scaling the data to 40% alone allows our model to overtake other methods, which use larger models and datasets, highlighting strong scalability despite the model's compact design.

AI.tldr: EffiMiniVLM：一种紧凑的双编码器视觉语言回归框架，用于冷启动场景下的产品质量预测，仅使用20%亚马逊评论数据，在保持竞争力的同时实现4-8倍的资源效率提升。
AI.motivation: 在冷启动场景中，预测产品质量需要依赖图像和文本元数据，但现有视觉语言模型通常依赖大型架构和/或大量外部数据集，导致计算成本高昂。需要开发更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出EffiMiniVLM紧凑双编码器视觉语言回归框架：集成EfficientNet-B0图像编码器和MiniLM文本编码器，配以轻量级回归头。引入加权Huber损失函数，利用评分计数强调更可靠的样本，提高训练样本效率。
AI.result: 模型仅含27.7M参数，需6.8 GFLOPs，使用20%亚马逊评论2023数据集训练，获得CES得分0.40，在基准测试中资源成本最低。与显著更大的模型相比保持竞争力，性能相当但资源效率高4-8倍，且是唯一不使用外部数据集的方法。数据扩展到40%时，模型性能超过使用更大模型和数据集的其他方法。
AI.conclusion: EffiMiniVLM证明了紧凑设计在视觉语言回归任务中的有效性，通过高效架构设计和加权损失函数，在有限数据和计算资源下实现竞争性性能，并展现出良好的可扩展性。

title: CAMEO: A Conditional and Quality-Aware Multi-Agent Image Editing Orchestrator
summary: Conditional image editing aims to modify a source image according to textual prompts and optional reference guidance. Such editing is crucial in scenarios requiring strict structural control (i.e., anomaly insertion in driving scenes and complex human pose transformation). Despite recent advances in large-scale editing models (i.e., Seedream, Nano Banana, etc), most approaches rely on single-step generation. This paradigm often lacks explicit quality control, may introduce excessive deviation from the original image, and frequently produces structural artifacts or environment-inconsistent modifications, typically requiring manual prompt tuning to achieve acceptable results. We propose \textbf{CAMEO}, a structured multi-agent framework that reformulates conditional editing as a quality-aware, feedback-driven process rather than a one-shot generation task. CAMEO decomposes editing into coordinated stages of planning, structured prompting, hypothesis generation, and adaptive reference grounding, where external guidance is invoked only when task complexity requires it. To overcome the lack of intrinsic quality control in existing methods, evaluation is embedded directly within the editing loop. Intermediate results are iteratively refined through structured feedback, forming a closed-loop process that progressively corrects structural and contextual inconsistencies. We evaluate CAMEO on anomaly insertion and human pose switching tasks. Across multiple strong editing backbones and independent evaluation models, CAMEO consistently achieves 20\% more win rate on average compared to multiple state-of-the-art models, demonstrating improved robustness, controllability, and structural reliability in conditional image editing.

AI.tldr: CAMEO是一个结构化多智能体框架，将条件图像编辑重新定义为质量感知、反馈驱动的过程，通过规划、结构化提示、假设生成和自适应参考接地的协调阶段，在编辑循环中嵌入评估，迭代优化结果，显著提升编辑质量和结构可靠性。
AI.motivation: 当前条件图像编辑方法（如Seedream、Nano Banana等）主要依赖单步生成，缺乏显式的质量控制，容易导致过度偏离原始图像、产生结构伪影或环境不一致的修改，通常需要手动调整提示才能获得可接受结果。需要一种更可控、更可靠的编辑方法。
AI.method: CAMEO将编辑分解为协调的阶段：规划、结构化提示、假设生成和自适应参考接地。采用多智能体框架，在编辑循环中直接嵌入评估，通过结构化反馈迭代优化中间结果，形成闭环过程。外部指导仅在任务复杂度需要时才被调用。
AI.result: 在异常插入和人体姿态切换任务上评估CAMEO，使用多个强大的编辑骨干和独立评估模型。相比多个最先进模型，CAMEO平均获得20%更高的胜率，展示了在条件图像编辑中改进的鲁棒性、可控性和结构可靠性。
AI.conclusion: CAMEO通过将条件图像编辑重新定义为质量感知、反馈驱动的过程，解决了现有单步生成方法缺乏质量控制的问题。其结构化多智能体框架和闭环迭代优化机制显著提升了编辑的可靠性和可控性，为需要严格结构控制的场景提供了有效解决方案。

title: Salt: Self-Consistent Distribution Matching with Cache-Aware Training for Fast Video Generation
summary: Distilling video generation models to extremely low inference budgets (e.g., 2--4 NFEs) is crucial for real-time deployment, yet remains challenging. Trajectory-style consistency distillation often becomes conservative under complex video dynamics, yielding an over-smoothed appearance and weak motion. Distribution matching distillation (DMD) can recover sharp, mode-seeking samples, but its local training signals do not explicitly regularize how denoising updates compose across timesteps, making composed rollouts prone to drift. To overcome this challenge, we propose Self-Consistent Distribution Matching Distillation (SC-DMD), which explicitly regularizes the endpoint-consistent composition of consecutive denoising updates. For real-time autoregressive video generation, we further treat the KV cache as a quality parameterized condition and propose Cache-Distribution-Aware training. This training scheme applies SC-DMD over multi-step rollouts and introduces a cache-conditioned feature alignment objective that steers low-quality outputs toward high-quality references. Across extensive experiments on both non-autoregressive backbones (e.g., Wan~2.1) and autoregressive real-time paradigms (e.g., Self Forcing), our method, dubbed \textbf{Salt}, consistently improves low-NFE video generation quality while remaining compatible with diverse KV-cache memory mechanisms. Source code will be released at \href{https://github.com/XingtongGe/Salt}{https://github.com/XingtongGe/Salt}.

AI.tldr: 提出SC-DMD方法，通过显式正则化去噪更新的端点一致性组合，解决视频生成模型在极低推理预算下的质量退化问题，并结合缓存感知训练实现实时自回归视频生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型蒸馏到极低推理预算（2-4 NFE）时面临挑战：轨迹一致性蒸馏在复杂视频动态下趋于保守，产生过度平滑外观和弱运动；分布匹配蒸馏能恢复锐利样本，但其局部训练信号未显式正则化去噪更新在时间步上的组合，导致组合推演易漂移。
AI.method: 提出自一致分布匹配蒸馏（SC-DMD），显式正则化连续去噪更新的端点一致性组合。针对实时自回归视频生成，将KV缓存视为质量参数化条件，提出缓存分布感知训练：在多步推演上应用SC-DMD，并引入缓存条件特征对齐目标，引导低质量输出向高质量参考对齐。
AI.result: 在非自回归骨干（如Wan 2.1）和自回归实时范式（如Self Forcing）上的广泛实验表明，该方法（名为Salt）持续提升低NFE视频生成质量，同时保持与多种KV缓存机制的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: SC-DMD通过显式正则化去噪更新的组合一致性，解决了分布匹配蒸馏中的漂移问题，结合缓存感知训练实现了高质量实时视频生成，为极低推理预算下的视频生成提供了有效解决方案。

title: Revealing Physical-World Semantic Vulnerabilities: Universal Adversarial Patches for Infrared Vision-Language Models
summary: Infrared vision-language models (IR-VLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for multimodal perception in low-visibility environments, yet their robustness to adversarial attacks remains largely unexplored. Existing adversarial patch methods are mainly designed for RGB-based models in closed-set settings and are not readily applicable to the open-ended semantic understanding and physical deployment requirements of infrared VLMs. To bridge this gap, we propose Universal Curved-Grid Patch (UCGP), a universal physical adversarial patch framework for IR-VLMs. UCGP integrates Curved-Grid Mesh (CGM) parameterization for continuous, low-frequency, and deployable patch generation with a unified representation-driven objective that promotes subspace departure, topology disruption, and stealth. To improve robustness under real-world deployment and domain shift, we further incorporate Meta Differential Evolution and EOT-augmented TPS deformation modeling. Rather than manipulating labels or prompts, UCGP directly disrupts the visual representation space, weakening cross-modal semantic alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UCGP consistently compromises semantic understanding across diverse IR-VLM architectures while maintaining cross-model transferability, cross-dataset generalization, real-world physical effectiveness, and robustness against defenses. These findings reveal a previously overlooked robustness vulnerability in current infrared multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: UCGP是一种针对红外视觉语言模型的通用物理对抗补丁框架，通过曲线网格参数化和统一表示驱动目标来破坏跨模态语义对齐，在现实部署中保持鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 红外视觉语言模型在低能见度环境中具有重要应用前景，但其对抗鲁棒性尚未得到充分研究。现有的对抗补丁方法主要针对RGB模型设计，不适用于红外VLMs的开放式语义理解和物理部署需求。
AI.method: 提出通用曲线网格补丁框架，包含：1) 曲线网格网格参数化实现连续、低频、可部署的补丁生成；2) 统一表示驱动目标促进子空间偏离、拓扑破坏和隐蔽性；3) 元差分进化和EOT增强的TPS变形建模以提高现实部署鲁棒性。
AI.result: UCGP能持续破坏不同IR-VLM架构的语义理解能力，同时保持跨模型可迁移性、跨数据集泛化性、现实物理有效性以及对防御的鲁棒性，揭示了当前红外多模态系统中被忽视的鲁棒性漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次系统探索了红外视觉语言模型的对抗鲁棒性，提出的UCGP框架有效揭示了这类系统的安全漏洞，为未来更鲁棒的红外多模态系统设计提供了重要参考。

title: Can VLMs Truly Forget? Benchmarking Training-Free Visual Concept Unlearning
summary:
VLMs trained on web-scale data retain sensitive and copyrighted visual concepts that deployment may require removing. Training-based unlearning methods share a structural flaw: fine-tuning on a narrow forget set degrades general capabilities before unlearning begins, making it impossible to attribute subsequent performance drops to the unlearning procedure itself. Training-free approaches sidestep this by suppressing concepts through prompts or system instructions, but no rigorous benchmark exists for evaluating them on visual tasks.
  We introduce VLM-UnBench, the first benchmark for training-free visual concept unlearning in VLMs. It covers four forgetting levels, 7 source datasets, and 11 concept axes, and pairs a three-level probe taxonomy with five evaluation conditions to separate genuine forgetting from instruction compliance. Across 8 evaluation settings and 13 VLM configurations, realistic unlearning prompts leave forget accuracy near the no-instruction baseline; meaningful reductions appear only under oracle conditions that disclose the target concept to the model. Object and scene concepts are the most resistant to suppression, and stronger instruction-tuned models remain capable despite explicit forget instructions. These results expose a clear gap between prompt-level suppression and true visual concept erasure.

AI.tldr: 提出首个视觉语言模型训练无关概念遗忘基准VLM-UnBench，揭示提示级抑制与真实视觉概念擦除之间存在明显差距
AI.motivation: 现有训练遗忘方法存在结构缺陷，而训练无关方法缺乏严谨评估基准。需要建立系统基准来评估视觉语言模型中训练无关的概念遗忘效果。
AI.method: 构建VLM-UnBench基准，涵盖4个遗忘级别、7个源数据集、11个概念轴，采用三级探测分类法与五种评估条件分离真实遗忘与指令遵从
AI.result: 现实遗忘提示下遗忘准确率接近无指令基线；仅在oracle条件下有显著降低。物体和场景概念最抵抗抑制，强指令调优模型即使有明确遗忘指令仍保持能力
AI.conclusion: 提示级抑制与真实视觉概念擦除存在明显差距，需要更有效的训练无关遗忘方法

title: ARIQA-3DS: A Stereoscopic Image Quality Assessment Dataset for Realistic Augmented Reality
summary: As Augmented Reality (AR) technologies advance towards immersive consumer adoption, the need for rigorous Quality of Experience (QoE) assessment becomes critical. However, existing datasets often lack ecological validity, relying on monocular viewing or simplified backgrounds that fail to capture the complex perceptual interplay, termed visual confusion, between real and virtual layers. To address this gap, we present ARIQA-3DS, the first large stereoscopic AR Image Quality Assessment dataset. Comprising 1,200 AR viewports, the dataset fuses high-resolution stereoscopic omnidirectional captures of real-world scenes with diverse augmented foregrounds under controlled transparency and degradation conditions. We conducted a comprehensive subjective study with 36 participants using a video see-through head-mounted display, collecting both quality ratings and simulator-sickness indicators. Our analysis reveals that perceived quality is primarily driven by foreground degradations and modulated by transparency levels, while oculomotor and disorientation symptoms show a progressive but manageable increase during viewing. ARIQA-3DS will be publicly released to serve as a comprehensive benchmark for developing next-generation AR quality assessment models.

AI.tldr: ARIQA-3DS是首个大规模立体AR图像质量评估数据集，包含1200个AR视口，融合了真实世界立体全景捕获与增强前景，用于评估AR质量体验。
AI.motivation: 随着AR技术向沉浸式消费应用发展，需要严格的QoE评估。现有数据集缺乏生态效度，通常采用单目视图或简化背景，无法捕捉真实与虚拟层之间复杂的感知交互（视觉混淆）。
AI.method: 创建ARIQA-3DS数据集，包含1200个AR视口，融合高分辨率立体全景真实场景捕获与多样化增强前景，在受控的透明度和退化条件下。使用视频透视头戴显示器对36名参与者进行全面的主观研究，收集质量评分和模拟器病指标。
AI.result: 感知质量主要由前景退化驱动，并受透明度水平调节；眼动和定向障碍症状在观看期间呈现渐进但可管理的增加。ARIQA-3DS将作为开发下一代AR质量评估模型的综合基准公开发布。
AI.conclusion: ARIQA-3DS填补了AR质量评估中生态效度的空白，为开发下一代AR质量评估模型提供了重要基准，揭示了前景退化对感知质量的关键影响以及模拟器病的可控性。

title: A Data-Centric Vision Transformer Baseline for SAR Sea Ice Classification
summary: Accurate and automated sea ice classification is important for climate monitoring and maritime safety in the Arctic. While Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) is the operational standard because of its all-weather capability, it remains challenging to distinguish morphologically similar ice classes under severe class imbalance. Rather than claiming a fully validated multimodal system, this paper establishes a trustworthy SAR only baseline that future fusion work can build upon. Using the AI4Arctic/ASIP Sea Ice Dataset (v2), which contains 461 Sentinel-1 scenes matched with expert ice charts, we combine full-resolution Sentinel-1 Extra Wide inputs, leakage-aware stratified patch splitting, SIGRID-3 stage-of-development labels, and training-set normalization to evaluate Vision Transformer baselines. We compare ViT-Base models trained with cross entropy and weighted cross-entropy against a ViT-Large model trained with focal loss. Among the tested configurations, ViT-Large with focal loss achieves 69.6% held-out accuracy, 68.8% weighted F1, and 83.9% precision on the minority Multi-Year Ice class. These results show that focal-loss training offers a more useful precision-recall trade-off than weighted cross-entropy for rare ice classes and establishes a cleaner baseline for future multimodal fusion with optical, thermal, or meteorological data.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了基于SAR的可靠海冰分类基线，使用Vision Transformer模型在AI4Arctic/ASIP数据集上评估，ViT-Large配合焦点损失函数在少数类多年冰上获得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 准确自动的海冰分类对北极气候监测和海上安全至关重要。虽然合成孔径雷达(SAR)因其全天候能力成为操作标准，但在严重类别不平衡下区分形态相似的冰类仍然具有挑战性。本文旨在建立一个可信赖的SAR基线，为未来多模态融合工作奠定基础。
AI.method: 使用AI4Arctic/ASIP海冰数据集(v2)，包含461个Sentinel-1场景与专家冰图匹配。结合全分辨率Sentinel-1超宽输入、泄漏感知分层补丁分割、SIGRID-3发展阶段标签和训练集归一化，评估Vision Transformer基线。比较使用交叉熵和加权交叉熵训练的ViT-Base模型与使用焦点损失训练的ViT-Large模型。
AI.result: 在测试配置中，使用焦点损失的ViT-Large模型达到69.6%的保留集准确率、68.8%加权F1分数，在少数类多年冰上获得83.9%的精确率。这些结果表明，焦点损失训练为稀有冰类提供了比加权交叉熵更有用的精确率-召回率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 焦点损失训练为稀有海冰类别提供了更优的精确率-召回率平衡，建立了一个更清晰的基线，为未来与光学、热力或气象数据的多模态融合工作奠定了基础。

title: MI-Pruner: Crossmodal Mutual Information-guided Token Pruner for Efficient MLLMs
summary: For multimodal large language models (MLLMs), visual information is relatively sparse compared with text. As a result, research on visual pruning emerges for efficient inference. Current approaches typically measure token importance based on the attention scores in the visual encoder or in the LLM decoder, then select visual tokens with high attention scores while pruning others. In this paper, we pursue a different and more surgical approach. Instead of relying on mechanism-specific signals, we directly compute Mutual Information (MI) between visual and textual features themselves, prior to their interaction. This allows us to explicitly measure crossmodal dependency at the feature levels. Our MI-Pruner is simple, efficient and non-intrusive, requiring no access to internal attention maps or architectural modifications. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms previous attention-based pruning methods with minimal latency.

AI.tldr: 提出MI-Pruner方法，通过直接计算视觉与文本特征间的互信息来评估跨模态依赖关系，实现更精准的视觉token剪枝，优于现有的注意力分数方法
AI.motivation: 针对多模态大语言模型中视觉信息相对稀疏的问题，现有视觉剪枝方法通常基于注意力分数选择重要token，但这种方法依赖特定机制且不够直接。需要更外科手术式的方法来精确评估跨模态依赖关系
AI.method: 提出MI-Pruner方法，不依赖注意力机制，直接计算视觉特征与文本特征之间的互信息来评估跨模态依赖。该方法简单高效且非侵入式，无需访问内部注意力图或修改架构
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法优于先前基于注意力的剪枝方法，同时保持了最小的延迟开销
AI.conclusion: 通过直接计算视觉与文本特征间的互信息来评估跨模态依赖，提供了一种更直接、更有效的视觉token剪枝方法，为多模态大语言模型的高效推理提供了新思路

title: Enhancing Robustness of Federated Learning via Server Learning
summary: This paper explores the use of server learning for enhancing the robustness of federated learning against malicious attacks even when clients' training data are not independent and identically distributed. We propose a heuristic algorithm that uses server learning and client update filtering in combination with geometric median aggregation. We demonstrate via experiments that this approach can achieve significant improvement in model accuracy even when the fraction of malicious clients is high, even more than $50\%$ in some cases, and the dataset utilized by the server is small and could be synthetic with its distribution not necessarily close to that of the clients' aggregated data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合服务器学习和客户端更新过滤的启发式算法，使用几何中位数聚合来增强联邦学习在非IID数据分布下的抗恶意攻击鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 解决联邦学习在客户端训练数据非独立同分布（non-IID）情况下对抗恶意攻击的鲁棒性问题。传统方法在非IID数据和大量恶意客户端存在时效果有限。
AI.method: 提出启发式算法，结合服务器学习和客户端更新过滤，采用几何中位数聚合方法。服务器使用少量数据（可以是合成数据，分布不必接近客户端聚合数据）进行学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能显著提高模型精度，即使在恶意客户端比例很高（某些情况下超过50%）的情况下也能有效工作。服务器数据集小且可以是合成数据，其分布不必接近客户端聚合数据分布。
AI.conclusion: 服务器学习与客户端更新过滤结合几何中位数聚合的方法能有效增强联邦学习在非IID数据分布下的抗恶意攻击鲁棒性，即使在高比例恶意客户端和有限服务器数据条件下也能保持良好性能。

title: Can Nano Banana 2 Replace Traditional Image Restoration Models? An Evaluation of Its Performance on Image Restoration Tasks
summary: Recent advances in generative AI raise the question of whether general-purpose image editing models can serve as unified solutions for image restoration. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of Nano Banana 2 for image restoration across diverse scenes and degradation types. Our results show that prompt design plays a critical role, where concise prompts with explicit fidelity constraints achieve the best trade-off between reconstruction accuracy and perceptual quality. Compared with state-of-the-art restoration models, Nano Banana 2 achieves superior performance in full-reference metrics while remaining competitive in perceptual quality, which is further supported by user studies. We also observe strong generalization in challenging scenarios, such as small faces, dense crowds, and severe degradations. However, the model remains sensitive to prompt formulation and may require iterative refinement for optimal results. Overall, our findings suggest that general-purpose generative models hold strong potential as unified image restoration solvers, while highlighting the importance of controllability and robustness. All test results are available on https://github.com/yxyuanxiao/NanoBanana2TestOnIR.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统评估了Nano Banana 2作为通用图像修复解决方案的性能，发现提示设计对重建精度和感知质量平衡至关重要，模型在参考指标上表现优异，但在提示敏感性和可控性方面仍有改进空间。
AI.motivation: 随着生成式AI的发展，研究通用图像编辑模型能否作为统一的图像修复解决方案，评估Nano Banana 2在不同场景和退化类型下的修复能力。
AI.method: 对Nano Banana 2进行系统评估，重点关注提示设计策略（简洁提示加显式保真度约束），与最先进的修复模型进行对比，包括全参考指标和感知质量评估，并进行用户研究验证。
AI.result: Nano Banana 2在全参考指标上优于现有修复模型，感知质量保持竞争力；在具有挑战性的场景（小脸、密集人群、严重退化）中表现出强泛化能力；但模型对提示表述敏感，可能需要迭代优化。
AI.conclusion: 通用生成模型具有作为统一图像修复解决方案的强大潜力，但需要改进可控性和鲁棒性；提示设计对平衡重建精度和感知质量至关重要。

title: STEAR: Layer-Aware Spatiotemporal Evidence Intervention for Hallucination Mitigation in Video Large Language Models
summary: Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) remain prone to spatiotemporal hallucinations, often generating visually unsupported details or incorrect temporal relations. Existing mitigation methods typically treat hallucination as a uniform decoding failure, applying globally shared correction rules. We instead observe that decoder layers contribute differently to visual grounding and later linguistic composition, indicating that intervention must be layer-aware. Based on this insight, we propose STEAR, a layer-aware spatiotemporal evidence intervention framework. STEAR identifies high-risk decoding steps and selects token-conditioned visual evidence from grounding-sensitive middle layers. It uses this shared evidence for two coupled purposes: restoring missing local grounding in middle layers, and constructing temporally perturbed patch-level counterfactuals to falsify inconsistent reasoning during late-layer decoding. Consequently, STEAR mitigates both spatial and temporal hallucinations within an efficient single-encode inference framework. Experiments across representative Video-LLM backbones and challenging benchmarks demonstrate that STEAR consistently reduces hallucinations while improving faithfulness, temporal consistency, and robustness. Our results confirm that reliable video decoding relies on intervening on precise evidence at the right layer, rather than enforcing a global penalty. The code is provided in the Supplementary Material.

AI.tldr: STEAR：一种层感知的时空证据干预框架，通过识别高风险解码步骤、从中间层提取token条件视觉证据，并利用该证据恢复中间层缺失的局部grounding、构建时间扰动的patch级反事实来纠正晚期解码中的不一致推理，从而在单次编码推理框架内有效缓解视频大语言模型的时空幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）容易产生时空幻觉，生成视觉上无支持的内容或错误的时间关系。现有缓解方法通常将幻觉视为统一的解码失败，应用全局共享的纠正规则。作者观察到解码器层对视觉grounding和后期语言组合的贡献不同，表明干预必须是层感知的。
AI.method: 提出STEAR框架：1）识别高风险解码步骤；2）从对grounding敏感的中层选择token条件视觉证据；3）利用该证据进行双重干预：恢复中间层缺失的局部grounding，以及构建时间扰动的patch级反事实来证伪晚期解码中的不一致推理。
AI.result: 在代表性Video-LLM主干和挑战性基准测试上的实验表明，STEAR能持续减少幻觉，同时提高忠实性、时间一致性和鲁棒性。结果证实可靠的视频解码依赖于在正确层上对精确证据进行干预，而非强制执行全局惩罚。
AI.conclusion: STEAR通过层感知的时空证据干预，在高效的单次编码推理框架内有效缓解视频大语言模型的时空幻觉问题。该方法强调针对特定解码层进行精确证据干预的重要性，而非采用全局统一的纠正策略。

title: Coupled Control, Structured Memory, and Verifiable Action in Agentic AI (SCRAT -- Stochastic Control with Retrieval and Auditable Trajectories): A Comparative Perspective from Squirrel Locomotion and Scatter-Hoarding
summary: Agentic AI is increasingly judged not by fluent output alone but by whether it can act, remember, and verify under partial observability, delay, and strategic observation. Existing research often studies these demands separately: robotics emphasizes control, retrieval systems emphasize memory, and alignment or assurance work emphasizes checking and oversight. This article argues that squirrel ecology offers a sharp comparative case because arboreal locomotion, scatter-hoarding, and audience-sensitive caching couple all three demands in one organism. We synthesize evidence from fox, eastern gray, and, in one field comparison, red squirrels, and impose an explicit inference ladder: empirical observation, minimal computational inference, and AI design conjecture. We introduce a minimal hierarchical partially observed control model with latent dynamics, structured episodic memory, observer-belief state, option-level actions, and delayed verifier signals. This motivates three hypotheses: (H1) fast local feedback plus predictive compensation improves robustness under hidden dynamics shifts; (H2) memory organized for future control improves delayed retrieval under cue conflict and load; and (H3) verifiers and observer models inside the action-memory loop reduce silent failure and information leakage while remaining vulnerable to misspecification. A downstream conjecture is that role-differentiated proposer/executor/checker/adversary systems may reduce correlated error under asymmetric information and verification burden. The contribution is a comparative perspective and benchmark agenda: a disciplined program of falsifiable claims about the coupling of control, memory, and verifiable action.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出以松鼠生态学为案例，研究智能体AI在部分可观测性、延迟和策略性观察下如何整合控制、记忆和验证功能，建立了一个包含潜在动态、结构化情景记忆、观察者信念状态和延迟验证信号的分层部分可观测控制模型。
AI.motivation: 当前AI研究往往将控制、记忆和验证功能分开研究，但现实世界中的智能体需要同时应对部分可观测性、延迟和策略性观察的挑战。作者认为松鼠生态学提供了一个理想的比较案例，因为松鼠的树冠移动、分散储藏和观众敏感型储藏行为将这三种需求耦合在一个生物体中。
AI.method: 采用综合证据法，分析狐狸松鼠、东部灰松鼠和红松鼠的行为数据，并建立明确的推理阶梯：经验观察、最小计算推理和AI设计猜想。引入了一个最小分层部分可观测控制模型，包含潜在动态、结构化情景记忆、观察者信念状态、选项级动作和延迟验证信号。
AI.result: 提出了三个假设：(H1)快速局部反馈加预测补偿能提高在隐藏动态变化下的鲁棒性；(H2)为未来控制组织的记忆能改善在提示冲突和负载下的延迟检索；(H3)动作-记忆循环内的验证器和观察者模型能减少静默故障和信息泄露，但仍易受错误规范影响。进一步猜想角色分化的提议者/执行者/检查者/对抗者系统可能减少不对称信息和验证负担下的相关错误。
AI.conclusion: 该研究的贡献在于提供了一个比较视角和基准议程：一个关于控制、记忆和可验证动作耦合的可证伪主张的严谨研究计划，为智能体AI设计提供了新的理论框架和实证基准。

title: Reliability Gated Multi-Teacher Distillation for Low Resource Abstractive Summarization
summary: We study multiteacher knowledge distillation for low resource abstractive summarization from a reliability aware perspective. We introduce EWAD (Entropy Weighted Agreement Aware Distillation), a token level mechanism that routes supervision between teacher distillation and gold supervision based on inter teacher agreement, and CPDP (Capacity Proportional Divergence Preservation), a geometric constraint on the student position relative to heterogeneous teachers. Across two Bangla datasets, 13 BanglaT5 ablations, and eight Qwen2.5 experiments, we find that logit level KD provides the most reliable gains, while more complex distillation improves semantic similarity for short summaries but degrades longer outputs. Cross lingual pseudo label KD across ten languages retains 71-122 percent of teacher ROUGE L at 3.2x compression. A human validated multi judge LLM evaluation further reveals calibration bias in single judge pipelines. Overall, our results show that reliability aware distillation helps characterize when multi teacher supervision improves summarization and when data scaling outweighs loss engineering.

AI.tldr: EWAD和CPDP方法用于低资源抽象摘要的多教师知识蒸馏，通过教师间一致性路由监督并保持学生与异质教师间的几何约束，在孟加拉语数据集上验证了可靠性感知蒸馏的有效性。
AI.motivation: 研究从可靠性感知角度探索低资源抽象摘要的多教师知识蒸馏，旨在解决复杂蒸馏方法在长文本摘要中性能下降的问题，并分析多教师监督何时优于数据扩展。
AI.method: 提出EWAD（熵加权一致性感知蒸馏）机制，基于教师间一致性在教师蒸馏和黄金监督之间进行令牌级路由；引入CPDP（容量比例散度保持）作为学生相对于异质教师的几何约束；在13个BanglaT5变体和8个Qwen2.5实验中进行评估。
AI.result: logit级知识蒸馏提供最可靠的性能提升；复杂蒸馏方法能提高短摘要的语义相似度但会降低长输出质量；跨语言伪标签知识蒸馏在10种语言中保持教师ROUGE-L分数的71-122%，实现3.2倍压缩；人类验证的多法官LLM评估揭示单法官流程存在校准偏差。
AI.conclusion: 可靠性感知蒸馏有助于确定多教师监督何时能改进摘要质量，以及何时数据扩展优于损失函数工程；该方法为低资源抽象摘要的知识蒸馏提供了系统评估框架。

title: GenSmoke-GS: A Multi-Stage Method for Novel View Synthesis from Smoke-Degraded Images Using a Generative Model
summary: This paper describes our method for Track 2 of the NTIRE 2026 3D Restoration and Reconstruction (3DRR) Challenge on smoke-degraded images. In this task, smoke reduces image visibility and weakens the cross-view consistency required by scene optimization and rendering. We address this problem with a multi-stage pipeline consisting of image restoration, dehazing, MLLM-based enhancement, 3DGS-MCMC optimization, and averaging over repeated runs. The main purpose of the pipeline is to improve visibility before rendering while limiting scene-content changes across input views. Experimental results on the challenge benchmark show improved quantitative performance and better visual quality than the provided baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/plbbl/GenSmoke-GS. Our method achieved a ranking of 1 out of 14 participants in Track 2 of the NTIRE 3DRR Challenge, as reported on the official competition website: https://www.codabench.org/competitions/13993/#/results-tab.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于NTIRE 2026 3D恢复与重建挑战赛Track 2（烟雾退化图像）的多阶段流水线方法，通过图像恢复、去雾、MLLM增强、3DGS-MCMC优化和多次运行平均等技术，在提升图像可见性的同时保持跨视图一致性，最终在14支参赛队伍中排名第一。
AI.motivation: 烟雾会降低图像可见性并削弱跨视图一致性，这对场景优化和渲染至关重要。现有方法在处理烟雾退化图像时难以同时保证可见性提升和场景内容的一致性保持。
AI.method: 采用多阶段流水线：1) 图像恢复；2) 去雾处理；3) 基于MLLM的增强；4) 3DGS-MCMC优化；5) 多次运行结果平均。核心目标是在渲染前提升可见性，同时限制输入视图间的场景内容变化。
AI.result: 在挑战赛基准测试中，该方法在定量性能和视觉质量上均优于提供的基线方法。在NTIRE 3DRR挑战赛Track 2的14名参与者中排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多阶段流水线方法能有效处理烟雾退化图像，在提升可见性的同时保持跨视图一致性，在3D恢复与重建任务中表现出色，获得了竞赛的最佳成绩。

title: Gradient Boosting within a Single Attention Layer
summary: Transformer attention computes a single softmax-weighted average over values -- a one-pass estimate that cannot correct its own errors. We introduce \emph{gradient-boosted attention}, which applies the principle of gradient boosting \emph{within} a single attention layer: a second attention pass, with its own learned projections, attends to the prediction error of the first and applies a gated correction. Under a squared reconstruction objective, the construction maps onto Friedman's gradient boosting machine, with each attention pass as a base learner and the per-dimension gate as the shrinkage parameter. We show that a single Hopfield-style update erases all query information orthogonal to the stored-pattern subspace, and that further iteration under local contraction can collapse distinct queries in the same region to the same fixed point. We also show that separate projections for the correction pass can recover residual information inaccessible to the shared-projection approach of Tukey's twicing. On a 10M-token subset of WikiText-103, gradient-boosted attention achieves a test perplexity of $67.9$ compared to $72.2$ for standard attention, $69.6$ for Twicing Attention, and $69.0$ for a parameter-matched wider baseline, with two rounds capturing most of the benefit.

AI.tldr: 提出梯度提升注意力，在单层注意力中应用梯度提升原理：第二注意力关注第一注意力的预测误差并进行门控校正，在重建任务中可映射到梯度提升机框架。
AI.motivation: 标准Transformer注意力通过单次softmax加权平均计算值，这种一次性估计无法纠正自身错误。需要一种机制能够在注意力层内部进行误差校正。
AI.method: 梯度提升注意力：第一注意力计算标准加权平均；第二注意力关注第一注意力的预测误差，使用独立学习的投影，并通过门控机制进行校正。在平方重建目标下，该结构映射到Friedman的梯度提升机框架。
AI.result: 在WikiText-103的10M标记子集上，梯度提升注意力测试困惑度为67.9，优于标准注意力(72.2)、Twicing注意力(69.6)和参数匹配的宽基线(69.0)。两轮提升即可获得大部分收益。
AI.conclusion: 梯度提升注意力通过引入内部误差校正机制，显著提升了注意力性能，将梯度提升原理成功应用于注意力机制设计，为Transformer架构提供了改进方向。

title: Safety-Critical Centralized Nonlinear MPC for Cooperative Payload Transportation by Two Quadrupedal Robots
summary: This paper presents a safety-critical centralized nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) framework for cooperative payload transportation by two quadrupedal robots. The interconnected robot-payload system is modeled as a discrete-time nonlinear differential-algebraic system, capturing the coupled dynamics through holonomic constraints and interaction wrenches. To ensure safety in complex environments, we develop a control barrier function (CBF)-based NMPC formulation that enforces collision avoidance constraints for both the robots and the payload. The proposed approach retains the interaction wrenches as decision variables, resulting in a structured DAE-constrained optimal control problem that enables efficient real-time implementation. The effectiveness of the algorithm is validated through extensive hardware experiments on two Unitree Go2 platforms performing cooperative payload transportation in cluttered environments under mass and inertia uncertainty and external push disturbances.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于双四足机器人协同负载运输的安全关键集中式非线性模型预测控制框架，通过控制屏障函数确保避障安全，并在硬件实验中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 需要解决多机器人协同负载运输中的安全控制问题，特别是在复杂环境中确保机器人和负载的避障安全，同时处理系统动力学耦合、质量惯性不确定性和外部扰动等挑战。
AI.method: 采用集中式非线性模型预测控制框架，将机器人-负载系统建模为离散时间非线性微分代数系统，通过控制屏障函数强制执行避障约束，将交互力矩作为决策变量，形成结构化DAE约束最优控制问题。
AI.result: 在Unitree Go2平台上进行了大量硬件实验，验证了算法在杂乱环境中协同负载运输的有效性，能够处理质量惯性不确定性和外部推力扰动。
AI.conclusion: 提出的安全关键NMPC框架能够有效实现双四足机器人的协同负载运输，确保复杂环境中的安全避障，为多机器人系统在动态不确定环境中的应用提供了可靠解决方案。

title: ARM: Advantage Reward Modeling for Long-Horizon Manipulation
summary: Long-horizon robotic manipulation remains challenging for reinforcement learning (RL) because sparse rewards provide limited guidance for credit assignment. Practical policy improvement thus relies on richer intermediate supervision, such as dense progress rewards, which are costly to obtain and ill-suited to non-monotonic behaviors such as backtracking and recovery. To address this, we propose Advantage Reward Modeling (ARM), a framework that shifts from hard-to-quantify absolute progress to estimating relative advantage. We introduce a cost-effective tri-state labeling strategy -- Progressive, Regressive, and Stagnant -- that reduces human cognitive overhead while ensuring high cross-annotator consistency. By training on these intuitive signals, ARM enables automated progress annotation for both complete demonstrations and fragmented DAgger-style data. Integrating ARM into an offline RL pipeline allows for adaptive action-reward reweighting, effectively filtering suboptimal samples. Our approach achieves a 99.4% success rate on a challenging long-horizon towel-folding task, demonstrating improved stability and data efficiency over current VLA baselines with near-zero human intervention during policy training.

AI.tldr: ARM框架通过相对优势估计替代稀疏奖励，使用三态标注策略减少人工标注成本，在长时程机器人操作任务中实现99.4%成功率
AI.motivation: 长时程机器人操作中稀疏奖励难以指导信用分配，而密集进度奖励成本高且不适用于非单调行为（如回溯和恢复），需要更有效的中间监督方法
AI.method: 提出优势奖励建模（ARM）框架，使用三态标注策略（进步、退步、停滞）训练相对优势估计器，支持完整演示和碎片化DAgger数据的自动进度标注，并集成到离线RL管道中进行自适应动作-奖励重加权
AI.result: 在挑战性长时程毛巾折叠任务中达到99.4%成功率，相比当前VLA基线在稳定性和数据效率方面均有提升，策略训练期间几乎无需人工干预
AI.conclusion: ARM通过相对优势估计和高效标注策略有效解决了长时程机器人操作的奖励稀疏性问题，显著提升了策略性能和数据效率

title: Reflective Context Learning: Studying the Optimization Primitives of Context Space
comment: Under review at COLM. Github: https://github.com/nvassilyev/RCL
summary: Generally capable agents must learn from experience in ways that generalize across tasks and environments. The fundamental problems of learning, including credit assignment, overfitting, forgetting, local optima, and high-variance learning signals, persist whether the learned object lies in parameter space or context space. While these challenges are well understood in classical machine learning optimization, they remain underexplored in context space, leading current methods to be fragmented and ad hoc. We present Reflective Context Learning (RCL), a unified framework for agents that learn through repeated interaction, reflection on behavior and failure modes, and iterative updates to context. In RCL, reflection converts trajectories and current context into a directional update signal analogous to gradients, while mutation applies that signal to improve future behavior in context space. We recast recent context-optimization approaches as instances of this shared learning problem and systematically extend them with classical optimization primitives, including batching, improved credit-assignment signal, auxiliary losses, failure replay, and grouped rollouts for variance reduction. On AppWorld, BrowseComp+, and RewardBench2, these primitives improve over strong baselines, with their relative importance shifting across task regimes. We further analyze robustness to initialization, the effects of batch size, sampling and curriculum strategy, optimizer-state variants, and the impact of allocating stronger or weaker models to different optimization components. Our results suggest that learning through context updates should be treated not as a set of isolated algorithms, but as an optimization problem whose mechanisms can be studied systematically and improved through transferable principles.

AI.tldr: RCL框架将上下文学习视为优化问题，通过反思和突变机制统一处理上下文空间中的学习挑战，并引入经典优化原语提升性能
AI.motivation: 当前上下文学习方法零散且临时，未能系统解决上下文空间中存在的信用分配、过拟合、遗忘、局部最优和高方差学习信号等经典机器学习优化问题
AI.method: 提出反思式上下文学习(RCL)框架，包含反思机制（将轨迹和当前上下文转换为类似梯度的方向更新信号）和突变机制（应用该信号改进上下文空间中的未来行为），并系统引入批处理、改进的信用分配信号、辅助损失、失败回放和分组rollout等经典优化原语
AI.result: 在AppWorld、BrowseComp+和RewardBench2任务上，这些优化原语显著提升了强基线方法的性能，且不同任务机制下各原语的重要性有所变化；分析了初始化鲁棒性、批大小、采样和课程策略、优化器状态变体以及不同强度模型分配的影响
AI.conclusion: 上下文学习不应被视为孤立算法集合，而应作为可系统研究并通过可转移原则改进的优化问题；RCL框架为此提供了统一视角

title: Hierarchical Planning with Latent World Models
summary: Model predictive control (MPC) with learned world models has emerged as a promising paradigm for embodied control, particularly for its ability to generalize zero-shot when deployed in new environments. However, learned world models often struggle with long-horizon control due to the accumulation of prediction errors and the exponentially growing search space. In this work, we address these challenges by learning latent world models at multiple temporal scales and performing hierarchical planning across these scales, enabling long-horizon reasoning while substantially reducing inference-time planning complexity. Our approach serves as a modular planning abstraction that applies across diverse latent world-model architectures and domains. We demonstrate that this hierarchical approach enables zero-shot control on real-world non-greedy robotic tasks, achieving a 70% success rate on pick-&-place using only a final goal specification, compared to 0% for a single-level world model. In addition, across physics-based simulated environments including push manipulation and maze navigation, hierarchical planning achieves higher success while requiring up to 4x less planning-time compute.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多尺度潜在世界模型和分层规划方法，以解决学习型世界模型在长时域控制中面临的预测误差累积和搜索空间指数增长问题。
AI.motivation: 基于学习型世界模型的模型预测控制（MPC）在具身控制中展现出潜力，特别是在新环境中具有零样本泛化能力。然而，学习型世界模型在长时域控制中面临两个主要挑战：预测误差的累积和搜索空间的指数级增长。
AI.method: 提出学习多个时间尺度的潜在世界模型，并在这些尺度上进行分层规划。该方法作为模块化的规划抽象，适用于多种潜在世界模型架构和领域，能够在保持长时域推理能力的同时显著降低推理时的规划复杂度。
AI.result: 在真实世界非贪婪机器人任务中，该方法实现了70%的拾放任务成功率（仅使用最终目标规范），而单层世界模型的成功率为0%。在物理模拟环境中（包括推动操作和迷宫导航），分层规划在获得更高成功率的同时，所需的规划时间计算量最多减少4倍。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度潜在世界模型和分层规划方法有效解决了学习型世界模型在长时域控制中的挑战，显著提升了零样本控制性能，同时大幅降低了规划计算复杂度，为具身智能控制提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Rendering Multi-Human and Multi-Object with 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Reconstructing dynamic scenes with multiple interacting humans and objects from sparse-view inputs is a critical yet challenging task, essential for creating high-fidelity digital twins for robotics and VR/AR. This problem, which we term Multi-Human Multi-Object (MHMO) rendering, presents two significant obstacles: achieving view-consistent representations for individual instances under severe mutual occlusion, and explicitly modeling the complex and combinatorial dependencies that arise from their interactions. To overcome these challenges, we propose MM-GS, a novel hierarchical framework built upon 3D Gaussian Splatting. Our method first employs a Per-Instance Multi-View Fusion module to establish a robust and consistent representation for each instance by aggregating visual information across all available views. Subsequently, a Scene-Level Instance Interaction module operates on a global scene graph to reason about relationships between all participants, refining their attributes to capture subtle interaction effects. Extensive experiments on challenging datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms strong baselines, producing state-of-the-art results with high-fidelity details and plausible inter-instance contacts.

AI.tldr: MM-GS：基于3D高斯泼溅的分层框架，用于从稀疏视图输入重建多人与多物体交互的动态场景，解决遮挡和复杂依赖关系问题。
AI.motivation: 多人与多物体交互场景的重建对于机器人学和VR/AR的数字孪生至关重要，但面临两个主要挑战：严重相互遮挡下的视角一致性表示，以及交互中产生的复杂组合依赖关系建模。
AI.method: 提出MM-GS分层框架：1）实例级多视图融合模块，通过聚合所有可用视图的视觉信息为每个实例建立鲁棒的视角一致表示；2）场景级实例交互模块，在全局场景图上推理所有参与者之间的关系，细化其属性以捕捉细微的交互效应。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的数据集上进行广泛实验，证明该方法显著优于强基线方法，产生最先进的结果，具有高保真细节和合理的实例间接触。
AI.conclusion: MM-GS成功解决了多人与多物体渲染中的视角一致性和复杂交互建模问题，为动态场景重建提供了有效的解决方案，在数字孪生应用中具有重要价值。

title: Beyond the Parameters: A Technical Survey of Contextual Enrichment in Large Language Models: From In-Context Prompting to Causal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) encode vast world knowledge in their parameters, yet they remain fundamentally limited by static knowledge, finite context windows, and weakly structured causal reasoning. This survey provides a unified account of augmentation strategies along a single axis: the degree of structured context supplied at inference time. We cover in-context learning and prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), GraphRAG, and CausalRAG. Beyond conceptual comparison, we provide a transparent literature-screening protocol, a claim-audit framework, and a structured cross-paper evidence synthesis that distinguishes higher-confidence findings from emerging results. The paper concludes with a deployment-oriented decision framework and concrete research priorities for trustworthy retrieval-augmented NLP.

AI.tldr: 该综述论文系统分析了LLM增强策略，提出了基于结构化上下文程度的统一框架，涵盖从提示工程到因果增强的多种方法，并提供了文献筛选协议、证据合成框架和部署决策指南。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽然编码了丰富的世界知识，但受到静态知识、有限上下文窗口和弱结构化因果推理的限制。需要系统分析各种增强策略，为研究者和实践者提供统一的框架和决策指南。
AI.method: 提出基于结构化上下文程度的统一分析框架，涵盖：上下文学习与提示工程、检索增强生成(RAG)、GraphRAG、CausalRAG。建立透明的文献筛选协议、声明审计框架和结构化跨论文证据合成方法。
AI.result: 构建了系统化的增强策略分类体系，区分了高置信度发现与新兴结果。提供了部署导向的决策框架和可信检索增强NLP的具体研究优先级。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化上下文程度的统一视角，系统分析了LLM增强策略。提出的决策框架和研究优先级为可信检索增强NLP的实际部署提供了指导，有助于推动该领域向更可靠、可解释的方向发展。

title: FSUNav: A Cerebrum-Cerebellum Architecture for Fast, Safe, and Universal Zero-Shot Goal-Oriented Navigation
summary: Current vision-language navigation methods face substantial bottlenecks regarding heterogeneous robot compatibility, real-time performance, and navigation safety. Furthermore, they struggle to support open-vocabulary semantic generalization and multimodal task inputs. To address these challenges, this paper proposes FSUNav: a Cerebrum-Cerebellum architecture for fast, safe, and universal zero-shot goal-oriented navigation, which innovatively integrates vision-language models (VLMs) with the proposed architecture. The cerebellum module, a high-frequency end-to-end module, develops a universal local planner based on deep reinforcement learning, enabling unified navigation across heterogeneous platforms (e.g., humanoid, quadruped, wheeled robots) to improve navigation efficiency while significantly reducing collision risk. The cerebrum module constructs a three-layer reasoning model and leverages VLMs to build an end-to-end detection and verification mechanism, enabling zero-shot open-vocabulary goal navigation without predefined IDs and improving task success rates in both simulation and real-world environments. Additionally, the framework supports multimodal inputs (e.g., text, target descriptions, and images), further enhancing generalization, real-time performance, safety, and robustness. Experimental results on MP3D, HM3D, and OVON benchmarks demonstrate that FSUNav achieves state-of-the-art performance on object, instance image, and task navigation, significantly outperforming existing methods. Real-world deployments on diverse robotic platforms further validate its robustness and practical applicability.

AI.tldr: FSUNav提出了一种脑-小脑架构，用于快速、安全、通用的零样本目标导航，通过整合视觉语言模型和深度强化学习，实现异构机器人平台的统一导航和开放词汇语义泛化。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言导航方法存在异构机器人兼容性差、实时性能不足、导航安全性有限等问题，且难以支持开放词汇语义泛化和多模态任务输入。需要一种能够同时解决这些挑战的通用导航框架。
AI.method: 提出FSUNav架构，包含两个核心模块：1) 小脑模块：基于深度强化学习的高频端到端通用局部规划器，实现异构机器人平台的统一导航；2) 大脑模块：三层推理模型，利用视觉语言模型构建端到端检测与验证机制，支持零样本开放词汇目标导航和多模态输入（文本、目标描述、图像）。
AI.result: 在MP3D、HM3D和OVON基准测试中，FSUNav在物体导航、实例图像导航和任务导航方面均达到最先进性能，显著优于现有方法。在多种机器人平台（人形、四足、轮式）上的真实世界部署进一步验证了其鲁棒性和实用性。
AI.conclusion: FSUNav通过创新的脑-小脑架构成功解决了视觉语言导航中的关键瓶颈，实现了快速、安全、通用的零样本目标导航，支持异构机器人平台和多模态输入，为机器人导航提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

title: Not All Frames Deserve Full Computation: Accelerating Autoregressive Video Generation via Selective Computation and Predictive Extrapolation
summary: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models enable long-form video generation but remain expensive due to repeated multi-step denoising. Existing training-free acceleration methods rely on binary cache-or-recompute decisions, overlooking intermediate cases where direct reuse is too coarse yet full recomputation is unnecessary. Moreover, asynchronous AR schedules assign different noise levels to co-generated frames, yet existing methods process the entire valid interval uniformly. To address these AR-specific inefficiencies, we present SCOPE, a training-free framework for efficient AR video diffusion. SCOPE introduces a tri-modal scheduler over cache, predict, and recompute, where prediction via noise-level Taylor extrapolation fills the gap between reuse and recomputation with explicit stability controls backed by error propagation analysis. It further introduces selective computation that restricts execution to the active frame interval. On MAGI-1 and SkyReels-V2, SCOPE achieves up to 4.73x speedup while maintaining quality comparable to the original output, outperforming all training-free baselines.

AI.tldr: SCOPE是一个无需训练的高效自回归视频扩散框架，通过三模态调度器（缓存、预测、重计算）和选择性计算，在保持质量的同时实现最高4.73倍加速。
AI.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型虽然能生成长视频，但多步去噪过程计算成本高。现有免训练加速方法采用二元的缓存或重计算决策，忽略了中间情况：直接重用太粗糙，完全重计算又不必要。此外，异步自回归调度为同时生成的帧分配不同噪声水平，但现有方法对整个有效区间进行统一处理。
AI.method: SCOPE引入三模态调度器：缓存、预测和重计算。其中预测通过噪声水平泰勒外推填补重用和重计算之间的空白，并通过误差传播分析提供显式稳定性控制。同时引入选择性计算，将执行限制在活动帧区间内。
AI.result: 在MAGI-1和SkyReels-V2数据集上，SCOPE实现了最高4.73倍的加速，同时保持与原始输出相当的质量，优于所有免训练基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE通过三模态调度和选择性计算有效解决了自回归视频扩散模型的特定低效问题，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升了推理效率，为长视频生成提供了实用的加速方案。

title: Chart-RL: Policy Optimization Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced Visual Reasoning in Chart Question Answering with Vision Language Models
comment: In Proceedings of the 32nd ACM-SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD 2026)
summary: The recent advancements in Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated progress toward true intelligence requiring robust reasoning capabilities. Beyond pattern recognition, linguistic reasoning must integrate with visual comprehension, particularly for Chart Question Answering (CQA) tasks involving complex data visualizations. Current VLMs face significant limitations in CQA, including imprecise numerical extraction, difficulty interpreting implicit visual relationships, and inadequate attention mechanisms for capturing spatial relationships in charts. In this work, we address these challenges by presenting Chart-RL, a novel reinforcement learning framework that enhances VLMs chart understanding through feedback-driven policy optimization of visual perception and logical inference. Our key innovation includes a comprehensive framework integrating Reinforcement Learning (RL) from Policy Optimization techniques along with adaptive reward functions, that demonstrates superior performance compared to baseline foundation models and competitive results against larger state-of-the-art architectures. We also integrated Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning through Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) in the RL framework that only requires single GPU configurations while preserving performance integrity. We conducted extensive benchmarking across open-source, proprietary, and state-of-the-art closed-source models utilizing the ChartQAPro dataset. The RL fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct model achieved an answer accuracy of 0.634, surpassing the 0.580 accuracy of the Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct foundation model despite utilizing half the parameter count, while simultaneously reducing inference latency from 31 seconds to 9 seconds.

AI.tldr: Chart-RL：基于强化学习的视觉语言模型框架，通过反馈驱动的策略优化提升图表问答能力，在减少参数量的同时实现性能提升和推理加速。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在图表问答任务中存在数值提取不精确、隐含视觉关系理解困难、空间关系注意力机制不足等局限性，需要更强大的推理能力来整合语言推理与视觉理解。
AI.method: 提出Chart-RL强化学习框架，通过策略优化技术进行反馈驱动的视觉感知和逻辑推理优化，集成自适应奖励函数，并采用LoRA参数高效微调方法，仅需单GPU配置。
AI.result: 在ChartQAPro数据集上的实验显示，RL微调的Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct模型达到0.634的答案准确率，超越基础模型Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct的0.580准确率，同时推理延迟从31秒降至9秒。
AI.conclusion: Chart-RL框架有效解决了图表问答中的关键挑战，通过强化学习优化实现了在减少参数量的同时提升性能并加速推理，为视觉语言模型的图表理解提供了高效解决方案。

title: Minimal Information Control Invariance via Vector Quantization
summary: Safety-critical autonomous systems must satisfy hard state constraints under tight computational and sensing budgets, yet learning-based controllers are often far more complex than safe operation requires. To formalize this gap, we study how many distinct control signals are needed to render a compact set forward invariant under sampled-data control, connecting the question to the information-theoretic notion of invariance entropy. We propose a vector-quantized autoencoder that jointly learns a state-space partition and a finite control codebook, and develop an iterative forward certification algorithm that uses Lipschitz-based reachable-set enclosures and sum-of-squares programming. On a 12-dimensional nonlinear quadrotor model, the learned controller achieves a $157\times$ reduction in codebook size over a uniform grid baseline while preserving invariance, and we empirically characterize the minimum sensing resolution compatible with safe operation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种向量量化自编码器方法，联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本，实现安全关键自主系统的紧凑控制表示，在12维非线性四旋翼模型上相比均匀网格基线实现157倍码本大小缩减。
AI.motivation: 安全关键自主系统需要在有限计算和感知预算下满足硬状态约束，但基于学习的控制器通常比安全操作所需复杂得多。需要形式化这种差距，研究在采样数据控制下使紧集前向不变所需的不同控制信号数量。
AI.method: 1) 连接信息论中的不变熵概念；2) 提出向量量化自编码器，联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本；3) 开发迭代前向认证算法，使用基于Lipschitz的可达集包络和平方和规划。
AI.result: 在12维非线性四旋翼模型上，学习到的控制器相比均匀网格基线实现了157倍的码本大小缩减，同时保持了不变性。实证表征了与安全操作兼容的最小感知分辨率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合学习状态划分和控制码本，显著减少了安全控制所需的控制信号数量，为安全关键自主系统提供了紧凑且可认证的控制表示，平衡了复杂性和安全性要求。

title: Effect of Input Resolution on Retinal Vessel Segmentation Performance: An Empirical Study Across Five Datasets
summary: Most deep learning pipelines for retinal vessel segmentation resize fundus images to satisfy GPU memory constraints and enable uniform batch processing. However, the impact of this resizing on thin vessel detection remains underexplored. When high resolution images are downsampled, thin vessels are reduced to subpixel structures, causing irreversible information loss even before the data enters the network. Standard volumetric metrics such as the Dice score do not capture this loss because thick vessel pixels dominate the evaluation. We investigated this effect by training a baseline UNet at multiple downsampling ratios across five fundus datasets (DRIVE, STARE, CHASE_DB1, HRF, and FIVES) with native widths ranging from 565 to 3504 pixels, keeping all other settings fixed. We introduce a width-stratified sensitivity metric that evaluates thin (half-width <3 pixels), medium (3 to 7 pixels), and thick (>7 pixels) vessel detection separately, using native resolution width estimates derived from a Euclidean distance transform. Results show that for high-resolution datasets (HRF, FIVES), thin vessel sensitivity improves monotonically as images are downsampled toward the encoder's effective operating range, peaking at processed widths between 256 and 876 pixels. For low-to-mid resolution datasets (DRIVE, STARE, CHASE_DB1), thin vessel sensitivity is highest at or near native resolution and degrades with any downsampling. Across all five datasets, aggressive downsampling reduced thin vessel sensitivity by up to 15.8 percentage points (DRIVE) while Dice remained relatively stable, confirming that Dice alone is insufficient for evaluating microvascular segmentation.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨了视网膜血管分割中图像下采样对细血管检测的影响，发现标准Dice指标无法捕捉细血管信息损失，提出了基于血管宽度的分层敏感性评估方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习视网膜血管分割流程通常需要将眼底图像下采样以满足GPU内存限制，但这种下采样对细血管检测的影响尚未充分研究。高分辨率图像下采样时，细血管会变为亚像素结构，导致不可逆的信息丢失，而标准的体积指标（如Dice分数）无法捕捉这种损失，因为厚血管像素主导了评估。
AI.method: 在五个眼底数据集（DRIVE、STARE、CHASE_DB1、HRF、FIVES）上，使用不同下采样比例训练基线UNet模型，保持其他设置不变。引入了基于血管宽度的分层敏感性指标，将细血管（半宽<3像素）、中血管（3-7像素）和厚血管（>7像素）的检测分开评估，使用欧几里得距离变换获得原生分辨率下的血管宽度估计。
AI.result: 对于高分辨率数据集（HRF、FIVES），细血管敏感性随着图像下采样到编码器有效操作范围而单调提高，峰值出现在处理宽度256-876像素之间。对于低到中分辨率数据集（DRIVE、STARE、CHASE_DB1），细血管敏感性在原生分辨率或接近原生分辨率时最高，任何下采样都会降低性能。在所有五个数据集中，激进的下采样使细血管敏感性降低高达15.8个百分点（DRIVE），而Dice分数保持相对稳定，证实Dice单独不足以评估微血管分割。
AI.conclusion: 图像下采样对细血管检测的影响取决于数据集的原生分辨率，高分辨率数据集需要适当下采样以达到最佳细血管检测性能，而低分辨率数据集应保持原生分辨率。标准Dice指标无法充分评估细血管分割质量，需要基于血管宽度的分层评估方法来全面评估微血管分割性能。

title: Valence-Arousal Subspace in LLMs: Circular Emotion Geometry and Multi-Behavioral Control
summary: We present a method to identify a valence-arousal (VA) subspace within large language model representations. From 211k emotion-labeled texts, we derive emotion steering vectors, then learn VA axes as linear combinations of their top PCA components via ridge regression on the model's self-reported valence-arousal scores. The resulting VA subspace exhibits circular geometry consistent with established models of human emotion perception. Projections along our recovered VA subspace correlate with human-crowdsourced VA ratings across 44k lexical items. Furthermore, steering generation along these axes produces monotonic shifts in the corresponding affective dimensions of model outputs. Steering along these directions also induces near-monotonic bidirectional control over refusal and sycophancy: increasing arousal decreases refusal and increases sycophancy, and vice versa. These effects replicate across Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen3-8B, and Qwen3-14B, demonstrating cross-architecture generality. We provide a mechanistic account for these effects and prior emotionally-framed controls: refusal-associated tokens ("I can't," "sorry") occupy low-arousal, negative-valence regions, so VA steering directly modulates their emission probability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从大语言模型表示中识别效价-唤醒度（VA）子空间的方法，通过情感引导向量和PCA组件学习VA轴，实现了对模型情感维度的线性控制和行为调节
AI.motivation: 研究大语言模型内部表示中是否存在与人类情感感知模型一致的情感维度结构，并探索如何通过控制这些维度来调节模型的情感表达和行为倾向
AI.method: 从21.1万条情感标注文本中推导情感引导向量，通过岭回归在模型自报告的效价-唤醒度分数上学习VA轴作为这些向量主成分分析的线性组合，构建VA子空间
AI.result: 恢复的VA子空间显示出与人类情感感知模型一致的圆形几何结构；VA投影与人类众包VA评分在4.4万个词汇项上相关；沿这些轴的引导能单调调节模型输出的情感维度，并双向控制拒绝和谄媚行为
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型表示中存在可识别的VA子空间，通过控制该子空间能有效调节模型的情感表达和行为倾向，这一发现在不同架构模型中具有普遍性，为情感引导提供了机制性解释

title: Learning the Signature of Memorization in Autoregressive Language Models
summary: All prior membership inference attacks for fine-tuned language models use hand-crafted heuristics (e.g., loss thresholding, Min-K\%, reference calibration), each bounded by the designer's intuition. We introduce the first transferable learned attack, enabled by the observation that fine-tuning any model on any corpus yields unlimited labeled data, since membership is known by construction. This removes the shadow model bottleneck and brings membership inference into the deep learning era: learning what matters rather than designing it, with generalization through training diversity and scale. We discover that fine-tuning language models produces an invariant signature of memorization detectable across architectural families and data domains. We train a membership inference classifier exclusively on transformer-based models. It transfers zero-shot to Mamba (state-space), RWKV-4 (linear attention), and RecurrentGemma (gated recurrence), achieving 0.963, 0.972, and 0.936 AUC respectively. Each evaluation combines an architecture and dataset never seen during training, yet all three exceed performance on held-out transformers (0.908 AUC). These four families share no computational mechanisms, their only commonality is gradient descent on cross-entropy loss. Even simple likelihood-based methods exhibit strong transfer, confirming the signature exists independently of the detection method. Our method, Learned Transfer MIA (LT-MIA), captures this signal most effectively by reframing membership inference as sequence classification over per-token distributional statistics. On transformers, LT-MIA achieves 2.8$\times$ higher TPR at 0.1\% FPR than the strongest baseline. The method also transfers to code (0.865 AUC) despite training only on natural language texts. Code and trained classifier available at https://github.com/JetBrains-Research/learned-mia.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个可迁移的基于学习的成员推理攻击LT-MIA，通过利用微调过程自动生成的标注数据，无需影子模型，实现了跨架构（Transformer、Mamba、RWKV-4、RecurrentGemma）和跨领域（自然语言到代码）的零样本迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有成员推理攻击依赖手工设计的启发式方法（如损失阈值、Min-K%、参考校准），这些方法受限于设计者的直觉，无法充分利用深度学习的能力。需要一种能够自动学习成员特征并具有跨架构和领域泛化能力的攻击方法。
AI.method: 提出LT-MIA方法，利用微调过程自动生成标注数据（成员状态已知），将成员推理重构为基于每词元分布统计量的序列分类任务。训练一个基于Transformer的成员推理分类器，通过训练多样性和规模实现泛化。
AI.result: LT-MIA在未见过的Mamba、RWKV-4和RecurrentGemma架构上分别达到0.963、0.972和0.936 AUC，均超过在保留Transformer上的性能（0.908 AUC）。在代码领域达到0.865 AUC（仅用自然语言文本训练）。在Transformer上，比最强基线在0.1% FPR时TPR提高2.8倍。
AI.conclusion: 微调语言模型会产生可跨架构家族和数据域检测的记忆化不变特征，该特征独立于检测方法存在。基于学习的攻击方法能够有效捕获这一信号，将成员推理带入深度学习时代，实现从手工设计到自动学习的转变。

title: Exploring Motion-Language Alignment for Text-driven Motion Generation
summary: Text-driven human motion generation aims to synthesize realistic motion sequences that follow textual descriptions. Despite recent advances, accurately aligning motion dynamics with textual semantics remains a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we revisit text-to-motion generation from the perspective of motion-language alignment and propose MLA-Gen, a framework that integrates global motion priors with fine-grained local conditioning. This design enables the model to capture common motion patterns, while establishing detailed alignment between texts and motions. Furthermore, we identify a previously overlooked attention sink phenomenon in human motion generation, where attention disproportionately concentrates on the start text token, limiting the utilization of informative textual cues and leading to degraded semantic grounding. To analyze this issue, we introduce SinkRatio, a metric for measuring attention concentration, and develop alignment-aware masking and control strategies to regulate attention during generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently improves both motion quality and motion-language alignment over strong baselines. Code will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: MLA-Gen框架通过整合全局运动先验与细粒度局部条件，解决文本驱动人体运动生成中的运动-语言对齐问题，并提出注意力沉没现象及其缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 文本驱动的人体运动生成中，运动动态与文本语义的准确对齐仍然是一个根本性挑战。现有方法在建立详细运动-语言对齐方面存在不足，且存在注意力沉没现象（注意力过度集中在起始文本标记），限制了信息性文本线索的利用。
AI.method: 提出MLA-Gen框架：1）整合全局运动先验与细粒度局部条件，捕捉常见运动模式并建立详细对齐；2）引入SinkRatio度量来量化注意力集中程度；3）开发对齐感知掩码和控制策略来调节生成过程中的注意力分布。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法在多个基准测试中持续优于强基线方法，显著提升了运动质量和运动-语言对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: MLA-Gen通过解决运动-语言对齐问题和注意力沉没现象，为文本驱动的人体运动生成提供了更有效的解决方案，在运动质量和语义对齐方面取得了显著改进。

title: InCoder-32B-Thinking: Industrial Code World Model for Thinking
summary: Industrial software development across chip design, GPU optimization, and embedded systems lacks expert reasoning traces showing how engineers reason about hardware constraints and timing semantics. In this work, we propose InCoder-32B-Thinking, trained on the data from the Error-driven Chain-of-Thought (ECoT) synthesis framework with an industrial code world model (ICWM) to generate reasoning traces. Specifically, ECoT generates reasoning chains by synthesizing the thinking content from multi-turn dialogue with environmental error feedback, explicitly modeling the error-correction process. ICWM is trained on domain-specific execution traces from Verilog simulation, GPU profiling, etc., learns the causal dynamics of how code affects hardware behavior, and enables self-verification by predicting execution outcomes before actual compilation. All synthesized reasoning traces are validated through domain toolchains, creating training data matching the natural reasoning depth distribution of industrial tasks. Evaluation on 14 general (81.3% on LiveCodeBench v5) and 9 industrial benchmarks (84.0% in CAD-Coder and 38.0% on KernelBench) shows InCoder-32B-Thinking achieves top-tier open-source results across all domains.GPU Optimization

AI.tldr: InCoder-32B-Thinking：基于ECoT合成框架和工业代码世界模型训练的代码生成模型，在通用和工业基准测试中取得顶级开源结果
AI.motivation: 工业软件开发（芯片设计、GPU优化、嵌入式系统）缺乏专家推理轨迹，无法展示工程师如何推理硬件约束和时序语义
AI.method: 1. ECoT（错误驱动思维链）框架：通过多轮对话与环境错误反馈合成推理链，显式建模错误修正过程；2. ICWM（工业代码世界模型）：基于Verilog仿真、GPU分析等特定领域执行轨迹训练，学习代码如何影响硬件行为的因果动态，实现编译前执行结果预测的自我验证；3. 所有合成推理轨迹通过领域工具链验证，创建匹配工业任务自然推理深度分布的训练数据
AI.result: 在14个通用基准测试（LiveCodeBench v5上81.3%）和9个工业基准测试（CAD-Coder上84.0%，KernelBench上38.0%）中，InCoder-32B-Thinking在所有领域均取得顶级开源结果
AI.conclusion: 通过ECoT合成框架和ICWM的结合，成功生成了高质量的专家推理轨迹，显著提升了工业代码生成任务的性能

title: An Open-Source LiDAR and Monocular Off-Road Autonomous Navigation Stack
summary: Off-road autonomous navigation demands reliable 3D perception for robust obstacle detection in challenging unstructured terrain. While LiDAR is accurate, it is costly and power-intensive. Monocular depth estimation using foundation models offers a lightweight alternative, but its integration into outdoor navigation stacks remains underexplored. We present an open-source off-road navigation stack supporting both LiDAR and monocular 3D perception without task-specific training. For the monocular setup, we combine zero-shot depth prediction (Depth Anything V2) with metric depth rescaling using sparse SLAM measurements (VINS-Mono). Two key enhancements improve robustness: edge-masking to reduce obstacle hallucination and temporal smoothing to mitigate the impact of SLAM instability. The resulting point cloud is used to generate a robot-centric 2.5D elevation map for costmap-based planning. Evaluated in photorealistic simulations (Isaac Sim) and real-world unstructured environments, the monocular configuration matches high-resolution LiDAR performance in most scenarios, demonstrating that foundation-model-based monocular depth estimation is a viable LiDAR alternative for robust off-road navigation. By open-sourcing the navigation stack and the simulation environment, we provide a complete pipeline for off-road navigation as well as a reproducible benchmark. Code available at https://github.com/LARIAD/Offroad-Nav.

AI.tldr: 提出一个开源越野导航系统，支持LiDAR和单目3D感知，无需任务特定训练，通过Depth Anything V2和VINS-Mono结合实现单目深度估计，在模拟和真实环境中性能接近高分辨率LiDAR。
AI.motivation: 越野自主导航需要可靠的3D感知，但LiDAR成本高、功耗大。基于基础模型的单目深度估计提供了轻量级替代方案，但其在户外导航系统中的集成尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 结合零样本深度预测（Depth Anything V2）和稀疏SLAM测量（VINS-Mono）进行度量深度重标定。采用边缘掩蔽减少障碍物幻觉，时间平滑缓解SLAM不稳定性。生成机器人中心2.5D高程图用于基于代价地图的规划。
AI.result: 在逼真模拟（Isaac Sim）和真实非结构化环境中评估，单目配置在大多数场景中匹配高分辨率LiDAR性能，证明基于基础模型的单目深度估计是越野导航中可行的LiDAR替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过开源导航栈和仿真环境，为越野导航提供了完整管道和可复现基准，展示了单目深度估计在越野导航中的实际可行性。

title: Visual Prototype Conditioned Focal Region Generation for UAV-Based Object Detection
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) based object detection is a critical but challenging task, when applied in dynamically changing scenarios with limited annotated training data. Layout-to-image generation approaches have proved effective in promoting detection accuracy by synthesizing labeled images based on diffusion models. However, they suffer from frequently producing artifacts, especially near layout boundaries of tiny objects, thus substantially limiting their performance. To address these issues, we propose UAVGen, a novel layout-to-image generation framework tailored for UAV-based object detection. Specifically, UAVGen designs a Visual Prototype Conditioned Diffusion Model (VPC-DM) that constructs representative instances for each class and integrates them into latent embeddings for high-fidelity object generation. Moreover, a Focal Region Enhanced Data Pipeline (FRE-DP) is introduced to emphasize object-concentrated foreground regions in synthesis, combined with a label refinement to correct missing, extra and misaligned generations. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, and consistently promotes accuracy when integrated with distinct detectors. The source code is available at https://github.com/Sirius-Li/UAVGen.

AI.tldr: UAVGen：针对无人机目标检测的布局到图像生成框架，通过视觉原型条件扩散模型和焦点区域增强数据管道解决小目标边界伪影问题
AI.motivation: 无人机目标检测在动态变化场景和有限标注数据下面临挑战。现有基于扩散模型的布局到图像生成方法在微小目标边界处容易产生伪影，严重影响检测性能
AI.method: 提出UAVGen框架：1）视觉原型条件扩散模型（VPC-DM），为每个类别构建代表性实例并集成到潜在嵌入中实现高保真目标生成；2）焦点区域增强数据管道（FRE-DP），强调合成中目标集中的前景区域；3）标签细化机制，纠正缺失、多余和未对齐的生成结果
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进方法，与不同检测器集成时能持续提升检测精度
AI.conclusion: UAVGen通过创新的视觉原型条件和焦点区域增强机制，有效解决了无人机目标检测中布局到图像生成的伪影问题，为有限标注数据下的目标检测提供了有效解决方案

title: AI-Assisted Unit Test Writing and Test-Driven Code Refactoring: A Case Study
summary: Many software systems originate as prototypes or minimum viable products (MVPs), developed with an emphasis on delivery speed and responsiveness to changing requirements rather than long-term code maintainability. While effective for rapid delivery, this approach can result in codebases that are difficult to modify, presenting a significant opportunity cost in the era of AI-assisted or even AI-led programming. In this paper, we present a case study of using coding models for automated unit test generation and subsequent safe refactoring, with proposed code changes validated by passing tests. The study examines best practices for iteratively generating tests to capture existing system behavior, followed by model-assisted refactoring under developer supervision. We describe how this workflow constrained refactoring changes, the errors and limitations observed in both phases, the efficiency gains achieved, when manual intervention was necessary, and how we addressed the weak value misalignment we observed in models. Using this approach, we generated nearly 16,000 lines of reliable unit tests in hours rather than weeks, achieved up to 78\% branch coverage in critical modules, and significantly reduced regression risk during large-scale refactoring. These results illustrate software engineering's shift toward an empirical science, emphasizing data collection and constraining mechanisms that support fast, safe iteration.

AI.tldr: 使用AI编码模型进行自动化单元测试生成和安全重构的案例研究，展示了在原型系统向可维护代码库转型中的高效应用
AI.motivation: 许多软件系统起源于原型或MVP，注重交付速度而非长期代码可维护性，导致代码库难以修改，这在AI辅助编程时代带来了显著的机会成本
AI.method: 采用编码模型进行自动化单元测试生成和后续安全重构的案例研究方法，通过迭代生成测试捕获现有系统行为，然后在开发者监督下进行模型辅助重构，使用通过的测试验证代码变更
AI.result: 在数小时内生成了近16,000行可靠的单元测试（而非数周），关键模块达到78%的分支覆盖率，大规模重构期间显著降低了回归风险
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了软件工程向实证科学的转变，强调数据收集和约束机制，支持快速、安全的迭代开发，同时解决了观察到的模型弱价值对齐问题

title: Flash-Mono: Feed-Forward Accelerated Gaussian Splatting Monocular SLAM
summary: Monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting SLAM suffers from critical limitations in time efficiency, geometric accuracy, and multi-view consistency. These issues stem from the time-consuming $\textit{Train-from-Scratch}$ optimization and the lack of inter-frame scale consistency from single-frame geometry priors. We contend that a feed-forward paradigm, leveraging multi-frame context to predict Gaussian attributes directly, is crucial for addressing these challenges. We present Flash-Mono, a system composed of three core modules: a feed-forward prediction frontend, a 2D Gaussian Splatting mapping backend, and an efficient hidden-state-based loop closure module. We trained a recurrent feed-forward frontend model that progressively aggregates multi-frame visual features into a hidden state via cross attention and jointly predicts camera poses and per-pixel Gaussian properties. By directly predicting Gaussian attributes, our method bypasses the burdensome per-frame optimization required in optimization-based GS-SLAM, achieving a $\textbf{10x}$ speedup while ensuring high-quality rendering. The power of our recurrent architecture extends beyond efficient prediction.
