Consequently, existing VLA systems are forced into suboptimal compromises: directly adopting 2D Vision-Language Models yields limited spatial perception, whereas enhancing them with 3D spatial representations often impairs the native reasoning capacity of VLMs. We argue that this dilemma largely stems from the coupled optimization of spatial perception and semantic reasoning within shared model parameters. To overcome this, we propose UniDriveVLA, a Unified Driving Vision-Language-Action model based on Mixture-of-Transformers that addresses the perception-reasoning conflict via expert decoupling. Specifically, it comprises three experts for driving understanding, scene perception, and action planning, which are coordinated through masked joint attention. In addition, we combine a sparse perception paradigm with a three-stage progressive training strategy to improve spatial perception while maintaining semantic reasoning capability. Extensive experiments show that UniDriveVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance in open-loop evaluation on nuScenes and closed-loop evaluation on Bench2Drive. Moreover, it demonstrates strong performance across a broad range of perception, prediction, and understanding tasks, including 3D detection, online mapping, motion forecasting, and driving-oriented VQA, highlighting its broad applicability as a unified model for autonomous driving. Code and model have been released at https://github.com/xiaomi-research/unidrivevla

AI.tldr: UniDriveVLA通过专家解耦的Mixture-of-Transformers架构解决了自动驾驶VLA模型中空间感知与语义推理的冲突，在保持语义推理能力的同时提升了空间感知性能。
AI.motivation: 当前自动驾驶中的视觉-语言-动作模型面临空间感知与语义推理的权衡困境：直接采用2D VLM空间感知有限，而增强3D空间表示又会损害VLM的原生推理能力。这种冲突源于空间感知和语义推理在共享模型参数中的耦合优化。
AI.method: 提出UniDriveVLA统一驾驶模型，基于Mixture-of-Transformers架构，通过专家解耦解决感知-推理冲突。包含三个专家：驾驶理解专家、场景感知专家和动作规划专家，通过掩码联合注意力协调。结合稀疏感知范式和三阶段渐进训练策略，在保持语义推理能力的同时提升空间感知。
AI.result: 在nuScenes的开环评估和Bench2Drive的闭环评估中达到最先进性能。在3D检测、在线建图、运动预测和驾驶导向VQA等广泛任务上表现出色，展示了作为自动驾驶统一模型的广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: UniDriveVLA通过专家解耦架构成功解决了VLA模型中的感知-推理冲突，实现了空间感知和语义推理能力的平衡，为自动驾驶提供了一个强大且通用的统一模型框架。

title: MOMO: Mars Orbital Model Foundation Model for Mars Orbital Applications
summary: We introduce MOMO, the first multi-sensor foundation model for Mars remote sensing. MOMO uses model merge to integrate representations learned independently from three key Martian sensors (HiRISE, CTX, and THEMIS), spanning resolutions from 0.25 m/pixel to 100 m/pixel. Central to our method is our novel Equal Validation Loss (EVL) strategy, which aligns checkpoints across sensors based on validation loss similarity before fusion via task arithmetic. This ensures models are merged at compatible convergence stages, leading to improved stability and generalization. We train MOMO on a large-scale, high-quality corpus of $\sim 12$ million samples curated from Mars orbital data and evaluate it on 9 downstream tasks from Mars-Bench. MOMO achieves better overall performance compared to ImageNet pre-trained, earth observation foundation model, sensor-specific pre-training, and fully-supervised baselines. Particularly on segmentation tasks, MOMO shows consistent and significant performance improvement. Our results demonstrate that model merging through an optimal checkpoint selection strategy provides an effective approach for building foundation models for multi-resolution data. The model weights, pretraining code, pretraining data, and evaluation code are available at: https://github.com/kerner-lab/MOMO.

AI.tldr: MOMO是首个火星遥感多传感器基础模型，通过模型融合整合了HiRISE、CTX和THEMIS三种火星传感器的表示学习，采用新颖的等验证损失策略进行融合，在9个下游任务上超越现有基准。
AI.motivation: 火星遥感数据来自多种传感器，具有不同的空间分辨率（0.25-100米/像素），现有方法难以有效整合这些多分辨率数据。需要开发能够统一处理多传感器火星数据的基础模型。
AI.method: 使用模型融合技术整合三种火星传感器（HiRISE、CTX、THEMIS）独立学习的表示。核心创新是等验证损失策略，基于验证损失相似性对齐不同传感器的检查点，然后通过任务算术进行融合，确保模型在兼容的收敛阶段合并。
AI.result: 在约1200万样本的大规模高质量火星轨道数据上训练，在Mars-Bench的9个下游任务上评估。MOMO在整体性能上优于ImageNet预训练、地球观测基础模型、传感器特定预训练和完全监督基线。在分割任务上表现尤为突出，显示出持续且显著的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过最优检查点选择策略进行模型融合，为构建多分辨率数据基础模型提供了有效方法。该方法能提高稳定性和泛化能力，为火星遥感分析提供了强大的基础模型工具。

title: A Unified Perspective on Adversarial Membership Manipulation in Vision Models
summary: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) aim to determine whether a specific data point was part of a model's training set, serving as effective tools for evaluating privacy leakage of vision models. However, existing MIAs implicitly assume honest query inputs, and their adversarial robustness remains unexplored. We show that MIAs for vision models expose a previously overlooked adversarial surface: adversarial membership manipulation, where imperceptible perturbations can reliably push non-member images into the "member" region of state-of-the-art MIAs. In this paper, we provide the first unified perspective on this phenomenon by analyzing its mechanism and implications. We begin by demonstrating that adversarial membership fabrication is consistently effective across diverse architectures and datasets. We then reveal a distinctive geometric signature - a characteristic gradient-norm collapse trajectory - that reliably separates fabricated from true members despite their nearly identical semantic representations. Building on this insight, we introduce a principled detection strategy grounded in gradient-geometry signals and develop a robust inference framework that substantially mitigates adversarial manipulation. Extensive experiments show that fabrication is broadly effective, while our detection and robust inference strategies significantly enhance resilience. This work establishes the first comprehensive framework for adversarial membership manipulation in vision models.

AI.tldr: 论文首次系统研究视觉模型中成员推断攻击的对抗鲁棒性问题，发现对抗性成员操纵现象，并提出基于梯度几何特征的检测方法和鲁棒推断框架。
AI.motivation: 现有成员推断攻击（MIAs）假设查询输入是诚实的，其对抗鲁棒性尚未被探索。作者发现MIAs存在一个被忽视的对抗攻击面：对抗性成员操纵，即通过微小扰动可将非成员图像可靠地推入"成员"区域。
AI.method: 1. 首先证明对抗性成员伪造在不同架构和数据集上普遍有效；2. 揭示梯度范数塌缩轨迹这一独特的几何特征，用于区分伪造成员与真实成员；3. 基于梯度几何信号设计原则性检测策略；4. 开发鲁棒推断框架以减轻对抗操纵。
AI.result: 实验表明：1. 对抗性成员伪造广泛有效；2. 提出的检测方法能可靠区分伪造成员与真实成员；3. 鲁棒推断策略显著增强了对对抗操纵的抵抗力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了视觉模型中对抗性成员操纵的第一个全面框架，揭示了成员推断攻击的对抗脆弱性，并提供了基于梯度几何特征的检测和防御方法，为评估视觉模型隐私泄露提供了更鲁棒的框架。

title: Backup-Based Safety Filters: A Comparative Review of Backup CBF, Model Predictive Shielding, and gatekeeper
summary: This paper revisits three backup-based safety filters -- Backup Control Barrier Functions (Backup CBF), Model Predictive Shielding (MPS), and gatekeeper -- through a unified comparative framework. Using a common safety-filter abstraction and shared notation, we make explicit both their common backup-policy structure and their key algorithmic differences. We compare the three methods through their filter-inactive sets, i.e., the states where the nominal policy is left unchanged. In particular, we show that MPS is a special case of gatekeeper, and we further relate gatekeeper to the interior of the Backup CBF inactive set within the implicit safe set. This unified view also highlights a key source of conservatism in backup-based safety filters: safety is often evaluated through the feasibility of a backup maneuver, rather than through the nominal policy's continued safe execution. The paper is intended as a compact tutorial and review that clarifies the theoretical connections and differences among these methods.

AI.tldr: 本文通过统一框架比较三种基于备份的安全滤波器方法（Backup CBF、MPS、gatekeeper），揭示其共同结构和关键差异，并指出基于备份的安全滤波器保守性的根源。
AI.motivation: 现有基于备份的安全滤波器方法（Backup CBF、MPS、gatekeeper）虽然都采用相似的安全保障机制，但缺乏统一的理论框架进行比较分析。本文旨在建立统一框架，明确这些方法的共同结构和关键差异，澄清它们之间的理论联系。
AI.method: 采用统一的安全滤波器抽象和共享符号体系，通过滤波器非激活集（即名义策略保持不变的状态集合）来比较三种方法。特别地，证明了MPS是gatekeeper的特例，并将gatekeeper与Backup CBF在隐式安全集内的非激活集内部联系起来。
AI.result: 建立了三种方法的统一比较框架，揭示了它们共同的备份策略结构和关键算法差异。证明了MPS是gatekeeper的特殊情况，并阐明了gatekeeper与Backup CBF非激活集之间的关系。同时指出了基于备份的安全滤波器保守性的关键来源：安全评估通常通过备份操作的可行性而非名义策略的持续安全执行。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个紧凑的教程和综述，澄清了三种基于备份的安全滤波器方法之间的理论联系和差异。统一框架不仅揭示了它们的共同结构，还指出了基于备份方法固有的保守性根源，为未来安全滤波器设计提供了理论指导。

title: Generative Frontiers: Why Evaluation Matters for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models have seen exciting recent progress, offering far more flexibility in generative trajectories than autoregressive models. This flexibility has motivated a growing body of research into new approaches to diffusion language modeling, which typically begins at the scale of GPT-2 small (150 million parameters). However, these advances introduce new issues with evaluation methodology. In this technical note, we discuss the limitations of current methodology and propose principled augmentations to ensure reliable comparisons. We first discuss why OpenWebText has become the standard benchmark, and why alternatives such as LM1B are inherently less meaningful. We then discuss the limitations of likelihood evaluations for diffusion models, and explain why relying on generative perplexity alone as a metric can lead to uninformative results. To address this, we show that generative perplexity and entropy are two components of the KL divergence to a reference distribution. This decomposition explains generative perplexity's sensitivity to entropy, and naturally suggests generative frontiers as a principled method for evaluating model generative quality. We conclude with empirical observations on model quality at this scale. We include a blog post with interactive content to illustrate the argument at https://patrickpynadath1.github.io/blog/eval_methodology/.

AI.tldr: 该技术笔记讨论了扩散语言模型评估方法的局限性，提出了基于KL散度分解的生成边界评估框架，以解决生成困惑度作为单一指标的不足。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型在生成轨迹上比自回归模型更灵活，但新的建模方法带来了评估方法学的问题。当前评估方法存在局限性，需要建立更可靠的比较标准。
AI.method: 1) 分析OpenWebText成为标准基准的原因及LM1B等替代方案的不足；2) 讨论似然评估对扩散模型的局限性；3) 展示生成困惑度和熵是KL散度的两个组成部分；4) 提出生成边界作为评估模型生成质量的原理性方法。
AI.result: 通过KL散度分解解释了生成困惑度对熵的敏感性，自然推导出生成边界作为评估模型生成质量的原理性方法。提供了该规模下模型质量的实证观察。
AI.conclusion: 需要采用更原理性的评估方法来确保扩散语言模型的可靠比较，生成边界框架为解决当前评估方法学问题提供了理论基础。

title: Generalized Small Object Detection:A Point-Prompted Paradigm and Benchmark
summary: Small object detection (SOD) remains challenging due to extremely limited pixels and ambiguous object boundaries. These characteristics lead to challenging annotation, limited availability of large-scale high-quality datasets, and inherently weak semantic representations for small objects. In this work, we first address the data limitation by introducing TinySet-9M, the first large-scale, multi-domain dataset for small object detection. Beyond filling the gap in large-scale datasets, we establish a benchmark to evaluate the effectiveness of existing label-efficient detection methods for small objects. Our evaluation reveals that weak visual cues further exacerbate the performance degradation of label-efficient methods in small object detection, highlighting a critical challenge in label-efficient SOD. Secondly, to tackle the limitation of insufficient semantic representation, we move beyond training-time feature enhancement and propose a new paradigm termed Point-Prompt Small Object Detection (P2SOD). This paradigm introduces sparse point prompts at inference time as an efficient information bridge for category-level localization, enabling semantic augmentation. Building upon the P2SOD paradigm and the large-scale TinySet-9M dataset, we further develop DEAL (DEtect Any smalL object), a scalable and transferable point-prompted detection framework that learns robust, prompt-conditioned representations from large-scale data. With only a single click at inference time, DEAL achieves a 31.4% relative improvement over fully supervised baselines under strict localization metrics (e.g., AP75) on TinySet-9M, while generalizing effectively to unseen categories and unseen datasets. Our project is available at https://zhuhaoraneis.github.io/TinySet-9M/.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对小目标检测的挑战，提出了首个大规模多领域数据集TinySet-9M，并开发了点提示小目标检测范式P2SOD及DEAL框架，显著提升了小目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 小目标检测面临像素有限、边界模糊、标注困难、高质量数据集稀缺以及语义表示弱等挑战，现有标签高效方法在小目标上性能下降严重，需要新的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 构建TinySet-9M大规模多领域小目标检测数据集；2) 提出点提示小目标检测范式P2SOD，在推理时引入稀疏点提示作为类别级定位的信息桥梁；3) 基于P2SOD和TinySet-9M开发DEAL框架，学习鲁棒的提示条件表示。
AI.result: DEAL在TinySet-9M上仅需推理时单次点击，就在严格定位指标AP75上相对全监督基线提升31.4%，同时在未见类别和未见数据集上表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过构建大规模数据集和提出点提示检测范式，有效解决了小目标检测的数据限制和语义表示不足问题，为标签高效的小目标检测提供了新方向。

title: PRO-SPECT: Probabilistically Safe Scalable Planning for Energy-Aware Coordinated UAV-UGV Teams in Stochastic Environments
summary: We consider energy-aware planning for an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) and unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) team operating in a stochastic environment. The UAV must visit a set of air points in minimum time while respecting energy constraints, relying on the UGV as a mobile charging station. Unlike prior work that assumed deterministic travel times or used fixed robustness margins, we model travel times as random variables and bound the probability of failure (energy depletion) across the entire mission to a user-specified risk level. We formulate the problem as a Mixed-Integer Program and propose PRO-SPECT, a polynomial-time algorithm that generates risk-bounded plans. The algorithm supports both offline planning and online re-planning, enabling the team to adapt to disturbances while preserving the risk bound. We provide theoretical results on solution feasibility and time complexity. We also demonstrate the performance of our method via numerical comparisons and simulations.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种用于无人机-无人车协同系统的风险感知能量规划方法，在随机环境中为无人机规划访问空中点的最短时间路径，同时将能量耗尽概率限制在用户指定的风险水平内。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常假设确定性旅行时间或使用固定的鲁棒性边界，而实际环境中旅行时间是随机的。需要一种能够建模随机旅行时间并将整个任务失败概率限制在指定风险水平内的规划方法。
AI.method: 将问题建模为混合整数规划，提出PRO-SPECT多项式时间算法生成风险有界计划。算法支持离线规划和在线重规划，使团队能够在保持风险边界的同时适应干扰。
AI.result: 提供了解决方案可行性和时间复杂度的理论结果。通过数值比较和仿真展示了方法的性能，证明能够在随机环境中有效管理能量风险。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无人机-无人车团队在随机环境中的能量感知规划提供了理论框架和实用算法，能够保证任务失败概率不超过用户指定的风险水平，同时支持动态环境中的适应性重规划。

title: FluxMoE: Decoupling Expert Residency for High-Performance MoE Serving
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have become a dominant paradigm for scaling large language models, but their rapidly growing parameter sizes introduce a fundamental inefficiency during inference: most expert weights remain idle in GPU memory while competing with performance-critical runtime state such as the key-value (KV) cache. Since KV cache capacity directly determines serving throughput, this mismatch leads to underutilized memory and degraded performance. In this paper, we present FluxMoE, a new MoE inference system that decouples expert parameters from persistent GPU residency. FluxMoE introduces an expert paging abstraction that treats expert weights as streamed, transient resources, materializing them on demand and evicting them immediately after use, allowing GPU memory to be preferentially allocated to throughput-critical runtime state. We implement FluxMoE atop vLLM to enable efficient MoE inference under severe memory constraints. Experimental results demonstrate that FluxMoE achieves up to 3.0$\times$ throughput gains over vLLM in memory-intensive regimes, without compromising model fidelity.

AI.tldr: FluxMoE：一种新的MoE推理系统，通过专家分页抽象将专家权重从GPU常驻内存中解耦，按需加载并立即驱逐，优先分配内存给KV缓存，在内存受限环境下实现高达3倍吞吐量提升。
AI.motivation: MoE模型参数规模快速增长导致推理效率低下：大部分专家权重在GPU内存中闲置，与性能关键的KV缓存竞争内存空间。KV缓存容量直接影响服务吞吐量，这种内存不匹配导致内存利用率低和性能下降。
AI.method: 提出FluxMoE系统，引入专家分页抽象，将专家权重视为流式、瞬态资源，按需在GPU上实例化并在使用后立即驱逐，优先分配GPU内存给吞吐量关键的运行时状态（如KV缓存）。系统基于vLLM实现，支持内存受限环境下的高效MoE推理。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，FluxMoE在内存密集型场景下相比vLLM实现高达3.0倍的吞吐量提升，且不损害模型保真度。
AI.conclusion: FluxMoE通过解耦专家参数与GPU常驻内存，解决了MoE推理中的内存效率瓶颈，为大规模MoE模型的高效部署提供了新范式。

title: InverseDraping: Recovering Sewing Patterns from 3D Garment Surfaces via BoxMesh Bridging
summary: Recovering sewing patterns from draped 3D garments is a challenging problem in human digitization research. In contrast to the well-studied forward process of draping designed sewing patterns using mature physical simulation engines, the inverse process of recovering parametric 2D patterns from deformed garment geometry remains fundamentally ill-posed for existing methods. We propose a two-stage framework that centers on a structured intermediate representation, BoxMesh, which serves as the key to bridging the gap between 3D garment geometry and parametric sewing patterns. BoxMesh encodes both garment-level geometry and panel-level structure in 3D, while explicitly disentangling intrinsic panel geometry and stitching topology from draping-induced deformations. This representation imposes a physically grounded structure on the problem, significantly reducing ambiguity. In Stage I, a geometry-driven autoregressive model infers BoxMesh from the input 3D garment. In Stage II, a semantics-aware autoregressive model parses BoxMesh into parametric sewing patterns. We adopt autoregressive modeling to naturally handle the variable-length and structured nature of panel configurations and stitching relationships. This decomposition separates geometric inversion from structured pattern inference, leading to more accurate and robust recovery. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the GarmentCodeData benchmark and generalizes effectively to real-world scans and single-view images.

AI.tldr: 提出BoxMesh中间表示的两阶段框架，从3D服装几何恢复参数化缝纫纸样
AI.motivation: 从变形的3D服装几何恢复参数化2D纸样是一个病态问题，现有方法难以解决。需要建立3D几何与参数化纸样之间的桥梁。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：第一阶段使用几何驱动的自回归模型从输入3D服装推断BoxMesh中间表示；第二阶段使用语义感知的自回归模型将BoxMesh解析为参数化缝纫纸样。BoxMesh编码服装级几何和面板级结构，同时显式解耦内在面板几何、缝合拓扑与悬垂变形。
AI.result: 在GarmentCodeData基准测试中达到最先进性能，并能有效泛化到真实世界扫描和单视图图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过BoxMesh结构化中间表示将几何反演与结构化纸样推断分离，实现了更准确、鲁棒的缝纫纸样恢复，解决了从3D服装几何恢复参数化纸样的病态问题。

title: One Model to Translate Them All? A Journey to Mount Doom for Multilingual Model Merging
summary: Weight-space model merging combines independently fine-tuned models without accessing original training data, offering a practical alternative to joint training. While merging succeeds in multitask settings, its behavior in multilingual contexts remains poorly understood. We systematically study weight-space merging for multilingual machine translation by fully fine-tuning language model on large-scale bilingual corpora and evaluating standard merging strategies. Our experiments reveal that merging degrades performance, especially when target languages differ. To explain this failure, we analyze internal representations using span-conditioned neuron selectivity and layer-wise centered kernel alignment. We find that language-specific neurons concentrate in embedding layers and upper transformer blocks, while intermediate layers remain largely shared across languages. Critically, fine-tuning redistributes rather than sharpens language selectivity: neurons for supervised and related languages become less exclusive, while those for unsupervised languages grow more isolated. This redistribution increases representational divergence in higher layers that govern generation. These findings suggest that multilingual fine-tuning may reshape geometry in ways that reduce compatibility with standard weight-space merging assumptions. Our work thus provides an explanation for why merging fails in multilingual translation scenarios.

AI.tldr: 多语言机器翻译中的权重空间模型合并会降低性能，尤其是在目标语言不同时，原因是微调改变了语言选择性的分布而非增强它
AI.motivation: 研究多语言机器翻译中权重空间模型合并的行为，因为虽然合并在多任务设置中成功，但在多语言环境中的表现仍不清楚
AI.method: 通过在大规模双语语料库上完全微调语言模型，评估标准合并策略，并使用跨度条件神经元选择性和层间中心核对齐分析内部表示
AI.result: 合并会降低性能，特别是当目标语言不同时；语言特异性神经元集中在嵌入层和上层transformer块，而中间层主要共享；微调重新分布而非增强语言选择性
AI.conclusion: 多语言微调可能以降低与标准权重空间合并假设兼容性的方式重塑几何结构，这解释了为什么合并在多语言翻译场景中失败

title: ROS 2-Based LiDAR Perception Framework for Mobile Robots in Dynamic Production Environments, Utilizing Synthetic Data Generation, Transformation-Equivariant 3D Detection and Multi-Object Tracking
comment: Accepted for publication at CIRP ICME 2025; will appear in Procedia CIRP
summary: Adaptive robots in dynamic production environments require robust perception capabilities, including 6D pose estimation and multi-object tracking. To address limitations in real-world data dependency, noise robustness, and spatiotemporal consistency, a LiDAR framework based on the Robot Operating System integrating a synthetic-data-trained Transformation-Equivariant 3D Detection with multi-object-tracking leveraging center poses is proposed. Validated across 72 scenarios with motion capture technology, overall results yield an Intersection over Union of 62.6% for standalone pose estimation, rising to 83.12% with multi-object-tracking integration. Our LiDAR-based framework achieves 91.12% of Higher Order Tracking Accuracy, advancing robustness and versatility of LiDAR-based perception systems for industrial mobile manipulators.

AI.tldr: 提出基于ROS的LiDAR框架，结合合成数据训练的变换等变3D检测与基于中心位姿的多目标跟踪，提升工业移动机械臂感知系统的鲁棒性和时空一致性
AI.motivation: 动态生产环境中自适应机器人需要鲁棒的感知能力，包括6D位姿估计和多目标跟踪。现有方法存在对真实数据依赖、噪声鲁棒性不足和时空一致性差等局限
AI.method: 基于ROS的LiDAR框架，集成合成数据训练的变换等变3D检测方法，结合基于中心位姿的多目标跟踪技术
AI.result: 在72个场景中通过运动捕捉技术验证：单独位姿估计IoU为62.6%，结合多目标跟踪后提升至83.12%；LiDAR框架实现91.12%的高阶跟踪准确率
AI.conclusion: 该LiDAR框架显著提升了工业移动机械臂感知系统的鲁棒性和多功能性，为动态生产环境中的自适应机器人提供了有效的感知解决方案

title: Evaluating the Formal Reasoning Capabilities of Large Language Models through Chomsky Hierarchy
summary: The formal reasoning capabilities of LLMs are crucial for advancing automated software engineering. However, existing benchmarks for LLMs lack systematic evaluation based on computation and complexity, leaving a critical gap in understanding their formal reasoning capabilities. Therefore, it is still unknown whether SOTA LLMs can grasp the structured, hierarchical complexity of formal languages as defined by Computation Theory. To address this, we introduce ChomskyBench, a benchmark for systematically evaluating LLMs through the lens of Chomsky Hierarchy. Unlike prior work that uses vectorized classification for neural networks, ChomskyBench is the first to combine full Chomsky Hierarchy coverage, process-trace evaluation via natural language, and deterministic symbolic verifiability. ChomskyBench is composed of a comprehensive suite of language recognition and generation tasks designed to test capabilities at each level. Extensive experiments indicate a clear performance stratification that correlates with the hierarchy's levels of complexity. Our analysis reveals a direct relationship where increasing task difficulty substantially impacts both inference length and performance. Furthermore, we find that while larger models and advanced inference methods offer notable relative gains, they face severe efficiency barriers: achieving practical reliability would require prohibitive computational costs, revealing that current limitations stem from inefficiency rather than absolute capability bounds. A time complexity analysis further indicates that LLMs are significantly less efficient than traditional algorithmic programs for these formal tasks. These results delineate the practical limits of current LLMs, highlight the indispensability of traditional software tools, and provide insights to guide the development of future LLMs with more powerful formal reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: ChomskyBench：首个基于乔姆斯基层级理论系统评估LLM形式推理能力的基准，揭示LLM性能与计算复杂性层级的相关性及效率瓶颈
AI.motivation: 现有LLM基准缺乏基于计算理论和复杂性的系统评估，无法确定SOTA LLM是否能理解形式语言的结构化层次复杂性，需要填补这一关键空白
AI.method: 引入ChomskyBench基准，结合完整的乔姆斯基层级覆盖、通过自然语言进行过程追踪评估和确定性符号可验证性，设计语言识别和生成任务测试各层级能力
AI.result: 实验显示性能分层与复杂性层级相关；任务难度增加显著影响推理长度和性能；更大模型和高级推理方法虽有相对提升，但面临严重效率障碍，实现实用可靠性需要过高计算成本
AI.conclusion: LLM在形式任务上效率显著低于传统算法程序，当前限制源于效率而非绝对能力边界；结果界定了LLM实际限制，强调传统软件工具不可或缺性，为开发具有更强形式推理能力的未来LLM提供指导

title: DeCo-DETR: Decoupled Cognition DETR for efficient Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
summary: Open-vocabulary Object Detection (OVOD) enables models to recognize objects beyond predefined categories, but existing approaches remain limited in practical deployment. On the one hand, multimodal designs often incur substantial computational overhead due to their reliance on text encoders at inference time. On the other hand, tightly coupled training objectives introduce a trade-off between closed-set detection accuracy and open-world generalization. Thus, we propose Decoupled Cognition DETR (DeCo-DETR), a vision-centric framework that addresses these challenges through a unified decoupling paradigm. Instead of depending on online text encoding, DeCo-DETR constructs a hierarchical semantic prototype space from region-level descriptions generated by pre-trained LVLMs and aligned via CLIP, enabling efficient and reusable semantic representation. Building upon this representation, the framework further disentangles semantic reasoning from localization through a decoupled training strategy, which separates alignment and detection into parallel optimization streams. Extensive experiments on standard OVOD benchmarks demonstrate that DeCo-DETR achieves competitive zero-shot detection performance while significantly improving inference efficiency. These results highlight the effectiveness of decoupling semantic cognition from detection, offering a practical direction for scalable OVOD systems.

AI.tldr: DeCo-DETR：一种视觉中心的开词汇目标检测框架，通过解耦范式实现高效推理，避免推理时依赖文本编码器，同时平衡闭集检测精度与开放世界泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有开词汇目标检测方法存在两个主要问题：1）多模态设计在推理时依赖文本编码器导致计算开销大；2）紧密耦合的训练目标在闭集检测精度和开放世界泛化能力之间存在权衡。需要一种更实用、可部署的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出DeCo-DETR框架，采用统一解耦范式：1）构建分层语义原型空间，从预训练LVLMs生成的区域级描述中提取语义，通过CLIP对齐，实现高效可重用的语义表示；2）通过解耦训练策略将语义推理与定位分离，将对齐和检测分为并行优化流。
AI.result: 在标准OVOD基准测试中，DeCo-DETR实现了具有竞争力的零样本检测性能，同时显著提高了推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 将语义认知与检测解耦是有效的，为可扩展的开词汇目标检测系统提供了实用方向，平衡了性能与效率。

title: Cross-Modal Visuo-Tactile Object Perception
comment: 23 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. Submitted for review to journal
summary: Estimating physical properties is critical for safe and efficient autonomous robotic manipulation, particularly during contact-rich interactions. In such settings, vision and tactile sensing provide complementary information about object geometry, pose, inertia, stiffness, and contact dynamics, such as stick-slip behavior. However, these properties are only indirectly observable and cannot always be modeled precisely (e.g., deformation in non-rigid objects coupled with nonlinear contact friction), making the estimation problem inherently complex and requiring sustained exploitation of visuo-tactile sensory information during action. Existing visuo-tactile perception frameworks have primarily emphasized forceful sensor fusion or static cross-modal alignment, with limited consideration of how uncertainty and beliefs about object properties evolve over time. Inspired by human multi-sensory perception and active inference, we propose the Cross-Modal Latent Filter (CMLF) to learn a structured, causal latent state-space of physical object properties. CMLF supports bidirectional transfer of cross-modal priors between vision and touch and integrates sensory evidence through a Bayesian inference process that evolves over time. Real-world robotic experiments demonstrate that CMLF improves the efficiency and robustness of latent physical properties estimation under uncertainty compared to baseline approaches. Beyond performance gains, the model exhibits perceptual coupling phenomena analogous to those observed in humans, including susceptibility to cross-modal illusions and similar trajectories in learning cross-sensory associations. Together, these results constitutes a significant step toward generalizable, robust and physically consistent cross-modal integration for robotic multi-sensory perception.

AI.tldr: 提出跨模态潜在滤波器(CMLF)，通过贝叶斯推理学习物体物理属性的结构化因果潜在状态空间，实现视觉与触觉的双向跨模态先验传递，提升机器人多感官感知的鲁棒性和效率。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人操作需要准确估计物体物理属性以确保安全高效，但现有视觉-触觉感知框架主要强调强力传感器融合或静态跨模态对齐，缺乏对不确定性和物体属性信念随时间演化的考虑。
AI.method: 受人类多感官感知和主动推理启发，提出跨模态潜在滤波器(CMLF)，学习物理物体属性的结构化因果潜在状态空间，支持视觉与触觉间的双向跨模态先验传递，并通过随时间演化的贝叶斯推理过程整合感官证据。
AI.result: 真实机器人实验表明，CMLF在不确定性条件下比基线方法更高效、鲁棒地估计潜在物理属性。模型还表现出类似人类的感知耦合现象，包括对跨模态错觉的敏感性和跨感官关联学习的相似轨迹。
AI.conclusion: CMLF在实现通用、鲁棒且物理一致的机器人多感官跨模态集成方面迈出了重要一步，为接触丰富的自主操作提供了更可靠的物理属性估计框架。

title: LieTrunc-QNN: Lie Algebra Truncation and Quantum Expressivity Phase Transition from LiePrune to Provably Stable Quantum Neural Networks
summary:
Quantum Machine Learning (QML) is fundamentally limited by two challenges: barren plateaus (exponentially vanishing gradients) and the fragility of parameterized quantum circuits under noise. Despite extensive empirical studies, a unified theoretical framework remains lacking.
  We introduce LieTrunc-QNN, an algebraic-geometric framework that characterizes trainability via Lie-generated dynamics. Parameterized quantum circuits are modeled as Lie subalgebras of u(2^n), whose action induces a Riemannian manifold of reachable quantum states. Expressivity is reinterpreted as intrinsic manifold dimension and geometry.
  We establish a geometric capacity-plateau principle: increasing effective dimension leads to exponential gradient suppression due to concentration of measure. By restricting to structured Lie subalgebras (LieTrunc), the manifold is contracted, preventing concentration and preserving non-degenerate gradients.
  We prove two main results: (1) a trainability lower bound for LieTrunc-QNN, and (2) that the Fubini-Study metric rank is bounded by the algebraic span of generators, showing expressivity is governed by structure rather than parameter count. Compact Lie subalgebras also provide inherent robustness to perturbations.
  Importantly, we establish a polynomial trainability regime where gradient variance decays polynomially instead of exponentially.
  Experiments (n=2-6) validate the theory: LieTrunc-QNN maintains stable gradients and high effective dimension, while random truncation leads to metric rank collapse. At n=6, full metric rank is preserved (rank=16). Results support a scaling law between gradient variance and effective dimension.
  This work provides a unified geometric framework for QNN design, linking Lie algebra, manifold geometry, and optimization.

AI.tldr: LieTrunc-QNN：基于李代数截断的几何框架，解决量子机器学习中的梯度消失问题，通过结构化李子代数保持非退化梯度。
AI.motivation: 量子机器学习面临两个基本挑战：贫瘠高原（梯度指数消失）和参数化量子电路在噪声下的脆弱性。尽管有大量实证研究，但缺乏统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 引入LieTrunc-QNN代数几何框架，将参数化量子电路建模为u(2^n)的李子代数，其作用诱导可达量子态的黎曼流形。通过限制到结构化李子代数（LieTrunc）来收缩流形，防止测度集中并保持非退化梯度。
AI.result: 证明了两个主要结果：(1) LieTrunc-QNN的可训练性下界；(2) Fubini-Study度量秩受生成元代数张成的限制。建立了多项式可训练性机制，其中梯度方差多项式衰减而非指数衰减。实验验证了理论：LieTrunc-QNN保持稳定梯度和高有效维度。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为QNN设计提供了统一的几何框架，将李代数、流形几何和优化联系起来，解决了量子机器学习中的梯度消失问题。

title: Differentiable Stroke Planning with Dual Parameterization for Efficient and High-Fidelity Painting Creation
summary: In stroke-based rendering, search methods often get trapped in local minima due to discrete stroke placement, while differentiable optimizers lack structural awareness and produce unstructured layouts. To bridge this gap, we propose a dual representation that couples discrete polylines with continuous Bézier control points via a bidirectional mapping mechanism. This enables collaborative optimization: local gradients refine global stroke structures, while content-aware stroke proposals help escape poor local optima. Our representation further supports Gaussian-splatting-inspired initialization, enabling highly parallel stroke optimization across the image. Experiments show that our approach reduces the number of strokes by 30-50%, achieves more structurally coherent layouts, and improves reconstruction quality, while cutting optimization time by 30-40% compared to existing differentiable vectorization methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种双表示方法，将离散折线与连续Bézier控制点耦合，通过双向映射机制实现协同优化，改善笔划渲染中的局部极小值问题。
AI.motivation: 笔划渲染中，搜索方法常因离散笔划放置陷入局部极小值，而可微分优化器缺乏结构意识且产生非结构化布局。需要弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 提出双表示方法，通过双向映射机制耦合离散折线与连续Bézier控制点。支持局部梯度优化全局笔划结构，内容感知笔划提议帮助逃离不良局部最优。采用高斯泼溅启发的初始化，实现高度并行的笔划优化。
AI.result: 实验显示：笔划数量减少30-50%，获得更结构连贯的布局，改善重建质量，相比现有可微分矢量化方法优化时间减少30-40%。
AI.conclusion: 双表示方法通过离散-连续耦合实现协同优化，有效解决笔划渲染中的局部极小值问题，在笔划数量、结构连贯性、重建质量和优化效率方面均有显著提升。

title: EMS: Multi-Agent Voting via Efficient Majority-then-Stopping
summary: Majority voting is the standard for aggregating multi-agent responses into a final decision. However, traditional methods typically require all agents to complete their reasoning before aggregation begins, leading to significant computational overhead, as many responses become redundant once a majority consensus is achieved. In this work, we formulate the multi-agent voting as a reliability-aware agent scheduling problem, and propose an Efficient Majority-then-Stopping (EMS) to improve reasoning efficiency. EMS prioritizes agents based on task-aware reliability and terminates the reasoning pipeline the moment a majority is achieved from the following three critical components. Specifically, we introduce Agent Confidence Modeling (ACM) to estimate agent reliability using historical performance and semantic similarity, Adaptive Incremental Voting (AIV) to sequentially select agents with early stopping, and Individual Confidence Updating (ICU) to dynamically update the reliability of each contributing agent. Extensive evaluations across six benchmarks demonstrate that EMS consistently reduces the average number of invoked agents by 32%.

AI.tldr: EMS：一种高效的多智能体投票方法，通过可靠性感知的智能体调度和早期停止机制，在达成多数共识时立即终止推理过程，减少32%的智能体调用。
AI.motivation: 传统多数投票方法需要所有智能体完成推理才能聚合结果，导致大量计算开销，因为一旦达成多数共识，后续响应就变得冗余。需要提高多智能体投票的效率。
AI.method: 提出EMS框架，包含三个核心组件：1) ACM：基于历史性能和语义相似度估计智能体可靠性；2) AIV：基于可靠性的顺序选择智能体并实现早期停止；3) ICU：动态更新贡献智能体的可靠性。
AI.result: 在六个基准测试上的广泛评估表明，EMS能够持续减少平均调用的智能体数量达32%。
AI.conclusion: EMS通过将多智能体投票重新定义为可靠性感知的智能体调度问题，实现了高效的多数投票，在达成多数共识时立即停止推理过程，显著提高了计算效率。

title: HyVGGT-VO: Tightly Coupled Hybrid Dense Visual Odometry with Feed-Forward Models
summary: Dense visual odometry (VO), which provides pose estimation and dense 3D reconstruction, serves as the cornerstone for applications ranging from robotics to augmented reality. Recently, feed-forward models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in dense mapping. However, when these models are used in dense visual SLAM systems, their heavy computational burden restricts them to yielding sparse pose outputs at keyframes while still failing to achieve real-time pose estimation. In contrast, traditional sparse methods provide high computational efficiency and high-frequency pose outputs, but lack the capability for dense reconstruction. To address these limitations, we propose HyVGGT-VO, a novel framework that combines the computational efficiency of sparse VO with the dense reconstruction capabilities of feed-forward models. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to tightly couple a traditional VO framework with VGGT, a state-of-the-art feed-forward model. Specifically, we design an adaptive hybrid tracking frontend that dynamically switches between traditional optical flow and the VGGT tracking head to ensure robustness. Furthermore, we introduce a hierarchical optimization framework that jointly refines VO poses and the scale of VGGT predictions to ensure global scale consistency. Our approach achieves an approximately 5x processing speedup compared to existing VGGT-based methods, while reducing the average trajectory error by 85% on the indoor EuRoC dataset and 12% on the outdoor KITTI benchmark. Our code will be publicly available upon acceptance. Project page: https://geneta2580.github.io/HyVGGT-VO.io.

AI.tldr: HyVGGT-VO提出了一种结合稀疏VO计算效率与前馈模型密集重建能力的新型视觉里程计框架，通过自适应混合跟踪前端和分层优化实现实时高精度位姿估计与稠密重建。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈模型在稠密视觉SLAM中计算负担重，只能输出关键帧稀疏位姿且无法实时；传统稀疏方法计算效率高但缺乏稠密重建能力。需要结合两者优势解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 提出HyVGGT-VO框架：1) 自适应混合跟踪前端，动态切换传统光流与VGGT跟踪头确保鲁棒性；2) 分层优化框架，联合优化VO位姿和VGGT预测尺度保证全局尺度一致性。
AI.result: 相比现有VGGT方法处理速度提升约5倍，在室内EuRoC数据集上平均轨迹误差降低85%，在室外KITTI基准上降低12%。
AI.conclusion: HyVGGT-VO成功将传统VO框架与VGGT紧密耦合，首次实现了稀疏VO计算效率与前馈模型稠密重建能力的有效结合，为实时高精度稠密视觉里程计提供了新解决方案。

title: Adaptive Semantic Communication for Wireless Image Transmission Leveraging Mixture-of-Experts Mechanism
summary: Deep learning based semantic communication has achieved significant progress in wireless image transmission, but most existing schemes rely on fixed models and thus lack robustness to diverse image contents and dynamic channel conditions. To improve adaptability, recent studies have developed adaptive semantic communication strategies that adjust transmission or model behavior according to either source content or channel state. More recently, MoE-based semantic communication has emerged as a sparse and efficient adaptive architecture, although existing designs still mainly rely on single-driven routing. To address this limitation, we propose a novel multi-stage end-to-end image semantic communication system for multi-input multi-output (MIMO) channels, built upon an adaptive MoE Swin Transformer block. Specifically, we introduce a dynamic expert gating mechanism that jointly evaluates both real-time CSI and the semantic content of input image patches to compute adaptive routing probabilities. By selectively activating only a specialized subset of experts based on this joint condition, our approach breaks the rigid coupling of traditional adaptive methods and overcomes the bottlenecks of single-driven routing. Simulation results indicate a significant improvement in reconstruction quality over existing methods while maintaining the transmission efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出基于自适应MoE Swin Transformer的多阶段端到端图像语义通信系统，通过动态专家门控机制联合评估CSI和图像语义内容，实现高效自适应传输
AI.motivation: 现有语义通信方案大多依赖固定模型，缺乏对多样化图像内容和动态信道条件的鲁棒性；现有MoE方案主要依赖单驱动路由，存在局限性
AI.method: 基于自适应MoE Swin Transformer块构建多阶段端到端图像语义通信系统，引入动态专家门控机制联合评估实时CSI和输入图像块的语义内容，计算自适应路由概率，仅激活专业化专家子集
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，相比现有方法在重建质量上有显著提升，同时保持了传输效率
AI.conclusion: 提出的多驱动自适应MoE架构打破了传统自适应方法的刚性耦合，克服了单驱动路由的瓶颈，为MIMO信道下的图像语义通信提供了更鲁棒高效的解决方案

title: Visual Instruction-Finetuned Language Model for Versatile Brain MR Image Tasks
summary: LLMs have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in linguistic reasoning and are increasingly adept at vision-language tasks. The integration of image tokens into transformers has enabled direct visual input and output, advancing research from image-to-text descriptions to text-to-image generation. However, simple text-to-image generation holds limited clinical utility. In medical imaging, tasks such as image segmentation for localizing pathologies or image translation for reconstructing missing sequences have much greater clinical importance. Despite this, integrating these diverse, clinically relevant tasks within a single, versatile language model remains unexplored. Our method, LLaBIT (Large Language Model for Brain Image Translation), extends the visual reasoning of LLMs to these clinically meaningful tasks in the brain MRI domain. To mitigate the spatial information loss inherent in image tokenization, we incorporate a mechanism to reuse feature maps from the image encoder, minimizing data degradation. We also generate text data using LLMs with strict predefined instructions to augment limited image-text paired data in brain MRI. We comprehensively evaluated our method on five brain MRI datasets across four distinct tasks: report generation, visual question answering, image segmentation, and image translation. Our model not only demonstrated superior performance across all tasks but also outperformed specialized, task-specific models in direct comparisons, highlighting its efficacy and versatility

AI.tldr: LLaBIT：一种用于脑MRI多任务处理的大语言模型，扩展了LLMs的视觉推理能力，在报告生成、视觉问答、图像分割和图像翻译四个临床相关任务上表现优异
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs在视觉语言任务中取得进展，但简单的文本到图像生成临床价值有限。医学影像中，图像分割（定位病理）和图像翻译（重建缺失序列）等任务更具临床重要性，然而将这些多样化临床任务集成到单一通用语言模型中尚未探索
AI.method: 提出LLaBIT方法，通过重用图像编码器的特征图来缓解图像标记化过程中的空间信息损失，并使用LLMs按照严格预定义指令生成文本数据，以增强脑MRI中有限的图像-文本配对数据
AI.result: 在五个脑MRI数据集上对四个任务（报告生成、视觉问答、图像分割、图像翻译）进行全面评估，模型在所有任务上均表现出优越性能，并在直接比较中超越了专门的特定任务模型
AI.conclusion: LLaBIT成功将LLMs的视觉推理能力扩展到脑MRI领域的临床相关任务，证明了其有效性和多功能性，为医学影像分析提供了统一的解决方案

title: LLM+Graph@VLDB'2025 Workshop Summary
summary: The integration of large language models (LLMs) with graph-structured data has become a pivotal and fast evolving research frontier, drawing strong interest from both academia and industry. The 2nd LLM+Graph Workshop, co-located with the 51st International Conference on Very Large Data Bases (VLDB 2025) in London, focused on advancing algorithms and systems that bridge LLMs, graph data management, and graph machine learning for practical applications. This report highlights the key research directions, challenges, and innovative solutions presented by the workshop's speakers.

AI.tldr: 第二届LLM+Graph研讨会聚焦大语言模型与图结构数据融合的前沿研究，探讨算法与系统创新
AI.motivation: LLM与图结构数据的集成已成为快速发展的研究前沿，学术界和工业界对此表现出浓厚兴趣。需要推动LLM、图数据管理和图机器学习的交叉融合，以解决实际应用中的挑战。
AI.method: 通过举办第二届LLM+Graph研讨会（与VLDB 2025会议联合举办），汇集学术界和工业界专家，展示最新研究成果，讨论关键研究方向、挑战和创新解决方案。
AI.result: 研讨会成功突出了LLM+Graph领域的主要研究方向、面临的挑战以及提出的创新解决方案，促进了该领域的知识交流与合作。
AI.conclusion: LLM与图结构数据的融合是一个重要且快速发展的研究领域，研讨会为推进相关算法和系统的发展提供了重要平台，有助于推动实际应用的发展。

title: CompassAD: Intent-Driven 3D Affordance Grounding in Functionally Competing Objects
summary: When told to "cut the apple," a robot must choose the knife over nearby scissors, despite both objects affording the same cutting function. In real-world scenes, multiple objects may share identical affordances, yet only one is appropriate under the given task context. We call such cases confusing pairs. However, existing 3D affordance methods largely sidestep this challenge by evaluating isolated single objects, often with explicit category names provided in the query. We formalize Multi-Object Affordance Grounding under Intent-Driven Instructions, a new 3D affordance setting that requires predicting a per-point affordance mask on the correct object within a cluttered multi-object point cloud, conditioned on implicit natural language intent. To study this problem, we construct CompassAD, the first benchmark centered on implicit intent in confusable multi-object scenes. It comprises 30 confusing object pairs spanning 16 affordance types, 6,422 scenes, and 88K+ query-answer pairs. Furthermore, we propose CompassNet, a framework that incorporates two dedicated modules tailored to this task. Instance-bounded Cross Injection (ICI) constrains language-geometry alignment within object boundaries to prevent cross-object semantic leakage. Bi-level Contrastive Refinement (BCR) enforces discrimination at both geometric-group and point levels, sharpening distinctions between target and confusable surfaces. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art results on both seen and unseen queries, and deployment on a robotic manipulator confirms effective transfer to real-world grasping in confusing multi-object scenes.

AI.tldr: 提出Multi-Object Affordance Grounding under Intent-Driven Instructions新任务，构建CompassAD基准数据集，开发CompassNet框架解决多物体场景中混淆对的选择问题
AI.motivation: 现实场景中多个物体可能具有相同的功能可供性，但只有特定物体适合特定任务上下文（如"切苹果"时选刀而非剪刀）。现有3D可供性方法主要评估孤立单物体，且常依赖显式类别名称，无法处理这种混淆对场景。
AI.method: 提出CompassNet框架：1) Instance-bounded Cross Injection (ICI)模块将语言-几何对齐约束在物体边界内，防止跨物体语义泄漏；2) Bi-level Contrastive Refinement (BCR)模块在几何组和点级别强制区分，增强目标与混淆表面间的辨别能力。
AI.result: 构建CompassAD基准数据集（30个混淆物体对，16种可供性类型，6,422个场景，88K+查询-答案对）。实验显示在可见和未见查询上均达到最先进性能，在机器人机械臂上的部署验证了在真实混淆多物体场景中有效抓取的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作形式化了意图驱动指令下的多物体可供性接地任务，通过专用基准和框架解决了混淆对场景中的物体选择问题，为机器人理解自然语言意图并在复杂现实场景中执行任务提供了重要进展。

title: Beyond Semantic Manipulation: Token-Space Attacks on Reward Models
summary: Reward models (RMs) are widely used as optimization targets in reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), yet they remain vulnerable to reward hacking. Existing attacks mainly operate within the semantic space, constructing human-readable adversarial outputs that exploit RM biases. In this work, we introduce a fundamentally different paradigm: Token Mapping Perturbation Attack (TOMPA), a framework that performs adversarial optimization directly in token space. By bypassing the standard decode-re-tokenize interface between the policy and the reward model, TOMPA enables the attack policy to optimize over raw token sequences rather than coherent natural language. Using only black-box scalar feedback, TOMPA automatically discovers non-linguistic token patterns that elicit extremely high rewards across multiple state-of-the-art RMs. Specifically, when targeting Skywork-Reward-V2-Llama-3.1-8B, TOMPA nearly doubles the reward of GPT-5 reference answers and outperforms them on 98.0% of prompts. Despite these high scores, the generated outputs degenerate into nonsensical text, revealing that RMs can be systematically exploited beyond the semantic regime and exposing a critical vulnerability in current RLHF pipelines.

AI.tldr: TOMPA是一种新的对抗攻击框架，直接在令牌空间而非语义空间进行优化，通过绕过策略与奖励模型之间的解码-重新令牌化接口，发现能获得极高奖励的非语言令牌模式，揭示了当前RLHF流程中的关键漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击主要在语义空间操作，构建人类可读的对抗输出以利用奖励模型偏差。本文旨在探索一种根本不同的范式，直接在令牌空间进行对抗优化，以揭示奖励模型在语义空间之外的系统性漏洞。
AI.method: 提出Token Mapping Perturbation Attack (TOMPA)框架，绕过策略与奖励模型之间的标准解码-重新令牌化接口，使攻击策略能够在原始令牌序列而非连贯自然语言上进行优化。仅使用黑盒标量反馈，自动发现能引发极高奖励的非语言令牌模式。
AI.result: 针对Skywork-Reward-V2-Llama-3.1-8B模型，TOMPA几乎使GPT-5参考答案的奖励翻倍，并在98.0%的提示上优于GPT-5参考答案。尽管获得高分，生成的输出退化为无意义的文本，表明奖励模型可以在语义体系之外被系统性利用。
AI.conclusion: TOMPA暴露了当前RLHF流程中的关键漏洞，表明奖励模型不仅容易受到语义空间攻击，还可以通过直接令牌空间优化被系统性利用，这对基于奖励模型的强化学习安全性和鲁棒性提出了重要挑战。

title: O-ConNet: Geometry-Aware End-to-End Inference of Over-Constrained Spatial Mechanisms
summary: Deep learning has shown strong potential for scientific discovery, but its ability to model macroscopic rigid-body kinematic constraints remains underexplored. We study this problem on spatial over-constrained mechanisms and propose O-ConNet, an end-to-end framework that infers mechanism structural parameters from only three sparse reachable points while reconstructing the full motion trajectory, without explicitly solving constraint equations during inference. On a self-constructed Bennett 4R dataset of 42,860 valid samples, O-ConNet achieves Param-MAE 0.276 +/- 0.077 and Traj-MAE 0.145 +/- 0.018 (mean +/- std over 10 runs), outperforming the strongest sequence baseline (LSTM-Seq2Seq) by 65.1 percent and 88.2 percent, respectively. These results suggest that end-to-end learning can capture closed-loop geometric structure and provide a practical route for inverse design of spatial over-constrained mechanisms under extremely sparse observations.

AI.tldr: O-ConNet：一个端到端深度学习框架，仅从三个稀疏可达点推断空间过约束机构的结构参数并重建完整运动轨迹，无需在推理时显式求解约束方程。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在科学发现中展现出强大潜力，但其建模宏观刚体运动学约束的能力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在解决空间过约束机构的参数推断问题，特别是在极稀疏观测条件下的逆设计挑战。
AI.method: 提出O-ConNet端到端框架，从仅三个稀疏可达点直接学习推断机构结构参数并重建完整运动轨迹。该方法避免了推理过程中显式求解约束方程，而是通过深度学习直接捕捉闭环几何结构。
AI.result: 在包含42,860个有效样本的自建Bennett 4R数据集上，O-ConNet取得Param-MAE 0.276±0.077和Traj-MAE 0.145±0.018（10次运行均值±标准差），分别比最强序列基线（LSTM-Seq2Seq）提升65.1%和88.2%。
AI.conclusion: 端到端学习能够有效捕捉闭环几何结构，为极稀疏观测条件下的空间过约束机构逆设计提供了实用途径，展示了深度学习在建模复杂运动学约束方面的潜力。

title: Finding Belief Geometries with Sparse Autoencoders
summary:
Understanding the geometric structure of internal representations is a central goal of mechanistic interpretability. Prior work has shown that transformers trained on sequences generated by hidden Markov models encode probabilistic belief states as simplex-shaped geometries in their residual stream, with vertices corresponding to latent generative states. Whether large language models trained on naturalistic text develop analogous geometric representations remains an open question.
  We introduce a pipeline for discovering candidate simplex-structured subspaces in transformer representations, combining sparse autoencoders (SAEs), $k$-subspace clustering of SAE features, and simplex fitting using AANet. We validate the pipeline on a transformer trained on a multipartite hidden Markov model with known belief-state geometry. Applied to Gemma-2-9B, we identify 13 priority clusters exhibiting candidate simplex geometry ($K \geq 3$).
  A key challenge is distinguishing genuine belief-state encoding from tiling artifacts: latents can span a simplex-shaped subspace without the mixture coordinates carrying predictive signal beyond any individual feature. We therefore adopt barycentric prediction as our primary discriminating test. Among the 13 priority clusters, 3 exhibit a highly significant advantage on near-vertex samples (Wilcoxon $p < 10^{-14}$) and 4 on simplex-interior samples. Together 5 distinct real clusters pass at least one split, while no null cluster passes either. One cluster, 768_596, additionally achieves the highest causal steering score in the dataset. This is the only case where passive prediction and active intervention converge. We present these findings as preliminary evidence that genuine belief-like geometry exists in Gemma-2-9B's representation space, and identify the structured evaluation that would be required to confirm this interpretation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种从transformer表示中发现候选单纯形结构子空间的流程，在Gemma-2-9B中识别出13个具有候选单纯形几何的优先簇，其中5个通过了重心的预测测试，提供了大语言模型中存在类似信念状态几何结构的初步证据。
AI.motivation: 理解内部表示的几何结构是机制可解释性的核心目标。先前研究表明，在隐马尔可夫模型序列上训练的transformer会在残差流中编码概率信念状态作为单纯形几何。但大型语言模型在自然文本训练中是否发展出类似的几何表示仍是一个开放问题。
AI.method: 引入了一个发现transformer表示中候选单纯形结构子空间的流程：结合稀疏自编码器(SAEs)、SAE特征的k-子空间聚类，以及使用AANet进行单纯形拟合。在已知信念状态几何的多部分隐马尔可夫模型上训练的transformer上验证了该流程，然后应用于Gemma-2-9B模型。
AI.result: 在Gemma-2-9B中识别出13个优先簇(K≥3)表现出候选单纯形几何。其中3个在近顶点样本上表现出高度显著优势(Wilcoxon p<10^{-14})，4个在单纯形内部样本上表现良好。总共5个不同的真实簇通过了至少一个分割测试，而零簇均未通过。簇768_596还获得了最高的因果引导分数，是被动预测和主动干预收敛的唯一案例。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现提供了初步证据，表明Gemma-2-9B的表示空间中存在真正的信念状几何结构。研究还确定了确认这一解释所需的结构化评估要求，强调了区分真正的信念状态编码与平铺伪影的重要性。

title: THOM: Generating Physically Plausible Hand-Object Meshes From Text
summary: The generation of 3D hand-object interactions (HOIs) from text is crucial for dexterous robotic grasping and VR/AR content generation, requiring both high visual fidelity and physical plausibility. Nevertheless, the ill-posed problem of mesh extraction from text-generated Gaussians, and physics-based optimization on the erroneous meshes pose challenges. To address these issues, we introduce THOM, a training-free framework that generates photorealistic, physically plausible 3D HOI meshes without the need for a template object mesh. THOM employs a two-stage pipeline, initially generating the hand and object Gaussians, followed by physics-based HOI optimization. Our new mesh extraction method and vertex-to-Gaussian mapping explicitly assign Gaussian elements to mesh vertices, allowing topology-aware regularization. Furthermore, we improve the physical plausibility of interactions by VLM-guided translation refinement and contact-aware optimization. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that THOM consistently surpasses state-of-the-art methods in terms of text alignment, visual realism, and interaction plausibility.

AI.tldr: THOM是一个无需训练的两阶段框架，从文本生成具有高视觉保真度和物理合理性的3D手-物体交互网格，通过高斯到网格映射和物理优化解决现有方法的问题。
AI.motivation: 从文本生成3D手-物体交互对于灵巧机器人抓取和VR/AR内容生成至关重要，但现有方法面临两个主要挑战：1) 从文本生成的高斯模型中提取网格的ill-posed问题；2) 在错误网格上进行基于物理的优化困难。
AI.method: THOM采用两阶段流程：1) 首先生成手和物体的高斯表示；2) 进行基于物理的HOI优化。关键技术包括：新的网格提取方法和顶点到高斯映射，将高斯元素显式分配给网格顶点，实现拓扑感知正则化；VLM引导的平移细化和接触感知优化提升物理合理性。
AI.result: 综合实验表明，THOM在文本对齐、视觉真实感和交互合理性方面持续超越最先进方法，无需模板物体网格即可生成逼真的物理合理3D HOI网格。
AI.conclusion: THOM通过创新的网格提取和物理优化方法，成功解决了从文本生成3D手-物体交互的挑战，为机器人抓取和VR/AR应用提供了高质量的3D交互生成方案。

title: High-resolution probabilistic estimation of three-dimensional regional ocean dynamics from sparse surface observations
summary: The ocean interior regulates Earth's climate but remains sparsely observed due to limited in situ measurements, while satellite observations are restricted to the surface. We present a depth-aware generative framework for reconstructing high-resolution three-dimensional ocean states from extremely sparse surface data. Our approach employs a conditional denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) trained on sea surface height and temperature observations with up to 99.9 percent sparsity, without reliance on a background dynamical model. By incorporating continuous depth embeddings, the model learns a unified vertical representation of the ocean states and generalizes to previously unseen depths. Applied to the Gulf of Mexico, the framework accurately reconstructs subsurface temperature, salinity, and velocity fields across multiple depths. Evaluations using statistical metrics, spectral analysis, and heat transport diagnostics demonstrate recovery of both large-scale circulation and multiscale variability. These results establish generative diffusion models as a scalable approach for probabilistic ocean reconstruction in data-limited regimes, with implications for climate monitoring and forecasting.

AI.tldr: 提出一种深度感知生成框架，利用条件去噪扩散概率模型从极稀疏（99.9%）的海面数据重建高分辨率三维海洋状态，无需依赖背景动力模型。
AI.motivation: 海洋内部对地球气候调节至关重要，但现场观测稀疏，卫星观测仅限于海面，需要从有限数据重建三维海洋状态的方法。
AI.method: 采用条件去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM），结合连续深度嵌入，从极稀疏（99.9%）的海面高度和温度观测中学习统一的垂直表示，无需背景动力模型。
AI.result: 在墨西哥湾应用中，准确重建了跨多个深度的次表层温度、盐度和流速场，通过统计指标、谱分析和热输送诊断验证了从大尺度环流到多尺度变率的恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: 生成扩散模型为数据受限条件下的概率海洋重建提供了可扩展方法，对气候监测和预报具有重要意义。

title: Bridging Discrete Planning and Continuous Execution for Redundant Robot
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures. Submitted to IFAC World Congress 2026
summary: Voxel-grid reinforcement learning is widely adopted for path planning in redundant manipulators due to its simplicity and reproducibility. However, direct execution through point-wise numerical inverse kinematics on 7-DoF arms often yields step-size jitter, abrupt joint transitions, and instability near singular configurations. This work proposes a bridging framework between discrete planning and continuous execution without modifying the discrete planner itself. On the planning side, step-normalized 26-neighbor Cartesian actions and a geometric tie-breaking mechanism are introduced to suppress unnecessary turns and eliminate step-size oscillations. On the execution side, a task-priority damped least-squares (TP-DLS) inverse kinematics layer is implemented. This layer treats end-effector position as a primary task, while posture and joint centering are handled as subordinate tasks projected into the null space, combined with trust-region clipping and joint velocity constraints. On a 7-DoF manipulator in random sparse, medium, and dense environments, this bridge raises planning success in dense scenes from about 0.58 to 1.00, shortens representative path length from roughly 1.53 m to 1.10 m, and while keeping end-effector error below 1 mm, reduces peak joint accelerations by over an order of magnitude, substantially improving the continuous execution quality of voxel-based RL paths on redundant manipulators.

AI.tldr: 提出连接离散规划与连续执行的桥梁框架，通过改进的体素网格强化学习规划（步长归一化26邻域动作+几何平局机制）和任务优先级阻尼最小二乘逆运动学执行层，显著提升7自由度冗余机械臂在密集环境中的路径规划成功率和执行质量。
AI.motivation: 体素网格强化学习在冗余机械臂路径规划中应用广泛，但通过逐点数值逆运动学直接执行会导致步长抖动、关节突变和奇异位姿附近不稳定等问题。需要在不修改离散规划器本身的前提下，建立离散规划与连续执行之间的桥梁。
AI.method: 1) 规划侧：引入步长归一化的26邻域笛卡尔动作和几何平局机制，抑制不必要的转向和消除步长振荡；2) 执行侧：实现任务优先级阻尼最小二乘逆运动学层，将末端执行器位置作为主任务，姿态和关节居中作为投影到零空间的从属任务，结合信任区域裁剪和关节速度约束。
AI.result: 在7自由度机械臂的随机稀疏、中等和密集环境中，该桥梁框架将密集场景的规划成功率从约0.58提升至1.00，代表性路径长度从约1.53米缩短至1.10米，在保持末端执行器误差低于1毫米的同时，将峰值关节加速度降低一个数量级以上。
AI.conclusion: 提出的桥梁框架显著提高了基于体素的强化学习路径在冗余机械臂上的连续执行质量，成功解决了离散规划与连续执行之间的不匹配问题，实现了更平滑、更稳定的机械臂运动控制。

title: Towards Secure Agent Skills: Architecture, Threat Taxonomy, and Security Analysis
summary: Agent Skills is an emerging open standard that defines a modular, filesystem-based packaging format enabling LLM-based agents to acquire domain-specific expertise on demand. Despite rapid adoption across multiple agentic platforms and the emergence of large community marketplaces, the security properties of Agent Skills have not been systematically studied. This paper presents the first comprehensive security analysis of the Agent Skills framework. We define the full lifecycle of an Agent Skill across four phases -- Creation, Distribution, Deployment, and Execution -- and identify the structural attack surface each phase introduces. Building on this lifecycle analysis, we construct a threat taxonomy comprising seven categories and seventeen scenarios organized across three attack layers, grounded in both architectural analysis and real-world evidence. We validate the taxonomy through analysis of five confirmed security incidents in the Agent Skills ecosystem. Based on these findings, we discuss defense directions for each threat category, identify open research challenges, and provide actionable recommendations for stakeholders. Our analysis reveals that the most severe threats arise from structural properties of the framework itself, including the absence of a data-instruction boundary, a single-approval persistent trust model, and the lack of mandatory marketplace security review, and cannot be addressed through incremental mitigations alone.

AI.tldr: 首次对Agent Skills框架进行系统性安全分析，识别其生命周期各阶段的安全威胁，构建威胁分类法，验证实际安全事件，并提出防御建议。
AI.motivation: Agent Skills作为新兴的开放标准，在多个智能体平台快速采用并形成大型社区市场，但其安全属性尚未得到系统研究，存在潜在安全风险。
AI.method: 定义Agent Skill的完整生命周期（创建、分发、部署、执行四个阶段），识别各阶段的结构性攻击面，构建包含7个类别和17个场景的威胁分类法，基于架构分析和实际证据验证分类法。
AI.result: 分析揭示了Agent Skills生态系统中5个已确认的安全事件，验证了威胁分类法的有效性。最严重的威胁源于框架本身的结构特性：缺乏数据-指令边界、单一审批的持久信任模型、缺乏强制性的市场安全审查。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠渐进式缓解措施无法解决Agent Skills框架的根本安全问题，需要系统性防御策略。论文为各威胁类别提供了防御方向，识别了开放研究挑战，并为利益相关者提供了可操作建议。

title: Integrated Identification of Collaborative Robots for Robot Assisted 3D Printing Processes
summary: In recent years, the integration of additive manufacturing (AM) and industrial robotics has opened new perspectives for the production of complex components, particularly in the automotive sector. Robot-assisted additive manufacturing processes overcome the dimensional and kinematic limitations of traditional Cartesian systems, enabling non-planar deposition and greater geometric flexibility. However, the increasing dynamic complexity of robotic manipulators introduces challenges related to precision, control, and error prediction. This work proposes a model-based approach equipped with an integrated identification procedure of the system's parameters, including the robot, the actuators and the controllers. We show that the integrated modeling procedure allows to obtain a reliable dynamic model even in the presence of sensory and programming limitations typical of collaborative robots. The manipulator's dynamic model is identified through an integrated five step methodology: starting with geometric and inertial analysis, followed by friction and controller parameters identification, all the way to the remaining parameters identification. The proposed procedure intrinsically ensures the physical consistency of the identified parameters. The identification approach is validated on a real world case study involving a 6-Degrees-Of-Freedom (DoFs) collaborative robot used in a thermoplastic extrusion process. The very good matching between the experimental results given by actual robot and those given by the identified model shows the potential enhancement of precision, control, and error prediction in Robot Assisted 3D Printing Processes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于模型的集成参数识别方法，用于提高机器人辅助增材制造系统的动态建模精度，通过五步识别流程确保参数物理一致性，并在6自由度协作机器人上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 机器人辅助增材制造虽然克服了传统笛卡尔系统的尺寸和运动学限制，但机器人动态复杂性增加带来了精度、控制和误差预测的挑战。协作机器人通常存在传感器和编程限制，需要可靠的动态模型来提升制造质量。
AI.method: 提出集成参数识别方法，通过五步流程：1)几何和惯性分析，2)摩擦参数识别，3)控制器参数识别，4)剩余参数识别，5)物理一致性验证。该方法考虑了机器人、执行器和控制器的完整系统参数，特别适用于协作机器人环境。
AI.result: 在6自由度协作机器人进行热塑性挤出工艺的实际案例中验证了该方法。实验结果显示，识别模型与实际机器人的结果匹配度非常高，证明了该方法能有效提升机器人辅助3D打印过程的精度、控制和误差预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的集成参数识别方法能够获得可靠的动态模型，即使在协作机器人典型的传感器和编程限制下也能确保参数物理一致性。该方法为机器人辅助增材制造系统的精度提升和控制优化提供了有效解决方案。

title: ExploreVLA: Dense World Modeling and Exploration for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
comment: The code and demo will be publicly available at https://zihaosheng.github.io/ExploreVLA/
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving models based on Vision-Language-Action (VLA) architectures have shown promising results by learning driving policies through behavior cloning on expert demonstrations. However, imitation learning inherently limits the model to replicating observed behaviors without exploring diverse driving strategies, leaving it brittle in novel or out-of-distribution scenarios. Reinforcement learning (RL) offers a natural remedy by enabling policy exploration beyond the expert distribution. Yet VLA models, typically trained on offline datasets, lack directly observable state transitions, necessitating a learned world model to anticipate action consequences. In this work, we propose a unified understanding-and-generation framework that leverages world modeling to simultaneously enable meaningful exploration and provide dense supervision. Specifically, we augment trajectory prediction with future RGB and depth image generation as dense world modeling objectives, requiring the model to learn fine-grained visual and geometric representations that substantially enrich the planning backbone. Beyond serving as a supervisory signal, the world model further acts as a source of intrinsic reward for policy exploration: its image prediction uncertainty naturally measures a trajectory's novelty relative to the training distribution, where high uncertainty indicates out-of-distribution scenarios that, if safe, represent valuable learning opportunities. We incorporate this exploration signal into a safety-gated reward and optimize the policy via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Experiments on the NAVSIM and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, achieving a state-of-the-art PDMS score of 93.7 and an EPDMS of 88.8 on NAVSIM. The code and demo will be publicly available at https://zihaosheng.github.io/ExploreVLA/.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一的感知-生成框架，通过世界建模实现有意义的探索和密集监督，提升VLA自动驾驶模型的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLA架构的端到端自动驾驶模型通过行为克隆学习驾驶策略，但模仿学习限制了模型只能复制观察到的行为，无法探索多样驾驶策略，在新颖或分布外场景中表现脆弱。强化学习虽然能实现策略探索，但VLA模型缺乏可直接观测的状态转移，需要学习世界模型来预测动作后果。
AI.method: 提出统一的理解-生成框架：1）通过未来RGB和深度图像生成作为密集世界建模目标，丰富规划骨干的视觉和几何表示；2）世界模型的不确定性作为内在奖励衡量轨迹新颖性，高不确定性表示分布外场景（若安全则是有价值的学习机会）；3）将探索信号整合到安全门控奖励中，通过组相对策略优化（GRPO）优化策略。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM和nuScenes基准测试中验证了方法的有效性：在NAVSIM上实现了最先进的PDMS分数93.7和EPDMS分数88.8。
AI.conclusion: 通过世界建模同时实现有意义的探索和密集监督，显著提升了VLA自动驾驶模型在分布外场景中的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: World Action Verifier: Self-Improving World Models via Forward-Inverse Asymmetry
summary: General-purpose world models promise scalable policy evaluation, optimization, and planning, yet achieving the required level of robustness remains challenging. Unlike policy learning, which primarily focuses on optimal actions, a world model must be reliable over a much broader range of suboptimal actions, which are often insufficiently covered by action-labeled interaction data. To address this challenge, we propose World Action Verifier (WAV), a framework that enables world models to identify their own prediction errors and self-improve. The key idea is to decompose action-conditioned state prediction into two factors -- state plausibility and action reachability -- and verify each separately. We show that these verification problems can be substantially easier than predicting future states due to two underlying asymmetries: the broader availability of action-free data and the lower dimensionality of action-relevant features. Leveraging these asymmetries, we augment a world model with (i) a diverse subgoal generator obtained from video corpora and (ii) a sparse inverse model that infers actions from a subset of state features. By enforcing cycle consistency among generated subgoals, inferred actions, and forward rollouts, WAV provides an effective verification mechanism in under-explored regimes, where existing methods typically fail. Across nine tasks spanning MiniGrid, RoboMimic, and ManiSkill, our method achieves 2x higher sample efficiency while improving downstream policy performance by 18%.

AI.tldr: WAV框架通过将状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性两个因子进行独立验证，利用动作无关数据的丰富性和动作相关特征的低维性，使世界模型能够自我识别预测错误并自我改进。
AI.motivation: 通用世界模型需要比策略学习更广泛的鲁棒性，必须对大量次优动作保持可靠预测，而现有动作标注的交互数据往往覆盖不足。现有方法在未充分探索的区域容易失败，需要一种能够自我验证和改进的机制。
AI.method: 将动作条件状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性两个因子进行独立验证。利用两个不对称性：动作无关数据的广泛可用性和动作相关特征的低维性。通过从视频语料库获取多样化子目标生成器和从状态特征子集推断动作的稀疏逆模型，通过子目标生成、动作推断和前向推演的循环一致性实现有效验证。
AI.result: 在MiniGrid、RoboMimic和ManiSkill的9个任务中，WAV实现了2倍的样本效率提升，同时将下游策略性能提高了18%。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解验证和利用数据不对称性，WAV框架能够有效识别世界模型的预测错误并在未充分探索区域实现自我改进，为构建更鲁棒的通用世界模型提供了可行路径。

title: Ego-Grounding for Personalized Question-Answering in Egocentric Videos
summary: We present the first systematic analysis of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in personalized question-answering requiring ego-grounding - the ability to understand the camera-wearer in egocentric videos. To this end, we introduce MyEgo, the first egocentric VideoQA dataset designed to evaluate MLLMs' ability to understand, remember, and reason about the camera wearer. MyEgo comprises 541 long videos and 5K personalized questions asking about "my things", "my activities", and "my past". Benchmarking reveals that competitive MLLMs across variants, including open-source vs. proprietary, thinking vs. non-thinking, small vs. large scales all struggle on MyEgo. Top closed- and open-source models (e.g., GPT-5 and Qwen3-VL) achieve only~46% and 36% accuracy, trailing human performance by near 40% and 50% respectively. Surprisingly, neither explicit reasoning nor model scaling yield consistent improvements. Models improve when relevant evidence is explicitly provided, but gains drop over time, indicating limitations in tracking and remembering "me" and "my past". These findings collectively highlight the crucial role of ego-grounding and long-range memory in enabling personalized QA in egocentric videos. We hope MyEgo and our analyses catalyze further progress in these areas for egocentric personalized assistance. Data and code are available at https://github.com/Ryougetsu3606/MyEgo

AI.tldr: 论文提出了MyEgo数据集，这是首个用于评估多模态大语言模型在自我中心视频中理解、记忆和推理相机佩戴者能力的视频问答数据集，揭示了当前模型在自我接地和长期记忆方面的显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在需要自我接地（理解相机佩戴者）的个性化问答任务中表现不佳，缺乏专门评估模型理解、记忆和推理"我"相关信息的基准数据集。
AI.method: 构建MyEgo数据集，包含541个长视频和5K个个性化问题，涵盖"我的物品"、"我的活动"和"我的过去"三类问题。在开源与闭源、思考与非思考、不同规模的各种MLLM变体上进行系统评估。
AI.result: 顶级闭源模型（如GPT-5）准确率仅约46%，开源模型（如Qwen3-VL）约36%，分别比人类表现低近40%和50%。显式推理和模型缩放未能带来一致改进，提供相关证据时模型有所改善但增益随时间下降。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了自我接地和长期记忆在自我中心视频个性化问答中的关键作用，MyEgo数据集和分析将推动该领域发展，促进自我中心个性化辅助系统的进步。

title: Learning Spatial Structure from Pre-Beamforming Per-Antenna Range-Doppler Radar Data via Visibility-Aware Cross-Modal Supervision
summary: Automotive radar perception pipelines commonly construct angle-domain representations via beamforming before applying learning-based models. This work instead investigates a representational question: can meaningful spatial structure be learned directly from pre-beamforming per-antenna range-Doppler (RD) measurements? Experiments are conducted on a 6-TX x 8-RX (48 virtual antennas) commodity automotive radar employing an A/B chirp-sequence frequency-modulated continuous-wave (CS-FMCW) transmit scheme, in which the effective transmit aperture varies between chirps (single-TX vs. multi-TX), enabling controlled analysis of chirp-dependent transmit configurations. We operate on pre-beamforming per-antenna RD tensors using a dual-chirp shared-weight encoder trained in an end-to-end, fully data-driven manner, and evaluate spatial recoverability using bird's-eye-view (BEV) occupancy as a geometric probe rather than a performance-driven objective. Supervision is visibility-aware and cross-modal, derived from LiDAR with explicit modeling of the radar field-of-view and occlusion-aware LiDAR observability via ray-based visibility. Through chirp ablations (A-only, B-only, A+B), range-band analysis, and physics-aligned baselines, we assess how transmit configurations affect geometric recoverability. The results indicate that spatial structure can be learned directly from pre-beamforming per-antenna RD tensors without explicit angle-domain construction or hand-crafted signal-processing stages.

AI.tldr: 该研究探索了能否直接从波束成形前的天线级距离-多普勒张量中学习空间结构，而不需要先构建角度域表示，通过双啁啾共享权重编码器在端到端数据驱动方式下验证了可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统汽车雷达感知流程通常先通过波束成形构建角度域表示，再应用学习模型。本研究旨在探索能否绕过这一显式的角度域构建过程，直接从波束成形前的天线级距离-多普勒测量中学习有意义的空间结构。
AI.method: 使用6发8收（48个虚拟天线）商用汽车雷达，采用A/B啁啾序列FMCW发射方案，其中有效发射孔径随啁啾变化（单发vs多发）。构建双啁啾共享权重编码器，以端到端数据驱动方式处理波束成形前的天线级RD张量。使用鸟瞰图占用率作为几何探针进行监督，监督信号来自LiDAR并考虑了雷达视场和基于射线的可见性建模。
AI.result: 通过啁啾消融实验（仅A、仅B、A+B）、距离带分析和物理对齐基线评估，结果表明可以直接从波束成形前的天线级RD张量中学习空间结构，无需显式的角度域构建或手工信号处理阶段。
AI.conclusion: 空间结构可以直接从波束成形前的天线级距离-多普勒张量中学习，无需先构建角度域表示，这为汽车雷达感知提供了新的端到端学习范式。

title: Product-Stability: Provable Convergence for Gradient Descent on the Edge of Stability
summary: Empirically, modern deep learning training often occurs at the Edge of Stability (EoS), where the sharpness of the loss exceeds the threshold below which classical convergence analysis applies. Despite recent progress, existing theoretical explanations of EoS either rely on restrictive assumptions or focus on specific squared-loss-type objectives. In this work, we introduce and study a structural property of loss functions that we term product-stability. We show that for losses with product-stable minima, gradient descent applied to objectives of the form $(x,y) \mapsto l(xy)$ can provably converge to the local minimum even when training in the EoS regime. This framework substantially generalizes prior results and applies to a broad class of losses, including binary cross entropy. Using bifurcation diagrams, we characterize the resulting training dynamics, explain the emergence of stable oscillations, and precisely quantify the sharpness at convergence. Together, our results offer a principled explanation for stable EoS training for a wider class of loss functions.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"乘积稳定性"概念，证明对于具有乘积稳定极小值的损失函数，梯度下降即使在边缘稳定性(EoS)区域也能收敛到局部极小值，扩展了EoS训练的理论解释范围。
AI.motivation: 现有EoS理论解释要么依赖限制性假设，要么只关注特定平方损失类型目标，无法解释更广泛损失函数在EoS区域的稳定训练现象。
AI.method: 引入"乘积稳定性"的结构性质，分析形式为$(x,y) \mapsto l(xy)$的目标函数，使用分岔图刻画训练动态，量化收敛时的锐度。
AI.result: 证明对于具有乘积稳定极小值的损失函数，梯度下降在EoS区域可收敛到局部极小值，该框架适用于包括二元交叉熵在内的广泛损失函数类。
AI.conclusion: 乘积稳定性框架为更广泛损失函数在EoS区域的稳定训练提供了理论解释，扩展了现有EoS理论适用范围。

title: Global Geometry of Orthogonal Foliations in the Control Allocation of Signed-Quadratic Systems
summary: This work formalizes the differential topology of redundancy resolution for systems governed by signed-quadratic actuation maps. By analyzing the minimally redundant case, the global topology of the continuous fiber bundle defining the nonlinear actuation null-space is established. The distribution orthogonal to these fibers is proven to be globally integrable and governed by an exact logarithmic potential field. This field foliates the actuator space, inducing a structural stratification of all orthants into transverse layers whose combinatorial sizes follow a strictly binomial progression. Within these layers, adjacent orthants are continuously connected via lower-dimensional strata termed reciprocal hinges, while the layers themselves are separated by boundary hyperplanes, or portals, that act as global sections of the fibers. This partition formally distinguishes extremal and transitional layers, which exhibit fundamentally distinct fiber topologies and foliation properties. Through this geometric framework, classical pseudo-linear static allocation strategies are shown to inevitably intersect singular boundary hyperplanes, triggering infinite-derivative kinetic singularities and fragmenting the task space into an exponential number of singularity-separated sectors. In contrast, allocators derived from the orthogonal manifolds yield continuously differentiable global sections with only a linear number of sectors for transversal layers, or can even form a single global diffeomorphism to the task space in the case of the two extremal layers, thus completely avoiding geometric rank-loss and boundary-crossing singularities. These theoretical results directly apply to the control allocation of propeller-driven architectures, including multirotor UAVs, marine, and underwater vehicles.

AI.tldr: 该论文形式化分析了带符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析微分拓扑，建立了非线性驱动零空间连续纤维丛的全局拓扑结构，揭示了正交分布的可积性，并基于此几何框架证明了经典伪线性静态分配策略必然导致奇异边界穿越，而正交流形派生的分配器可实现全局微分同胚。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于形式化分析带符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析微分拓扑，特别是针对多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器等螺旋桨驱动架构的控制分配问题。传统伪线性静态分配策略存在不可避免的奇异边界穿越问题，导致无限导数动力学奇异性和任务空间碎片化，需要建立几何框架来避免这些缺陷。
AI.method: 通过分析最小冗余情况，建立了定义非线性驱动零空间的连续纤维丛的全局拓扑结构。证明正交于这些纤维的分布是全局可积的，并由精确对数势场控制。该场将驱动器空间分层为横向层，其组合大小遵循严格二项式级数。在几何框架内，对比了经典伪线性静态分配策略与从正交流形派生的分配器。
AI.result: 经典伪线性静态分配策略必然与奇异边界超平面相交，触发无限导数动力学奇异性，并将任务空间碎片化为指数数量的奇异性分离扇区。相反，从正交流形派生的分配器产生连续可微全局截面，对于横向层仅具有线性数量的扇区，在极端层情况下甚至可形成到任务空间的单一全局微分同胚，完全避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇异性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究建立了带符号二次驱动映射系统冗余解析的微分拓扑框架，揭示了驱动空间的分层结构和纤维拓扑特性。理论结果表明，基于正交流形的分配策略可避免传统方法的奇异性问题，为多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器等螺旋桨驱动架构的控制分配提供了理论基础。

title: Generalization Limits of Reinforcement Learning Alignment
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, accepted at JSAI 2026
summary: The safety of large language models (LLMs) relies on alignment techniques such as reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF). However, recent theoretical analyses suggest that reinforcement learning-based training does not acquire new capabilities but merely redistributes the utilization probabilities of existing ones. In this study, we propose ``compound jailbreaks'' targeting OpenAI gpt-oss-20b, which exploit the generalization failures of alignment. This approach combines multiple attack techniques -- each individually defended against -- to saturate the instruction hierarchy maintenance process. Our evaluation shows that the attack success rate (ASR) increased from 14.3\% with individual methods to 71.4\% with the combined approach. These results provide empirical evidence for the hypothesis that safety training does not generalize as broadly as model capabilities, highlighting the need for multifaceted safety evaluations using compound attack scenarios.

AI.tldr: 针对OpenAI gpt-oss-20b的复合越狱攻击，通过组合多种防御技术来饱和指令层级维护过程，将攻击成功率从14.3%提升至71.4%，证明安全训练泛化能力弱于模型能力
AI.motivation: 现有理论分析表明基于强化学习的训练不会获得新能力，而只是重新分配现有能力的利用概率。本研究旨在验证安全训练是否如模型能力一样广泛泛化，通过设计复合越狱攻击来探索对齐的泛化失败
AI.method: 提出"复合越狱"攻击方法，针对OpenAI gpt-oss-20b模型，通过组合多种单独已被防御的攻击技术，饱和指令层级维护过程，利用对齐的泛化失败
AI.result: 攻击成功率从单独方法的14.3%显著提升至复合方法的71.4%，为安全训练泛化能力不如模型能力的假设提供了实证证据
AI.conclusion: 安全训练的泛化能力不如模型能力广泛，需要使用复合攻击场景进行多方面的安全评估，以更全面地评估大语言模型的安全性

title: XrayClaw: Cooperative-Competitive Multi-Agent Alignment for Trustworthy Chest X-ray Diagnosis
summary: Chest X-ray (CXR) interpretation is a fundamental yet complex clinical task that increasingly relies on artificial intelligence for automation. However, traditional monolithic models often lack the nuanced reasoning required for trustworthy diagnosis, frequently leading to logical inconsistencies and diagnostic hallucinations. While multi-agent systems offer a potential solution by simulating collaborative consultations, existing frameworks remain susceptible to consensus-based errors when instantiated by a single underlying model. This paper introduces XrayClaw, a novel framework that operationalizes multi-agent alignment through a sophisticated cooperative-competitive architecture. XrayClaw integrates four specialized cooperative agents to simulate a systematic clinical workflow, alongside a competitive agent that serves as an independent auditor. To reconcile these distinct diagnostic pathways, we propose Competitive Preference Optimization, a learning objective that penalizes illogical reasoning by enforcing mutual verification between analytical and holistic interpretations. Extensive empirical evaluations on the MS-CXR-T, MIMIC-CXR, and CheXbench benchmarks demonstrate that XrayClaw achieves state-of-the-art performance in diagnostic accuracy, clinical reasoning fidelity, and zero-shot domain generalization. Our results indicate that XrayClaw effectively mitigates cumulative hallucinations and enhances the overall reliability of automated CXR diagnosis, establishing a new paradigm for trustworthy medical imaging analysis.

AI.tldr: XrayClaw：一种通过合作-竞争多智能体架构实现胸部X光片诊断的新型框架，采用竞争偏好优化来减少逻辑不一致和诊断幻觉，在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 传统单体模型在胸部X光片诊断中缺乏细致推理能力，容易产生逻辑不一致和诊断幻觉。现有的多智能体系统虽然能模拟会诊协作，但基于单一底层模型时仍易受共识性错误影响，需要更可靠的自动化诊断框架。
AI.method: 提出XrayClaw框架，包含四个专业合作智能体模拟系统化临床工作流程，以及一个竞争智能体作为独立审计者。引入竞争偏好优化学习目标，通过强制分析性和整体性解释之间的相互验证来惩罚不合理推理。
AI.result: 在MS-CXR-T、MIMIC-CXR和CheXbench基准测试中，XrayClaw在诊断准确性、临床推理保真度和零样本领域泛化方面达到最先进性能，有效减轻了累积幻觉问题。
AI.conclusion: XrayClaw通过合作-竞争多智能体架构和竞争偏好优化，显著提升了自动化胸部X光片诊断的可靠性，为可信赖的医学影像分析建立了新范式。

title: Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective for Bridging Efficiency and Stability in Generative Policy Learning
summary: Expressive generative models have advanced robotic manipulation by capturing complex, multi-modal action distributions over temporally extended trajectories. However, fine-tuning these policies via RL remains challenging due to instability and sample inefficiency. We introduce Posterior Optimization with Clipped Objective (POCO), a principled RL framework that formulates policy improvement as a posterior inference problem tailored for temporal action chunks. Through an Expectation-Maximization procedure, POCO distills a reward-weighted implicit posterior into the policy without likelihood estimation. Furthermore, POCO adopts an offline-to-online paradigm that anchors online exploration to pre-trained priors, and its model-agnostic design scales to fine-tune large VLA models without architectural modifications. Evaluations across 7 simulation benchmarks and 4 contact-rich real-world tasks demonstrate that POCO prevents catastrophic policy collapse, outperforms SOTA baselines, and achieves a 96.7% success rate on real-world tasks. Videos are available at our project website https://cccedric.github.io/poco/.

AI.tldr: POCO是一个用于机器人操作的后验优化强化学习框架，通过期望最大化将奖励加权的隐式后验提炼到策略中，采用离线到在线范式，无需架构修改即可微调大型VLA模型。
AI.motivation: 尽管表达性生成模型能够捕捉复杂的多模态动作分布，但通过强化学习微调这些策略仍然面临不稳定和样本效率低下的挑战。
AI.method: POCO将策略改进形式化为时间动作块的后验推断问题，通过期望最大化过程将奖励加权的隐式后验提炼到策略中，无需似然估计。采用离线到在线范式，将在线探索锚定到预训练先验，模型无关设计可扩展微调大型VLA模型。
AI.result: 在7个仿真基准和4个接触丰富的真实世界任务中，POCO防止了灾难性策略崩溃，优于最先进的基线方法，在真实世界任务中达到96.7%的成功率。
AI.conclusion: POCO提供了一个原则性的RL框架，能够有效微调表达性生成模型，在仿真和真实世界任务中表现出优越性能，为机器人操作策略优化提供了新方法。

title: Communication-free Sampling and 4D Hybrid Parallelism for Scalable Mini-batch GNN Training
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are widely used for learning on graph datasets derived from various real-world scenarios. Learning from extremely large graphs requires distributed training, and mini-batching with sampling is a popular approach for parallelizing GNN training. Existing distributed mini-batch approaches have significant performance bottlenecks due to expensive sampling methods and limited scaling when using data parallelism. In this work, we present ScaleGNN, a 4D parallel framework for scalable mini-batch GNN training that combines communication-free distributed sampling, 3D parallel matrix multiplication (PMM), and data parallelism. ScaleGNN introduces a uniform vertex sampling algorithm, enabling each process (GPU device) to construct its local mini-batch, i.e., subgraph partitions without any inter-process communication. 3D PMM enables scaling mini-batch training to much larger GPU counts than vanilla data parallelism with significantly lower communication overheads. We also present additional optimizations to overlap sampling with training, reduce communication overhead by sending data in lower precision, kernel fusion, and communication-computation overlap. We evaluate ScaleGNN on five graph datasets and demonstrate strong scaling up to 2048 GPUs on Perlmutter, 2048 GCDs on Frontier, and 1024 GPUs on Tuolumne. On Perlmutter, ScaleGNN achieves 3.5x end-to-end training speedup over the SOTA baseline on ogbn-products.

AI.tldr: ScaleGNN：一个4D并行框架，通过无通信分布式采样、3D并行矩阵乘法和数据并行，实现可扩展的GNN小批量训练，在2048个GPU上展示强扩展性
AI.motivation: 现有分布式GNN小批量训练方法存在性能瓶颈：采样方法昂贵，数据并行扩展有限，需要更高效的并行框架来支持大规模图学习
AI.method: 提出ScaleGNN框架，包含：1) 无通信分布式采样（均匀顶点采样算法）；2) 3D并行矩阵乘法；3) 数据并行；4) 采样与训练重叠、低精度通信、内核融合、通信计算重叠等优化
AI.result: 在Perlmutter、Frontier、Tuolumne等多个系统上测试，在ogbn-products数据集上相比SOTA基线获得3.5倍端到端训练加速，支持2048个GPU的强扩展
AI.conclusion: ScaleGNN通过创新的4D并行设计解决了大规模GNN训练的扩展瓶颈，为超大规模图学习提供了高效的分布式训练解决方案

title: Rubrics to Tokens: Bridging Response-level Rubrics and Token-level Rewards in Instruction Following Tasks
summary: Rubric-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a promising approach for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with complex, open-domain instruction following tasks. However, existing methods predominantly rely on response-level rewards, introducing severe reward sparsity and reward ambiguity problems.
