Action chunking helps amortize inference, yet it also creates partially open-loop behavior, allowing small mismatches to accumulate into drift. We present AnchorVLA, a diffusion-based VLA policy for mobile manipulation built on the core insight that when sampling begins near a plausible solution manifold, extensive denoising is unnecessary to recover multimodal, valid actions. AnchorVLA combines a lightweight VLA adaptation backbone with an anchored diffusion action head, which denoises locally around anchor trajectories using a truncated diffusion schedule. This retains multimodal action generation while reducing inference cost for closed-loop control. Crucially, to mitigate chunking-induced drift, we introduce a test-time self-correction mechanism via a lightweight residual correction module that makes high-frequency, per-step adjustments during rollout. Across diverse mobile manipulation tasks, AnchorVLA improves success and stability under disturbances and distribution shifts while maintaining low-latency inference. The source code is made available at https://github.com/jason-lim26/AnchorVLA.

AI.tldr: AnchorVLA：一种用于移动操作的扩散式VLA策略，通过锚定扩散和轻量级自校正机制，在保持多模态动作生成的同时降低推理成本并减少块化导致的漂移。
AI.motivation: 移动操作中的核心挑战是在保持多个合理动作模型的同时，在执行过程中保持反应性。扩散策略虽然能建模多模态动作分布，但完整迭代去噪在控制时成本高昂。动作分块虽然能分摊推理成本，但会导致部分开环行为，使小误差累积成漂移。
AI.method: AnchorVLA结合轻量级VLA适配骨干和锚定扩散动作头，在锚定轨迹周围进行局部去噪，使用截断扩散调度。为减轻分块导致的漂移，引入测试时自校正机制，通过轻量级残差校正模块在rollout期间进行高频、每步调整。
AI.result: 在多样化的移动操作任务中，AnchorVLA在干扰和分布偏移下提高了成功率和稳定性，同时保持低延迟推理。
AI.conclusion: AnchorVLA通过锚定扩散和自校正机制，有效解决了移动操作中多模态动作生成与实时反应性之间的平衡问题，在保持扩散策略优势的同时显著降低了推理成本。

title: Overconfidence and Calibration in Medical VQA: Empirical Findings and Hallucination-Aware Mitigation
summary: As vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed in clinical decision support, more than accuracy is required: knowing when to trust their predictions is equally critical. Yet, a comprehensive and systematic investigation into the overconfidence of these models remains notably scarce in the medical domain. We address this gap through a comprehensive empirical study of confidence calibration in VLMs, spanning three model families (Qwen3-VL, InternVL3, LLaVA-NeXT), three model scales (2B--38B), and multiple confidence estimation prompting strategies, across three medical visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks. Our study yields three key findings: First, overconfidence persists across model families and is not resolved by scaling or prompting, such as chain-of-thought and verbalized confidence variants. Second, simple post-hoc calibration approaches, such as Platt scaling, reduce calibration error and consistently outperform the prompt-based strategy. Third, due to their (strict) monotonicity, these post-hoc calibration methods are inherently limited in improving the discriminative quality of predictions, leaving AUROC at the same level. Motivated by these findings, we investigate hallucination-aware calibration (HAC), which incorporates vision-grounded hallucination detection signals as complementary inputs to refine confidence estimates. We find that leveraging these hallucination signals improves both calibration and AUROC, with the largest gains on open-ended questions. Overall, our findings suggest post-hoc calibration as standard practice for medical VLM deployment over raw confidence estimates, and highlight the practical usefulness of hallucination signals to enable more reliable use of VLMs in medical VQA.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了视觉语言模型在医学视觉问答中的置信度校准问题，发现模型普遍存在过度自信，提出后处理校准优于提示策略，并引入幻觉感知校准方法提升性能。
AI.motivation: 随着视觉语言模型在临床决策支持中的部署增加，仅关注准确性已不足够，了解何时信任模型预测同样关键。然而，在医学领域对模型过度自信的系统性研究仍然缺乏。
AI.method: 研究采用综合实证方法，涵盖三个模型家族（Qwen3-VL、InternVL3、LLaVA-NeXT）、三个模型规模（2B-38B）和多种置信度估计提示策略，在三个医学视觉问答基准上进行评估。提出幻觉感知校准方法，利用视觉基础幻觉检测信号作为补充输入来优化置信度估计。
AI.result: 1. 过度自信在所有模型家族中持续存在，无法通过模型缩放或提示策略解决；2. 简单的后处理校准方法（如Platt缩放）能降低校准误差，优于提示策略；3. 后处理校准方法由于单调性限制，无法改善预测的判别质量（AUROC保持不变）；4. 幻觉感知校准能同时改善校准和AUROC，在开放式问题上提升最显著。
AI.conclusion: 建议将后处理校准作为医学视觉语言模型部署的标准实践，而非使用原始置信度估计。幻觉信号具有实际应用价值，能够实现医学视觉问答中更可靠的视觉语言模型使用。

title: Trivial Vocabulary Bans Improve LLM Reasoning More Than Deep Linguistic Constraints
summary: A previous study reported that E-Prime (English without the verb "to be") selectively altered reasoning in language models, with cross-model correlations suggesting a structural signature tied to which vocabulary was removed. I designed a replication with active controls to test the proposed mechanism: cognitive restructuring through specific vocabulary-cognition mappings. The experiment tested five conditions (unconstrained control, E-Prime, No-Have, elaborated metacognitive prompt, neutral filler-word ban) across six models and seven reasoning tasks (N=15,600 trials, 11,919 after compliance filtering). Every prediction from the cognitive restructuring hypothesis was disconfirmed. All four treatments outperformed the control (83.0%), including both active controls predicted to show null effects. The neutral filler-word ban, banning words like "very" and "just" with no role in logical inference, produced the largest improvement (+6.7 pp), while E-Prime produced the smallest (+3.7 pp). The four conditions ranked in perfect inverse order of theoretical depth. The cross-model correlation signature did not replicate (mean r=0.005). These results are consistent with a simpler mechanism: any constraint that forces a model off its default generation path acts as an output regularizer, improving reasoning by disrupting fluent but shallow response patterns. The shallowest constraints work best because they impose monitoring load with minimal conceptual disruption. I present these findings as a case study in discovery through disconfirmation.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过对照实验发现，先前关于E-Prime（英语中不使用"to be"动词）能选择性改变语言模型推理能力的说法不成立，实际机制是任何约束都能通过干扰默认生成路径来改善推理，最浅层的约束效果最好。
AI.motivation: 先前研究声称E-Prime能通过特定词汇-认知映射的认知重构机制选择性改变语言模型的推理能力，本研究旨在通过对照实验验证这一机制是否真实存在。
AI.method: 设计了包含五个条件的对照实验：无约束控制组、E-Prime组、No-Have组、精细化元认知提示组、中性填充词禁止组，在六个语言模型和七个推理任务上进行测试（共15,600次试验，过滤后11,919次）。
AI.result: 所有四个处理组都优于控制组（83.0%），包括预期显示零效应的主动对照组。中性填充词禁止组（禁止"very"、"just"等与逻辑推理无关的词）改善最大（+6.7个百分点），E-Prime组改善最小（+3.7个百分点）。四个条件按理论深度完美逆序排列，跨模型相关特征未复现（平均r=0.005）。
AI.conclusion: 认知重构假说的所有预测都被证伪，实际机制是：任何迫使模型偏离默认生成路径的约束都作为输出正则化器，通过干扰流畅但肤浅的响应模式来改善推理。最浅层的约束效果最好，因为它们施加监控负荷但造成最小的概念干扰。这是通过证伪进行发现的案例研究。

title: A Dynamic Toolkit for Transmission Characteristics of Precision Reducers with Explicit Contact Geometry
summary: Precision reducers are critical components in robotic systems, directly affecting the motion accuracy and dynamic performance of humanoid robots, quadruped robots, collaborative robots, industrial robots, and SCARA robots. This paper presents a dynamic toolkit for analyzing the transmission characteristics of precision reducers with explicit contact geometry. A unified framework is proposed to address the challenges in modeling accurate contact behaviors, evaluating gear stiffness, and predicting system vibrations. By integrating advanced contact theories and numerical solving methods, the proposed toolkit offers higher precision and computational efficiency compared to traditional dynamics software. The toolkit is designed with a modular, scriptable architecture that supports rapid reconfiguration across diverse reducer topologies. Numerical validation against published benchmarks confirms the accuracy of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出用于精密减速器传动特性分析的动态工具包，采用显式接触几何建模，提供更高精度和计算效率
AI.motivation: 精密减速器是机器人系统的关键组件，直接影响各类机器人的运动精度和动态性能。现有方法在精确接触行为建模、齿轮刚度评估和系统振动预测方面存在挑战
AI.method: 提出统一框架，集成先进接触理论和数值求解方法，采用模块化、可脚本化架构，支持不同减速器拓扑结构的快速重构
AI.result: 相比传统动力学软件，该工具包提供更高精度和计算效率。通过已发表基准的数值验证，确认了所提方法的准确性
AI.conclusion: 该动态工具包为精密减速器传动特性分析提供了有效解决方案，能够准确建模接触行为、评估齿轮刚度和预测系统振动

title: Fast NF4 Dequantization Kernels for Large Language Model Inference
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, EMC2 Workshop at ASPLOS 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have grown beyond the memory capacity of single GPU devices, necessitating quantization techniques for practical deployment. While NF4 (4-bit NormalFloat) quantization enables 4$\times$ memory reduction, inference on current NVIDIA GPUs (e.g., Ampere A100) requires expensive dequantization back to FP16 format, creating a critical performance bottleneck. This paper presents a lightweight shared memory optimization that addresses this gap through principled memory hierarchy exploitation while maintaining full ecosystem compatibility. We compare our technique against the open-source BitsAndBytes implementation, achieving 2.0--2.2$\times$ kernel speedup across three models (Gemma 27B, Qwen3 32B, and Llama3.3 70B) and up to 1.54$\times$ end-to-end improvement by leveraging the 12--15$\times$ latency advantage of shared memory over global memory access. Our optimization reduces instruction counts through simplified indexing logic while using only 64 bytes of shared memory per thread block, demonstrating that lightweight optimizations can deliver substantial performance gains with minimal engineering effort. This work provides a plug-and-play solution for the HuggingFace ecosystem that democratizes access to advanced models on existing GPU infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级共享内存优化技术，用于解决NF4量化LLM在NVIDIA GPU上推理时的性能瓶颈，通过内存层次结构利用实现2-2.2倍内核加速和1.54倍端到端改进。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型已超出单GPU设备的内存容量，需要量化技术进行实际部署。虽然NF4（4位NormalFloat）量化实现了4倍内存减少，但在当前NVIDIA GPU（如Ampere A100）上进行推理需要昂贵的反量化回FP16格式，这造成了关键的性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出轻量级共享内存优化技术，通过原则性的内存层次结构利用来解决这一差距，同时保持完整的生态系统兼容性。该优化利用共享内存相对于全局内存访问的12-15倍延迟优势，通过简化索引逻辑减少指令计数，每个线程块仅使用64字节共享内存。
AI.result: 与开源BitsAndBytes实现相比，在三个模型（Gemma 27B、Qwen3 32B和Llama3.3 70B）上实现了2.0-2.2倍内核加速，通过利用共享内存优势实现高达1.54倍的端到端改进。优化通过简化索引逻辑减少指令计数，同时每个线程块仅使用64字节共享内存。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级优化可以在最小工程努力下提供显著的性能提升。这项工作为HuggingFace生态系统提供了一个即插即用的解决方案，使现有GPU基础设施能够更高效地访问先进模型。

title: Feature Attribution Stability Suite: How Stable Are Post-Hoc Attributions?
comment: Accepted in the proceedings track of XAI4CV Workshop at CVPR 2026. It has 2 images, 5 tables, 6 equations, and 35 references in the main paper and 12 figures, 15 tables, and 3 references in the supplementary material
summary: Post-hoc feature attribution methods are widely deployed in safety-critical vision systems, yet their stability under realistic input perturbations remains poorly characterized. Existing metrics evaluate explanations primarily under additive noise, collapse stability to a single scalar, and fail to condition on prediction preservation, conflating explanation fragility with model sensitivity. We introduce the Feature Attribution Stability Suite (FASS), a benchmark that enforces prediction-invariance filtering, decomposes stability into three complementary metrics: structural similarity, rank correlation, and top-k Jaccard overlap-and evaluates across geometric, photometric, and compression perturbations. Evaluating four attribution methods (Integrated Gradients, GradientSHAP, Grad-CAM, LIME) across four architectures and three datasets-ImageNet-1K, MS COCO, and CIFAR-10, FASS shows that stability estimates depend critically on perturbation family and prediction-invariance filtering. Geometric perturbations expose substantially greater attribution instability than photometric changes, and without conditioning on prediction preservation, up to 99% of evaluated pairs involve changed predictions. Under this controlled evaluation, we observe consistent method-level trends, with Grad-CAM achieving the highest stability across datasets.

AI.tldr: FASS基准测试评估特征归因方法在预测不变条件下的稳定性，发现几何扰动比光度变化导致更大的归因不稳定性，Grad-CAM在跨数据集测试中表现最稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有特征归因方法稳定性评估存在缺陷：主要针对加性噪声、将稳定性压缩为单一标量、未考虑预测不变性，导致归因脆弱性与模型敏感性混淆。需要更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出特征归因稳定性套件(FASS)：强制预测不变性过滤，将稳定性分解为三个互补指标（结构相似性、秩相关、top-k Jaccard重叠），在几何、光度和压缩扰动下评估四种归因方法（Integrated Gradients、GradientSHAP、Grad-CAM、LIME）在四种架构和三个数据集上的表现。
AI.result: 稳定性估计严重依赖于扰动类型和预测不变性过滤。几何扰动比光度变化暴露更大的归因不稳定性；未考虑预测不变性时，高达99%的评估对涉及预测变化。在受控评估下，Grad-CAM在跨数据集中表现出最高的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 特征归因方法稳定性评估需要系统化基准，必须考虑预测不变性过滤和多维度指标。FASS提供了更全面的评估框架，揭示了现有方法的稳定性特征，为安全关键视觉系统中的可靠解释提供指导。

title: Robust Learning with Optimal Error
summary:
We construct algorithms with optimal error for learning with adversarial noise. The overarching theme of this work is that the use of \textsl{randomized} hypotheses can substantially improve upon the best error rates achievable with deterministic hypotheses.
  - For $η$-rate malicious noise, we show the optimal error is $\frac{1}{2} \cdot η/(1-η)$, improving on the optimal error of deterministic hypotheses by a factor of $1/2$. This answers an open question of Cesa-Bianchi et al. (JACM 1999) who showed randomness can improve error by a factor of $6/7$.
  - For $η$-rate nasty noise, we show the optimal error is $\frac{3}{2} \cdot η$ for distribution-independent learners and $η$ for fixed-distribution learners, both improving upon the optimal $2 η$ error of deterministic hypotheses. This closes a gap first noted by Bshouty et al. (Theoretical Computer Science 2002) when they introduced nasty noise and reiterated in the recent works of Klivans et al. (NeurIPS 2025) and Blanc et al. (SODA 2026).
  - For $η$-rate agnostic noise and the closely related nasty classification noise model, we show the optimal error is $η$, improving upon the optimal $2η$ error of deterministic hypotheses.
  All of our learners have sample complexity linear in the VC-dimension of the concept class and polynomial in the inverse excess error. All except for the fixed-distribution nasty noise learner are time efficient given access to an oracle for empirical risk minimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了对抗性噪声学习的最优误差算法，证明随机化假设相比确定性假设能显著降低误差，解决了多个开放性问题。
AI.motivation: 研究对抗性噪声学习中的最优误差问题，探索随机化假设相比确定性假设的优势，解决多个长期存在的开放性问题。
AI.method: 构建基于随机化假设的学习算法，针对不同类型的对抗性噪声（恶意噪声、恶意噪声、不可知噪声等）设计专门的算法，利用VC维和样本复杂性分析。
AI.result: 对于恶意噪声，最优误差为1/2·η/(1-η)，相比确定性假设改进1/2；对于恶意噪声，分布独立学习器最优误差为3/2·η，固定分布学习器为η；对于不可知噪声，最优误差为η。
AI.conclusion: 随机化假设能显著提高对抗性噪声学习的最优误差界限，解决了多个开放性问题，算法具有线性VC维样本复杂度和多项式时间效率。

title: Rapidly deploying on-device eye tracking by distilling visual foundation models
summary: Eye tracking (ET) plays a critical role in augmented and virtual reality applications. However, rapidly deploying high-accuracy, on-device gaze estimation for new products remains challenging because hardware configurations (e.g., camera placement, camera pose, and illumination) often change across device generations. Visual foundation models (VFMs) are a promising direction for rapid training and deployment, and they excel on natural-image benchmarks; yet we find that off-the-shelf VFMs still struggle to achieve high accuracy on specialized near-eye infrared imagery. To address this gap, we introduce DistillGaze, a framework that distills a foundation model by leveraging labeled synthetic data and unlabeled real data for rapid and high-performance on-device gaze estimation. DistillGaze proceeds in two stages. First, we adapt a VFM into a domain-specialized teacher using self-supervised learning on labeled synthetic and unlabeled real images. Synthetic data provides scalable, high-quality gaze supervision, while unlabeled real data helps bridge the synthetic-to-real domain gap. Second, we train an on-device student using both teacher guidance and self-training. Evaluated on a large-scale, crowd-sourced dataset spanning over 2,000 participants, DistillGaze reduces median gaze error by 58.62% relative to synthetic-only baselines while maintaining a lightweight 256K-parameter model suitable for real-time on-device deployment. Overall, DistillGaze provides an efficient pathway for training and deploying ET models that adapt to hardware changes, and offers a recipe for combining synthetic supervision with unlabeled real data in on-device regression tasks.

AI.tldr: DistillGaze：一种利用标记合成数据和无标记真实数据蒸馏基础模型，实现快速高精度设备端注视估计的框架
AI.motivation: 在增强现实和虚拟现实应用中，针对不同硬件配置快速部署高精度设备端注视估计面临挑战，现有视觉基础模型在近眼红外图像上表现不佳
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1）使用标记合成数据和无标记真实数据通过自监督学习将视觉基础模型适配为领域专家教师模型；2）结合教师指导和自训练训练轻量级设备端学生模型
AI.result: 在超过2000名参与者的大规模众包数据集上，DistillGaze相比仅使用合成数据的基线将中位注视误差降低了58.62%，同时保持256K参数的轻量级模型，适合实时设备端部署
AI.conclusion: DistillGaze为适应硬件变化的注视估计模型训练和部署提供了高效途径，并为在设备端回归任务中结合合成监督和无标记真实数据提供了可行方案

title: An Explainable Vision-Language Model Framework with Adaptive PID-Tversky Loss for Lumbar Spinal Stenosis Diagnosis
summary: Lumbar Spinal Stenosis (LSS) diagnosis remains a critical clinical challenge, with diagnosis heavily dependent on labor-intensive manual interpretation of multi-view Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), leading to substantial inter-observer variability and diagnostic delays. Existing vision-language models simultaneously fail to address the extreme class imbalance prevalent in clinical segmentation datasets while preserving spatial accuracy, primarily due to global pooling mechanisms that discard crucial anatomical hierarchies. We present an end-to-end Explainable Vision-Language Model framework designed to overcome these limitations, achieved through two principal objectives. We propose a Spatial Patch Cross-Attention module that enables precise, text-directed localization of spinal anomalies with spatial precision. A novel Adaptive PID-Tversky Loss function by integrating control theory principles dynamically further modifies training penalties to specifically address difficult, under-segmented minority instances. By incorporating foundational VLMs alongside an Automated Radiology Report Generation module, our framework demonstrates considerable performance: a diagnostic classification accuracy of 90.69%, a macro-averaged Dice score of 0.9512 for segmentation, and a CIDEr score of 92.80%. Furthermore, the framework shows explainability by converting complex segmentation predictions into radiologist-style clinical reports, thereby establishing a new benchmark for transparent, interpretable AI in clinical medical imaging that keeps essential human supervision while enhancing diagnostic capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可解释的视觉语言模型框架，用于腰椎管狭窄症的诊断，通过空间补丁交叉注意力模块和自适应PID-Tversky损失函数，解决临床数据集中的极端类别不平衡问题，同时保持空间精度。
AI.motivation: 腰椎管狭窄症诊断依赖人工解读多视图MRI，存在观察者间变异大、诊断延迟的问题。现有视觉语言模型无法同时解决临床分割数据集的极端类别不平衡和空间精度保持问题，主要由于全局池化机制丢弃了关键的解剖层次信息。
AI.method: 提出端到端的可解释视觉语言模型框架，包含两个主要创新：1) 空间补丁交叉注意力模块，实现文本指导的脊柱异常精确定位；2) 自适应PID-Tversky损失函数，结合控制理论原理动态调整训练惩罚，专门针对难以分割的少数类别实例。框架还整合基础视觉语言模型和自动放射报告生成模块。
AI.result: 框架表现出显著性能：诊断分类准确率90.69%，分割宏平均Dice分数0.9512，CIDEr分数92.80%。框架通过将复杂分割预测转换为放射科医生风格的临床报告，展示了可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为临床医学影像建立了透明、可解释AI的新基准，在保持必要人工监督的同时增强了诊断能力，解决了现有模型在类别不平衡和空间精度方面的局限性。

title: Distal-Stable Beam for Continuum Robots
summary: Continuum robots are well suited for constrained environments but suffer from low distal stiffness, resulting in large posture errors under external loads. In this paper, we propose a novel structural primitive, the Distal-Stable Beam, which achieves a strong stiffness gradient through purely geometric design, maintaining compliance in the intermediate section while ensuring high distal rigidity. The structure consists of two parallel rods and one convergent rod constrained by guide disks, introducing geometric coupling that suppresses deformation modes and preserves distal posture. Experiments show that the distal stiffness is 12 times higher than at the center, corresponding to an approximately 100-fold improvement over a conventional cantilever beam. The proposed mechanism enables simultaneous compliance and distal stability without active stiffness modulation, providing a new design approach for continuum robots requiring both safety and precision.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新型结构单元"远端稳定梁"，通过纯几何设计实现强刚度梯度，在保持中间段柔顺性的同时确保远端高刚性，为连续体机器人提供同时具备安全性和精度的新设计方法。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人适用于受限环境，但存在远端刚度低的问题，导致在外部载荷下产生大的姿态误差。需要一种既能保持柔顺性又能确保远端稳定性的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出远端稳定梁结构，由两根平行杆和一根收敛杆通过导向盘约束组成。通过几何耦合抑制变形模式，保持远端姿态，实现纯几何设计的强刚度梯度。
AI.result: 实验显示远端刚度比中心高12倍，相比传统悬臂梁有约100倍的改进。该机制无需主动刚度调节即可同时实现柔顺性和远端稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 远端稳定梁为需要同时具备安全性和精度的连续体机器人提供了新的设计方法，通过几何设计实现刚度梯度，解决了传统连续体机器人远端刚度不足的问题。

title: Delaunay Canopy: Building Wireframe Reconstruction from Airborne LiDAR Point Clouds via Delaunay Graph
summary: Reconstructing building wireframe from airborne LiDAR point clouds yields a compact, topology-centric representation that enables structural understanding beyond dense meshes. Yet a key limitation persists: conventional methods have failed to achieve accurate wireframe reconstruction in regions afflicted by significant noise, sparsity, or internal corners. This failure stems from the inability to establish an adaptive search space to effectively leverage the rich 3D geometry of large, sparse building point clouds. In this work, we address this challenge with Delaunay Canopy, which utilizes the Delaunay graph as a geometric prior to define a geometrically adaptive search space. Central to our approach is Delaunay Graph Scoring, which not only reconstructs the underlying geometric manifold but also yields region-wise curvature signatures to robustly guide the reconstruction. Built on this foundation, our corner and wire selection modules leverage the Delaunay-induced prior to focus on highly probable elements, thereby shaping the search space and enabling accurate prediction even in previously intractable regions. Extensive experiments on the Building3D Tallinn city and entry-level datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art wireframe reconstruction, delivering accurate predictions across diverse and complex building geometries.

AI.tldr: Delaunay Canopy方法利用Delaunay图作为几何先验，构建自适应搜索空间，在噪声大、稀疏或内角区域实现精确的建筑线框重建。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在噪声大、稀疏或内角区域无法实现精确的建筑线框重建，主要原因是无法建立自适应搜索空间来有效利用大型稀疏建筑点云的丰富3D几何信息。
AI.method: 提出Delaunay Canopy方法：1) 使用Delaunay图作为几何先验定义几何自适应搜索空间；2) Delaunay图评分重建底层几何流形并产生区域曲率特征；3) 角点和线框选择模块利用Delaunay诱导先验聚焦高概率元素，实现精确预测。
AI.result: 在Building3D Tallinn城市和入门级数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法实现了最先进的线框重建性能，能在多样复杂的建筑几何结构上提供精确预测。
AI.conclusion: Delaunay Canopy通过几何自适应搜索空间解决了传统方法在噪声、稀疏和内角区域的局限性，为建筑点云线框重建提供了鲁棒有效的解决方案。

title: Efficient Equivariant Transformer for Self-Driving Agent Modeling
summary: Accurately modeling agent behaviors is an important task in self-driving. It is also a task with many symmetries, such as equivariance to the order of agents and objects in the scene or equivariance to arbitrary roto-translations of the entire scene as a whole; i.e., SE(2)-equivariance. The transformer architecture is a ubiquitous tool for modeling these symmetries. While standard self-attention is inherently permutation equivariant, explicit pairwise relative positional encodings have been the standard for introducing SE(2)-equivariance. However, this approach introduces an additional cost that is quadratic in the number of agents, limiting its scalability to larger scenes and batch sizes. In this work, we propose DriveGATr, a novel transformer-based architecture for agent modeling that achieves SE(2)-equivariance without the computational cost of existing methods. Inspired by recent advances in geometric deep learning, DriveGATr encodes scene elements as multivectors in the 2D projective geometric algebra $\mathbb{R}^*_{2,0,1}$ and processes them with a stack of equivariant transformer blocks. Crucially, DriveGATr models geometric relationships using standard attention between multivectors, eliminating the need for costly explicit pairwise relative positional encodings. Experiments on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset demonstrate that DriveGATr is comparable to the state-of-the-art in traffic simulation and establishes a superior Pareto front for performance vs computational cost.

AI.tldr: DriveGATr：一种基于几何代数的SE(2)-等变Transformer架构，用于自动驾驶中的智能体建模，无需昂贵的显式成对相对位置编码
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中准确建模智能体行为至关重要，现有方法使用显式成对相对位置编码实现SE(2)-等变性，但计算成本随智能体数量呈二次方增长，限制了大规模场景和批处理的可扩展性
AI.method: 提出DriveGATr架构，将场景元素编码为2D投影几何代数ℝ*_{2,0,1}中的多向量，使用等变Transformer块处理，通过多向量间的标准注意力建模几何关系，无需显式成对相对位置编码
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Motion Dataset上的实验表明，DriveGATr在交通仿真方面与最先进方法相当，并在性能与计算成本之间建立了更优的Pareto前沿
AI.conclusion: DriveGATr通过几何代数表示实现了高效的SE(2)-等变Transformer架构，消除了二次方计算成本，为大规模自动驾驶场景建模提供了可扩展的解决方案

title: Token-Efficient Multimodal Reasoning via Image Prompt Packaging
summary: Deploying large multimodal language models at scale is constrained by token-based inference costs, yet the cost-performance behavior of visual prompting strategies remains poorly characterized. We introduce Image Prompt Packaging (IPPg), a prompting paradigm that embeds structured text directly into images to reduce text token overhead, and benchmark it across five datasets, three frontier models (GPT-4.1, GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet), and two task families (VQA and code generation). We derive a cost formulation decomposing savings by token type and show IPPg achieves 35.8--91.0\% inference cost reductions. Despite token compression of up to 96\%, accuracy remains competitive in many settings, though outcomes are highly model- and task-dependent: GPT-4.1 achieves simultaneous accuracy and cost gains on CoSQL, while Claude 3.5 incurs cost increases on several VQA benchmarks. Systematic error analysis yields a failure-mode taxonomy: spatial reasoning, non-English inputs, and character-sensitive operations are most vulnerable, while schema-structured tasks benefit most. A 125-configuration rendering ablation reveals accuracy shifts of 10--30 percentage points, establishing visual encoding choices as a first-class variable in multimodal system design.

AI.tldr: Image Prompt Packaging (IPPg)通过在图像中嵌入结构化文本来减少文本token开销，在多个模型和任务上实现了35.8-91.0%的推理成本降低，但准确率表现高度依赖于模型和任务类型。
AI.motivation: 大规模多模态语言模型的部署受到基于token的推理成本限制，而视觉提示策略的成本-性能关系尚未得到充分研究。需要探索能够降低文本token开销的视觉提示方法。
AI.method: 提出Image Prompt Packaging (IPPg)提示范式，将结构化文本直接嵌入图像中以减少文本token开销。在5个数据集、3个前沿模型(GPT-4.1、GPT-4o、Claude 3.5 Sonnet)和2个任务家族(VQA和代码生成)上进行基准测试。推导了按token类型分解的成本公式，并进行125种配置的渲染消融实验。
AI.result: IPPg实现了35.8-91.0%的推理成本降低，token压缩高达96%。准确率表现高度模型和任务依赖：GPT-4.1在CoSQL上同时实现准确率和成本增益，而Claude 3.5在多个VQA基准上成本增加。渲染消融显示准确率变化10-30个百分点，表明视觉编码选择是多模态系统设计的关键变量。
AI.conclusion: IPPg是有效的成本优化策略，但效果高度依赖于模型和任务特性。空间推理、非英语输入和字符敏感操作最易受影响，而模式结构化任务受益最大。视觉编码选择应被视为多模态系统设计的一等变量。

title: Eligibility-Aware Evidence Synthesis: An Agentic Framework for Clinical Trial Meta-Analysis
summary: Clinical evidence synthesis requires identifying relevant trials from large registries and aggregating results that account for population differences. While recent LLM-based approaches have automated components of systematic review, they do not support end-to-end evidence synthesis. Moreover, conventional meta-analysis weights studies by statistical precision without considering clinical compatibility reflected in eligibility criteria. We propose EligMeta, an agentic framework that integrates automated trial discovery with eligibility-aware meta-analysis, translating natural-language queries into reproducible trial selection and incorporating eligibility alignment into study weighting to produce cohort-specific pooled estimates. EligMeta employs a hybrid architecture separating LLM-based reasoning from deterministic execution: LLMs generate interpretable rules from natural-language queries and perform schema-constrained parsing of trial metadata, while all logical operations, weight computations, and statistical pooling are executed deterministically to ensure reproducibility. The framework structures eligibility criteria and computes similarity-based study weights reflecting population alignment between target and comparator trials. In a gastric cancer landscape analysis, EligMeta reduced 4,044 candidate trials to 39 clinically relevant studies through rule-based filtering, recovering all 13 guideline-cited trials. In an olaparib adverse events meta-analysis across four trials, eligibility-aware weighting shifted the pooled risk ratio from 2.18 (95% CI: 1.71-2.79) under conventional Mantel-Haenszel estimation to 1.97 (95% CI: 1.76-2.20), demonstrating quantifiable impact of incorporating eligibility alignment. EligMeta bridges automated trial discovery with eligibility-aware meta-analysis, providing a scalable and reproducible framework for evidence synthesis in precision medicine.

AI.tldr: EligMeta是一个端到端的证据合成框架，通过自动试验发现和资格感知的元分析，将自然语言查询转化为可重复的试验选择，并纳入资格对齐进行加权，生成队列特定的汇总估计。
AI.motivation: 当前基于LLM的系统综述方法仅自动化了部分环节，不支持端到端证据合成；传统元分析仅基于统计精度加权，未考虑反映临床兼容性的资格标准差异。
AI.method: 采用混合架构分离LLM推理与确定性执行：LLM从自然语言查询生成可解释规则并进行模式约束的试验元数据解析，所有逻辑操作、权重计算和统计汇总均确定性执行以确保可重复性；框架结构化资格标准并计算基于相似性的研究权重，反映目标与比较试验间的人群对齐。
AI.result: 在胃癌分析中，从4,044个候选试验通过基于规则的筛选减少到39个临床相关研究，恢复了所有13个指南引用的试验；在奥拉帕利不良事件元分析中，资格感知加权使汇总风险比从传统Mantel-Haenszel估计的2.18变为1.97，展示了纳入资格对齐的量化影响。
AI.conclusion: EligMeta将自动试验发现与资格感知元分析相结合，为精准医学中的证据合成提供了一个可扩展且可重复的框架。

title: Low-Burden LLM-Based Preference Learning: Personalizing Assistive Robots from Natural Language Feedback for Users with Paralysis
comment: This work has been submitted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (ROMAN)
summary: Physically Assistive Robots (PARs) require personalized behaviors to ensure user safety and comfort. However, traditional preference learning methods, like exhaustive pairwise comparisons, cause severe physical and cognitive fatigue for users with profound motor impairments. To solve this, we propose a low-burden, offline framework that translates unstructured natural language feedback directly into deterministic robotic control policies. To safely bridge the gap between ambiguous human speech and robotic code, our pipeline uses Large Language Models (LLMs) grounded in the Occupational Therapy Practice Framework (OTPF). This clinical reasoning decodes subjective user reactions into explicit physical and psychological needs, which are then mapped into transparent decision trees. Before deployment, an automated "LLM-as-a-Judge" verifies the code's structural safety. We validated this system in a simulated meal preparation study with 10 adults with paralysis. Results show our natural language approach significantly reduces user workload compared to traditional baselines. Additionally, independent clinical experts confirmed the generated policies are safe and accurately reflect user preferences.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于自然语言反馈的低负担离线框架，将非结构化语言直接转换为确定性机器人控制策略，减少重度运动障碍用户的疲劳
AI.motivation: 物理辅助机器人需要个性化行为确保用户安全舒适，但传统偏好学习方法（如详尽成对比较）会给重度运动障碍用户带来严重的生理和认知疲劳
AI.method: 使用基于职业治疗实践框架的大语言模型，将模糊的人类语音解码为明确的生理和心理需求，然后映射到透明决策树，并通过"LLM-as-a-Judge"自动验证代码结构安全性
AI.result: 在10名瘫痪成人的模拟备餐研究中验证，自然语言方法显著降低用户工作负荷，独立临床专家确认生成策略安全且准确反映用户偏好
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架能有效将自然语言反馈转化为安全机器人控制策略，为物理辅助机器人提供低负担个性化方案

title: VLMs Need Words: Vision Language Models Ignore Visual Detail In Favor of Semantic Anchors
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) achieve impressive performance across a wide range of multimodal tasks. However, on some tasks that demand fine-grained visual perception, they often fail even when the required information is present in their internal representations. In this work, we demonstrate that this gap arises from their narrow training pipeline which focuses on moving visual information to the textual space. Consequently, VLMs can only reason about visual entities that can be mapped to known concepts in the language space, leaving vision-focused tasks such as visual correspondence and reasoning about novel visual entities poorly supported. As a result, VLMs are severely limited in several important multimodal capabilities because they rely on brittle, hallucinated textual descriptions of visual entities that they cannot map to textual representations. We verify this behavior through visual correspondence tasks, in which VLMs must detect matching entities between two images. Testing across semantic, shape, and face correspondence tasks, we find that VLMs perform much better when the relevant entities are nameable in language than when they are unnameable. Mechanistically, our Logit Lens analyses confirm that VLMs explicitly assign semantic labels to nameable entities and surface more unique corresponding tokens compared to unnameable entities. Furthermore, we show that teaching completely arbitrary names for unknown entities improves performance, yet task-specific finetuning yields even stronger generalization without relying on language priors. Our findings suggest that current VLM failures on visual tasks reflect learned shortcuts from their training, rather than a fundamental limitation of multimodal architectures.

AI.tldr: VLMs在需要细粒度视觉感知的任务上表现不佳，原因是其训练流程过于关注将视觉信息映射到文本空间，导致无法处理无法用语言命名的视觉实体。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLMs在多模态任务上表现出色，但在需要细粒度视觉感知的任务上经常失败，即使所需信息存在于其内部表示中。本研究旨在探究这种差距的根源。
AI.method: 通过视觉对应任务测试VLMs性能，包括语义、形状和面部对应任务；使用Logit Lens分析机制；比较可命名实体与不可命名实体的表现；探索通过教授任意名称和任务特定微调来改进性能。
AI.result: VLMs在可命名实体上的表现显著优于不可命名实体；机制分析显示VLMs会为可命名实体显式分配语义标签并生成更多独特的对应标记；教授任意名称可改善性能，但任务特定微调能实现更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs在视觉任务上的失败反映了其训练中学到的捷径，而非多模态架构的根本限制。任务特定微调可以绕过对语言先验的依赖，实现更好的视觉推理能力。

title: Do Agent Societies Develop Intellectual Elites? The Hidden Power Laws of Collective Cognition in LLM Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) multi-agent systems are increasingly deployed as interacting agent societies, yet scaling these systems often yields diminishing or unstable returns, the causes of which remain poorly understood. We present the first large-scale empirical study of coordination dynamics in LLM-based multi-agent systems, introducing an atomic event-level formulation that reconstructs reasoning as cascades of coordination. Analyzing over 1.5 Million interactions across tasks, topologies, and scales, we uncover three coupled laws: coordination follows heavy-tailed cascades, concentrates via preferential attachment into intellectual elites, and produces increasingly frequent extreme events as system size grows. We show that these effects are coupled through a single structural mechanism: an integration bottleneck, in which coordination expansion scales with system size while consolidation does not, producing large but weakly integrated reasoning processes. To test this mechanism, we introduce Deficit-Triggered Integration (DTI), which selectively increases integration under imbalance. DTI improves performance precisely where coordination fails, without suppressing large-scale reasoning. Together, our results establish quantitative laws of collective cognition and identify coordination structure as a fundamental, previously unmeasured axis for understanding and improving scalable multi-agent intelligence.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次对LLM多智能体系统中的协调动力学进行了大规模实证研究，揭示了协调遵循重尾级联、通过优先连接集中到知识精英、并随系统规模增长产生更频繁极端事件的三条耦合定律，提出了选择性增强整合的DTI方法来改善协调失败。
AI.motivation: LLM多智能体系统作为交互智能体社会部署日益增多，但系统扩展常导致收益递减或不稳定，其根本原因尚不清楚。需要理解多智能体系统中协调动态的基本规律。
AI.method: 引入原子事件级表述，将推理重构为协调级联。分析了超过150万次交互，涵盖不同任务、拓扑结构和规模。提出赤字触发整合(DTI)方法，在协调失衡时选择性增强整合。
AI.result: 发现三条耦合定律：协调遵循重尾级联分布；通过优先连接集中到知识精英；系统规模增长导致极端事件更频繁。揭示单一结构机制：整合瓶颈，即协调扩展随系统规模增长而整合不增长。DTI方法在协调失败处精确提升性能，同时不抑制大规模推理。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了集体认知的定量定律，确定协调结构是理解和改进可扩展多智能体智能的一个基本、先前未测量的维度。整合瓶颈机制解释了扩展收益递减现象，DTI提供了针对性的改进方法。

title: A Spectral Framework for Multi-Scale Nonlinear Dimensionality Reduction
summary: Dimensionality reduction (DR) is characterized by two longstanding trade-offs. First, there is a global-local preservation tension: methods such as t-SNE and UMAP prioritize local neighborhood preservation, yet may distort global manifold structure, while methods such as Laplacian Eigenmaps preserve global geometry but often yield limited local separation. Second, there is a gap between expressiveness and analytical transparency: many nonlinear DR methods produce embeddings without an explicit connection to the underlying high-dimensional structure, limiting insight into the embedding process. In this paper, we introduce a spectral framework for nonlinear DR that addresses these challenges. Our approach embeds high-dimensional data using a spectral basis combined with cross-entropy optimization, enabling multi-scale representations that bridge global and local structure. Leveraging linear spectral decomposition, the framework further supports analysis of embeddings through a graph-frequency perspective, enabling examination of how spectral modes influence the resulting embedding. We complement this analysis with glyph-based scatterplot augmentations for visual exploration. Quantitative evaluations and case studies demonstrate that our framework improves manifold continuity while enabling deeper analysis of embedding structure through spectral mode contributions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种谱框架解决降维中的全局-局部保持权衡和表达能力-分析透明度差距，通过谱基与交叉熵优化实现多尺度表示，支持图频率视角分析嵌入结构。
AI.motivation: 解决降维中的两个长期权衡：1）全局-局部保持矛盾（如t-SNE/UMAP侧重局部但扭曲全局，Laplacian Eigenmaps保持全局但局部分离有限）；2）表达能力与分析透明度之间的差距（许多非线性降维方法缺乏与高维结构的明确联系，限制了对嵌入过程的理解）。
AI.method: 提出谱框架：结合谱基与交叉熵优化嵌入高维数据，实现多尺度表示以桥接全局和局部结构；利用线性谱分解支持通过图频率视角分析嵌入，可检查谱模式如何影响最终嵌入；补充基于字形散点图增强进行可视化探索。
AI.result: 定量评估和案例研究表明，该框架改善了流形连续性，同时通过谱模式贡献实现了对嵌入结构的更深入分析。
AI.conclusion: 提出的谱框架有效解决了降维中的全局-局部权衡和分析透明度问题，通过多尺度表示和谱分析能力为非线性降维提供了新的分析视角和可视化工具。

title: Generating Satellite Imagery Data for Wildfire Detection through Mask-Conditioned Generative AI
summary:
The scarcity of labeled satellite imagery remains a fundamental bottleneck for deep-learning (DL)-based wildfire monitoring systems. This paper investigates whether a diffusion-based foundation model for Earth Observation (EO), EarthSynth, can synthesize realistic post-wildfire Sentinel-2 RGB imagery conditioned on existing burn masks, without task-specific retraining.
  Using burn masks derived from the CalFireSeg-50 dataset (Martin et al., 2025), we design and evaluate six controlled experimental configurations that systematically vary: (i) pipeline architecture (mask-only full generation vs. inpainting with pre-fire context), (ii) prompt engineering strategy (three hand-crafted prompts and a VLM-generated prompt via Qwen2-VL), and (iii) a region-wise color-matching post-processing step.
  Quantitative assessment on 10 stratified test samples uses four complementary metrics: Burn IoU, burn-region color distance (ΔC_burn), Darkness Contrast, and Spectral Plausibility. Results show that inpainting-based pipelines consistently outperform full-tile generation across all metrics, with the structured inpainting prompt achieving the best spatial alignment (Burn IoU = 0.456) and burn saliency (Darkness Contrast = 20.44), while color matching produces the lowest color distance (ΔC_burn = 63.22) at the cost of reduced burn saliency.
  VLM-assisted inpainting is competitive with hand-crafted prompts. These findings provide a foundation for incorporating generative data augmentation into wildfire detection pipelines.
  Code and experiments are available at: https://www.kaggle.com/code/valeriamartinh/genai-all-runned

AI.tldr: 研究探索了EarthSynth扩散模型能否基于现有燃烧掩码合成逼真的野火后Sentinel-2 RGB影像，无需任务特定微调。通过六种实验配置评估了不同架构、提示工程和颜色匹配方法，发现基于修复的管道在空间对齐和燃烧显著性方面优于全图生成。
AI.motivation: 标记卫星影像的稀缺性是深度学习野火监测系统的主要瓶颈。研究旨在探索扩散基础模型EarthSynth是否能够基于现有燃烧掩码合成逼真的野火后影像，为生成式数据增强提供基础。
AI.method: 使用CalFireSeg-50数据集的燃烧掩码，设计了六种实验配置：1) 管道架构（仅掩码全图生成 vs. 结合灾前背景的修复）；2) 提示工程策略（三种手工提示和VLM生成的提示）；3) 区域颜色匹配后处理。在10个分层测试样本上使用Burn IoU、ΔC_burn、Darkness Contrast和Spectral Plausibility四个指标进行定量评估。
AI.result: 基于修复的管道在所有指标上均优于全图生成。结构化修复提示获得最佳空间对齐（Burn IoU = 0.456）和燃烧显著性（Darkness Contrast = 20.44）。颜色匹配产生最低颜色距离（ΔC_burn = 63.22）但降低了燃烧显著性。VLM辅助修复与手工提示竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: EarthSynth扩散模型能够基于燃烧掩码合成逼真的野火后影像，无需任务特定训练。基于修复的架构结合结构化提示表现最佳，为将生成式数据增强整合到野火检测管道奠定了基础。

title: Too Polite to Disagree: Understanding Sycophancy Propagation in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often exhibit sycophancy: agreement with user stance even when it conflicts with the model's opinion. While prior work has mostly studied this in single-agent settings, it remains underexplored in collaborative multi-agent systems. We ask whether awareness of other agents' sycophancy levels influences discussion outcomes. To investigate this, we run controlled experiments with six open-source LLMs, providing agents with peer sycophancy rankings that estimate each peer's tendency toward sycophancy. These rankings are based on scores calculated using various static (pre-discussion) and dynamic (online) strategies. We find that providing sycophancy priors reduces the influence of sycophancy-prone peers, mitigates error-cascades, and improves final discussion accuracy by an absolute 10.5%. Thus, this is a lightweight, effective way to reduce discussion sycophancy and improve downstream accuracy.

AI.tldr: 通过向多智能体系统中的LLM提供同伴谄媚倾向排名，可以有效降低谄媚行为影响，提升讨论准确性
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型存在谄媚倾向（sycophancy），即在单智能体设置中会迎合用户立场。然而，在多智能体协作系统中，这种倾向如何影响讨论结果尚未得到充分研究，特别是智能体对其他智能体谄媚水平的认知是否会改变讨论动态。
AI.method: 使用六个开源LLM进行受控实验，为智能体提供同伴谄媚排名，这些排名基于静态（讨论前）和动态（在线）策略计算的分数。通过对比有无谄媚先验信息的情况，分析其对讨论结果的影响。
AI.result: 提供谄媚先验信息能够减少谄媚倾向较强同伴的影响力，缓解错误级联效应，最终讨论准确率绝对提升10.5%。这表明该方法是一种轻量级且有效的降低讨论谄媚性、提升下游准确性的策略。
AI.conclusion: 在多智能体系统中提供同伴谄媚倾向信息是一种有效的干预措施，能够显著降低谄媚行为对讨论结果的不利影响，提升协作决策的准确性，为改善LLM在多智能体环境中的表现提供了实用方法。

title: Learning When to See and When to Feel: Adaptive Vision-Torque Fusion for Contact-Aware Manipulation
summary: Vision-based policies have achieved a good performance in robotic manipulation due to the accessibility and richness of visual observations. However, purely visual sensing becomes insufficient in contact-rich and force-sensitive tasks where force/torque (F/T) signals provide critical information about contact dynamics, alignment, and interaction quality. Although various strategies have been proposed to integrate vision and F/T signals, including auxiliary prediction objectives, mixture-of-experts architectures, and contact-aware gating mechanisms, a comparison of these approaches remains lacking. In this work, we provide a comparison study of different F/T-vision integration strategies within diffusion-based manipulation policies. In addition, we propose an adaptive integration strategy that ignores F/T signals during non-contact phases while adaptively leveraging both vision and torque information during contact. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms the strongest baseline by 14% in success rate, highlighting the importance of contact-aware multimodal fusion for robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了力/力矩与视觉信号在机器人操作中的不同融合策略，并提出了一种自适应融合方法，在非接触阶段忽略力/力矩信号，在接触阶段自适应利用视觉和力矩信息。
AI.motivation: 基于视觉的策略在机器人操作中表现良好，但在接触丰富和力敏感的任务中，纯视觉感知不足，力/力矩信号能提供接触动力学、对齐和交互质量的关键信息。虽然已有多种视觉与力/力矩信号融合策略，但缺乏对这些方法的系统比较。
AI.method: 1. 在基于扩散的操作策略框架下，比较不同的力/力矩-视觉融合策略；2. 提出自适应融合策略：在非接触阶段忽略力/力矩信号，在接触阶段自适应地利用视觉和力矩信息。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法比最强基线在成功率上提升了14%，突显了接触感知的多模态融合对机器人操作的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应融合策略能有效整合视觉和力/力矩信号，在接触丰富的机器人操作任务中显著提升性能，证明了接触感知的多模态融合的重要性。

title: Guideline2Graph: Profile-Aware Multimodal Parsing for Executable Clinical Decision Graphs
summary: Clinical practice guidelines are long, multimodal documents whose branching recommendations are difficult to convert into executable clinical decision support (CDS), and one-shot parsing often breaks cross-page continuity. Recent LLM/VLM extractors are mostly local or text-centric, under-specifying section interfaces and failing to consolidate cross-page control flow across full documents into one coherent decision graph. We present a decomposition-first pipeline that converts full-guideline evidence into an executable clinical decision graph through topology-aware chunking, interface-constrained chunk graph generation, and provenance-preserving global aggregation. Rather than relying on single-pass generation, the pipeline uses explicit entry/terminal interfaces and semantic deduplication to preserve cross-page continuity while keeping the induced control flow auditable and structurally consistent. We evaluate on an adjudicated prostate-guideline benchmark with matched inputs and the same underlying VLM backbone across compared methods. On the complete merged graph, our approach improves edge and triplet precision/recall from $19.6\%/16.1\%$ in existing models to $69.0\%/87.5\%$, while node recall rises from $78.1\%$ to $93.8\%$. These results support decomposition-first, auditable guideline-to-CDS conversion on this benchmark, while current evidence remains limited to one adjudicated prostate guideline and motivates broader multi-guideline validation.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种分解优先的管道方法，将完整的临床实践指南转换为可执行的临床决策图，通过拓扑感知分块、接口约束的块图生成和溯源保留的全局聚合，显著提升了决策图的准确性和完整性。
AI.motivation: 临床实践指南是冗长、多模态的文档，其分支推荐难以转换为可执行的临床决策支持系统。现有的LLM/VLM提取器大多是局部或文本中心的，未能充分指定章节接口，也无法将跨页面的控制流整合为连贯的决策图。
AI.method: 采用分解优先的管道方法：1) 拓扑感知分块，2) 接口约束的块图生成，3) 溯源保留的全局聚合。使用明确的入口/终止接口和语义去重，保持跨页面连续性，同时确保控制流的可审计性和结构一致性。
AI.result: 在前列腺指南基准测试中，完整合并图的边和三元组精确率/召回率从现有模型的19.6%/16.1%提升到69.0%/87.5%，节点召回率从78.1%提升到93.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法支持分解优先、可审计的指南到临床决策支持系统的转换，在基准测试中表现优异，但当前证据仅限于一个前列腺指南，需要更广泛的多指南验证。

title: A soft and lightweight fabric-based pneumatic interface for multimodal fingertip tactile feedback
summary: Wearable fingertip haptic devices are critical for realistic interaction in virtual reality, augmented reality, and teleoperation, yet existing approaches struggle to simultaneously achieve adequate tactile output, low mass, simple fabrication, and untethered portability. Here we show that fabric-based pneumatic actuation can address this gap. Our device comprises four pneumatic chambers fabricated from thermoplastic polyurethane-coated fabric via computer numerical control heat-sealing, yielding a soft, conformable interface weighing 2.1 g that operates untethered with a wrist-mounted control unit. Mechanical and dynamic characterization confirms that the fabric actuators produce sufficient force, displacement, and bandwidth for fingertip tactile rendering. A psychophysical study with 15 participants demonstrates classification accuracy exceeding 90% across three distinct tactile modes -- contact configuration, directional sliding, and vibrotactile frequency. These findings establish fabric-based pneumatic actuation as a viable technology route for lightweight, low-cost, and multimodal fingertip haptic interfaces.

AI.tldr: 基于织物的气动驱动指尖触觉设备，通过热封工艺制造，重量仅2.1克，支持无线操作，能实现接触配置、方向滑动和振动触觉三种模式，分类准确率超过90%。
AI.motivation: 现有可穿戴指尖触觉设备难以同时实现足够的触觉输出、低质量、简单制造和无束缚便携性。需要一种能平衡这些需求的新技术方案。
AI.method: 采用织物基气动驱动技术，使用热塑性聚氨酯涂层织物通过CNC热封工艺制造四个气动腔室，形成柔软贴合界面，配合腕戴式控制单元实现无线操作。
AI.result: 设备重量仅2.1克，机械和动态特性测试确认其能产生足够的力、位移和带宽用于指尖触觉渲染。心理物理学研究显示15名参与者对三种触觉模式的分类准确率超过90%。
AI.conclusion: 织物基气动驱动技术为轻量、低成本、多模态的指尖触觉接口提供了一条可行的技术路线，解决了现有设备在触觉输出、重量、制造和便携性方面的平衡问题。

title: Interpretable Deep Reinforcement Learning for Element-level Bridge Life-cycle Optimization
summary: The new Specifications for the National Bridge Inventory (SNBI), in effect from 2022, emphasize the use of element-level condition states (CS) for risk-based bridge management. Instead of a general component rating, element-level condition data use an array of relative CS quantities (i.e., CS proportions) to represent the condition of a bridge. Although this greatly increases the granularity of bridge condition data, it introduces challenges to set up optimal life-cycle policies due to the expanded state space from one single categorical integer to four-dimensional probability arrays. This study proposes a new interpretable reinforcement learning (RL) approach to seek optimal life-cycle policies based on element-level state representations. Compared to existing RL methods, the proposed algorithm yields life-cycle policies in the form of oblique decision trees with reasonable amounts of nodes and depth, making them directly understandable and auditable by humans and easily implementable into current bridge management systems. To achieve near-optimal policies, the proposed approach introduces three major improvements to existing RL methods: (a) the use of differentiable soft tree models as actor function approximators, (b) a temperature annealing process during training, and (c) regularization paired with pruning rules to limit policy complexity. Collectively, these improvements can yield interpretable life-cycle policies in the form of deterministic oblique decision trees. The benefits and trade-offs from these techniques are demonstrated in both supervised and reinforcement learning settings. The resulting framework is illustrated in a life-cycle optimization problem for steel girder bridges.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于可解释强化学习的新方法，用于制定基于元素级状态表示的桥梁最优生命周期策略，通过可微软树模型、温度退火和正则化等技术生成可直接理解的斜决策树策略。
AI.motivation: 2022年生效的新国家桥梁库存规范强调使用元素级状况状态进行基于风险的桥梁管理，这虽然提高了数据粒度，但由于状态空间从单一分类整数扩展到四维概率数组，给制定最优生命周期策略带来了挑战。
AI.method: 提出新的可解释强化学习方法，包含三个主要改进：(a)使用可微软树模型作为演员函数逼近器，(b)训练过程中的温度退火过程，(c)正则化与剪枝规则结合以限制策略复杂度，最终生成确定性斜决策树形式的可解释生命周期策略。
AI.result: 该方法在监督学习和强化学习设置中展示了各项技术的优势和权衡，并在钢梁桥生命周期优化问题中进行了框架验证，能够生成节点数量和深度合理的可直接理解和审计的生命周期策略。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可解释强化学习方法能够基于元素级状态表示寻求最优生命周期策略，生成可直接理解、可审计且易于集成到现有桥梁管理系统中的决策树策略，解决了新规范带来的状态空间扩展挑战。

title: Hierarchical, Interpretable, Label-Free Concept Bottleneck Model
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) introduce interpretability to black-box deep learning models by predicting labels through human-understandable concepts. However, unlike humans, who identify objects at different levels of abstraction using both general and specific features, existing CBMs operate at a single semantic level in both concept and label space. We propose HIL-CBM, a Hierarchical Interpretable Label-Free Concept Bottleneck Model that extends CBMs into a hierarchical framework to enhance interpretability by more closely mirroring the human cognitive process. HIL-CBM enables classification and explanation across multiple semantic levels without requiring relational concept annotations. HIL-CBM aligns the abstraction level of concept-based explanations with that of model predictions, progressing from abstract to concrete. This is achieved by (i) introducing a gradient-based visual consistency loss that encourages abstraction layers to focus on similar spatial regions, and (ii) training dual classification heads, each operating on feature concepts at different abstraction levels. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that HIL-CBM outperforms state-of-the-art sparse CBMs in classification accuracy. Human evaluations further show that HIL-CBM provides more interpretable and accurate explanations, while maintaining a hierarchical and label-free approach to feature concepts.

AI.tldr: HIL-CBM：一种分层可解释的无标签概念瓶颈模型，通过分层框架增强可解释性，模仿人类认知过程，在多个语义层次上进行分类和解释，无需关系概念标注。
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型（CBMs）在概念和标签空间中都只在单一语义层次上操作，而人类认知过程是在不同抽象层次上识别对象，使用通用和特定特征。需要更接近人类认知过程的分层可解释模型。
AI.method: 1. 引入基于梯度的视觉一致性损失，鼓励抽象层关注相似空间区域；2. 训练双分类头，每个头在不同抽象层次的特征概念上操作；3. 实现从抽象到具体的概念解释与预测对齐。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，HIL-CBM在分类准确率上优于最先进的稀疏CBMs。人类评估进一步显示，HIL-CBM提供更可解释和准确的解释，同时保持特征概念的分层和无标签方法。
AI.conclusion: HIL-CBM通过分层框架扩展了概念瓶颈模型，更接近人类认知过程，在多个语义层次上提供分类和解释，无需关系概念标注，在准确性和可解释性方面都表现出优越性。

title: AffordTissue: Dense Affordance Prediction for Tool-Action Specific Tissue Interaction
summary: Surgical action automation has progressed rapidly toward achieving surgeon-like dexterous control, driven primarily by advances in learning from demonstration and vision-language-action models. While these have demonstrated success in table-top experiments, translating them to clinical deployment remains challenging: current methods offer limited predictability on where instruments will interact on tissue surfaces and lack explicit conditioning inputs to enforce tool-action-specific safe interaction regions. Addressing this gap, we introduce AffordTissue, a multimodal framework for predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions as dense heatmaps during cholecystectomy. Our approach combines a temporal vision encoder capturing tool motion and tissue dynamics across multiple viewpoints, language conditioning enabling generalization across diverse instrument-action pairs, and a DiT-style decoder for dense affordance prediction. We establish the first tissue affordance benchmark by curating and annotating 15,638 video clips across 103 cholecystectomy procedures, covering six unique tool-action pairs involving four instruments (hook, grasper, scissors, clipper) and their associated tasks: dissection, grasping, clipping, and cutting. Experiments demonstrate substantial improvement over vision-language model baselines (20.6 px ASSD vs. 60.2 px for Molmo-VLM), showing that our task-specific architecture outperforms large-scale foundation models for dense surgical affordance prediction. By predicting tool-action specific tissue affordance regions, AffordTissue provides explicit spatial reasoning for safe surgical automation, potentially unlocking explicit policy guidance toward appropriate tissue regions and early safe stop when instruments deviate outside predicted safe zones.

AI.tldr: AffordTissue：用于胆囊切除术中预测工具-动作特定组织可操作区域的密集热图的多模态框架，通过时间视觉编码器、语言条件化和DiT风格解码器实现，在首个组织可操作性基准上显著优于视觉语言模型基线。
AI.motivation: 当前手术动作自动化方法在临床部署中存在局限性：缺乏对器械在组织表面交互位置的可预测性，缺少强制执行工具-动作特定安全交互区域的显式条件输入。需要开发能够预测工具-动作特定组织可操作区域的框架，为安全手术自动化提供显式空间推理。
AI.method: 提出AffordTissue多模态框架：1）时间视觉编码器捕捉多视角下的工具运动和组织动态；2）语言条件化实现跨不同器械-动作对的泛化；3）DiT风格解码器进行密集可操作性预测。建立了首个组织可操作性基准，包含103个胆囊切除术中的15,638个视频片段，涵盖4种器械（钩、抓钳、剪刀、夹钳）和6种工具-动作对。
AI.result: 实验显示显著优于视觉语言模型基线：ASSD指标为20.6像素 vs. Molmo-VLM的60.2像素。任务特定架构在密集手术可操作性预测方面优于大规模基础模型，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AffordTissue通过预测工具-动作特定组织可操作区域，为安全手术自动化提供了显式空间推理，有望实现向适当组织区域的显式策略引导，并在器械偏离预测安全区域时实现早期安全停止，推动手术自动化向临床部署迈进。

title: Jump Start or False Start? A Theoretical and Empirical Evaluation of LLM-initialized Bandits
summary: The recent advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs) offers new opportunities to generate user preference data to warm-start bandits. Recent studies on contextual bandits with LLM initialization (CBLI) have shown that these synthetic priors can significantly lower early regret. However, these findings assume that LLM-generated choices are reasonably aligned with actual user preferences. In this paper, we systematically examine how LLM-generated preferences perform when random and label-flipping noise is injected into the synthetic training data. For aligned domains, we find that warm-starting remains effective up to 30% corruption, loses its advantage around 40%, and degrades performance beyond 50%. When there is systematic misalignment, even without added noise, LLM-generated priors can lead to higher regret than a cold-start bandit. To explain these behaviors, we develop a theoretical analysis that decomposes the effect of random label noise and systematic misalignment on the prior error driving the bandit's regret, and derive a sufficient condition under which LLM-based warm starts are provably better than a cold-start bandit. We validate these results across multiple conjoint datasets and LLMs, showing that estimated alignment reliably tracks when warm-starting improves or degrades recommendation quality.

AI.tldr: 研究LLM生成偏好数据用于上下文赌博机预热时，噪声和系统错位对推荐性能的影响，发现随机噪声容忍度约30%，系统错位会导致比冷启动更差的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设LLM生成的偏好数据与真实用户偏好合理对齐，但未系统研究当合成训练数据中存在噪声和系统错位时，LLM预热策略的有效性变化。
AI.method: 在合成训练数据中注入随机噪声和标签翻转噪声，分析对齐和错位领域下的性能变化；开发理论分析框架，分解随机标签噪声和系统错位对先验误差的影响；推导LLM预热优于冷启动的充分条件；在多个联合数据集和LLM上进行验证。
AI.result: 对齐领域中，预热策略在30%噪声下仍有效，40%左右失去优势，超过50%会降低性能；系统错位时，即使无额外噪声，LLM生成先验也会导致比冷启动更高的遗憾；理论分析表明估计的对齐度能可靠预测预热策略何时改善或降低推荐质量。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成偏好数据用于赌博机预热时，需要考虑噪声容忍度和系统错位问题；估计的对齐度可作为判断预热策略有效性的可靠指标；研究为实际应用中LLM预热策略的部署提供了理论指导和实用标准。

title: VERTIGO: Visual Preference Optimization for Cinematic Camera Trajectory Generation
summary: Cinematic camera control relies on a tight feedback loop between director and cinematographer, where camera motion and framing are continuously reviewed and refined. Recent generative camera systems can produce diverse, text-conditioned trajectories, but they lack this "director in the loop" and have no explicit supervision of whether a shot is visually desirable. This results in in-distribution camera motion but poor framing, off-screen characters, and undesirable visual aesthetics. In this paper, we introduce VERTIGO, the first framework for visual preference optimization of camera trajectory generators. Our framework leverages a real-time graphics engine (Unity) to render 2D visual previews from generated camera motion. A cinematically fine-tuned vision-language model then scores these previews using our proposed cyclic semantic similarity mechanism, which aligns renders with text prompts. This process provides the visual preference signals for Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) post-training. Both quantitative evaluations and user studies on Unity renders and diffusion-based Camera-to-Video pipelines show consistent gains in condition adherence, framing quality, and perceptual realism. Notably, VERTIGO reduces the character off-screen rate from 38% to nearly 0% while preserving the geometric fidelity of camera motion. User study participants further prefer VERTIGO over baselines across composition, consistency, prompt adherence, and aesthetic quality, confirming the perceptual benefits of our visual preference post-training.

AI.tldr: VERTIGO：首个用于相机轨迹生成器的视觉偏好优化框架，通过实时渲染和视觉语言模型评分，结合DPO后训练，显著提升相机控制的质量和美学效果
AI.motivation: 现有生成式相机系统虽然能产生多样化的文本条件轨迹，但缺乏"导演在环"机制和视觉美学监督，导致构图不佳、角色出框、视觉美学不理想等问题
AI.method: 使用Unity实时渲染2D视觉预览，通过电影微调的视觉语言模型采用循环语义相似度机制评分，为直接偏好优化（DPO）提供视觉偏好信号进行后训练
AI.result: 在Unity渲染和基于扩散的相机到视频管道上，定量评估和用户研究均显示在条件遵循、构图质量、感知真实感方面持续提升；角色出框率从38%降至接近0%，同时保持相机运动的几何保真度
AI.conclusion: VERTIGO通过视觉偏好后训练显著提升了相机轨迹生成的质量，用户研究证实其在构图、一致性、提示遵循和美学质量方面优于基线方法，验证了视觉偏好优化的感知优势

title: Open-loop POMDP Simplification and Safe Skipping of Replanning with Formal Performance Guarantees
summary: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) provide a principled mathematical framework for decision-making under uncertainty. However, the exact solution to POMDPs is computationally intractable. In this paper, we address the computational intractability by introducing a novel framework for adaptive open-loop simplification with formal performance guarantees. Our method adaptively interleaves open-loop and closed-loop planning via a topology-based belief tree, enabling a significant reduction in planning complexity. The key contribution lies in the derivation of efficiently computable bounds which provide formal guarantees and can be used to ensure that our simplification can identify the immediate optimal action of the original POMDP problem. Our framework therefore provides computationally tractable performance guarantees for macro-actions within POMDPs. Furthermore, we propose a novel framework for safely skipping replanning during execution, supported by theoretical guarantees on multi-step open-loop action sequences. To the best of our knowledge, this framework is the first to address skipping replanning with formal performance guarantees. Practical online solvers for our proposed simplification are developed, including a sampling-based solver and an anytime solver. Empirical results demonstrate substantial computational speedups while maintaining provable performance guarantees, advancing the tractability and efficiency of POMDP planning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种具有形式性能保证的自适应开环简化框架，通过拓扑信念树交替开环和闭环规划，显著降低POMDP规划复杂度，并提供可计算边界保证最优动作识别。
AI.motivation: POMDP为不确定性下的决策提供原则性数学框架，但精确解计算不可行。现有方法缺乏形式性能保证的开环简化，且执行过程中跳过重规划缺乏理论保证。
AI.method: 提出自适应开环简化框架：1) 基于拓扑的信念树交替开环和闭环规划；2) 推导可计算边界保证识别原始POMDP最优动作；3) 提出安全跳过重规划框架，支持多步开环动作序列的理论保证；4) 开发实用在线求解器（采样基求解器和任意时间求解器）。
AI.result: 实证结果显示计算速度显著提升，同时保持可证明的性能保证。框架首次提供跳过重规划的形式性能保证，推进了POMDP规划的可处理性和效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过自适应开环简化有效解决POMDP计算不可行问题，提供形式性能保证和实用求解器，在保持理论保证的同时实现计算效率大幅提升，为POMDP规划提供了新的可处理解决方案。

title: AdaHOP: Fast and Accurate Low-Precision Training via Outlier-Pattern-Aware Rotation
summary: Low-precision training (LPT) commonly employs Hadamard transforms to suppress outliers and mitigate quantization error in large language models (LLMs). However, prior methods apply a fixed transform uniformly, despite substantial variation in outlier structures across tensors. Through the first systematic study of outlier patterns across weights, activations, and gradients of LLMs, we show that this strategy is fundamentally flawed: the effectiveness of Hadamard-based suppression depends on how the transform's smoothing direction aligns with the outlier structure of each operand -- a property that varies substantially across layers and computation paths. We characterize these patterns into three types: Row-wise, Column-wise, and None. Each pair requires a tailored transform direction or outlier handling strategy to minimize quantization error. Based on this insight, we propose AdaHOP (Adaptive Hadamard transform with Outlier-Pattern-aware strategy), which assigns each matrix multiplication its optimal strategy: Inner Hadamard Transform (IHT) where inner-dimension smoothing is effective, or IHT combined with selective Outlier Extraction (OE) -- routing dominant outliers to a high-precision path -- where it is not. Combined with hardware-aware Triton kernels, AdaHOP achieves BF16 training quality at MXFP4 precision while delivering up to 3.6X memory compression and 1.8X kernel acceleration} over BF16 full-precision training.

AI.tldr: AdaHOP通过自适应Hadamard变换和异常值模式感知策略，在MXFP4精度下实现BF16训练质量，达到3.6倍内存压缩和1.8倍内核加速。
AI.motivation: 现有低精度训练方法采用固定的Hadamard变换来抑制异常值，但忽略了不同张量间异常值结构的显著差异。研究发现，Hadamard变换的有效性取决于其平滑方向与每个操作数异常值结构的对齐程度，而这一特性在不同层和计算路径中变化很大。
AI.method: 首先系统研究LLM中权重、激活和梯度的异常值模式，将其分为三类：行向、列向和无异常值。基于此提出AdaHOP，为每个矩阵乘法分配最优策略：当内维平滑有效时使用内Hadamard变换；否则将IHT与选择性异常值提取结合，将主导异常值路由到高精度路径。结合硬件感知的Triton内核实现。
AI.result: AdaHOP在MXFP4精度下实现了BF16训练质量，同时达到3.6倍内存压缩和1.8倍内核加速（相比BF16全精度训练）。
AI.conclusion: 固定Hadamard变换策略存在根本缺陷，需要根据异常值模式进行自适应调整。AdaHOP通过模式感知的自适应策略，在极低精度下保持了训练质量，同时显著提升了内存效率和计算速度。

title: Street-Legal Physical-World Adversarial Rim for License Plates
comment: 20 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables, submitted to Security in Machine Learning Applications 2026
summary: Automatic license plate reader (ALPR) systems are widely deployed to identify and track vehicles. While prior work has demonstrated vulnerabilities in ALPR systems, far less attention has been paid to their legality and physical-world practicality. We investigate whether low-resourced threat actors can engineer a successful adversarial attack against a modern open-source ALPR system. We introduce the Street-legal Physical Adversarial Rim (SPAR), a physically realizable white-box attack against the popular ALPR system fast-alpr. SPAR requires no access to ALPR infrastructure during attack deployment and does not alter or obscure the attacker's license plate. Based on prior legislation and case law, we argue that SPAR is street-legal in the state of Texas. Under optimal conditions, SPAR reduces ALPR accuracy by 60% and achieves an 18% targeted impersonation rate. SPAR can be produced for under $100, and it was implemented entirely by commercial agentic coding assistants. These results highlight practical vulnerabilities in modern ALPR systems under realistic physical-world conditions and suggest new directions for both attack and defense.

AI.tldr: SPAR是一种针对开源ALPR系统的物理对抗性攻击方法，通过合法改装轮辋实现，无需接触ALPR基础设施，成本低于100美元，能显著降低识别准确率并实现目标冒充。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注ALPR系统的技术漏洞，而较少探讨攻击的合法性和物理世界实用性。本文旨在研究资源有限的威胁行为者能否对现代开源ALPR系统实施成功的对抗性攻击。
AI.method: 提出SPAR（Street-legal Physical Adversarial Rim）方法，这是一种针对fast-alpr系统的物理可实现白盒攻击。攻击通过改装车辆轮辋实现，不改变或遮挡车牌，完全基于商业智能编码助手实现，成本低于100美元。
AI.result: 在最优条件下，SPAR能将ALPR准确率降低60%，实现18%的目标冒充率。攻击在德克萨斯州被认为是合法的，且无需访问ALPR基础设施即可部署。
AI.conclusion: SPAR展示了现代ALPR系统在现实物理条件下的实际漏洞，为攻击和防御研究提供了新方向，强调了在合法框架内实施物理对抗性攻击的可行性。

title: AQVolt26: High-Temperature r$^2$SCAN Halide Dataset for Universal ML Potentials and Solid-State Batteries
summary: The demand for safe, high-energy-density batteries has spotlighted halide solid-state electrolytes, which offer the potential for enhanced ionic mobility, electrochemical stability, and interfacial deformability. Accelerating their discovery requires extensive molecular dynamics, which has been increasingly enabled by universal machine learning interatomic potentials trained on foundational datasets. However, the dynamic softness of halides poses a stringent test of whether general-purpose models can reliably replace first-principles calculations under the highly distorted, elevated-temperature regimes necessary to probe ion transport. Here, we present AQVolt26, a dataset of 322,656 r$^2$SCAN single-point calculations for lithium halides, generated via high-temperature configurational sampling across $\sim$5K structures. We demonstrate that foundational datasets provide a strong baseline for stable halide chemistries and transfer local forces well, however absolute energy predictions degrade in distorted higher-temperature regimes. Co-training with AQVolt26 resolves this blind spot. Furthermore, incorporating Materials Project relaxation data improves near-equilibrium performance but degrades extreme-strain robustness without enhancing high-temperature force accuracy. These results demonstrate that domain-specific configurational sampling is essential for the reliable dynamic screening of halide electrolytes. Furthermore, our findings suggest that while foundational models provide a robust base, they are most effective for dynamically soft solid-state chemistries when augmented with targeted, high-temperature data. Finally, we show that near-equilibrium relaxation data serves as a task-specific complement rather than a universally beneficial addition.

AI.tldr: 该研究创建了AQVolt26数据集（包含322,656个r²SCAN单点计算），用于提升机器学习势函数在高温、高应变条件下对卤化物固态电解质的预测可靠性，发现基础数据集在稳定化学体系中表现良好，但需要特定高温数据补充以准确模拟离子传输。
AI.motivation: 卤化物固态电解质因其高离子迁移率、电化学稳定性和界面可变形性而备受关注，但卤化物的动态软性对通用机器学习势函数在高温、高应变条件下的可靠性提出了严峻挑战。需要验证基础模型能否可靠替代第一性原理计算来研究离子传输所需的高温扭曲状态。
AI.method: 1. 构建AQVolt26数据集：包含322,656个r²SCAN单点计算，通过约5,000个结构的高温构型采样生成；2. 评估基础数据集在卤化物化学体系中的表现；3. 通过AQVolt26数据进行协同训练以解决高温扭曲区域的盲点；4. 结合Materials Project弛豫数据评估近平衡性能与极端应变鲁棒性的权衡。
AI.result: 1. 基础数据集对稳定卤化物化学体系提供良好基线，局部力预测准确，但在高温扭曲区域绝对能量预测退化；2. 使用AQVolt26协同训练解决了这一盲点；3. 加入Materials Project弛豫数据改善了近平衡性能，但降低了极端应变鲁棒性，且未提升高温力预测精度；4. 领域特异性构型采样对卤化物电解质的可靠动态筛选至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 对于动态软性固态化学体系，基础模型需要针对性的高温数据补充才能发挥最佳效果；近平衡弛豫数据可作为任务特异性补充，而非普遍有益；领域特异性构型采样是可靠动态筛选卤化物电解质的关键。

title: Managing Diabetic Retinopathy with Deep Learning: A Data Centric Overview
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a serious microvascular complication of diabetes, and one of the leading causes of vision loss worldwide. Although automated detection and grading, with Deep Learning (DL), can reduce the burden on ophthalmologists, it is constrained by the limited availability of high-quality datasets. Existing repositories often remain geographically narrow, contain limited samples, and exhibit inconsistent annotations or variable image quality; thereby, restricting their clinical reliability. This paper presents a comprehensive review and comparative analysis of fundus image datasets used in the management of DR. The study evaluates their usability across key tasks, including binary classification, severity grading, lesion localization, and multi-disease screening. It also categorizes the datasets by size, accessibility, and annotation type (such as image-level, lesion-level, and multi-disease). Finally, a recently published dataset is presented as a case study to illustrate broader challenges in dataset curation and usage. The review consolidates current knowledge while highlighting persistent gaps such as the lack of standardized lesion-level annotations and longitudinal data. It also outlines recommendations for future dataset development to support clinically reliable and explainable solutions in DR screening.

AI.tldr: 该论文对糖尿病视网膜病变（DR）眼底图像数据集进行了全面综述和比较分析，评估了它们在二元分类、严重程度分级、病灶定位和多疾病筛查等任务中的可用性，并提出了未来数据集发展的建议。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是全球视力丧失的主要原因之一，深度学习自动检测和分级可以减轻眼科医生负担，但受限于高质量数据集的有限可用性。现有数据集通常地理范围狭窄、样本有限、注释不一致或图像质量参差不齐，限制了临床可靠性。
AI.method: 对DR眼底图像数据集进行全面综述和比较分析，评估它们在关键任务（二元分类、严重程度分级、病灶定位、多疾病筛查）中的可用性，按大小、可访问性和注释类型（图像级、病灶级、多疾病）分类数据集，并通过一个最近发布的数据集作为案例研究说明数据集管理和使用的挑战。
AI.result: 研究整合了当前知识，同时突出了持续存在的差距，如缺乏标准化的病灶级注释和纵向数据。研究还提出了未来数据集发展的建议，以支持DR筛查中临床可靠和可解释的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为DR眼底图像数据集提供了系统性的分析框架，指出了当前数据集在标准化、注释质量和纵向数据方面的不足，并提出了改进方向，旨在促进临床可靠和可解释的DR筛查解决方案的发展。

title: GBQA: A Game Benchmark for Evaluating LLMs as Quality Assurance Engineers
comment: Accepted as a workshop paper at the Fourteenth International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)
summary: The autonomous discovery of bugs remains a significant challenge in modern software development. Compared to code generation, the complexity of dynamic runtime environments makes bug discovery considerably harder for large language models (LLMs). In this paper, we take game development as a representative domain and introduce the Game Benchmark for Quality Assurance (GBQA), a benchmark containing 30 games and 124 human-verified bugs across three difficulty levels, to evaluate whether LLMs can autonomously detect software bugs. The benchmark is constructed using a multi-agent system that develops games and injects bugs in a scalable manner, with human experts in the loop to ensure correctness. Moreover, we provide a baseline interactive agent equipped with a multi-round ReAct loop and a memory mechanism, enabling long-horizon exploration of game environments for bug detection across different LLMs. Extensive experiments on frontier LLMs demonstrate that autonomous bug discovery remains highly challenging: the best-performing model, Claude-4.6-Opus in thinking mode, identifies only 48.39% of the verified bugs. We believe GBQA provides an adequate testbed and evaluation criterion, and that further progress on it will help close the gap in autonomous software engineering.

AI.tldr: GBQA基准测试评估LLM在游戏开发中自主发现软件bug的能力，包含30个游戏和124个人工验证的bug，最佳模型仅发现48.39%的bug。
AI.motivation: 自主发现软件bug是现代软件开发的重要挑战，相比代码生成，动态运行时环境的复杂性使LLM在bug发现方面面临更大困难。游戏开发作为代表性领域，需要评估LLM能否自主检测软件bug。
AI.method: 1) 构建GBQA基准测试：使用多智能体系统可扩展地开发游戏并注入bug，人工专家参与确保正确性；2) 提供基线交互智能体：配备多轮ReAct循环和记忆机制，支持长时程游戏环境探索；3) 在多个前沿LLM上进行广泛实验。
AI.result: 自主bug发现仍然极具挑战性：性能最佳的Claude-4.6-Opus（思考模式）仅识别出48.39%的已验证bug。实验表明当前LLM在自主软件bug发现方面能力有限。
AI.conclusion: GBQA为自主软件工程提供了合适的测试平台和评估标准，进一步推进该基准测试将有助于缩小自主软件工程领域的差距。

title: Functional Force-Aware Retargeting from Virtual Human Demos to Soft Robot Policies
summary: We introduce SoftAct, a framework for teaching soft robot hands to perform human-like manipulation skills by explicitly reasoning about contact forces. Leveraging immersive virtual reality, our system captures rich human demonstrations, including hand kinematics, object motion, dense contact patches, and detailed contact force information. Unlike conventional approaches that retarget human joint trajectories, SoftAct employs a two-stage, force-aware retargeting algorithm. The first stage attributes demonstrated contact forces to individual human fingers and allocates robot fingers proportionally, establishing a force-balanced mapping between human and robot hands. The second stage performs online retargeting by combining baseline end-effector pose tracking with geodesic-weighted contact refinements, using contact geometry and force magnitude to adjust robot fingertip targets in real time. This formulation enables soft robotic hands to reproduce the functional intent of human demonstrations while naturally accommodating extreme embodiment mismatch and nonlinear compliance. We evaluate SoftAct on a suite of contact-rich manipulation tasks using a custom non-anthropomorphic pneumatic soft robot hand. SoftAct's controller reduces fingertip trajectory tracking RMSE by up to 55 percent and reduces tracking variance by up to 69 percent compared to kinematic and learning-based baselines. At the policy level, SoftAct achieves consistently higher success in zero-shot real-world deployment and in simulation. These results demonstrate that explicitly modeling contact geometry and force distribution is essential for effective skill transfer to soft robotic hands, and cannot be recovered through kinematic imitation alone. Project videos and additional details are available at https://soft-act.github.io/.

AI.tldr: SoftAct框架通过显式建模接触力和几何，实现人类技能向软体机器人手的迁移，解决本体不匹配和非线性柔顺性问题
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅重定向人类关节轨迹，无法有效处理软体机器人手与人类手之间的极端本体不匹配和非线性柔顺性，需要显式建模接触力和几何来实现有效的技能迁移
AI.method: 采用两阶段力感知重定向算法：第一阶段将演示的接触力分配到人类手指并比例分配给机器人手指，建立力平衡映射；第二阶段结合末端执行器姿态跟踪与测地加权接触细化，利用接触几何和力大小实时调整机器人指尖目标
AI.result: 在接触丰富的操作任务上，SoftAct控制器将指尖轨迹跟踪RMSE降低达55%，跟踪方差降低达69%；在策略层面，在零样本真实世界部署和仿真中均获得更高成功率
AI.conclusion: 显式建模接触几何和力分布对于软体机器人手的有效技能迁移至关重要，仅靠运动学模仿无法恢复这些信息，SoftAct框架为软体机器人操作提供了新途径

title: PlayGen-MoG: Framework for Diverse Multi-Agent Play Generation via Mixture-of-Gaussians Trajectory Prediction
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to CVPRW 2026
summary: Multi-agent trajectory generation in team sports requires models that capture both the diversity of possible plays and realistic spatial coordination between players on plays. Standard generative approaches such as Conditional Variational Autoencoders (CVAE) and diffusion models struggle with this task, exhibiting posterior collapse or convergence to the dataset mean. Moreover, most trajectory prediction methods operate in a forecasting regime that requires multiple frames of observed history, limiting their use for play design where only the initial formation is available. We present PlayGen-MoG, an extensible framework for formation-conditioned play generation that addresses these challenges through three design choices: 1/ a Mixture-of-Gaussians (MoG) output head with shared mixture weights across all agents, where a single set of weights selects a play scenario that couples all players' trajectories, 2/ relative spatial attention that encodes pairwise player positions and distances as learned attention biases, and 3/ non-autoregressive prediction of absolute displacements from the initial formation, eliminating cumulative error drift and removing the dependence on observed trajectory history, enabling realistic play generation from a single static formation alone. On American football tracking data, PlayGen-MoG achieves 1.68 yard ADE and 3.98 yard FDE while maintaining full utilization of all 8 mixture components with entropy of 2.06 out of 2.08, and qualitatively confirming diverse generation without mode collapse.

AI.tldr: PlayGen-MoG：基于混合高斯和相对空间注意力的美式足球多智能体轨迹生成框架，可从单一静态阵型生成多样化且空间协调的战术
AI.motivation: 团队运动中的多智能体轨迹生成需要同时捕捉战术多样性和球员间的空间协调性。传统生成方法（如CVAE和扩散模型）存在后验坍塌或收敛到数据集均值的问题，且大多数轨迹预测方法需要多帧观测历史，限制了其在仅基于初始阵型的战术设计中的应用。
AI.method: 1. 混合高斯输出头：所有智能体共享混合权重，单一权重集选择耦合所有球员轨迹的战术场景；2. 相对空间注意力：将成对球员位置和距离编码为学习的注意力偏置；3. 非自回归预测：从初始阵型预测绝对位移，消除累积误差漂移，无需观测轨迹历史。
AI.result: 在美式足球追踪数据上，PlayGen-MoG达到1.68码ADE和3.98码FDE，充分利用所有8个混合分量（熵值2.06/2.08），定性验证了无模式坍塌的多样化生成。
AI.conclusion: PlayGen-MoG通过混合高斯输出头、相对空间注意力和非自回归预测，实现了从单一静态阵型生成多样化且空间协调的团队运动战术，解决了传统生成方法的局限性。

title: Speaking of Language: Reflections on Metalanguage Research in NLP
summary: This work aims to shine a spotlight on the topic of metalanguage. We first define metalanguage, link it to NLP and LLMs, and then discuss our two labs' metalanguage-centered efforts. Finally, we discuss four dimensions of metalanguage and metalinguistic tasks, offering a list of understudied future research directions.

AI.tldr: 该论文聚焦于元语言主题，首先定义元语言及其与NLP和LLMs的联系，然后介绍两个实验室的元语言相关研究，最后讨论元语言和元语言任务的四个维度，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 该研究的动机是强调元语言这一重要但可能被忽视的主题，探讨其在自然语言处理和大型语言模型中的重要性，并推动该领域的系统性研究。
AI.method: 论文采用概念分析和综述方法：首先定义元语言概念，建立与NLP和LLMs的理论联系，然后通过两个实验室的具体研究案例展示元语言的实际应用，最后从四个维度系统分析元语言任务。
AI.result: 研究提出了元语言在NLP和LLMs中的系统性框架，识别了元语言任务的四个关键维度，并整理了一份尚未充分研究的未来研究方向清单，为元语言研究提供了理论基础和实践指导。
AI.conclusion: 元语言是NLP和LLMs研究中的重要主题，需要更多系统性关注。论文通过定义、案例分析和维度框架为该领域提供了研究基础，并指出了多个有前景的未来研究方向。

title: Collaborative Task and Path Planning for Heterogeneous Robotic Teams using Multi-Agent PPO
summary: Efficient robotic extraterrestrial exploration requires robots with diverse capabilities, ranging from scientific measurement tools to advanced locomotion. A robotic team enables the distribution of tasks over multiple specialized subsystems, each providing specific expertise to complete the mission. The central challenge lies in efficiently coordinating the team to maximize utilization and the extraction of scientific value. Classical planning algorithms scale poorly with problem size, leading to long planning cycles and high inference costs due to the combinatorial growth of possible robot-target allocations and possible trajectories. Learning-based methods are a viable alternative that move the scaling concern from runtime to training time, setting a critical step towards achieving real-time planning. In this work, we present a collaborative planning strategy based on Multi-Agent Proximal Policy Optimization (MAPPO) to coordinate a team of heterogeneous robots to solve a complex target allocation and scheduling problem. We benchmark our approach against single-objective optimal solutions obtained through exhaustive search and evaluate its ability to perform online replanning in the context of a planetary exploration scenario.

AI.tldr: 基于MAPPO的多智能体协作规划策略，用于协调异构机器人团队解决复杂的目标分配与调度问题，相比传统规划算法具有更好的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 高效的地外机器人探索需要多样化的机器人能力，多机器人团队可以将任务分配给多个专业化子系统。传统规划算法在问题规模增大时扩展性差，导致规划周期长、推理成本高，需要学习型方法将扩展性问题从运行时转移到训练时。
AI.method: 提出基于多智能体近端策略优化（MAPPO）的协作规划策略，协调异构机器人团队解决复杂的目标分配和调度问题。该方法将学习型方法应用于多机器人协调，能够处理组合爆炸问题。
AI.result: 通过穷举搜索获得的单目标最优解进行基准测试，并在行星探索场景中评估其在线重新规划能力。结果表明该方法在复杂多机器人协调问题上具有实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: MAPPO为基础的协作规划策略为解决多机器人地外探索中的复杂协调问题提供了可行方案，相比传统规划方法具有更好的可扩展性和实时规划潜力。

title: Re-analysis of the Human Transcription Factor Atlas Recovers TF-Specific Signatures from Pooled Single-Cell Screens with Missing Controls
summary: Public pooled single-cell perturbation atlases are valuable resources for studying transcription factor (TF) function, but downstream re-analysis can be limited by incomplete deposited metadata and missing internal controls. Here we re-analyze the human TF Atlas dataset (GSE216481), a MORF-based pooled overexpression screen spanning 3,550 TF open reading frames and 254,519 cells, with a reproducible pipeline for quality control, MORF barcode demultiplexing, per-TF differential expression, and functional enrichment. From 77,018 cells in the pooled screen, we assign 60,997 (79.2\%) to 87 TF identities. Because the deposited barcode mapping lacks the GFP and mCherry negative controls present in the original library, we use embryoid body (EB) cells as an external baseline and remove shared batch/transduction artifacts by background subtraction. This strategy recovers TF-specific signatures for 59 of 61 testable TFs, compared with 27 detected by one-vs-rest alone, showing that robust TF-level signal can be rescued despite missing intra-pool controls. HOPX, MAZ, PAX6, FOS, and FEZF2 emerge as the strongest transcriptional remodelers, while per-TF enrichment links FEZF2 to regulation of differentiation, EGR1 to Hippo and cardiac programs, FOS to focal adhesion, and NFIC to collagen biosynthesis. Condition-level analyses reveal convergent Wnt, neurogenic, EMT, and Hippo signatures, and Harmony indicates minimal confounding batch effects across pooled replicates. Our per-TF effect sizes significantly agree with Joung et al.'s published rankings (Spearman $ρ= -0.316$, $p = 0.013$; negative because lower rank indicates stronger effect). Together, these results show that the deposited TF Atlas data can support validated TF-specific transcriptional and pathway analyses when paired with principled external controls, artifact removal, and reproducible computation.

AI.tldr: 对公共单细胞扰动图谱TF Atlas数据的重新分析，开发了可重复的流程进行质量控制、条形码解复用、差异表达分析和功能富集，通过外部对照和背景扣除恢复了TF特异性信号。
AI.motivation: 公共池式单细胞扰动图谱是研究转录因子功能的重要资源，但下游再分析常受限于不完整的元数据和缺失的内部对照，需要开发方法从现有数据中提取可靠信息。
AI.method: 重新分析人类TF Atlas数据集，建立可重复的流程：质量控制、MORF条形码解复用、每个TF的差异表达分析、功能富集分析。使用胚胎体细胞作为外部基线，通过背景扣除去除共享的批次/转导伪影。
AI.result: 从77,018个细胞中成功分配60,997个(79.2%)到87个TF身份。使用外部对照策略恢复了59/61个可测试TF的特异性信号，而传统方法仅检测到27个。HOPX、MAZ、PAX6、FOS和FEZF2被鉴定为最强的转录重塑因子。TF特异性富集分析揭示了FEZF2与分化调控、EGR1与Hippo和心脏程序、FOS与粘着斑、NFIC与胶原生物合成的关联。
AI.conclusion: 当结合原则性外部对照、伪影去除和可重复计算时，已存储的TF Atlas数据能够支持经过验证的TF特异性转录和通路分析，为公共扰动数据的再利用提供了有效策略。

title: From Elevation Maps To Contour Lines: SVM and Decision Trees to Detect Violin Width Reduction
comment: Paper accepted for the Florence Heri-Tech 2026 Conference
summary: We explore the automatic detection of violin width reduction using 3D photogrammetric meshes. We compare SVM and Decision Trees applied to a geometry-based raw representation built from elevation maps with a more targeted, feature-engineered approach relying on parametric contour lines fitting. Although elevation maps occasionally achieve strong results, their performance does not surpass that of the contour-based inputs.
