AI.tldr: 该研究探索使用3D摄影测量网格自动检测小提琴宽度缩减，比较了基于高程图的几何原始表示与基于参数化轮廓线拟合的特征工程方法，发现轮廓线方法表现更优。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是开发自动检测小提琴宽度缩减的方法，这对于乐器鉴定、修复和历史研究具有重要意义，传统方法依赖专家目视评估，需要更客观、自动化的技术。
AI.method: 方法包括：1) 使用3D摄影测量网格获取小提琴几何数据；2) 两种特征提取方法：基于高程图的几何原始表示和基于参数化轮廓线拟合的特征工程方法；3) 应用SVM和决策树两种机器学习算法进行分类。
AI.result: 结果表明：高程图方法有时能获得良好结果，但其性能始终未超过基于轮廓线的输入方法，轮廓线拟合的特征工程方法在检测小提琴宽度缩减方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 结论是参数化轮廓线拟合的特征工程方法比基于高程图的几何原始表示更适合于小提琴宽度缩减的自动检测，为乐器分析提供了更有效的技术途径。

title: SMASH: Mastering Scalable Whole-Body Skills for Humanoid Ping-Pong with Egocentric Vision
summary: Existing humanoid table tennis systems remain limited by their reliance on external sensing and their inability to achieve agile whole-body coordination for precise task execution. These limitations stem from two core challenges: achieving low-latency and robust onboard egocentric perception under fast robot motion, and obtaining sufficiently diverse task-aligned strike motions for learning precise yet natural whole-body behaviors. In this work, we present \methodname, a modular system for agile humanoid table tennis that unifies scalable whole-body skill learning with onboard egocentric perception, eliminating the need for external cameras during deployment. Our work advances prior humanoid table-tennis systems in three key aspects. First, we achieve agile and precise ball interaction with tightly coordinated whole-body control, rather than relying on decoupled upper- and lower-body behaviors. This enables the system to exhibit diverse strike motions, including explosive whole-body smashes and low crouching shots. Second, by augmenting and diversifying strike motions with a generative model, our framework benefits from scalable motion priors and produces natural, robust striking behaviors across a wide workspace. Third, to the best of our knowledge, we demonstrate the first humanoid table-tennis system capable of consecutive strikes using onboard sensing alone, despite the challenges of low-latency perception, ego-motion-induced instability, and limited field of view. Extensive real-world experiments demonstrate stable and precise ball exchanges under high-speed conditions, validating scalable, perception-driven whole-body skill learning for dynamic humanoid interaction tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种模块化的人形机器人乒乓球系统，通过机载感知和全身协调控制实现敏捷击球，无需外部摄像头，首次实现仅使用机载感知的连续击球。
AI.motivation: 现有的人形机器人乒乓球系统依赖外部感知且无法实现敏捷的全身协调控制，存在两个核心挑战：快速运动下的低延迟机载感知，以及获取足够多样化的任务对齐击球动作来学习精确自然的全身行为。
AI.method: 提出模块化系统，结合可扩展的全身技能学习与机载感知。通过生成模型增强和多样化击球动作，获得可扩展的运动先验，实现紧密协调的全身控制而非解耦的上下半身行为。
AI.result: 实现了敏捷精确的球体交互，展示了多样化的击球动作（包括爆发性全身扣杀和低蹲击球）。首次演示了仅使用机载感知的人形机器人连续击球系统，在高速度条件下实现了稳定精确的球体交换。
AI.conclusion: 该系统验证了可扩展的感知驱动全身技能学习在动态人形交互任务中的有效性，为人形机器人在复杂动态环境中的自主操作提供了新范式。

title: Optimal Projection-Free Adaptive SGD for Matrix Optimization
summary: Recently, Jiang et al. [2026] developed Leon, a practical variant of One-sided Shampoo [Xie et al., 2025a, An et al., 2025] algorithm for online convex optimization, which does not require computing a costly quadratic projection at each iteration. Unfortunately, according to the existing analysis, Leon requires tuning an additional hyperparameter in its preconditioner and cannot achieve dimension-independent convergence guarantees for convex optimization problems beyond the bounded gradients assumption. In this paper, we resolve this issue by proving certain stability properties of Leon's preconditioner. Using our improved analysis, we show that tuning the extra hyperparameter can be avoided and, more importantly, develop the first practical variant of One-sided Shampoo with Nesterov acceleration, which does not require computing projections at each iteration. As a side contribution, we obtain improved dimension-independent rates in the non-smooth non-convex setting and develop a unified analysis of the proposed algorithm, which yields accelerated projection-free adaptive SGD with (block-)diagonal preconditioners.

AI.tldr: 该论文改进了Leon算法（One-sided Shampoo的实用变体），通过证明其预条件子的稳定性，避免了额外超参数调优，并首次开发出具有Nesterov加速的实用One-sided Shampoo变体，无需每次迭代计算投影。
AI.motivation: 现有Leon算法存在两个主要问题：1）需要在预条件子中调整额外超参数；2）在超出有界梯度假设的凸优化问题中无法实现维度无关的收敛保证。本文旨在解决这些问题。
AI.method: 通过证明Leon预条件子的稳定性性质，改进分析框架。基于此开发了首个具有Nesterov加速的实用One-sided Shampoo变体，无需每次迭代计算投影。同时提供了统一分析框架，支持（块）对角预条件子的加速投影自由自适应SGD。
AI.result: 成功避免了额外超参数调优，实现了维度无关的收敛保证。在非光滑非凸设置中获得了改进的维度无关收敛率。开发出首个实用的加速投影自由One-sided Shampoo算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过改进Leon算法的分析，解决了其超参数调优和收敛保证问题，并成功开发了具有Nesterov加速的实用变体，为自适应优化算法提供了更高效、更易用的解决方案。

title: ActionParty: Multi-Subject Action Binding in Generative Video Games
summary: Recent advances in video diffusion have enabled the development of "world models" capable of simulating interactive environments. However, these models are largely restricted to single-agent settings, failing to control multiple agents simultaneously in a scene. In this work, we tackle a fundamental issue of action binding in existing video diffusion models, which struggle to associate specific actions with their corresponding subjects. For this purpose, we propose ActionParty, an action controllable multi-subject world model for generative video games. It introduces subject state tokens, i.e. latent variables that persistently capture the state of each subject in the scene. By jointly modeling state tokens and video latents with a spatial biasing mechanism, we disentangle global video frame rendering from individual action-controlled subject updates. We evaluate ActionParty on the Melting Pot benchmark, demonstrating the first video world model capable of controlling up to seven players simultaneously across 46 diverse environments. Our results show significant improvements in action-following accuracy and identity consistency, while enabling robust autoregressive tracking of subjects through complex interactions.

AI.tldr: ActionParty：首个能够同时控制最多7个玩家的视频世界模型，通过引入主体状态令牌解决现有视频扩散模型中动作绑定的基本问题，实现生成式视频游戏的多主体动作控制。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型主要局限于单智能体设置，无法同时控制场景中的多个主体，且存在动作绑定的基本问题——难以将特定动作与其对应的主体关联起来。
AI.method: 提出ActionParty模型，引入主体状态令牌作为潜在变量持续捕捉场景中每个主体的状态。通过空间偏置机制联合建模状态令牌和视频潜在表示，实现全局视频帧渲染与个体动作控制主体更新的解耦。
AI.result: 在Melting Pot基准测试中评估，展示了首个能够同时控制最多7个玩家、覆盖46个多样化环境的视频世界模型。结果显示在动作跟随准确性和身份一致性方面有显著改进，同时能够通过复杂交互实现鲁棒的自回归主体追踪。
AI.conclusion: ActionParty成功解决了多主体视频世界模型中的动作绑定问题，为生成式视频游戏提供了有效的多主体控制框架，在动作控制精度和身份保持方面表现出色。

title: Toys that listen, talk, and play: Understanding Children's Sensemaking and Interactions with AI Toys
summary: Generative AI (genAI) is increasingly being integrated into children's everyday lives, not only through screens but also through so-called "screen-free" AI toys. These toys can simulate emotions, personalize responses, and recall prior interactions, creating the illusion of an ongoing social connection. Such capabilities raise important questions about how children understand boundaries, agency, and relationships when interacting with AI toys. To investigate this, we conducted two participatory design sessions with eight children ages 6-11 where they engaged with three different AI toys, shifting between play, experimentation, and reflection. Our findings reveal that children approached AI toys with genuine curiosity, profiling them as social beings. However, frequent interaction breakdowns and mismatches between apparent intelligence and toy-like form disrupted expectations around play and led to adversarial play. We conclude with implications and design provocations to navigate children's encounters with AI toys in more transparent, developmentally appropriate, and responsible ways.

AI.tldr: 儿童与AI玩具互动研究：通过参与式设计探讨儿童如何理解AI玩具的边界、能动性和社会关系
AI.motivation: 生成式AI越来越多地融入儿童日常生活，不仅通过屏幕，还通过"无屏幕"AI玩具。这些玩具能模拟情感、个性化回应并记忆先前互动，创造持续社会连接的错觉。这引发重要问题：儿童在与AI玩具互动时如何理解边界、能动性和关系。
AI.method: 对8名6-11岁儿童进行两次参与式设计会议，让他们与三种不同的AI玩具互动，在游戏、实验和反思之间切换。
AI.result: 儿童以真诚的好奇心接近AI玩具，将其视为社会存在。但频繁的交互中断、明显智能与玩具形态之间的不匹配破坏了游戏期望，导致对抗性游戏行为。
AI.conclusion: 提出启示和设计建议，以更透明、适合发展水平和负责任的方式引导儿童与AI玩具的接触。

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Robotic Manipulation under Distribution Shift with Bounded Extremum Seeking
summary: Reinforcement learning has shown strong performance in robotic manipulation, but learned policies often degrade in performance when test conditions differ from the training distribution. This limitation is especially important in contact-rich tasks such as pushing and pick-and-place, where changes in goals, contact conditions, or robot dynamics can drive the system out-of-distribution at inference time. In this paper, we investigate a hybrid controller that combines reinforcement learning with bounded extremum seeking to improve robustness under such conditions. In the proposed approach, deep deterministic policy gradient (DDPG) policies are trained under standard conditions on the robotic pushing and pick-and-place tasks, and are then combined with bounded ES during deployment. The RL policy provides fast manipulation behavior, while bounded ES ensures robustness of the overall controller to time variations when operating conditions depart from those seen during training. The resulting controller is evaluated under several out-of-distribution settings, including time-varying goals and spatially varying friction patches.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合强化学习与有界极值搜索的混合控制器，用于提升机器人操作任务在分布外条件下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在机器人操作中表现出色，但训练的策略在测试条件与训练分布不同时性能会下降。这一限制在接触丰富的任务（如推动和抓放）中尤为突出，因为目标、接触条件或机器人动力学的变化都可能在推理时将系统推向分布外状态。
AI.method: 提出混合控制器，结合深度确定性策略梯度（DDPG）和有界极值搜索（bounded ES）。DDPG策略在标准条件下训练机器人推动和抓放任务，部署时与有界ES结合。RL策略提供快速操作行为，有界ES确保控制器在操作条件偏离训练条件时对时间变化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多种分布外设置下评估控制器，包括时变目标和空间变化的摩擦斑块。结果表明混合控制器能有效提升鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 结合强化学习与有界极值搜索的混合方法能有效提升机器人操作任务在分布外条件下的鲁棒性，为实际部署提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Generative World Renderer
summary: Scaling generative inverse and forward rendering to real-world scenarios is bottlenecked by the limited realism and temporal coherence of existing synthetic datasets. To bridge this persistent domain gap, we introduce a large-scale, dynamic dataset curated from visually complex AAA games. Using a novel dual-screen stitched capture method, we extracted 4M continuous frames (720p/30 FPS) of synchronized RGB and five G-buffer channels across diverse scenes, visual effects, and environments, including adverse weather and motion-blur variants. This dataset uniquely advances bidirectional rendering: enabling robust in-the-wild geometry and material decomposition, and facilitating high-fidelity G-buffer-guided video generation. Furthermore, to evaluate the real-world performance of inverse rendering without ground truth, we propose a novel VLM-based assessment protocol measuring semantic, spatial, and temporal consistency. Experiments demonstrate that inverse renderers fine-tuned on our data achieve superior cross-dataset generalization and controllable generation, while our VLM evaluation strongly correlates with human judgment. Combined with our toolkit, our forward renderer enables users to edit styles of AAA games from G-buffers using text prompts.

AI.tldr: 提出一个从AAA游戏中提取的大规模动态数据集，包含4M连续帧的RGB和G-buffer数据，用于提升生成式逆渲染和正向渲染的泛化能力，并引入基于VLM的评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据集的真实性和时间一致性有限，阻碍了生成式逆渲染和正向渲染在真实场景中的扩展，需要高质量数据集来弥合领域差距。
AI.method: 采用新颖的双屏拼接捕获方法，从视觉复杂的AAA游戏中提取4M连续帧（720p/30 FPS）的同步RGB和五个G-buffer通道数据；提出基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的评估协议，用于无真实值情况下评估逆渲染性能。
AI.result: 在该数据集上微调的逆渲染器实现了优异的跨数据集泛化能力和可控生成；VLM评估结果与人类判断高度相关；结合工具包，用户可通过文本提示从G-buffer编辑AAA游戏的风格。
AI.conclusion: 该大规模动态数据集显著提升了双向渲染的性能，特别是逆渲染的野外几何和材质分解能力，以及G-buffer引导的高保真视频生成，为真实世界渲染应用提供了重要资源。

title: VRUD: A Drone Dataset for Complex Vehicle-VRU Interactions within Mixed Traffic
summary: The Operational Design Domain (ODD) of urbanoriented Level 4 (L4) autonomous driving, especially for autonomous robotaxis, confronts formidable challenges in complex urban mixed traffic environments. These challenges stem mainly from the high density of Vulnerable Road Users (VRUs) and their highly uncertain and unpredictable interaction behaviors. However, existing open-source datasets predominantly focus on structured scenarios such as highways or regulated intersections, leaving a critical gap in data representing chaotic, unstructured urban environments. To address this, this paper proposes an efficient, high-precision method for constructing drone-based datasets and establishes the Vehicle-Vulnerable Road User Interaction Dataset (VRUD), as illustrated in Figure 1. Distinct from prior works, VRUD is collected from typical "Urban Villages" in Shenzhen, characterized by loose traffic supervision and extreme occlusion. The dataset comprises 4 hours of 4K/30Hz recording, containing 11,479 VRU trajectories and 1,939 vehicle trajectories. A key characteristic of VRUD is its composition: VRUs account for about 87% of all traffic participants, significantly exceeding the proportions in existing benchmarks. Furthermore, unlike datasets that only provide raw trajectories, we extracted 4,002 multi-agent interaction scenarios based on a novel Vector Time to Collision (VTTC) threshold, supported by standard OpenDRIVE HD maps. This study provides valuable, rare edge-case resources for enhancing the safety performance of ADS in complex, unstructured urban environments. To facilitate further research, we have made the VRUD dataset open-source at: https://zzi4.github.io/VRUD/.

AI.tldr: 提出无人机采集的高精度数据集VRUD，专注于城市复杂交通环境中车辆与弱势道路使用者的交互，填补了现有数据集在非结构化城市环境中的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有开源数据集主要关注高速公路或规范交叉口等结构化场景，缺乏对混乱、非结构化城市环境的数据，特别是针对L4级城市自动驾驶在复杂混合交通环境中面临的挑战，尤其是高密度弱势道路使用者及其高度不确定的交互行为。
AI.method: 提出高效、高精度的无人机数据集构建方法，在深圳典型"城中村"（交通监管松散、遮挡严重）采集数据，建立车辆-弱势道路使用者交互数据集VRUD，包含4小时4K/30Hz录像，11,479个VRU轨迹和1,939个车辆轨迹，并基于新型向量碰撞时间阈值提取了4,002个多智能体交互场景。
AI.result: VRUD数据集包含4小时4K/30Hz录像，11,479个VRU轨迹和1,939个车辆轨迹，其中VRU占比约87%，显著超过现有基准。基于向量碰撞时间阈值提取了4,002个多智能体交互场景，并提供了标准OpenDRIVE高清地图支持。
AI.conclusion: VRUD数据集为增强自动驾驶系统在复杂非结构化城市环境中的安全性能提供了宝贵的边缘案例资源，已开源供进一步研究使用。

title: Failing to Falsify: Evaluating and Mitigating Confirmation Bias in Language Models
summary: Confirmation bias, the tendency to seek evidence that supports rather than challenges one's belief, hinders one's reasoning ability. We examine whether large language models (LLMs) exhibit confirmation bias by adapting the rule-discovery study from human psychology: given a sequence of three numbers (a "triple"), an agent engages in an interactive feedback loop where it (1) proposes a new triple, (2) receives feedback on whether it satisfies the hidden rule, and (3) guesses the rule. Across eleven LLMs of multiple families and scales, we find that LLMs exhibit confirmation bias, often proposing triples to confirm their hypothesis rather than trying to falsify it. This leads to slower and less frequent discovery of the hidden rule. We further explore intervention strategies (e.g., encouraging the agent to consider counter examples) developed for humans. We find prompting LLMs with such instruction consistently decreases confirmation bias in LLMs, improving rule discovery rates from 42% to 56% on average. Lastly, we mitigate confirmation bias by distilling intervention-induced behavior into LLMs, showing promising generalization to a new task, the Blicket test. Our work shows that confirmation bias is a limitation of LLMs in hypothesis exploration, and that it can be mitigated via injecting interventions designed for humans.

AI.tldr: LLMs在假设探索中表现出确认偏误，这降低了规则发现效率；通过人类心理学干预策略可以缓解这种偏误
AI.motivation: 研究大型语言模型是否像人类一样表现出确认偏误，这种认知偏差会阻碍推理能力，影响假设探索和规则发现
AI.method: 采用人类心理学中的规则发现研究范式：给定三个数字序列，模型通过交互反馈循环提出新序列、接收反馈、猜测规则；测试了11个不同家族和规模的LLM；探索了针对人类的干预策略（如鼓励考虑反例）
AI.result: LLMs普遍表现出确认偏误，倾向于提出确认假设的序列而非证伪假设，导致规则发现速度更慢、成功率更低（42%）；干预策略能有效减少确认偏误，将规则发现率提升至56%；通过蒸馏干预诱导的行为可以缓解偏误，并在新任务（Blicket测试）上表现出泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 确认偏误是LLMs在假设探索中的一个重要限制因素，但可以通过借鉴人类心理学的干预策略来有效缓解，这为改进LLM的推理能力提供了实用方法

title: Modulate-and-Map: Crossmodal Feature Mapping with Cross-View Modulation for 3D Anomaly Detection
summary: We present ModMap, a natively multiview and multimodal framework for 3D anomaly detection and segmentation. Unlike existing methods that process views independently, our method draws inspiration from the crossmodal feature mapping paradigm to learn to map features across both modalities and views, while explicitly modelling view-dependent relationships through feature-wise modulation. We introduce a cross-view training strategy that leverages all possible view combinations, enabling effective anomaly scoring through multiview ensembling and aggregation. To process high-resolution 3D data, we train and publicly release a foundational depth encoder tailored to industrial datasets. Experiments on SiM3D, a recent benchmark that introduces the first multiview and multimodal setup for 3D anomaly detection and segmentation, demonstrate that ModMap attains state-of-the-art performance by surpassing previous methods by wide margins.

AI.tldr: ModMap是一个原生多视角多模态的3D异常检测与分割框架，通过跨模态特征映射和视角依赖的特征调制，在SiM3D基准上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法独立处理各个视角，缺乏对多视角和多模态数据的有效整合。工业3D异常检测需要同时利用深度和RGB信息，并考虑不同视角间的几何关系。
AI.method: 1. 采用跨模态特征映射范式学习跨模态和跨视角的特征映射；2. 通过特征级调制显式建模视角依赖关系；3. 引入跨视角训练策略利用所有可能的视角组合；4. 训练并公开了针对工业数据集的基础深度编码器；5. 通过多视角集成和聚合进行异常评分。
AI.result: 在SiM3D基准测试中，ModMap以显著优势超越了现有方法，实现了最先进的性能。SiM3D是首个为3D异常检测和分割设计的多视角多模态基准。
AI.conclusion: ModMap通过原生多视角多模态设计、跨视角特征映射和显式的视角依赖建模，为工业3D异常检测提供了有效的解决方案，并在基准测试中取得了突破性成果。

title: ProOOD: Prototype-Guided Out-of-Distribution 3D Occupancy Prediction
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/7uHeng/ProOOD
summary: 3D semantic occupancy prediction is central to autonomous driving, yet current methods are vulnerable to long-tailed class bias and out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs, often overconfidently assigning anomalies to rare classes. We present ProOOD, a lightweight, plug-and-play method that couples prototype-guided refinement with training-free OOD scoring. ProOOD comprises (i) prototype-guided semantic imputation that fills occluded regions with class-consistent features, (ii) prototype-guided tail mining that strengthens rare-class representations to curb OOD absorption, and (iii) EchoOOD, which fuses local logit coherence with local and global prototype matching to produce reliable voxel-level OOD scores. Extensive experiments on five datasets demonstrate that ProOOD achieves state-of-the-art performance on both in-distribution 3D occupancy prediction and OOD detection. On SemanticKITTI, it surpasses baselines by +3.57% mIoU overall and +24.80% tail-class mIoU; on VAA-KITTI, it improves AuPRCr by +19.34 points, with consistent gains across benchmarks. These improvements yield more calibrated occupancy estimates and more reliable OOD detection in safety-critical urban driving. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/7uHeng/ProOOD.

AI.tldr: ProOOD：一种用于3D语义占据预测的轻量级即插即用方法，通过原型引导的细化和免训练的OOD评分，解决长尾类别偏差和OOD输入问题，提升预测准确性和OOD检测性能。
AI.motivation: 当前3D语义占据预测方法存在两个主要问题：1）对长尾类别偏差敏感，容易将异常样本过度自信地分配给稀有类别；2）对分布外（OOD）输入脆弱，导致在安全关键的自动驾驶场景中产生不可靠的预测。
AI.method: ProOOD包含三个核心组件：1）原型引导的语义填补，用类别一致的特征填充遮挡区域；2）原型引导的尾部挖掘，增强稀有类别表示以减少OOD吸收；3）EchoOOD，融合局部logit一致性、局部和全局原型匹配，生成可靠的体素级OOD分数。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上的实验表明，ProOOD在3D占据预测和OOD检测方面均达到最先进性能：在SemanticKITTI上，整体mIoU提升+3.57%，尾部类别mIoU提升+24.80%；在VAA-KITTI上，AuPRCr提升+19.34个点，各基准测试均有稳定提升。
AI.conclusion: ProOOD通过原型引导的细化和免训练OOD评分，显著提升了3D语义占据预测的校准性和OOD检测的可靠性，为安全关键的城市场景自动驾驶提供了更可靠的感知能力。

title: SEDGE: Structural Extrapolated Data Generation
summary: This paper proposes a framework for Structural Extrapolated Data GEneration (SEDGE) based on suitable assumptions on the underlying data generating process. We provide conditions under which data satisfying new specifications can be generated reliably, together with the approximate identifiability of the distribution of such data under certain ``conservative" assumptions. On the algorithmic side, we develop practical methods to achieve extrapolated data generation, based on the structure-informed optimization strategy or diffusion posterior sampling, respectively. We verify the extrapolation performance on synthetic data and also consider extrapolated image generation as a real-world scenario to illustrate the validity of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: SEDGE框架：基于数据生成过程的结构化外推数据生成方法，提供可靠生成新规范数据的条件，并开发基于结构优化或扩散后验采样的实用算法。
AI.motivation: 现有数据生成方法在外推新规范数据时缺乏理论保证，需要建立结构化框架来可靠生成满足新规范的数据，同时确保生成数据的分布可近似识别。
AI.method: 提出SEDGE框架，基于数据生成过程的合适假设；开发两种实用方法：基于结构信息优化策略和扩散后验采样，实现外推数据生成。
AI.result: 在合成数据上验证了外推性能，并在外推图像生成这一真实场景中展示了框架的有效性；提供了生成数据分布近似可识别的理论条件。
AI.conclusion: SEDGE框架为结构化外推数据生成提供了理论基础和实用算法，能够在保守假设下可靠生成满足新规范的数据，并在合成和真实场景中验证了有效性。

title: Steerable Visual Representations
summary: Pretrained Vision Transformers (ViTs) such as DINOv2 and MAE provide generic image features that can be applied to a variety of downstream tasks such as retrieval, classification, and segmentation. However, such representations tend to focus on the most salient visual cues in the image, with no way to direct them toward less prominent concepts of interest. In contrast, Multimodal LLMs can be guided with textual prompts, but the resulting representations tend to be language-centric and lose their effectiveness for generic visual tasks. To address this, we introduce Steerable Visual Representations, a new class of visual representations, whose global and local features can be steered with natural language. While most vision-language models (e.g., CLIP) fuse text with visual features after encoding (late fusion), we inject text directly into the layers of the visual encoder (early fusion) via lightweight cross-attention. We introduce benchmarks for measuring representational steerability, and demonstrate that our steerable visual features can focus on any desired objects in an image while preserving the underlying representation quality. Our method also matches or outperforms dedicated approaches on anomaly detection and personalized object discrimination, exhibiting zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出可操控视觉表示（Steerable Visual Representations），通过早期融合文本提示来引导视觉特征关注图像中任意感兴趣的对象，同时保持通用视觉任务性能
AI.motivation: 现有预训练视觉Transformer（如DINOv2、MAE）的表示倾向于关注图像中最显著的特征，无法引导到不太突出的感兴趣概念；而多模态LLM虽然可通过文本提示引导，但其表示偏向语言中心化，在通用视觉任务上效果下降
AI.method: 通过轻量级交叉注意力在视觉编码器层中直接注入文本（早期融合），而非像CLIP等模型在编码后进行融合（晚期融合），创建可操控的视觉表示，使全局和局部特征都能通过自然语言引导
AI.result: 提出的可操控视觉特征能够聚焦于图像中任何期望的对象，同时保持底层表示质量；在异常检测和个性化对象识别任务上匹配或优于专用方法，并展示了对分布外任务的零样本泛化能力
AI.conclusion: Steerable Visual Representations通过早期文本融合实现了视觉表示的灵活可控性，在保持通用视觉任务性能的同时，能够根据文本提示关注特定视觉概念，为视觉表示学习提供了新的方向

title: OntoKG: Ontology-Oriented Knowledge Graph Construction with Intrinsic-Relational Routing
summary:
Organizing a large-scale knowledge graph into a typed property graph requires structural decisions -- which entities become nodes, which properties become edges, and what schema governs these choices. Existing approaches embed these decisions in pipeline code or extract relations ad hoc, producing schemas that are tightly coupled to their construction process and difficult to reuse for downstream ontology-level tasks. We present an ontology-oriented approach in which the schema is designed from the outset for ontology analysis, entity disambiguation, domain customization, and LLM-guided extraction -- not merely as a byproduct of graph building. The core mechanism is intrinsic-relational routing, which classifies every property as either intrinsic or relational and routes it to the corresponding schema module. This routing produces a declarative schema that is portable across storage backends and independently reusable.
  We instantiate the approach on the January 2026 Wikidata dump. A rule-based cleaning stage identifies a 34.6M-entity core set from the full dump, followed by iterative intrinsic-relational routing that assigns each property to one of 94 modules organized into 8 categories. With tool-augmented LLM support and human review, the schema reaches 93.3% category coverage and 98.0% module assignment among classified entities. Exporting this schema yields a property graph with 34.0M nodes and 61.2M edges across 38 relationship types. We validate the ontology-oriented claim through five applications that consume the schema independently of the construction pipeline: ontology structure analysis, benchmark annotation auditing, entity disambiguation, domain customization, and LLM-guided extraction.

AI.tldr: 提出一种本体导向的知识图谱构建方法，通过内在-关系路由机制将属性分类到模块化模式中，实现可移植、可重用的模式设计
AI.motivation: 现有方法将模式设计嵌入流水线代码或临时提取关系，导致模式与构建过程紧密耦合，难以用于下游本体级任务。需要一种从设计之初就面向本体分析、实体消歧、领域定制和LLM引导提取的模式设计方法。
AI.method: 采用本体导向方法，核心是内在-关系路由机制，将每个属性分类为内在属性或关系属性，并路由到相应的模式模块。该方法在2026年1月Wikidata数据集上实例化，包括基于规则的清洗阶段和迭代路由过程。
AI.result: 从完整数据集中识别出3460万个实体的核心集，将属性分配到8个类别下的94个模块中。模式达到93.3%的类别覆盖率和98.0%的模块分配率。导出得到包含3400万个节点和6120万条边的属性图，涵盖38种关系类型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法产生的声明式模式可跨存储后端移植并独立重用，通过五个应用验证了本体导向主张：本体结构分析、基准标注审计、实体消歧、领域定制和LLM引导提取。

title: BAT: Balancing Agility and Stability via Online Policy Switching for Long-Horizon Whole-Body Humanoid Control
summary: Despite recent advances in control, reinforcement learning, and imitation learning, developing a unified framework that can achieve agile, precise, and robust whole-body behaviors, particularly in long-horizon tasks, remains challenging. Existing approaches typically follow two paradigms: coupled whole-body policies for global coordination and decoupled policies for modular precision. However, without a systematic method to integrate both, this trade-off between agility, robustness, and precision remains unresolved. In this work, we propose BAT, an online policy-switching framework that dynamically selects between two complementary whole-body RL controllers to balance agility and stability across different motion contexts. Our framework consists of two complementary modules: a switching policy learned via hierarchical RL with an expert guidance from sliding-horizon policy pre-evaluation, and an option-aware VQ-VAE that predicts option preference from discrete motion token sequences for improved generalization. The final decision is obtained via confidence-weighted fusion of two modules. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot demonstrate that BAT enables versatile long-horizon loco-manipulation and outperforms prior methods across diverse tasks.

AI.tldr: BAT：一种在线策略切换框架，通过动态选择两个互补的全身强化学习控制器，在长时域任务中平衡敏捷性与稳定性
AI.motivation: 现有方法在全局协调的耦合全身策略和模块化精度的解耦策略之间存在权衡，缺乏系统整合两者的方法，导致敏捷性、鲁棒性和精度之间的平衡问题未解决
AI.method: 提出BAT框架，包含两个互补模块：1) 通过分层强化学习学习的切换策略，采用滑动时域策略预评估的专家指导；2) 选项感知的VQ-VAE，从离散运动令牌序列预测选项偏好以提升泛化能力；最终决策通过两个模块的置信度加权融合获得
AI.result: 在Unitree G1人形机器人上的大量仿真和真实世界实验表明，BAT能够实现多功能的长时域移动操作任务，并在多样化任务中优于先前方法
AI.conclusion: BAT框架通过动态策略切换成功解决了敏捷性、鲁棒性和精度之间的权衡问题，为长时域全身行为控制提供了统一解决方案

title: Beyond Referring Expressions: Scenario Comprehension Visual Grounding
summary: Existing visual grounding benchmarks primarily evaluate alignment between image regions and literal referring expressions, where models can often succeed by matching a prominent named category. We explore a complementary and more challenging setting of scenario-based visual grounding, where the target must be inferred from roles, intentions, and relational context rather than explicit naming. We introduce Referring Scenario Comprehension (RSC), a benchmark designed for this setting. The queries in this benchmark are paragraph-length texts that describe object roles, user goals, and contextual cues, including deliberate references to distractor objects that often require deep understanding to resolve. Each instance is annotated with interpretable difficulty tags for uniqueness, clutter, size, overlap, and position which expose distinct failure modes and support fine-grained analysis. RSC contains approximately 31k training examples, 4k in-domain test examples, and a 3k out-of-distribution split with unseen object categories. We further propose ScenGround, a curriculum reasoning method serving as a reference point for this setting, combining supervised warm-starting with difficulty-aware reinforcement learning. Experiments show that scenario-based queries expose systematic failures in current models that standard benchmarks do not reveal, and that curriculum training improves performance on challenging slices and transfers to standard benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出场景式视觉定位新任务，引入RSC基准测试，包含基于角色、意图和关系的段落查询，比传统字面表达更具挑战性，并开发了课程推理方法ScenGround。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位基准主要评估图像区域与字面指代表达的对齐，模型可通过匹配显著命名类别成功。需要探索更具挑战性的场景式视觉定位，目标需从角色、意图和关系上下文中推断而非显式命名。
AI.method: 引入Referring Scenario Comprehension (RSC)基准，包含段落长度文本描述对象角色、用户目标和上下文线索，标注可解释难度标签。提出ScenGround课程推理方法，结合监督预热和难度感知强化学习。
AI.result: RSC包含约31k训练样本、4k域内测试样本和3k未见对象类别的域外分割。实验显示场景式查询暴露了当前模型在标准基准中未揭示的系统性失败，课程训练提高了挑战性切片性能并迁移到标准基准。
AI.conclusion: 场景式视觉定位比传统字面表达更具挑战性，RSC基准支持细粒度分析，课程推理方法ScenGround有效提升性能，为视觉语言理解提供了更全面的评估框架。

title: Stein Variational Uncertainty-Adaptive Model Predictive Control
summary: We propose a Stein variational distributionally robust controller for nonlinear dynamical systems with latent parametric uncertainty. The method is an alternative to conservative worst-case ambiguity-set optimization with a deterministic particle-based approximation of a task-dependent uncertainty distribution, enabling the controller to concentrate on parameter sensitivities that most strongly affect closed-loop performance. Our method yields a controller that is robust to latent parameter uncertainty by coupling optimal control with Stein variational inference, and avoiding restrictive parametric assumptions on the uncertainty model while preserving computational parallelism. In contrast to classical DRO, which can sacrifice nominal performance through worst-case design, we find our approach achieves robustness by shaping the control law around relevant uncertainty that are most critical to the task objective. The proposed framework therefore reconciles robust control and variational inference in a single decision-theoretic formulation for broad classes of control systems with parameter uncertainty. We demonstrate our approach on representative control problems that empirically illustrate improved performance-robustness tradeoffs over nominal, ensemble, and classical distributionally robust baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Stein变分分布鲁棒控制的非线性动力系统控制器，用于处理潜在参数不确定性，通过任务相关的粒子近似替代保守的最坏情况优化，在保持计算并行性的同时实现性能-鲁棒性权衡的改进。
AI.motivation: 传统分布鲁棒优化(DRO)采用最坏情况设计，可能牺牲名义性能；现有方法对不确定性模型有严格的参数假设限制；需要一种既能处理参数不确定性又能保持计算效率的控制方法。
AI.method: 将最优控制与Stein变分推断相结合，使用确定性粒子近似任务相关的不确定性分布，使控制器专注于对闭环性能影响最大的参数敏感性；避免对不确定性模型的限制性参数假设，同时保持计算并行性。
AI.result: 在代表性控制问题上实证表明，相比名义控制、集成控制和经典分布鲁棒基线，该方法实现了更好的性能-鲁棒性权衡；控制器通过围绕对任务目标最关键的相关不确定性来塑造控制律，实现鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在单一决策理论公式中统一了鲁棒控制和变分推断，适用于具有参数不确定性的广泛控制系统类别，为非线性动力系统的鲁棒控制提供了新的有效方法。

title: Time-Warping Recurrent Neural Networks for Transfer Learning
summary:
Dynamical systems describe how a physical system evolves over time. Physical processes can evolve faster or slower in different environmental conditions. We use time-warping as rescaling the time in a model of a physical system. This thesis proposes a new method of transfer learning for Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) based on time-warping. We prove that for a class of linear, first-order differential equations known as time lag models, an LSTM can approximate these systems with any desired accuracy, and the model can be time-warped while maintaining the approximation accuracy.
  The Time-Warping method of transfer learning is then evaluated in an applied problem on predicting fuel moisture content (FMC), an important concept in wildfire modeling. An RNN with LSTM recurrent layers is pretrained on fuels with a characteristic time scale of 10 hours, where there are large quantities of data available for training. The RNN is then modified with transfer learning to generate predictions for fuels with characteristic time scales of 1 hour, 100 hours, and 1000 hours. The Time-Warping method is evaluated against several known methods of transfer learning. The Time-Warping method produces predictions with an accuracy level comparable to the established methods, despite modifying only a small fraction of the parameters that the other methods modify.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于时间扭曲的RNN迁移学习方法，通过时间缩放将预训练模型适应不同时间尺度的物理系统，并在野火燃料湿度预测任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 物理系统在不同环境条件下演化速度不同，需要将模型适应不同时间尺度。传统迁移学习方法需要修改大量参数，而时间扭曲方法旨在通过最小参数调整实现跨时间尺度的模型适应。
AI.method: 提出基于时间扭曲的RNN迁移学习方法：1) 证明LSTM能够以任意精度近似线性一阶时滞微分方程系统；2) 通过时间缩放（时间扭曲）将预训练模型适应不同时间尺度；3) 在燃料湿度预测任务中，将10小时时间尺度的预训练LSTM模型通过时间扭曲适应1小时、100小时和1000小时时间尺度。
AI.result: 时间扭曲方法在燃料湿度预测任务中表现与现有迁移学习方法相当，但仅修改了少量参数。该方法成功将10小时时间尺度的预训练模型适应到1小时、100小时和1000小时时间尺度，保持了近似精度。
AI.conclusion: 时间扭曲是一种有效的RNN迁移学习方法，能够通过最小参数调整实现跨时间尺度的模型适应，在保持精度的同时显著减少参数修改量，为物理系统建模提供了新的迁移学习策略。

title: Large-scale Codec Avatars: The Unreasonable Effectiveness of Large-scale Avatar Pretraining
summary: High-quality 3D avatar modeling faces a critical trade-off between fidelity and generalization. On the one hand, multi-view studio data enables high-fidelity modeling of humans with precise control over expressions and poses, but it struggles to generalize to real-world data due to limited scale and the domain gap between the studio environment and the real world. On the other hand, recent large-scale avatar models trained on millions of in-the-wild samples show promise for generalization across a wide range of identities, yet the resulting avatars are often of low-quality due to inherent 3D ambiguities. To address this, we present Large-Scale Codec Avatars (LCA), a high-fidelity, full-body 3D avatar model that generalizes to world-scale populations in a feedforward manner, enabling efficient inference. Inspired by the success of large language models and vision foundation models, we present, for the first time, a pre/post-training paradigm for 3D avatar modeling at scale: we pretrain on 1M in-the-wild videos to learn broad priors over appearance and geometry, then post-train on high-quality curated data to enhance expressivity and fidelity. LCA generalizes across hair styles, clothing, and demographics while providing precise, fine-grained facial expressions and finger-level articulation control, with strong identity preservation. Notably, we observe emergent generalization to relightability and loose garment support to unconstrained inputs, and zero-shot robustness to stylized imagery, despite the absence of direct supervision.

AI.tldr: LCA提出了一种大规模编解码器化身模型，通过预训练/后训练范式实现高保真度与泛化能力的平衡，能在前馈推理中生成高质量全身3D化身。
AI.motivation: 解决3D化身建模中保真度与泛化能力的关键权衡问题：多视角工作室数据保真度高但泛化能力差，大规模野外数据训练模型泛化能力强但质量低。
AI.method: 采用预训练/后训练范式：先在100万野外视频上预训练学习外观和几何的广泛先验，然后在高质量策划数据上后训练增强表现力和保真度。
AI.result: LCA能泛化到不同发型、服装和人口特征，同时提供精细的面部表情和手指级关节控制，具有强身份保持能力。观察到对重新光照、宽松服装支持的无监督泛化能力，以及对风格化图像的零样本鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: LCA通过大规模预训练与高质量后训练相结合，成功实现了高保真度与泛化能力的统一，为3D化身建模提供了新的可扩展范式。

title: Do Audio-Visual Large Language Models Really See and Hear?
summary: Audio-Visual Large Language Models (AVLLMs) are emerging as unified interfaces to multimodal perception. We present the first mechanistic interpretability study of AVLLMs, analyzing how audio and visual features evolve and fuse through different layers of an AVLLM to produce the final text outputs. We find that although AVLLMs encode rich audio semantics at intermediate layers, these capabilities largely fail to surface in the final text generation when audio conflicts with vision. Probing analyses show that useful latent audio information is present, but deeper fusion layers disproportionately privilege visual representations that tend to suppress audio cues. We further trace this imbalance to training: the AVLLM's audio behavior strongly matches its vision-language base model, indicating limited additional alignment to audio supervision. Our findings reveal a fundamental modality bias in AVLLMs and provide new mechanistic insights into how multimodal LLMs integrate audio and vision.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对音频-视觉大语言模型（AVLLMs）进行机制可解释性研究，发现当音频与视觉冲突时，模型在中间层编码的丰富音频语义无法在最终文本生成中体现，深层融合层过度偏向视觉表征而抑制音频线索。
AI.motivation: 音频-视觉大语言模型作为多模态感知的统一接口正在兴起，但对其工作机制的理解有限。本文旨在通过机制可解释性研究，分析AVLLMs中音频和视觉特征如何在不同层中演化与融合，以产生最终文本输出。
AI.method: 采用机制可解释性方法，分析AVLLMs不同层中音频和视觉特征的演化与融合过程。通过探测分析验证潜在音频信息的存在性，并追溯训练过程以理解模态偏差的来源。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）AVLLMs在中间层编码了丰富的音频语义；2）当音频与视觉冲突时，这些音频能力无法在最终文本生成中体现；3）有用的潜在音频信息确实存在，但深层融合层不成比例地偏向视觉表征，抑制音频线索；4）这种不平衡源于训练过程，AVLLM的音频行为与其视觉-语言基础模型高度匹配，表明对音频监督的额外对齐有限。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了AVLLMs中存在根本性的模态偏差，为理解多模态大语言模型如何整合音频和视觉提供了新的机制性见解。这表明当前AVLLMs在音频-视觉融合方面存在系统性不平衡，需要更平衡的多模态对齐训练策略。

title: Infinite-Horizon Ergodic Control via Kernel Mean Embeddings
summary: This paper derives an infinite-horizon ergodic controller based on kernel mean embeddings for long-duration coverage tasks on general domains. While existing kernel-based ergodic control methods provide strong coverage guarantees on general coverage domains, their practical use has been limited to sub-ergodic, finite-time horizons due to intractable computational scaling, prohibiting its use for long-duration coverage. We resolve this scaling by deriving an infinite-horizon ergodic controller equipped with an extended kernel mean embedding error visitation state that recursively records state visitation. This extended state decouples past visitation from future control synthesis and expands ergodic control to infinite-time settings. In addition, we present a variation of the controller that operates on a receding-horizon control formulation with the extended error state. We demonstrate theoretical proof of asymptotic convergence of the derived controller and show preservation of ergodic coverage guarantees for a class of 2D and 3D coverage problems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于核均值嵌入的无限时域遍历控制器，解决长期覆盖任务中现有方法计算复杂度高、只能用于有限时域的问题
AI.motivation: 现有基于核的遍历控制方法在一般覆盖域上提供强覆盖保证，但由于计算复杂度呈指数增长，实际应用仅限于次遍历、有限时域，无法用于长期覆盖任务
AI.method: 推导无限时域遍历控制器，配备扩展的核均值嵌入误差访问状态，递归记录状态访问历史；该扩展状态将过去访问与未来控制合成解耦，将遍历控制扩展到无限时域；还提出基于扩展误差状态的滚动时域控制变体
AI.result: 提供了控制器的渐近收敛性理论证明，并在2D和3D覆盖问题中展示了保持遍历覆盖保证
AI.conclusion: 通过扩展核均值嵌入误差状态，成功将遍历控制扩展到无限时域，解决了长期覆盖任务的计算可扩展性问题，为一般域上的长期覆盖提供了实用解决方案

title: LitPivot: Developing Well-Situated Research Ideas Through Dynamic Contextualization and Critique within the Literature Landscape
summary: Developing a novel research idea is hard. It must be distinct enough from prior work to claim a contribution while also building on it. This requires iteratively reviewing literature and refining an idea based on what a researcher reads; yet when an idea changes, the literature that matters often changes with it. Most tools offer limited support for this interplay: literature tools help researchers understand a fixed body of work, while ideation tools evaluate ideas against a static, pre-curated set of papers. We introduce literature-initiated pivots, a mechanism where engagement with literature prompts revision to a developing idea, and where that revision changes which literature is relevant. We operationalize this in LitPivot, where researchers concurrently draft and vet an idea. LitPivot dynamically retrieves clusters of papers relevant to a selected part of the idea and proposes literature-informed critiques for how to revise it. A lab study ($n{=}17$) shows researchers produced higher-rated ideas with stronger self-reported understanding of the literature space; an open-ended study ($n{=}5$) reveals how researchers use LitPivot to iteratively evolve their own ideas.

AI.tldr: LitPivot是一个支持文献与创意动态交互的研究工具，通过文献引导的转向机制帮助研究者迭代完善研究想法
AI.motivation: 现有研究工具存在局限性：文献工具仅帮助理解固定文献集，创意工具则基于静态预选论文评估想法。缺乏支持文献与创意动态交互的工具，而研究过程中想法改变时相关文献也会随之变化。
AI.method: 提出文献引导转向机制，将这一机制操作化为LitPivot工具。研究者可同时起草和验证想法，系统动态检索与想法特定部分相关的论文簇，并提供基于文献的修改建议。
AI.result: 实验室研究（n=17）显示研究者能产生评分更高的想法，并自我报告对文献空间有更强理解；开放式研究（n=5）揭示了研究者如何使用LitPivot迭代演化自己的想法。
AI.conclusion: LitPivot通过支持文献与创意的动态交互，有效解决了研究创意开发中的核心挑战，帮助研究者产生更高质量的想法并深化对相关文献的理解。

title: Focal plane wavefront control with model-based reinforcement learning
summary: The direct imaging of potentially habitable exoplanets is one prime science case for high-contrast imaging instruments on extremely large telescopes. Most such exoplanets orbit close to their host stars, where their observation is limited by fast-moving atmospheric speckles and quasi-static non-common-path aberrations (NCPA). Conventional NCPA correction methods often use mechanical mirror probes, which compromise performance during operation. This work presents machine-learning-based NCPA control methods that automatically detect and correct both dynamic and static NCPA errors by leveraging sequential phase diversity. We extend previous work in reinforcement learning for AO to focal plane control. A new model-based RL algorithm, Policy Optimization for NCPAs (PO4NCPA), interprets the focal-plane image as input data and, through sequential phase diversity, determines phase corrections that optimize both non-coronagraphic and post-coronagraphic PSFs without prior system knowledge. Further, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach by numerically simulating static NCPA errors on a ground-based telescope and an infrared imager affected by water-vapor-induced seeing (dynamic NCPAs). Simulations show that PO4NCPA robustly compensates static and dynamic NCPAs. In static cases, it achieves near-optimal focal-plane light suppression with a coronagraph and near-optimal Strehl without one. With dynamics NCPA, it matches the performance of the modal least-squares reconstruction combined with a 1-step delay integrator in these metrics. The method remains effective for the ELT pupil, vector vortex coronagraph, and under photon and background noise. PO4NCPA is model-free and can be directly applied to standard imaging as well as to any coronagraph. Its sub-millisecond inference times and performance also make it suitable for real-time low-order correction of atmospheric turbulence beyond HCI.

AI.tldr: 提出基于强化学习的非共光路像差控制方法PO4NCPA，通过序列相位多样性自动校正动态和静态像差，适用于系外行星直接成像
AI.motivation: 系外行星直接成像受限于快速移动的大气散斑和准静态非共光路像差，传统机械镜面探针方法在运行时会损害性能，需要更优的自动校正方法
AI.method: 提出基于模型的强化学习算法PO4NCPA，将焦平面图像作为输入数据，通过序列相位多样性确定相位校正，优化非日冕和日冕后PSF，无需先验系统知识
AI.result: PO4NCPA能稳健补偿静态和动态NCPA：静态情况下，使用日冕仪时实现近最优焦平面光抑制，不使用日冕仪时实现近最优Strehl；动态情况下，性能与模态最小二乘重建结合1步延迟积分器相当
AI.conclusion: PO4NCPA是无模型方法，适用于标准成像和任何日冕仪，亚毫秒推理时间和性能使其适合实时低阶大气湍流校正，超越高对比度成像应用

title: On the Geometric Structure of Layer Updates in Deep Language Models
summary:
We study the geometric structure of layer updates in deep language models. Rather than analyzing what information is encoded in intermediate representations, we ask how representations change from one layer to the next. We show that layerwise updates admit a decomposition into a dominant tokenwise component and a residual that is not captured by restricted tokenwise function classes.
  Across multiple architectures, including Transformers and state-space models, we find that the full layer update is almost perfectly aligned with the tokenwise component, while the residual exhibits substantially weaker alignment, larger angular deviation, and significantly lower projection onto the dominant tokenwise subspace. This indicates that the residual is not merely a small correction, but a geometrically distinct component of the transformation.
  This geometric separation has functional consequences: approximation error under the restricted tokenwise model is strongly associated with output perturbation, with Spearman correlations often exceeding 0.7 and reaching up to 0.95 in larger models. Together, these results suggest that most layerwise updates behave like structured reparameterizations along a dominant direction, while functionally significant computation is concentrated in a geometrically distinct residual component.
  Our framework provides a simple, architecture-agnostic method for probing the geometric and functional structure of layer updates in modern language models.

AI.tldr: 层更新几何结构分析：发现Transformer等语言模型的层间更新可分解为主导的tokenwise分量和几何上不同的残差分量，后者承载重要功能计算。
AI.motivation: 研究深度语言模型中层更新的几何结构，而非仅关注中间表示编码的信息，探究表示如何从一层变化到下一层。
AI.method: 提出架构无关的框架，分析层更新的几何结构，将其分解为tokenwise分量和残差分量，通过角度偏差、投影等几何指标评估分离程度。
AI.result: 发现层更新几乎完美对齐tokenwise分量，而残差分量对齐较弱、角度偏差更大、在主tokenwise子空间投影显著更低；受限tokenwise模型的近似误差与输出扰动强相关（Spearman相关常超0.7，大模型可达0.95）。
AI.conclusion: 层更新主要表现为沿主导方向的结构化重参数化，而功能上重要的计算集中在几何上不同的残差分量中，该框架为探测现代语言模型层更新的几何和功能结构提供了简单方法。

title: LumiVideo: An Intelligent Agentic System for Video Color Grading
summary: Video color grading is a critical post-production process that transforms flat, log-encoded raw footage into emotionally resonant cinematic visuals. Existing automated methods act as static, black-box executors that directly output edited pixels, lacking both interpretability and the iterative control required by professionals. We introduce LumiVideo, an agentic system that mimics the cognitive workflow of professional colorists through four stages: Perception, Reasoning, Execution, and Reflection. Given only raw log video, LumiVideo autonomously produces a cinematic base grade by analyzing the scene's physical lighting and semantic content. Its Reasoning engine synergizes an LLM's internalized cinematic knowledge with a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework via a Tree of Thoughts (ToT) search to navigate the non-linear color parameter space. Rather than generating pixels, the system compiles the deduced parameters into industry-standard ASC-CDL configurations and a globally consistent 3D LUT, analytically guaranteeing temporal consistency. An optional Reflection loop then allows creators to refine the result via natural language feedback. We further introduce LumiGrade, the first log-encoded video benchmark for evaluating automated grading. Experiments show that LumiVideo approaches human expert quality in fully automatic mode while enabling precise iterative control when directed.

AI.tldr: LumiVideo是一个模仿专业调色师认知流程的智能视频调色系统，通过感知、推理、执行、反思四阶段工作流，将原始log视频自动转换为电影级调色效果，并生成行业标准参数配置。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化调色方法缺乏可解释性和专业所需的迭代控制能力，它们作为静态黑盒直接输出编辑像素，无法满足专业调色师的工作流程需求。
AI.method: 系统采用四阶段工作流：1)感知阶段分析场景物理光照和语义内容；2)推理阶段结合LLM的电影知识、RAG框架和ToT搜索在非线性色彩参数空间导航；3)执行阶段编译参数为ASC-CDL配置和全局一致的3D LUT；4)可选反思阶段通过自然语言反馈进行精炼。
AI.result: LumiVideo在完全自动模式下接近人类专家质量，同时支持精确的迭代控制。系统还引入了首个log编码视频基准LumiGrade用于评估自动调色。
AI.conclusion: LumiVideo成功模拟了专业调色师的认知工作流程，通过参数化方法而非直接像素生成，提供了可解释性和迭代控制能力，填补了现有自动化调色方法的不足。

title: Making Written Theorems Explorable by Grounding Them in Formal Representations
summary: LLM-generated explanations can make technical content more accessible, but there is a ceiling on what they can support interactively. Because LLM outputs are static text, they cannot be executed or stepped through. We argue that grounding explanations in a formalized representation enables interactive affordances beyond what static text supports. We instantiate this idea for mathematical proof comprehension with explorable theorems, a system that uses LLMs to translate a theorem and its written proof into Lean, a programming language for machine-checked proofs, and links the written proof with the Lean code. Readers can work through the proof at a step-level granularity, test custom examples or counterexamples, and trace the logical dependencies bridging each step. Each worked-out step is produced by executing the Lean proof on that example and extracting its intermediate state. A user study ($n = 16$) shows potential advantages of this approach: in a proof-reading task, participants who had access to the provided explorability features gave better, more correct, and more detailed answers to comprehension questions, demonstrating a stronger overall understanding of the underlying mathematics.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"可探索定理"系统，将数学定理和证明转化为Lean代码，实现交互式证明理解，超越静态文本限制
AI.motivation: LLM生成的解释虽然能提高技术内容可访问性，但静态文本无法执行或逐步调试，限制了交互支持能力
AI.method: 使用LLM将定理及其书面证明翻译为Lean（机器检查证明的编程语言），将书面证明与Lean代码链接，实现步骤级粒度探索、自定义示例测试和逻辑依赖追踪
AI.result: 用户研究（n=16）显示，在证明阅读任务中，使用可探索功能的参与者能给出更好、更正确、更详细的答案，表现出更强的数学理解能力
AI.conclusion: 基于形式化表示的交互式解释系统能超越静态文本支持，显著提升数学证明的理解效果

title: Do We Need Frontier Models to Verify Mathematical Proofs?
summary: Advances in training, post-training, and inference-time methods have enabled frontier reasoning models to win gold medals in math competitions and settle challenging open problems. Gaining trust in the responses of these models requires that natural language proofs be checked for errors. LLM judges are increasingly being adopted to meet the growing demand for evaluating such proofs. While verification is considered easier than generation, what model capability does reliable verification actually require? We systematically evaluate four open-source and two frontier LLMs on datasets of human-graded natural language proofs of competition-level problems. We consider two key metrics: verifier accuracy and self-consistency (the rate of agreement across repeated judgments on the same proof). We observe that smaller open-source models are only up to ~10% behind frontier models in accuracy but they are up to ~25% more inconsistent. Furthermore, we see that verifier accuracy is sensitive to prompt choice across all models. We then demonstrate that the smaller models, in fact, do possess the mathematical capabilities to verify proofs at the level of frontier models, but they struggle to reliably elicit these capabilities with general judging prompts. Through an LLM-guided prompt search, we synthesize an ensemble of specialized prompts that overcome the specific failure modes of smaller models, boosting their performance by up to 9.1% in accuracy and 15.9% in self-consistency. These gains are realized across models and datasets, allowing models like Qwen3.5-35B to perform on par with frontier models such as Gemini 3.1 Pro for proof verification.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了LLM在验证数学证明方面的能力，发现小型开源模型在准确性上接近前沿模型，但自一致性较差，通过提示工程可以显著提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 随着前沿推理模型在数学竞赛和解决开放问题方面取得突破，需要验证其自然语言证明的正确性。LLM评估器被广泛采用，但可靠验证需要何种模型能力尚不明确。
AI.method: 系统评估了4个开源模型和2个前沿LLM在人类评分的竞赛级问题自然语言证明数据集上的表现。采用两个关键指标：验证器准确性和自一致性。通过LLM引导的提示搜索，合成专门提示集合来克服小型模型的特定失败模式。
AI.result: 小型开源模型在准确性上仅比前沿模型落后约10%，但自一致性差25%。验证器准确性对所有模型的提示选择都很敏感。通过专门提示集合，小型模型的准确性提升达9.1%，自一致性提升15.9%，使Qwen3.5-35B等模型在证明验证方面能与Gemini 3.1 Pro等前沿模型媲美。
AI.conclusion: 小型模型实际上具备与前沿模型相当的数学验证能力，但难以通过通用提示可靠地激发这些能力。专门的提示工程可以显著提升小型模型的验证性能，使其达到前沿模型的水平。

title: PanoAir: A Panoramic Visual-Inertial SLAM with Cross-Time Real-World UAV Dataset
summary:
Accurate pose estimation is fundamental for unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) applications, where Visual-Inertial SLAM (VI-SLAM) provides a cost-effective solution for localization and mapping. However, existing VI-SLAM methods mainly rely on sensors with limited fields of view (FoV), which can lead to drift and even failure in complex UAV scenarios. Although panoramic cameras provide omnidirectional perception to improve robustness, panoramic VI-SLAM and corresponding real-world datasets for UAVs remain underexplored. To address this limitation, we first construct a real-world panoramic visual-inertial dataset covering diverse flight conditions, including varying illumination, altitudes, trajectory lengths, and motion dynamics. To achieve accurate and robust pose estimation under such challenging UAV scenarios, we propose a panoramic VI-SLAM framework that exploits the omnidirectional FoV via the proposed panoramic feature extraction and panoramic loop closure, enhancing feature constraints and ensuring global consistency. Extensive experiments on both the proposed dataset and public benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves superior accuracy, robustness, and consistency compared to existing approaches. Moreover, deployment on embedded platform validates its practical applicability, achieving comparable computational efficiency to PC implementations.
  The source code and dataset are publicly available at https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lG1Upn6yi-N6tYpEHAt6dfR1uhzNtWbT/view

AI.tldr: 提出首个面向无人机的全景视觉-惯性SLAM框架及相应真实世界数据集，通过全景特征提取和闭环增强约束，在复杂飞行场景中实现高精度、鲁棒的位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 现有VI-SLAM方法主要依赖有限视场传感器，在复杂无人机场景中易产生漂移甚至失效。全景相机虽能提供全向感知增强鲁棒性，但面向无人机的全景VI-SLAM及相关真实世界数据集仍缺乏研究。
AI.method: 首先构建覆盖多样化飞行条件的真实世界全景视觉-惯性数据集；提出全景VI-SLAM框架，通过全景特征提取和全景闭环利用全向视场，增强特征约束并保证全局一致性。
AI.result: 在提出的数据集和公共基准测试上的大量实验表明，该方法相比现有方法在精度、鲁棒性和一致性方面表现更优；在嵌入式平台部署验证了其实用性，计算效率与PC实现相当。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了无人机全景VI-SLAM领域的空白，提出的框架和数据集为复杂无人机场景下的鲁棒位姿估计提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

title: VOID: Video Object and Interaction Deletion
summary: Existing video object removal methods excel at inpainting content "behind" the object and correcting appearance-level artifacts such as shadows and reflections. However, when the removed object has more significant interactions, such as collisions with other objects, current models fail to correct them and produce implausible results. We present VOID, a video object removal framework designed to perform physically-plausible inpainting in these complex scenarios. To train the model, we generate a new paired dataset of counterfactual object removals using Kubric and HUMOTO, where removing an object requires altering downstream physical interactions. During inference, a vision-language model identifies regions of the scene affected by the removed object. These regions are then used to guide a video diffusion model that generates physically consistent counterfactual outcomes. Experiments on both synthetic and real data show that our approach better preserves consistent scene dynamics after object removal compared to prior video object removal methods. We hope this framework sheds light on how to make video editing models better simulators of the world through high-level causal reasoning.

AI.tldr: VOID是一个视频对象移除框架，专注于处理具有显著物理交互（如碰撞）的对象移除场景，通过生成物理上合理的反事实结果来保持场景动态一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频对象移除方法擅长处理对象"背后"的内容修复和外观层面的伪影（如阴影和反射），但当移除的对象与其他对象有更显著的物理交互（如碰撞）时，现有模型无法修正这些交互，导致结果不真实。
AI.method: 1. 使用Kubric和HUMOTO生成新的配对反事实对象移除数据集，其中移除对象需要改变下游物理交互；2. 推理时，使用视觉语言模型识别受移除对象影响的场景区域；3. 使用这些区域指导视频扩散模型生成物理一致的反事实结果。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据上的实验表明，与先前的视频对象移除方法相比，该方法在对象移除后能更好地保持一致的场景动态。
AI.conclusion: 该框架展示了如何通过高级因果推理使视频编辑模型成为更好的世界模拟器，为处理复杂物理交互的对象移除提供了新思路。

title: Mitigating LLM biases toward spurious social contexts using direct preference optimization
summary: LLMs are increasingly used for high-stakes decision-making, yet their sensitivity to spurious contextual information can introduce harmful biases. This is a critical concern when models are deployed for tasks like evaluating teachers' instructional quality, where biased assessment can affect teachers' professional development and career trajectories. We investigate model robustness to spurious social contexts using the largest publicly available dataset of U.S. classroom transcripts (NCTE) paired with expert rubric scores. Evaluating seven frontier and open-weight models across seven categories of spurious contexts -- including teacher experience, education level, demographic identity, and sycophancy-inducing framings -- we find that irrelevant contextual information can shift model predictions by up to 1.48 points on a 7-point scale, with larger models sometimes exhibiting greater sensitivity despite higher predictive accuracy. Mitigations using prompts and standard direct preference optimization (DPO) prove largely insufficient. We propose **Debiasing-DPO**,, a self-supervised training method that pairs neutral reasoning generated from the query alone, with the model's biased reasoning generated with both the query and additional spurious context. We further combine this objective with supervised fine-tuning on ground-truth labels to prevent losses in predictive accuracy. Applied to Llama 3B \& 8B and Qwen 3B \& 7B Instruct models, Debiasing-DPO reduces bias by 84\% and improves predictive accuracy by 52\% on average. Our findings from the educational case study highlight that robustness to spurious context is not a natural byproduct of model scaling and that our proposed method can yield substantial gains in both accuracy and robustness for prompt-based prediction tasks.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了LLMs在教师教学质量评估中对虚假上下文信息的敏感性，提出了Debiasing-DPO方法，在减少84%偏见的同时提高52%预测准确率
AI.motivation: LLMs越来越多地用于高风险决策，但其对虚假上下文信息的敏感性可能引入有害偏见，特别是在教师教学质量评估等任务中，偏见评估会影响教师的专业发展和职业轨迹
AI.method: 使用美国课堂转录本数据集(NCTE)评估7个前沿和开源模型对7类虚假上下文的敏感性；提出Debiasing-DPO自监督训练方法，将仅基于查询的中立推理与基于查询加虚假上下文的偏见推理配对，并与监督微调结合以保持预测准确性
AI.result: 无关上下文信息可使模型预测在7分量表上偏移达1.48分；更大模型有时表现出更高敏感性；标准缓解方法效果有限；Debiasing-DPO在Llama和Qwen模型上平均减少84%偏见并提高52%预测准确率
AI.conclusion: 对虚假上下文的鲁棒性不是模型规模扩展的自然副产品；提出的Debiasing-DPO方法能在基于提示的预测任务中同时显著提高准确性和鲁棒性

title: DVGT-2: Vision-Geometry-Action Model for Autonomous Driving at Scale
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving has evolved from the conventional paradigm based on sparse perception into vision-language-action (VLA) models, which focus on learning language descriptions as an auxiliary task to facilitate planning. In this paper, we propose an alternative Vision-Geometry-Action (VGA) paradigm that advocates dense 3D geometry as the critical cue for autonomous driving. As vehicles operate in a 3D world, we think dense 3D geometry provides the most comprehensive information for decision-making. However, most existing geometry reconstruction methods (e.g., DVGT) rely on computationally expensive batch processing of multi-frame inputs and cannot be applied to online planning. To address this, we introduce a streaming Driving Visual Geometry Transformer (DVGT-2), which processes inputs in an online manner and jointly outputs dense geometry and trajectory planning for the current frame. We employ temporal causal attention and cache historical features to support on-the-fly inference. To further enhance efficiency, we propose a sliding-window streaming strategy and use historical caches within a certain interval to avoid repetitive computations. Despite the faster speed, DVGT-2 achieves superior geometry reconstruction performance on various datasets. The same trained DVGT-2 can be directly applied to planning across diverse camera configurations without fine-tuning, including closed-loop NAVSIM and open-loop nuScenes benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出Vision-Geometry-Action（VGA）自动驾驶新范式，强调密集3D几何作为关键线索，并开发了在线处理的DVGT-2模型，同时输出几何重建和轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶从稀疏感知发展到VLA（视觉-语言-动作）模型，但作者认为车辆在3D世界中运行，密集3D几何应提供最全面的决策信息。然而现有几何重建方法（如DVGT）依赖多帧批处理，无法应用于在线规划。
AI.method: 提出流式驾驶视觉几何变换器（DVGT-2），采用在线处理方式，联合输出当前帧的密集几何和轨迹规划。使用时间因果注意力和历史特征缓存支持实时推理。进一步提出滑动窗口流式策略，利用历史缓存避免重复计算。
AI.result: DVGT-2在保持更快速度的同时，在多个数据集上实现了优越的几何重建性能。同一训练模型可直接应用于不同相机配置的规划任务（包括闭环NAVSIM和开环nuScenes基准），无需微调。
AI.conclusion: VGA范式通过密集3D几何作为自动驾驶的关键线索是有效的，DVGT-2模型实现了高效的在线几何重建和规划，展示了跨相机配置的泛化能力。

title: Matrix Profile for Time-Series Anomaly Detection: A Reproducible Open-Source Benchmark on TSB-AD
summary: Matrix Profile (MP) methods are an interpretable and scalable family of distance-based methods for time-series anomaly detection, but strong benchmark performance still depends on design choices beyond a vanilla nearest-neighbor profile. This technical report documents an open-source Matrix Profile for Anomaly Detection (MMPAD) submission to TSB-AD, a benchmark that covers both univariate and multivariate time series. The submitted system combines pre-sorted multidimensional aggregation, efficient exclusion-zone-aware k-nearest-neighbor (kNN) retrieval for repeated anomalies, and moving-average post-processing. To serve as a reproducible reference for MP-based anomaly detection on TSB-AD, we detail the released implementation, the hyperparameter settings for the univariate and multivariate tracks, and the corresponding benchmark results. We further analyze how the system performs on the aggregate leaderboard and across specific dataset characteristics.The open-source implementation is available at https://github.com/mcyeh/mmpad_tsb.

AI.tldr: MMPAD是一个基于矩阵轮廓的时间序列异常检测开源系统，针对TSB-AD基准测试设计，结合了多维聚合、高效kNN检索和移动平均后处理技术。
AI.motivation: 矩阵轮廓方法虽然具有可解释性和可扩展性，但在基准测试中的优异表现仍依赖于超越基本最近邻轮廓的设计选择。需要为TSB-AD基准测试提供一个可复现的矩阵轮廓异常检测参考实现。
AI.method: 系统结合了预排序多维聚合、支持排除区的高效k近邻检索（用于重复异常检测）和移动平均后处理。提供了单变量和多变量时间序列的超参数设置。
AI.result: 提供了在TSB-AD基准测试上的结果，包括在总体排行榜上的表现和针对特定数据集特征的分析。开源实现已发布在GitHub上。
AI.conclusion: MMPAD为基于矩阵轮廓的时间序列异常检测在TSB-AD基准测试上提供了一个可复现的参考系统，展示了如何通过精心设计的技术组合提升基准性能。

title: AdamFlow: Adam-based Wasserstein Gradient Flows for Surface Registration in Medical Imaging
summary: Surface registration plays an important role for anatomical shape analysis in medical imaging. Existing surface registration methods often face a trade-off between efficiency and robustness. Local point matching methods are computationally efficient, but vulnerable to noise and initialisation. Methods designed for global point set alignment tend to incur a high computational cost. To address the challenge, here we present a fast surface registration method, which formulates surface meshes as probability measures and surface registration as a distributional optimisation problem. The discrepancy between two meshes is measured using an efficient sliced Wasserstein distance with log-linear computational complexity. We propose a novel optimisation method, AdamFlow, which generalises the well-known Adam optimisation method from the Euclidean space to the probability space for minimising the sliced Wasserstein distance. We theoretically analyse the asymptotic convergence of AdamFlow and empirically demonstrate its superior performance in both affine and non-rigid surface registration across various anatomical structures.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种快速表面配准方法，将表面网格表示为概率测度，将配准问题转化为分布优化问题，使用切片Wasserstein距离度量差异，并开发了AdamFlow优化算法。
AI.motivation: 现有表面配准方法在效率和鲁棒性之间存在权衡：局部点匹配方法计算高效但对噪声和初始化敏感；全局点集对齐方法鲁棒但计算成本高。需要一种既高效又鲁棒的表面配准方法。
AI.method: 将表面网格表示为概率测度，将表面配准转化为分布优化问题。使用具有对数线性计算复杂度的切片Wasserstein距离度量网格差异。提出了AdamFlow优化方法，将Adam优化从欧几里得空间推广到概率空间，用于最小化切片Wasserstein距离。
AI.result: 理论上分析了AdamFlow的渐近收敛性。实证表明该方法在各种解剖结构的仿射和非刚性表面配准中均表现出优越性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过将表面配准重新表述为分布优化问题，并使用高效的切片Wasserstein距离和AdamFlow优化算法，实现了既高效又鲁棒的表面配准，解决了现有方法在效率和鲁棒性之间的权衡问题。

title: High Volatility and Action Bias Distinguish LLMs from Humans in Group Coordination
summary: Humans exhibit remarkable abilities to coordinate in groups. As large language models (LLMs) become more capable, it remains an open question whether they can demonstrate comparable adaptive coordination and whether they use the same strategies as humans. To investigate this, we compare LLM and human performance on a common-interest game with imperfect monitoring: Group Binary Search. In this n-player game, participants need to coordinate their actions to achieve a common objective. Players independently submit numerical values in an effort to collectively sum to a randomly assigned target number. Without direct communication, they rely on group feedback to iteratively adjust their submissions until they reach the target number. Our findings show that, unlike humans who adapt and stabilize their behavior over time, LLMs often fail to improve across games and exhibit excessive switching, which impairs group convergence. Moreover, richer feedback (e.g., numerical error magnitude) benefits humans substantially but has small effects on LLMs. Taken together, by grounding the analysis in human baselines and mechanism-level metrics, including reactivity scaling, switching dynamics, and learning across games, we point to differences in human and LLM groups and provide a behaviorally grounded diagnostic for closing the coordination gap.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了人类与LLM在群体协调任务（群体二分搜索游戏）中的表现差异，发现人类能适应并稳定行为，而LLM则表现出过度切换且难以改进。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探究大型语言模型是否具备与人类相当的群体协调能力，以及它们是否使用与人类相同的策略。随着LLM能力增强，了解其在群体协调任务中的表现差异具有重要意义。
AI.method: 研究方法采用群体二分搜索游戏作为实验平台，这是一个具有共同利益且监控不完善的n人游戏。参与者独立提交数值，目标是使集体总和达到随机分配的目标数。通过比较人类和LLM在不同反馈条件下的表现，分析其协调策略差异。
AI.result: 研究结果显示：1）人类能够适应并稳定行为，而LLM往往无法在多次游戏中改进，表现出过度切换，损害群体收敛；2）更丰富的反馈（如数值误差大小）对人类有显著益处，但对LLM影响很小；3）通过反应性缩放、切换动态和跨游戏学习等机制层面指标揭示了差异。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出人类与LLM在群体协调中存在显著差异，通过基于人类基线和机制层面指标的分析，为缩小协调差距提供了行为学基础诊断方法。

title: Compact Keyframe-Optimized Multi-Agent Gaussian Splatting SLAM
summary: Efficient multi-agent 3D mapping is essential for robotic teams operating in unknown environments, but dense representations hinder real-time exchange over constrained communication links. In multi-agent Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM), systems typically rely on a centralized server to merge and optimize the local maps produced by individual agents. However, sharing these large map representations, particularly those generated by recent methods such as Gaussian Splatting, becomes a bottleneck in real-world scenarios with limited bandwidth. We present an improved multi-agent RGB-D Gaussian Splatting SLAM framework that reduces communication load while preserving map fidelity. First, we incorporate a compaction step into our SLAM system to remove redundant 3D Gaussians, without degrading the rendering quality. Second, our approach performs centralized loop closure computation without initial guess, operating in two modes: a pure rendered-depth mode that requires no data beyond the 3D Gaussians, and a camera-depth mode that includes lightweight depth images for improved registration accuracy and additional Gaussian pruning. Evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets shows up to 85-95\% reduction in transmitted data compared to state-of-the-art approaches in both modes, bringing 3D Gaussian multi-agent SLAM closer to practical deployment in real-world scenarios. Code: https://github.com/lemonci/coko-slam

AI.tldr: 提出改进的多智能体RGB-D高斯泼溅SLAM框架，通过压缩冗余高斯和两种中心化闭环检测模式，在保持地图保真度的同时减少85-95%的通信负载
AI.motivation: 多智能体3D建图在未知环境中至关重要，但密集表示阻碍了在受限通信链路上的实时交换。传统多智能体SLAM依赖中心服务器合并和优化局部地图，而高斯泼溅等方法生成的大型地图表示在有限带宽下成为瓶颈
AI.method: 1) 在SLAM系统中加入压缩步骤，移除冗余3D高斯而不降低渲染质量；2) 采用两种中心化闭环检测模式：纯渲染深度模式（仅需3D高斯）和相机深度模式（包含轻量深度图像以提高配准精度和额外高斯修剪）
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上的评估显示，与最先进方法相比，两种模式下传输数据减少85-95%，使3D高斯多智能体SLAM更接近实际部署
AI.conclusion: 提出的改进框架显著降低了通信负载，同时保持地图保真度，使3D高斯多智能体SLAM在现实场景中的实际部署更加可行

title: Mitigating Data Scarcity in Spaceflight Applications for Offline Reinforcement Learning Using Physics-Informed Deep Generative Models
summary: The deployment of reinforcement learning (RL)-based controllers on physical systems is often limited by poor generalization to real-world scenarios, known as the simulation-to-reality (sim-to-real) gap. This gap is particularly challenging in spaceflight, where real-world training data are scarce due to high cost and limited planetary exploration data. Traditional approaches, such as system identification and synthetic data generation, depend on sufficient data and often fail due to modeling assumptions or lack of physics-based constraints. We propose addressing this data scarcity by introducing physics-based learning bias in a generative model. Specifically, we develop the Mutual Information-based Split Variational Autoencoder (MI-VAE), a physics-informed VAE that learns differences between observed system trajectories and those predicted by physics-based models. The latent space of the MI-VAE enables generation of synthetic datasets that respect physical constraints. We evaluate MI-VAE on a planetary lander problem, focusing on limited real-world data and offline RL training. Results show that augmenting datasets with MI-VAE samples significantly improves downstream RL performance, outperforming standard VAEs in statistical fidelity, sample diversity, and policy success rate. This work demonstrates a scalable strategy for enhancing autonomous controller robustness in complex, data-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 提出MI-VAE方法，通过物理信息化的生成模型解决强化学习在空间飞行中的仿真到现实差距问题，在数据稀缺条件下提升自主控制器的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 强化学习控制器在物理系统部署中面临仿真到现实的泛化差距问题，特别是在空间飞行领域，由于成本高昂和行星探索数据有限，真实世界训练数据稀缺。传统方法如系统辨识和合成数据生成依赖充足数据，常因建模假设或缺乏物理约束而失败。
AI.method: 提出基于互信息的分裂变分自编码器（MI-VAE），这是一种物理信息化的VAE，学习观测系统轨迹与物理模型预测轨迹之间的差异。MI-VAE的潜在空间能够生成尊重物理约束的合成数据集，用于增强有限真实数据下的离线强化学习训练。
AI.result: 在行星着陆器问题上评估MI-VAE，结果显示使用MI-VAE样本增强数据集显著提升了下游强化学习性能，在统计保真度、样本多样性和策略成功率方面均优于标准VAE。
AI.conclusion: MI-VAE为复杂、数据受限环境中增强自主控制器鲁棒性提供了一种可扩展策略，通过引入物理学习偏置有效解决了仿真到现实差距问题。

title: Omni123: Exploring 3D Native Foundation Models with Limited 3D Data by Unifying Text to 2D and 3D Generation
summary: Recent multimodal large language models have achieved strong performance in unified text and image understanding and generation, yet extending such native capability to 3D remains challenging due to limited data. Compared to abundant 2D imagery, high-quality 3D assets are scarce, making 3D synthesis under-constrained. Existing methods often rely on indirect pipelines that edit in 2D and lift results into 3D via optimization, sacrificing geometric consistency. We present Omni123, a 3D-native foundation model that unifies text-to-2D and text-to-3D generation within a single autoregressive framework. Our key insight is that cross-modal consistency between images and 3D can serve as an implicit structural constraint. By representing text, images, and 3D as discrete tokens in a shared sequence space, the model leverages abundant 2D data as a geometric prior to improve 3D representations. We introduce an interleaved X-to-X training paradigm that coordinates diverse cross-modal tasks over heterogeneous paired datasets without requiring fully aligned text-image-3D triplets. By traversing semantic-visual-geometric cycles (e.g., text to image to 3D to image) within autoregressive sequences, the model jointly enforces semantic alignment, appearance fidelity, and multi-view geometric consistency. Experiments show that Omni123 significantly improves text-guided 3D generation and editing, demonstrating a scalable path toward multimodal 3D world models.

AI.tldr: Omni123是一个3D原生基础模型，在单一自回归框架中统一文本到2D和文本到3D生成，利用2D图像作为几何先验来改善3D表示。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在统一文本和图像理解与生成方面表现强劲，但扩展到3D领域面临挑战，主要原因是高质量3D数据稀缺，导致3D合成约束不足。现有方法通常依赖间接流程，在2D中编辑然后通过优化提升到3D，牺牲了几何一致性。
AI.method: 将文本、图像和3D表示为共享序列空间中的离散标记，利用丰富的2D数据作为几何先验。采用交错X到X训练范式，在异构配对数据集上协调多样跨模态任务，无需完全对齐的文本-图像-3D三元组。通过在自回归序列中遍历语义-视觉-几何循环（如文本到图像到3D到图像），联合强制执行语义对齐、外观保真度和多视角几何一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，Omni123显著改善了文本引导的3D生成和编辑，展示了向多模态3D世界模型扩展的可扩展路径。
AI.conclusion: Omni123通过统一文本到2D和文本到3D生成，利用2D图像作为几何约束，解决了3D数据稀缺问题，为构建多模态3D世界模型提供了有前景的方向。

title: Bench2Drive-VL: Benchmarks for Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving with Vision-Language Models
comment: All codes and annotated datasets are available at \url{https://github.com/Thinklab-SJTU/Bench2Drive-VL} and \url{https://huggingface.co/datasets/Telkwevr/Bench2Drive-VL-base}
summary: With the rise of vision-language models (VLM), their application for autonomous driving (VLM4AD) has gained significant attention. Meanwhile, in autonomous driving, closed-loop evaluation has become widely recognized as a more reliable validation method than open-loop evaluation, as it can evaluate the performance of the model under cumulative errors and out-of-distribution inputs. However, existing VLM4AD benchmarks evaluate the model`s scene understanding ability under open-loop, i.e., via static question-answer (QA) dataset. This kind of evaluation fails to assess the VLMs performance under out-of-distribution states rarely appeared in the human collected datasets.To this end, we present Bench2Drive-VL, an extension of Bench2Drive that brings closed-loop evaluation to VLM-based driving, which introduces: (1) DriveCommenter, a closed-loop generator that automatically generates diverse, behavior-grounded question-answer pairs for all driving situations in CARLA,including severe off-route and off-road deviations previously unassessable in simulation. (2) A unified protocol and interface that allows modern VLMs to be directly plugged into the Bench2Drive closed-loop environment to compare with traditional agents. (3) A flexible reasoning and control framework, supporting multi-format visual inputs and configurable graph-based chain-of-thought execution. (4) A complete development ecosystem. Together, these components form a comprehensive closed-loop benchmark for VLM4AD. All codes and annotated datasets are open sourced.

AI.tldr: Bench2Drive-VL：首个用于视觉语言模型自动驾驶的闭环评估基准，通过自动生成多样化、行为驱动的问答对，在CARLA模拟器中评估VLM在累积误差和分布外状态下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM4AD基准采用开环评估（静态问答数据集），无法评估模型在累积误差和分布外输入下的性能。自动驾驶需要更可靠的闭环评估方法，但当前缺乏针对VLM的闭环评估基准。
AI.method: 1. DriveCommenter：闭环生成器，自动为CARLA中所有驾驶情况生成多样化、行为驱动的问答对，包括严重偏离路线和越野等分布外状态。2. 统一协议和接口：允许现代VLM直接接入Bench2Drive闭环环境与传统智能体比较。3. 灵活推理和控制框架：支持多格式视觉输入和可配置的基于图的思维链执行。4. 完整开发生态系统。
AI.result: 构建了Bench2Drive-VL，这是首个全面的VLM4AD闭环评估基准，包含自动生成的多样化问答数据集、统一的评估协议和完整的开发工具链。所有代码和标注数据集均已开源。
AI.conclusion: Bench2Drive-VL填补了VLM4AD领域闭环评估的空白，能够更可靠地评估视觉语言模型在自动驾驶场景中的实际性能，特别是在累积误差和分布外状态下的表现，为VLM在自动驾驶中的应用提供了更有效的评估工具。

title: Generative AI Use in Entrepreneurship: An Integrative Review and an Empowerment-Entrapment Framework
summary: Despite the growing use of generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) in entrepreneurship, research on its impact remains fragmented. To address this limitation, we provide an integrative review of how GenAI influences entrepreneurs at each stage of the entrepreneurial process: (1) opportunity recognition and ideation, (2) opportunity evaluation and commitment, (3) resource assembly and mobilization, and (4) venture launch and growth. Based on our review, we propose the Empowerment-Entrapment Framework to understand how GenAI can both empower and entrap entrepreneurs, highlighting GenAI's role as a double-edged sword at each stage of the entrepreneurial process. For example, GenAI may improve venture idea quality but introduce hallucinations and training data biases; boost entrepreneurial self-efficacy but heighten entrepreneurial overconfidence; increase functional breadth but decrease relational embeddedness; and boost productivity but fuel "workslop" and erode critical thinking, learning, and memory. Moreover, we identify core features of GenAI that underlie these empowering and entrapping effects. We also explore boundary conditions (e.g., entrepreneurs' metacognition, domain expertise, and entrepreneurial experience) that shape the magnitude of these effects. Beyond these theoretical contributions, our review and the Empowerment-Entrapment Framework offer practical implications for entrepreneurs seeking to use GenAI strategically throughout the entrepreneurial process while managing its risks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出赋能-困境框架，系统分析生成式AI在创业各阶段的双刃剑效应：既能赋能创业者，也可能使其陷入困境。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成式AI在创业领域应用日益广泛，但相关研究仍处于碎片化状态。为弥补这一研究空白，本文旨在对生成式AI如何影响创业过程各阶段进行整合性综述。
AI.method: 采用整合性文献综述方法，分析生成式AI在创业四个阶段的影响：(1)机会识别与创意生成，(2)机会评估与承诺，(3)资源整合与调动，(4)企业启动与成长。基于分析提出赋能-困境框架。
AI.result: 识别出生成式AI在创业各阶段的双重效应：提升创意质量但引入幻觉和训练数据偏见；增强创业自我效能但加剧过度自信；扩大功能广度但削弱关系嵌入；提高生产力但导致"工作滑坡"并侵蚀批判性思维、学习和记忆能力。同时确定了影响这些效应的边界条件。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI是创业过程中的双刃剑，既能赋能创业者，也可能使其陷入困境。提出的赋能-困境框架为理解这一复杂现象提供了理论框架，并为创业者战略性地使用生成式AI同时管理其风险提供了实践指导。

title: A Dual-Action Fabric-Based Soft Robotic Glove for Ergonomic Hand Rehabilitation
summary: Hand impairment following neurological disorders substantially limits independence in activities of daily living, motivating the development of effective assistive and rehabilitation strategies. Soft robotic gloves have attracted growing interest in this context, yet persistent challenges in customization, ergonomic fit, and flexion-extension actuation constrain their clinical utility. Here, we present a dual-action fabric-based soft robotic glove incorporating customized actuators aligned with individual finger joints. The glove comprises five independently controlled dual-action actuators supporting finger flexion and extension, together with a dedicated thumb abduction actuator. Leveraging computer numerical control heat sealing technology, we fabricated symmetrical-chamber actuators that adopt a concave outer surface upon inflation, thereby maximizing finger contact area and improving comfort. Systematic characterization confirmed that the actuators generate sufficient joint moment and fingertip force for ADL-relevant tasks, and that the complete glove system produces adequate grasping force for common household objects. A preliminary study with ten healthy subjects demonstrated that active glove assistance significantly reduces forearm muscle activity during object manipulation. A pilot feasibility study with three individuals with cervical spinal cord injury across seven functional tasks indicated that glove assistance promotes more natural grasp patterns and reduces reliance on tenodesis grasp, although at the cost of increased task completion time attributable to the current actuation interface. This customizable, ergonomic design represents a practical step toward personalized hand rehabilitation and assistive robotics.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于织物的双作用软体机器人手套，用于手部康复和辅助，具有个性化定制、符合人体工学设计，能够同时提供手指屈曲和伸展辅助。
AI.motivation: 神经系统疾病导致的手部功能障碍严重影响日常生活独立性，现有软体机器人手套在定制化、人体工学贴合度以及屈伸双向驱动方面存在局限，限制了其临床应用价值。
AI.method: 采用计算机数控热封技术制造对称腔室双作用驱动器，与个体手指关节对齐；手套包含五个独立控制的屈伸双作用驱动器和一个拇指外展驱动器；驱动器充气时形成凹形外表面以最大化手指接触面积。
AI.result: 驱动器产生足够关节力矩和指尖力以满足日常生活任务需求；完整手套系统能产生足够抓握力处理常见家居物品；健康受试者测试显示主动辅助显著降低前臂肌肉活动；脊髓损伤患者初步研究表明手套辅助促进更自然的抓握模式并减少对肌腱固定抓握的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 这种可定制、符合人体工学的设计代表了向个性化手部康复和辅助机器人技术迈出的实际一步，尽管当前驱动界面导致任务完成时间增加，但显示出改善抓握模式和减少异常代偿的潜力。

title: Novel Memory Forgetting Techniques for Autonomous AI Agents: Balancing Relevance and Efficiency
summary: Long-horizon conversational agents require persistent memory for coherent reasoning, yet uncontrolled accumulation causes temporal decay and false memory propagation. Benchmarks such as LOCOMO and LOCCO report performance degradation from 0.455 to 0.05 across stages, while MultiWOZ shows 78.2% accuracy with 6.8% false memory rate under persistent retention. This work introduces an adaptive budgeted forgetting framework that regulates memory through relevanceguided scoring and bounded optimization. The approach integrates recency, frequency, and semantic alignment to maintain stability under constrained context. Comparative analysis demonstrates improved long-horizon F1 beyond 0.583 baseline levels, higher retention consistency, and reduced false memory behavior without increasing context usage. These findings confirm that structured forgetting preserves reasoning performance while preventing unbounded memory growth in extended conversational settings.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应预算遗忘框架，通过相关性引导评分和有界优化调节记忆，解决长对话中记忆积累导致的性能衰减和错误记忆传播问题。
AI.motivation: 长对话智能体需要持久记忆进行连贯推理，但无控制的记忆积累会导致时间衰减和错误记忆传播。现有基准如LOCOMO和LOCCO显示性能从0.455降至0.05，MultiWOZ在持久保留下有78.2%准确率和6.8%错误记忆率。
AI.method: 引入自适应预算遗忘框架，通过相关性引导评分和有界优化调节记忆。该方法整合了时效性、频率和语义对齐，在受限上下文中保持稳定性。
AI.result: 比较分析显示，该方法将长对话F1分数提升至超过0.583基线水平，提高了保留一致性，减少了错误记忆行为，且未增加上下文使用量。
AI.conclusion: 结构化遗忘在保持推理性能的同时，防止了扩展对话场景中无界记忆增长，证实了受控遗忘机制的有效性。

title: Pragmatics Meets Culture: Culturally-adapted Artwork Description Generation and Evaluation
summary: Language models are known to exhibit various forms of cultural bias in decision-making tasks, yet much less is known about their degree of cultural familiarity in open-ended text generation tasks. In this paper, we introduce the task of culturally-adapted art description generation, where models describe artworks for audiences from different cultural groups who vary in their familiarity with the cultural symbols and narratives embedded in the artwork. To evaluate cultural competence in this pragmatic generation task, we propose a framework based on culturally grounded question answering. We find that base models are only marginally adequate for this task, but, through a pragmatic speaker model, we can improve simulated listener comprehension by up to 8.2%. A human study further confirms that the model with higher pragmatic competence is rated as more helpful for comprehension by 8.0%.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出文化适应性艺术描述生成任务，通过基于文化基础问答的评估框架，发现基础模型在该任务上表现有限，但通过实用说话者模型可将模拟听众理解率提升8.2%，人类研究证实高实用能力模型被评价为更有助于理解
AI.motivation: 语言模型在决策任务中表现出文化偏见已有研究，但在开放式文本生成任务中的文化熟悉度了解较少。研究者希望探索模型在文化适应性艺术描述生成任务中的表现，即针对不同文化背景的受众生成艺术描述，这些受众对艺术品中嵌入的文化符号和叙事熟悉度不同
AI.method: 提出文化适应性艺术描述生成任务，建立基于文化基础问答的评估框架。使用基础模型作为基准，引入实用说话者模型来改进生成质量。通过模拟听众理解率评估模型表现，并进行人类研究验证
AI.result: 基础模型在该任务上表现仅勉强合格，但实用说话者模型可将模拟听众理解率提升8.2%。人类研究进一步证实，具有更高实用能力的模型在帮助理解方面获得8.0%的更高评分
AI.conclusion: 语言模型在文化适应性文本生成任务中存在局限性，但通过实用建模方法可以显著提升其文化能力。该研究为评估和改进语言模型的文化适应性提供了新框架和方法

title: A wearable haptic device for edge and surface simulation
summary: Object manipulation is fundamental to virtual reality (VR) applications, yet conventional fingertip haptic devices fail to render certain tactile features relevant for immersive and precise interactions, as i.e. detection of edges. This paper presents a compact, lightweight fingertip haptic device (24.3 g) that delivers distinguishable surface and edge contact feedback through a novel dual-motor mechanism. Pressure distribution characterization using a 6 x 6 flexible sensor array demonstrates distinct contact patterns between the two stimulation modes.
