A preliminary user study with five participants achieved 93% average classification accuracy across four conditions (edge/surface contact with light/heavy pressure), with mean response times of 2.79 seconds. The results indicate that the proposed device can effectively convey edge and surface tactile cues, potentially enhancing object manipulation fidelity in VR environments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级指尖触觉设备，通过双电机机制区分表面和边缘接触反馈，在VR中增强物体操作保真度
AI.motivation: 传统指尖触觉设备无法渲染某些对沉浸式和精确交互相关的触觉特征（如边缘检测），限制了VR应用中物体操作的保真度
AI.method: 开发了一种紧凑轻量（24.3克）的指尖触觉设备，采用新颖的双电机机制来提供可区分的表面和边缘接触反馈；使用6×6柔性传感器阵列进行压力分布表征
AI.result: 压力分布表征显示两种刺激模式具有不同的接触模式；初步用户研究（5名参与者）在四种条件（轻/重压力下的边缘/表面接触）下平均分类准确率达到93%，平均响应时间为2.79秒
AI.conclusion: 该设备能有效传达边缘和表面触觉线索，有望提升VR环境中物体操作的保真度

title: Modular Energy Steering for Safe Text-to-Image Generation with Foundation Models
summary: Controlling the behavior of text-to-image generative models is critical for safe and practical deployment. Existing safety approaches typically rely on model fine-tuning or curated datasets, which can degrade generation quality or limit scalability. We propose an inference-time steering framework that leverages gradient feedback from frozen pretrained foundation models to guide the generation process without modifying the underlying generator. Our key observation is that vision-language foundation models encode rich semantic representations that can be repurposed as off-the-shelf supervisory signals during generation. By injecting such feedback through clean latent estimates at each sampling step, our method formulates safety steering as an energy-based sampling problem. This design enables modular, training-free safety control that is compatible with both diffusion and flow-matching models and can generalize across diverse visual concepts. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art robustness against NSFW red-teaming benchmarks and effective multi-target steering, while preserving high generation quality on benign non-targeted prompts. Our framework provides a principled approach for utilizing foundation models as semantic energy estimators, enabling reliable and scalable safety control for text-to-image generation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于梯度反馈的推理时引导框架，利用冻结的预训练基础模型作为语义能量估计器，在不修改生成器的情况下实现训练无关的安全控制
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型的安全控制方法通常依赖于模型微调或策划数据集，这会降低生成质量或限制可扩展性。需要一种不修改底层生成器、保持高质量生成同时实现可靠安全控制的方法。
AI.method: 提出推理时引导框架，利用冻结的视觉语言基础模型作为现成的监督信号。通过在每个采样步骤向干净的潜在估计注入梯度反馈，将安全引导公式化为基于能量的采样问题。该方法与扩散模型和流匹配模型兼容，支持模块化、训练无关的安全控制。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在NSFW红队测试基准上达到最先进的鲁棒性，能够有效进行多目标引导，同时在良性非目标提示上保持高质量生成。框架能够泛化到多样化的视觉概念。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为基础模型作为语义能量估计器的使用提供了原则性方法，为文本到图像生成实现了可靠且可扩展的安全控制，无需训练或修改生成器，同时保持生成质量。

title: From Theory to Practice: Code Generation Using LLMs for CAPEC and CWE Frameworks
summary: The increasing complexity and volume of software systems have heightened the importance of identifying and mitigating security vulnerabilities. The existing software vulnerability datasets frequently fall short in providing comprehensive, detailed code snippets explicitly linked to specific vulnerability descriptions, reducing their utility for advanced research and hindering efforts to develop a deeper understanding of security vulnerabilities. To address this challenge, we present a novel dataset that provides examples of vulnerable code snippets corresponding to Common Attack Pattern Enumerations and Classifications (CAPEC) and Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) descriptions. By employing the capabilities of Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT) models, we have developed a robust methodology for generating these examples. Our approach utilizes GPT-4o, Llama and Claude models to generate code snippets that exhibit specific vulnerabilities as described in CAPEC and CWE documentation. This dataset not only enhances the understanding of security vulnerabilities in code but also serves as a valuable resource for training machine learning models focused on automatic vulnerability detection and remediation. Preliminary evaluations suggest that the dataset generated by Large Language Models demonstrates high accuracy and can serve as a reliable reference for vulnerability identification systems. We found consistent results across the three models, with 0.98 cosine similarity among codes. The final dataset comprises 615 CAPEC code snippets in three programming languages: Java, Python, and JavaScript, making it one of the most extensive and diverse resources in this domain.

AI.tldr: 研究人员利用GPT-4o、Llama和Claude等大语言模型生成与CAPEC和CWE描述对应的漏洞代码片段数据集，包含Java、Python和JavaScript三种语言的615个代码示例，用于增强安全漏洞理解和训练自动漏洞检测模型。
AI.motivation: 现有软件漏洞数据集通常缺乏与特定漏洞描述明确关联的全面、详细代码片段，这限制了高级研究的实用性，并阻碍了对安全漏洞的深入理解。需要创建更全面的资源来支持漏洞检测和修复研究。
AI.method: 利用GPT-4o、Llama和Claude等生成式预训练Transformer模型，根据CAPEC（常见攻击模式枚举与分类）和CWE（常见弱点枚举）文档描述生成展示特定漏洞的代码片段。采用多模型方法确保生成质量。
AI.result: 生成了包含615个CAPEC代码片段的最终数据集，涵盖Java、Python和JavaScript三种编程语言。三个模型生成的代码显示出高度一致性（余弦相似度0.98），初步评估表明LLM生成的代码具有高准确性，可作为漏洞识别系统的可靠参考。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集不仅增强了代码中安全漏洞的理解，还为专注于自动漏洞检测和修复的机器学习模型训练提供了宝贵资源。这是该领域最广泛和多样化的资源之一，展示了LLM在生成高质量漏洞代码示例方面的潜力。

title: How to Train your Tactile Model: Tactile Perception with Multi-fingered Robot Hands
comment: Accepted for publication at the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026, Vienna
summary: Rapid deployment of new tactile sensors is essential for scalable robotic manipulation, especially in multi-fingered hands equipped with vision-based tactile sensors. However, current methods for inferring contact properties rely heavily on convolutional neural networks (CNNs), which, while effective on known sensors, require large, sensor-specific datasets. Furthermore, they require retraining for each new sensor due to differences in lens properties, illumination, and sensor wear. Here we introduce TacViT, a novel tactile perception model based on Vision Transformers, designed to generalize on new sensor data. TacViT leverages global self-attention mechanisms to extract robust features from tactile images, enabling accurate contact property inference even on previously unseen sensors. This capability significantly reduces the need for data collection and retraining, accelerating the deployment of new sensors. We evaluate TacViT on sensors for a five-fingered robot hand and demonstrate its superior generalization performance compared to CNNs. Our results highlight TacViTs potential to make tactile sensing more scalable and practical for real-world robotic applications.

AI.tldr: TacViT：基于Vision Transformer的触觉感知模型，旨在解决CNN方法在新触觉传感器部署中需要大量传感器特定数据和重新训练的问题，通过自注意力机制实现对新传感器的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 当前基于CNN的触觉感知方法存在严重局限性：需要大量传感器特定数据集，且每当部署新传感器时（由于镜头特性、照明条件和传感器磨损的差异）都需要重新训练，这阻碍了触觉传感器在机器人操作中的快速、规模化部署。
AI.method: 提出TacViT模型，基于Vision Transformers架构，利用全局自注意力机制从触觉图像中提取鲁棒特征。该设计使其能够学习更通用的触觉表示，从而在未见过的传感器上也能准确推断接触属性，减少数据收集和重新训练需求。
AI.result: 在五指机器人手的传感器上评估TacViT，结果显示其相比CNN方法具有更优越的泛化性能。模型能够有效处理新传感器的部署，显著减少了数据收集和重新训练的需求。
AI.conclusion: TacViT通过Vision Transformer架构实现了触觉感知的泛化能力，有望使触觉传感在真实世界机器人应用中更具可扩展性和实用性，加速新传感器的部署过程。

title: Grounded Token Initialization for New Vocabulary in LMs for Generative Recommendation
summary: Language models (LMs) are increasingly extended with new learnable vocabulary tokens for domain-specific tasks, such as Semantic-ID tokens in generative recommendation. The standard practice initializes these new tokens as the mean of existing vocabulary embeddings, then relies on supervised fine-tuning to learn their representations. We present a systematic analysis of this strategy: through spectral and geometric diagnostics, we show that mean initialization collapses all new tokens into a degenerate subspace, erasing inter-token distinctions that subsequent fine-tuning struggles to fully recover. These findings suggest that \emph{token initialization} is a key bottleneck when extending LMs with new vocabularies. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose the \emph{Grounded Token Initialization Hypothesis}: linguistically grounding novel tokens in the pretrained embedding space before fine-tuning better enables the model to leverage its general-purpose knowledge for novel-token domains. We operationalize this hypothesis as GTI (Grounded Token Initialization), a lightweight grounding stage that, prior to fine-tuning, maps new tokens to distinct, semantically meaningful locations in the pretrained embedding space using only paired linguistic supervision. Despite its simplicity, GTI outperforms both mean initialization and existing auxiliary-task adaptation methods in the majority of evaluation settings across multiple generative recommendation benchmarks, including industry-scale and public datasets. Further analyses show that grounded embeddings produce richer inter-token structure that persists through fine-tuning, corroborating the hypothesis that initialization quality is a key bottleneck in vocabulary extension.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了语言模型扩展新词汇时均值初始化方法的缺陷，提出了基于语言学基础的词元初始化假设，并设计了GTI方法在微调前将新词元映射到预训练嵌入空间中的语义位置。
AI.motivation: 当前语言模型扩展新可学习词汇词元（如生成推荐中的语义ID词元）时，通常采用均值初始化策略，即将新词元初始化为现有词汇嵌入的均值，然后通过监督微调学习其表示。作者通过谱分析和几何诊断发现，这种均值初始化方法会使所有新词元坍缩到一个退化子空间，抹去了词元间的区分度，导致后续微调难以完全恢复这些区分。
AI.method: 论文提出了"基于语言学基础的词元初始化假设"：在微调前将新词元在预训练嵌入空间中进行语言学基础化，能更好地让模型利用其通用知识处理新词元领域。作者将这一假设操作化为GTI（基于语言学基础的词元初始化）方法，这是一个轻量级的基础化阶段，在微调前仅使用配对的语言学监督将新词元映射到预训练嵌入空间中不同且语义有意义的位置。
AI.result: GTI方法在多个生成推荐基准测试（包括工业规模和公共数据集）的大多数评估设置中，都优于均值初始化和现有的辅助任务适应方法。进一步分析表明，基于语言学基础的嵌入能产生更丰富的词元间结构，这些结构在微调过程中得以保持，证实了初始化质量是词汇扩展关键瓶颈的假设。
AI.conclusion: 词元初始化是扩展语言模型新词汇时的关键瓶颈。均值初始化会导致新词元坍缩到退化子空间，而提出的GTI方法通过在微调前将新词元语言学基础化到预训练嵌入空间中，能产生更丰富的词元间结构，从而在多个基准测试中取得更好的性能，验证了基于语言学基础的词元初始化假设的有效性。

title: SPAR: Single-Pass Any-Resolution ViT for Open-vocabulary Segmentation
summary: Foundational Vision Transformers (ViTs) have limited effectiveness in tasks requiring fine-grained spatial understanding, due to their fixed pre-training resolution and inherently coarse patch-level representations. These challenges are especially pronounced in dense prediction scenarios, such as open-vocabulary segmentation with ViT-based vision-language models, where high-resolution inputs are essential for accurate pixel-level reasoning. Existing approaches typically process large-resolution images using a sliding-window strategy at the pre-training resolution. While this improves accuracy through finer strides, it comes at a significant computational cost. We introduce SPAR: Single-Pass Any-Resolution ViT, a resolution-agnostic dense feature extractor designed for efficient high-resolution inference. We distill the spatial reasoning capabilities of a finely-strided, sliding-window teacher into a single-pass student using a feature regression loss, without requiring architectural changes or pixel-level supervision. Applied to open-vocabulary segmentation, SPAR improves single-pass baselines by up to 10.5 mIoU and even surpasses the teacher, demonstrating effectiveness in efficient, high-resolution reasoning. Code: https://github.com/naomikombol/SPAR

AI.tldr: SPAR是一种分辨率无关的密集特征提取器，通过特征回归损失将滑动窗口教师模型的空间推理能力蒸馏到单次推理学生模型中，用于高效高分辨率视觉任务
AI.motivation: 基础视觉Transformer在需要细粒度空间理解的任务中效果有限，因为其固定的预训练分辨率和粗糙的patch级表示。在密集预测任务（如开放词汇分割）中，高分辨率输入对像素级推理至关重要，但现有滑动窗口方法计算成本高昂
AI.method: 提出SPAR：单次推理任意分辨率ViT，通过特征回归损失将细粒度滑动窗口教师模型的空间推理能力蒸馏到单次推理学生模型中，无需架构修改或像素级监督
AI.result: 在开放词汇分割任务中，SPAR将单次推理基线提升了高达10.5 mIoU，甚至超过了教师模型的性能，证明了在高分辨率推理中的有效性
AI.conclusion: SPAR提供了一种高效的高分辨率密集特征提取方法，通过知识蒸馏实现了比传统滑动窗口方法更好的性能，同时显著降低了计算成本

title: Competency Questions as Executable Plans: a Controlled RAG Architecture for Cultural Heritage Storytelling
comment: Accepted at the 23rd European Semantic Web Conference (ESWC 2026)
summary: The preservation of intangible cultural heritage is a critical challenge as collective memory fades over time. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer a promising avenue for generating engaging narratives, their propensity for factual inaccuracies or "hallucinations" makes them unreliable for heritage applications where veracity is a central requirement. To address this, we propose a novel neuro-symbolic architecture grounded in Knowledge Graphs (KGs) that establishes a transparent "plan-retrieve-generate" workflow for story generation. A key novelty of our approach is the repurposing of competency questions (CQs) - traditionally design-time validation artifacts - into run-time executable narrative plans. This approach bridges the gap between high-level user personas and atomic knowledge retrieval, ensuring that generation is evidence-closed and fully auditable. We validate this architecture using a new resource: the Live Aid KG, a multimodal dataset aligning 1985 concert data with the Music Meta Ontology and linking to external multimedia assets. We present a systematic comparative evaluation of three distinct Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) strategies over this graph: a purely symbolic KG-RAG, a text-enriched Hybrid-RAG, and a structure-aware Graph-RAG. Our experiments reveal a quantifiable trade-off between the factual precision of symbolic retrieval, the contextual richness of hybrid methods, and the narrative coherence of graph-based traversal. Our findings offer actionable insights for designing personalised and controllable storytelling systems.

AI.tldr: 提出基于知识图谱的神经符号架构，将能力问题转化为可执行叙事计划，通过"规划-检索-生成"流程确保故事生成的可验证性，在Live Aid KG上评估三种RAG策略的权衡
AI.motivation: 非物质文化遗产保护面临集体记忆消失的挑战，现有大语言模型存在事实不准确问题，无法满足文化遗产应用对真实性的核心要求
AI.method: 提出基于知识图谱的神经符号架构，将传统设计时验证工具能力问题重新利用为运行时可执行叙事计划，建立透明的"规划-检索-生成"工作流，在Live Aid KG上评估三种RAG策略：纯符号KG-RAG、文本增强Hybrid-RAG和结构感知Graph-RAG
AI.result: 实验揭示了符号检索的事实精确性、混合方法的上下文丰富性和基于图遍历的叙事连贯性之间的量化权衡，为设计个性化可控故事系统提供可行见解
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过知识图谱基础确保生成过程证据封闭且完全可审计，为非物质文化遗产保护提供可靠的故事生成解决方案

title: SoftHand Model-W: A 3D-Printed, Anthropomorphic, Underactuated Robot Hand with Integrated Wrist and Carpal Tunnel
comment: Accepted for publication at the International Conference of Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026, Vienna
summary: This paper presents the SoftHand Model-W: a 3D-printed, underactuated, anthropomorphic robot hand based on the Pisa/IIT SoftHand, with an integrated antagonistic tendon mechanism and 2 degree-of-freedom tendon-driven wrist. These four degrees-of-acuation provide active flexion and extension to the five fingers, and active flexion/extension and radial/ulnar deviation of the palm through the wrist, while preserving the synergistic and self-adaptive features of such SoftHands. A carpal tunnel-inspired tendon routing allows remote motor placement in the forearm, reducing distal inertia and maintaining a compact form factor. The SoftHand-W is mounted on a 6-axis robot arm and tested with two reorientation tasks requiring coordination between the hand and arm's pose: cube stacking and in-plane disc rotation. Results comparing task time, arm joint travel, and configuration changes with and without wrist actuation show that adding the wrist reduces compensatory and reconfiguration movements of the arm for a quicker task-completion time. Moreover, the wrist enables pick-and-place operations that would be impossible otherwise. Overall, the SoftHand Model-W demonstrates how proximal degrees of freedom are key to achieving versatile, human-like manipulation in real world robotic applications, with a compact design enabling deployment in research and assistive settings.

AI.tldr: SoftHand Model-W：一款基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand的3D打印欠驱动仿人机器人手，集成拮抗肌腱机制和2自由度肌腱驱动腕部，通过腕部主动运动减少手臂补偿运动，提高操作效率
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人手通常缺乏腕部自由度，导致需要手臂进行大量补偿运动来完成复杂操作任务。为了在保持软体手自适应特性的同时实现更高效、类人的操作，需要集成腕部主动自由度。
AI.method: 开发SoftHand Model-W：基于Pisa/IIT SoftHand的3D打印欠驱动仿人手，集成拮抗肌腱机制提供手指主动屈伸，2自由度肌腱驱动腕部提供手掌屈伸和桡尺偏转。采用腕管启发式肌腱布线将电机远程放置在前臂，减少远端惯性。将手安装在6轴机器人臂上进行立方体堆叠和平面圆盘旋转任务测试。
AI.result: 与无腕部驱动相比，添加腕部驱动显著减少了任务完成时间、手臂关节行程和配置变化。腕部减少了手臂的补偿和重新配置运动，使任务完成更快。腕部还实现了原本不可能的拾放操作。
AI.conclusion: SoftHand Model-W展示了近端自由度对于实现真实世界机器人应用中多功能、类人操作的关键作用。紧凑设计使其适用于研究和辅助场景，腕部主动自由度显著提升了操作效率和能力。

title: Batched Contextual Reinforcement: A Task-Scaling Law for Efficient Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models employing Chain-of-Thought reasoning achieve strong performance but suffer from excessive token consumption that inflates inference costs. Existing efficiency methods such as explicit length penalties, difficulty estimators, or multi-stage curricula either degrade reasoning quality or require complex training pipelines. We introduce Batched Contextual Reinforcement, a minimalist, single-stage training paradigm that unlocks efficient reasoning through a simple structural modification: training the model to solve N problems simultaneously within a shared context window, rewarded purely by per-instance accuracy. This formulation creates an implicit token budget that yields several key findings: (1) We identify a novel task-scaling law: as the number of concurrent problems N increases during inference, per-problem token usage decreases monotonically while accuracy degrades far more gracefully than baselines, establishing N as a controllable throughput dimension. (2) BCR challenges the traditional accuracy-efficiency trade-off by demonstrating a "free lunch" phenomenon at standard single-problem inference. Across both 1.5B and 4B model families, BCR reduces token usage by 15.8% to 62.6% while consistently maintaining or improving accuracy across five major mathematical benchmarks. (3) Qualitative analyses reveal emergent self-regulated efficiency, where models autonomously eliminate redundant metacognitive loops without explicit length supervision. (4) Crucially, we empirically demonstrate that implicit budget constraints successfully circumvent the adversarial gradients and catastrophic optimization collapse inherent to explicit length penalties, offering a highly stable, constraint-based alternative for length control. These results prove BCR practical, showing simple structural incentives unlock latent high-density reasoning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: BCR是一种通过批量上下文强化训练的单阶段范式，让模型在共享上下文中同时解决多个问题，利用隐式令牌预算实现推理效率提升，在保持或提高准确性的同时显著减少令牌消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有链式思维推理方法存在令牌消耗过高的问题，而现有的效率方法如显式长度惩罚、难度估计或多阶段课程要么会降低推理质量，要么需要复杂的训练流程。需要一种简单有效的解决方案来平衡推理效率和质量。
AI.method: 提出批量上下文强化训练范式：训练模型在共享上下文窗口中同时解决N个问题，仅通过每个实例的准确性进行奖励。这种结构修改创建了隐式令牌预算，使模型学会高效推理。
AI.result: 1) 发现任务缩放定律：随着并发问题数N增加，每个问题的令牌使用量单调减少，准确性下降远低于基线；2) BCR在标准单问题推理中实现"免费午餐"现象，在1.5B和4B模型上减少15.8%-62.6%令牌使用，同时在五个主要数学基准上保持或提高准确性；3) 模型自主消除冗余元认知循环；4) 隐式预算约束避免了显式长度惩罚的对抗梯度和灾难性优化崩溃。
AI.conclusion: BCR通过简单的结构激励解锁了LLMs中潜在的高密度推理能力，提供了一种高度稳定、基于约束的长度控制替代方案，证明了隐式预算约束在提升推理效率方面的实用性和有效性。

title: LiPS: Lightweight Panoptic Segmentation for Resource-Constrained Robotics
comment: Submitted to IEEE ICIP 2026. Under review
summary: Panoptic segmentation is a key enabler for robotic perception, as it unifies semantic understanding with object-level reasoning. However, the increasing complexity of state-of-the-art models makes them unsuitable for deployment on resource-constrained platforms such as mobile robots. We propose a novel approach called LiPS that addresses the challenge of efficient-to-compute panoptic segmentation with a lightweight design that retains query-based decoding while introducing a streamlined feature extraction and fusion pathway. It aims at providing a strong panoptic segmentation performance while substantially lowering the computational demands. Evaluations on standard benchmarks demonstrate that LiPS attains accuracy comparable to much heavier baselines, while providing up to 4.5 higher throughput, measured in frames per second, and requiring nearly 6.8 times fewer computations. This efficiency makes LiPS a highly relevant bridge between modern panoptic models and real-world robotic applications.

AI.tldr: LiPS：一种轻量级全景分割方法，在保持查询式解码的同时简化特征提取与融合路径，显著降低计算需求，适合资源受限的移动机器人平台
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的全景分割模型复杂度高，不适合部署在移动机器人等资源受限平台上，需要一种既能保持高性能又计算高效的解决方案
AI.method: 提出LiPS方法，保留基于查询的解码机制，同时引入简化的特征提取和融合路径，实现轻量级设计
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，LiPS达到与更重基线相当的精度，同时提供高达4.5倍的吞吐量（帧/秒），计算需求减少近6.8倍
AI.conclusion: LiPS在现代全景分割模型与现实世界机器人应用之间架起了高效桥梁，为资源受限平台提供了可行的全景分割解决方案

title: SCALE: Semantic- and Confidence-Aware Conditional Variational Autoencoder for Zero-shot Skeleton-based Action Recognition
summary: Zero-shot skeleton-based action recognition (ZSAR) aims to recognize action classes without any training skeletons from those classes, relying instead on auxiliary semantics from text. Existing approaches frequently depend on explicit skeleton-text alignment, which can be brittle when action names underspecify fine-grained dynamics and when unseen classes are semantically confusable. We propose SCALE, a lightweight and deterministic Semantic- and Confidence-Aware Listwise Energy-based framework that formulates ZSAR as class-conditional energy ranking. SCALE builds a text-conditioned Conditional Variational Autoencoder where frozen text representations parameterize both the latent prior and the decoder, enabling likelihood-based evaluation for unseen classes without generating samples at test time. To separate competing hypotheses, we introduce a semantic- and confidence-aware listwise energy loss that emphasizes semantically similar hard negatives and incorporates posterior uncertainty to adapt decision margins and reweight ambiguous training instances. Additionally, we utilize a latent prototype contrast objective to align posterior means with text-derived latent prototypes, improving semantic organization and class separability without direct feature matching. Experiments on NTU-60 and NTU-120 datasets show that SCALE consistently improves over prior VAE- and alignment-based baselines while remaining competitive with diffusion-based methods.

AI.tldr: SCALE是一个轻量级确定性框架，通过语义和置信度感知的列表能量排序解决零样本骨架动作识别问题，避免脆弱的显式骨架-文本对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本骨架动作识别方法依赖显式骨架-文本对齐，当动作名称无法充分描述细粒度动态或未见类别语义混淆时，这种方法很脆弱。需要更鲁棒的框架来处理这些挑战。
AI.method: 提出SCALE框架：1) 构建文本条件变分自编码器，冻结文本表示参数化先验和解码器；2) 引入语义和置信度感知列表能量损失，强调语义相似的困难负样本并融入后验不确定性；3) 使用潜在原型对比目标对齐后验均值与文本派生潜在原型。
AI.result: 在NTU-60和NTU-120数据集上的实验表明，SCALE持续优于先前的VAE和对齐基线方法，同时与基于扩散的方法保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: SCALE通过能量排序框架有效解决了零样本骨架动作识别中的语义混淆和细粒度动态描述不足问题，提供了一种轻量级且确定性的替代方案，避免了脆弱的显式对齐。

title: StretchBot: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Adaptive Guidance with Assistive Robots
summary: Assistive robots have growing potential to support physical wellbeing in home and healthcare settings, for example, by guiding users through stretching or rehabilitation routines. However, existing systems remain largely scripted, which limits their ability to adapt to user state, environmental context, and interaction dynamics. In this work, we present StretchBot, a hybrid neuro-symbolic robotic coach for adaptive assistive guidance. The system combines multimodal perception with knowledge-graph-grounded large language model reasoning to support context-aware adjustments during short stretching sessions while maintaining a structured routine. To complement the system description, we report an exploratory pilot comparison between scripted and adaptive guidance with three participants. The pilot findings suggest that the adaptive condition improved perceived adaptability and contextual relevance, while scripted guidance remained competitive in smoothness and predictability. These results provide preliminary evidence that structured actionable knowledge can help ground language-model-based adaptation in embodied assistive interaction, while also highlighting the need for larger, longitudinal studies to evaluate robustness, generalizability, and long-term user experience.

AI.tldr: StretchBot：结合多模态感知与知识图谱增强大语言模型推理的混合神经符号机器人教练，用于自适应辅助拉伸指导
AI.motivation: 现有辅助机器人系统大多基于脚本，无法适应用户状态、环境上下文和交互动态的变化，限制了其在家庭和医疗场景中支持身体健康的潜力
AI.method: 提出StretchBot混合神经符号机器人教练系统，结合多模态感知与基于知识图谱的大语言模型推理，在保持结构化常规的同时支持上下文感知的调整
AI.result: 探索性试点比较显示自适应条件改善了感知适应性和上下文相关性，而脚本指导在流畅性和可预测性方面仍具竞争力
AI.conclusion: 结构化可操作知识有助于在具身辅助交互中基于语言模型进行自适应，但需要更大规模的纵向研究来评估鲁棒性、泛化性和长期用户体验

title: go-$m$HC: Direct Parameterization of Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections via Generalized Orthostochastic Matrices
comment: 29 pages, 30 figures, 9 tables. Includes supplementary material
summary: Doubly stochastic matrices enable learned mixing across residual streams, but parameterizing the set of doubly stochastic matrices (the Birkhoff polytope) exactly and efficiently remains an open challenge. Existing exact methods scale factorially with the number of streams ($d$), while Kronecker-factorized approaches are efficient but expressivity-limited. We introduce a novel exact parameterization grounded in the theory of generalized orthostochastic matrices, which scales as $\mathcal{O}(d^3)$ and exposes a single hyperparameter $s$ which continuously interpolates between a computationally efficient boundary and the fully expressive Birkhoff polytope. Building on Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections ($m$HC), a framework for learned dynamic layer connectivity, we instantiate this parameterization in go-$m$HC. Our method composes naturally with Kronecker-factorized methods, substantially recovering expressivity at similar FLOP costs. Spectral analysis indicates that go-$m$HC fills the Birkhoff polytope far more completely than Kronecker-factorized baselines. On synthetic stream-mixing tasks, go-$m$HC achieves the minimum theoretical loss while converging up to $10\times$ faster. We validate our approach in a 30M parameter GPT-style language model. The expressivity, efficiency, and exactness of go-$m$HC offer a practical avenue for scaling $d$ as a new dimension of model capacity.

AI.tldr: 提出go-mHC方法，通过广义正交随机矩阵理论实现双随机矩阵的精确参数化，计算复杂度为O(d³)，在流混合任务中收敛速度提升10倍
AI.motivation: 双随机矩阵能够实现残差流之间的学习混合，但现有方法要么计算复杂度阶乘增长，要么表达能力受限，需要一种既高效又具有完全表达能力的精确参数化方法
AI.method: 基于广义正交随机矩阵理论提出新的精确参数化方法，引入超参数s在计算效率和完全表达能力之间连续插值，结合流形约束超连接框架实现go-mHC方法
AI.result: go-mHC在合成流混合任务中达到理论最小损失，收敛速度提升10倍；谱分析显示比Kronecker分解基线更完全填充Birkhoff多面体；在3000万参数GPT风格语言模型中验证有效
AI.conclusion: go-mHC提供了双随机矩阵的精确、高效参数化方案，为将流数量d作为模型容量的新维度进行扩展提供了实用途径

title: A Physical Imitation Learning Pipeline for Energy-Efficient Quadruped Locomotion Assisted by Parallel Elastic Joint
summary: Due to brain-body co-evolution, animals' intrinsic body dynamics play a crucial role in energy-efficient locomotion, which shares control effort between active muscles and passive body dynamics -- a principle known as Embodied Physical Intelligence. In contrast, robot bodies are often designed with one centralised controller that typically suppress the intrinsic body dynamics instead of exploiting it. We introduce Physical Imitation Learning (PIL), which distils a Reinforcement Learning (RL) control policy into physically implementable body responses that can be directly offloaded to passive Parallel Elastic Joints (PEJs), enabling therefore the body to imitate part of the controlled behaviour. Meanwhile, the residual policy commands the motors to recover the RL policy's performance. The results is an overall reduced energy consumption thanks to outsourcing parts of the control policy to the PEJs. Here we show in simulated quadrupeds, that our PIL approach can offloads up to 87% of mechanical power to PEJs on flat terrain and 18% on rough terrain. Because the body design is distilled from -- rather than jointly optimised with -- the control policy, PIL realises brain-body co-design without expanding the search space with body design parameters, providing a computationally efficient route to task-specific Embodied Physical Intelligence applicable to a wide range of joint-based robot morphologies.

AI.tldr: PIL方法将强化学习控制策略蒸馏到被动并联弹性关节中，实现身体模仿部分控制行为，从而降低能量消耗
AI.motivation: 动物通过脑体协同进化利用内在身体动力学实现节能运动，而机器人通常采用集中控制器抑制而非利用身体动力学。需要开发能利用身体动力学的控制方法，实现具身物理智能
AI.method: 提出物理模仿学习(PIL)：将强化学习控制策略蒸馏到可物理实现的被动并联弹性关节响应中，让身体模仿部分控制行为；剩余策略控制电机恢复RL策略性能
AI.result: 在模拟四足机器人上，PIL能将高达87%的机械功率卸载到并联弹性关节（平坦地形），粗糙地形为18%；实现脑体协同设计而不扩展搜索空间
AI.conclusion: PIL为任务特定的具身物理智能提供了计算高效路径，适用于广泛的关节型机器人形态，通过将控制策略卸载到身体实现节能

title: Taming the Exponential: A Fast Softmax Surrogate for Integer-Native Edge Inference
summary: Softmax can become a computational bottleneck in the Transformer model's Multi-Head Attention (MHA) block, particularly in small models under low-precision inference, where exponentiation and normalization incur significant overhead. As such, we suggest using Head-Calibrated Clipped-Linear Softmax (HCCS), a bounded, monotone surrogate to the exponential softmax function, which uses a clipped linear mapping of the max centered attention logits. This approximation produces a stable probability distribution, maintains the ordering of the original logits and has non-negative values. HCCS differs from previous softmax surrogates as it includes a set of lightweight calibration parameters that are optimized offline based on a representative dataset and calibrated for each individual attention head to preserve the statistical properties of the individual heads. We describe a hardware-motivated implementation of HCCS for high-throughput scenarios targeting the AMD Versal AI Engines. The current reference implementations from AMD for this platform rely upon either bfloat16 arithmetic or LUTs to perform the exponential operation, which might limit the throughput of the platform and fail to utilize the high-throughput integer vector processing units of the AI Engine. In contrast, HCCS provides a natural mapping to the AI Engines' int8 multiply accumulate (MAC) units. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first int8 optimized softmax surrogate for AMD AI engines that significantly exceeds the speed performance of other reference implementations while maintaining competitive task accuracy on small or heavily quantized MHA workloads after quantization-aware retraining.

AI.tldr: 提出HCCS（Head-Calibrated Clipped-Linear Softmax）作为Softmax的替代方案，针对AMD Versal AI Engines平台优化，使用int8整数运算替代浮点指数运算，提升Transformer注意力机制的计算效率。
AI.motivation: Softmax在Transformer多头注意力机制中成为计算瓶颈，特别是在低精度推理的小模型中，指数运算和归一化带来显著开销。现有AMD平台实现依赖bfloat16或查找表，未能充分利用AI Engine的高吞吐整数向量处理单元。
AI.method: 提出HCCS方法：使用截断线性映射替代指数函数，包含轻量级校准参数，基于代表性数据集离线优化，为每个注意力头单独校准以保持统计特性。针对AMD AI Engines的int8乘累加单元进行硬件优化实现。
AI.result: HCCS在AMD AI Engines上显著超越其他参考实现的速度性能，同时在小规模或重度量化MHA工作负载上保持竞争力的任务精度（经过量化感知重训练）。这是首个针对AMD AI Engines的int8优化Softmax替代方案。
AI.conclusion: HCCS为Transformer注意力机制提供了高效的Softmax替代方案，特别适合AMD Versal AI Engines平台，通过整数运算替代浮点指数运算，在保持精度的同时大幅提升计算吞吐量。

title: Opal: Private Memory for Personal AI
summary:
Personal AI systems increasingly retain long-term memory of user activity, including documents, emails, messages, meetings, and ambient recordings. Trusted hardware can keep this data private, but struggles to scale with a growing datastore. This pushes the data to external storage, which exposes retrieval access patterns that leak private information to the application provider. Oblivious RAM (ORAM) is a cryptographic primitive that can hide these patterns, but it requires a fixed access budget, precluding the query-dependent traversals that agentic memory systems rely on for accuracy.
  We present Opal, a private memory system for personal AI. Our key insight is to decouple all data-dependent reasoning from the bulk of personal data, confining it to the trusted enclave. Untrusted disk then sees only fixed, oblivious memory accesses. This enclave-resident component uses a lightweight knowledge graph to capture personal context that semantic search alone misses and handles continuous ingestion by piggybacking reindexing and capacity management on every ORAM access. Evaluated on a comprehensive synthetic personal-data pipeline driven by stochastic communication models, Opal improves retrieval accuracy by 13 percentage points over semantic search and achieves 29x higher throughput with 15x lower infrastructure cost than a secure baseline. Opal is under consideration for deployment to millions of users at a major AI provider.

AI.tldr: Opal是一个用于个人AI的隐私内存系统，通过将数据依赖的推理与大量个人数据分离到可信执行环境中，使用ORAM隐藏访问模式，结合知识图谱提升检索准确性，显著优于语义搜索基线。
AI.motivation: 个人AI系统需要长期记忆用户活动数据，但可信硬件难以扩展，将数据推送到外部存储会暴露检索访问模式，泄露隐私信息。传统ORAM需要固定访问预算，无法支持智能体记忆系统所需的查询依赖遍历。
AI.method: Opal的核心洞察是将所有数据依赖的推理与大量个人数据分离，限制在可信执行环境内。不可信磁盘只看到固定的、不可知的存储器访问。环境内组件使用轻量级知识图谱捕获语义搜索遗漏的个人上下文，并通过在每个ORAM访问上附加重新索引和容量管理来处理持续的数据摄入。
AI.result: 在基于随机通信模型的综合合成个人数据管道评估中，Opal相比语义搜索提高了13个百分点的检索准确率，实现了29倍的高吞吐量和15倍的低基础设施成本。该系统正在考虑在主要AI提供商处部署给数百万用户。
AI.conclusion: Opal通过将数据依赖推理与大量数据分离到可信执行环境，结合知识图谱和ORAM，解决了个人AI系统中的隐私保护与可扩展性矛盾，在保持隐私的同时显著提升了检索性能和系统效率。

title: Multi-Camera View Scaling for Data-Efficient Robot Imitation Learning
summary: The generalization ability of imitation learning policies for robotic manipulation is fundamentally constrained by the diversity of expert demonstrations, while collecting demonstrations across varied environments is costly and difficult in practice. In this paper, we propose a practical framework that exploits inherent scene diversity without additional human effort by scaling camera views during demonstration collection. Instead of acquiring more trajectories, multiple synchronized camera perspectives are used to generate pseudo-demonstrations from each expert trajectory, which enriches the training distribution and improves viewpoint invariance in visual representations. We analyze how different action spaces interact with view scaling and show that camera-space representations further enhance diversity. In addition, we introduce a multiview action aggregation method that allows single-view policies to benefit from multiple cameras during deployment. Extensive experiments in simulation and real-world manipulation tasks demonstrate significant gains in data efficiency and generalization compared to single-view baselines. Our results suggest that scaling camera views provides a practical and scalable solution for imitation learning, which requires minimal additional hardware setup and integrates seamlessly with existing imitation learning algorithms. The website of our project is https://yichen928.github.io/robot_multiview.

AI.tldr: 通过多视角相机采集专家演示，无需额外人工成本即可扩展场景多样性，提升模仿学习的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 机器人模仿学习的泛化能力受限于专家演示的多样性，而收集多样化环境的演示成本高且困难。需要一种无需额外人工努力就能利用场景多样性的实用方法
AI.method: 提出多视角框架：在演示采集时使用多个同步相机视角，从每个专家轨迹生成伪演示；分析不同动作空间与视角扩展的交互；引入相机空间表示增强多样性；设计多视角动作聚合方法，使单视角策略在部署时也能受益于多相机
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界操作任务中的大量实验表明，相比单视角基线，该方法在数据效率和泛化能力方面有显著提升
AI.conclusion: 扩展相机视角为模仿学习提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案，只需最小额外硬件设置，并能与现有模仿学习算法无缝集成

title: Unifying Group-Relative and Self-Distillation Policy Optimization via Sample Routing
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a standard paradigm for post-training large language models. While Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is widely adopted, its coarse credit assignment uniformly penalizes failed rollouts, lacking the token-level focus needed to efficiently address specific deviations. Self-Distillation Policy Optimization (SDPO) addresses this by providing denser, more targeted logit-level supervision that facilitates rapid early improvement, yet it frequently collapses during prolonged training. We trace this late-stage instability to two intrinsic flaws: self-distillation on already-correct samples introduces optimization ambiguity, and the self-teacher's signal reliability progressively degrades. To resolve these issues, we propose Sample-Routed Policy Optimization (SRPO), a unified on-policy framework that routes correct samples to GRPO's reward-aligned reinforcement and failed samples to SDPO's targeted logit-level correction. SRPO further incorporates an entropy-aware dynamic weighting mechanism to suppress high-entropy, unreliable distillation targets while emphasizing confident ones. Evaluated across five benchmarks and two model scales, SRPO achieves both the rapid early improvement of SDPO and the long-horizon stability of GRPO. It consistently surpasses the peak performance of both baselines, raising the five-benchmark average on Qwen3-8B by 3.4% over GRPO and 6.3% over SDPO, while simultaneously yielding moderate response lengths and lowering per-step compute cost by up to 17.2%.

AI.tldr: SRPO是一种统一策略优化框架，结合GRPO的奖励对齐强化和SDPO的针对性对数级修正，通过样本路由和熵感知动态加权机制，实现快速早期改进和长期训练稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法存在局限性：GRPO采用粗粒度信用分配，对失败rollout统一惩罚，缺乏针对特定偏差的token级关注；SDPO提供更密集的对数级监督，能实现快速早期改进，但在长期训练中经常崩溃。需要解决SDPO后期不稳定的内在缺陷。
AI.method: 提出Sample-Routed Policy Optimization (SRPO)：1) 样本路由机制：将正确样本路由到GRPO的奖励对齐强化学习，失败样本路由到SDPO的针对性对数级修正；2) 熵感知动态加权机制：抑制高熵不可靠的蒸馏目标，强调置信度高的目标。
AI.result: 在5个基准测试和2个模型规模上评估，SRPO同时实现了SDPO的快速早期改进和GRPO的长期稳定性。在Qwen3-8B上，5个基准测试平均性能比GRPO提升3.4%，比SDPO提升6.3%，同时产生适中的响应长度，每步计算成本降低高达17.2%。
AI.conclusion: SRPO通过统一框架有效结合了GRPO和SDPO的优势，解决了SDPO后期不稳定的问题，在性能、稳定性和计算效率方面均优于现有基线方法。

title: Sparse Bayesian Learning Algorithms Revisited: From Learning Majorizers to Structured Algorithmic Learning using Neural Networks
summary: Sparse Bayesian Learning is one of the most popular sparse signal recovery methods, and various algorithms exist under the SBL paradigm. However, given a performance metric and a sparse recovery problem, it is difficult to know a-priori the best algorithm to choose. This difficulty is in part due to a lack of a unified framework to derive SBL algorithms. We address this issue by first showing that the most popular SBL algorithms can be derived using the majorization-minimization (MM) principle, providing hitherto unknown convergence guarantees to this class of SBL methods. Moreover, we show that the two most popular SBL update rules not only fall under the MM framework but are both valid descent steps for a common majorizer, revealing a deeper analytical compatibility between these algorithms. Using this insight and properties from MM theory we expand the class of SBL algorithms, and address finding the best SBL algorithm via data within the MM framework. Second, we go beyond the MM framework by introducing the powerful modeling capabilities of deep learning to further expand the class of SBL algorithms, aiming to learn a superior SBL update rule from data. We propose a novel deep learning architecture that can outperform the classical MM based ones across different sparse recovery problems. Our architecture's complexity does not scale with the measurement matrix dimension, hence providing a unique opportunity to test generalization capability across different matrices. For parameterized dictionaries, this invariance allows us to train and test the model across different parameter ranges. We also showcase our model's ability to learn a functional mapping by its zero-shot performance on unseen measurement matrices. Finally, we test our model's performance across different numbers of snapshots, signal-to-noise ratios, and sparsity levels.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种统一稀疏贝叶斯学习(SBL)算法的框架，基于MM原理推导现有SBL算法并提供收敛保证，同时引入深度学习架构扩展SBL算法类别，通过数据学习更优的更新规则。
AI.motivation: 稀疏贝叶斯学习(SBL)存在多种算法，但缺乏统一框架来推导和选择最佳算法。现有算法之间关系不明确，且难以根据具体问题和性能指标预先选择最合适的算法。
AI.method: 1. 证明主流SBL算法可通过主优化-最小化(MM)原理推导，提供收敛保证；2. 揭示两种最流行SBL更新规则共享同一主优化器；3. 基于MM理论扩展SBL算法类别；4. 引入深度学习架构，设计不随测量矩阵维度扩展的模型，学习更优的SBL更新规则。
AI.result: 1. 建立了SBL算法的统一MM框架；2. 提出的深度学习模型在多种稀疏恢复问题上优于传统MM方法；3. 模型复杂度不随测量矩阵维度增加，展示了跨不同矩阵的泛化能力；4. 在参数化字典中实现跨参数范围的训练和测试；5. 展示了在未见测量矩阵上的零样本性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过MM框架统一了SBL算法分析，并引入深度学习扩展了算法类别。提出的深度学习架构能够从数据中学习更优的更新规则，在多种稀疏恢复场景中表现优异，且具有良好的泛化能力。

title: Simulating Realistic LiDAR Data Under Adverse Weather for Autonomous Vehicles: A Physics-Informed Learning Approach
summary: Accurate LiDAR simulation is crucial for autonomous driving, especially under adverse weather conditions. Existing methods struggle to capture the complex interactions between LiDAR signals and atmospheric phenomena, leading to unrealistic representations. This paper presents a physics-informed learning framework (PICWGAN) for generating realistic LiDAR data under adverse weather conditions. By integrating physicsdriven constraints for modeling signal attenuation and geometryconsistent degradations into a physics-informed learning pipeline, the proposed method reduces the sim-to-real gap. Evaluations on real-world datasets (CADC for snow, Boreas for rain) and the VoxelScape dataset show that our approach closely mimics realworld intensity patterns. Quantitative metrics, including MSE, SSIM, KL divergence, and Wasserstein distance, demonstrate statistically consistent intensity distributions. Additionally, models trained on data enhanced by our framework outperform baselines in downstream 3D object detection, achieving performance comparable to models trained on real-world data. These results highlight the effectiveness of the proposed approach in improving the realism of LiDAR data and enabling robust perception under adverse weather conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出PICWGAN物理信息学习框架，通过融合物理驱动约束来生成恶劣天气下的真实LiDAR数据，缩小仿真与现实差距，提升下游3D目标检测性能
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR仿真方法难以准确捕捉LiDAR信号与大气现象（如雨雪）的复杂相互作用，导致恶劣天气条件下的数据表示不真实，限制了自动驾驶系统的鲁棒性
AI.method: 提出PICWGAN物理信息学习框架，将信号衰减的物理驱动约束和几何一致退化建模集成到物理信息学习流程中，使用条件Wasserstein GAN架构生成恶劣天气下的真实LiDAR数据
AI.result: 在真实数据集（CADC雪天、Boreas雨天、VoxelScape）上评估，方法能准确模拟真实世界强度模式；定量指标（MSE、SSIM、KL散度、Wasserstein距离）显示强度分布具有统计一致性；使用该框架增强数据训练的模型在下游3D目标检测中优于基线，性能接近真实数据训练的模型
AI.conclusion: PICWGAN框架能有效提升恶劣天气下LiDAR数据的真实感，缩小仿真与现实差距，为恶劣天气条件下的鲁棒感知系统开发提供支持

title: De Jure: Iterative LLM Self-Refinement for Structured Extraction of Regulatory Rules
summary: Regulatory documents encode legally binding obligations that LLM-based systems must respect. Yet converting dense, hierarchically structured legal text into machine-readable rules remains a costly, expert-intensive process. We present De Jure, a fully automated, domain-agnostic pipeline for extracting structured regulatory rules from raw documents, requiring no human annotation, domain-specific prompting, or annotated gold data. De Jure operates through four sequential stages: normalization of source documents into structured Markdown; LLM-driven semantic decomposition into structured rule units; multi-criteria LLM-as-a-judge evaluation across 19 dimensions spanning metadata, definitions, and rule semantics; and iterative repair of low-scoring extractions within a bounded regeneration budget, where upstream components are repaired before rule units are evaluated. We evaluate De Jure across four models on three regulatory corpora spanning finance, healthcare, and AI governance. On the finance domain, De Jure yields consistent and monotonic improvement in extraction quality, reaching peak performance within three judge-guided iterations. De Jure generalizes effectively to healthcare and AI governance, maintaining high performance across both open- and closed-source models. In a downstream compliance question-answering evaluation via RAG, responses grounded in De Jure extracted rules are preferred over prior work in 73.8% of cases at single-rule retrieval depth, rising to 84.0% under broader retrieval, confirming that extraction fidelity translates directly into downstream utility. These results demonstrate that explicit, interpretable evaluation criteria can substitute for human annotation in complex regulatory domains, offering a scalable and auditable path toward regulation-grounded LLM alignment.

AI.tldr: De Jure是一个完全自动化的、领域无关的管道，用于从原始监管文档中提取结构化规则，无需人工标注或领域特定提示，通过四个阶段实现高质量规则提取。
AI.motivation: 监管文档包含LLM系统必须遵守的法律义务，但将密集、分层结构的法律文本转换为机器可读规则仍然是一个昂贵、专家密集型的过程，需要自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用四阶段管道：1) 将源文档规范化为结构化Markdown；2) LLM驱动的语义分解为结构化规则单元；3) 基于LLM-as-a-judge的多标准评估（19个维度）；4) 在有限再生预算内迭代修复低质量提取。
AI.result: 在金融、医疗和AI治理三个监管领域评估，De Jure在金融领域经过三次迭代达到峰值性能，在医疗和AI治理领域保持高性能。在下游合规问答评估中，基于De Jure提取规则的响应在73.8%-84.0%的情况下优于先前工作。
AI.conclusion: 显式、可解释的评估标准可以替代复杂监管领域中的人工标注，为基于监管的LLM对齐提供了可扩展且可审计的路径。

title: ViT-Explainer: An Interactive Walkthrough of the Vision Transformer Pipeline
summary: Transformer-based architectures have become the shared backbone of natural language processing and computer vision. However, understanding how these models operate remains challenging, particularly in vision settings, where images are processed as sequences of patch tokens. Existing interpretability tools often focus on isolated components or expert-oriented analysis, leaving a gap in guided, end-to-end understanding of the full inference pipeline. To bridge this gap, we present ViT-Explainer, a web-based interactive system that provides an integrated visualization of Vision Transformer inference, from patch tokenization to final classification. The system combines animated walkthroughs, patch-level attention overlays, and a vision-adapted Logit Lens within both guided and free exploration modes. A user study with six participants suggests that ViT-Explainer is easy to learn and use, helping users interpret and understand Vision Transformer behavior.

AI.tldr: ViT-Explainer：一个基于Web的交互式系统，用于可视化Vision Transformer的完整推理过程，从图像分块到最终分类，提供动画演示、注意力覆盖和视觉适应的Logit Lens功能。
AI.motivation: Transformer架构已成为NLP和CV的共享骨干，但在视觉领域理解其工作原理仍具挑战性。现有可解释性工具通常关注孤立组件或专家导向分析，缺乏对完整推理流程的引导式端到端理解。
AI.method: 开发ViT-Explainer系统，提供集成可视化功能：1) 动画演示Vision Transformer推理流程；2) 分块级注意力覆盖；3) 视觉适应的Logit Lens；4) 引导模式和自由探索模式。
AI.result: 通过6名参与者的用户研究表明，ViT-Explainer易于学习和使用，能够帮助用户解释和理解Vision Transformer的行为。
AI.conclusion: ViT-Explainer填补了Vision Transformer可解释性工具的空白，通过交互式可视化系统提供了对完整推理流程的端到端理解，有助于用户更好地理解和解释模型行为。

title: Social Meaning in Large Language Models: Structure, Magnitude, and Pragmatic Prompting
summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly exhibit human-like patterns of pragmatic and social reasoning. This paper addresses two related questions: do LLMs approximate human social meaning not only qualitatively but also quantitatively, and can prompting strategies informed by pragmatic theory improve this approximation? To address the first, we introduce two calibration-focused metrics distinguishing structural fidelity from magnitude calibration: the Effect Size Ratio (ESR) and the Calibration Deviation Score (CDS). To address the second, we derive prompting conditions from two pragmatic assumptions: that social meaning arises from reasoning over linguistic alternatives, and that listeners infer speaker knowledge states and communicative motives. Applied to a case study on numerical (im)precision across three frontier LLMs, we find that all models reliably reproduce the qualitative structure of human social inferences but differ substantially in magnitude calibration. Prompting models to reason about speaker knowledge and motives most consistently reduces magnitude deviation, while prompting for alternative-awareness tends to amplify exaggeration. Combining both components is the only intervention that improves all calibration-sensitive metrics across all models, though fine-grained magnitude calibration remains only partially resolved. LLMs thus capture inferential structure while variably distorting inferential strength, and pragmatic theory provides a useful but incomplete handle for improving that approximation.

AI.tldr: LLMs能近似人类社交推理的定性结构但量化校准存在差异，基于语用理论的提示策略可改善但未完全解决量化校准问题
AI.motivation: 研究LLMs是否不仅在定性上而且在量化上近似人类社交意义，以及基于语用理论的提示策略能否改善这种近似
AI.method: 引入两个校准指标（ESR和CDS），从语用理论推导提示策略（说话者知识状态和交际动机推理、语言替代项意识），在三个前沿LLMs上进行数值（不）精确性案例研究
AI.result: 所有模型都能可靠地复制人类社交推理的定性结构，但在幅度校准上差异显著；提示模型推理说话者知识和动机最一致地减少幅度偏差，而提示替代项意识倾向于放大夸张；结合两种成分是唯一改善所有模型校准敏感指标的方法
AI.conclusion: LLMs捕捉推理结构但不同程度地扭曲推理强度，语用理论为改善这种近似提供了有用但不完整的工具

title: Bistable Quad-Nets Composed of Four-Bar Linkages
summary: We study mechanical structures composed of spatial four-bar linkages that are bistable, that is, they allow for two distinct configurations. They have an interpretation as quad nets in the Study quadric which can be used to prove existence of arbitrarily large structures of this type. We propose a purely geometric construction of such examples, starting from infinitesimally flexible quad nets in Euclidean space and applying Whiteley de-averaging. This point of view situates the problem within the broader framework of discrete differential geometry and enables the construction of bistable structures from well-known classes of quad nets, such as discrete minimal surfaces. The proposed construction does not rely on numerical optimization and allows control over axis positions and snap angles.

AI.tldr: 研究由空间四杆机构组成的双稳态机械结构，这些结构在Study二次曲面中可解释为四边形网格，通过几何构造方法从欧氏空间中的无穷小柔性四边形网格出发，应用Whiteley去平均化技术来构建。
AI.motivation: 研究双稳态机械结构的设计方法，特别是由空间四杆机构组成的结构。这类结构具有两个不同的稳定配置，在工程应用中具有重要意义。传统方法可能依赖数值优化，本研究旨在提供一种纯几何的构造方法，能够精确控制轴位置和跳跃角度。
AI.method: 采用离散微分几何框架，将问题置于Study二次曲面中的四边形网格解释。从欧氏空间中的无穷小柔性四边形网格出发，应用Whiteley去平均化技术来构造双稳态结构。该方法不依赖数值优化，可以从已知的四边形网格类（如离散极小曲面）出发进行构造。
AI.result: 证明了这类双稳态结构可以任意大规模构造。提出的几何构造方法能够精确控制轴位置和跳跃角度，并且可以从离散微分几何中已知的四边形网格类（如离散极小曲面）出发，系统地生成双稳态结构。
AI.conclusion: 通过将双稳态机械结构问题置于离散微分几何框架中，提供了一种纯几何的构造方法，能够从欧氏空间中的无穷小柔性四边形网格出发，应用Whiteley去平均化技术来构造任意大规模的双稳态结构。这种方法不依赖数值优化，能够精确控制设计参数，并为从已知几何结构类（如离散极小曲面）构造双稳态结构提供了系统途径。

title: Reflection Generation for Composite Image Using Diffusion Model
summary: Image composition involves inserting a foreground object into the background while synthesizing environment-consistent effects such as shadows and reflections. Although shadow generation has been extensively studied, reflection generation remains largely underexplored. In this work, we focus on reflection generation. We inject the prior information of reflection placement and reflection appearance into foundation diffusion model. We also divide reflections into two types and adopt type-aware model design. To support training, we construct the first large-scale object reflection dataset DEROBA. Experiments demonstrate that our method generates reflections that are physically coherent and visually realistic, establishing a new benchmark for reflection generation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种反射生成方法，通过将反射位置和外观的先验信息注入基础扩散模型，并采用类型感知的模型设计，在构建的大规模对象反射数据集DEROBA上进行训练，实现了物理一致且视觉逼真的反射效果。
AI.motivation: 图像合成涉及将前景对象插入背景并合成环境一致的效果（如阴影和反射）。虽然阴影生成已被广泛研究，但反射生成在很大程度上仍未得到充分探索。本工作专注于反射生成，旨在填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 1. 将反射位置和反射外观的先验信息注入基础扩散模型；2. 将反射分为两种类型，并采用类型感知的模型设计；3. 构建了首个大规模对象反射数据集DEROBA用于训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法生成的反射具有物理一致性和视觉真实性，为反射生成建立了新的基准。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种有效的反射生成方法，通过先验信息注入和类型感知设计，在构建的大规模数据集上训练，成功实现了高质量的反射合成，为图像合成中的反射生成问题提供了新的解决方案。

title: A Comprehensive Framework for Long-Term Resiliency Investment Planning under Extreme Weather Uncertainty for Electric Utilities
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, submission to PowerUp 2026 conference
summary: Electric utilities must make massive capital investments in the coming years to respond to explosive growth in demand, aging assets and rising threats from extreme weather. Utilities today already have rigorous frameworks for capital planning, and there are opportunities to extend this capability to solve multi-objective optimization problems in the face of uncertainty. This work presents a four-part framework that 1) incorporates extreme weather as a source of uncertainty, 2) leverages a digital twin of the grid, 3) uses Monte Carlo simulation to capture variability and 4) applies a multi-objective optimization method for finding the optimal investment portfolio. We use this framework to investigate whether grid-aware optimization methods outperform model-free approaches. We find that, in fact, given the computational complexity of model-based metaheuristic optimization methods, the simpler net present value ranking method was able to find more optimal portfolios with only limited knowledge of the grid.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个四部分框架，用于电力公司在极端天气不确定性下进行多目标资本投资组合优化，发现基于净现值排名的简单方法比复杂的基于模型的元启发式优化方法表现更好。
AI.motivation: 电力公司面临需求爆炸性增长、资产老化和极端天气威胁，需要大量资本投资。虽然已有资本规划框架，但需要扩展以解决不确定性下的多目标优化问题。
AI.method: 提出了四部分框架：1) 将极端天气作为不确定性来源；2) 利用电网数字孪生；3) 使用蒙特卡洛模拟捕捉变异性；4) 应用多目标优化方法寻找最优投资组合。研究比较了电网感知优化方法与无模型方法的性能。
AI.result: 研究发现，考虑到基于模型的元启发式优化方法的计算复杂性，更简单的净现值排名方法仅凭有限的电网知识就能找到更优的投资组合。
AI.conclusion: 在电力资本投资组合优化中，简单的净现值排名方法优于复杂的基于模型的元启发式优化方法，特别是在计算复杂性较高的情况下。

title: Reachability-Aware Time Scaling for Path Tracking
summary: This paper studies tracking of collision-free waypoint paths produced by an offline planner for a planar double-integrator system with bounded speed and acceleration. Because sampling-based planners must route around obstacles, the resulting waypoint paths can contain sharp turns and high-curvature regions, so one-step reachability under acceleration limits becomes critical even when the path geometry is collision-free. We build on a pure-pursuit-style, reachability-guided quadratic-program (QP) tracker with a one-step acceleration margin. Offline, we evaluate this margin along a spline fitted to the waypoint path and update a scalar speed-scaling profile so that the required one-step acceleration remains below the available bound. Online, the same look-ahead tracking structure is used to track the scaled reference.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于平面双积分系统的轨迹跟踪方法，通过离线速度缩放和在线QP跟踪相结合，确保在有界速度和加速度约束下安全跟踪包含急转弯的路径
AI.motivation: 基于采样的离线规划器生成的路径可能包含急转弯和高曲率区域，即使路径本身无碰撞，但在加速度限制下的一步可达性仍然至关重要。需要确保系统能够在速度和加速度约束下安全跟踪这些路径
AI.method: 采用纯追踪风格的可达性引导二次规划跟踪器，具有一步加速度裕度。离线阶段：沿路径样条评估加速度裕度，更新标量速度缩放曲线，使所需一步加速度保持在可用界限内。在线阶段：使用相同的向前看跟踪结构跟踪缩放后的参考轨迹
AI.result: 该方法能够确保系统在速度和加速度约束下安全跟踪包含急转弯的路径，通过离线速度缩放和在线QP跟踪相结合，保证了一步可达性要求
AI.conclusion: 提出的离线速度缩放与在线可达性引导QP跟踪相结合的方法，能够有效处理基于采样规划器生成的复杂路径，确保在系统动力学约束下的安全跟踪性能

title: SKILL0: In-Context Agentic Reinforcement Learning for Skill Internalization
summary: Agent skills, structured packages of procedural knowledge and executable resources that agents dynamically load at inference time, have become a reliable mechanism for augmenting LLM agents. Yet inference-time skill augmentation is fundamentally limited: retrieval noise introduces irrelevant guidance, injected skill content imposes substantial token overhead, and the model never truly acquires the knowledge it merely follows. We ask whether skills can instead be internalized into model parameters, enabling zero-shot autonomous behavior without any runtime skill retrieval. We introduce SKILL0, an in-context reinforcement learning framework designed for skill internalization. SKILL0 introduces a training-time curriculum that begins with full skill context and progressively withdraws it. Skills are grouped offline by category and rendered with interaction history into a compact visual context, teaching he model tool invocation and multi-turn task completion. A Dynamic Curriculum then evaluates each skill file's on-policy helpfulness, retaining only those from which the current policy still benefits within a linearly decaying budget, until the agent operates in a fully zero-shot setting. Extensive agentic experiments demonstrate that SKILL0 achieves substantial improvements over the standard RL baseline (+9.7\% for ALFWorld and +6.6\% for Search-QA), while maintaining a highly efficient context of fewer than 0.5k tokens per step. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZJU-REAL/SkillZero.

AI.tldr: SKILL0提出了一种通过上下文强化学习框架将技能内化到模型参数中的方法，避免推理时的技能检索开销和噪声问题，实现零样本自主行为。
AI.motivation: 当前基于推理时技能增强的LLM智能体存在三个根本限制：检索噪声引入无关指导、注入技能内容带来大量token开销、模型从未真正内化知识而只是遵循指令。需要探索能否将技能内化到模型参数中，实现无需运行时技能检索的零样本自主行为。
AI.method: SKILL0是一个用于技能内化的上下文强化学习框架。包含：1）离线按类别分组技能，将交互历史渲染为紧凑的视觉上下文，教授工具调用和多轮任务完成；2）动态课程学习，从完整技能上下文开始，逐步撤回，评估每个技能文件对当前策略的有用性，在线性衰减的预算内仅保留仍有帮助的技能，直到智能体在完全零样本设置下运行。
AI.result: 在广泛的智能体实验中，SKILL0相比标准RL基线取得显著改进：ALFWorld任务提升9.7%，Search-QA任务提升6.6%，同时保持每步少于0.5k token的高效上下文。
AI.conclusion: SKILL0框架成功实现了技能内化，使LLM智能体能够零样本自主执行任务，避免了推理时技能检索的局限性，在保持高效上下文使用的同时显著提升了任务性能。

title: Beyond the Fold: Quantifying Split-Level Noise and the Case for Leave-One-Dataset-Out AU Evaluation
summary:
Subject-exclusive cross-validation is the standard evaluation protocol for facial Action Unit (AU) detection, yet reported improvements are often small. We show that cross-validation itself introduces measurable stochastic variance. On BP4D+, repeated 3-fold subject-exclusive splits produce an empirical noise floor of $\pm 0.065$ in average F1, with substantially larger variation for low-prevalence AUs. Operating-point metrics such as F1 fluctuate more than threshold-independent measures such as AUC, and model ranking can change under different fold assignments.
  We further evaluate cross-dataset robustness using a Leave-One-Dataset-Out (LODO) protocol across five AU datasets. LODO removes partition randomness and exposes domain-level instability that is not visible under single-dataset cross-validation. Together, these results suggest that gains often reported in cross-fold validation may fall within protocol variance. Leave-one-dataset-out cross-validation yields more stable and interpretable findings

AI.tldr: 面部动作单元检测的标准评估协议——受试者排他交叉验证本身存在可测量的随机方差，导致F1分数波动±0.065，模型排名可能因折叠分配而改变；跨数据集评估（LODO）能提供更稳定和可解释的结果。
AI.motivation: 当前面部动作单元检测研究中，受试者排他交叉验证是标准评估协议，但报告的改进往往很小。本文旨在揭示交叉验证本身引入的随机方差问题，并探索更稳定的评估方法。
AI.method: 1. 在BP4D+数据集上进行重复3折受试者排他分割，测量经验噪声水平；2. 使用留一数据集出协议评估跨数据集鲁棒性，涵盖五个AU数据集；3. 比较操作点指标（如F1）与阈值无关指标（如AUC）的波动性。
AI.result: 1. 重复3折分割产生平均F1的经验噪声水平为±0.065，低流行度AU的波动更大；2. F1等操作点指标比AUC等阈值无关指标波动更大；3. 模型排名可能因折叠分配而改变；4. LODO协议消除了分割随机性，揭示了单数据集交叉验证中不可见的域级不稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 交叉验证本身引入的协议方差可能导致文献中报告的微小改进实际上落在噪声范围内。留一数据集出交叉验证提供了更稳定和可解释的评估结果，建议在面部动作单元检测研究中采用这种更严格的评估协议。

title: Certificate-Driven Closed-Loop Multi-Agent Path Finding with Inheritable Factorization
summary:
Multi-agent coordination in automated warehouses and logistics is commonly modeled as the Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) problem. Closed-loop MAPF algorithms improve scalability by planning only the next movement and replanning online, but this finite-horizon viewpoint can be shortsighted and makes it difficult to preserve global guarantees and exploit compositional structure. This issue is especially visible in Anytime Closed-Loop Conflict-Based Search (ACCBS), which applies Conflict-Based Search (CBS) over dynamically extended finite horizons but, under finite computational budgets, may terminate with short active prefixes in dense instances.
  We introduce certificate trajectories and their associated fleet budget as a general mechanism for filtering closed-loop updates. A certificate provides a conflict-free fallback plan and a monotone upper bound on the remaining cost; accepting only certificate-improving updates yields completeness. The same budget information induces a budget-limited factorization that enables global, inheritable decomposition across timesteps. Instantiating the framework on ACCBS yields Certificate-Driven Conflict-Based Search (CDCBS). Experiments on benchmark maps show that CDCBS achieves more consistent solution quality than ACCBS, particularly in dense settings, while the proposed factorization reduces effective group size.

AI.tldr: 提出CDCBS算法，通过证书轨迹和舰队预算机制改进ACCBS，在密集场景下获得更一致的解质量
AI.motivation: 现有闭环MAPF算法（如ACCBS）在有限计算预算下可能产生短活动前缀，缺乏全局保证和利用组合结构的能力
AI.method: 引入证书轨迹和舰队预算机制，提供无冲突回退计划和剩余成本单调上界，实现证书改进更新的过滤和预算限制的分解
AI.result: CDCBS在基准地图上比ACCBS获得更一致的解质量，尤其在密集场景下，提出的分解方法减少了有效组大小
AI.conclusion: 证书轨迹和预算机制为闭环MAPF提供了有效的全局保证和组合结构利用方法，CDCBS是ACCBS的有效改进

title: CoRegOVCD: Consistency-Regularized Open-Vocabulary Change Detection
summary: Remote sensing change detection (CD) aims to identify where land-cover semantics change across time, but most existing methods still assume a fixed label space and therefore cannot answer arbitrary user-defined queries. Open-vocabulary change detection (OVCD) instead asks for the change mask of a queried concept. In the fully training-free setting, however, dense concept responses are difficult to compare directly across dates: appearance variation, weak cross-concept competition, and the spatial continuity of many land-cover categories often produce noisy, fragmented, and semantically unreliable change evidence. We propose Consistency-Regularized Open-Vocabulary Change Detection (CoRegOVCD), a training-free dense inference framework that reformulates concept-specific change as calibrated posterior discrepancy. Competitive Posterior Calibration (CPC) and the Semantic Posterior Delta (SPD) convert raw concept responses into competition-aware queried-concept posteriors and quantify their cross-temporal discrepancy, making semantic change evidence more comparable without explicit instance matching. Geometry-Token Consistency Gate (GeoGate) and Regional Consensus Discrepancy (RCD) further suppress unsupported responses and improve spatial coherence through geometry-aware structural verification and regional consensus. Across four benchmarks spanning building-oriented and multi-class settings, CoRegOVCD consistently improves over the strongest previous training-free baseline by 2.24 to 4.98 F1$_C$ points and reaches a six-class average of 47.50% F1$_C$ on SECOND.

AI.tldr: 提出CoRegOVCD框架，一种无需训练的开集词汇变化检测方法，通过后验校准和一致性正则化解决跨时间概念响应可比性问题，显著提升变化检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统变化检测方法假设固定标签空间，无法响应用户自定义查询。开集词汇变化检测(OVCD)需要获取查询概念的变化掩码，但在完全无需训练的情况下，密集概念响应难以直接跨时间比较：外观变化、弱跨概念竞争以及许多土地覆盖类别的空间连续性通常会产生噪声、碎片化且语义不可靠的变化证据。
AI.method: 提出一致性正则化开集词汇变化检测(CoRegOVCD)框架，包含：1)竞争性后验校准(CPC)和语义后验差异(SPD)，将原始概念响应转换为竞争感知的查询概念后验并量化其跨时间差异；2)几何令牌一致性门(GeoGate)和区域共识差异(RCD)，通过几何感知的结构验证和区域共识抑制不支持响应并提高空间一致性。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试中（涵盖建筑导向和多类别设置），CoRegOVCD相比之前最强的无需训练基线持续提升2.24到4.98个F1_C点，在SECOND数据集上达到六类平均47.50%的F1_C分数。
AI.conclusion: CoRegOVCD通过后验校准和一致性正则化有效解决了开集词汇变化检测中跨时间概念响应可比性问题，在无需训练的情况下显著提升了变化检测性能，为开放词汇遥感变化检测提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Learning Humanoid Navigation from Human Data
summary: We present EgoNav, a system that enables a humanoid robot to traverse diverse, unseen environments by learning entirely from 5 hours of human walking data, with no robot data or finetuning. A diffusion model predicts distributions of plausible future trajectories conditioned on past trajectory, a 360 deg visual memory fusing color, depth, and semantics, and video features from a frozen DINOv3 backbone that capture appearance cues invisible to depth sensors. A hybrid sampling scheme achieves real-time inference in 10 denoising steps, and a receding-horizon controller selects paths from the predicted distribution. We validate EgoNav through offline evaluations, where it outperforms baselines in collision avoidance and multi-modal coverage, and through zero-shot deployment on a Unitree G1 humanoid across unseen indoor and outdoor environments. Behaviors such as waiting for doors to open, navigating around crowds, and avoiding glass walls emerge naturally from the learned prior. We will release the dataset and trained models. Our website: https://egonav.weizhuowang.com

AI.tldr: EgoNav系统仅用5小时人类行走数据训练，无需机器人数据或微调，即可让双足机器人在未见环境中导航。系统通过扩散模型预测未来轨迹分布，结合360度视觉记忆和DINOv3特征，实现实时推理和零样本部署。
AI.motivation: 当前机器人导航方法通常需要大量机器人数据或特定环境微调，限制了泛化能力。本文旨在开发仅从少量人类行走数据学习、无需机器人数据或微调就能在多样未见环境中导航的系统。
AI.method: 1. 扩散模型预测基于过去轨迹、360度视觉记忆（融合颜色、深度和语义）和DINOv3视频特征的未来轨迹分布；2. 混合采样方案实现10步去噪的实时推理；3. 滚动时域控制器从预测分布中选择路径。
AI.result: 离线评估显示EgoNav在碰撞避免和多模态覆盖方面优于基线方法。在Unitree G1双足机器人上零样本部署，成功在未见室内外环境中导航，自然涌现出等待开门、绕开人群、避开玻璃墙等行为。
AI.conclusion: EgoNav证明仅从少量人类行走数据学习即可实现双足机器人在多样未见环境中的鲁棒导航，无需机器人数据或微调。系统展示了从学习先验中自然涌现复杂行为的能力，为数据高效机器人学习提供了新途径。

title: DenOiS: Dual-Domain Denoising of Observation and Solution in Ultrasound Image Reconstruction
summary: Medical imaging aims to recover underlying tissue properties, using inexact (simplified/linearized) imaging models and often from inaccurate and incomplete measurements. Analytical reconstruction methods rely on hand-crafted regularization, sensitive to noise assumptions and parameter tuning. Among deep learning alternatives, plug-and-play (PnP) approaches learn regularization while incorporating imaging physics during inference, outperforming purely data-driven methods. The performance of all these approaches, however, still strongly depends on measurement quality and imaging model accuracy. In this work, we propose DenOiS, a framework that denoises both input observations and resulting solution in their respective domains. It consists of an observation refinement strategy that corrects degraded measurements while compensating for imaging model simplifications, and a diffusion-based PnP reconstruction approach that remains robust under missing measurements. DenOiS enables generalization to real data from training only in simulations, resulting in high-fidelity image reconstruction with noisy observations and inexact imaging models. We demonstrate this for speed-of-sound imaging as a challenging setting of quantitative ultrasound image reconstruction.

AI.tldr: DenOiS框架通过同时去噪观测数据和重建结果，在噪声观测和不精确成像模型下实现高保真图像重建，适用于定量超声成像等挑战性场景。
AI.motivation: 医学成像面临观测数据不准确不完整、成像模型简化/线性化不精确的问题。现有方法（包括分析重建和深度学习方法）的性能严重依赖于测量质量和成像模型准确性，难以处理噪声观测和不精确模型。
AI.method: 提出DenOiS框架：1）观测细化策略，校正退化测量并补偿成像模型简化；2）基于扩散的PnP重建方法，在缺失测量下保持鲁棒性。框架仅需在仿真数据上训练即可泛化到真实数据。
AI.result: DenOiS能够在噪声观测和不精确成像模型下实现高保真图像重建，在具有挑战性的声速成像（定量超声图像重建）场景中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: DenOiS通过同时去噪观测域和重建域，解决了医学成像中测量质量和模型准确性的双重挑战，实现了从仿真训练到真实数据的有效泛化。

title: Sampling-based Task and Kinodynamic Motion Planning under Semantic Uncertainty
summary: This paper tackles the problem of integrated task and kinodynamic motion planning in uncertain environments. We consider a robot with nonlinear dynamics tasked with a Linear Temporal Logic over finite traces ($\ltlf$) specification operating in a partially observable environment. Specifically, the uncertainty is in the semantic labels of the environment. We show how the problem can be modeled as a Partially Observable Stochastic Hybrid System that captures the robot dynamics, $\ltlf$ task, and uncertainty in the environment state variables. We propose an anytime algorithm that takes advantage of the structure of the hybrid system, and combines the effectiveness of decision-making techniques and sampling-based motion planning. We prove the soundness and asymptotic optimality of the algorithm. Results show the efficacy of our algorithm in uncertain environments, and that it consistently outperforms baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在不确定环境中集成任务和动力学运动规划的方法，使用LTLf规范，将问题建模为部分可观测随机混合系统，开发了结合决策技术和采样运动规划的算法。
AI.motivation: 解决在不确定环境中的集成任务和动力学运动规划问题，机器人具有非线性动力学，需要在部分可观测环境中执行LTLf规范任务，环境语义标签存在不确定性。
AI.method: 将问题建模为部分可观测随机混合系统，捕获机器人动力学、LTLf任务和环境状态变量不确定性。提出一种利用混合系统结构的随时算法，结合决策技术和基于采样的运动规划方法。
AI.result: 证明了算法的正确性和渐近最优性。实验结果表明算法在不确定环境中有效，且始终优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 成功解决了不确定环境中的集成任务和动力学运动规划问题，提出的混合系统建模和算法框架有效，为复杂环境中的机器人规划提供了新方法。

title: Smoothing the Landscape: Causal Structure Learning via Diffusion Denoising Objectives
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 5th Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning (CLeaR 2026)
summary: Understanding causal dependencies in observational data is critical for informing decision-making. These relationships are often modeled as Bayesian Networks (BNs) and Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs). Existing methods, such as NOTEARS and DAG-GNN, often face issues with scalability and stability in high-dimensional data, especially when there is a feature-sample imbalance. Here, we show that the denoising score matching objective of diffusion models could smooth the gradients for faster, more stable convergence. We also propose an adaptive k-hop acyclicity constraint that improves runtime over existing solutions that require matrix inversion. We name this framework Denoising Diffusion Causal Discovery (DDCD). Unlike generative diffusion models, DDCD utilizes the reverse denoising process to infer a parameterized causal structure rather than to generate data. We demonstrate the competitive performance of DDCDs on synthetic benchmarking data. We also show that our methods are practically useful by conducting qualitative analyses on two real-world examples. Code is available at this url: https://github.com/haozhu233/ddcd.

AI.tldr: DDCD是一种基于去噪扩散模型的因果发现框架，通过利用扩散模型的反向去噪过程推断参数化因果结构，而非生成数据，解决了高维数据中特征-样本不平衡带来的可扩展性和稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有因果发现方法（如NOTEARS、DAG-GNN）在高维数据中面临可扩展性和稳定性问题，特别是在特征-样本不平衡的情况下。需要一种更高效、更稳定的方法来建模观测数据中的因果依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出Denoising Diffusion Causal Discovery (DDCD)框架：1) 利用扩散模型的去噪分数匹配目标平滑梯度以实现更快、更稳定的收敛；2) 提出自适应k跳无环约束，避免矩阵求逆，提高运行效率；3) 不同于生成式扩散模型，DDCD使用反向去噪过程推断参数化因果结构。
AI.result: 在合成基准数据上展示了DDCD的竞争性能，并在两个真实世界案例中进行了定性分析，证明了方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: DDCD通过结合扩散模型的去噪分数匹配和自适应无环约束，提供了一种更高效、更稳定的因果发现方法，能够处理高维数据中的特征-样本不平衡问题，并在合成和真实数据中表现出良好性能。

title: Automated Malware Family Classification using Weighted Hierarchical Ensembles of Large Language Models
summary:
Malware family classification remains a challenging task in automated malware analysis, particularly in real-world settings characterized by obfuscation, packing, and rapidly evolving threats. Existing machine learning and deep learning approaches typically depend on labeled datasets, handcrafted features, supervised training, or dynamic analysis, which limits their scalability and effectiveness in open-world scenarios.
  This paper presents a zero-label malware family classification framework based on a weighted hierarchical ensemble of pretrained large language models (LLMs). Rather than relying on feature-level learning or model retraining, the proposed approach aggregates decision-level predictions from multiple LLMs with complementary reasoning strengths. Model outputs are weighted using empirically derived macro-F1 scores and organized hierarchically, first resolving coarse-grained malicious behavior before assigning fine-grained malware families. This structure enhances robustness, reduces individual model instability, and aligns with analyst-style reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出基于加权层次集成预训练大语言模型的零标签恶意软件家族分类框架，通过聚合多个LLMs的决策级预测实现无需标注数据的分类
AI.motivation: 现有恶意软件家族分类方法依赖标注数据集、手工特征、监督训练或动态分析，在现实世界混淆、加壳和快速演变的威胁环境中可扩展性和有效性受限
AI.method: 基于加权层次集成预训练LLMs的零标签框架：1) 聚合多个具有互补推理能力的LLMs的决策级预测；2) 使用经验推导的macro-F1分数加权模型输出；3) 层次化组织，先解决粗粒度恶意行为再分配细粒度家族
AI.result: 该方法增强了鲁棒性，减少了个体模型的不稳定性，并符合分析师风格的推理过程
AI.conclusion: 提出的零标签框架通过加权层次集成LLMs，为开放世界场景中的恶意软件家族分类提供了可扩展且有效的解决方案，不依赖传统监督学习方法的限制

title: LatentUM: Unleashing the Potential of Interleaved Cross-Modal Reasoning via a Latent-Space Unified Model
summary: Unified models (UMs) hold promise for their ability to understand and generate content across heterogeneous modalities. Compared to merely generating visual content, the use of UMs for interleaved cross-modal reasoning is more promising and valuable, e.g., for solving understanding problems that require dense visual thinking, improving visual generation through self-reflection, or modeling visual dynamics of the physical world guided by stepwise action interventions. However, existing UMs necessitate pixel decoding as a bridge due to their disjoint visual representations for understanding and generation, which is both ineffective and inefficient. In this paper, we introduce LatentUM, a novel unified model that represents all modalities within a shared semantic latent space, eliminating the need for pixel-space mediation between visual understanding and generation. This design naturally enables flexible interleaved cross-modal reasoning and generation. Beyond improved computational efficiency, the shared representation substantially alleviates codec bias and strengthens cross-modal alignment, allowing LatentUM to achieve state-of-the-art performance on the Visual Spatial Planning benchmark, push the limits of visual generation through self-reflection, and support world modeling by predicting future visual states within the shared semantic latent space.

AI.tldr: LatentUM提出了一种新颖的统一模型，通过在共享语义潜在空间中表示所有模态，消除了视觉理解和生成之间像素空间中介的需求，实现了更高效的跨模态推理和生成。
AI.motivation: 现有统一模型由于视觉理解和生成使用分离的表示，需要通过像素解码作为桥梁，这既低效又低效。需要一种更有效的方法来实现跨模态推理和生成。
AI.method: LatentUM将所有模态表示在共享的语义潜在空间中，消除了像素空间中介的需求。这种设计自然支持灵活的跨模态推理和生成，减少了编解码器偏差并增强了跨模态对齐。
AI.result: LatentUM在视觉空间规划基准测试中达到最先进性能，通过自反思推动视觉生成极限，并支持在共享语义潜在空间中预测未来视觉状态的世界建模。
AI.conclusion: 共享语义潜在空间表示的统一模型设计比基于像素解码的方法更有效，能够实现更好的跨模态推理、生成和世界建模能力。

title: A Multimodal Vision Transformer-based Modeling Framework for Prediction of Fluid Flows in Energy Systems
summary: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations of complex fluid flows in energy systems are prohibitively expensive due to strong nonlinearities and multiscale-multiphysics interactions. In this work, we present a transformer-based modeling framework for prediction of fluid flows, and demonstrate it for high-pressure gas injection phenomena relevant to reciprocating engines. The approach employs a hierarchical Vision Transformer (SwinV2-UNet) architecture that processes multimodal flow datasets from multi-fidelity simulations. The model architecture is conditioned on auxiliary tokens explicitly encoding the data modality and time increment. Model performance is assessed on two different tasks: (1) spatiotemporal rollouts, where the model autoregressively predicts the flow state at future times; and (2) feature transformation, where the model infers unobserved fields/views from observed fields/views. We train separate models on multimodal datasets generated from in-house CFD simulations of argon jet injection into a nitrogen environment, encompassing multiple grid resolutions, turbulence models, and equations of state. The resulting data-driven models learn to generalize across resolutions and modalities, accurately forecasting the flow evolution and reconstructing missing flow-field information from limited views. This work demonstrates how large vision transformer-based models can be adapted to advance predictive modeling of complex fluid flow systems.

AI.tldr: 基于Transformer的流体流动预测框架，采用分层视觉Transformer架构处理多模态多保真度CFD数据，应用于高压气体喷射现象预测
AI.motivation: 能源系统中复杂流体流动的CFD模拟计算成本过高，需要开发高效的数据驱动预测模型来替代昂贵的数值模拟
AI.method: 采用分层视觉Transformer（SwinV2-UNet）架构，处理多模态多保真度模拟数据，通过辅助token编码数据模态和时间增量，支持时空滚动预测和特征转换任务
AI.result: 模型能够跨分辨率和模态泛化，准确预测流动演化并从有限视角重建缺失流场信息，在氩气喷射到氮气环境的CFD数据集上验证有效
AI.conclusion: 大型视觉Transformer模型可有效推进复杂流体流动系统的预测建模，为替代昂贵CFD模拟提供可行方案

title: Implicit Primal-Dual Interior-Point Methods for Quadratic Programming
summary: This paper introduces a new method for solving quadratic programs using primal-dual interior-point methods. Instead of handling complementarity as an explicit equation in the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) conditions, we ensure that complementarity is implicitly satisfied by construction. This is achieved by introducing an auxiliary variable and relating it to the duals and slacks via a retraction map. Specifically, we prove that the softplus function has favorable numerical properties compared to the commonly used exponential map. The resulting KKT system is guaranteed to be spectrally bounded, thereby eliminating the most pressing limitation of primal-dual methods: ill-conditioning near the solution. These attributes facilitate the solution of the underlying linear system, either by removing the need to compute factorizations at every iteration, enabling factorization-free approaches like indirect solvers, or allowing the solver to achieve high accuracy in low-precision arithmetic. Consequently, this novel perspective opens new opportunities for interior-point methods, especially for solving large-scale problems to high precision.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的原始-对偶内点法求解二次规划，通过构造隐式满足互补条件，使用softplus函数替代指数映射，保证KKT系统谱有界，消除病态问题，支持无分解求解器和高精度低精度计算。
AI.motivation: 传统原始-对偶内点法在求解二次规划时，KKT条件中的互补条件通常作为显式方程处理，导致在接近最优解时系统变得病态（ill-conditioning），这限制了方法的数值稳定性和求解精度，特别是在大规模问题中。
AI.method: 引入辅助变量并通过回缩映射（retraction map）将其与对偶变量和松弛变量关联，构造性地隐式满足互补条件。特别地，证明softplus函数相比常用的指数映射具有更优的数值性质。这种方法保证KKT系统谱有界，消除病态问题。
AI.result: 该方法产生的KKT系统具有谱有界性，消除了内点法最紧迫的限制——接近解时的病态问题。这使得线性系统的求解更加容易：无需每次迭代计算分解（支持无分解间接求解器），或能在低精度算术中实现高精度求解。
AI.conclusion: 这种新视角为内点法开辟了新机会，特别是为大规模问题的高精度求解提供了可能，通过消除病态限制，使得内点法在数值稳定性和计算效率方面得到显著改善。

title: (PAC-)Learning state machines from data streams: A generic strategy and an improved heuristic (Extended version)
comment: Extended version of Learning state machines from data streams: A generic strategy and an improved heuristic, International Conference on Grammatical Inference (ICGI) 2023, Rabat, Morocco
summary:
This is an extended version of our publication Learning state machines from data streams: A generic strategy and an improved heuristic, International Conference on Grammatical Inference (ICGI) 2023, Rabat, Morocco. It has been extended with a formal proof on PAC-bounds, and the discussion and analysis of a similar approach has been moved from the appendix and is now a full Section.
  State machine models are models that simulate the behavior of discrete event systems, capable of representing systems such as software systems, network interactions, and control systems, and have been researched extensively. The nature of most learning algorithms however is the assumption that all data be available at the beginning of the algorithm, and little research has been done in learning state machines from streaming data. In this paper, we want to close this gap further by presenting a generic method for learning state machines from data streams, as well as a merge heuristic that uses sketches to account for incomplete prefix trees. We implement our approach in an open-source state merging library and compare it with existing methods. We show the effectiveness of our approach with respect to run-time, memory consumption, and quality of results on a well known open dataset. Additionally, we provide a formal analysis of our algorithm, showing that it is capable of learning within the PAC framework, and show a theoretical improvement to increase run-time, without sacrificing correctness of the algorithm in larger sample sizes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从数据流中学习状态机的通用方法，包含基于草图的不完全前缀树合并启发式算法，并在开源库中实现，在运行时间、内存消耗和结果质量方面表现出色，同时提供了PAC框架下的形式化分析。
AI.motivation: 现有状态机学习算法大多假设所有数据在算法开始时即可用，而针对数据流的学习研究较少。本文旨在填补这一空白，提出从数据流中学习状态机的通用方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种从数据流中学习状态机的通用方法，以及使用草图（sketches）处理不完全前缀树的合并启发式算法。方法在开源状态合并库中实现，并与现有方法进行比较。
AI.result: 在知名开源数据集上验证了方法的有效性，在运行时间、内存消耗和结果质量方面表现优异。提供了算法的形式化分析，证明其能够在PAC框架下学习，并展示了在不牺牲算法正确性的前提下提高运行时间的理论改进。
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了从数据流中学习状态机的研究空白，提出的通用方法和合并启发式算法在实际应用中表现出色，同时提供了理论保证，为大规模流式数据的状态机学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: GroundVTS: Visual Token Sampling in Multimodal Large Language Models for Video Temporal Grounding
comment: Published as a conference paper at CVPR 2026
summary: Video temporal grounding (VTG) is a critical task in video understanding and a key capability for extending video large language models (Vid-LLMs) to broader applications. However, existing Vid-LLMs rely on uniform frame sampling to extract video information, resulting in a sparse distribution of key frames and the loss of crucial temporal cues. To address this limitation, we propose Grounded Visual Token Sampling (GroundVTS), a Vid-LLM architecture that focuses on the most informative temporal segments. GroundVTS employs a fine-grained, query-guided mechanism to filter visual tokens before feeding them into the LLM, thereby preserving essential spatio-temporal information and maintaining temporal coherence. Futhermore, we introduce a progressive optimization strategy that enables the LLM to effectively adapt to the non-uniform distribution of visual features, enhancing its ability to model temporal dependencies and achieve precise video localization. We comprehensively evaluate GroundVTS on three standard VTG benchmarks, where it outperforms existing methods, achieving a 7.7-point improvement in mIoU for moment retrieval and 12.0-point improvement in mAP for highlight detection. Code is available at https://github.com/Florence365/GroundVTS.

AI.tldr: GroundVTS：一种用于视频大语言模型的视觉token采样方法，通过查询引导的细粒度机制筛选关键视觉token，解决均匀帧采样导致的关键帧稀疏和时序信息丢失问题，在视频时序定位任务中显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大语言模型依赖均匀帧采样提取视频信息，导致关键帧分布稀疏且丢失重要时序线索，限制了视频时序定位任务的性能。
AI.method: 提出Grounded Visual Token Sampling (GroundVTS)架构，采用细粒度的查询引导机制在输入LLM前过滤视觉token，保留关键时空信息并维持时序连贯性；引入渐进优化策略使LLM适应视觉特征的非均匀分布。
AI.result: 在三个标准视频时序定位基准测试中，GroundVTS超越现有方法，在时刻检索任务上mIoU提升7.7个百分点，在高光检测任务上mAP提升12.0个百分点。
AI.conclusion: GroundVTS通过查询引导的视觉token采样有效解决了视频大语言模型中的时序信息稀疏问题，显著提升了视频时序定位性能，为Vid-LLMs在更广泛应用中的扩展提供了关键技术。

title: A Dual-Stream Transformer Architecture for Illumination-Invariant TIR-LiDAR Person Tracking
summary: Robust person tracking is a critical capability for autonomous mobile robots operating in diverse and unpredictable environments. While RGB-D tracking has shown high precision, its performance severely degrades under challenging illumination conditions, such as total darkness or intense backlighting. To achieve all-weather robustness, this paper proposes a novel Thermal-Infrared and Depth (TIR-D) tracking architecture that leverages the standard sensor suite of SLAM-capable robots, namely LiDAR and TIR cameras. A major challenge in TIR-D tracking is the scarcity of annotated multi-modal datasets. To address this, we introduce a sequential knowledge transfer strategy that evolves structural priors from a large-scale thermal-trained model into the TIR-D domain. By employing a differential learning rate strategy -- referred to as ``Fine-grained Differential Learning Rate Strategy'' -- we effectively preserve pre-trained feature extraction capabilities while enabling rapid adaptation to geometric depth cues.
