Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed TIR-D tracker achieves superior performance, with an Average Overlap (AO) of 0.700 and a Success Rate (SR) of 58.7\%, significantly outperforming conventional RGB-transfer and single-modality baselines. Our approach provides a practical and resource-efficient solution for robust human-following in all-weather robotics applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种热红外-深度（TIR-D）多模态跟踪架构，通过序列知识迁移策略和细粒度差分学习率策略，解决了RGB-D跟踪在恶劣光照条件下的性能退化问题，实现了全天候鲁棒的人员跟踪。
AI.motivation: RGB-D跟踪在完全黑暗或强烈背光等挑战性光照条件下性能严重下降，而自主移动机器人需要在多样化和不可预测的环境中实现鲁棒的人员跟踪。现有的热红外-深度跟踪面临多模态标注数据集稀缺的挑战。
AI.method: 提出TIR-D跟踪架构，利用SLAM机器人的标准传感器套件（LiDAR和热红外相机）。采用序列知识迁移策略，将大规模热红外训练模型的结构先验演化到TIR-D领域。通过细粒度差分学习率策略，在保留预训练特征提取能力的同时，快速适应几何深度线索。
AI.result: TIR-D跟踪器在实验中表现出优越性能，平均重叠率（AO）达到0.700，成功率（SR）达到58.7%，显著优于传统的RGB迁移和单模态基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为全天候机器人应用中鲁棒的人员跟随提供了实用且资源高效的解决方案，通过有效利用热红外和深度多模态信息，克服了光照条件限制。

title: When to ASK: Uncertainty-Gated Language Assistance for Reinforcement Learning
comment: In Proceedings of International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN)
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) agents often struggle with out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios, leading to high uncertainty and random behavior. While language models (LMs) contain valuable world knowledge, larger ones incur high computational costs, hindering real-time use, and exhibit limitations in autonomous planning. We introduce Adaptive Safety through Knowledge (ASK), which combines smaller LMs with trained RL policies to enhance OOD generalization without retraining. ASK employs Monte Carlo Dropout to assess uncertainty and queries the LM for action suggestions only when uncertainty exceeds a set threshold. This selective use preserves the efficiency of existing policies while leveraging the language model's reasoning in uncertain situations. In experiments on the FrozenLake environment, ASK shows no improvement in-domain, but demonstrates robust navigation in transfer tasks, achieving a reward of 0.95. Our findings indicate that effective neuro-symbolic integration requires careful orchestration rather than simple combination, highlighting the need for sufficient model scale and effective hybridization mechanisms for successful OOD generalization.

AI.tldr: ASK方法结合小型语言模型与强化学习策略，通过选择性查询语言模型来增强OOD泛化能力，无需重新训练
AI.motivation: 强化学习智能体在分布外场景中表现不佳，而大型语言模型计算成本高且自主规划能力有限，需要一种高效结合两者的方法
AI.method: 使用蒙特卡洛Dropout评估不确定性，仅在不确定性超过阈值时查询语言模型获取行动建议，选择性利用语言模型推理能力
AI.result: 在FrozenLake环境中，域内性能无改善，但在迁移任务中实现稳健导航，获得0.95的奖励
AI.conclusion: 有效的神经符号集成需要精心编排而非简单组合，需要足够的模型规模和有效的混合机制来实现成功的OOD泛化

title: Go Big or Go Home: Simulating Mobbing Behavior with Braitenbergian Robots
comment: This work was completed in 2019 as a final project for a graduate course at the University of Waterloo, titled: ECE 750 - Artificial Life: Embodied Intelligence
summary: We used the Webots robotics simulation platform to simulate a dyadic avoiding and mobbing predator behavior in a group of Braitenbergian robots. Mobbing is an antipredator adaptation used by some animals in which the individuals cooperatively attack or harass a predator to protect themselves. One way of coordinating a mobbing attack is using mobbing calls to summon other individuals of the mobbing species. We imitated this mechanism and simulated Braitenbergian robots that use mobbing calls when they face a light source (representing an inanimate predator) and mob it if they can summon allies, otherwise, they escape from it. We explore the effects of range of mobbing call (infinite range, mid-range and low-range) and the size of the robot group (ten robots vs three) on the overall success of mobbing. Our results suggest that both variables have significant impacts. This work has implications for simulations of action selection in artificial life and designing control architectures for autonomous agents.

AI.tldr: 在Webots机器人仿真平台中模拟了Braitenberg机器人的群体捕食者回避和围攻行为，研究了围攻呼叫范围和群体规模对围攻成功率的影响。
AI.motivation: 模仿动物群体围攻捕食者的反捕食适应行为，研究机器人群体如何通过围攻呼叫机制协调攻击，为人工生命行为选择和自主智能体控制架构设计提供参考。
AI.method: 使用Webots机器人仿真平台，模拟Braitenberg机器人群体面对光源（代表无生命捕食者）时的行为：当遇到光源时，机器人发出围攻呼叫召集同伴进行围攻，否则逃离。研究围攻呼叫范围（无限、中程、低程）和群体规模（10个机器人vs3个机器人）对围攻成功率的影响。
AI.result: 结果表明，围攻呼叫范围和群体规模都对围攻成功率有显著影响。无限范围的呼叫和更大的群体规模能够提高围攻成功率。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作对人工生命行为选择的仿真和自主智能体控制架构设计具有重要意义，展示了群体协调机制在机器人行为选择中的重要性。

title: Real Time Local Wind Inference for Robust Autonomous Navigation
comment: PhD Thesis, University of Pennsylvania, 2026. 152 pages
summary: This thesis presents a solution that enables aerial robots to reason about surrounding wind flow fields in real time using on board sensors and embedded flight hardware. The core novelty of this research is the fusion of range measurements with sparse in situ wind measurements to predict surrounding flow fields. We aim to address two fundamental questions: first, the sufficiency of topographical data for accurate wind prediction in dense urban environments; and second, the utility of learned wind models for motion planning with an emphasis on energy efficiency and obstacle avoidance. Drawing on tools from deep learning, fluid mechanics, and optimal control, we establish a framework for local wind prediction using navigational LiDAR, and then incorporate local wind model priors into a receding-horizon optimal controller to study how local wind knowledge affects energy use and robustness during autonomous navigation. Through simulated demonstrations in diverse urban wind scenarios we evaluate the predictive capabilities of the wind predictor, and quantify improvements to autonomous urban navigation in terms of crash rates and energy consumption when local wind information is integrated into the motion planning. Sub-scale free flight experiments in an open-air wind tunnel demonstrate that these algorithms can run in real time on an embedded flight computer with sufficient bandwidth for stable control of a small aerial robot. Philosophically, this thesis contributes a new paradigm for localized wind inference and motion planning in unknown windy environments. By enabling robots to rapidly assess local wind conditions without prior environmental knowledge, this research accelerates the introduction of aerial robots into increasingly challenging environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种让空中机器人能够使用机载传感器和嵌入式飞行硬件实时推理周围风场的方法，核心创新是将距离测量与稀疏现场风测量融合来预测周围流场。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在解决两个基本问题：1) 地形数据在密集城市环境中对准确风预测是否足够；2) 学习到的风模型在运动规划中的实用性，特别关注能源效率和避障。通过让机器人能够快速评估局部风况而无需先验环境知识，加速空中机器人进入更具挑战性的环境。
AI.method: 结合深度学习、流体力学和最优控制工具，建立了一个使用导航LiDAR进行局部风预测的框架，然后将局部风模型先验纳入后退时域最优控制器，研究局部风知识如何影响自主导航中的能源使用和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 通过在不同城市风场景中的仿真演示评估了风预测器的预测能力，并量化了将局部风信息集成到运动规划中对自主城市导航的改进（碰撞率和能耗）。亚尺度自由飞行实验在露天风洞中证明这些算法可以在嵌入式飞行计算机上实时运行，具有足够带宽来稳定控制小型空中机器人。
AI.conclusion: 该论文为未知风环境中的局部风推断和运动规划贡献了一个新范式。通过使机器人能够快速评估局部风况而无需先验环境知识，这项研究加速了空中机器人进入日益具有挑战性的环境。

title: Country-wide, high-resolution monitoring of forest browning with Sentinel-2
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures, to be published in the ISPRS Annals of the Photogrammetry, Remote Sensing and Spatial Information Sciences (ISPRS Congress)
summary: Natural and anthropogenic disturbances are impacting the health of forests worldwide. Monitoring forest disturbances at scale is important to inform conservation efforts. Here, we present a scalable approach for country-wide mapping of forest greenness anomalies at the 10 m resolution of Sentinel-2. Using relevant ecological and topographical context and an established representation of the vegetation cycle, we learn a predictive quantile model of the normalised difference vegetation index (NDVI) derived from Sentinel-2 data. The resulting expected seasonal cycles are used to detect NDVI anomalies across Switzerland between April 2017 and August 2025. Goodness-of-fit evaluations show that the conditional model explains 65% of the observed variations in the median seasonal cycle. The model consistently benefits from the local context information, particularly during the green-up period. The approach produces coherent spatial anomaly patterns and enables country-wide quantification of forest browning. Case studies with independent reference data from known events illustrate that the model reliably detects different types of disturbances.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于Sentinel-2数据的10米分辨率森林绿度异常监测方法，用于瑞士全国范围的森林扰动检测
AI.motivation: 全球森林受到自然和人为干扰影响，需要大规模监测来支持保护工作。现有方法需要更精细的空间分辨率（10米）和全国范围的监测能力。
AI.method: 使用Sentinel-2数据计算NDVI，结合生态和地形背景信息，建立植被周期的预测分位数模型。利用预期季节性周期检测2017年4月至2025年8月期间的NDVI异常。
AI.result: 条件模型解释了65%的中值季节性周期变化。模型从局部背景信息中持续受益，特别是在返青期。方法产生一致的空间异常模式，能够全国范围量化森林褐变。案例研究表明模型能可靠检测不同类型干扰。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种可扩展的全国范围森林扰动监测方案，能够在10米分辨率下有效检测森林绿度异常，为森林保护提供重要信息支持。

title: Hierarchical Motion Planning and Control under Unknown Nonlinear Dynamics via Predicted Reachability
summary: Autonomous motion planning under unknown nonlinear dynamics requires learning system properties while navigating toward a target. In this work, we develop a hierarchical planning-control framework that enables online motion synthesis with limited prior system knowledge. The state space is partitioned into polytopes and approximates the unknown nonlinear system using a piecewise-affine (PWA) model. The local affine models are identified once the agent enters the corresponding polytopes. To reduce computational complexity, we introduce a non-uniform adaptive state space partition strategy that refines the partition only in task-relevant regions. The resulting PWA system is abstracted into a directed weighted graph, whose edge existence is incrementally verified using reach control theory and predictive reachability conditions. Certified edges are weighted using provable time-to-reach bounds, while uncertain edges are assigned information-theoretic weights to guide exploration. The graph is updated online as new data becomes available, and high-level planning is performed by graph search, while low-level affine feedback controllers are synthesized to execute the plan. Furthermore, the conditions of classical reach control theory are often difficult to satisfy in underactuated settings. We therefore introduce relaxed reachability conditions to extend the framework to such systems. Simulations demonstrate effective exploration-exploitation trade-offs with formal reachability guarantees.

AI.tldr: 分层规划控制框架，用于未知非线性动力学下的自主运动规划，通过自适应状态空间分区、分段仿射模型学习和图抽象实现在线运动合成
AI.motivation: 在未知非线性动力学下进行自主运动规划需要同时学习系统特性并导航至目标，现有方法通常需要先验系统知识或缺乏形式化保证
AI.method: 1) 非均匀自适应状态空间分区策略，仅在任务相关区域细化分区；2) 分段仿射模型在线学习；3) 图抽象与可达性验证；4) 松弛可达条件处理欠驱动系统；5) 分层规划控制架构
AI.result: 仿真结果表明该方法能有效平衡探索与利用，并提供形式化可达性保证，特别是在欠驱动系统设置中表现出色
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层框架能够在有限先验知识下实现具有形式化保证的在线运动规划，通过自适应分区和图抽象有效处理未知非线性动力学，扩展了可达控制理论的应用范围

title: PLUME: Latent Reasoning Based Universal Multimodal Embedding
summary: Universal multimodal embedding (UME) maps heterogeneous inputs into a shared retrieval space with a single model. Recent approaches improve UME by generating explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) rationales before extracting embeddings, enabling multimodal large language models to better infer complex query intent. However, explicit CoT incurs substantial inference overhead and can compress rich multimodal evidence into a narrow textual bottleneck. We propose PLUME, a latent reasoning framework that advances UME by replacing verbalized CoT with a short autoregressive rollout of continuous latent states. To support diverse multimodal queries, PLUME further introduces a semantic-anchor-guided transition adapter that steers latent rollout along different reasoning trajectories under the same fixed computation budget. To stabilize training, PLUME adopts a progressive explicit-to-latent curriculum that uses verbalized reasoning only as a temporary training scaffold and gradually transfers this behavior into hidden-state computation, eliminating explicit CoT at inference. On the 78-task MMEB-v2 benchmark, PLUME outperforms strong explicit-CoT UME baselines while reducing reasoning from hundreds of generated tokens to fewer than 10 latent steps, delivering over 30x faster inference. PLUME is especially well suited to retrieval settings where relevant evidence is dense, structurally complex, and difficult to organize through verbalized intermediate rationales, such as video and visual document retrieval. These results show that structured latent computation can preserve the benefits of intermediate reasoning without the overhead of explicit rationale generation, providing a stronger and more efficient paradigm for practical retrieval systems.

AI.tldr: PLUME提出了一种潜在推理框架，用连续潜在状态的自回归展开替代显式思维链，在保持推理优势的同时大幅减少推理开销，实现30倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有通用多模态嵌入方法使用显式思维链推理，虽然能改善复杂查询意图推断，但存在两个主要问题：1) 产生大量推理开销；2) 将丰富的多模态证据压缩到狭窄的文本瓶颈中。
AI.method: PLUME采用潜在推理框架：1) 用连续潜在状态的自回归展开替代显式思维链；2) 引入语义锚点引导的转换适配器，在固定计算预算下引导不同推理轨迹；3) 采用渐进式显式到潜在课程学习，使用显式推理作为临时训练支架，逐步转移到隐藏状态计算。
AI.result: 在78个任务的MMEB-v2基准测试中，PLUME优于强显式思维链基线，同时将推理从数百个生成token减少到少于10个潜在步骤，实现超过30倍的推理加速。在视频和视觉文档检索等证据密集、结构复杂、难以通过显式中介推理组织的检索场景中表现尤其出色。
AI.conclusion: 结构化潜在计算可以在不产生显式推理生成开销的情况下保留中介推理的优势，为实际检索系统提供了更强、更高效的范式。

title: Play-Testing REMind: Evaluating an Educational Robot-Mediated Role-Play Game
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: This paper presents REMind, an innovative educational robot-mediated role-play game designed to support anti-bullying bystander intervention among children. REMind invites players to observe a bullying scenario enacted by social robots, reflect on the perspectives of the characters, and rehearse defending strategies by puppeteering a robotic avatar. We evaluated REMind through a mixed-methods play-testing study with 18 children aged 9--10. The findings suggest that the experience supported key learning goals related to self-efficacy, perspective-taking, understanding outcomes of defending, and intervention strategies. These results highlight the promise of Robot-Mediated Applied Drama (RMAD) as a novel pedagogical framework to support Social-Emotional Learning.

AI.tldr: REMind是一个创新的教育机器人介导角色扮演游戏，旨在支持儿童的反欺凌旁观者干预，通过社交机器人表演欺凌场景，让儿童反思角色视角并通过操控机器人化身来练习防御策略。
AI.motivation: 设计一个创新的教育工具来支持儿童的反欺凌旁观者干预，利用机器人技术增强社会情感学习效果。
AI.method: 开发了REMind系统，这是一个机器人介导的角色扮演游戏。玩家观察社交机器人表演的欺凌场景，反思角色视角，并通过操控机器人化身来练习防御策略。通过混合方法游戏测试研究，对18名9-10岁儿童进行了评估。
AI.result: 研究发现该体验支持了关键学习目标，包括自我效能感、观点采择、理解防御结果以及干预策略。这些结果突出了机器人介导应用戏剧作为支持社会情感学习的新教学框架的潜力。
AI.conclusion: REMind展示了机器人介导应用戏剧作为支持儿童反欺凌旁观者干预的有效教学框架的潜力，为利用机器人技术增强社会情感学习提供了新途径。

title: From High-Dimensional Spaces to Verifiable ODD Coverage for Safety-Critical AI-based Systems
summary: While Artificial Intelligence (AI) offers transformative potential for operational performance, its deployment in safety-critical domains such as aviation requires strict adherence to rigorous certification standards. Current EASA guidelines mandate demonstrating complete coverage of the AI/ML constituent's Operational Design Domain (ODD) -- a requirement that demands proof that no critical gaps exist within defined operational boundaries. However, as systems operate within high-dimensional parameter spaces, existing methods struggle to provide the scalability and formal grounding necessary to satisfy the completeness criterion. Currently, no standardized engineering method exists to bridge the gap between abstract ODD definitions and verifiable evidence. This paper addresses this void by proposing a method that integrates parameter discretization, constraint-based filtering, and criticality-based dimension reduction into a structured, multi-step ODD coverage verification process. Grounded in gathered simulation data from prior research on AI-based mid-air collision avoidance research, this work demonstrates a systematic engineering approach to defining and achieving coverage metrics that satisfy EASA's demand for completeness. Ultimately, this method enables the validation of ODD coverage in higher dimensions, advancing a Safety-by-Design approach while complying with EASA's standards.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结构化多步骤方法，用于验证AI/ML系统在安全关键领域（如航空）中操作设计域（ODD）的完整覆盖，以满足EASA认证标准。
AI.motivation: 当前AI在安全关键领域（如航空）部署面临EASA认证挑战，要求证明AI/ML组件的操作设计域（ODD）完全覆盖，但现有方法在高维参数空间中缺乏可扩展性和形式化基础，无法满足完整性要求，且缺乏标准化工程方法连接抽象ODD定义与可验证证据。
AI.method: 提出结构化多步骤ODD覆盖验证方法，整合参数离散化、基于约束的过滤和基于关键性的维度约简，基于先前AI空中防撞研究的仿真数据进行验证。
AI.result: 该方法能够系统化定义和实现满足EASA完整性要求的覆盖度量，实现在更高维度上验证ODD覆盖，推进"安全设计"方法并符合EASA标准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法填补了抽象ODD定义与可验证证据之间的工程方法空白，为AI在安全关键领域的安全认证提供了可扩展且形式化的解决方案。

title: DreamControl-v2: Simpler and Scalable Autonomous Humanoid Skills via Trainable Guided Diffusion Priors
summary: Developing robust autonomous loco-manipulation skills for humanoids remains an open problem in robotics. While RL has been applied successfully to legged locomotion, applying it to complex, interaction-rich manipulation tasks is harder given long-horizon planning challenges for manipulation. A recent approach along these lines is DreamControl, which addresses these issues by leveraging off-the-shelf human motion diffusion models as a generative prior to guide RL policies during training. In this paper, we investigate the impact of DreamControl's motion prior and propose an improved framework that trains a guided diffusion model directly in the humanoid robot's motion space, aggregating diverse human and robot datasets into a unified embodiment space. We demonstrate that our approach captures a wider range of skills due to the larger training data mixture and establishes a more automated pipeline by removing the need for manual filtering interventions. Furthermore, we show that scaling the generation of reference trajectories is important for achieving robust downstream RL policies. We validate our approach through extensive experiments in simulation and on a real Unitree-G1.

AI.tldr: 提出改进的DreamControl框架，通过直接在仿人机器人运动空间训练引导扩散模型，整合人类和机器人数据集，实现更自动化的技能学习管道，提升自主操作能力。
AI.motivation: 仿人机器人的自主操作技能开发仍具挑战性，现有方法如DreamControl虽利用人类运动扩散模型作为先验指导RL训练，但存在数据范围有限、需要人工干预等问题，需要更自动化的解决方案。
AI.method: 在仿人机器人运动空间直接训练引导扩散模型，整合多样化的人类和机器人数据集到统一的具身空间，建立更自动化的训练管道，无需人工筛选干预，并扩展参考轨迹生成规模。
AI.result: 方法能够捕捉更广泛的技能范围（得益于更大的训练数据混合），建立更自动化的管道，通过扩展参考轨迹生成实现更鲁棒的下游RL策略，在仿真和真实Unitree-G1机器人上验证有效。
AI.conclusion: 直接在机器人运动空间训练扩散模型并整合多源数据，能够更有效地开发仿人机器人的自主操作技能，为复杂交互任务提供更鲁棒、自动化的解决方案。

title: Computing the Exact Pareto Front in Average-Cost Multi-Objective Markov Decision Processes
summary: Many communication and control problems are cast as multi-objective Markov decision processes (MOMDPs). The complete solution to an MOMDP is the Pareto front. Much of the literature approximates this front via scalarization into single-objective MDPs. Recent work has begun to characterize the full front in discounted or simple bi-objective settings by exploiting its geometry. In this work, we characterize the exact front in average-cost MOMDPs. We show that the front is a continuous, piecewise-linear surface lying on the boundary of a convex polytope. Each vertex corresponds to a deterministic policy, and adjacent vertices differ in exactly one state. Each edge is realized as a convex combination of the policies at its endpoints, with the mixing coefficient given in closed form. We apply these results to a remote state estimation problem, where each vertex on the front corresponds to a threshold policy. The exact Pareto front and solutions to certain non-convex MDPs can be obtained without explicitly solving any MDP.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了平均成本多目标马尔可夫决策过程（MOMDP）的帕累托前沿精确表征，发现前沿是位于凸多面体边界上的连续分段线性曲面，每个顶点对应确定性策略，相邻顶点仅在一个状态上不同。
AI.motivation: 现有文献主要通过标量化方法近似MOMDP的帕累托前沿，或仅在折扣或简单双目标设置下表征前沿。本文旨在精确表征平均成本MOMDP的完整帕累托前沿，填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 利用帕累托前沿的几何特性进行分析，证明前沿是位于凸多面体边界上的连续分段线性曲面。每个顶点对应确定性策略，相邻顶点仅在一个状态上不同。边缘通过端点策略的凸组合实现，混合系数以闭式给出。
AI.result: 获得了平均成本MOMDP帕累托前沿的精确几何表征，前沿是连续分段线性曲面。在远程状态估计问题应用中，前沿上的每个顶点对应阈值策略。无需显式求解任何MDP即可获得精确帕累托前沿和某些非凸MDP的解。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次精确表征了平均成本MOMDP的帕累托前沿，揭示了其几何结构为凸多面体边界上的分段线性曲面。这一理论成果使得无需显式求解MDP即可获得精确前沿，为通信和控制问题提供了新的分析工具。

title: When simulations look right but causal effects go wrong: Large language models as behavioral simulators
summary: Behavioral simulation is increasingly used to anticipate responses to interventions. Large language models (LLMs) enable researchers to specify population characteristics and intervention context in natural language, but it remains unclear to what extent LLMs can use these inputs to infer intervention effects. We evaluated three LLMs on 11 climate-psychology interventions using a dataset of 59,508 participants from 62 countries, and replicated the main analysis in two additional datasets (12 and 27 countries). LLMs reproduced observed patterns in attitudinal outcomes (e.g., climate beliefs and policy support) reasonably well, and prompting refinements improved this descriptive fit. However, descriptive fit did not reliably translate into causal fidelity (i.e., accurate estimates of intervention effects), and these two dimensions of accuracy followed different error structures. This descriptive-causal divergence held across the three datasets, but varied across intervention logics, with larger errors for interventions that depended on evoking internal experience than on directly conveying reasons or social cues. It was more pronounced for behavioral outcomes, where LLMs imposed stronger attitude-behavior coupling than in human data. Countries and population groups appearing well captured descriptively were not necessarily those with lower causal errors. Relying on descriptive fit alone may therefore create unwarranted confidence in simulation results, misleading conclusions about intervention effects and masking population disparities that matter for fairness.

AI.tldr: LLMs能较好模拟态度结果描述性模式，但描述性拟合不保证因果保真度，两者存在系统性差异，尤其在行为结果和依赖内部体验的干预中误差更大
AI.motivation: 评估LLMs在行为模拟中推断干预效果的能力，检验描述性拟合是否可靠转化为因果保真度，避免因描述性拟合良好而产生对模拟结果的过度自信
AI.method: 使用三个LLMs评估11个气候心理学干预，基于59,508名参与者数据集（62个国家），并在两个额外数据集（12和27个国家）中复制主要分析；比较描述性拟合与因果保真度
AI.result: LLMs能较好复制态度结果的观察模式，但描述性拟合不保证因果保真度；两者遵循不同误差结构；因果误差在依赖内部体验的干预中更大；行为结果中LLMs施加了比人类数据更强的态度-行为耦合
AI.conclusion: 仅依赖描述性拟合可能导致对模拟结果的过度自信，误导干预效果结论并掩盖对公平性重要的人口差异；需要区分描述性拟合与因果保真度

title: Long-Horizon Geometry-Aware Navigation among Polytopes via MILP-MPC and Minkowski-Based CBFs
summary: Autonomous navigation in complex, non-convex environments remains challenging when robot dynamics, control limits, and exact robot geometry must all be taken into account. In this paper, we propose a hierarchical planning and control framework that bridges long-horizon guidance and geometry-aware safety guarantees for a polytopic robot navigating among polytopic obstacles. At the high level, Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) is embedded within a Model Predictive Control (MPC) framework to generate a nominal trajectory around polytopic obstacles while modeling the robot as a point mass for computational tractability. At the low level, we employ a control barrier function (CBF) based on the exact signed distance in the Minkowski-difference space as a safety filter to explicitly enforce the geometric constraints of the robot shape, and further extend its formulation to a high-order CBF (HOCBF). We demonstrate the proposed framework in U-shaped and maze-like environments under single- and double-integrator dynamics. The results show that the proposed architecture mitigates the topology-induced local-minimum behavior of purely reactive CBF-based navigation while enabling safe, real-time, geometry-aware navigation.

AI.tldr: 提出分层规划与控制框架，结合长时域引导和几何感知安全保证，用于多面体机器人在多面体障碍物环境中的自主导航
AI.motivation: 复杂非凸环境中考虑机器人动力学、控制限制和精确几何形状的自主导航仍然具有挑战性，需要同时解决长时域规划和几何安全约束问题
AI.method: 分层框架：高层将混合整数线性规划嵌入模型预测控制，生成点质量机器人的名义轨迹；低层使用基于闵可夫斯基差空间精确符号距离的控制屏障函数作为安全滤波器，并扩展到高阶CBF以强制执行机器人几何约束
AI.result: 在U形和迷宫环境中测试单积分器和双积分器动力学，结果表明该架构缓解了纯反应式CBF导航的拓扑诱导局部极小值问题，实现了安全、实时、几何感知的导航
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层框架成功结合了长时域规划和几何感知安全保证，为多面体机器人在复杂障碍物环境中的导航提供了有效的解决方案

title: HapCompass: A Rotational Haptic Device for Contact-Rich Robotic Teleoperation
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2026. 8 pages, 5 figures. Project page: https://ripl.github.io/HapCompass/
summary: The contact-rich nature of manipulation makes it a significant challenge for robotic teleoperation. While haptic feedback is critical for contact-rich tasks, providing intuitive directional cues within wearable teleoperation interfaces remains a bottleneck. Existing solutions, such as non-directional vibrations from handheld controllers, provide limited information, while vibrotactile arrays are prone to perceptual interference. To address these limitations, we propose HapCompass, a novel, low-cost wearable haptic device that renders 2D directional cues by mechanically rotating a single linear resonant actuator (LRA). We evaluated HapCompass's ability to convey directional cues to human operators and showed that it increased the success rate, decreased the completion time and the maximum contact force for teleoperated manipulation tasks when compared to vision-only and non-directional feedback baselines. Furthermore, we conducted a preliminary imitation-learning evaluation, suggesting that the directional feedback provided by HapCompass enhances the quality of demonstration data and, in turn, the trained policy. We release the design of the HapCompass device along with the code that implements our teleoperation interface: https://ripl.github.io/HapCompass/.

AI.tldr: HapCompass：一种低成本可穿戴触觉设备，通过机械旋转单个线性谐振执行器来提供2D方向提示，改善接触丰富的机器人遥操作任务
AI.motivation: 接触丰富的操作任务对机器人遥操作构成重大挑战。虽然触觉反馈对接触丰富的任务至关重要，但在可穿戴遥操作界面中提供直观的方向提示仍然是一个瓶颈。现有解决方案（如手持控制器的非定向振动）提供的信息有限，而振动触觉阵列容易产生感知干扰。
AI.method: 提出HapCompass，一种新颖的低成本可穿戴触觉设备，通过机械旋转单个线性谐振执行器来渲染2D方向提示。评估了HapCompass向人类操作员传递方向提示的能力，并将其与仅视觉和非定向反馈基线进行比较。
AI.result: HapCompass提高了遥操作任务的成功率，减少了完成时间和最大接触力。初步的模仿学习评估表明，HapCompass提供的定向反馈提高了演示数据的质量，从而改善了训练的策略。
AI.conclusion: HapCompass通过机械旋转单个LRA提供2D方向提示，有效改善了接触丰富的遥操作任务性能，并可能提升模仿学习的数据质量。设备设计和遥操作界面代码已开源。

title: Do Lexical and Contextual Coreference Resolution Systems Degrade Differently under Mention Noise? An Empirical Study on Scientific Software Mentions
summary: We present our participation in the SOMD 2026 shared task on cross-document software mention coreference resolution, where our systems ranked second across all three subtasks. We compare two fine-tuning-free approaches: Fuzzy Matching (FM), a lexical string-similarity method, and Context Aware Representations (CAR), which combines mention-level and document-level embeddings. Both achieve competitive performance across all subtasks (CoNLL F1 of 0.94-0.96), with CAR consistently outperforming FM by 1 point on the official test set, consistent with the high surface regularity of software names, which reduces the need for complex semantic reasoning. A controlled noise-injection study reveals complementary failure modes: as boundary noise increases, CAR loses only 0.07 F1 points from clean to fully corrupted input, compared to 0.20 for FM, whereas under mention substitution, FM degrades more gracefully (0.52 vs. 0.63). Our inference-time analysis shows that FM scales superlinearly with corpus size, whereas CAR scales approximately linearly, making CAR the more efficient choice at large scale. These findings suggest that system selection should be informed by both the noise profile of the upstream mention detector and the scale of the target corpus. We release our code to support future work on this underexplored task.

AI.tldr: 该论文在SOMD 2026跨文档软件提及共指消解任务中排名第二，比较了两种无需微调的方法：模糊匹配和上下文感知表示，分析了它们在噪声环境和不同规模语料下的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 软件提及共指消解是一个研究不足的任务，需要探索无需复杂微调的有效方法。论文旨在比较基于词汇相似性和上下文嵌入的两种方法在不同噪声条件和语料规模下的表现，为实际应用提供指导。
AI.method: 采用两种无需微调的方法：1) 模糊匹配(FM)：基于词汇字符串相似性的方法；2) 上下文感知表示(CAR)：结合提及级别和文档级别嵌入的方法。通过噪声注入实验（边界噪声和提及替换）和推理时间分析来评估两种方法的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
AI.result: 两种方法在所有三个子任务中都取得了竞争性性能（CoNLL F1 0.94-0.96），CAR在官方测试集上始终比FM高1分。噪声注入研究表明两种方法有互补的失败模式：CAR对边界噪声更鲁棒（F1仅下降0.07），而FM对提及替换更鲁棒（F1下降0.52 vs 0.63）。推理时间分析显示FM随语料规模呈超线性扩展，而CAR近似线性扩展。
AI.conclusion: 系统选择应同时考虑上游提及检测器的噪声特征和目标语料的规模。CAR在大规模语料下更高效，而FM在小规模或提及替换噪声较多的情况下可能更合适。软件名称的高度表面规律性降低了对复杂语义推理的需求，使得这些简单方法也能取得良好效果。

title: True to Tone? Quantifying Skin Tone Fidelity and Bias in Photographic-to-Virtual Human Pipelines
summary: Accurate reproduction of facial skin tone is essential for realism, identity preservation, and fairness in Virtual Human (VH) rendering. However, most accessible avatar creation pipelines rely on photographic inputs that lack colorimetric calibration, which can introduce inconsistencies and bias. We propose a fully automatic and scalable methodology to systematically evaluate skin tone fidelity across the VH generation pipeline. Our approach defines a full workflow that integrates skin color and illumination extraction, texture recolorization, real-time rendering, and quantitative color analysis. Using facial images from the Chicago Face Database (CFD), we compare skin tone extraction strategies based on cheek-region sampling, following the literature, and multidimensional masking derived from full-face analysis. Additionally, we test both strategies with lighting isolation, using the pre-trained TRUST framework, employed without any training or optimization within our pipeline. Extracted skin tones are applied to MetaHuman textures and rendered under multiple lighting configurations. Skin tone consistency is evaluated objectively in the CIELAB color space using the $ΔE$ metric and the Individual Typology Angle (ITA). The proposed methodology operates without manual intervention and, with the exception of pre-trained illumination compensation modules, the pipeline does not include learning or training stages, enabling low computational cost and large-scale evaluation. Using this framework, we generate and analyze approximately 19,848 rendered instances. Our results show phenotype-dependent behavior of extraction strategies and consistently higher colorimetric errors for darker skin tones.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种自动评估虚拟人皮肤色调保真度的系统方法，通过皮肤颜色提取、纹理重着色、实时渲染和定量分析，发现较深肤色存在更高的色度误差。
AI.motivation: 虚拟人渲染中准确再现面部肤色对于真实感、身份保持和公平性至关重要。现有虚拟人创建流程依赖未进行色彩校准的摄影输入，可能导致不一致性和偏见。
AI.method: 提出全自动工作流程：整合皮肤颜色与光照提取、纹理重着色、实时渲染和定量色彩分析。使用芝加哥面部数据库图像，比较基于脸颊区域采样和多维掩模的皮肤色调提取策略，结合TRUST框架进行光照隔离。将提取的肤色应用于MetaHuman纹理并在多种光照配置下渲染，在CIELAB色彩空间中使用ΔE度量和个体类型学角度(ITA)客观评估肤色一致性。
AI.result: 生成并分析了约19,848个渲染实例。结果显示提取策略表现出表型依赖性行为，较深肤色始终存在更高的色度误差。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法无需人工干预，计算成本低，支持大规模评估。研究揭示了肤色提取策略的表型依赖性，并确认了较深肤色的系统性色彩保真度问题，为改进虚拟人渲染的公平性提供了量化框架。

title: Beyond Symbolic Control: Societal Consequences of AI-Driven Workforce Displacement and the Imperative for Genuine Human Oversight Architectures
summary: The accelerating displacement of human labor by artificial intelligence (AI) and robotic systems represents a structural transformation whose societal consequences extend far beyond conventional labor market analysis. This paper presents a systematic multi-domain examination of the likely effects on economic structure, psychological well-being, political stability, education, healthcare, and geopolitical order. We identify a critical and underexamined dimension of this transition: the governance gap between nominal human oversight of AI systems -- where humans occupy positions of formal authority over AI decisions -- and genuine human oversight, where those humans possess the cognitive access, technical capability, and institutional authority to meaningfully understand, evaluate, and override AI outputs. We argue that this distinction, largely absent from current governance frameworks including the EU AI Act and NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0, represents the primary architectural failure mode in deployed AI governance. The societal consequences of labor displacement intensify this problem by concentrating consequential AI decision-making among an increasingly narrow class of technical and capital actors. We propose five architectural requirements for genuine human oversight systems and characterize the governance window -- estimated at 10-15 years -- before current deployment trajectories risk path-dependent social, economic, and institutional lock-in.

AI.tldr: 论文分析了AI取代人类劳动的结构性影响，指出当前治理框架存在"名义人类监督"与"真正人类监督"之间的关键差距，这构成了AI治理的主要架构失败模式。
AI.motivation: AI和机器人系统加速取代人类劳动带来了超越传统劳动力市场分析的社会后果，当前治理框架未能区分名义人类监督与真正人类监督，这种治理差距是AI治理的主要架构缺陷。
AI.method: 采用系统性多领域分析方法，考察AI取代人类劳动对经济结构、心理健康、政治稳定、教育、医疗和地缘政治秩序的影响，并提出真正人类监督系统的五个架构要求。
AI.result: 识别出当前治理框架（包括欧盟AI法案和NIST AI风险管理框架1.0）中缺乏的真正人类监督维度，指出劳动替代使重要的AI决策权集中在少数技术和资本行动者手中，加剧了这一问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前部署轨迹存在路径依赖的社会、经济和制度锁定风险，估计有10-15年的治理窗口期来建立真正的人类监督系统，避免架构失败模式固化。

title: A Practical Two-Stage Framework for GPU Resource and Power Prediction in Heterogeneous HPC Systems
summary: Efficient utilization of GPU resources and power has become critical with the growing demand for GPUs in high-performance computing (HPC). In this paper, we analyze GPU utilization and GPU memory utilization, as well as the power consumption of the Vienna ab initio Simulation Package (VASP), using the Slurm workload manager historical logs and GPU performance metrics collected by NVIDIA's Data Center GPU Manager (DCGM). VASP is a widely used materials science application on Perlmutter at NERSC, an HPE Cray EX system based on NVIDIA A100 GPUs. Using our insights from the resource utilization analysis of VASP applications, we propose a resource prediction framework to predict the average GPU power, maximum GPU utilization, and maximum GPU memory utilization values of heterogeneous HPC system applications to enable more efficient scheduling decisions and power-aware system operation. Our prediction framework consists of two stages: 1) using only the Slurm accounting logs as training data and 2) augmenting the training data with historical GPU profiling metrics collected with DCGM. The maximum GPU utilization predictions using only the Slurm submission features achieve up to 97% accuracy. Furthermore, features engineered from GPU-compute and memory activity metrics exhibit good correlations with average power utilization, and our runtime power usage prediction experiments result in up to 92% prediction accuracy. These findings demonstrate the effectiveness of DCGM metrics in capturing application characteristics and highlight their potential for developing predictive models to support dynamic power management in HPC systems.

AI.tldr: 基于Slurm日志和NVIDIA DCGM指标分析VASP应用GPU资源利用，提出两阶段资源预测框架，实现GPU利用率预测97%准确率和功耗预测92%准确率
AI.motivation: 随着GPU在高性能计算中需求增长，高效利用GPU资源和功耗变得至关重要。研究旨在通过分析VASP应用的GPU资源利用模式，开发预测框架以支持更高效的调度决策和功耗感知的系统操作。
AI.method: 1) 分析VASP在Perlmutter系统（基于NVIDIA A100 GPU）上的GPU利用率、GPU内存利用率和功耗；2) 使用Slurm工作负载管理器历史日志和NVIDIA DCGM收集的GPU性能指标；3) 提出两阶段资源预测框架：第一阶段仅使用Slurm记账日志作为训练数据，第二阶段增加DCGM收集的历史GPU性能指标；4) 从GPU计算和内存活动指标中提取特征，建立预测模型。
AI.result: 仅使用Slurm提交特征的最大GPU利用率预测达到97%准确率；从GPU计算和内存活动指标中提取的特征与平均功耗利用率表现出良好相关性；运行时功耗使用预测实验达到92%预测准确率。
AI.conclusion: DCGM指标能有效捕捉应用特征，在开发支持HPC系统动态功耗管理的预测模型方面具有潜力。研究证明了基于资源利用分析构建预测框架的可行性，可为高效调度和功耗感知操作提供支持。

title: Jagle: Building a Large-Scale Japanese Multimodal Post-Training Dataset for Vision-Language Models
summary: Developing vision-language models (VLMs) that generalize across diverse tasks requires large-scale training datasets with diverse content. In English, such datasets are typically constructed by aggregating and curating numerous existing visual question answering (VQA) resources. However, this strategy does not readily extend to other languages, where VQA datasets remain limited in both scale and domain coverage, posing a major obstacle to building high-quality multilingual and non-English VLMs. In this work, we introduce Jagle, the largest Japanese multimodal post-training dataset to date, comprising approximately 9.2 million instances across diverse tasks. Rather than relying on existing VQA datasets, we collect heterogeneous source data, including images, image-text pairs, and PDF documents, and generate VQA pairs through multiple strategies such as VLM-based QA generation, translation, and text rendering. Experiments demonstrate that a 2.2B model trained with Jagle achieves strong performance on Japanese tasks, surpassing InternVL3.5-2B in average score across ten Japanese evaluation tasks and approaching within five points of Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct. Furthermore, combining Jagle with FineVision does not degrade English performance; instead, it improves English performance compared to training with FineVision alone. To facilitate reproducibility and future research, we release the dataset, trained models, and code.

AI.tldr: Jagle是迄今为止最大的日语多模态后训练数据集，包含约920万个实例，通过多种策略生成视觉问答对，用于训练高性能的日语视觉语言模型。
AI.motivation: 构建高质量的多语言和非英语视觉语言模型面临的主要障碍是其他语言的视觉问答数据集在规模和领域覆盖上都很有限。英语可以通过聚合现有VQA资源构建大规模数据集，但这一策略不适用于日语等其他语言。
AI.method: 收集异构源数据（图像、图像-文本对、PDF文档），通过多种策略生成VQA对：基于VLM的问答生成、翻译和文本渲染。构建了包含约920万个实例的日语多模态后训练数据集Jagle。
AI.result: 使用Jagle训练的2.2B模型在日语任务上表现优异，在十个日语评估任务中平均得分超过InternVL3.5-2B，接近Qwen3-VL-2B-Instruct（差距在5分以内）。将Jagle与FineVision结合不仅不会降低英语性能，反而比单独使用FineVision训练效果更好。
AI.conclusion: Jagle数据集为构建高质量日语视觉语言模型提供了有效解决方案，解决了日语VQA数据稀缺的问题。通过创新的数据生成策略，该数据集支持模型在多语言任务上的优异表现，同时发布了数据集、训练模型和代码以促进可重复性和未来研究。

title: Hybrid Framework for Robotic Manipulation: Integrating Reinforcement Learning and Large Language Models
summary: This paper introduces a new hybrid framework that combines Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Large Language Models (LLMs) to improve robotic manipulation tasks. By utilizing RL for accurate low-level control and LLMs for high level task planning and understanding of natural language, the proposed framework effectively connects low-level execution with high-level reasoning in robotic systems. This integration allows robots to understand and carry out complex, human-like instructions while adapting to changing environments in real time. The framework is tested in a PyBullet-based simulation environment using the Franka Emika Panda robotic arm, with various manipulation scenarios as benchmarks. The results show a 33.5% decrease in task completion time and enhancements of 18.1% and 36.4% in accuracy and adaptability, respectively, when compared to systems that use only RL. These results underscore the potential of LLM-enhanced robotic systems for practical applications, making them more efficient, adaptable, and capable of interacting with humans. Future research will aim to explore sim-to-real transfer, scalability, and multi-robot systems to further broaden the framework's applicability.

AI.tldr: 提出结合强化学习（RL）与大语言模型（LLM）的混合框架，用于提升机器人操作任务性能，通过RL负责底层控制，LLM负责高层任务规划与自然语言理解，实现高效的人机交互与环境适应。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人系统通常单独使用强化学习进行控制，缺乏高层任务规划能力和自然语言理解能力，难以处理复杂的人类指令和动态环境变化，需要一种能够连接底层执行与高层推理的集成框架。
AI.method: 提出混合框架：RL负责精确的底层运动控制，LLM负责高层任务分解、规划和自然语言指令理解。在PyBullet仿真环境中使用Franka Emika Panda机械臂进行测试，设计多种操作场景作为基准。
AI.result: 相比仅使用RL的系统，任务完成时间减少33.5%，准确率提升18.1%，适应性提升36.4%。框架能够理解并执行复杂的人类指令，并在实时环境中适应变化。
AI.conclusion: LLM增强的机器人系统具有实际应用潜力，使机器人更高效、适应性强且能与人交互。未来研究方向包括仿真到现实的迁移、可扩展性和多机器人系统，以进一步扩展框架的适用性。

title: AstroConcepts: A Large-Scale Multi-Label Classification Corpus for Astrophysics
summary: Scientific multi-label text classification suffers from extreme class imbalance, where specialized terminology exhibits severe power-law distributions that challenge standard classification approaches. Existing scientific corpora lack comprehensive controlled vocabularies, focusing instead on broad categories and limiting systematic study of extreme imbalance. We introduce AstroConcepts, a corpus of English abstracts from 21,702 published astrophysics papers, labeled with 2,367 concepts from the Unified Astronomy Thesaurus. The corpus exhibits severe label imbalance, with 76% of concepts having fewer than 50 training examples. By releasing this resource, we enable systematic study of extreme class imbalance in scientific domains and establish strong baselines across traditional, neural, and vocabulary-constrained LLM methods. Our evaluation reveals three key patterns that provide new insights into scientific text classification. First, vocabulary-constrained LLMs achieve competitive performance relative to domain-adapted models in astrophysics classification, suggesting a potential for parameter-efficient approaches. Second, domain adaptation yields relatively larger improvements for rare, specialized terminology, although absolute performance remains limited across all methods. Third, we propose frequency-stratified evaluation to reveal performance patterns that are hidden by aggregate scores, thereby making robustness assessment central to scientific multi-label evaluation. These results offer actionable insights for scientific NLP and establish benchmarks for research on extreme imbalance.

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了AstroConcepts语料库，包含21,702篇天体物理学论文摘要，标注了2,367个天文学同义词库概念，用于研究科学文本分类中的极端类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 科学多标签文本分类面临极端类别不平衡问题，专业术语呈现严重的幂律分布，挑战标准分类方法。现有科学语料库缺乏全面的受控词汇表，主要关注广泛类别，限制了极端不平衡的系统研究。
AI.method: 构建AstroConcepts语料库：包含21,702篇天体物理学论文摘要，标注2,367个统一天文学同义词库概念。采用传统、神经和词汇约束LLM方法建立基线，提出频率分层评估方法，揭示被聚合分数隐藏的性能模式。
AI.result: 1) 词汇约束LLM在性能上可与领域适应模型竞争，表明参数高效方法的潜力；2) 领域适应对罕见专业术语改进相对更大，但所有方法的绝对性能仍然有限；3) 频率分层评估揭示了被聚合分数隐藏的性能模式，使鲁棒性评估成为科学多标签评估的核心。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为科学NLP提供了可操作的见解，并为极端不平衡研究建立了基准。提出的频率分层评估方法使鲁棒性评估成为科学多标签评估的核心，有助于更好地理解不同频率类别下的模型性能。

title: Efficient Reasoning via Thought Compression for Language Segmentation
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning has significantly improved the performance of large multimodal models in language-guided segmentation, yet its prohibitive computational cost, stemming from generating verbose rationales, limits real-world applicability. We introduce WISE (Wisdom from Internal Self-Exploration), a novel paradigm for efficient reasoning guided by the principle of \textit{thinking twice -- once for learning, once for speed}. WISE trains a model to generate a structured sequence: a concise rationale, the final answer, and then a detailed explanation. By placing the concise rationale first, our method leverages autoregressive conditioning to enforce that the concise rationale acts as a sufficient summary for generating the detailed explanation. This structure is reinforced by a self-distillation objective that jointly rewards semantic fidelity and conciseness, compelling the model to internalize its detailed reasoning into a compact form. At inference, the detailed explanation is omitted. To address the resulting conditional distribution shift, our inference strategy, WISE-S, employs a simple prompting technique that injects a brevity-focused instruction into the user's query. This final adjustment facilitates the robust activation of the learned concise policy, unlocking the full benefits of our framework. Extensive experiments show that WISE-S achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on the ReasonSeg benchmark with 58.3 cIoU, while reducing the average reasoning length by nearly \textbf{5$\times$} -- from 112 to just 23 tokens. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/mrazhou/WISE}{WISE}.

AI.tldr: WISE提出了一种高效推理范式，通过"思考两次"原则（一次学习，一次加速），训练模型生成结构化序列（简洁理由→答案→详细解释），在推理时省略详细解释，实现5倍推理长度压缩，同时保持SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CoT推理方法在语言引导分割中虽然性能显著，但生成冗长推理过程导致计算成本过高，限制了实际应用。需要一种既能保持推理能力又能大幅降低计算开销的高效方法。
AI.method: WISE训练模型生成结构化序列：简洁理由→最终答案→详细解释。通过将简洁理由置于首位，利用自回归条件约束确保简洁理由足以生成详细解释。采用自蒸馏目标联合奖励语义保真度和简洁性，使模型将详细推理内化为紧凑形式。推理时使用WISE-S策略，通过简洁性指令提示激活学习到的简洁策略。
AI.result: 在ReasonSeg基准测试中，WISE-S达到58.3 cIoU的零样本SOTA性能，同时将平均推理长度从112个token减少到23个token，实现近5倍的压缩。代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: WISE通过"思考两次"范式成功解决了CoT推理的计算效率问题，在保持高性能的同时大幅降低推理成本，为实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Passive iFIR filters for data-driven velocity control in robotics
summary: We present a passive, data-driven velocity control method for nonlinear robotic manipulators that achieves better tracking performance than optimized PID with comparable design complexity. Using only three minutes of probing data, a VRFT-based design identifies passive iFIR controllers that (i) preserve closed-loop stability via passivity constraints and (ii) outperform a VRFT-tuned PID baseline on the Franka Research 3 robot in both joint-space and Cartesian-space velocity control, achieving up to a 74.5% reduction in tracking error for the Cartesian velocity tracking experiment with the most demanding reference model. When the robot end-effector dynamics change, the controller can be re-learned from new data, regaining nominal performance. This study bridges learning-based control and stability-guaranteed design: passive iFIR learns from data while retaining passivity-based stability guarantees, unlike many learning-based approaches.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于被动性约束的数据驱动速度控制方法，使用三分钟探测数据通过VRFT设计被动iFIR控制器，在Franka Research 3机器人上优于优化的PID控制
AI.motivation: 解决非线性机器人操纵器的速度控制问题，旨在实现比优化PID更好的跟踪性能，同时保持设计复杂度相当，并连接学习型控制与稳定性保证设计
AI.method: 采用被动数据驱动方法，使用VRFT（虚拟参考反馈整定）从三分钟探测数据中识别被动iFIR控制器，通过被动性约束保证闭环稳定性
AI.result: 在Franka Research 3机器人上，该方法在关节空间和笛卡尔空间速度控制中均优于VRFT整定的PID基线，笛卡尔速度跟踪实验中跟踪误差最多减少74.5%，且当末端执行器动力学变化时可重新学习恢复性能
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功连接了学习型控制与稳定性保证设计，被动iFIR控制器既能从数据中学习，又能保持基于被动性的稳定性保证，为机器人控制提供了新的有效方法

title: Auction-Based Online Policy Adaptation for Evolving Objectives
summary: We consider multi-objective reinforcement learning problems where objectives come from an identical family -- such as the class of reachability objectives -- and may appear or disappear at runtime. Our goal is to design adaptive policies that can efficiently adjust their behaviors as the set of active objectives changes. To solve this problem, we propose a modular framework where each objective is supported by a selfish local policy, and coordination is achieved through a novel auction-based mechanism: policies bid for the right to execute their actions, with bids reflecting the urgency of the current state. The highest bidder selects the action, enabling a dynamic and interpretable trade-off among objectives. Going back to the original adaptation problem, when objectives change, the system adapts by simply adding or removing the corresponding policies. Moreover, as objectives arise from the same family, identical copies of a parameterized policy can be deployed, facilitating immediate adaptation at runtime. We show how the selfish local policies can be computed by turning the problem into a general-sum game, where the policies compete against each other to fulfill their own objectives. To succeed, each policy must not only optimize its own objective, but also reason about the presence of other goals and learn to produce calibrated bids that reflect relative priority. In our implementation, the policies are trained concurrently using proximal policy optimization (PPO). We evaluate on Atari Assault and a gridworld-based path-planning task with dynamic targets. Our method achieves substantially better performance than monolithic policies trained with PPO.

AI.tldr: 提出基于拍卖机制的模块化多目标强化学习框架，通过自私的局部策略竞争执行权，实现运行时目标的动态适应
AI.motivation: 解决多目标强化学习中目标在运行时动态出现或消失的问题，需要设计能够高效调整行为的自适应策略
AI.method: 模块化框架：每个目标对应一个自私的局部策略，通过拍卖机制协调——策略根据当前状态紧急程度出价竞标执行权，最高出价者选择动作。将问题转化为一般和博弈，使用PPO并发训练策略
AI.result: 在Atari Assault和基于网格世界的路径规划任务（动态目标）上评估，相比使用PPO训练的单一策略，本方法获得显著更好的性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的拍卖机制模块化框架能够有效处理运行时目标变化，实现动态可解释的权衡，支持通过简单添加/移除策略实现系统适应

title: IndoorCrowd: A Multi-Scene Dataset for Human Detection, Segmentation, and Tracking with an Automated Annotation Pipeline
comment: Accepted at Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops 2026
summary: Understanding human behaviour in crowded indoor environments is central to surveillance, smart buildings, and human-robot interaction, yet existing datasets rarely capture real-world indoor complexity at scale. We introduce IndoorCrowd, a multi-scene dataset for indoor human detection, instance segmentation, and multi-object tracking, collected across four campus locations (ACS-EC, ACS-EG, IE-Central, R-Central). It comprises $31$ videos ($9{,}913$ frames at $5$fps) with human-verified, per-instance segmentation masks. A $620$-frame control subset benchmarks three foundation-model auto-annotators: SAM3, GroundingSAM, and EfficientGroundingSAM, against human labels using Cohen's $κ$, AP, precision, recall, and mask IoU. A further $2{,}552$-frame subset supports multi-object tracking with continuous identity tracks in MOTChallenge format. We establish detection, segmentation, and tracking baselines using YOLOv8n, YOLOv26n, and RT-DETR-L paired with ByteTrack, BoT-SORT, and OC-SORT. Per-scene analysis reveals substantial difficulty variation driven by crowd density, scale, and occlusion: ACS-EC, with $79.3\%$ dense frames and a mean instance scale of $60.8$px, is the most challenging scene. The project page is available at https://sheepseb.github.io/IndoorCrowd/.

AI.tldr: IndoorCrowd是一个大规模室内人群数据集，包含31个视频（9,913帧），用于人体检测、实例分割和多目标跟踪，在四个校园场景中收集，包含人工验证的实例分割掩码和跟踪标注。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集很少能大规模捕捉真实世界室内环境的复杂性，而理解拥挤室内环境中的人类行为对于监控、智能建筑和人机交互至关重要。
AI.method: 收集了四个校园场景（ACS-EC、ACS-EG、IE-Central、R-Central）的31个视频，包含9,913帧（5fps），提供人工验证的每实例分割掩码。使用620帧控制子集评估SAM3、GroundingSAM和EfficientGroundingSAM三个基础模型自动标注器，使用Cohen's κ、AP、精确率、召回率和掩码IoU指标。另外2,552帧子集支持MOTChallenge格式的多目标跟踪。建立了使用YOLOv8n、YOLOv26n、RT-DETR-L与ByteTrack、BoT-SORT、OC-SORT组合的检测、分割和跟踪基线。
AI.result: 按场景分析显示，由于人群密度、尺度和遮挡导致的难度变化显著：ACS-EC场景（79.3%密集帧，平均实例尺度60.8像素）是最具挑战性的场景。评估了基础模型自动标注器的性能，并建立了检测、分割和跟踪的基准结果。
AI.conclusion: IndoorCrowd数据集填补了大规模真实世界室内人群数据集空白，支持检测、分割和跟踪任务，揭示了室内场景中由密度、尺度和遮挡导致的显著难度变化，为未来研究提供了有价值的基准。

title: Compositional Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning
summary: We study structured abstraction-based reasoning for the Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC) and compare its generalization to test-time approaches. Purely neural architectures lack reliable combinatorial generalization, while strictly symbolic systems struggle with perceptual grounding. We therefore propose a neuro-symbolic architecture that extracts object-level structure from grids, uses neural priors to propose candidate transformations from a fixed domain-specific language (DSL) of atomic patterns, and filters hypotheses using cross-example consistency. Instantiated as a compositional reasoning framework based on unit patterns inspired by human visual abstraction, the system augments large language models (LLMs) with object representations and transformation proposals. On ARC-AGI-2, it improves base LLM performance from 16% to 24.4% on the public evaluation set, and to 30.8% when combined with ARC Lang Solver via a meta-classifier. These results demonstrate that separating perception, neural-guided transformation proposal, and symbolic consistency filtering improves generalization without task-specific finetuning or reinforcement learning, while reducing reliance on brute-force search and sampling-based test-time scaling. We open-source the ARC-AGI-2 Reasoner code (https://github.com/CoreThink-AI/arc-agi-2-reasoner).

AI.tldr: 提出基于结构化抽象推理的神经符号架构，通过提取网格对象级结构、使用神经先验从DSL提出候选变换、跨示例一致性过滤假设，在ARC-AGI-2上将LLM性能从16%提升至30.8%
AI.motivation: 纯神经架构缺乏可靠组合泛化能力，严格符号系统难以处理感知基础问题，需要结合两者优势解决ARC中的抽象推理任务
AI.method: 提出神经符号架构：1)从网格提取对象级结构；2)使用神经先验从固定领域特定语言(DSL)提出原子模式候选变换；3)通过跨示例一致性过滤假设；4)基于单元模式构建组合推理框架，用对象表示和变换建议增强LLM
AI.result: 在ARC-AGI-2公开评估集上，将基础LLM性能从16%提升至24.4%，与ARC Lang Solver通过元分类器结合后达到30.8%，无需任务特定微调或强化学习
AI.conclusion: 分离感知、神经引导变换建议和符号一致性过滤可改善泛化能力，减少对暴力搜索和基于采样的测试时扩展的依赖，神经符号方法在抽象推理任务中具有优势

title: DIAL: Decoupling Intent and Action via Latent World Modeling for End-to-End VLA
summary: The development of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models has been significantly accelerated by pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs). However, most existing end-to-end VLAs treat the VLM primarily as a multimodal encoder, directly mapping vision-language features to low-level actions. This paradigm underutilizes the VLM's potential in high-level decision making and introduces training instability, frequently degrading its rich semantic representations. To address these limitations, we introduce DIAL, a framework bridging high-level decision making and low-level motor execution through a differentiable latent intent bottleneck. Specifically, a VLM-based System-2 performs latent world modeling by synthesizing latent visual foresight within the VLM's native feature space; this foresight explicitly encodes intent and serves as the structural bottleneck. A lightweight System-1 policy then decodes this predicted intent together with the current observation into precise robot actions via latent inverse dynamics. To ensure optimization stability, we employ a two-stage training paradigm: a decoupled warmup phase where System-2 learns to predict latent futures while System-1 learns motor control under ground-truth future guidance within a unified feature space, followed by seamless end-to-end joint optimization. This enables action-aware gradients to refine the VLM backbone in a controlled manner, preserving pre-trained knowledge. Extensive experiments on the RoboCasa GR1 Tabletop benchmark show that DIAL establishes a new state-of-the-art, achieving superior performance with 10x fewer demonstrations than prior methods. Furthermore, by leveraging heterogeneous human demonstrations, DIAL learns physically grounded manipulation priors and exhibits robust zero-shot generalization to unseen objects and novel configurations during real-world deployment on a humanoid robot.

AI.tldr: DIAL框架通过可微分潜在意图瓶颈连接高级决策与低级运动执行，利用VLM进行潜在世界建模，实现稳定训练和卓越性能
AI.motivation: 现有端到端VLA模型主要将VLM作为多模态编码器，直接映射视觉语言特征到低级动作，这未能充分利用VLM的高级决策潜力，且导致训练不稳定，可能破坏其丰富的语义表示
AI.method: 提出DIAL框架：1) 基于VLM的System-2在VLM原生特征空间中进行潜在世界建模，合成潜在视觉前瞻作为意图瓶颈；2) 轻量级System-1策略将预测意图与当前观测解码为精确机器人动作；3) 采用两阶段训练：解耦预热阶段分别训练System-2预测潜在未来和System-1在真实未来指导下学习运动控制，然后进行端到端联合优化
AI.result: 在RoboCasa GR1 Tabletop基准测试中达到新的最先进水平，仅需先前方法1/10的演示数据；通过利用异构人类演示学习物理基础的操纵先验，在真实人形机器人部署中展现出对未见物体和新配置的鲁棒零样本泛化能力
AI.conclusion: DIAL框架通过可微分潜在意图瓶颈有效连接高级决策与低级执行，在保持预训练知识的同时实现稳定优化，显著提升了VLA模型的性能和泛化能力

title: Rare-Aware Autoencoding: Reconstructing Spatially Imbalanced Data
summary: Autoencoders can be challenged by spatially non-uniform sampling of image content. This is common in medical imaging, biology, and physics, where informative patterns occur rarely at specific image coordinates, as background dominates these locations in most samples, biasing reconstructions toward the majority appearance. In practice, autoencoders are biased toward dominant patterns resulting in the loss of fine-grained detail and causing blurred reconstructions for rare spatial inputs especially under spatial data imbalance. We address spatial imbalance by two complementary components: (i) self-entropy-based loss that upweights statistically uncommon spatial locations and (ii) Sample Propagation, a replay mechanism that selectively re-exposes the model to hard to reconstruct samples across batches during training. We benchmark existing data balancing strategies, originally developed for supervised classification, in the unsupervised reconstruction setting. Drawing on the limitations of these approaches, our method specifically targets spatial imbalance by encouraging models to focus on statistically rare locations, improving reconstruction consistency compared to existing baselines. We validate in a simulated dataset with controlled spatial imbalance conditions, and in three, uncontrolled, diverse real-world datasets spanning physical, biological, and astronomical domains. Our approach outperforms baselines on various reconstruction metrics, particularly under spatial imbalance distributions. These results highlight the importance of data representation in a batch and emphasize rare samples in unsupervised image reconstruction. We will make all code and related data available.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种解决自编码器中空间非均匀采样问题的方法，通过自熵损失和样本传播机制来改善空间不平衡条件下的图像重建质量。
AI.motivation: 在医学成像、生物学和物理学等领域，图像内容通常存在空间非均匀采样问题，信息丰富的模式在特定坐标上出现频率很低，而背景在这些位置占据主导。这导致自编码器偏向于重建多数模式，丢失细粒度细节，在空间数据不平衡条件下对罕见空间输入产生模糊重建。
AI.method: 提出了两个互补组件：1) 基于自熵的损失函数，对统计上不常见的空间位置进行加权；2) 样本传播机制，这是一种重放机制，在训练过程中选择性地将难以重建的样本重新暴露给模型。该方法专门针对空间不平衡问题，鼓励模型关注统计上罕见的位置。
AI.result: 在受控空间不平衡条件的模拟数据集以及三个无控制的真实世界数据集（涵盖物理、生物和天文领域）上验证了方法的有效性。该方法在各种重建指标上优于基线方法，特别是在空间不平衡分布条件下表现更佳。
AI.conclusion: 该方法强调了批次中数据表示的重要性，并在无监督图像重建中突出了罕见样本的价值。研究结果展示了针对空间不平衡问题的专门方法在改善重建一致性方面的优势，为处理空间非均匀采样问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Reconfiguration of supernumerary robotic limbs for human augmentation
summary: Wearable robots aim to seamlessly adapt to humans and their environment with personalized interactions. Existing supernumerary robotic limbs (SRLs), which enhance the physical capabilities of humans with additional extremities, have thus far been developed primarily for task-specific applications in structured industrial settings, limiting their adaptability to dynamic and unstructured environments. Here, we introduce a novel reconfigurable SRL framework grounded in a quantitative analysis of human augmentation to guide the development of more adaptable SRLs for diverse scenarios. This framework captures how SRL configuration shapes workspace extension and human-robot collaboration. We define human augmentation ratios to evaluate collaborative, visible extended, and non-visible extended workspaces, enabling systematic selection of SRL placement, morphology, and autonomy for a given task. Using these metrics, we demonstrate how quantitative augmentation analysis can guide the reconfiguration and control of SRLs to better match task requirements. We validate the proposed approach through experiments with a reconfigurable SRL composed of origami-inspired modular elements. Our results suggest that reconfigurable SRLs, informed by quantitative human augmentation analysis, offer a new perspective for providing adaptable human augmentation and assistance in everyday environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于定量人机增强分析的可重构超限机器人肢体框架，通过定义人机增强比来评估不同工作空间，指导SRL的配置、形态和自主性选择，以实现动态非结构化环境中的适应性人机增强。
AI.motivation: 现有超限机器人肢体主要针对结构化工业环境中的特定任务设计，缺乏对动态非结构化环境的适应性。需要一种系统方法来指导SRL的配置和设计，使其能够更好地适应多样化场景。
AI.method: 提出可重构SRL框架，基于定量人机增强分析定义三种人机增强比（协作、可见扩展、非可见扩展工作空间），指导SRL的放置、形态和自主性选择。采用折纸启发的模块化元素构建可重构SRL原型进行验证。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，定量增强分析能够有效指导SRL的重新配置和控制，使其更好地匹配任务需求。可重构SRL结合定量分析为日常环境中的适应性人机增强提供了新视角。
AI.conclusion: 基于定量人机增强分析的可重构SRL框架能够提高机器人肢体在动态非结构化环境中的适应性，为人机协作和增强提供了系统化的设计指导方法。

title: Variational Encoder--Multi-Decoder (VE-MD) for Privacy-by-functional-design (Group) Emotion Recognition
summary: Group Emotion Recognition (GER) aims to infer collective affect in social environments such as classrooms, crowds, and public events. Many existing approaches rely on explicit individual-level processing, including cropped faces, person tracking, or per-person feature extraction, which makes the analysis pipeline person-centric and raises privacy concerns in deployment scenarios where only group-level understanding is needed. This research proposes VE-MD, a Variational Encoder-Multi-Decoder framework for group emotion recognition under a privacy-aware functional design. Rather than providing formal anonymization or cryptographic privacy guarantees, VE-MD is designed to avoid explicit individual monitoring by constraining the model to predict only aggregate group-level affect, without identity recognition or per-person emotion outputs. VE-MD learns a shared latent representation jointly optimized for emotion classification and internal prediction of body and facial structural representations. Two structural decoding strategies are investigated: a transformer-based PersonQuery decoder and a dense Heatmap decoder that naturally accommodates variable group sizes. Experiments on six in-the-wild datasets, including two GER and four Individual Emotion Recognition (IER) benchmarks, show that structural supervision consistently improves representation learning. More importantly, the results reveal a clear distinction between GER and IER: optimizing the latent space alone is often insufficient for GER because it tends to attenuate interaction-related cues, whereas preserving explicit structural outputs improves collective affect inference. In contrast, projected structural representations seem to act as an effective denoising bottleneck for IER. VE-MD achieves state-of-the-art performance on GAF-3.0 (up to 90.06%) and VGAF (82.25% with multimodal fusion with audio). These results show that preserving interaction-related structural information is particularly beneficial for group-level affect modeling without relying on prior individual feature extraction. On IER datasets using multimodal fusion with audio modality, VE-MD outperforms SOTA on SamSemo (77.9%, adding text modality) while achieving competitive performances on MER-MULTI (63.8%), DFEW (70.7%) and EngageNet (69.0).

AI.tldr: VE-MD：一种用于群体情感识别的变分编码器-多解码器框架，通过结构监督学习共享潜在表示，避免显式个体监控，在隐私保护前提下实现群体级情感分析
AI.motivation: 现有群体情感识别方法依赖显式个体级处理（如裁剪人脸、人员跟踪、每人特征提取），导致分析流程以人为中心，在仅需群体级理解的部署场景中引发隐私担忧
AI.method: 提出VE-MD（变分编码器-多解码器）框架，通过约束模型仅预测聚合群体级情感，避免身份识别或每人情感输出。学习共享潜在表示，联合优化情感分类和内部预测身体与面部结构表示。研究两种结构解码策略：基于Transformer的PersonQuery解码器和适应可变群体规模的密集Heatmap解码器
AI.result: 在六个野外数据集（包括两个GER和四个IER基准）上实验表明：结构监督持续改进表示学习；GER与IER存在明显区别——仅优化潜在空间对GER不足（倾向于衰减交互相关线索），而保留显式结构输出改善集体情感推断；投影结构表示对IER起到有效去噪瓶颈作用。VE-MD在GAF-3.0上达到90.06%的SOTA性能，在VGAF上达到82.25%（与音频多模态融合）。在IER数据集上，VE-MD在SamSemo上超越SOTA（77.9%，添加文本模态），在MER-MULTI（63.8%）、DFEW（70.7%）和EngageNet（69.0%）上取得竞争性表现
AI.conclusion: 保留交互相关结构信息对群体级情感建模特别有益，无需依赖先验个体特征提取。VE-MD提供了一种隐私感知的功能设计，避免显式个体监控，同时通过结构监督学习改进表示，在群体情感识别任务中实现高性能

title: Generative models on phase space
summary: Deep generative models such as diffusion and flow matching are powerful machine learning tools capable of learning and sampling from high-dimensional distributions. They are particularly useful when the training data appears to be concentrated on a submanifold of the data embedding space. For high-energy physics data, consisting of collections of relativistic energy-momentum 4-vectors, this submanifold can enforce extremely strong physically-motivated priors, such as energy and momentum conservation. If these constraints are learned only approximately, rather than exactly, this can inhibit the interpretability and reliability of such generative models. To remedy this deficiency, we introduce generative models which are, by construction, confined at every step of their sampling trajectory to the manifold of massless N-particle Lorentz-invariant phase space in the center-of-momentum frame. In the case of diffusion models, the "pure noise" forward process endpoint corresponds to the uniform distribution on phase space, which provides a clear starting point from which to identify how correlations among the particles emerge during the reverse (de-noising) process. We demonstrate that our models are able to learn both few-particle and many-particle distributions with various singularity structures, paving the way for future interpretability studies using generative models trained on simulated jet data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种约束在质量为零的N粒子洛伦兹不变相空间流形上的生成模型，确保物理守恒定律在采样过程中被精确满足
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型和流匹配模型在高能物理数据生成中只能近似满足能量动量守恒等物理约束，这影响了模型的解释性和可靠性
AI.method: 构建了在采样轨迹的每一步都严格约束在质量为零的N粒子洛伦兹不变相空间流形上的生成模型，前向过程的"纯噪声"终点对应相空间上的均匀分布
AI.result: 模型能够学习具有各种奇点结构的少粒子和多粒子分布，为未来使用模拟喷注数据训练的生成模型进行可解释性研究铺平了道路
AI.conclusion: 通过将生成模型严格约束在物理相空间流形上，可以确保物理守恒定律被精确满足，从而提高模型的解释性和可靠性

title: SafeDMPs: Integrating Formal Safety with DMPs for Adaptive HRI
summary: Robots operating in human-centric environments must be both robust to disturbances and provably safe from collisions. Achieving these properties simultaneously and efficiently remains a central challenge. While Dynamic Movement Primitives (DMPs) offer inherent stability and generalization from single demonstrations, they lack formal safety guarantees. Conversely, formal methods like Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) provide provable safety but often rely on computationally expensive, real-time optimization, hindering their use in high-frequency control. This paper introduces SafeDMPs, a novel framework that resolves this trade-off. We integrate the closed-form efficiency and dynamic robustness of DMPs with a provably safe, non-optimization-based control law derived from Spatio-Temporal Tubes (STTs). This synergy allows us to generate motions that are not only robust to perturbations and adaptable to new goals, but also guaranteed to avoid static and dynamic obstacles. Our approach achieves a closed-form solution for a problem that traditionally requires online optimization. Experimental results on a 7-DOF robot manipulator demonstrate that SafeDMPs is orders of magnitude faster and more accurate than optimization-based baselines, making it an ideal solution for real-time, safe, and collaborative robotics.

AI.tldr: SafeDMPs框架将动态运动基元(DMPs)的闭式效率与时空管(STTs)的可证明安全控制律相结合，解决了机器人运动控制中鲁棒性与安全性之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 在人类中心环境中操作的机器人需要同时具备对扰动的鲁棒性和可证明的碰撞安全性。现有方法存在局限性：动态运动基元(DMPs)具有固有稳定性和泛化能力但缺乏形式化安全保证；控制屏障函数(CBFs)等形式化方法提供可证明安全性但依赖计算昂贵的实时优化，难以用于高频控制。
AI.method: 提出SafeDMPs框架，将DMPs的闭式效率和动态鲁棒性与基于时空管(STTs)的可证明安全、非优化控制律相结合。该方法生成闭式解，避免了传统方法所需的在线优化。
AI.result: 在7自由度机器人机械臂上的实验结果表明，SafeDMPs比基于优化的基线方法快几个数量级且更精确，适用于实时、安全和协作机器人应用。
AI.conclusion: SafeDMPs框架成功解决了机器人运动控制中鲁棒性与安全性之间的权衡问题，通过闭式解实现了可证明的安全运动生成，为实时协作机器人提供了理想解决方案。

title: Environment-Aware Channel Prediction for Vehicular Communications: A Multimodal Visual Feature Fusion Framework
summary: The deep integration of communication with intelligence and sensing, as a defining vision of 6G, renders environment-aware channel prediction a key enabling technology. As a representative 6G application, vehicular communications require accurate and forward-looking channel prediction under stringent reliability, latency, and adaptability demands. Traditional empirical and deterministic models remain limited in balancing accuracy, generalization, and deployability, while the growing availability of onboard and roadside sensing devices offers a promising source of environmental priors. This paper proposes an environment-aware channel prediction framework based on multimodal visual feature fusion. Using GPS data and vehicle-side panoramic RGB images, together with semantic segmentation and depth estimation, the framework extracts semantic, depth, and position features through a three-branch architecture and performs adaptive multimodal fusion via a squeeze-excitation attention gating module. For 360-dimensional angular power spectrum (APS) prediction, a dedicated regression head and a composite multi-constraint loss are further designed. As a result, joint prediction of path loss (PL), delay spread (DS), azimuth spread of arrival (ASA), azimuth spread of departure (ASD), and APS is achieved. Experiments on a synchronized urban V2I measurement dataset yield the best root mean square error (RMSE) of 3.26 dB for PL, RMSEs of 37.66 ns, 5.05 degrees, and 5.08 degrees for DS, ASA, and ASD, respectively, and mean/median APS cosine similarities of 0.9342/0.9571, demonstrating strong accuracy, generalization, and practical potential for intelligent channel prediction in 6G vehicular communications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模态视觉特征融合的环境感知信道预测框架，用于6G车联网通信，通过融合GPS、全景RGB图像、语义分割和深度估计特征，实现了路径损耗、时延扩展、到达角扩展、出发角扩展和角功率谱的联合预测。
AI.motivation: 6G通信将通信与智能感知深度融合，环境感知信道预测成为关键技术。车联网通信对信道预测的准确性、前瞻性、可靠性、低延迟和适应性有严格要求。传统经验模型和确定性模型在准确性、泛化性和可部署性方面存在局限，而车载和路侧感知设备的普及为环境先验信息提供了新来源。
AI.method: 提出基于多模态视觉特征融合的环境感知信道预测框架：1) 使用GPS数据和车辆侧全景RGB图像；2) 通过语义分割和深度估计提取语义、深度和位置特征；3) 采用三分支架构处理不同模态特征；4) 通过挤压-激励注意力门控模块实现自适应多模态融合；5) 设计专用回归头和复合多约束损失函数进行360维角功率谱预测；6) 实现路径损耗、时延扩展、到达角扩展、出发角扩展和角功率谱的联合预测。
AI.result: 在同步城市V2I测量数据集上的实验结果显示：路径损耗的RMSE为3.26 dB；时延扩展RMSE为37.66 ns；到达角扩展RMSE为5.05度；出发角扩展RMSE为5.08度；角功率谱的平均/中值余弦相似度为0.9342/0.9571。这些结果表明该方法在准确性、泛化性和实际应用潜力方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该环境感知信道预测框架通过多模态视觉特征融合，在6G车联网通信中实现了高精度的信道预测，为智能信道预测提供了有效的解决方案，展示了在6G车联网通信中的实际应用潜力。

title: Design and Aerodynamic Modeling of MetaMorpher: A Hybrid Rotary andFixed-Wing Morphing UAV
summary: In this paper, we present a generalized, comprehensive nonlinear mathematical model and conceptual design for the MetaMorpher, a metamorphic Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) designed to bridge the gap between vertical takeoff and landing agility and fixed-wing cruising efficiency. Building on the successful design of the spincopter platform, this work introduces a simplified mechanical architecture using lightweight materials and a novel wing-folding strategy. Unlike traditional rigid-body approximations, we derive a nonlinear flight dynamics model that enables arbitrary force distributions across a segmented wing structure. This modularity allows for testing different airfoils, mass distributions, and chord lengths in a single environment. As part of this work, various flight modes were specifically tested and analyzed in the Simulink environment. The results show that the model behaves predictably under different structural configurations, demonstrating its reliability as a tool for rapid design evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出MetaMorpher变形无人机，结合垂直起降敏捷性与固定翼巡航效率，基于非线性动力学模型和模块化机翼设计，通过Simulink验证不同飞行模式。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机设计在垂直起降敏捷性和固定翼巡航效率之间存在权衡，需要一种能够桥接这两种能力的变形无人机系统。
AI.method: 基于spincopter平台，采用轻质材料和新型机翼折叠策略的简化机械架构，建立非线性飞行动力学模型，支持分段机翼结构的任意力分布，实现模块化设计。
AI.result: Simulink环境下测试多种飞行模式，模型在不同结构配置下表现出可预测行为，验证了其作为快速设计评估工具的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: MetaMorpher变形无人机通过非线性模型和模块化设计成功实现了垂直起降与固定翼巡航的融合，为无人机设计提供了有效的评估工具。

title: Gradient estimators for parameter inference in discrete stochastic kinetic models
summary: Stochastic kinetic models are ubiquitous in physics, yet inferring their parameters from experimental data remains challenging. In deterministic models, parameter inference often relies on gradients, as they can be obtained efficiently through automatic differentiation. However, these tools cannot be directly applied to stochastic simulation algorithms (SSA) such as the Gillespie algorithm, since sampling from a discrete set of reactions introduces non-differentiable operations. In this work, we adopt three gradient estimators from machine learning for the Gillespie SSA: the Gumbel-Softmax Straight-Through (GS-ST) estimator, the Score Function estimator, and the Alternative Path estimator. We compare the properties of all estimators in two representative systems exhibiting relaxation or oscillatory dynamics, where the latter requires gradient estimation of time-dependent objective functions. We find that the GS-ST estimator mostly yields well-behaved gradient estimates, but exhibits diverging variance in challenging parameter regimes, resulting in unsuccessful parameter inference. In these cases, the other estimators provide more robust, lower variance gradients. Our results demonstrate that gradient-based parameter inference can be integrated effectively with the Gillespie SSA, with different estimators offering complementary advantages.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了三种梯度估计器（GS-ST、Score Function、Alternative Path）在Gillespie随机模拟算法参数推断中的应用效果，发现不同估计器在不同参数区域具有互补优势。
AI.motivation: 随机动力学模型在物理学中普遍存在，但基于实验数据的参数推断仍然具有挑战性。确定性模型可以通过自动微分高效获取梯度，但这些工具无法直接应用于Gillespie等随机模拟算法，因为从离散反应集合中采样引入了不可微操作。
AI.method: 研究采用三种来自机器学习的梯度估计器：Gumbel-Softmax Straight-Through (GS-ST)估计器、Score Function估计器和Alternative Path估计器。在两种代表性系统（弛豫动力学和振荡动力学）中比较这些估计器的特性，其中振荡动力学需要估计时间依赖目标函数的梯度。
AI.result: GS-ST估计器在多数情况下能产生行为良好的梯度估计，但在具有挑战性的参数区域会表现出发散方差，导致参数推断失败。在这些情况下，其他估计器能提供更稳健、方差更低的梯度。振荡动力学系统需要估计时间依赖目标函数的梯度，这增加了复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 基于梯度的参数推断可以有效地与Gillespie随机模拟算法集成，不同估计器提供互补优势。研究结果为随机动力学模型的参数推断提供了实用的梯度估计方法选择指南。

title: Are VLMs Lost Between Sky and Space? LinkS$^2$Bench for UAV-Satellite Dynamic Cross-View Spatial Intelligence
summary: Synergistic spatial intelligence between UAVs and satellites is indispensable for emergency response and security operations, as it uniquely integrates macro-scale global coverage with dynamic, real-time local perception. However, the capacity of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to master this complex interplay remains largely unexplored. This gap persists primarily because existing benchmarks are confined to isolated Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) videos or static satellite imagery, failing to evaluate the dynamic local-to-global spatial mapping essential for comprehensive cross-view reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce LinkS$^2$Bench, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate VLMs' wide-area, dynamic cross-view spatial intelligence. LinkS$^2$Bench links 1,022 minutes of dynamic UAV footage with high-resolution satellite imagery covering over 200 km$^2$. Through an LMM-assisted pipeline and rigorous human annotation, we constructed 17.9k high-quality question-answer pairs comprising 12 fine-grained tasks across four dimensions: perception, localization, relation, and reasoning. Evaluations of 18 representative VLMs reveal a substantial gap compared to human baselines, identifying accurate cross-view dynamic alignment as the critical bottleneck. To alleviate this, we design a Cross-View Alignment Adapter, demonstrating that explicit alignment significantly improves model performance. Furthermore, fine-tuning experiments underscore the potential of LinkS$^2$Bench in advancing VLM adaptation for complex spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: LinkS²Bench：首个评估视觉语言模型在无人机-卫星协同空间智能方面的基准，包含17.9k高质量问答对，覆盖12个细粒度任务，揭示了现有模型在跨视图动态对齐上的显著差距。
AI.motivation: 无人机与卫星的协同空间智能对应急响应和安全操作至关重要，但现有基准局限于孤立的无人机视频或静态卫星图像，无法评估动态局部到全局的空间映射能力，视觉语言模型在此复杂交互中的能力尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 构建LinkS²Bench基准，将1022分钟动态无人机视频与覆盖200+ km²的高分辨率卫星图像链接；采用LMM辅助流水线和严格人工标注，创建17.9k高质量问答对，涵盖感知、定位、关系和推理四个维度的12个细粒度任务；设计Cross-View Alignment Adapter来改善跨视图对齐。
AI.result: 评估18个代表性VLM显示，与人类基线相比存在显著差距，准确跨视图动态对齐是关键瓶颈；Cross-View Alignment Adapter显著提升模型性能；微调实验证明LinkS²Bench在推进VLM适应复杂空间推理方面的潜力。
AI.conclusion: LinkS²Bench填补了评估VLM在宽域动态跨视图空间智能方面的空白，揭示了跨视图动态对齐的关键挑战，提出的对齐适配器有效改善性能，为推进VLM在复杂空间推理任务上的适应提供了重要基准。

title: Semantic Zone-Based Map Management for Stable AI-Integrated Mobile Robots
summary: Recent advances in large AI models (VLMs and LLMs) and joint use of the 3D dense maps, enable mobile robots to provide more powerful and interactive services grounded in rich spatial context. However, deploying both heavy AI models and dense maps on edge robots is challenging under strict memory budgets. When the memory budget is exceeded, required keyframes may not be loaded in time, which can degrade the stability of position estimation and interfering model performance. We proposes a semantic zone-based map management approach to stabilize dense-map utilization under memory constraints. We associate keyframes with semantic indoor regions (e.g., rooms and corridors) and keyframe management at the semantic zone level prioritizes spatially relevant map content while respecting memory constraints. This reduces keyframe loading and unloading frequency and memory usage. We evaluate the proposed approach in large-scale simulated indoor environments and on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano under concurrent SLAM-VLM execution. With Qwen3.5:0.8b, the proposed method improves throughput by 3.3 tokens/s and reduces latency by 21.7% relative to a geometric map-management strategy. Furthermore, while the geometric strategy suffers from out-of-memory failures and stalled execution under memory pressure, the proposed method eliminates both issues, preserving localization stability and enabling robust VLM operation. These results demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient dense map utilization for memory constrained, AI-integrated mobile robots. Code is available at: https://github.com/huichangs/rtabmap/tree/segment

AI.tldr: 提出基于语义区域的稠密地图管理方法，用于内存受限的移动机器人，通过语义区域级别的关键帧管理优化内存使用，提高SLAM-VLM系统的稳定性和性能。
AI.motivation: 在内存受限的边缘机器人上同时部署大型AI模型（VLMs/LLMs）和稠密地图具有挑战性。当内存预算超限时，关键帧无法及时加载，会降低定位稳定性并影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出语义区域地图管理方法：将关键帧与语义室内区域（如房间、走廊）关联，在语义区域级别进行关键帧管理，优先保留空间相关的地图内容，同时遵守内存约束。
AI.result: 在大型模拟室内环境和NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上评估，使用Qwen3.5:0.8b时，相比几何地图管理策略，吞吐量提高3.3 tokens/s，延迟降低21.7%。消除了内存溢出故障和执行停滞问题，保持了定位稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了内存受限AI集成移动机器人的高效稠密地图利用，通过语义区域管理减少关键帧加载/卸载频率和内存使用，确保定位稳定性和VLM稳健运行。

title: AA-SVD : Anchored and Adaptive SVD for Large Language Model Compression
summary: We introduce a fast low-rank factorization-based framework for compressing large language models that enables rapid compression of billion-parameter models without retraining. Unlike existing factorization-based approaches that optimize only on the original inputs, ignoring distribution shifts from upstream compression and thus propagating errors forward, or those that rely only on shifted inputs and risk drifting away from the original outputs, our approach accounts for both. Beyond individual layer compression, we further refine each transformer block end-to-end, minimizing block-level output distortion and allowing compressed layers to jointly compensate for accumulated errors. By anchoring each compressed layer to the original outputs while explicitly modeling input distribution shifts, our method finds a low-rank approximation that maintains functional equivalence with the original model. Experiments on large language models show that our method consistently outperforms existing SVD-based baselines across compression ratios, with the advantage becoming increasingly pronounced at aggressive compression budgets, where competing methods degrade substantially or collapse entirely, offering a practical solution for efficient, large-scale model deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于低秩分解的快速大语言模型压缩框架，通过同时考虑原始输入和压缩引起的分布偏移，实现无需重训练的快速压缩，并在端到端块级优化中减少累积误差。
AI.motivation: 现有基于分解的压缩方法存在两个主要问题：1) 仅优化原始输入，忽略上游压缩引起的分布偏移，导致误差传播；2) 仅依赖偏移输入，可能偏离原始输出。需要一种能同时考虑两者的方法，以在快速压缩中保持模型功能等效性。
AI.method: 提出双锚定低秩分解框架：1) 同时考虑原始输入和压缩引起的分布偏移；2) 将每个压缩层锚定到原始输出，同时显式建模输入分布偏移；3) 在单个层压缩基础上，对每个Transformer块进行端到端细化，最小化块级输出失真，使压缩层能联合补偿累积误差。
AI.result: 在大语言模型上的实验表明，该方法在多种压缩比下始终优于现有的SVD基线方法。在激进压缩预算下优势更加明显，此时竞争方法性能大幅下降或完全失效，为高效大规模模型部署提供了实用解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过同时锚定原始输出和建模输入分布偏移，找到了与原始模型保持功能等效的低秩近似，实现了无需重训练的快速大语言模型压缩，在激进压缩场景下表现出显著优势。

title: Decouple and Rectify: Semantics-Preserving Structural Enhancement for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation
summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation in the remote sensing (RS) field requires both language-aligned recognition and fine-grained spatial delineation. Although CLIP offers robust semantic generalization, its global-aligned visual representations inherently struggle to capture structural details. Recent methods attempt to compensate for this by introducing RS-pretrained DINO features. However, these methods treat CLIP representations as a monolithic semantic space and cannot localize where structural enhancement is required, failing to effectively delineate boundaries while risking the disruption of CLIP's semantic integrity. To address this limitation, we propose DR-Seg, a novel decouple-and-rectify framework in this paper. Our method is motivated by the key observation that CLIP feature channels exhibit distinct functional heterogeneity rather than forming a uniform semantic space. Building on this insight, DR-Seg decouples CLIP features into semantics-dominated and structure-dominated subspaces, enabling targeted structural enhancement by DINO without distorting language-aligned semantics. Subsequently, a prior-driven graph rectification module injects high-fidelity structural priors under DINO guidance to form a refined branch, while an uncertainty-guided adaptive fusion module dynamically integrates this refined branch with the original CLIP branch for final prediction. Comprehensive experiments across eight benchmarks demonstrate that DR-Seg establishes a new state-of-the-art.

AI.tldr: DR-Seg：一种用于遥感开放词汇语义分割的解耦与校正框架，通过分离CLIP特征为语义主导和结构主导子空间，在保持语言对齐语义的同时实现针对性结构增强。
AI.motivation: 遥感领域的开放词汇语义分割需要语言对齐识别和细粒度空间划分。尽管CLIP提供强大的语义泛化能力，但其全局对齐的视觉表示难以捕捉结构细节。现有方法引入RS预训练的DINO特征进行补偿，但将CLIP表示视为单一语义空间，无法定位需要结构增强的区域，导致边界划分效果不佳且可能破坏CLIP的语义完整性。
AI.method: 提出DR-Seg框架：1）基于CLIP特征通道功能异质性的观察，将CLIP特征解耦为语义主导和结构主导子空间；2）在DINO指导下进行针对性结构增强而不扭曲语言对齐语义；3）先验驱动的图校正模块在DINO指导下注入高保真结构先验形成精炼分支；4）不确定性引导的自适应融合模块动态集成精炼分支和原始CLIP分支进行最终预测。
AI.result: 在八个基准测试上的综合实验表明，DR-Seg建立了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: DR-Seg通过解耦CLIP特征并针对性增强结构，有效解决了遥感开放词汇语义分割中语言对齐与空间划分的平衡问题，实现了更好的边界划分效果同时保持了语义完整性。

title: GraSP-STL: A Graph-Based Framework for Zero-Shot Signal Temporal Logic Planning via Offline Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
summary: This paper studies offline, zero-shot planning under Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications. We assume access only to an offline dataset of state-action-state transitions collected by a task-agnostic behavior policy, with no analytical dynamics model, no further environment interaction, and no task-specific retraining. The objective is to synthesize a control strategy whose resulting trajectory satisfies an arbitrary unseen STL specification. To this end, we propose GraSP-STL, a graph-search-based framework for zero-shot STL planning from offline trajectories.
