The method learns a goal-conditioned value function from offline data and uses it to induce a finite-horizon reachability metric over the state space. Based on this metric, it constructs a directed graph abstraction whose nodes represent representative states and whose edges encode feasible short-horizon transitions. Planning is then formulated as a graph search over waypoint sequences, evaluated using arithmetic-geometric mean robustness and its interval semantics, and executed by a learned goal-conditioned policy. The proposed framework separates reusable reachability learning from task-conditioned planning, enabling zero-shot generalization to unseen STL tasks and long-horizon planning through the composition of short-horizon behaviors from offline data. Experimental results demonstrate its effectiveness on a range of offline STL planning tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出GraSP-STL框架，基于离线数据实现零样本STL规划，无需环境交互或任务特定训练
AI.motivation: 解决离线、零样本条件下满足STL规范的规划问题，仅使用任务无关行为策略收集的离线数据集，无需分析动力学模型、环境交互或任务特定重训练
AI.method: 提出GraSP-STL框架：1) 从离线数据学习目标条件值函数，导出有限时域可达性度量；2) 构建有向图抽象，节点代表代表性状态，边编码可行短时域转移；3) 将规划表述为路点序列的图搜索，使用算术几何平均鲁棒性及其区间语义评估；4) 通过学习的目标条件策略执行
AI.result: 实验结果表明该框架在一系列离线STL规划任务中有效，能够实现零样本泛化到未见STL任务，并通过离线数据中短时域行为的组合实现长时域规划
AI.conclusion: GraSP-STL框架成功分离了可重用的可达性学习与任务条件规划，实现了从离线轨迹进行零样本STL规划，无需环境交互或任务特定训练

title: ProDiG: Progressive Diffusion-Guided Gaussian Splatting for Aerial to Ground Reconstruction
summary: Generating ground-level views and coherent 3D site models from aerial-only imagery is challenging due to extreme viewpoint changes, missing intermediate observations, and large scale variations. Existing methods either refine renderings post-hoc, often producing geometrically inconsistent results, or rely on multi-altitude ground-truth, which is rarely available. Gaussian Splatting and diffusion-based refinements improve fidelity under small variations but fail under wide aerial-to-ground gaps. To address these limitations, we introduce ProDiG (Progressive Altitude Gaussian Splatting), a diffusion-guided framework that progressively transforms aerial 3D representations toward ground-level fidelity. ProDiG synthesizes intermediate-altitude views and refines the Gaussian representation at each stage using a geometry-aware causal attention module that injects epipolar structure into reference-view diffusion. A distance-adaptive Gaussian module dynamically adjusts Gaussian scale and opacity based on camera distance, ensuring stable reconstruction across large viewpoint gaps. Together, these components enable progressive, geometrically grounded refinement without requiring additional ground-truth viewpoints. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that ProDiG produces visually realistic ground-level renderings and coherent 3D geometry, significantly outperforming existing approaches in terms of visual quality, geometric consistency, and robustness to extreme viewpoint changes.

AI.tldr: ProDiG：一种渐进式扩散引导框架，通过多阶段几何感知扩散和距离自适应高斯模块，从仅有的航拍图像生成逼真的地面级视图和一致的3D场景模型，无需地面真值数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在从仅有的航拍图像生成地面级视图和一致的3D场景模型时面临挑战：极端视角变化、中间观测缺失和大尺度变化导致几何不一致；现有方法要么后处理渲染结果几何不一致，要么依赖多高度地面真值数据（通常不可得）；高斯泼溅和基于扩散的细化方法在小视角变化下有效，但在大航拍-地面视角差距下失效。
AI.method: 提出ProDiG（渐进式高度高斯泼溅）框架：1）渐进式将航拍3D表示向地面级保真度转换，合成中间高度视图；2）几何感知因果注意力模块：在参考视图扩散中注入极线结构，细化每个阶段的高斯表示；3）距离自适应高斯模块：根据相机距离动态调整高斯尺度和不透明度，确保大视角差距下的稳定重建。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明：ProDiG能生成视觉逼真的地面级渲染和一致的3D几何；在视觉质量、几何一致性和对极端视角变化的鲁棒性方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ProDiG通过渐进式扩散引导框架，无需额外地面真值视点，实现了几何基础的渐进细化，成功解决了从仅有航拍图像生成地面级视图和一致3D场景模型的挑战。

title: Communication Outage-Resistant UUV State Estimation: A Variational History Distillation Approach
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures. Accepted for publication in 2026 IEEE/OES OCEANS Sanya. \c{opyright} 2026 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. See PDF for the full IEEE copyright notice
summary: The reliable operation of Unmanned Underwater Vehicle (UUV) clusters is highly dependent on continuous acoustic communication. However, this communication method is highly susceptible to intermittent interruptions. When communication outages occur, standard state estimators such as the Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF) will be forced to make open-loop predictions. If the environment contains unmodeled dynamic factors, such as unknown ocean currents, this estimation error will grow rapidly, which may eventually lead to mission failure. To address this critical issue, this paper proposes a Variational History Distillation (VHD) approach. VHD regards trajectory prediction as an approximate Bayesian reasoning process, which links a standard motion model based on physics with a pattern extracted directly from the past trajectory of the UUV. This is achieved by synthesizing ``virtual measurements'' distilled from historical trajectories. Recognizing that the reliability of extrapolated historical trends degrades over extended prediction horizons, an adaptive confidence mechanism is introduced. This mechanism allows the filter to gradually reduce the trust of virtual measurements as the communication outage time is extended. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations in a high-fidelity environment demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a 91% reduction in prediction Root Mean Square Error (RMSE), reducing the error from approximately 170 m to 15 m during a 40-second communication outage. These results demonstrate that VHD can maintain robust state estimation performance even under complete communication loss.

AI.tldr: 提出变分历史蒸馏方法，通过从历史轨迹中提取模式并合成虚拟测量，在UUV集群通信中断时维持鲁棒的状态估计，将40秒中断期间的预测误差从170米降至15米。
AI.motivation: UUV集群依赖连续声学通信，但该通信方式易受间歇中断影响。通信中断时，标准状态估计器（如UKF）被迫进行开环预测，若环境中存在未建模动态因素（如未知洋流），估计误差会迅速增长，可能导致任务失败。
AI.method: 提出变分历史蒸馏方法，将轨迹预测视为近似贝叶斯推理过程，将基于物理的标准运动模型与直接从UUV历史轨迹中提取的模式相结合。通过从历史轨迹中蒸馏出"虚拟测量"来实现。引入自适应置信机制，随着通信中断时间延长，逐渐降低对虚拟测量的信任度。
AI.result: 在高保真环境中的大量蒙特卡洛模拟表明，该方法在40秒通信中断期间将预测均方根误差从约170米降至15米，实现了91%的误差减少。即使在完全通信丢失情况下，VHD也能维持鲁棒的状态估计性能。
AI.conclusion: VHD方法通过结合物理模型和历史模式，在UUV通信中断时显著提高了状态估计的鲁棒性，自适应置信机制确保了长期预测的可靠性，为解决通信中断下的UUV状态估计问题提供了有效方案。

title: Prosodic ABX: A Language-Agnostic Method for Measuring Prosodic Contrast in Speech Representations
summary: Speech representations from self-supervised speech models (S3Ms) are known to be sensitive to phonemic contrasts, but their sensitivity to prosodic contrasts has not been directly measured. The ABX discrimination task has been used to measure phonemic contrast in S3M representations via minimal pairs. We introduce prosodic ABX, an extension of this framework to evaluate prosodic contrast with only a handful of examples and no explicit labels. Also, we build and release a dataset of English and Japanese minimal pairs and use it along with a Mandarin dataset to evaluate contrast in English stress, Japanese pitch accent, and Mandarin tone. Finally, we show that model and layer rankings are often preserved across several experimental conditions, making it practical for low-resource settings.

AI.tldr: 提出prosodic ABX框架，扩展ABX判别任务来评估自监督语音模型中韵律对比的敏感性，无需显式标签
AI.motivation: 自监督语音模型表示已知对音位对比敏感，但其对韵律对比的敏感性尚未直接测量。需要一种无需大量数据或显式标签的方法来评估韵律对比敏感性
AI.method: 1. 提出prosodic ABX框架，扩展ABX判别任务来评估韵律对比；2. 构建并发布英语和日语最小对数据集；3. 使用该数据集和现有普通话数据集评估英语重音、日语音高重音和普通话声调的对比敏感性；4. 分析模型和层级排名在不同实验条件下的稳定性
AI.result: 1. 成功评估了自监督语音模型表示对英语重音、日语音高重音和普通话声调的敏感性；2. 发现模型和层级排名在多种实验条件下通常保持稳定，使其适用于低资源场景
AI.conclusion: prosodic ABX框架能够有效评估自监督语音模型表示中的韵律对比敏感性，且评估结果在低资源设置下具有实用性，因为模型和层级排名在不同条件下保持稳定

title: Resonance4D: Frequency-Domain Motion Supervision for Preset-Free Physical Parameter Learning in 4D Dynamic Physical Scene Simulation
summary: Physics-driven 4D dynamic simulation from static 3D scenes remains constrained by an overlooked contradiction: reliable motion supervision often relies on online video diffusion or optical-flow pipelines whose computational cost exceeds that of the simulator itself. Existing methods further simplify inverse physical modeling by optimizing only partial material parameters, limiting realism in scenes with complex materials and dynamics. We present Resonance4D, a physics-driven 4D dynamic simulation framework that couples 3D Gaussian Splatting with the Material Point Method through lightweight yet physically expressive supervision. Our key insight is that dynamic consistency can be enforced without dense temporal generation by jointly constraining motion in complementary domains. To this end, we introduce Dual-domain Motion Supervision (DMS), which combines spatial structural consistency for local deformation with frequency-domain spectral consistency for oscillatory and global dynamic patterns, substantially reducing training cost and memory overhead while preserving physically meaningful motion cues. To enable stable full-parameter physical recovery, we further combine zero-shot text-prompted segmentation with simulation-guided initialization to automatically decompose Gaussians into object-part-level regions and support joint optimization of full material parameters. Experiments on both synthetic and real scenes show that Resonance4D achieves strong physical fidelity and motion consistency while reducing peak GPU memory from over 35\,GB to around 20\,GB, enabling high-fidelity physics-driven 4D simulation on a single consumer-grade GPU.

AI.tldr: Resonance4D：基于物理的4D动态模拟框架，通过双域运动监督和全参数物理恢复，在单消费级GPU上实现高保真4D模拟
AI.motivation: 现有物理驱动的4D动态模拟方法存在两个主要问题：1）运动监督依赖计算成本高的在线视频扩散或光流管道，成本超过模拟器本身；2）仅优化部分材料参数限制了复杂材料和动态场景的真实性
AI.method: 提出Resonance4D框架，将3D高斯泼溅与物质点法耦合，通过轻量级物理表达监督实现。核心创新包括：1）双域运动监督（DMS），结合空间结构一致性（局部变形）和频域谱一致性（振荡和全局动态模式）；2）零样本文本提示分割与模拟引导初始化，自动将高斯分解为对象部件级区域，支持全材料参数联合优化
AI.result: 在合成和真实场景实验中，Resonance4D实现了强物理保真度和运动一致性，同时将峰值GPU内存从超过35GB降低到约20GB，使高保真物理驱动4D模拟能在单消费级GPU上运行
AI.conclusion: Resonance4D通过创新的双域运动监督和全参数物理恢复方法，解决了现有4D动态模拟的计算成本和物理真实性限制，为高保真物理驱动4D模拟提供了高效实用的解决方案

title: CReF: Cross-modal and Recurrent Fusion for Depth-conditioned Humanoid Locomotion
summary: Stable traversal over geometrically complex terrain increasingly requires exteroceptive perception, yet prior perceptive humanoid locomotion methods often remain tied to explicit geometric abstractions, either by mediating control through robot-centric 2.5D terrain representations or by shaping depth learning with auxiliary geometry-related targets. Such designs inherit the representational bias of the intermediate or supervisory target and can be restrictive for vertical structures, perforated obstacles, and complex real-world clutter. We propose CReF (Cross-modal and Recurrent Fusion), a single-stage depth-conditioned humanoid locomotion framework that learns locomotion-relevant features directly from raw forward-facing depth without explicit geometric intermediates. CReF couples proprioception and depth tokens through proprioception-queried cross-modal attention, fuses the resulting representation with a gated residual fusion block, and performs temporal integration with a Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) regulated by a highway-style output gate for state-dependent blending of recurrent and feedforward features. To further improve terrain interaction, we introduce a terrain-aware foothold placement reward that extracts supportable foothold candidates from foot-end point-cloud samples and rewards touchdown locations that lie close to the nearest supportable candidate. Experiments in simulation and on a physical humanoid demonstrate robust traversal over diverse terrains and effective zero-shot transfer to real-world scenes containing handrails, hollow pallet assemblies, severe reflective interference, and visually cluttered outdoor surroundings.

AI.tldr: CReF：一种单阶段深度条件人形机器人运动框架，通过跨模态注意力直接学习原始深度图像的运动相关特征，无需显式几何中间表示，实现复杂地形下的鲁棒穿越。
AI.motivation: 现有感知人形机器人运动方法通常依赖于显式几何抽象（如机器人中心2.5D地形表示或几何相关监督目标），这些方法存在表示偏差，在处理垂直结构、穿孔障碍和复杂真实世界杂乱环境时受限。
AI.method: 提出CReF框架：1）通过本体感觉查询的跨模态注意力耦合本体感觉和深度token；2）使用门控残差融合块融合表示；3）采用GRU进行时间集成，并通过高速公路式输出门实现状态依赖的循环和前馈特征混合；4）引入地形感知落脚点放置奖励，从足端点云样本中提取可支撑落脚点候选。
AI.result: 在仿真和物理人形机器人上的实验表明，CReF能够鲁棒地穿越多样地形，并有效实现零样本迁移到包含扶手、空心托盘组件、严重反射干扰和视觉杂乱户外环境的真实场景。
AI.conclusion: CReF通过直接学习原始深度图像的运动相关特征，避免了显式几何中间表示的局限性，实现了对复杂几何地形（包括垂直结构、穿孔障碍等）的鲁棒穿越，展示了在真实世界杂乱环境中的有效零样本迁移能力。

title: Attention at Rest Stays at Rest: Breaking Visual Inertia for Cognitive Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Like a body at rest that stays at rest, we find that visual attention in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibits pronounced inertia, remaining largely static once settled during early decoding steps and failing to support the compositional understanding required for cognitive inference. While existing hallucination mitigation methods mainly target perceptual hallucinations concerning object existence or attributes, they remain inadequate for such cognitive hallucinations that require inter-object relational deduction. Through token-wise attention analysis, we identify this visual inertia as a key factor: attention to semantically critical regions remains persistently focused and fails to dynamically support relational inference. We thereby propose a training-free Inertia-aware Visual Excitation (IVE) method that breaks this inertial pattern by modeling cognitive inference as the dynamic responsiveness of visual attention. Specifically, IVE selects visual tokens that are dynamically emerging relative to historical attention trends while distinguishing tokens exhibiting inertial behavior. To further facilitate compositional inference, IVE introduces an inertia-aware penalty that discourages over-concentration and limits the persistence of attention within localized regions. Extensive experiments show that IVE is effective across various base MLLMs and multiple hallucination benchmarks, particularly for cognitive hallucinations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出IVE方法解决多模态大语言模型中视觉注意力的惯性问题，该惯性导致模型难以进行组合推理和认知推断。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型中的视觉注意力表现出明显的惯性现象：一旦在早期解码步骤中稳定后，注意力基本保持静态，无法支持认知推断所需的组合理解。现有幻觉缓解方法主要针对感知幻觉，但对需要对象间关系推理的认知幻觉效果有限。
AI.method: 提出无需训练的惯性感知视觉激发方法，通过建模认知推断为视觉注意力的动态响应来打破惯性模式。IVE选择相对于历史注意力趋势动态出现的视觉标记，同时区分表现出惯性行为的标记。为促进组合推理，引入惯性感知惩罚机制，防止注意力过度集中和局部区域的持续关注。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，IVE在各种基础多模态大语言模型和多个幻觉基准测试中均有效，特别是在认知幻觉方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 视觉注意力惯性是多模态大语言模型中认知幻觉的关键因素，IVE方法通过打破这种惯性模式，有效提升了模型对组合推理和关系推断的能力。

title: RAAP: Retrieval-Augmented Affordance Prediction with Cross-Image Action Alignment
summary: Understanding object affordances is essential for enabling robots to perform purposeful and fine-grained interactions in diverse and unstructured environments. However, existing approaches either rely on retrieval, which is fragile due to sparsity and coverage gaps, or on large-scale models, which frequently mislocalize contact points and mispredict post-contact actions when applied to unseen categories, thereby hindering robust generalization. We introduce Retrieval-Augmented Affordance Prediction (RAAP), a framework that unifies affordance retrieval with alignment-based learning. By decoupling static contact localization and dynamic action direction, RAAP transfers contact points via dense correspondence and predicts action directions through a retrieval-augmented alignment model that consolidates multiple references with dual-weighted attention. Trained on compact subsets of DROID and HOI4D with as few as tens of samples per task, RAAP achieves consistent performance across unseen objects and categories, and enables zero-shot robotic manipulation in both simulation and the real world. Project website: https://github.com/SEU-VIPGroup/RAAP.

AI.tldr: RAAP框架通过检索增强的对应学习，将静态接触点定位与动态动作方向解耦，实现跨类别零样本泛化的物体可操作性预测
AI.motivation: 现有物体可操作性预测方法存在局限性：基于检索的方法因稀疏性和覆盖不足而脆弱；基于大规模模型的方法在未见类别上经常错误定位接触点并误预测接触后动作，阻碍了鲁棒泛化
AI.method: 提出检索增强可操作性预测(RAAP)框架，统一检索与基于对齐的学习。通过解耦静态接触定位和动态动作方向，RAAP通过密集对应传递接触点，并通过检索增强对齐模型预测动作方向，该模型使用双重加权注意力整合多个参考
AI.result: 在DROID和HOI4D的紧凑子集上训练（每个任务仅需数十个样本），RAAP在未见物体和类别上实现了一致的性能，并在仿真和现实世界中实现了零样本机器人操作
AI.conclusion: RAAP通过结合检索的鲁棒性和对齐学习的泛化能力，解决了现有方法的局限性，实现了跨类别的零样本可操作性预测和机器人操作

title: Curia-2: Scaling Self-Supervised Learning for Radiology Foundation Models
summary: The rapid growth of medical imaging has fueled the development of Foundation Models (FMs) to reduce the growing, unsustainable workload on radiologists. While recent FMs have shown the power of large-scale pre-training to CT and MRI analysis, there remains significant room to optimize how these models learn from complex radiological volumes. Building upon the Curia framework, this work introduces Curia-2, which significantly improves the original pre-training strategy and representation quality to better capture the specificities of radiological data. The proposed methodology enables scaling the architecture up to billion-parameter Vision Transformers, marking a first for multi-modal CT and MRI FMs. Furthermore, we formalize the evaluation of these models by extending and restructuring CuriaBench into two distinct tracks: a 2D track tailored for slice-based vision models and a 3D track for volumetric benchmarking. Our results demonstrate that Curia-2 outperforms all FMs on vision-focused tasks and fairs competitively to vision-language models on clinically complex tasks such as finding detection. Weights will be made publicly available to foster further research.

AI.tldr: Curia-2是一个用于CT和MRI分析的十亿参数基础模型，通过改进预训练策略和表示质量，在2D和3D基准测试中优于现有视觉基础模型
AI.motivation: 医学影像快速增长导致放射科医生工作量不可持续，需要开发基础模型来减轻负担。现有基础模型在CT和MRI分析方面仍有优化空间，特别是在从复杂放射学体积数据中学习方面
AI.method: 基于Curia框架，改进预训练策略和表示质量，扩展架构至十亿参数视觉变换器，创建CuriaBench评估框架的2D切片和3D体积两个独立评估轨道
AI.result: Curia-2在视觉任务上优于所有基础模型，在临床复杂任务（如病灶检测）上与视觉语言模型表现相当，权重将公开以促进研究
AI.conclusion: Curia-2通过优化的预训练策略和十亿参数架构，显著提升了放射学基础模型的性能，为医学影像分析提供了更强大的工具

title: Native-Domain Cross-Attention for Camera-LiDAR Extrinsic Calibration Under Large Initial Perturbations
summary: Accurate camera-LiDAR fusion relies on precise extrinsic calibration, which fundamentally depends on establishing reliable cross-modal correspondences under potentially large misalignments. Existing learning-based methods typically project LiDAR points into depth maps for feature fusion, which distorts 3D geometry and degrades performance when the extrinsic initialization is far from the ground truth. To address this issue, we propose an extrinsic-aware cross-attention framework that directly aligns image patches and LiDAR point groups in their native domains. The proposed attention mechanism explicitly injects extrinsic parameter hypotheses into the correspondence modeling process, enabling geometry-consistent cross-modal interaction without relying on projected 2D depth maps. Extensive experiments on the KITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both accuracy and robustness. Under large extrinsic perturbations, our approach achieves accurate calibration in 88% of KITTI cases and 99% of nuScenes cases, substantially surpassing the second-best baseline. We have open sourced our code on https://github.com/gitouni/ProjFusion to benefit the community.

AI.tldr: 提出一种外参感知的跨模态注意力框架，直接在图像块和LiDAR点群的原生域中进行对齐，避免投影导致的几何失真，显著提升大外参扰动下的标定精度和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的方法通常将LiDAR点投影到深度图进行特征融合，这会扭曲3D几何结构，当外参初始化远离真实值时性能会下降。需要一种能够直接处理原生模态数据、对外参扰动更鲁棒的标定方法。
AI.method: 提出外参感知的跨注意力框架，将外参假设参数显式注入到对应关系建模过程中。该方法直接在图像块和LiDAR点群之间建立几何一致的跨模态交互，无需依赖投影的2D深度图。
AI.result: 在KITTI和nuScenes基准测试中，该方法在精度和鲁棒性上均优于现有最优方法。在大外参扰动下，在KITTI上达到88%的准确标定率，在nuScenes上达到99%的准确标定率，显著超越次优基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的外参感知跨注意力框架通过直接在原生域中进行跨模态对齐，避免了投影带来的几何失真，实现了更准确和鲁棒的相机-LiDAR外参标定，特别是在大外参扰动情况下表现优异。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Speculative Trading under Exploratory Framework
summary: We study a speculative trading problem within the exploratory reinforcement learning (RL) framework of Wang et al. [2020]. The problem is formulated as a sequential optimal stopping problem over entry and exit times under general utility function and price process. We first consider a relaxed version of the problem in which the stopping times are modeled by the jump times of Cox processes driven by bounded, non-randomized intensity controls. Under the exploratory formulation, the agent's randomized control is characterized via the probability measure over the jump intensities, and their objective function is regularized by Shannon's differential entropy. This yields a system of the exploratory HJB equations and Gibbs distributions in closed-form as the optimal policy. Error estimates and convergence of the RL objective to the value function of the original problem are established. Finally, an RL algorithm is designed, and its implementation is showcased in a pairs-trading application.

AI.tldr: 论文研究探索性强化学习框架下的投机交易问题，通过随机化控制和熵正则化求解最优进入退出时机，并设计了RL算法应用于配对交易
AI.motivation: 研究投机交易中的最优进入退出时机选择问题，传统方法难以处理复杂价格过程和一般效用函数，探索性强化学习框架提供了一种新的解决方案
AI.method: 将投机交易问题建模为顺序最优停止问题，采用探索性RL框架，将停止时间建模为Cox过程的跳跃时间，使用有界非随机强度控制，通过概率测度表征随机化控制，并引入香农微分熵进行正则化
AI.result: 推导出探索性HJB方程和闭式Gibbs分布作为最优策略，建立了误差估计和RL目标函数向原问题值函数的收敛性，设计了RL算法并在配对交易应用中展示实现
AI.conclusion: 探索性强化学习框架为投机交易中的最优时机选择问题提供了有效的解决方案，通过随机化控制和熵正则化获得了闭式最优策略，并在实际应用中验证了算法的可行性

title: Interactive Tracking: A Human-in-the-Loop Paradigm with Memory-Augmented Adaptation
summary: Existing visual trackers mainly operate in a non-interactive, fire-and-forget manner, making them impractical for real-world scenarios that require human-in-the-loop adaptation. To overcome this limitation, we introduce Interactive Tracking, a new paradigm that allows users to guide the tracker at any time using natural language commands. To support research in this direction, we make three main contributions. First, we present InteractTrack, the first large-scale benchmark for interactive tracking, containing 150 videos with dense bounding box annotations and timestamped language instructions. Second, we propose a comprehensive evaluation protocol and evaluate 25 representative trackers, showing that state-of-the-art methods fail in interactive scenarios; strong performance on conventional benchmarks does not transfer. Third, we introduce Interactive Memory-Augmented Tracking (IMAT), a new baseline that employs a dynamic memory mechanism to learn from user feedback and update tracking behavior accordingly. Our benchmark, protocol, and baseline establish a foundation for developing more intelligent, adaptive, and collaborative tracking systems, bridging the gap between automated perception and human guidance. The full benchmark, tracking results, and analysis are available at https://github.com/NorahGreen/InteractTrack.git.

AI.tldr: 提出交互式跟踪新范式，允许用户通过自然语言指令实时指导跟踪器，并建立首个大规模交互式跟踪基准InteractTrack
AI.motivation: 现有视觉跟踪器主要工作在非交互式、发射后不管的模式，无法适应需要人在回路调整的真实场景，因此需要开发能够接受人类指导的交互式跟踪系统
AI.method: 1) 创建InteractTrack基准，包含150个视频、密集边界框标注和时间戳语言指令；2) 提出评估协议并测试25个代表性跟踪器；3) 提出交互式记忆增强跟踪(IMAT)基线方法，采用动态记忆机制从用户反馈中学习并更新跟踪行为
AI.result: 评估显示现有最先进方法在交互场景中失败，传统基准上的强性能无法迁移；IMAT作为新基线为交互式跟踪提供了可行方案
AI.conclusion: 该工作为开发更智能、自适应和协作的跟踪系统奠定了基础，弥合了自动感知与人类指导之间的差距，推动了交互式跟踪研究

title: CLaD: Planning with Grounded Foresight via Cross-Modal Latent Dynamics
summary: Robotic manipulation involves kinematic and semantic transitions that are inherently coupled via underlying actions. However, existing approaches plan within either semantic or latent space without explicitly aligning these cross-modal transitions. To address this, we propose CLaD, a framework that models how proprioceptive and semantic states jointly evolve under actions through asymmetric cross-attention that allows kinematic transitions to query semantic ones. CLaD predicts grounded latent foresights via self-supervised objectives with EMA target encoders and auxiliary reconstruction losses, preventing representation collapse while anchoring predictions to observable states. Predicted foresights are modulated with observations to condition a diffusion policy for action generation. On LIBERO-LONG benchmark, CLaD achieves 94.7\% success rate, competitive with large VLAs with significantly fewer parameters.

AI.tldr: CLaD框架通过非对称交叉注意力建模本体感知和语义状态在动作下的联合演化，使用自监督目标和EMA编码器预测基础潜在前瞻，并调制扩散策略生成动作，在LIBERO-LONG基准上达到94.7%成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在语义空间或潜在空间中规划，但未显式对齐跨模态（本体感知和语义）的过渡。机器人操作涉及通过底层动作耦合的动觉和语义过渡，需要建模这些跨模态状态的联合演化。
AI.method: 提出CLaD框架：1）使用非对称交叉注意力让动觉过渡查询语义过渡，建模状态联合演化；2）通过自监督目标、EMA目标编码器和辅助重建损失预测基础潜在前瞻，防止表示崩溃；3）用观测调制预测的前瞻，条件化扩散策略生成动作。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-LONG基准上达到94.7%的成功率，与参数量大得多的视觉语言动作模型（VLA）性能相当，但参数显著减少。
AI.conclusion: CLaD通过显式对齐跨模态过渡，有效建模了机器人操作中动觉和语义状态的联合演化，实现了高效且性能优越的操作策略。

title: The Self Driving Portfolio: Agentic Architecture for Institutional Asset Management
summary: Agentic AI shifts the investor's role from analytical execution to oversight. We present an agentic strategic asset allocation pipeline in which approximately 50 specialized agents produce capital market assumptions, construct portfolios using over 20 competing methods, and critique and vote on each other's output. A researcher agent proposes new portfolio construction methods not yet represented, and a meta-agent compares past forecasts against realized returns and rewrites agent code and prompts to improve future performance. The entire pipeline is governed by the Investment Policy Statement--the same document that guides human portfolio managers can now constrain and direct autonomous agents.

AI.tldr: 提出一个由约50个专业智能体组成的资产配置管道，将投资者角色从分析执行转变为监督，智能体生成市场假设、构建投资组合并相互评审投票，通过元智能体持续改进性能。
AI.motivation: 将投资者角色从传统的分析执行转变为监督，通过智能体系统实现更高效、全面的战略资产配置，同时保持与人类投资经理相同的投资政策声明约束。
AI.method: 构建包含约50个专业智能体的管道：1）生成资本市场假设；2）使用20多种竞争方法构建投资组合；3）相互评审和投票；4）研究智能体提出新方法；5）元智能体比较预测与实际回报，重写智能体代码和提示以改进性能；6）整个管道受投资政策声明约束。
AI.result: 成功实现了由智能体主导的战略资产配置管道，将投资者角色转变为监督者，智能体能够自主生成假设、构建组合、相互评审，并通过元智能体持续学习和改进。
AI.conclusion: 智能体AI能够有效转变投资管理范式，通过多智能体协作和持续改进机制，在投资政策声明的约束下实现自主的战略资产配置，为投资管理提供了新的自动化解决方案。

title: Learning Semantic Priorities for Autonomous Target Search
summary: The use of semantic features can improve the efficiency of target search in unknown environments for robotic search and rescue missions. Current target search methods rely on training with large datasets of similar domains, which limits the adaptability to diverse environments. However, human experts possess high-level knowledge about semantic relationships necessary to effectively guide a robot during target search missions in diverse and previously unseen environments. In this paper, we propose a target search method that leverages expert input to train a model of semantic priorities. By employing the learned priorities in a frontier exploration planner using combinatorial optimization, our approach achieves efficient target search driven by semantic features while ensuring robustness and complete coverage. The proposed semantic priority model is trained with several synthetic datasets of simulated expert guidance for target search. Simulation tests in previously unseen environments show that our method consistently achieves faster target recovery than a coverage-driven exploration planner.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用专家输入训练语义优先级模型的目标搜索方法，通过组合优化在边界探索规划器中使用学习到的优先级，实现基于语义特征的高效目标搜索
AI.motivation: 当前目标搜索方法依赖相似领域的大数据集训练，限制了在多样化环境中的适应性。人类专家拥有关于语义关系的高层知识，可以有效指导机器人在多样化、未见过的环境中进行目标搜索
AI.method: 提出目标搜索方法，利用专家输入训练语义优先级模型，将学习到的优先级应用于使用组合优化的边界探索规划器，通过模拟专家指导的合成数据集训练语义优先级模型
AI.result: 在未见过的环境中进行仿真测试，该方法相比覆盖驱动探索规划器能持续实现更快的目标恢复
AI.conclusion: 通过利用专家知识训练语义优先级模型，结合组合优化的边界探索规划器，可以实现基于语义特征的高效目标搜索，同时确保鲁棒性和完全覆盖

title: SDesc3D: Towards Layout-Aware 3D Indoor Scene Generation from Short Descriptions
summary: 3D indoor scene generation conditioned on short textual descriptions provides a promising avenue for interactive 3D environment construction without the need for labor-intensive layout specification. Despite recent progress in text-conditioned 3D scene generation, existing works suffer from poor physical plausibility and insufficient detail richness in such semantic condensation cases, largely due to their reliance on explicit semantic cues about compositional objects and their spatial relationships. This limitation highlights the need for enhanced 3D reasoning capabilities, particularly in terms of prior integration and spatial anchoring. Motivated by this, we propose SDesc3D, a short-text conditioned 3D indoor scene generation framework, that leverages multi-view structural priors and regional functionality implications to enable 3D layout reasoning under sparse textual guidance. Specifically, we introduce a Multi-view scene prior augmentation that enriches underspecified textual inputs with aggregated multi-view structural knowledge, shifting from inaccessible semantic relation cues to multi-view relational prior aggregation. Building on this, we design a Functionality-aware layout grounding, employing regional functionality grounding for implicit spatial anchors and conducting hierarchical layout reasoning to enhance scene organization and semantic plausibility. Furthermore, an Iterative reflection-rectification scheme is employed for progressive structural plausibility refinement via self-rectification. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms existing approaches on short-text conditioned 3D indoor scene generation. Code will be publicly available.

AI.tldr: SDesc3D：基于短文本描述的3D室内场景生成框架，通过多视角结构先验和区域功能感知提升稀疏文本条件下的3D布局推理能力
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本的3D场景生成方法在短文本条件下存在物理合理性差和细节丰富度不足的问题，主要因为它们过度依赖明确的组合对象语义关系，需要增强3D推理能力，特别是先验整合和空间锚定能力
AI.method: 提出SDesc3D框架：1）多视角场景先验增强：通过聚合多视角结构知识丰富欠指定的文本输入；2）功能感知布局定位：利用区域功能定位作为隐式空间锚点，进行分层布局推理；3）迭代反射-修正方案：通过自修正进行渐进式结构合理性优化
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在短文本条件下的3D室内场景生成任务上优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: SDesc3D通过整合多视角结构先验和区域功能感知，有效提升了稀疏文本条件下的3D场景生成质量，解决了物理合理性和细节丰富度不足的问题

title: Interacting Multiple Model Proprioceptive Odometry for Legged Robots
summary: State estimation for legged robots remains challenging because legged odometry generally suffers from limited observability and therefore depends critically on measurement constraints to suppress drift. When exteroceptive sensors are unreliable or degraded, such constraints are mainly derived from proprioceptive measurements, particularly contact-related leg kinematics information. However, most existing proprioceptive odometry methods rely on an idealized point-contact assumption, which is often violated during real locomotion. Consequently, the effectiveness of proprioceptive constraints may be significantly reduced, resulting in degraded estimation accuracy. To address these limitations, we propose an interacting multiple model (IMM)-based proprioceptive odometry framework for legged robots. By incorporating multiple contact hypotheses within a unified probabilistic framework, the proposed method enables online mode switching and probabilistic fusion under varying contact conditions. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior pose estimation accuracy over state-of-the-art methods while maintaining comparable computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出基于交互多模型(IMM)的足式机器人本体感知里程计框架，通过多接触假设解决传统点接触假设在实际运动中的局限性
AI.motivation: 足式机器人状态估计面临挑战：足式里程计可观测性有限，依赖测量约束抑制漂移。当外部感知传感器不可靠时，主要依赖本体感知测量，特别是接触相关的腿部运动学信息。但现有方法大多基于理想化的点接触假设，在实际运动中常被违反，导致约束效果降低，估计精度下降
AI.method: 提出基于交互多模型(IMM)的本体感知里程计框架，在统一概率框架内整合多个接触假设，实现在线模式切换和变接触条件下的概率融合
AI.result: 大量仿真和真实世界实验表明，该方法在保持可比计算效率的同时，实现了优于最先进方法的姿态估计精度
AI.conclusion: IMM框架有效解决了足式机器人本体感知里程计中接触假设的理想化问题，通过多接触假设的概率融合显著提升了姿态估计精度

title: Feature Weighting Improves Pool-Based Sequential Active Learning for Regression
summary: Pool-based sequential active learning for regression (ALR) optimally selects a small number of samples sequentially from a large pool of unlabeled samples to label, so that a more accurate regression model can be constructed under a given labeling budget. Representativeness and diversity, which involve computing the distances among different samples, are important considerations in ALR. However, previous ALR approaches do not incorporate the importance of different features in inter-sample distance computation, resulting in sub-optimal sample selection. This paper proposes three feature weighted single-task ALR approaches and two feature weighted multi-task ALR approaches, where the ridge regression coefficients trained from a small amount of previously labeled samples are used to weight the corresponding features in inter-sample distance computation. Experiments showed that this easy-to-implement enhancement almost always improves the performance of four existing ALR approaches, in both single-task and multi-task regression problems. The feature weighting strategy may also be easily extended to stream-based ALR, and classification algorithms.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于特征加权的主动学习回归方法，通过使用岭回归系数对特征进行加权，改进了样本间距离计算，从而提升了主动学习回归的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的主动学习回归方法在计算样本间距离时没有考虑不同特征的重要性，导致样本选择不够优化。现有方法在代表性和多样性考虑中忽略了特征权重的影响。
AI.method: 提出了三种特征加权的单任务主动学习回归方法和两种特征加权的多任务主动学习回归方法。使用从少量已标记样本训练的岭回归系数来加权相应特征，改进样本间距离计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，这种易于实现的增强方法几乎总是能提升四种现有主动学习回归方法的性能，在单任务和多任务回归问题中都有效。
AI.conclusion: 特征加权策略能有效改进主动学习回归的性能，且该方法易于实现，还可扩展到流式主动学习和分类算法中。

title: Industrial-Grade Robust Robot Vision for Screw Detection and Removal under Uneven Conditions
summary: As the amount of used home appliances is expected to increase despite the decreasing labor force in Japan, there is a need to automate disassembling processes at recycling plants. The automation of disassembling air conditioner outdoor units, however, remains a challenge due to unit size variations and exposure to dirt and rust. To address these challenges, this study proposes an automated system that integrates a task-specific two-stage detection method and a lattice-based local calibration strategy. This approach achieved a screw detection recall of 99.8% despite severe degradation and ensured a manipulation accuracy of +/-0.75 mm without pre-programmed coordinates. In real-world validation with 120 units, the system attained a disassembly success rate of 78.3% and an average cycle time of 193 seconds, confirming its feasibility for industrial application.

AI.tldr: 提出自动化拆卸空调室外单元的系统，结合两阶段检测和局部校准策略，实现高精度螺丝检测和操作，在真实测试中达到78.3%拆卸成功率。
AI.motivation: 日本劳动力减少而废旧家电数量增加，需要自动化回收流程。空调室外单元拆卸自动化面临挑战：尺寸变化、污垢和锈蚀影响。
AI.method: 集成任务特定的两阶段检测方法和基于网格的局部校准策略，无需预编程坐标即可实现高精度操作。
AI.result: 螺丝检测召回率达99.8%（即使在严重退化情况下），操作精度±0.75mm。在120个单元的真实测试中，拆卸成功率78.3%，平均周期时间193秒。
AI.conclusion: 该系统证明了在工业应用中自动化拆卸空调室外单元的可行性，能够应对实际回收环境中的挑战。

title: Demographic Parity Tails for Regression
summary: Demographic parity (DP) is a widely studied fairness criterion in regression, enforcing independence between the predictions and sensitive attributes. However, constraining the entire distribution can degrade predictive accuracy and may be unnecessary for many applications, where fairness concerns are localized to specific regions of the distribution. To overcome this issue, we propose a new framework for regression under DP that focuses on the tails of target distribution across sensitive groups. Our methodology builds on optimal transport theory. By enforcing fairness constraints only over targeted regions of the distribution, our approach enables more nuanced and context-sensitive interventions. Leveraging recent advances, we develop an interpretable and flexible algorithm that leverages the geometric structure of optimal transport. We provide theoretical guarantees, including risk bounds and fairness properties, and validate the method through experiments in regression settings.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于最优传输理论的回归公平性新框架，专注于敏感群体目标分布的尾部区域，而非整个分布，实现更精细的公平约束。
AI.motivation: 传统的人口统计均等（DP）公平性准则要求整个预测分布与敏感属性独立，这会降低预测准确性，且许多应用场景中公平性关注点仅集中在分布的特定区域（如尾部）。
AI.method: 基于最优传输理论，提出新框架仅对目标分布的特定区域（特别是尾部）施加公平性约束，开发可解释的灵活算法，利用最优传输的几何结构。
AI.result: 提供了理论保证（包括风险界和公平性性质），并在回归设置中通过实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过专注于分布尾部区域的公平性约束，该方法实现了更细致、上下文敏感的干预，在保持预测准确性的同时满足特定区域的公平性要求。

title: Automated Prostate Gland Segmentation in MRI Using nnU-Net
summary: Accurate segmentation of the prostate gland in multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) is a fundamental step for a wide range of clinical and research applications, including image registration, volume estimation, and radiomic analysis. However, manual delineation is time-consuming and subject to inter-observer variability, while general-purpose segmentation tools often fail to provide sufficient accuracy for prostate-specific tasks. In this work, we propose a dedicated deep learning-based approach for automatic prostate gland segmentation using the nnU-Net v2 framework. The model leverages multimodal mpMRI data, including T2-weighted imaging, diffusion-weighted imaging (DWI), and apparent diffusion coefficient (ADC) maps, to exploit complementary tissue information. Training was performed on 981 cases from the PI-CAI dataset using whole-gland annotations, and model performance was assessed through 5-fold cross-validation and external validation on an independent cohort of 54 patients from Hospital La Fe. The proposed model achieved a mean Dice score of 0.96 +/- 0.00 in cross-validation and 0.82 on the external test set, demonstrating strong generalization despite domain shift. In comparison, a general-purpose approach (TotalSegmentator) showed substantially lower performance, with a Dice score of 0.15, primarily due to under-segmentation of the gland. These results highlight the importance of task-specific, multimodal segmentation strategies and demonstrate the potential of the proposed approach for reliable integration into clinical research workflows. To facilitate reproducibility and deployment, the model has been fully containerized and is available as a ready-to-use inference tool.

AI.tldr: 基于nnU-Net v2框架开发的多模态MRI前列腺自动分割模型，在PI-CAI数据集上训练，在外部验证中Dice得分0.82，显著优于通用分割工具
AI.motivation: 前列腺MRI手动分割耗时且存在观察者间差异，通用分割工具在前列腺特定任务中精度不足，需要开发专用的自动分割方法
AI.method: 使用nnU-Net v2框架，整合T2加权成像、扩散加权成像和表观扩散系数图等多模态MRI数据，在PI-CAI数据集的981个病例上进行训练
AI.result: 5折交叉验证平均Dice得分0.96±0.00，外部验证集（54例患者）Dice得分0.82；通用工具TotalSegmentator仅得0.15分，主要因腺体欠分割
AI.conclusion: 任务特异性多模态分割策略至关重要，所提方法具有强泛化能力，已容器化部署为即用推理工具，适合临床研究流程集成

title: Retrieval-Augmented Question Answering over Scientific Literature for the Electron-Ion Collider
summary: To harness the power of Language Models in answering domain specific specialized technical questions, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) is been used widely. In this work, we have developed a Q\&A application inspired by the Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), which is comprised of an in-house database indexed on the arXiv articles related to the Electron-Ion Collider (EIC) experiment - one of the largest international scientific collaboration and incorporated an open-source LLaMA model for answer generation. This is an extension to it's proceeding application built on proprietary model and Cloud-hosted external knowledge-base for the EIC experiment. This locally-deployed RAG-system offers a cost-effective, resource-constraint alternative solution to build a RAG-assisted Q\&A application on answering domain-specific queries in the field of experimental nuclear physics. This set-up facilitates data-privacy, avoids sending any pre-publication scientific data and information to public domain. Future improvement will expand the knowledge base to encompass heterogeneous EIC-related publications and reports and upgrade the application pipeline orchestration to the LangGraph framework.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个基于检索增强生成(RAG)的问答应用，使用本地部署的开源LLaMA模型和arXiv上EIC实验相关的内部数据库，为实验核物理领域提供成本效益高、保护数据隐私的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 为了利用语言模型回答领域特定的专业技术问题，同时解决先前基于专有模型和云端外部知识库的EIC实验应用的成本和隐私问题，需要开发一个本地部署的RAG系统。
AI.method: 基于检索增强生成(RAG)架构，构建了一个包含arXiv上电子-离子对撞机(EIC)实验相关文章的内部数据库索引，并集成了开源LLaMA模型进行答案生成，实现了完全本地部署。
AI.result: 成功开发了一个成本效益高、资源受限的RAG辅助问答应用，专门用于回答实验核物理领域的特定查询，同时确保数据隐私，避免将预发表科学数据发送到公共领域。
AI.conclusion: 该本地部署的RAG系统为领域特定问答应用提供了经济有效的替代方案，未来计划扩展知识库包含异构的EIC相关出版物和报告，并将应用管道编排升级到LangGraph框架。

title: Apriel-Reasoner: RL Post-Training for General-Purpose and Efficient Reasoning
summary: Building general-purpose reasoning models using reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) across diverse domains has been widely adopted by frontier open-weight models. However, their training recipes and domain mixtures are often not disclosed. Joint optimization across domains poses significant challenges: domains vary widely in rollout length, problem difficulty and sample efficiency. Further, models with long chain-of-thought traces increase inference cost and latency, making efficiency critical for practical deployment. We present Apriel-Reasoner, trained with a fully reproducible multi-domain RL post-training recipe on Apriel-Base, a 15B-parameter open-weight LLM, across five domains using public datasets: mathematics, code generation, instruction following, logical puzzles and function calling. We introduce an adaptive domain sampling mechanism that preserves target domain ratios despite heterogeneous rollout dynamics, and a difficulty-aware extension of the standard length penalty that, with no additional training overhead, encourages longer reasoning for difficult problems and shorter traces for easy ones. Trained with a strict 16K-token output budget, Apriel-Reasoner generalizes to 32K tokens at inference and improves over Apriel-Base on AIME 2025, GPQA, MMLU-Pro, and LiveCodeBench while producing 30-50% shorter reasoning traces. It matches strong open-weight models of similar size at lower token cost, thereby pushing the Pareto frontier of accuracy versus token budget.

AI.tldr: Apriel-Reasoner是一个15B参数的开源LLM，通过多领域RL后训练在数学、代码生成等五个领域优化，采用自适应领域采样和难度感知长度惩罚，在保持准确率的同时减少30-50%的推理痕迹长度。
AI.motivation: 现有通用推理模型通常不公开训练配方和领域混合策略，且跨领域联合优化面临挑战：各领域在轨迹长度、问题难度和样本效率上差异巨大。长思维链推理会增加推理成本和延迟，因此效率对实际部署至关重要。
AI.method: 基于Apriel-Base（15B参数开源LLM）进行多领域RL后训练，覆盖数学、代码生成、指令遵循、逻辑谜题和函数调用五个领域。引入自适应领域采样机制以保持目标领域比例，并提出难度感知的长度惩罚扩展，在不增加训练开销的情况下鼓励对难题进行更长推理、对简单问题缩短推理痕迹。
AI.result: 在严格16K令牌输出预算下训练，推理时可泛化到32K令牌。在AIME 2025、GPQA、MMLU-Pro和LiveCodeBench上优于Apriel-Base，同时产生30-50%更短的推理痕迹。在相似规模的开源模型中达到同等性能但使用更少令牌，推动了准确率与令牌预算的帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: Apriel-Reasoner通过可复现的多领域RL后训练配方，结合自适应领域采样和难度感知长度惩罚，实现了在保持准确率的同时显著减少推理痕迹长度，为高效推理模型的部署提供了有效解决方案。

title: MAVFusion: Efficient Infrared and Visible Video Fusion via Motion-Aware Sparse Interaction
summary: Infrared and visible video fusion combines the object saliency from infrared images with the texture details from visible images to produce semantically rich fusion results. However, most existing methods are designed for static image fusion and cannot effectively handle frame-to-frame motion in videos. Current video fusion methods improve temporal consistency by introducing interactions across frames, but they often require high computational cost. To mitigate these challenges, we propose MAVFusion, an end-to-end video fusion framework featuring a motion-aware sparse interaction mechanism that enhances efficiency while maintaining superior fusion quality. Specifically, we leverage optical flow to identify dynamic regions in multi-modal sequences, adaptively allocating computationally intensive cross-modal attention to these sparse areas to capture salient transitions and facilitate inter-modal information exchange. For static background regions, a lightweight weak interaction module is employed to maintain structural and appearance integrity. By decoupling the processing of dynamic and static regions, MAVFusion simultaneously preserves temporal consistency and fine-grained details while significantly accelerating inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MAVFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple infrared and visible video benchmarks, achieving a speed of 14.16\,FPS at $640 \times 480$ resolution. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ixilai/MAVFusion.

AI.tldr: MAVFusion是一个用于红外与可见光视频融合的端到端框架，通过运动感知稀疏交互机制，在保持高质量融合的同时显著提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有红外与可见光视频融合方法大多针对静态图像设计，无法有效处理视频中的帧间运动。当前视频融合方法虽然通过引入跨帧交互改善了时间一致性，但计算成本较高。
AI.method: 提出MAVFusion框架，采用运动感知稀疏交互机制：1) 利用光流识别多模态序列中的动态区域；2) 对动态区域自适应分配计算密集的跨模态注意力以捕捉显著过渡和促进模态间信息交换；3) 对静态背景区域使用轻量级弱交互模块保持结构和外观完整性；4) 通过解耦动态和静态区域处理，同时保持时间一致性和细粒度细节。
AI.result: 在多个红外与可见光视频基准测试中达到最先进性能，在640×480分辨率下实现14.16 FPS的推理速度，显著加速了推理过程。
AI.conclusion: MAVFusion通过运动感知稀疏交互机制，在保持高质量视频融合的同时显著提升了计算效率，为红外与可见光视频融合提供了一种高效且有效的解决方案。

title: Generative AI Spotlights the Human Core of Data Science: Implications for Education
summary: Generative AI (GAI) reveals an irreducible human core at the center of data science: advances in GAI should sharpen, rather than diminish, the focus on human reasoning in data science education. GAI can now execute many routine data science workflows, including cleaning, summarizing, visualizing, modeling, and drafting reports. Yet the competencies that matter most remain irreducibly human: problem formulation, measurement and design, causal identification, statistical and computational reasoning, ethics and accountability, and sensemaking. Drawing on Donoho's Greater Data Science framework, Nolan and Temple Lang's vision of computational literacy, and the McLuhan-Culkin insight that we shape our tools and thereafter our tools shape us, this paper traces the emergence of data science through three converging lineages: Tukey's intellectual vision of data analysis as a science, the commercial logic of surveillance capitalism that created industrial demand for data scientists, and the academic programs that followed. Mapping GAI's impact onto Donoho's six divisions of Greater Data Science shows that computing with data (GDS3) has been substantially automated, while data gathering, preparation, and exploration (GDS1) and science about data science (GDS6) still require essential human input. The educational implication is that data science curricula should focus on this human core while teaching students how to contribute effectively within iterative prompt-output-prompt cycles using retrieval-augmented generation, and that learning outcomes and assessments should explicitly evaluate reasoning and judgment.

AI.tldr: 生成式AI在数据科学中凸显了不可替代的人类核心能力，数据科学教育应聚焦人类推理而非技术操作
AI.motivation: 探讨生成式AI对数据科学领域的影响，特别是AI自动化常规工作流程后，人类在数据科学中的核心价值和教育重点应如何调整
AI.method: 基于Donoho的"更大数据科学"框架，分析生成式AI对六个数据科学领域的自动化程度；结合Tukey的数据分析科学愿景、监控资本主义的商业逻辑和学术项目发展，追溯数据科学的三条发展脉络
AI.result: 生成式AI已能自动化数据计算(GDS3)，但数据收集准备探索(GDS1)和数据科学科学(GDS6)仍需人类核心参与；人类不可替代的能力包括问题表述、测量设计、因果识别、统计计算推理、伦理问责和意义建构
AI.conclusion: 数据科学教育应聚焦人类核心能力，培养学生通过检索增强生成进行迭代提示-输出循环，学习成果评估应明确评价推理和判断能力

title: IMPASTO: Integrating Model-Based Planning with Learned Dynamics Models for Robotic Oil Painting Reproduction
summary: Robotic reproduction of oil paintings using soft brushes and pigments requires force-sensitive control of deformable tools, prediction of brushstroke effects, and multi-step stroke planning, often without human step-by-step demonstrations or faithful simulators. Given only a sequence of target oil painting images, can a robot infer and execute the stroke trajectories, forces, and colors needed to reproduce it? We present IMPASTO, a robotic oil-painting system that integrates learned pixel dynamics models with model-based planning. The dynamics models predict canvas updates from image observations and parameterized stroke actions; a receding-horizon model predictive control optimizer then plans trajectories and forces, while a force-sensitive controller executes strokes on a 7-DoF robot arm. IMPASTO integrates low-level force control, learned dynamics models, and high-level closed-loop planning, learns solely from robot self-play, and approximates human artists' single-stroke datasets and multi-stroke artworks, outperforming baselines in reproduction accuracy. Project website: https://impasto-robopainting.github.io/

AI.tldr: IMPASTO是一个机器人油画系统，通过自学习像素动态模型和基于模型的规划，仅从目标图像序列就能推断并执行笔触轨迹、力度和颜色来复制油画作品。
AI.motivation: 机器人复制油画需要控制可变形工具、预测笔触效果和多步骤规划，但通常缺乏人类逐步演示或精确模拟器。研究旨在探索仅凭目标图像序列，机器人能否推断并执行所需的笔触轨迹、力度和颜色。
AI.method: IMPASTO整合了学习到的像素动态模型与基于模型的规划：动态模型从图像观察和参数化笔触动作预测画布更新；滚动时域模型预测控制优化器规划轨迹和力度；力敏感控制器在7自由度机械臂上执行笔触。系统集成了低层力控制、学习动态模型和高层闭环规划。
AI.result: IMPASTO仅通过机器人自学习，就能近似人类艺术家的单笔触数据集和多笔触艺术作品，在复制准确性上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: IMPASTO展示了机器人油画系统通过整合学习动态模型与模型预测控制，能够仅从目标图像序列推断并执行复杂的笔触规划，实现高质量的油画复制。

title: A Self supervised learning framework for imbalanced medical imaging datasets
summary: Two problems often plague medical imaging analysis: 1) Non-availability of large quantities of labeled training data, and 2) Dealing with imbalanced data, i.e., abundant data are available for frequent classes, whereas data are highly limited for the rare class. Self supervised learning (SSL) methods have been proposed to deal with the first problem to a certain extent, but the issue of investigating the robustness of SSL to imbalanced data has rarely been addressed in the domain of medical image classification. In this work, we make the following contributions: 1) The MIMV method proposed by us in an earlier work is extended with a new augmentation strategy to construct asymmetric multi-image, multi-view (AMIMV) pairs to address both data scarcity and dataset imbalance in medical image classification. 2) We carry out a data analysis to evaluate the robustness of AMIMV under varying degrees of class imbalance in medical imaging . 3) We evaluate eight representative SSL methods in 11 medical imaging datasets (MedMNIST) under long-tailed distributions and limited supervision. Our experimental results on the MedMNIST dataset show an improvement of 4.25% on retinaMNIST, 1.88% on tissueMNIST, and 3.1% on DermaMNIST.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出AMIMV方法，通过不对称多图像多视图增强策略解决医学图像分类中的数据稀缺和类别不平衡问题，并在11个MedMNIST数据集上评估了8种自监督学习方法在长尾分布下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析面临两大问题：1）缺乏大量标注训练数据；2）数据不平衡问题（常见类别数据丰富，罕见类别数据稀缺）。自监督学习（SSL）方法在一定程度上解决了第一个问题，但SSL在医学图像分类中对不平衡数据的鲁棒性研究很少。
AI.method: 1）扩展先前提出的MIMV方法，引入新的增强策略构建不对称多图像多视图（AMIMV）对，同时解决数据稀缺和数据集不平衡问题；2）进行数据分析评估AMIMV在不同程度类别不平衡下的鲁棒性；3）在11个MedMNIST数据集上评估8种代表性SSL方法在长尾分布和有限监督下的性能。
AI.result: 在MedMNIST数据集上的实验结果显示：retinaMNIST提升4.25%，tissueMNIST提升1.88%，DermaMNIST提升3.1%。AMIMV方法有效改善了医学图像分类在数据不平衡情况下的性能。
AI.conclusion: AMIMV方法通过不对称多图像多视图增强策略，能够有效应对医学图像分类中的数据稀缺和类别不平衡问题，为自监督学习在医学图像分析中的应用提供了新的解决方案，特别是在长尾分布场景下表现出良好的鲁棒性。

title: Do Emotions in Prompts Matter? Effects of Emotional Framing on Large Language Models
summary: Emotional tone is pervasive in human communication, yet its influence on large language model (LLM) behaviour remains unclear. Here, we examine how first-person emotional framing in user-side queries affect LLM performance across six benchmark domains, including mathematical reasoning, medical question answering, reading comprehension, commonsense reasoning and social inference. Across models and tasks, static emotional prefixes usually produce only small changes in accuracy, suggesting that affective phrasing is typically a mild perturbation rather than a reliable general-purpose intervention. This stability is not uniform: effects are more variable in socially grounded tasks, where emotional context more plausibly interacts with interpersonal reasoning. Additional analyses show that stronger emotional wording induces only modest extra change, and that human-written prefixes reproduce the same qualitative pattern as LLM-generated ones. We then introduce EmotionRL, an adaptive emotional prompting framework that selects emotional framing adaptively for each query. Although no single emotion is consistently beneficial, adaptive selection yields more reliable gains than fixed emotional prompting. Together, these findings show that emotional tone is neither a dominant driver of LLM performance nor irrelevant noise, but a weak and input-dependent signal that can be exploited through adaptive control.

AI.tldr: 情感前缀对LLM性能影响有限，但可通过自适应情感提示框架EmotionRL获得更可靠提升
AI.motivation: 研究情感语调在用户查询中对大语言模型行为的影响，探索情感框架是否可作为有效的干预手段
AI.method: 在六个基准领域（数学推理、医学问答、阅读理解、常识推理、社会推理）测试静态情感前缀的影响，引入EmotionRL自适应情感提示框架进行对比
AI.result: 静态情感前缀通常只产生小的准确率变化，但在社会性任务中影响更显著；自适应情感选择比固定情感提示产生更可靠的性能提升
AI.conclusion: 情感语调既不是LLM性能的主导因素，也不是无关噪声，而是一种弱且输入依赖的信号，可通过自适应控制加以利用

title: Captioning Daily Activity Images in Early Childhood Education: Benchmark and Algorithm
summary:
Image captioning for Early Childhood Education (ECE) is essential for automated activity understanding and educational assessment. However, existing methods face two key challenges. First, the lack of large-scale, domain-specific datasets limits the model's ability to capture fine-grained semantic concepts unique to ECE scenarios, resulting in generic and imprecise descriptions. Second, conventional training paradigms exhibit limitations in enhancing professional object description capability, as supervised learning tends to favor high-frequency expressions, while reinforcement learning may suffer from unstable optimization on difficult samples.
  To address these limitations, we introduce ECAC, a large-scale benchmark for ECE daily activity image captioning, comprising 256,121 real-world images annotated with expert-level captions and fine-grained labels. ECAC is further equipped with a domain-oriented evaluation protocol, the Teaching Toy Recognition Score (TTS), to explicitly measure professional object naming accuracy. Furthermore, we propose RSRS (Reward-Conditional Switch of Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning), a hybrid training framework that dynamically alternates between RL and supervised optimization. By rerouting hard samples with zero rewards to supervised fine-tuning, RSRS effectively mitigates advantage collapse and enables stable optimization for fine-grained recognition. Leveraging ECAC and RSRS, we develop KinderMM-Cap-3B, a domain-adapted multimodal large language model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves a TTS of 51.06, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining superior caption quality, highlighting its potential for specialized educational applications.

AI.tldr: 提出ECAC大规模早教活动图像描述基准和RSRS混合训练框架，开发KinderMM-Cap-3B模型，显著提升专业物体识别精度
AI.motivation: 早教图像描述对自动化活动理解和教育评估至关重要，但现有方法面临两大挑战：缺乏大规模领域特定数据集导致描述泛化不精确；传统训练范式在提升专业物体描述能力方面存在局限
AI.method: 1) 构建ECAC基准：包含256,121张真实世界图像，配备专家级描述和细粒度标签，引入TTS评估协议；2) 提出RSRS混合训练框架：动态切换强化学习和监督微调，将零奖励困难样本重定向到监督学习；3) 开发KinderMM-Cap-3B：领域适应的多模态大语言模型
AI.result: 模型在TTS指标上达到51.06，显著超越现有基线方法，同时保持优越的描述质量，展示了在专业教育应用中的潜力
AI.conclusion: ECAC基准和RSRS框架有效解决了早教图像描述的两大挑战，KinderMM-Cap-3B模型在专业物体识别精度和描述质量方面均表现出色，为专业教育应用提供了有力工具

title: Answering the Wrong Question: Reasoning Trace Inversion for Abstention in LLMs
summary: For Large Language Models (LLMs) to be reliably deployed, models must effectively know when not to answer: abstain. Reasoning models, in particular, have gained attention for impressive performance on complex tasks. However, reasoning models have been shown to have worse abstention abilities. Taking the vulnerabilities of reasoning models into account, we propose our Query Misalignment Framework. Hallucinations resulting in failed abstention can be reinterpreted as LLMs answering the wrong question (rather than answering a question incorrectly). Based on this framework, we develop a new class of state-of-the-art abstention methods called Trace Inversion. First, we generate the reasoning trace of a model. Based on only the trace, we then reconstruct the most likely query that the model responded to. Finally, we compare the initial query with the reconstructed query. Low similarity score between the initial query and reconstructed query suggests that the model likely answered the question incorrectly and is flagged to abstain. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Trace Inversion effectively boosts abstention performance in four frontier LLMs across nine abstention QA datasets, beating competitive baselines in 33 out of 36 settings.

AI.tldr: 提出Trace Inversion方法，通过分析推理模型的推理轨迹来重构其可能回答的问题，通过比较原始问题与重构问题的相似度来判断是否应该弃权，显著提升了推理模型的弃权能力。
AI.motivation: 推理模型在复杂任务上表现出色，但弃权能力较差。模型幻觉导致的弃权失败可以重新解释为模型回答了错误的问题（而不是错误地回答问题）。需要开发能够有效提升推理模型弃权能力的方法。
AI.method: 提出查询错位框架和Trace Inversion方法：1）生成模型的推理轨迹；2）仅基于推理轨迹重构模型最可能回答的查询；3）比较初始查询与重构查询的相似度，低相似度表明模型可能回答错误，标记为弃权。
AI.result: 在四个前沿LLM和九个弃权QA数据集上的广泛实验表明，Trace Inversion在36个设置中的33个中击败了竞争基线，有效提升了弃权性能。
AI.conclusion: Trace Inversion通过分析推理轨迹来检测查询错位，为提升推理模型的弃权能力提供了新的有效方法，显著改善了模型在不确定情况下的可靠性。

title: Homogenized Transformers
summary: We study a random model of deep multi-head self-attention in which the weights are resampled independently across layers and heads, as at initialization of training. Viewing depth as a time variable, the residual stream defines a discrete-time interacting particle system on the unit sphere. We prove that, under suitable joint scalings of the depth, the residual step size, and the number of heads, this dynamics admits a nontrivial homogenized limit. Depending on the scaling, the limit is either deterministic or stochastic with common noise; in the mean-field regime, the latter leads to a stochastic nonlinear Fokker--Planck equation for the conditional law of a representative token. In the Gaussian setting, the limiting drift vanishes, making the homogenized dynamics explicit enough to study representation collapse. This yields quantitative trade-offs between dimension, context length, and temperature, and identifies regimes in which clustering can be mitigated.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了一个深度多头自注意力随机模型，其中权重在层和头之间独立重采样。通过将深度视为时间变量，残差流在单位球面上定义了一个离散时间相互作用粒子系统。作者证明了在适当的深度、残差步长和头数联合缩放下，该动力学存在非平凡的均匀化极限。
AI.motivation: 研究深度多头自注意力机制的随机模型，理解其在初始化时的动力学行为，特别是分析表示崩溃现象以及维度、上下文长度和温度之间的定量权衡关系。
AI.method: 将深度视为时间变量，将残差流建模为单位球面上的离散时间相互作用粒子系统。在深度、残差步长和头数的联合缩放下，推导动力学的均匀化极限。在均值场机制下，极限表现为带有公共噪声的随机非线性Fokker-Planck方程。在高斯设置中，分析极限动力学的显式形式。
AI.result: 证明了在适当的缩放下，动力学存在非平凡的均匀化极限，该极限可以是确定性的或带有公共噪声的随机过程。在均值场机制下，极限由随机非线性Fokker-Planck方程描述。在高斯设置中，极限漂移项消失，使得均匀化动力学足够显式以研究表示崩溃现象。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为深度多头自注意力机制提供了理论分析框架，揭示了维度、上下文长度和温度之间的定量权衡关系，并识别了可以缓解聚类现象的参数机制。这有助于理解Transformer架构中表示崩溃的根本原因。

title: MaskAdapt: Learning Flexible Motion Adaptation via Mask-Invariant Prior for Physics-Based Characters
summary: We present MaskAdapt, a framework for flexible motion adaptation in physics-based humanoid control. The framework follows a two-stage residual learning paradigm. In the first stage, we train a mask-invariant base policy using stochastic body-part masking and a regularization term that enforces consistent action distributions across masking conditions. This yields a robust motion prior that remains stable under missing observations, anticipating later adaptation in those regions. In the second stage, a residual policy is trained atop the frozen base controller to modify only the targeted body parts while preserving the original behaviors elsewhere. We demonstrate the versatility of this design through two applications: (i) motion composition, where varying masks enable multi-part adaptation within a single sequence, and (ii) text-driven partial goal tracking, where designated body parts follow kinematic targets provided by a pre-trained text-conditioned autoregressive motion generator. Through experiments, MaskAdapt demonstrates strong robustness and adaptability, producing diverse behaviors under masked observations and delivering superior targeted motion adaptation compared to prior work.

AI.tldr: MaskAdapt是一个用于物理人形控制中灵活运动适应的框架，采用两阶段残差学习范式，通过掩码不变性基策略和残差策略实现针对特定身体部位的精确运动修改。
AI.motivation: 现有物理人形控制方法在针对特定身体部位进行精确运动修改时存在局限性，难以在保持其他部位原始行为的同时实现局部运动适应。需要一种能够灵活适应不同身体部位运动需求的框架。
AI.method: 采用两阶段残差学习范式：第一阶段通过随机身体部位掩码和正则化项训练掩码不变性基策略，获得在缺失观测下保持稳定的运动先验；第二阶段在冻结的基控制器上训练残差策略，仅修改目标身体部位而保留其他部位原始行为。
AI.result: MaskAdapt在掩码观测下表现出强大的鲁棒性和适应性，能够生成多样行为。在目标运动适应方面优于先前工作，成功实现了运动组合和文本驱动的部分目标跟踪两种应用。
AI.conclusion: MaskAdapt框架通过两阶段残差学习实现了物理人形控制中灵活的运动适应，能够精确修改特定身体部位运动同时保持其他部位行为，为运动组合和文本驱动控制等应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Impact of Multimodal and Conversational AI on Learning Outcomes and Experience
comment: 16 pages, 3 figures, Accepted to AIED 2026 (Seoul, South Korea)
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer an opportunity to support multimedia learning through conversational systems grounded in educational content. However, while conversational AI is known to boost engagement, its impact on learning in visually-rich STEM domains remains under-explored. Moreover, there is limited understanding of how multimodality and conversationality jointly influence learning in generative AI systems. This work reports findings from a randomized controlled online study (N = 124) comparing three approaches to learning biology from textbook content: (1) a document-grounded conversational AI with interleaved text-and-image responses (MuDoC), (2) a document-grounded conversational AI with text-only responses (TexDoC), and (3) a textbook interface with semantic search and highlighting (DocSearch). Learners using MuDoC achieved the highest post-test scores and reported the most positive learning experience. Notably, while TexDoC was rated as significantly more engaging and easier to use than DocSearch, it led to the lowest post-test scores, revealing a disconnect between student perceptions and learning outcomes. Interpreted through the lens of the Cognitive Load Theory, these findings suggest that conversationality reduces extraneous load, while visual-verbal integration induced by multimodality increases germane load, leading to better learning outcomes. When conversationality is not complemented by multimodality, reduced cognitive effort may instead inflate perceived understanding without improving learning outcomes.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了三种基于教材的学习方法：多模态对话AI、纯文本对话AI和文档搜索界面，发现多模态对话AI学习效果最好，而纯文本对话AI虽然更吸引人但学习效果最差，揭示了学生感知与学习成果之间的脱节。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型为基于教育内容的多媒体学习提供了机会，但对话式AI在视觉丰富的STEM领域对学习的影响尚未充分探索，且多模态性和对话性如何共同影响生成式AI系统中的学习效果缺乏理解。
AI.method: 采用随机对照在线研究（N=124），比较三种从教材内容学习生物学的方法：1）具有交错文本-图像响应的文档基础对话AI（MuDoC）；2）仅文本响应的文档基础对话AI（TexDoC）；3）具有语义搜索和高亮功能的教科书界面（DocSearch）。
AI.result: 使用MuDoC的学习者获得最高的后测分数和最积极的学习体验。TexDoC虽然被评价为比DocSearch更吸引人且更易用，但导致最低的后测分数，显示出学生感知与学习成果之间的脱节。
AI.conclusion: 从认知负荷理论解释，对话性减少外在认知负荷，而多模态诱导的视觉-言语整合增加相关认知负荷，从而带来更好的学习效果。当对话性没有多模态补充时，减少的认知努力可能反而会夸大感知理解而不改善学习成果。

title: MRReP: Mixed Reality-based Hand-drawn Reference Path Editing Interface for Mobile Robot Navigation
summary: Autonomous mobile robots operating in human-shared indoor environments often require paths that reflect human spatial intentions, such as avoiding interference with pedestrian flow or maintaining comfortable clearance. However, conventional path planners primarily optimize geometric costs and provide limited support for explicit route specification by human operators. This paper presents MRReP, a Mixed Reality-based interface that enables users to draw a Hand-drawn Reference Path (HRP) directly on the physical floor using hand gestures. The drawn HRP is integrated into the robot navigation stack through a custom Hand-drawn Reference Path Planner, which converts the user-specified point sequence into a global path for autonomous navigation. We evaluated MRReP in a within-subject experiment against a conventional 2D baseline interface. The results demonstrated that MRReP enhanced path specification accuracy, usability, and perceived workload, while enabling more stable path specification in the physical environment. These findings suggest that direct path specification in MR is an effective approach for incorporating human spatial intention into mobile robot navigation. Additional material is available at https://mertcookimg.github.io/mrrep

AI.tldr: MRReP：基于混合现实的界面，允许用户通过手势在物理地面上绘制参考路径，以指导机器人导航，相比传统2D界面提高了路径指定精度和可用性。
AI.motivation: 传统路径规划器主要优化几何成本，缺乏对人类操作者明确路径指定的支持，而人类共享环境中机器人需要反映人类空间意图的路径（如避免干扰行人流、保持舒适距离）。
AI.method: 开发MRReP混合现实界面，用户通过手势在物理地面上绘制手绘参考路径（HRP），通过自定义的手绘参考路径规划器将用户指定的点序列转换为全局路径，集成到机器人导航栈中。
AI.result: 在受试者内实验中，MRReP相比传统2D基线界面提高了路径指定精度、可用性和感知工作量，同时在物理环境中实现了更稳定的路径指定。
AI.conclusion: 直接在混合现实中指定路径是有效的方法，可将人类空间意图融入移动机器人导航，MRReP展示了在物理环境中直接路径指定的优势。

title: Abnormal Head Movements in Neurological Conditions: A Knowledge-Based Dataset with Application to Cervical Dystonia
summary: Abnormal head movements (AHMs) manifest across a broad spectrum of neurological disorders; however, the absence of a multi-condition resource integrating kinematic measurements, clinical severity scores, and patient demographics constitutes a persistent barrier to the development of AI-driven diagnostic tools. To address this gap, this study introduces NeuroPose-AHM, a knowledge-based dataset of neurologically induced AHMs constructed through a multi-LLM extraction framework applied to 1,430 peer-reviewed publications. The dataset contains 2,756 patient-group-level records spanning 57 neurological conditions, derived from 846 AHM-relevant papers. Inter-LLM reliability analysis confirms robust extraction performance, with study-level classification achieving strong agreement (kappa = 0.822). To demonstrate the dataset's analytical utility, a four-task framework is applied to cervical dystonia (CD), the condition most directly defined by pathological head movement. First, Task 1 performs multi-label AHM type classification (F1 = 0.856). Task 2 constructs the Head-Neck Severity Index (HNSI), a unified metric that normalizes heterogeneous clinical rating scales. The clinical relevance of this index is then evaluated in Task 3, where HNSI is validated against real-world CD patient data, with aligned severe-band proportions (6.7%) providing a preliminary plausibility indication for index calibration within the high severity range. Finally, Task 4 performs bridge analysis between movement-type probabilities and HNSI scores, producing significant correlations (p less than 0.001). These results demonstrate the analytical utility of NeuroPose-AHM as a structured, knowledge-based resource for neurological AHM research. The NeuroPose-AHM dataset is publicly available on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19386862).

AI.tldr: 该研究创建了NeuroPose-AHM数据集，这是一个包含57种神经系统疾病中异常头部运动的多条件知识库，通过多LLM框架从1430篇文献中提取了2756条患者组记录，并展示了其在颈椎肌张力障碍分析中的应用价值。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏整合运动学测量、临床严重程度评分和患者人口统计学的多条件资源，这阻碍了AI驱动诊断工具的发展。异常头部运动在多种神经系统疾病中普遍存在，但缺乏系统性的知识整合。
AI.method: 1. 使用多LLM提取框架从1430篇同行评审文献中构建NeuroPose-AHM数据集；2. 对颈椎肌张力障碍应用四任务分析框架：多标签AHM类型分类、构建头颈严重程度指数(HNSI)、验证HNSI临床相关性、分析运动类型概率与HNSI分数的关联。
AI.result: 1. 数据集包含2756条患者组记录，涵盖57种神经系统疾病，提取可靠性高（kappa=0.822）；2. 颈椎肌张力障碍分析中：AHM类型分类F1=0.856；HNSI成功整合异质临床评分量表；HNSI与真实患者数据验证显示严重带比例一致（6.7%）；运动类型概率与HNSI显著相关（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: NeuroPose-AHM是一个结构化、基于知识的资源，为神经系统异常头部运动研究提供了有价值的分析工具。数据集已公开可用，展示了其在临床研究和AI诊断开发中的实用潜力。

title: Enhancing Medical Visual Grounding via Knowledge-guided Spatial Prompts
summary: Medical Visual Grounding (MVG) aims to identify diagnostically relevant phrases from free-text radiology reports and localize their corresponding regions in medical images, providing interpretable visual evidence to support clinical decision-making. Although recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit promising multimodal reasoning ability, their grounding remains insufficient spatial precision, largely due to a lack of explicit localization priors when relying solely on latent embeddings. In this work, we analyze this limitation from an attention perspective and propose KnowMVG, a Knowledge-prior and global-local attention enhancement framework for MVG in VLMs that explicitly strengthens spatial awareness during decoding. Specifically, we present a knowledge-enhanced prompting strategy that encodes phrase related medical knowledge into compact embeddings, together with a global-local attention that jointly leverages coarse global information and refined local cues to guide precise region localization. localization. This design bridges high-level semantic understanding and fine-grained visual perception without introducing extra textual reasoning overhead. Extensive experiments on four MVG benchmarks demonstrate that our KnowMVG consistently outperforms existing approaches, achieving gains of 3.0% in AP50 and 2.6% in mIoU over prior state-of-the-art methods. Qualitative and ablation studies further validate the effectiveness of each component.

AI.tldr: KnowMVG通过知识增强提示和全局-局部注意力机制提升医学视觉定位精度，在四个基准测试中超越现有方法
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在医学视觉定位任务中空间定位精度不足，主要原因是仅依赖潜在嵌入而缺乏显式的定位先验知识
AI.method: 提出KnowMVG框架：1) 知识增强提示策略，将医学知识编码为紧凑嵌入；2) 全局-局部注意力机制，联合利用粗粒度全局信息和细粒度局部线索指导精确区域定位
AI.result: 在四个MVG基准测试中，KnowMVG相比先前最优方法在AP50指标上提升3.0%，在mIoU指标上提升2.6%
AI.conclusion: KnowMVG通过显式增强解码过程中的空间感知能力，有效连接了高层语义理解和细粒度视觉感知，显著提升了医学视觉定位的精度

title: VISTA: Visualization of Token Attribution via Efficient Analysis
summary: Understanding how Large Language Models (LLMs) process information from prompts remains a significant challenge. To shed light on this "black box," attention visualization techniques have been developed to capture neuron-level perceptions and interpret how models focus on different parts of input data. However, many existing techniques are tailored to specific model architectures, particularly within the Transformer family, and often require backpropagation, resulting in nearly double the GPU memory usage and increased computational cost. A lightweight, model-agnostic approach for attention visualization remains lacking. In this paper, we introduce a model-agnostic token importance visualization technique to better understand how generative AI systems perceive and prioritize information from input text, without incurring additional computational cost. Our method leverages perturbation-based strategies combined with a three-matrix analytical framework to generate relevance maps that illustrate token-level contributions to model predictions. The framework comprises: (1) the Angular Deviation Matrix, which captures shifts in semantic direction; (2) the Magnitude Deviation Matrix, which measures changes in semantic intensity; and (3) the Dimensional Importance Matrix, which evaluates contributions across individual vector dimensions. By systematically removing each token and measuring the resulting impact across these three complementary dimensions, we derive a composite importance score that provides a nuanced and mathematically grounded measure of token significance. To support reproducibility and foster wider adoption, we provide open-source implementations of all proposed and utilized explainability techniques, with code and resources publicly available at https://github.com/Infosys/Infosys-Responsible-AI-Toolkit

AI.tldr: 提出了一种模型无关的token重要性可视化技术，通过扰动策略和三矩阵分析框架生成相关性图，无需额外计算成本
AI.motivation: 现有注意力可视化技术通常针对特定Transformer架构，需要反向传播导致GPU内存使用翻倍和计算成本增加，缺乏轻量级、模型无关的方法
AI.method: 采用基于扰动的策略结合三矩阵分析框架：角度偏差矩阵（捕捉语义方向变化）、幅度偏差矩阵（测量语义强度变化）和维度重要性矩阵（评估各向量维度贡献），通过系统移除每个token并测量影响来生成复合重要性分数
AI.result: 开发了模型无关的token重要性可视化技术，能够生成显示token对模型预测贡献的相关性图，提供开源实现促进可重复性和广泛采用
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解生成式AI系统如何感知和优先处理输入文本信息提供了轻量级、模型无关的解决方案，无需额外计算成本，有助于提高模型可解释性

title: Night Eyes: A Reproducible Framework for Constellation-Based Corneal Reflection Matching
summary: Corneal reflection (glint) detection plays an important role in pupil-corneal reflection (P-CR) eye tracking, but in practice it is often handled as heuristics embedded within larger systems, making reproducibility difficult across hardware setups. We introduce a 2D geometry-driven, constellation-based pipeline for mulit-glint detection and matching, focusing on reproducibility and clear evaluation. Inspired by lost-in-space star identification, we treat glints as structured constellations rather than independent blobs. We propose a Similarity-Layout Alignment (SLA) procedure which adapts constellation matching to the specific constraints of multi-LED eye tracking. The framework brings together controlled over-detection, adaptive candidate fallback, appearance-aware scoring, and optional semantic layout priors while keeping detection and correspondence explicitly separated. Evaluated on a public multi-LED dataset, the system provides stable identity-preserving correspondence under noisy conditions. We release code, presets, and evaluation scripts to enable transparent replication, comparison, and dataset annotation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于几何驱动的多光斑检测与匹配流程，将角膜反射光斑视为结构化星座而非独立斑点，提高眼动追踪系统的可复现性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 角膜反射光斑检测在瞳孔-角膜反射眼动追踪中至关重要，但现有方法通常作为启发式算法嵌入大型系统，导致不同硬件设置下难以复现。需要一种可复现、可评估的标准化检测方法。
AI.method: 提出相似性-布局对齐（SLA）流程，将星座匹配技术适配到多LED眼动追踪的特定约束中。采用受控过检测、自适应候选回退、外观感知评分和可选语义布局先验，同时保持检测与对应关系明确分离。
AI.result: 在公开多LED数据集上的评估表明，该系统在噪声条件下提供稳定的身份保持对应关系。代码、预设和评估脚本已开源，支持透明复现、比较和数据集标注。
AI.conclusion: 该几何驱动的星座式多光斑检测框架解决了眼动追踪中光斑检测的可复现性问题，通过结构化方法在噪声环境下保持稳定的对应关系，为标准化评估和跨硬件比较提供了基础。

title: Long-Reach Robotic Cleaning for Lunar Solar Arrays
comment: Extended abstract, 4 pages, 3 figures, accepted to and presented at the Sustainable Space Robotics Workshop at iSpaRo 2025
summary: Commercial lunar activity is accelerating the need for reliable surface infrastructure and routine operations to keep it functioning. Maintenance tasks such as inspection, cleaning, dust mitigation, and minor repair are essential to preserve performance and extend system life. A specific application is the cleaning of lunar solar arrays. Solar arrays are expected to provide substantial fraction of lunar surface power and operate for months to years, supplying continuous energy to landers, habitats, and surface assets, making sustained output mission-critical. However, over time lunar dust accumulates on these large solar arrays, which can rapidly degrade panel output and reduce mission lifetime. We propose a small mobile robot equipped with a long-reach, lightweight deployable boom and interchangeable cleaning tool to perform gentle cleaning over meter-scale workspaces with minimal human involvement. Building on prior vision-guided long-reach manipulation, we add a compliant wrist with distal force sensing and a velocity-based admittance controller to regulate stable contact during surface cleaning. In preliminary benchtop experiments on a planar surface, the system maintained approximately 2 N normal force while executing a simple cleaning motion over boom lengths from 0.3 m to 1.0 m, with RMS force error of approximately 0.2 N after initial contact. These early results suggest that deployable long-reach manipulators are a promising architecture for robotic maintenance of lunar infrastructure such as solar arrays, radiators, and optical surfaces.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于月球太阳能电池板清洁的小型移动机器人，配备长臂可展开机械臂和可互换清洁工具，通过顺应性手腕和力控制实现稳定接触清洁
AI.motivation: 商业月球活动需要可靠的地面基础设施和常规维护操作。月球太阳能电池板提供大部分表面电力，但月尘积累会迅速降低输出功率和任务寿命，因此需要自动化清洁解决方案
AI.method: 开发小型移动机器人，配备轻量化可展开长臂机械臂和可互换清洁工具。基于先前的视觉引导长臂操作，增加带有远端力传感的顺应性手腕和基于速度的导纳控制器，以在表面清洁期间调节稳定接触
AI.result: 在平面表面的初步实验台上实验中，系统在0.3米到1.0米的臂长范围内执行简单清洁运动时，保持约2N的法向力，初始接触后RMS力误差约为0.2N
AI.conclusion: 早期结果表明，可展开的长臂机械臂是用于月球基础设施（如太阳能电池板、散热器和光学表面）机器人维护的有前景的架构

title: Learn by Surprise, Commit by Proof
summary: We propose LSCP, a self-gated post-training framework for autonomous knowledge acquisition: learning only what a model does not already know, verified against what it does know, at a strength proportional to conviction, with no external oracle. When a passage produces anomalously high per-token loss, LSCP flags it, generates a Q&A chain that forces the model to articulate its own knowledge and identify gaps, then adjusts AdamW's $β_2$ proportionally to conviction depth k (the number of self-verification steps the passage survives) via $β_2 = 0.999 \cdot r^k$. The entire learning intensity is governed by a single parameter $r$. Beyond new knowledge, this process sharpens weakly encoded existing knowledge, which is a primary source of hallucination. The framework is self-extinguishing: as the model learns, per-token loss on learned passages decreases toward the surprisal threshold and the system progressively converges to standard AdamW. This models biological memory consolidation: temporary information in the context window is selectively consolidated into parametric weights, the model's long-term memory. Experiments on the reference model (Qwen3-14B) and across six models (8B--32B, four families) show that standard fine-tuning produces rote memorization (perturbation gap (the ratio of paraphrase to original perplexity) of 11.6 +- 0.2 x baseline) while all LSCP conditions learn semantically (2.7--3.0x). The r=1.0 condition (identical optimizer, nearly identical data, only Q&A format differs) confirms that the training data format, not $β_2$ gating, is the primary mechanism preventing memorization; gating instead protects neighboring knowledge from contamination by corrupt content (93 +- 7% accuracy on adjacent questions at r=0.98 vs. 90% baseline).

AI.tldr: LSCP是一种自门控后训练框架，通过异常损失检测、自问答验证和基于置信度的β₂调整，实现自主知识获取，防止死记硬背并保护已有知识。
AI.motivation: 解决传统微调导致的死记硬背问题，同时防止新知识污染已有知识，实现类似生物记忆巩固的选择性知识整合。
AI.method: 基于异常高损失的段落检测，生成问答链让模型自我验证知识缺口，根据置信深度k调整AdamW的β₂参数（β₂ = 0.999·r^k），整个学习强度由单个参数r控制。
AI.result: 相比标准微调（扰动间隙11.6±0.2倍基线），所有LSCP条件都实现语义学习（2.7-3.0倍）。r=1.0条件证明训练数据格式（而非β₂门控）是防止死记硬背的主要机制；门控保护相邻知识免受污染（r=0.98时相邻问题准确率93±7% vs 基线90%）。
AI.conclusion: LSCP框架通过自门控机制实现自主知识获取，防止死记硬背，保护已有知识，并模拟生物记忆巩固过程，为后训练提供了一种更智能的知识整合方法。

title: Multi-Agent Video Recommenders: Evolution, Patterns, and Open Challenges
comment: Accepted for publication in The Nineteenth ACM International Conference on Web Search and Data Mining (WSDM Companion 2026)
summary: Video recommender systems are among the most popular and impactful applications of AI, shaping content consumption and influencing culture for billions of users. Traditional single-model recommenders, which optimize static engagement metrics, are increasingly limited in addressing the dynamic requirements of modern platforms. In response, multi-agent architectures are redefining how video recommender systems serve, learn, and adapt to both users and datasets. These agent-based systems coordinate specialized agents responsible for video understanding, reasoning, memory, and feedback, to provide precise, explainable recommendations. In this survey, we trace the evolution of multi-agent video recommendation systems (MAVRS). We combine ideas from multi-agent recommender systems, foundation models, and conversational AI, culminating in the emerging field of large language model (LLM)-powered MAVRS. We present a taxonomy of collaborative patterns and analyze coordination mechanisms across diverse video domains, ranging from short-form clips to educational platforms. We discuss representative frameworks, including early multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) systems such as MMRF and recent LLM-driven architectures like MACRec and Agent4Rec, to illustrate these patterns. We also outline open challenges in scalability, multimodal understanding, incentive alignment, and identify research directions such as hybrid reinforcement learning-LLM systems, lifelong personalization and self-improving recommender systems.

AI.tldr: 该综述论文系统梳理了多智能体视频推荐系统(MAVRS)的发展历程，从传统单模型推荐系统到基于大语言模型的多智能体架构，分析了协作模式、协调机制，并讨论了该领域面临的挑战和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 传统基于单模型的视频推荐系统主要优化静态参与度指标，难以满足现代平台的动态需求。多智能体架构通过协调专门负责视频理解、推理、记忆和反馈的智能体，能够提供更精准、可解释的推荐，从而应对视频推荐系统的复杂性和动态性挑战。
AI.method: 论文采用综述研究方法，首先追溯多智能体视频推荐系统的演进历程，结合多智能体推荐系统、基础模型和对话式AI的思想，聚焦于LLM驱动的MAVRS新兴领域。提出了协作模式的分类法，分析不同视频领域（从短视频到教育平台）的协调机制，并通过代表性框架（如早期的MMRF多智能体强化学习系统和最近的MACRec、Agent4Rec等LLM驱动架构）来阐释这些模式。
AI.result: 论文系统梳理了MAVRS的发展脉络，建立了多智能体视频推荐系统的分类框架，识别了不同协作模式和协调机制。通过分析代表性系统，展示了从多智能体强化学习到LLM驱动架构的技术演进，为理解这一新兴领域提供了系统性的知识框架。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体架构正在重新定义视频推荐系统的服务、学习和适应方式。LLM驱动的MAVRS代表了该领域的最新发展方向，但仍面临可扩展性、多模态理解、激励对齐等挑战。未来研究方向包括混合强化学习-LLM系统、终身个性化、自改进推荐系统等，这些方向将推动视频推荐系统向更智能、更适应、更可解释的方向发展。

title: annbatch unlocks terabyte-scale training of biological data in anndata
summary: The scale of biological datasets now routinely exceeds system memory, making data access rather than model computation the primary bottleneck in training machine-learning models. This bottleneck is particularly acute in biology, where widely used community data formats must support heterogeneous metadata, sparse and dense assays, and downstream analysis within established computational ecosystems. Here we present annbatch, a mini-batch loader native to anndata that enables out-of-core training directly on disk-backed datasets. Across single-cell transcriptomics, microscopy and whole-genome sequencing benchmarks, annbatch increases loading throughput by up to an order of magnitude and shortens training from days to hours, while remaining fully compatible with the scverse ecosystem. Annbatch establishes a practical data-loading infrastructure for scalable biological AI, allowing increasingly large and diverse datasets to be used without abandoning standard biological data formats. Github: https://github.com/scverse/annbatch

AI.tldr: annbatch是一个原生集成于anndata的mini-batch加载器，支持直接在磁盘数据集上进行out-of-core训练，显著提升生物数据加载吞吐量并缩短训练时间
AI.motivation: 生物数据集规模已常超出系统内存，数据访问而非模型计算成为训练机器学习模型的主要瓶颈。现有生物数据格式需要支持异构元数据、稀疏和密集检测数据，并在现有计算生态系统中进行下游分析
AI.method: 开发annbatch作为anndata的原生mini-batch加载器，支持直接在磁盘数据集上进行out-of-core训练，保持与scverse生态系统的完全兼容性
