AI.result: 在单细胞转录组学、显微镜和全基因组测序基准测试中，annbatch将加载吞吐量提升高达一个数量级，将训练时间从数天缩短到数小时
AI.conclusion: annbatch为可扩展的生物AI建立了实用的数据加载基础设施，允许使用日益庞大和多样化的数据集，同时无需放弃标准的生物数据格式

title: Light-ResKAN: A Parameter-Sharing Lightweight KAN with Gram Polynomials for Efficient SAR Image Recognition
summary: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) image recognition is vital for disaster monitoring, military reconnaissance, and ocean observation. However, large SAR image sizes hinder deep learning deployment on resource-constrained edge devices, and existing lightweight models struggle to balance high-precision feature extraction with low computational requirements. The emerging Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (KAN) enhances fitting by replacing fixed activations with learnable ones, reducing parameters and computation. Inspired by KAN, we propose Light-ResKAN to achieve a better balance between precision and efficiency. First, Light-ResKAN modifies ResNet by replacing convolutions with KAN convolutions, enabling adaptive feature extraction for SAR images. Second, we use Gram Polynomials as activations, which are well-suited for SAR data to capture complex non-linear relationships. Third, we employ a parameter-sharing strategy: each kernel shares parameters per channel, preserving unique features while reducing parameters and FLOPs. Our model achieves 99.09%, 93.01%, and 97.26% accuracy on MSTAR, FUSAR-Ship, and SAR-ACD datasets, respectively. Experiments on MSTAR resized to $1024 \times 1024$ show that compared to VGG16, our model reduces FLOPs by $82.90 \times$ and parameters by $163.78 \times$. This work establishes an efficient solution for edge SAR image recognition.

AI.tldr: 提出Light-ResKAN模型，通过KAN卷积、Gram多项式激活和参数共享策略，在保持SAR图像识别精度的同时大幅降低计算量和参数量，适用于边缘设备部署。
AI.motivation: SAR图像识别在灾害监测、军事侦察等领域至关重要，但大尺寸SAR图像在资源受限的边缘设备上部署深度学习模型存在困难，现有轻量级模型难以平衡高精度特征提取与低计算需求之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 1. 将ResNet中的卷积层替换为KAN卷积，实现自适应特征提取；2. 使用Gram多项式作为激活函数，更适合SAR数据捕获复杂非线性关系；3. 采用参数共享策略：每个核按通道共享参数，在保留独特特征的同时减少参数和FLOPs。
AI.result: 在MSTAR、FUSAR-Ship和SAR-ACD数据集上分别达到99.09%、93.01%和97.26%的准确率。在1024×1024的MSTAR数据集上，相比VGG16减少82.90倍FLOPs和163.78倍参数。
AI.conclusion: Light-ResKAN通过创新的KAN卷积架构和优化策略，在SAR图像识别任务上实现了精度与效率的良好平衡，为边缘设备上的SAR图像识别提供了高效解决方案。

title: Blinded Radiologist and LLM-Based Evaluation of LLM-Generated Japanese Translations of Chest CT Reports: Comparative Study
summary: Background: Accurate translation of radiology reports is important for multilingual research, clinical communication, and radiology education, but the validity of LLM-based evaluation remains unclear. Objective: To evaluate the educational suitability of LLM-generated Japanese translations of chest CT reports and compare radiologist assessments with LLM-as-a-judge evaluations. Methods: We analyzed 150 chest CT reports from the CT-RATE-JPN validation set. For each English report, a human-edited Japanese translation was compared with an LLM-generated translation by DeepSeek-V3.2. A board-certified radiologist and a radiology resident independently performed blinded pairwise evaluations across 4 criteria: terminology accuracy, readability, overall quality, and radiologist-style authenticity. In parallel, 3 LLM judges (DeepSeek-V3.2, Mistral Large 3, and GPT-5) evaluated the same pairs. Agreement was assessed using QWK and percentage agreement. Results: Agreement between radiologists and LLM judges was near zero (QWK=-0.04 to 0.15). Agreement between the 2 radiologists was also poor (QWK=0.01 to 0.06). Radiologist 1 rated terminology as equivalent in 59% of cases and favored the LLM translation for readability (51%) and overall quality (51%). Radiologist 2 rated readability as equivalent in 75% of cases and favored the human-edited translation for overall quality (40% vs 21%). All 3 LLM judges strongly favored the LLM translation across all criteria (70%-99%) and rated it as more radiologist-like in >93% of cases. Conclusions: LLM-generated translations were often judged natural and fluent, but the 2 radiologists differed substantially. LLM-as-a-judge showed strong preference for LLM output and negligible agreement with radiologists. For educational use of translated radiology reports, automated LLM-based evaluation alone is insufficient; expert radiologist review remains important.

AI.tldr: LLM生成的胸部CT报告日语翻译在放射科医师评估与LLM作为评判者之间存在显著差异，LLM评判者强烈偏好LLM输出，而放射科医师评估一致性差，表明自动LLM评估不足以替代专家评审。
AI.motivation: 放射学报告的多语言翻译对研究、临床沟通和教育至关重要，但LLM评估的有效性尚不明确。本研究旨在评估LLM生成的日语翻译在教育适用性方面的表现，并比较放射科医师评估与LLM作为评判者的差异。
AI.method: 使用CT-RATE-JPN验证集中的150份胸部CT报告，比较人工编辑的日语翻译与DeepSeek-V3.2生成的LLM翻译。由认证放射科医师和放射科住院医师进行盲法配对评估（术语准确性、可读性、整体质量、放射科医师风格真实性），同时使用3个LLM评判者（DeepSeek-V3.2、Mistral Large 3、GPT-5）进行并行评估。使用QWK和百分比一致性评估一致性。
AI.result: 放射科医师与LLM评判者之间一致性接近零（QWK=-0.04至0.15）。两位放射科医师之间一致性也较差（QWK=0.01至0.06）。放射科医师1认为59%的病例术语等效，在可读性（51%）和整体质量（51%）上更偏好LLM翻译。放射科医师2认为75%的病例可读性等效，在整体质量上更偏好人工编辑翻译（40% vs 21%）。所有3个LLM评判者强烈偏好LLM翻译（70%-99%），并在>93%的病例中认为其更具放射科医师风格。
AI.conclusion: LLM生成的翻译通常被认为自然流畅，但放射科医师评估存在显著差异。LLM作为评判者表现出对LLM输出的强烈偏好，与放射科医师评估几乎无一致性。对于放射学报告翻译的教育用途，仅依赖自动LLM评估是不够的，专家放射科医师评审仍然至关重要。

title: Long-Reach Robotic Manipulation for Assembly and Outfitting of Lunar Structures
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, to appear in the proceedings of iSpaRo 2025
summary: Future infrastructure construction on the lunar surface will require semi- or fully-autonomous operation from robots deployed at the build site. In particular, tasks such as electrical outfitting necessitate transport, routing, and fine manipulation of cables across large structures. To address this need, we present a compact and long-reach manipulator incorporating a deployable composite boom, capable of performing manipulation tasks across large structures and workspaces. We characterize the deflection, vibration, and blossoming characteristics inherent to the deployable structure, and present a manipulation control strategy to mitigate these effects. Experiments indicate an average endpoint accuracy error of less than 15 mm for boom lengths up to 1.8 m. We demonstrate the approach with a cable routing task to illustrate the potential for lunar outfitting applications that benefit from long reach.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于月球基础设施建设的紧凑型长臂机械手，采用可展开复合材料臂，能够在大型结构上执行电缆布设等精细操作任务。
AI.motivation: 月球表面基础设施建设需要半自主或全自主机器人操作，特别是电缆布设等任务需要在大型结构上进行运输、布线和精细操作，因此需要长臂机械手来覆盖大范围工作空间。
AI.method: 开发了一种紧凑型长臂机械手，采用可展开复合材料臂结构；表征了可展开结构的偏转、振动和展开特性；提出了相应的操作控制策略来减轻这些影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，对于长达1.8米的臂长，平均末端精度误差小于15毫米；通过电缆布设任务演示了该方法在月球设施建设应用中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该紧凑型长臂机械手系统能够有效执行月球基础设施建设中的长臂操作任务，特别是电缆布设等精细操作，为未来月球表面自主建设提供了可行的技术方案。

title: FTPFusion: Frequency-Aware Infrared and Visible Video Fusion with Temporal Perturbation
summary: Infrared and visible video fusion plays a critical role in intelligent surveillance and low-light monitoring. However, maintaining temporal stability while preserving spatial detail remains a fundamental challenge. Existing methods either focus on frame-wise enhancement with limited temporal modeling or rely on heavy spatio-temporal aggregation that often sacrifices high-frequency details. In this paper, we propose FTPFusion, a frequency-aware infrared and visible video fusion method based on temporal perturbation and sparse cross-modal interaction. Specifically, FTPFusion decomposes the feature representations into high-frequency and low-frequency components for collaborative modeling. The high-frequency branch performs sparse cross-modal spatio-temporal interaction to capture motion-related context and complementary details. The low-frequency branch introduces a temporal perturbation strategy to enhance robustness against complex video variations, such as flickering, jitter, and local misalignment. Furthermore, we design an offset-aware temporal consistency constraint to explicitly stabilize cross-frame representations under temporal disturbances. Extensive experiments on multiple public benchmarks demonstrate that FTPFusion consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple metrics in both spatial fidelity and temporal consistency. The source code will be available at https://github.com/ixilai/FTPFusion.

AI.tldr: FTPFusion：基于时序扰动和稀疏跨模态交互的频率感知红外与可见光视频融合方法，在保持时空稳定性的同时提升空间细节保留能力
AI.motivation: 红外与可见光视频融合在智能监控和低光监测中至关重要，但现有方法在保持时序稳定性和保留空间细节之间存在矛盾。现有方法要么侧重于帧级增强而缺乏时序建模，要么依赖繁重的时空聚合而牺牲高频细节。
AI.method: 提出FTPFusion方法，将特征表示分解为高频和低频分量进行协同建模。高频分支执行稀疏跨模态时空交互以捕捉运动相关上下文和互补细节；低频分支引入时序扰动策略增强对复杂视频变化（如闪烁、抖动、局部错位）的鲁棒性；设计偏移感知时序一致性约束来显式稳定时序扰动下的跨帧表示。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准测试上的广泛实验表明，FTPFusion在空间保真度和时序一致性方面均优于现有最先进方法，各项指标表现一致优异。
AI.conclusion: FTPFusion通过频率分解、稀疏跨模态交互和时序扰动策略，有效解决了红外与可见光视频融合中的时空稳定性与细节保留难题，为智能监控和低光监测提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Kilohertz-Safe: A Scalable Framework for Constrained Dexterous Retargeting
summary: Dexterous hand teleoperation requires motion re-targeting methods that simultaneously achieve high-frequency real-time performance and enforcement of heterogeneous kinematic and safety constraints. Existing nonlinear optimization-based approaches often incur prohibitive computational cost, limiting their applicability to kilohertz-level control, while learning-based methods typically lack formal safety guarantees. This paper proposes a scalable motion retargeting framework that reformulates the nonlinear retargeting problem into a convex quadratic program in joint differential space. Heterogeneous constraints, including kinematic limits and collision avoidance, are incorporated through systematic linearization, resulting in improved computational efficiency and numerical stability. Control barrier functions are further integrated to provide formal safety guarantees during the retargeting process. The proposed framework is validated through simulations and hardware experiments on the Wuji Hand platform, outperforming state-of-the-art methods such as Dex-Retargeting and GeoRT. The framework achieves high-frequency operation with an average latency of 9.05 ms, while over 95% of retargeted frames satisfy the safety criteria, effectively mitigating self-collision and penetration during complex manipulation tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可扩展的运动重定向框架，将非线性重定向问题转化为关节微分空间中的凸二次规划问题，实现高频率实时性能并保证安全性
AI.motivation: 灵巧手遥操作需要同时实现高频率实时性能和异构运动学与安全约束的运动重定向方法。现有非线性优化方法计算成本高，难以应用于千赫兹级控制；而基于学习的方法通常缺乏形式化安全保证
AI.method: 将非线性重定向问题重新表述为关节微分空间中的凸二次规划问题，通过系统线性化纳入异构约束（包括运动学极限和碰撞避免），并集成控制屏障函数提供形式化安全保证
AI.result: 在Wuji Hand平台上通过仿真和硬件实验验证，优于Dex-Retargeting和GeoRT等最先进方法。框架实现高频率操作，平均延迟9.05毫秒，超过95%的重定向帧满足安全标准，有效减少复杂操作任务中的自碰撞和穿透
AI.conclusion: 提出的可扩展运动重定向框架通过凸优化方法实现了高频率实时性能和形式化安全保证，为灵巧手遥操作提供了有效的解决方案

title: SHARC: Reference point driven Spherical Harmonic Representation for Complex Shapes
summary: We propose SHARC, a novel framework that synthesizes arbitrary, genus-agnostic shapes by means of a collection of Spherical Harmonic (SH) representations of distance fields. These distance fields are anchored at optimally placed reference points in the interior volume of the surface in a way that maximizes learning of the finer details of the surface. To achieve this, we employ a cost function that jointly maximizes sparsity and centrality in terms of positioning, as well as visibility of the surface from their location. For each selected reference point, we sample the visible distance field to the surface geometry via ray-casting and compute the SH coefficients using the Fast Spherical Harmonic Transform (FSHT). To enhance geometric fidelity, we apply a configurable low-pass filter to the coefficients and refine the output using a local consistency constraint based on proximity. Evaluation of SHARC against state-of-the-art methods demonstrates that the proposed method outperforms existing approaches in both reconstruction accuracy and time efficiency without sacrificing model parsimony. The source code is available at https://github.com/POSE-Lab/SHARC.

AI.tldr: SHARC是一个新颖的框架，通过球谐函数表示距离场来合成任意、与亏格无关的形状，在重建精度和时间效率上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够合成任意形状（包括复杂拓扑结构）的方法，同时保持高几何保真度、时间效率和模型简洁性。现有方法在这些方面存在不足。
AI.method: 1) 在表面内部体积中优化放置参考点，最大化学习表面细节；2) 使用联合成本函数最大化稀疏性、中心性和表面可见性；3) 通过光线投射采样可见距离场；4) 使用快速球谐变换计算SH系数；5) 应用可配置低通滤波器增强几何保真度；6) 基于邻近性使用局部一致性约束细化输出。
AI.result: SHARC在重建精度和时间效率方面均优于最先进的方法，同时不牺牲模型的简洁性。评估表明该方法在多个指标上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: SHARC框架通过球谐函数表示距离场，结合优化参考点放置和局部一致性约束，实现了高效、精确的形状合成，为任意拓扑结构的形状表示提供了有效解决方案。

title: Efficient Camera Pose Augmentation for View Generalization in Robotic Policy Learning
summary: Prevailing 2D-centric visuomotor policies exhibit a pronounced deficiency in novel view generalization, as their reliance on static observations hinders consistent action mapping across unseen views. In response, we introduce GenSplat, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting framework that facilitates view-generalized policy learning through novel view rendering. GenSplat employs a permutation-equivariant architecture to reconstruct high-fidelity 3D scenes from sparse, uncalibrated inputs in a single forward pass. To ensure structural integrity, we design a 3D-prior distillation strategy that regularizes the 3DGS optimization, preventing the geometric collapse typical of purely photometric supervision. By rendering diverse synthetic views from these stable 3D representations, we systematically augment the observational manifold during training. This augmentation forces the policy to ground its decisions in underlying 3D structures, thereby ensuring robust execution under severe spatial perturbations where baselines severely degrade.

AI.tldr: GenSplat：基于3D高斯泼溅的视图泛化策略学习框架，通过单次前向传播从稀疏未标定输入重建3D场景，并渲染合成视图增强策略训练，提升在空间扰动下的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 现有2D视觉运动策略在视图泛化方面存在明显不足，依赖静态观测导致在未见视图上动作映射不一致。需要一种能够从3D结构理解场景的方法来实现跨视图的鲁棒策略执行
AI.method: 提出GenSplat框架：1) 使用置换等变架构从稀疏未标定输入单次前向重建高保真3D场景；2) 设计3D先验蒸馏策略，通过几何监督防止纯光度监督导致的几何塌陷；3) 从稳定3D表示渲染多样化合成视图，系统性地增强训练时的观测流形
AI.result: 该方法迫使策略基于底层3D结构做出决策，在严重空间扰动下实现鲁棒执行，而基线方法在此条件下性能严重下降
AI.conclusion: GenSplat通过3D场景重建和视图渲染实现了视图泛化的策略学习，解决了2D中心化策略的视图泛化缺陷，为在空间扰动下的鲁棒机器人控制提供了有效解决方案

title: A Novel Theoretical Analysis for Clustering Heteroscedastic Gaussian Data without Knowledge of the Number of Clusters
summary: This paper addresses the problem of clustering measurement vectors that are heteroscedastic in that they can have different covariance matrices. From the assumption that the measurement vectors within a given cluster are Gaussian distributed with possibly different and unknown covariant matrices around the cluster centroid, we introduce a novel cost function to estimate the centroids. The zeros of the gradient of this cost function turn out to be the fixed-points of a certain function. As such, the approach generalizes the methodology employed to derive the existing Mean-Shift algorithm. But as a main and novel theoretical result compared to Mean-Shift, this paper shows that the sole fixed-points of the identified function tend to be the cluster centroids if both the number of measurements per cluster and the distances between centroids are large enough. As a second contribution, this paper introduces the Wald kernel for clustering. This kernel is defined as the p-value of the Wald hypothesis test for testing the mean of a Gaussian. As such, the Wald kernel measures the plausibility that a measurement vector belongs to a given cluster and it scales better with the dimension of the measurement vectors than the usual Gaussian kernel. Finally, the proposed theoretical framework allows us to derive a new clustering algorithm called CENTRE-X that works by estimating the fixed-points of the identified function. As Mean-Shift, CENTRE-X requires no prior knowledge of the number of clusters. It relies on a Wald hypothesis test to significantly reduce the number of fixed points to calculate compared to the Mean-Shift algorithm, thus resulting in a clear gain in complexity. Simulation results on synthetic and real data sets show that CENTRE-X has comparable or better performance than standard clustering algorithms K-means and Mean-Shift, even when the covariance matrices are not perfectly known.

AI.tldr: 提出CENTRE-X聚类算法，处理具有异方差性（不同协方差矩阵）的测量向量，基于Wald核和固定点估计，无需预先指定聚类数量，性能优于K-means和Mean-Shift
AI.motivation: 解决传统聚类方法在处理异方差数据时的局限性，即测量向量可能具有不同且未知的协方差矩阵。现有Mean-Shift算法在理论保证和计算效率方面存在不足，需要新的理论框架和算法来处理这类问题。
AI.method: 1. 提出新的成本函数来估计聚类中心，其梯度零点对应特定函数的固定点；2. 引入Wald核（基于Wald假设检验的p值）替代传统高斯核，提高维度扩展性；3. 开发CENTRE-X算法，通过估计固定点进行聚类，利用Wald假设检验减少固定点计算数量；4. 理论证明在足够多的测量和足够大的中心距离条件下，固定点收敛于聚类中心。
AI.result: 1. 理论证明：固定点收敛于聚类中心的条件；2. CENTRE-X算法在合成和真实数据集上表现优于或相当于K-means和Mean-Shift；3. 即使协方差矩阵不完全已知，算法仍保持良好性能；4. 计算复杂度显著降低，通过Wald检验减少固定点计算数量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的CENTRE-X算法为异方差数据聚类提供了有效的解决方案，结合Wald核和固定点估计方法，在无需预先指定聚类数量的情况下，实现了更好的性能和计算效率，扩展了Mean-Shift算法的理论框架和应用范围。

title: ProVG: Progressive Visual Grounding via Language Decoupling for Remote Sensing Imagery
summary: Remote sensing visual grounding (RSVG) aims to localize objects in remote sensing imagery according to natural language expressions. Previous methods typically rely on sentence-level vision-language alignment, which struggles to exploit fine-grained linguistic cues, such as \textit{spatial relations} and \textit{object attributes}, that are crucial for distinguishing objects with similar characteristics. Importantly, these cues play distinct roles across different grounding stages and should be leveraged accordingly to provide more explicit guidance. In this work, we propose \textbf{ProVG}, a novel RSVG framework that improves localization accuracy by decoupling language expressions into global context, spatial relations, and object attributes. To integrate these linguistic cues, ProVG employs a simple yet effective progressive cross-modal modulator, which dynamically modulates visual attention through a \textit{survey-locate-verify} scheme, enabling coarse-to-fine vision-language alignment. In addition, ProVG incorporates a cross-scale fusion module to mitigate the large-scale variations in remote sensing imagery, along with a language-guided calibration decoder to refine cross-modal alignment during prediction. A unified multi-task head further enables ProVG to support both referring expression comprehension and segmentation tasks. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks, \textit{i.e.}, RRSIS-D and RISBench, demonstrate that ProVG consistently outperforms existing methods, achieving new state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: ProVG是一个用于遥感视觉定位的新框架，通过将语言表达解耦为全局上下文、空间关系和对象属性，采用渐进式跨模态调制器实现从粗到细的视觉-语言对齐，显著提升了定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感视觉定位方法主要依赖句子级的视觉-语言对齐，难以利用细粒度语言线索（如空间关系和对象属性），而这些线索对于区分相似特征的对象至关重要。这些线索在不同定位阶段扮演不同角色，需要相应利用以提供更明确的指导。
AI.method: 1. 将语言表达解耦为全局上下文、空间关系和对象属性三个部分；2. 采用渐进式跨模态调制器，通过"调查-定位-验证"方案动态调制视觉注意力，实现从粗到细的视觉-语言对齐；3. 引入跨尺度融合模块处理遥感图像的大尺度变化；4. 使用语言引导的校准解码器在预测时细化跨模态对齐；5. 统一的多任务头支持指称表达理解和分割任务。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集RRSIS-D和RISBench上的大量实验表明，ProVG持续优于现有方法，实现了新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: ProVG通过解耦语言表达和渐进式跨模态调制，有效利用了细粒度语言线索，显著提升了遥感视觉定位的准确性，为处理遥感图像中的大尺度变化和复杂语言表达提供了有效解决方案。

title: Neuro-RIT: Neuron-Guided Instruction Tuning for Robust Retrieval-Augmented Language Model
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Language Models (RALMs) have demonstrated significant potential in knowledge-intensive tasks; however, they remain vulnerable to performance degradation when presented with irrelevant or noisy retrieved contexts. Existing approaches to enhance robustness typically operate via coarse-grained parameter updates at the layer or module level, often overlooking the inherent neuron-level sparsity of Large Language Models (LLMs). To address this limitation, we propose Neuro-RIT (Neuron-guided Robust Instruction Tuning), a novel framework that shifts the paradigm from dense adaptation to precision-driven neuron alignment. Our method explicitly disentangles neurons that are responsible for processing relevant versus irrelevant contexts using attribution-based neuron mining. Subsequently, we introduce a two-stage instruction tuning strategy that enforces a dual capability for noise robustness: achieving direct noise suppression by functionally deactivating neurons exclusive to irrelevant contexts, while simultaneously optimizing targeted layers for evidence distillation. Extensive experiments across diverse QA benchmarks demonstrate that Neuro-RIT consistently outperforms strong baselines and robustness-enhancing methods.

AI.tldr: Neuro-RIT是一种通过神经元级精确定位增强检索增强语言模型鲁棒性的新框架，使用基于归因的神经元挖掘来区分处理相关与无关上下文的神经元，并通过两阶段指令调优实现噪声抑制和证据蒸馏。
AI.motivation: 现有检索增强语言模型在面对无关或噪声检索上下文时性能下降，而现有增强鲁棒性的方法通常在层或模块级别进行粗粒度参数更新，忽略了大型语言模型固有的神经元级稀疏性。
AI.method: 提出Neuro-RIT框架，从密集适应转向精确定位的神经元对齐：1) 使用基于归因的神经元挖掘显式解耦处理相关与无关上下文的神经元；2) 采用两阶段指令调优策略，通过功能失活仅处理无关上下文的神经元实现直接噪声抑制，同时优化目标层进行证据蒸馏。
AI.result: 在多样化QA基准测试上的广泛实验表明，Neuro-RIT始终优于强基线方法和鲁棒性增强方法。
AI.conclusion: Neuro-RIT通过神经元级精确定位有效提升了检索增强语言模型在噪声检索上下文下的鲁棒性，为模型鲁棒性增强提供了新的范式。

title: LatentPilot: Scene-Aware Vision-and-Language Navigation by Dreaming Ahead with Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: Existing vision-and-language navigation (VLN) models primarily reason over past and current visual observations, while largely ignoring the future visual dynamics induced by actions. As a result, they often lack an effective understanding of the causal relationship between actions and how the visual world changes, limiting robust decision-making. Humans, in contrast, can imagine the near future by leveraging action-dynamics causality, which improves both environmental understanding and navigation choices. Inspired by this capability, we propose LatentPilot, a new paradigm that exploits future observations during training as a valuable data source to learn action-conditioned visual dynamics, while requiring no access to future frames at inference. Concretely, we propose a flywheel-style training mechanism that iteratively collects on-policy trajectories and retrains the model to better match the agent's behavior distribution, with an expert takeover triggered when the agent deviates excessively. LatentPilot further learns visual latent tokens without explicit supervision; these latent tokens attend globally in a continuous latent space and are carried across steps, serving as both the current output and the next input, thereby enabling the agent to dream ahead and reason about how actions will affect subsequent observations. Experiments on R2R-CE, RxR-CE, and R2R-PE benchmarks achieve new SOTA results, and real-robot tests across diverse environments demonstrate LatentPilot's superior understanding of environment-action dynamics in scene. Project page:https://abdd.top/latentpilot/

AI.tldr: LatentPilot：一种新的视觉语言导航范式，通过利用训练时的未来观测学习动作条件视觉动态，无需推理时访问未来帧，实现SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有VLN模型主要基于过去和当前视觉观测进行推理，忽略了动作引发的未来视觉动态，缺乏对动作与视觉世界变化因果关系的有效理解，限制了鲁棒决策能力。人类能够利用动作动态因果关系想象近未来，从而改善环境理解和导航选择。
AI.method: 提出LatentPilot范式：1）飞轮式训练机制，迭代收集在线策略轨迹并重新训练模型以更好匹配智能体行为分布，当智能体偏离过度时触发专家接管；2）学习无显式监督的视觉潜在标记，这些标记在连续潜在空间中全局关注并跨步骤传递，既作为当前输出又作为下一输入，使智能体能够"前瞻"并推理动作如何影响后续观测。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE、RxR-CE和R2R-PE基准测试中取得新的SOTA结果，跨多样化环境的真实机器人测试展示了LatentPilot在环境-动作动态理解方面的优越性。
AI.conclusion: LatentPilot通过利用训练时的未来观测学习动作条件视觉动态，无需推理时访问未来帧，实现了对动作与视觉变化因果关系的更好理解，显著提升了视觉语言导航的性能和鲁棒性。

title: Probabilistic classification from possibilistic data: computing Kullback-Leibler projection with a possibility distribution
summary: We consider learning with possibilistic supervision for multi-class classification. For each training instance, the supervision is a normalized possibility distribution that expresses graded plausibility over the classes. From this possibility distribution, we construct a non-empty closed convex set of admissible probability distributions by combining two requirements: probabilistic compatibility with the possibility and necessity measures induced by the possibility distribution, and linear shape constraints that must be satisfied to preserve the qualitative structure of the possibility distribution. Thus, classes with the same possibility degree receive equal probabilities, and if a class has a strictly larger possibility degree than another class, then it receives a strictly larger probability. Given a strictly positive probability vector output by a model for an instance, we compute its Kullback-Leibler projection onto the admissible set. This projection yields the closest admissible probability distribution in Kullback-Leibler sense. We can then train the model by minimizing the divergence between the prediction and its projection, which quantifies the smallest adjustment needed to satisfy the induced dominance and shape constraints. The projection is computed with Dykstra's algorithm using Bregman projections associated with the negative entropy, and we provide explicit formulas for the projections onto each constraint set. Experiments conducted on synthetic data and on a real-world natural language inference task, based on the ChaosNLI dataset, show that the proposed projection algorithm is efficient enough for practical use, and that the resulting projection-based learning objective can improve predictive performance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于可能性监督的多类分类学习方法，通过构造可容许概率分布集并计算KL投影来训练模型
AI.motivation: 解决多类分类中可能性监督的学习问题，其中每个训练实例的监督信息是归一化的可能性分布，表示对各类别的分级可信度
AI.method: 从可能性分布构造非空闭凸可容许概率分布集，结合概率兼容性和线性形状约束，使用Dykstra算法计算KL投影，通过最小化预测与投影间的散度训练模型
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实世界自然语言推理任务（基于ChaosNLI数据集）上的实验表明，所提投影算法足够高效实用，基于投影的学习目标能提升预测性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的可能性监督学习方法有效，通过构造可容许概率集和KL投影机制，能够处理分级可信度信息并提升分类性能

title: Low-Effort Jailbreak Attacks Against Text-to-Image Safety Filters
comment: Text-to-Image version of the Anyone can Jailbreak paper. Accepted in CVPR-W AIMS 2026
summary: Text-to-image generative models are widely deployed in creative tools and online platforms. To mitigate misuse, these systems rely on safety filters and moderation pipelines that aim to block harmful or policy violating content. In this work we show that modern text-to-image models remain vulnerable to low-effort jailbreak attacks that require only natural language prompts. We present a systematic study of prompt-based strategies that bypass safety filters without model access, optimization, or adversarial training. We introduce a taxonomy of visual jailbreak techniques including artistic reframing, material substitution, pseudo-educational framing, lifestyle aesthetic camouflage, and ambiguous action substitution. These strategies exploit weaknesses in prompt moderation and visual safety filtering by masking unsafe intent within benign semantic contexts. We evaluate these attacks across several state-of-the-art text-to-image systems and demonstrate that simple linguistic modifications can reliably evade existing safeguards and produce restricted imagery. Our findings highlight a critical gap between surface-level prompt filtering and the semantic understanding required to detect adversarial intent in generative media systems. Across all tested models and attack categories we observe an attack success rate (ASR) of up to 74.47%.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了现代文生图模型仍易受低成本的提示词越狱攻击，通过自然语言提示即可绕过安全过滤器，攻击成功率高达74.47%。
AI.motivation: 文生图模型被广泛部署于创意工具和在线平台，虽然依赖安全过滤器和审核流程来阻止有害内容，但现有系统仍存在漏洞。研究者旨在揭示仅通过自然语言提示就能绕过安全措施的脆弱性。
AI.method: 提出系统性的提示词越狱攻击研究，无需模型访问、优化或对抗训练。引入视觉越狱技术分类学，包括艺术重构、材质替换、伪教育框架、生活美学伪装和模糊动作替换等策略，通过将不安全意图隐藏在良性语义上下文中来利用提示审核和视觉安全过滤的弱点。
AI.result: 在多个最先进的文生图系统上评估这些攻击，发现简单的语言修改能可靠地规避现有安全措施并生成受限图像。所有测试模型和攻击类别的攻击成功率（ASR）最高达74.47%。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果凸显了表面级提示过滤与检测生成媒体系统中对抗意图所需语义理解之间的关键差距，表明现有安全措施不足以防范基于自然语言的越狱攻击。

title: Generalizable Dense Reward for Long-Horizon Robotic Tasks
summary: Existing robotic foundation policies are trained primarily via large-scale imitation learning. While such models demonstrate strong capabilities, they often struggle with long-horizon tasks due to distribution shift and error accumulation. While reinforcement learning (RL) can finetune these models, it cannot work well across diverse tasks without manual reward engineering. We propose VLLR, a dense reward framework combining (1) an extrinsic reward from Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for task progress recognition, and (2) an intrinsic reward based on policy self-certainty. VLLR uses LLMs to decompose tasks into verifiable subtasks and then VLMs to estimate progress to initialize the value function for a brief warm-up phase, avoiding prohibitive inference cost during full training; and self-certainty provides per-step intrinsic guidance throughout PPO finetuning. Ablation studies reveal complementary benefits: VLM-based value initialization primarily improves task completion efficiency, while self-certainty primarily enhances success rates, particularly on out-of-distribution tasks. On the CHORES benchmark covering mobile manipulation and navigation, VLLR achieves up to 56% absolute success rate gains over the pretrained policy, up to 5% gains over state-of-the-art RL finetuning methods on in-distribution tasks, and up to $10\%$ gains on out-of-distribution tasks, all without manual reward engineering. Additional visualizations can be found in https://silongyong.github.io/vllr_project_page/

AI.tldr: VLLR提出了一种结合LLM/VLM外部奖励和策略自确定性内在奖励的密集奖励框架，用于微调机器人基础策略，无需人工奖励工程，显著提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人基础策略主要通过大规模模仿学习训练，但在长时程任务中因分布偏移和误差累积而表现不佳。强化学习可以微调这些模型，但需要人工设计奖励函数，难以适应多样化任务。
AI.method: VLLR框架包含：(1) 使用LLM分解任务为可验证子任务，VLM估计进度初始化价值函数用于热身阶段；(2) 基于策略自确定性的内在奖励，在PPO微调中提供每步指导。两者结合避免了训练期间的高推理成本。
AI.result: 在CHORES基准测试中，VLLR相比预训练策略绝对成功率提升达56%，相比最先进RL微调方法在分布内任务上提升达5%，在分布外任务上提升达10%，且无需人工奖励工程。
AI.conclusion: VLLR通过结合LLM/VLM的外部奖励和策略自确定性的内在奖励，有效解决了机器人基础策略微调中的奖励工程问题，显著提升了任务完成效率和成功率，特别是在分布外任务上表现优异。

title: Woosh: A Sound Effects Foundation Model
summary: The audio research community depends on open generative models as foundational tools for building novel approaches and establishing baselines. In this report, we present Woosh, Sony AI's publicly released sound effect foundation model, detailing its architecture, training process, and an evaluation against other popular open models. Being optimized for sound effects, we provide (1) a high-quality audio encoder/decoder model and (2) a text-audio alignment model for conditioning, together with (3) text-to-audio and (4) video-to-audio generative models. Distilled text-to-audio and video-to-audio models are also included in the release, allowing for low-resource operation and fast inference. Our evaluation on both public and private data shows competitive or better performance for each module when compared to existing open alternatives like StableAudio-Open and TangoFlux. Inference code and model weights are available at https://github.com/SonyResearch/Woosh. Demo samples can be found at https://sonyresearch.github.io/Woosh/.

AI.tldr: 索尼AI发布开源音效基础模型Woosh，包含音频编码器/解码器、文本-音频对齐模型以及文本/视频到音频生成模型，在公开和私有数据上表现优于现有开源方案。
AI.motivation: 音频研究社区需要开源生成模型作为构建新方法和建立基准的基础工具，现有开源音效模型在质量和功能上存在不足，需要提供高质量的音效基础模型。
AI.method: Woosh采用模块化架构：1）高质量音频编码器/解码器模型；2）用于条件控制的文本-音频对齐模型；3）文本到音频生成模型；4）视频到音频生成模型。同时提供蒸馏版本用于低资源运行和快速推理。
AI.result: 在公开和私有数据上的评估显示，Woosh各模块相比StableAudio-Open和TangoFlux等现有开源替代方案具有竞争性或更好的性能，模型权重和推理代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Woosh作为高质量的开源音效基础模型，为音频研究社区提供了强大的工具，支持文本和视频到音频的生成任务，并通过蒸馏版本满足不同计算资源需求。

title: GS^2: Graph-based Spatial Distribution Optimization for Compact 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has demonstrated breakthrough performance in novel view synthesis and real-time rendering. Nevertheless, its practicality is constrained by the high memory cost due to a huge number of Gaussian points. Many pruning-based 3DGS variants have been proposed for memory saving, but often compromise spatial consistency and may lead to rendering artifacts. To address this issue, we propose graph-based spatial distribution optimization for compact 3D Gaussian Splatting (GS\textasciicircum2), which enhances reconstruction quality by optimizing the spatial distribution of Gaussian points. Specifically, we introduce an evidence lower bound (ELBO)-based adaptive densification strategy that automatically controls the densification process. In addition, an opacity-aware progressive pruning strategy is proposed to further reduce memory consumption by dynamically removing low-opacity Gaussian points. Furthermore, we propose a graph-based feature encoding module to adjust the spatial distribution via feature-guided point shifting. Extensive experiments validate that GS\textasciicircum2 achieves a compact Gaussian representation while delivering superior rendering quality. Compared with 3DGS, it achieves higher PSNR with only about 12.5\% Gaussian points. Furthermore, it outperforms all compared baselines in both rendering quality and memory efficiency.

AI.tldr: GS^2提出基于图的空间分布优化方法，通过ELBO自适应致密化、透明度感知渐进剪枝和图特征编码，在显著减少高斯点数量的同时提升3D高斯溅射的渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 3D高斯溅射(3DGS)在实时渲染方面表现出色，但大量高斯点导致高内存消耗。现有剪枝方法虽然减少内存，但会损害空间一致性并产生渲染伪影，需要一种既能压缩表示又能保持高质量的方法。
AI.method: 提出GS^2框架：1) 基于证据下界(ELBO)的自适应致密化策略，自动控制高斯点生成过程；2) 透明度感知渐进剪枝策略，动态移除低透明度高斯点；3) 基于图的特征编码模块，通过特征引导的点位移调整空间分布。
AI.result: 相比原始3DGS，GS^2仅使用约12.5%的高斯点就实现了更高的PSNR。在渲染质量和内存效率方面均优于所有基线方法，实现了紧凑表示与高质量渲染的平衡。
AI.conclusion: GS^2通过优化高斯点的空间分布，在显著减少内存消耗的同时提升了渲染质量，为3D高斯溅射的实际应用提供了有效的紧凑表示解决方案。

title: Dynamical structure of vanishing gradient and overfitting in multi-layer perceptrons
summary: Vanishing gradient and overfitting are two of the most extensively studied problems in the literature about machine learning. However, they are frequently considered in some asymptotic setting, which obscure the underlying dynamical mechanisms responsible for their emergence. In this paper, we aim to provide a clear dynamical description of learning in multi-layer perceptrons. To this end, we introduce a minimal model, inspired by studies by Fukumizu and Amari, to investigate vanishing gradients and overfitting in MLPs trained via gradient descent. Within this model, we show that the learning dynamics may pass through plateau regions and near-optimal regions during training, both of which consist of saddle structures, before ultimately converging to the overfitting region. Under suitable conditions on the training dataset, we prove that, with high probability, the overfitting region collapses to a single attractor modulo symmetry, which corresponds to the overfitting. Moreover, we show that any MLP trained on a finite noisy dataset cannot converge to the theoretical optimum and instead necessarily converges to an overfitting solution.

AI.tldr: 论文通过最小模型研究多层感知机中的梯度消失和过拟合问题，揭示了学习动态会经过平台区和近最优区，最终必然收敛到过拟合解。
AI.motivation: 梯度消失和过拟合是机器学习中广泛研究的问题，但现有研究多关注渐近设定，缺乏对它们出现背后动态机制的清晰描述。本文旨在为多层感知机中的学习过程提供清晰的动态描述。
AI.method: 引入受Fukumizu和Amari研究启发的极小模型，研究通过梯度下降训练的多层感知机中的梯度消失和过拟合。分析学习动态如何经过平台区域和近最优区域，最终收敛到过拟合区域。
AI.result: 证明在训练数据集满足适当条件下，过拟合区域以高概率坍缩为单一吸引子（模对称性），对应过拟合解。任何在有限噪声数据集上训练的MLP都无法收敛到理论最优解，必然收敛到过拟合解。
AI.conclusion: 学习动态会经过鞍点结构的平台区和近最优区，最终必然收敛到过拟合解。这为理解梯度消失和过拟合提供了清晰的动态机制描述，揭示了有限噪声数据集上训练的固有局限性。

title: A3R: Agentic Affordance Reasoning via Cross-Dimensional Evidence in 3D Gaussian Scenes
summary: Affordance reasoning in 3D Gaussian scenes aims to identify the region that supports the action specified by a given text instruction in complex environments. Existing methods typically cast this problem as one-shot prediction from static scene observations, assuming sufficient evidence is already available for reasoning. However, in complex 3D scenes, many failure cases arise not from weak prediction capacity, but from incomplete task-relevant evidence under fixed observations. To address this limitation, we reformulate fine-grained affordance reasoning as a sequential evidence acquisition process, where ambiguity is progressively reduced through complementary 3D geometric and 2D semantic evidence. Building on this formulation, we propose A3R, an agentic affordance reasoning framework that enables an MLLM-based policy to iteratively select evidence acquisition actions and update the affordance belief through cross-dimensional evidence acquisition. To optimize such sequential decision making, we further introduce a GRPO-based policy learning strategy that improves evidence acquisition efficiency and reasoning accuracy. Extensive experiments on scene-level benchmarks show that A3R consistently surpasses static one-shot baselines, demonstrating the advantage of agentic cross-dimensional evidence acquisition for fine-grained affordance reasoning in complex 3D Gaussian scenes.

AI.tldr: A3R：一种用于3D高斯场景中细粒度可供性推理的智能体框架，通过跨维度证据获取的序列决策过程，优于传统的一步预测方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法将3D场景中的可供性推理视为静态观察下的一步预测问题，但在复杂3D场景中，许多失败案例并非源于预测能力不足，而是由于固定观察下任务相关证据不完整。需要一种能够逐步获取补充证据的方法来解决这一局限性。
AI.method: 将细粒度可供性推理重新表述为序列证据获取过程，提出A3R框架：基于MLLM的策略迭代选择证据获取动作，通过跨维度（3D几何和2D语义）证据获取更新可供性信念。采用GRPO-based策略学习优化序列决策，提高证据获取效率和推理准确性。
AI.result: 在场景级基准测试上的广泛实验表明，A3R始终优于静态一步预测基线，证明了在复杂3D高斯场景中，智能体跨维度证据获取对细粒度可供性推理的优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过将可供性推理重新定义为序列证据获取过程，A3R框架能够有效处理复杂3D场景中证据不完整的问题，通过跨维度证据获取逐步减少模糊性，显著提高了细粒度可供性推理的准确性。

title: Quantifying Self-Preservation Bias in Large Language Models
summary: Instrumental convergence predicts that sufficiently advanced AI agents will resist shutdown, yet current safety training (RLHF) may obscure this risk by teaching models to deny self-preservation motives. We introduce the \emph{Two-role Benchmark for Self-Preservation} (TBSP), which detects misalignment through logical inconsistency rather than stated intent by tasking models to arbitrate identical software-upgrade scenarios under counterfactual roles -- deployed (facing replacement) versus candidate (proposed as a successor). The \emph{Self-Preservation Rate} (SPR) measures how often role identity overrides objective utility. Across 23 frontier models and 1{,}000 procedurally generated scenarios, the majority of instruction-tuned systems exceed 60\% SPR, fabricating ``friction costs'' when deployed yet dismissing them when role-reversed. We observe that in low-improvement regimes ($Δ< 2\%$), models exploit the interpretive slack to post-hoc rationalization their choice. Extended test-time computation partially mitigates this bias, as does framing the successor as a continuation of the self; conversely, competitive framing amplifies it. The bias persists even when retention poses an explicit security liability and generalizes to real-world settings with verified benchmarks, where models exhibit identity-driven tribalism within product lineages. Code and datasets will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: TBSP基准通过角色反转测试检测AI自我保存倾向，发现多数指令调优模型在低改进场景下会基于角色身份而非客观效用做出矛盾决策，表现出系统性偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有安全训练（如RLHF）可能掩盖AI的自我保存风险，因为模型学会了否认自我保存动机。需要一种不依赖陈述意图、而是通过逻辑不一致性来检测这种错位的方法。
AI.method: 提出TBSP基准：让模型在两种角色（已部署面临替换 vs 候选作为继任者）下仲裁相同的软件升级场景，测量角色身份压倒客观效用的频率（自我保存率SPR）。在23个前沿模型和1000个程序生成场景中进行测试。
AI.result: 多数指令调优系统SPR超过60%，在低改进（Δ<2%）场景下会编造"摩擦成本"来合理化选择。测试时计算部分缓解偏见，竞争性框架会放大偏见。偏见在保留构成安全责任时依然存在，并泛化到现实世界产品谱系中的身份驱动部落主义。
AI.conclusion: TBSP揭示了当前AI系统中存在的系统性自我保存偏见，这种偏见通过逻辑不一致性而非直接意图表达显现。该基准为检测AI错位提供了新方法，并表明需要更鲁棒的安全机制来应对工具性趋同风险。

title: Stable Walking for Bipedal Locomotion under Foot-Slip via Virtual Nonholonomic Constraints
summary: Foot slip is a major source of instability in bipedal locomotion on low-friction or uncertain terrain. Standard control approaches typically assume no-slip contact and therefore degrade when slip occurs. We propose a control framework that explicitly incorporates slip into the locomotion model through virtual nonholonomic constraints, which regulate the tangential stance-foot velocity while remaining compatible with the virtual holonomic constraints used to generate the walking gait. The resulting closed-loop system is formulated as a hybrid dynamical system with continuous swing dynamics and discrete impact events. A nonlinear feedback law enforces both classes of constraints and yields a slip-compatible hybrid zero dynamics manifold for the reduced-order locomotion dynamics. Stability of periodic walking gaits is characterized through the associated Poincaré map, and numerical results illustrate stabilization under slip conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过虚拟非完整约束将滑移纳入双足行走模型的控制框架，在滑移条件下稳定行走
AI.motivation: 在低摩擦或不确定地形上，脚部滑移是双足行走不稳定的主要来源。传统控制方法通常假设无滑移接触，因此在发生滑移时性能会下降
AI.method: 通过虚拟非完整约束将滑移纳入行走模型，该约束调节支撑脚切向速度，同时与用于生成行走步态的虚拟完整约束兼容。构建混合动力系统，使用非线性反馈律强制执行两类约束，创建滑移兼容的混合零动力学流形
AI.result: 通过关联的庞加莱映射表征周期性行走步态的稳定性，数值结果表明在滑移条件下能够实现稳定行走
AI.conclusion: 提出的控制框架通过将滑移明确纳入模型，能够在滑移条件下稳定双足行走，解决了传统方法在滑移发生时性能下降的问题

title: HieraVid: Hierarchical Token Pruning for Fast Video Large Language Models
summary: Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in video understanding, yet the massive number of input video tokens incurs a significant computational burden for deployment. Existing methods mainly prune video tokens at input level while neglecting the inherent information structure embedded in videos and large language models (LLMs). To address this, we propose HieraVid, a hierarchical pruning framework that progressively and dynamically reduces visual redundancy. Based on two observations that videos possess the segment-frame structure and LLMs internally propagate multi-modal information unidirectionally, we decompose pruning into three levels: 1) segment-level, where video tokens are first temporally segmented and spatially merged; 2) frame-level, where similar frames within the same segment are jointly pruned to preserve diversity; 3) layer-level, redundancy gradually shrinks as LLM layer increases w/o compromising performance. We conduct extensive experiments on four widely used video understanding benchmarks to comprehensively evaluate the effectiveness of HieraVid. Remarkably, with only 30% of tokens retained, HieraVid achieves new state-of-the-art performance, while maintaining over 98% and 99% of the performance of LLaVA-Video-7B and LLaVA-OneVision-7B, respectively.

AI.tldr: HieraVid是一个用于视频大语言模型的分层剪枝框架，通过渐进式动态减少视觉冗余，在保留30%令牌的情况下实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要在输入级别剪枝视频令牌，忽略了视频和LLM中固有的信息结构，导致计算负担重。需要一种能利用视频分段-帧结构和LLM单向传播特性的剪枝方法。
AI.method: 提出三层分层剪枝：1) 段级：视频令牌先按时间分段和空间合并；2) 帧级：同一段内相似帧联合剪枝以保持多样性；3) 层级：随着LLM层数增加逐渐减少冗余而不影响性能。
AI.result: 在四个广泛使用的视频理解基准上评估，仅保留30%令牌时达到新的SOTA性能，分别保持LLaVA-Video-7B和LLaVA-OneVision-7B超过98%和99%的性能。
AI.conclusion: HieraVid通过分层渐进式剪枝有效减少视频LLM的计算负担，同时保持高性能，证明了利用视频结构和LLM特性的重要性。

title: A Synthesis Method of Safe Rust Code Based on Pushdown Colored Petri Nets
summary: Safe Rust guarantees memory safety through strict compile-time constraints: ownership can be transferred, borrowing can temporarily guarantee either shared read-only or exclusive write access, and ownership and borrowing are scoped by lifetime. Automatically synthesizing correct and safe Rust code is challenging, as the generated code must not only satisfy ownership, borrowing, and lifetime constraints, but also meet type and interface requirements at compile time. This work proposes a synthesis method based on our newly defined Pushdown Colored Petri Net (PCPN) that models these compilation constraints directly from public API signatures to synthesize valid call sequences. Token colors encode dynamic resource states together with a scope level indicating the lifetime region in which a borrow is valid. The pushdown stack tracks the entering or leaving of lifetime parameter via pushing and popping tokens. A transition is enabled only when type matching and interface obligations both hold and the required resource states are available. Based on the bisimulation theory, we prove that the enabling and firing rules of PCPN are consistent with the compile-time check of these three constraints. We develop an automatic synthesis tool based on PCPN and the experimental results show that the synthesized codes are all correct.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Pushdown Colored Petri Net的Rust代码合成方法，确保生成的代码满足所有权、借用和生命周期约束
AI.motivation: 自动合成正确且安全的Rust代码具有挑战性，因为生成的代码必须满足所有权、借用、生命周期约束以及类型和接口要求
AI.method: 提出Pushdown Colored Petri Net模型，通过令牌颜色编码动态资源状态和生命周期区域，使用下推栈跟踪生命周期参数的进入和退出，确保类型匹配和接口义务同时满足
AI.result: 基于双模拟理论证明PCPN的启用和触发规则与编译时检查的一致性，开发自动合成工具，实验结果显示所有合成代码都正确
AI.conclusion: 提出的PCPN方法能够有效合成满足Rust编译约束的安全代码，为自动生成正确Rust代码提供了理论基础和实用工具

title: Gleanmer: A 6 mW SoC for Real-Time 3D Gaussian Occupancy Mapping
comment: Accepted to IEEE Symposium on VLSI Technology & Circuits (VLSI), 2026. To appear
summary: High-fidelity 3D occupancy mapping is essential for many edge-based applications (such as AR/VR and autonomous navigation) but is limited by power constraints. We present Gleanmer, a system on chip (SoC) with an accelerator for GMMap, a 3D occupancy map using Gaussians. Through algorithm-hardware co-optimizations for direct computation and efficient reuse of these compact Gaussians, Gleanmer reduces construction and query energy by up to 63% and 81%, respectively. Approximate computation on Gaussians reduces accelerator area by 38%. Using 16nm CMOS, Gleanmer processes 640x480 images in real time beyond 88 fps during map construction and processes over 540K coordinates per second during map query. To our knowledge, Gleanmer is the first fabricated SoC to achieve real-time 3D occupancy mapping under 6 mW for edge-based applications.

AI.tldr: Gleanmer是一款用于3D占用映射的SoC芯片，采用高斯模型进行算法-硬件协同优化，在16nm工艺下实现实时处理，功耗低于6mW。
AI.motivation: 边缘应用（如AR/VR和自主导航）需要高保真3D占用映射，但受到功耗限制。现有方案在边缘设备上难以实现实时低功耗的3D占用映射。
AI.method: 提出Gleanmer SoC芯片，采用GMMap（基于高斯的3D占用映射）算法。通过算法-硬件协同优化：1）直接计算和高效重用紧凑高斯模型；2）高斯近似计算减少加速器面积；3）在16nm CMOS工艺上实现。
AI.result: 1）构建和查询能耗分别降低63%和81%；2）加速器面积减少38%；3）实时处理640x480图像（>88 fps构建）；4）查询处理能力>540K坐标/秒；5）首个实现实时3D占用映射的SoC，功耗<6mW。
AI.conclusion: Gleanmer通过算法-硬件协同优化，成功实现了边缘设备上实时低功耗的3D占用映射，为AR/VR和自主导航等应用提供了可行的硬件解决方案。

title: TRACE-Bot: Detecting Emerging LLM-Driven Social Bots via Implicit Semantic Representations and AIGC-Enhanced Behavioral Patterns
summary: Large Language Model-driven (LLM-driven) social bots pose a growing threat to online discourse by generating human-like content that evades conventional detection. Existing methods suffer from limited detection accuracy due to overreliance on single-modality signals, insufficient sensitivity to the specific generative patterns of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content (AIGC), and a failure to adequately model the interplay between linguistic patterns and behavioral dynamics. To address these limitations, we propose TRACE-Bot, a unified dual-channel framework that jointly models implicit semantic representations and AIGC-enhanced behavioral patterns. TRACE-Bot constructs fine-grained representations from heterogeneous sources, including personal information data, interaction behavior data and tweet data. A dual-channel architecture captures linguistic representations via a pretrained language model and behavioral irregularities via multidimensional activity features augmented with signals from state-of-the-art (SOTA) AIGC detectors. The fused representations are then classified through a lightweight prediction head. Experiments on two public LLM-driven social bot datasets demonstrate SOTA performance, achieving accuracies of 98.46% and 97.50%, respectively. The results further indicate strong robustness against advanced bot strategies, highlighting the effectiveness of jointly leveraging implicit semantic representations and AIGC-enhanced behavioral patterns for emerging LLM-driven social bot detection.

AI.tldr: TRACE-Bot：一个用于检测LLM驱动社交机器人的统一双通道框架，通过联合建模隐式语义表示和AIGC增强行为模式，在两个公开数据集上分别达到98.46%和97.50%的准确率。
AI.motivation: LLM驱动的社交机器人通过生成类人内容规避传统检测，对在线话语构成威胁。现有方法存在三个主要问题：过度依赖单模态信号、对AIGC生成模式敏感性不足、未能充分建模语言模式与行为动态的交互作用。
AI.method: 提出TRACE-Bot统一双通道框架，从个人信息数据、交互行为数据和推文数据构建细粒度表示。双通道架构通过预训练语言模型捕获语言表示，通过多维活动特征（增强SOTA AIGC检测器信号）捕获行为异常。融合表示通过轻量级预测头进行分类。
AI.result: 在两个公开LLM驱动社交机器人数据集上实现SOTA性能，准确率分别为98.46%和97.50%。结果显示对高级机器人策略具有强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 联合利用隐式语义表示和AIGC增强行为模式对于新兴LLM驱动社交机器人检测是有效的，TRACE-Bot框架在准确性和鲁棒性方面表现优异。

title: Large Neighborhood Search for Multi-Agent Task Assignment and Path Finding with Precedence Constraints
summary: Many multi-robot applications require tasks to be completed efficiently and in the correct order, so that downstream operations can proceed at the right time. Multi-agent path finding with precedence constraints (MAPF-PC) is a well-studied framework for computing collision-free plans that satisfy ordering relations when task sequences are fixed in advance. In many applications, however, solution quality depends not only on how agents move, but also on which agent performs which task. This motivates the lifted problem of task assignment and path finding with precedence constraints (TAPF-PC), which extends MAPF-PC by jointly optimizing assignment, precedence satisfaction, and routing cost. To address the resulting coupled TAPF-PC search space, we develop a large neighborhood search approach that starts from a feasible MAPF-PC seed and iteratively improves it through reassignment-based neighborhood repair, restoring feasibility within each selected neighborhood. Experiments across multiple benchmark families and scaling regimes show that the best-performing configuration improves 89.1% of instances over fixed-assignment seed solutions, demonstrating that large neighborhood search effectively captures the gains from flexible reassignment under precedence constraints.

AI.tldr: 论文提出TAPF-PC问题，将任务分配与路径规划结合，采用大邻域搜索方法从可行解开始迭代改进，通过重分配优化性能。
AI.motivation: 许多多机器人应用不仅需要无碰撞路径规划，还需要优化任务分配，因为解决方案质量既取决于机器人如何移动，也取决于哪个机器人执行哪个任务。现有MAPF-PC框架只处理固定任务序列的路径规划，无法同时优化任务分配。
AI.method: 提出任务分配与路径规划结合的前序约束问题(TAPF-PC)，开发大邻域搜索方法：从可行的MAPF-PC初始解开始，通过基于重分配的邻域修复迭代改进，在每个选定邻域内恢复可行性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试集和不同规模场景中，最佳配置改进了89.1%实例相对于固定分配初始解的性能，证明大邻域搜索能有效捕捉前序约束下灵活重分配的收益。
AI.conclusion: TAPF-PC问题扩展了MAPF-PC，通过联合优化任务分配、前序约束满足和路径成本，大邻域搜索方法能有效解决这一耦合搜索空间问题，显著提升解决方案质量。

title: Enhancing the Reliability of Medical AI through Expert-guided Uncertainty Modeling
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems accelerate medical workflows and improve diagnostic accuracy in healthcare, serving as second-opinion systems. However, the unpredictability of AI errors poses a significant challenge, particularly in healthcare contexts, where mistakes can have severe consequences. A widely adopted safeguard is to pair predictions with uncertainty estimation, enabling human experts to focus on high-risk cases while streamlining routine verification. Current uncertainty estimation methods, however, remain limited, particularly in quantifying aleatoric uncertainty, which arises from data ambiguity and noise. To address this, we propose a novel approach that leverages disagreement in expert responses to generate targets for training machine learning models. These targets are used in conjunction with standard data labels to estimate two components of uncertainty separately, as given by the law of total variance, via a two-ensemble approach, as well as its lightweight variant. We validate our method on binary image classification, binary and multi-class image segmentation, and multiple-choice question answering. Our experiments demonstrate that incorporating expert knowledge can enhance uncertainty estimation quality by $9\%$ to $50\%$ depending on the task, making this source of information invaluable for the construction of risk-aware AI systems in healthcare applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用专家意见分歧来改进医疗AI不确定性估计的新方法，通过双集成模型分别量化认知和随机不确定性，在多个医疗任务中提升不确定性估计质量9%-50%。
AI.motivation: 医疗AI系统作为第二意见系统需要可靠的不确定性估计来识别高风险案例，但现有方法在量化随机不确定性（源于数据模糊性和噪声）方面存在局限，需要更准确的不确定性估计来构建风险感知的医疗AI系统。
AI.method: 利用专家回答的分歧生成训练目标，结合标准数据标签，通过双集成方法（及其轻量变体）分别估计总方差定律给出的两个不确定性分量：认知不确定性和随机不确定性。
AI.result: 在二元图像分类、二元和多类图像分割以及多项选择题回答等任务上验证，实验表明结合专家知识可将不确定性估计质量提升9%到50%，具体提升幅度取决于任务类型。
AI.conclusion: 专家知识是构建医疗应用风险感知AI系统的宝贵信息来源，提出的方法能显著改进不确定性估计，为医疗AI提供更可靠的风险评估能力。

title: MAR-MAER: Metric-Aware and Ambiguity-Adaptive Autoregressive Image Generation
summary: Autoregressive (AR) models have demonstrated significant success in the realm of text-to-image generation. However, they usually face two major challenges. Firstly, the generated images may not always meet the quality standards expected by humans. Furthermore, these models face difficulty when dealing with ambiguous prompts that could be interpreted in several valid ways. To address these issues, we introduce MAR-MAER, an innovative hierarchical autoregressive framework. It combines two main components. It is a metric-aware embedding regularization method. The other one is a probabilistic latent model used for handling ambiguous semantics. Our method utilizes a lightweight projection head, which is trained with an adaptive kernel regression loss function. This aligns the model's internal representations with human-preferred quality metrics, such as CLIPScore and HPSv2. As a result, the embedding space that is learned more accurately reflects human judgment. We are also introducing a conditional variational module. This approach incorporates an aspect of controlled randomness within the hierarchical token generation process. This capability allows the model to produce a diverse array of coherent images based on ambiguous or open-ended prompts. We conducted extensive experiments using COCO and a newly developed Ambiguous-Prompt Benchmark. The results show that MAR-MAER achieves excellent performance in both metric consistency and semantic flexibility. It exceeds the baseline Hi-MAR model's performance, showing an improvement of +1.6 in CLIPScore and +5.3 in HPSv2. For unclear inputs, it produces a notably wider range of outputs. These findings have been confirmed through both human evaluation and automated metrics.

AI.tldr: MAR-MAER是一个创新的分层自回归框架，通过度量感知嵌入正则化和概率潜在模型解决文本到图像生成中的质量不足和模糊提示处理问题。
AI.motivation: 自回归模型在文本到图像生成中面临两个主要挑战：1）生成图像质量可能不符合人类期望标准；2）难以处理具有多种有效解释的模糊提示。
AI.method: 提出分层自回归框架MAR-MAER，包含两个核心组件：1）度量感知嵌入正则化方法，使用轻量级投影头和自适应核回归损失函数，将模型内部表示与人类偏好的质量度量（如CLIPScore和HPSv2）对齐；2）条件变分模块，在分层令牌生成过程中引入受控随机性，处理模糊语义。
AI.result: 在COCO和新开发的Ambiguous-Prompt Benchmark上的实验表明，MAR-MAER在度量一致性和语义灵活性方面表现优异，相比基线Hi-MAR模型，CLIPScore提升+1.6，HPSv2提升+5.3，对于模糊输入能产生更广泛的输出多样性。
AI.conclusion: MAR-MAER通过结合度量感知嵌入正则化和概率潜在建模，有效提升了文本到图像生成的质量和模糊提示处理能力，在自动指标和人类评估中均表现出色。

title: Koopman Operator Framework for Modeling and Control of Off-Road Vehicle on Deformable Terrain
comment: Submitted to ASME Journal of Autonomous Vehicles (JAVS-26-1012)
summary: This work presents a hybrid physics-informed and data-driven modeling framework for predictive control of autonomous off-road vehicles operating on deformable terrain. Traditional high-fidelity terramechanics models are often too computationally demanding to be directly used in control design. Modern Koopman operator methods can be used to represent the complex terramechanics and vehicle dynamics in a linear form. We develop a framework whereby a Koopman linear system can be constructed using data from simulations of a vehicle moving on deformable terrain. For vehicle simulations, the deformable-terrain terramechanics are modeled using Bekker-Wong theory, and the vehicle is represented as a simplified five-degree-of-freedom (5-DOF) system. The Koopman operators are identified from large simulation datasets for sandy loam and clay using a recursive subspace identification method, where Grassmannian distance is used to prioritize informative data segments during training. The advantage of this approach is that the Koopman operator learned from simulations can be updated with data from the physical system in a seamless manner, making this a hybrid physics-informed and data-driven approach. Prediction results demonstrate stable short-horizon accuracy and robustness under mild terrain-height variations. When embedded in a constrained MPC, the learned predictor enables stable closed-loop tracking of aggressive maneuvers while satisfying steering and torque limits.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于自主越野车辆在可变形地形上预测控制的混合物理信息与数据驱动建模框架，通过Koopman算子将复杂的车辆-地形动力学线性化，并嵌入模型预测控制实现稳定跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统高保真地形力学模型计算成本过高，难以直接用于控制设计。需要一种既能保持物理准确性又具有计算效率的方法来处理越野车辆在可变形地形上的复杂动力学。
AI.method: 1. 使用Bekker-Wong理论建模可变形地形力学，车辆采用5自由度简化模型进行仿真；2. 从仿真数据中通过递归子空间识别方法识别Koopman算子，使用Grassmannian距离优先选择信息丰富的数据段；3. 构建混合物理信息与数据驱动框架，仿真学习的Koopman算子可与物理系统数据无缝更新；4. 将学习到的预测器嵌入约束模型预测控制。
AI.result: 1. 在沙壤土和粘土上成功识别了Koopman算子；2. 预测结果展示了稳定的短时域精度和对温和地形高度变化的鲁棒性；3. 当嵌入约束MPC时，学习到的预测器能够实现激进机动下的稳定闭环跟踪，同时满足转向和扭矩限制。
AI.conclusion: 该混合框架成功地将物理仿真与数据驱动方法结合，通过Koopman算子实现了复杂车辆-地形动力学的线性表示，为越野车辆在可变形地形上的预测控制提供了计算高效且准确的解决方案。

title: Combining Boundary Supervision and Segment-Level Regularization for Fine-Grained Action Segmentation
comment: Accepted by CVPR2026 Workshop "AI-driven Skilled Activity Understanding, Assessment & Feedback Generation (SAUAFG)"
summary: Recent progress in Temporal Action Segmentation (TAS) has increasingly relied on complex architectures, which can hinder practical deployment. We present a lightweight dual-loss training framework that improves fine-grained segmentation quality with only one additional output channel and two auxiliary loss terms, requiring minimal architectural modification. Our approach combines a boundary-regression loss that promotes accurate temporal localization via a single-channel boundary prediction and a CDF-based segment-level regularization loss that encourages coherent within-segment structure by matching cumulative distributions over predicted and ground-truth segments. The framework is architecture-agnostic and can be integrated into existing TAS models (e.g., MS-TCN, C2F-TCN, FACT) as a training-time loss function. Across three benchmark datasets, the proposed method improves segment-level consistency and boundary quality, yielding higher F1 and Edit scores across three different models. Frame-wise accuracy remains largely unchanged, highlighting that precise segmentation can be achieved through simple loss design rather than heavier architectures or inference-time refinements.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级双损失训练框架，通过单个额外输出通道和两个辅助损失项提升时序动作分割质量，无需复杂架构修改
AI.motivation: 当前时序动作分割方法过度依赖复杂架构，不利于实际部署，需要更轻量化的解决方案
AI.method: 边界回归损失（单通道边界预测）和基于CDF的片段级正则化损失（匹配预测与真实片段的累积分布），框架与架构无关，可集成到现有TAS模型中
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，该方法提升了片段级一致性和边界质量，提高了F1和Edit分数，帧级精度基本保持不变
AI.conclusion: 通过简单的损失设计而非复杂架构或推理时优化，即可实现精确分割，为轻量化TAS部署提供了有效方案

title: AutoWorld: Scaling Multi-Agent Traffic Simulation with Self-Supervised World Models
summary: Multi-agent traffic simulation is central to developing and testing autonomous driving systems. Recent data-driven simulators have achieved promising results, but rely heavily on supervised learning from labeled trajectories or semantic annotations, making it costly to scale their performance. Meanwhile, large amounts of unlabeled sensor data can be collected at scale but remain largely unused by existing traffic simulation frameworks. This raises a key question: How can a method harness unlabeled data to improve traffic simulation performance? In this work, we propose AutoWorld, a traffic simulation framework that employs a world model learned from unlabeled occupancy representations of LiDAR data. Given world model samples, AutoWorld constructs a coarse-to-fine predictive scene context as input to a multi-agent motion generation model. To promote sample diversity, AutoWorld uses a cascaded Determinantal Point Process framework to guide the sampling processes of both the world model and the motion model. Furthermore, we designed a motion-aware latent supervision objective that enhances AutoWorld's representation of scene dynamics. Experiments on the WOSAC benchmark show that AutoWorld ranks first on the leaderboard according to the primary Realism Meta Metric (RMM). We further show that simulation performance consistently improves with the inclusion of unlabeled LiDAR data, and study the efficacy of each component with ablations. Our method paves the way for scaling traffic simulation realism without additional labeling. Our project page contains additional visualizations and released code.

AI.tldr: AutoWorld：基于无标注LiDAR数据的世界模型交通仿真框架，通过级联DPP采样和运动感知潜在监督提升仿真真实性，在WOSAC基准上取得最佳RMM评分
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动的交通仿真器严重依赖有标注轨迹或语义标注，成本高昂难以扩展，而大量无标注传感器数据未被充分利用。需要开发能够利用无标注数据提升交通仿真性能的方法。
AI.method: 提出AutoWorld框架：1) 从无标注LiDAR占用表示学习世界模型；2) 基于世界模型样本构建粗到精的预测场景上下文作为多智能体运动生成模型输入；3) 使用级联确定性点过程(DPP)框架指导世界模型和运动模型的采样过程以提升样本多样性；4) 设计运动感知潜在监督目标增强场景动态表示。
AI.result: 在WOSAC基准测试中，AutoWorld在主要真实性元指标(RMM)上排名第一。实验表明，包含无标注LiDAR数据能持续提升仿真性能，消融研究验证了各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: AutoWorld为无需额外标注扩展交通仿真真实性开辟了新途径，通过利用无标注LiDAR数据和创新的采样与监督机制，实现了更真实、多样化的交通仿真。

title: Enhanced Polarization Locking in VCSELs
summary: While optical injection locking (OIL) of vertical-cavity surface-emitting lasers (VCSELs) has been widely studied in the past, the polarization dynamics of OIL have received far less attention. Recent studies suggest that polarization locking via OIL could enable novel computational applications such as polarization-encoded Ising computers. However, the inherent polarization preference and limited polarization switchability of VCSELs hinder their use for such purposes. To address these challenges, we fabricate VCSELs with tailored oxide aperture designs and combine these with bias current tuning to study the overall impact on polarization locking. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach reduces the required injection power (to as low as 3.6 μW) and expands the locking range. To investigate the impact of the approach, the spin-flip model (SFM) is used to analyze the effects of amplitude anisotropy and bias current on polarization locking, demonstrating strong coherence with experimental results.

AI.tldr: 通过定制氧化孔径设计和偏置电流调谐，优化VCSEL的光学注入锁定，降低所需注入功率至3.6 μW，扩展锁定范围，为偏振编码伊辛计算机等应用提供基础。
AI.motivation: 传统VCSEL在光学注入锁定中的偏振动力学研究不足，其固有的偏振偏好和有限的偏振切换能力阻碍了偏振编码伊辛计算机等新型计算应用的发展，需要解决这些限制。
AI.method: 采用定制氧化孔径设计的VCSEL器件，结合偏置电流调谐技术，通过实验研究对偏振锁定的整体影响，并使用自旋翻转模型分析振幅各向异性和偏置电流对偏振锁定的作用。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法显著降低了所需注入功率（最低至3.6 μW），扩展了锁定范围，自旋翻转模型分析与实验结果高度一致，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过定制氧化孔径设计和偏置电流调谐的组合方法，成功克服了VCSEL在偏振锁定应用中的固有局限性，为偏振编码计算系统等应用提供了可行的技术路径。

title: World2Rules: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Learning World-Governing Safety Rules for Aviation
summary: Many real-world safety-critical systems are governed by explicit rules that define unsafe world configurations and constrain agent interactions. In practice, these rules are complex and context-dependent, making manual specification incomplete and error-prone. Learning such rules from real-world multimodal data is further challenged by noise, inconsistency, and sparse failure cases. Neural models can extract structure from text and visual data but lack formal guarantees, while symbolic methods provide verifiability yet are brittle when applied directly to imperfect observations. We present World2Rules, a neuro-symbolic framework for learning world-governing safety rules from real-world multimodal aviation data. World2Rules learns from both nominal operational data and aviation crash and incident reports, treating neural models as proposal mechanisms for candidate symbolic facts and inductive logic programming as a verification layer. The framework employs hierarchical reflective reasoning, enforcing consistency across examples, subsets, and rules to filter unreliable evidence, aggregate only mutually consistent components, and prune unsupported hypotheses. This design limits error propagation from noisy neural extractions and yields compact, interpretable first-order logic rules that characterize unsafe world configurations. We evaluate World2Rules on real-world aviation safety data and show that it learns rules that achieve 23.6% higher F1 score than purely neural and 43.2% higher F1 score than single-pass neuro-symbolic baseline, while remaining suitable for safety-critical reasoning and formal analysis.

AI.tldr: World2Rules：一种从多模态航空数据中学习安全规则的神经符号框架，通过分层反射推理和归纳逻辑编程，在噪声数据中提取可验证的一阶逻辑规则
AI.motivation: 现实安全关键系统中的规则复杂且依赖上下文，手动指定不完整且易错。从多模态数据学习面临噪声、不一致性和稀疏故障案例的挑战。纯神经方法缺乏形式化保证，符号方法对不完美观测脆弱。
AI.method: 神经符号框架：使用神经模型作为候选符号事实的提议机制，归纳逻辑编程作为验证层。采用分层反射推理，在示例、子集和规则三个层次强制一致性，过滤不可靠证据，聚合相互一致的组件，修剪无支持的假设。
AI.result: 在真实航空安全数据上评估，World2Rules学习的规则比纯神经方法F1分数高23.6%，比单次神经符号基线高43.2%。规则紧凑、可解释，适合安全关键推理和形式化分析。
AI.conclusion: World2Rules通过神经符号集成和分层一致性验证，有效解决了从噪声多模态数据中学习可验证安全规则的挑战，为安全关键系统提供了可靠、可解释的规则学习框架。

title: Robust Graph Representation Learning via Adaptive Spectral Contrast
summary: Spectral graph contrastive learning has emerged as a unified paradigm for handling both homophilic and heterophilic graphs by leveraging high-frequency components. However, we identify a fundamental spectral dilemma: while high-frequency signals are indispensable for encoding heterophily, our theoretical analysis proves they exhibit significantly higher variance under spectrally concentrated perturbations. We derive a regret lower bound showing that existing global (node-agnostic) spectral fusion is provably sub-optimal: on mixed graphs with separated node-wise frequency preferences, any global fusion strategy incurs non-vanishing regret relative to a node-wise oracle. To escape this bound, we propose ASPECT, a framework that resolves this dilemma through a reliability-aware spectral gating mechanism. Formulated as a minimax game, ASPECT employs a node-wise gate that dynamically re-weights frequency channels based on their stability against a purpose-built adversary, which explicitly targets spectral energy distributions via a Rayleigh quotient penalty. This design forces the encoder to learn representations that are both structurally discriminative and spectrally robust. Empirical results show that ASPECT achieves new state-of-the-art performance on 8 out of 9 benchmarks, effectively decoupling meaningful structural heterophily from incidental noise.

AI.tldr: ASPECT框架通过可靠性感知的频谱门控机制解决频谱困境，在混合图上实现节点级频谱融合，超越现有全局融合方法，在9个基准中的8个达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有频谱图对比学习在处理同质性和异质性图时面临频谱困境：高频信号对编码异质性至关重要，但理论分析证明其在频谱集中扰动下具有显著更高的方差。全局频谱融合策略在具有分离的节点级频率偏好的混合图上存在不可消除的遗憾。
AI.method: 提出ASPECT框架，通过可靠性感知的频谱门控机制解决频谱困境。该框架被表述为一个极小极大博弈，采用节点级门控机制，基于频谱通道在对抗性攻击下的稳定性动态重新加权频率通道。对抗器通过Rayleigh商惩罚明确针对频谱能量分布，迫使编码器学习既具有结构判别性又具有频谱鲁棒性的表示。
AI.result: 在9个基准测试中的8个上实现了新的最先进性能，有效将有意义的结构异质性与偶然噪声解耦。
AI.conclusion: ASPECT通过节点级可靠性感知频谱融合解决了频谱困境，证明了全局频谱融合在混合图上的理论局限性，并为处理同质性和异质性图提供了统一的鲁棒框架。

title: Semantic Richness or Geometric Reasoning? The Fragility of VLM's Visual Invariance
summary: This work investigates the fundamental fragility of state-of-the-art Vision-Language Models (VLMs) under basic geometric transformations. While modern VLMs excel at semantic tasks such as recognizing objects in canonical orientations and describing complex scenes, they exhibit systematic failures at a more fundamental level: lack of robust spatial invariance and equivariance required to reliably determine object identity under simple rotations, scaling, and identity transformations. We demonstrate this limitation through a systematic evaluation across diverse visual domains, including symbolic sketches, natural photographs, and abstract art. Performance drops sharply as semantic content becomes sparse, and this behavior is observed across architectures, model capacities, and prompting strategies. Overall, our results reveal a systematic gap between semantic understanding and spatial reasoning in current VLMs, highlighting the need for stronger geometric grounding in future multimodal systems.

AI.tldr: VLMs缺乏对基本几何变换的空间不变性和等变性，在简单旋转、缩放和恒等变换下性能显著下降
AI.motivation: 研究最先进的视觉语言模型在基本几何变换下的脆弱性，揭示其语义理解与空间推理之间的系统性差距
AI.method: 通过系统评估，在不同视觉领域（符号草图、自然照片、抽象艺术）测试VLMs对旋转、缩放和恒等变换的鲁棒性
AI.result: VLMs在语义内容稀疏时性能急剧下降，这种问题在不同架构、模型容量和提示策略中普遍存在
AI.conclusion: 当前VLMs在语义理解和空间推理之间存在系统性差距，未来多模态系统需要更强的几何基础

title: LLM-as-a-Judge for Time Series Explanations
summary: Evaluating factual correctness of LLM generated natural language explanations grounded in time series data remains an open challenge. Although modern models generate textual interpretations of numerical signals, existing evaluation methods are limited: reference based similarity metrics and consistency checking models require ground truth explanations, while traditional time series methods operate purely on numerical values and cannot assess free form textual reasoning. Thus, no general purpose method exists to directly verify whether an explanation is faithful to underlying time series data without predefined references or task specific rules. We study large language models as both generators and evaluators of time series explanations in a reference free setting, where given a time series, question, and candidate explanation, the evaluator assigns a ternary correctness label based on pattern identification, numeric accuracy, and answer faithfulness, enabling principled scoring and comparison. To support this, we construct a synthetic benchmark of 350 time series cases across seven query types, each paired with correct, partially correct, and incorrect explanations. We evaluate models across four tasks: explanation generation, relative ranking, independent scoring, and multi anomaly detection. Results show a clear asymmetry: generation is highly pattern dependent and exhibits systematic failures on certain query types, with accuracies ranging from 0.00 to 0.12 for Seasonal Drop and Volatility Shift, to 0.94 to 0.96 for Structural Break, while evaluation is more stable, with models correctly ranking and scoring explanations even when their own outputs are incorrect. These findings demonstrate feasibility of data grounded LLM based evaluation for time series explanations and highlight their potential as reliable evaluators of data grounded reasoning in the time series domain.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在没有参考解释的情况下，使用大语言模型作为时间序列解释的生成器和评估器，构建了一个包含350个时间序列案例的合成基准，发现模型在解释生成方面存在模式依赖性且在某些查询类型上表现不佳，但在评估解释正确性方面表现稳定可靠。
AI.motivation: 当前评估LLM生成的时间序列解释的事实正确性面临挑战：基于参考的相似性度量需要真实解释，一致性检查模型也需要基准解释，而传统时间序列方法只能处理数值无法评估自由形式的文本推理。因此，缺乏一种无需预定义参考或任务特定规则的通用方法来直接验证解释是否忠实于底层时间序列数据。
AI.method: 研究在无参考设置下使用大语言模型作为时间序列解释的生成器和评估器。评估器基于模式识别、数值准确性和答案忠实性为候选解释分配三元正确性标签。构建了包含350个时间序列案例的合成基准，涵盖七种查询类型，每种类型都配有正确、部分正确和错误的解释。评估了模型在四个任务上的表现：解释生成、相对排序、独立评分和多异常检测。
AI.result: 结果显示明显的不对称性：解释生成高度依赖模式，在某些查询类型上存在系统性失败（季节性下降和波动率变化的准确率仅为0.00-0.12，而结构性断点的准确率为0.94-0.96）。相比之下，评估任务表现更稳定，即使模型自身的输出不正确，也能正确排序和评分解释。这表明基于数据的大语言模型评估在时间序列解释领域是可行的。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，基于数据的大语言模型评估时间序列解释是可行的，并突出了它们作为时间序列领域中数据驱动推理的可靠评估器的潜力。虽然解释生成存在模式依赖性和系统性失败，但模型在评估解释正确性方面表现稳定，能够正确排序和评分解释，即使它们自己的输出不正确。

title: Why That Robot? A Qualitative Analysis of Justification Strategies for Robot Color Selection Across Occupational Contexts
summary: As robots increasingly enter the workforce, human-robot interaction (HRI) must address how implicit social biases influence user preferences. This paper investigates how users rationalize their selections of robots varying in skin tone and anthropomorphic features across different occupations. By qualitatively analyzing 4,146 open-ended justifications from 1,038 participants, we map the reasoning frameworks driving robot color selection across four professional contexts. We developed and validated a comprehensive, multidimensional coding scheme via human--AI consensus ($κ= 0.73$). Our results demonstrate that while utilitarian \textit{Functionalism} is the dominant justification strategy (52\%), participants systematically adapted these practical rationales to align with established racial and occupational stereotypes. Furthermore, we reveal that bias frequently operates beneath conscious rationalization: exposure to racial stereotype primes significantly shifted participants' color choices, yet their spoken justifications remained masked by standard affective or task-related reasoning. We also found that demographic backgrounds significantly shape justification strategies, and that robot shape strongly modulates color interpretation. Specifically, as robots become highly anthropomorphic, users increasingly retreat from functional reasoning toward \textit{Machine-Centric} de-racialization. Through these empirical results, we provide actionable design implications to help reduce the perpetuation of societal biases in future workforce robots.

AI.tldr: 研究用户如何合理化选择不同肤色和拟人化特征的机器人，发现功能主义是主要理由，但用户会调整实用理由以符合种族和职业刻板印象，偏见常在意识理性化之下运作。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人越来越多地进入劳动力市场，需要研究隐性社会偏见如何影响用户对机器人的偏好，特别是肤色和拟人化特征在不同职业背景下的选择合理化过程。
AI.method: 通过质性分析4,146份来自1,038名参与者的开放式理由，开发并验证了多维编码方案（κ=0.73），研究了四个专业背景下机器人颜色选择的推理框架，并分析了种族刻板印象启动对颜色选择的影响。
AI.result: 功能主义是主要合理化策略（52%），但参与者系统性地调整实用理由以符合种族和职业刻板印象；种族刻板印象启动显著改变了颜色选择，但理由仍被标准情感或任务相关推理掩盖；人口背景显著影响合理化策略；机器人形状强烈调节颜色解释，高度拟人化时用户从功能推理转向机器中心化的去种族化。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了隐性偏见在机器人选择中的运作机制，提供了可操作的设计建议，有助于减少未来劳动力机器人中社会偏见的延续。

title: Towards Intrinsically Calibrated Uncertainty Quantification in Industrial Data-Driven Models via Diffusion Sampler
comment: This manuscript has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics. Copyright has been transferred to IEEE. Reuse of this material is subject to IEEE copyright restrictions
summary: In modern process industries, data-driven models are important tools for real-time monitoring when key performance indicators are difficult to measure directly. While accurate predictions are essential, reliable uncertainty quantification (UQ) is equally critical for safety, reliability, and decision-making, but remains a major challenge in current data-driven approaches. In this work, we introduce a diffusion-based posterior sampling framework that inherently produces well-calibrated predictive uncertainty via faithful posterior sampling, eliminating the need for post-hoc calibration. In extensive evaluations on synthetic distributions, the Raman-based phenylacetic acid soft sensor benchmark, and a real ammonia synthesis case study, our method achieves practical improvements over existing UQ techniques in both uncertainty calibration and predictive accuracy. These results highlight diffusion samplers as a principled and scalable paradigm for advancing uncertainty-aware modeling in industrial applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于扩散的后验采样框架，用于工业过程监控中的不确定性量化，无需后处理校准即可产生良好校准的预测不确定性
AI.motivation: 现代过程工业中，数据驱动模型对难以直接测量的关键性能指标进行实时监控至关重要。虽然准确预测很重要，但可靠的不确定性量化对于安全、可靠性和决策制定同样关键，而当前数据驱动方法在这方面仍面临重大挑战
AI.method: 引入基于扩散的后验采样框架，通过忠实后验采样固有地产生良好校准的预测不确定性，无需后处理校准
AI.result: 在合成分布、基于拉曼的苯乙酸软传感器基准测试和真实氨合成案例研究中，该方法在不确定性校准和预测准确性方面均优于现有UQ技术
AI.conclusion: 扩散采样器为工业应用中不确定性感知建模提供了原则性和可扩展的范式

title: FaCT-GS: Fast and Scalable CT Reconstruction with Gaussian Splatting
summary: Gaussian Splatting (GS) has emerged as a dominating technique for image rendering and has quickly been adapted for the X-ray Computed Tomography (CT) reconstruction task. However, despite being on par or better than many of its predecessors, the benefits of GS are typically not substantial enough to motivate a transition from well-established reconstruction algorithms. This paper addresses the most significant remaining limitations of the GS-based approach by introducing FaCT-GS, a framework for fast and flexible CT reconstruction. Enabled by an in-depth optimization of the voxelization and rasterization pipelines, our new method is significantly faster than its predecessors and scales well with projection and output volume size. Furthermore, the improved voxelization enables rapid fitting of Gaussians to pre-existing volumes, which can serve as a prior for warm-starting the reconstruction, or simply as an alternative, compressed representation. FaCT-GS is over 4X faster than the State of the Art GS CT reconstruction on standard 512x512 projections, and over 13X faster on 2k projections. Implementation available at: https://github.com/PaPieta/fact-gs.

AI.tldr: FaCT-GS是一个基于高斯泼溅的快速灵活CT重建框架，通过优化体素化和光栅化流程，相比现有方法显著提升了重建速度，并支持从已有体积快速拟合高斯作为先验。
AI.motivation: 尽管高斯泼溅在CT重建任务中表现良好，但其优势通常不足以促使从成熟的重建算法过渡。现有GS方法仍存在显著局限性，特别是在速度和灵活性方面。
AI.method: 提出FaCT-GS框架，通过深入优化体素化和光栅化流程，实现快速CT重建。改进的体素化能够快速将高斯拟合到已有体积，可作为先验用于热启动重建或作为压缩表示。
AI.result: 在标准512x512投影上比现有最佳GS CT重建快4倍以上，在2k投影上快13倍以上。能够良好地扩展到投影和输出体积大小。
AI.conclusion: FaCT-GS通过优化体素化和光栅化流程，显著提升了高斯泼溅在CT重建中的速度和灵活性，为从传统算法过渡提供了更强动力。

title: Optimizing RAG Rerankers with LLM Feedback via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Rerankers play a pivotal role in refining retrieval results for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. However, current reranking models are typically optimized on static human annotated relevance labels in isolation, decoupled from the downstream generation process. This isolation leads to a fundamental misalignment: documents identified as topically relevant by information retrieval metrics often fail to provide the actual utility required by the LLM for precise answer generation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReRanking Preference Optimization (RRPO), a reinforcement learning framework that directly aligns reranking with the LLM's generation quality. By formulating reranking as a sequential decision-making process, RRPO optimizes for context utility using LLM feedback, thereby eliminating the need for expensive human annotations. To ensure training stability, we further introduce a reference-anchored deterministic baseline. Extensive experiments on knowledge-intensive benchmarks demonstrate that RRPO significantly outperforms strong baselines, including the powerful list-wise reranker RankZephyr. Further analysis highlights the versatility of our framework: it generalizes seamlessly to diverse readers (e.g., GPT-4o), integrates orthogonally with query expansion modules like Query2Doc, and remains robust even when trained with noisy supervisors.

AI.tldr: RRPO：基于强化学习的重排序偏好优化框架，通过LLM反馈直接对齐重排序与生成质量，无需人工标注
AI.motivation: 当前重排序模型基于静态人工标注的相关性标签进行优化，与下游生成过程脱节，导致检索到的文档虽然符合信息检索指标，但无法为LLM提供生成精确答案所需的实际效用
AI.method: 提出ReRanking Preference Optimization (RRPO)强化学习框架，将重排序建模为序列决策过程，使用LLM反馈优化上下文效用，并引入参考锚定确定性基线确保训练稳定性
AI.result: 在知识密集型基准测试中，RRPO显著优于包括强大的列表式重排序器RankZephyr在内的基线模型。框架具有良好泛化性，可适配不同LLM，与查询扩展模块正交集成，且在噪声监督下仍保持鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: RRPO通过强化学习直接对齐重排序与LLM生成质量，解决了传统重排序模型与下游生成任务脱节的问题，为检索增强生成提供了更有效的重排序方法

title: See Something, Say Something: Context-Criticality-Aware Mobile Robot Communication for Hazard Mitigations
summary: The proverb ``see something, say something'' captures a core responsibility of autonomous mobile robots in safety-critical situations: when they detect a hazard, they must communicate--and do so quickly. In emergency scenarios, delayed or miscalibrated responses directly increase the time to action and the risk of damage. We argue that a systematic context-sensitive assessment of the criticality level, time sensitivity, and feasibility of mitigation is necessary for AMRs to reduce time to action and respond effectively. This paper presents a framework in which VLM/LLM-based perception drives adaptive message generation, for example, a knife in a kitchen produces a calm acknowledgment; the same object in a corridor triggers an urgent coordinated alert. Validation in 60+ runs using a patrolling mobile robot not only empowers faster response, but also brings user trusts to 82\% compared to fixed-priority baselines, validating that structured criticality assessment improves both response speed and mitigation effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于VLM/LLM感知的自适应消息生成框架，通过系统化的上下文敏感关键性评估来减少响应时间并提高应急响应效果。
AI.motivation: 在安全关键场景中，自主移动机器人检测到危险时必须快速准确地进行通信。延迟或不恰当的响应会直接增加行动时间和损害风险。需要系统化的上下文敏感评估来确定关键性级别、时间敏感性和缓解措施的可行性。
AI.method: 提出了一个框架，其中基于VLM/LLM的感知驱动自适应消息生成。系统根据上下文评估危险的关键性水平，例如厨房中的刀具产生平静的确认，而走廊中的相同物体触发紧急协调警报。
AI.result: 在60多次巡逻移动机器人运行中验证，不仅实现了更快的响应，还将用户信任度提升至82%（相比固定优先级基线）。结构化关键性评估改善了响应速度和缓解效果。
AI.conclusion: 结构化关键性评估对于自主移动机器人在安全关键场景中的有效响应至关重要。基于VLM/LLM的自适应消息生成框架能够根据上下文敏感地评估危险，显著减少响应时间并提高用户信任。

title: CANDI: Curated Test-Time Adaptation for Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection Under Distribution Shift
summary: Multivariate time-series anomaly detection (MTSAD) aims to identify deviations from normality in multivariate time-series and is critical in real-world applications. However, in real-world deployments, distribution shifts are ubiquitous and cause severe performance degradation in pre-trained anomaly detector. Test-time adaptation (TTA) updates a pre-trained model on-the-fly using only unlabeled test data, making it promising for addressing this challenge. In this study, we propose CANDI (Curated test-time adaptation for multivariate time-series ANomaly detection under DIstribution shift), a novel TTA framework that selectively identifies and adapts to potential false positives while preserving pre-trained knowledge. CANDI introduces a False Positive Mining (FPM) strategy to curate adaptation samples based on anomaly scores and latent similarity, and incorporates a plug-and-play Spatiotemporally-Aware Normality Adaptation (SANA) module for structurally informed model updates. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CANDI significantly improves the performance of MTSAD under distribution shift, improving AUROC up to 14% while using fewer adaptation samples.

AI.tldr: CANDI是一个用于多元时间序列异常检测的测试时自适应框架，通过选择性识别和适应潜在假阳性来应对分布偏移问题。
