Furthermore, we show that low spatial resolution can be compensated by higher feature dimensionality, improving controllability in generative rendering from explicit spatial representations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种使用自监督学习特征作为预训练视频扩散模型条件信号的方法，通过轻量级架构解耦外观与其他特征，实现视频域迁移和3D到视频生成。
AI.motivation: 当前视频模型主要用作生成渲染器，通过感知、几何或简单语义信号进行条件控制。自监督学习获得的高维特征虽然包含丰富的场景信息，但风格、光照和语义信息相互纠缠，限制了生成能力。需要探索如何将这些特征作为更通用的条件信号用于预训练视频扩散模型。
AI.method: 引入轻量级架构和训练策略，将外观特征与其他需要保留的特征解耦。通过补偿低空间分辨率与高特征维度的关系，提高从显式空间表示进行生成渲染的可控性。
AI.result: 该方法能够实现视频域迁移（如风格化、重光照）和从3D到视频的生成任务。通过特征解耦实现了对外观变化的鲁棒控制，同时保持了其他重要特征。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习特征可以作为预训练视频扩散模型的有效条件信号，通过适当的架构设计实现特征解耦，显著提升了视频生成任务的可控性和应用范围。

title: Optimizing Interventions for Agent-Based Infectious Disease Simulations
summary: Non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs) are commonly used tools for controlling infectious disease transmission when pharmaceutical options are unavailable. Yet, identifying effective interventions that minimize societal disruption remains challenging. Agent-based simulation is a popular tool for analyzing the impact of possible interventions in epidemiology. However, automatically optimizing NPIs using agent-based simulations poses a complex problem because, in agent-based epidemiological models, interventions can target individuals based on multiple attributes, affect hierarchical group structures (e.g., schools, workplaces, and families), and be combined arbitrarily, resulting in a very large or even infinite search space. We aim to support decision-makers with our Agent-based Infectious Disease Intervention Optimization System (ADIOS) that optimizes NPIs for infectious disease simulations using Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming (GGGP). The core of ADIOS is a domain-specific language for expressing NPIs in agent-based simulations that structures the intervention search space through a context-free grammar. To make optimization more efficient, the search space can be further reduced by defining constraints that prevent the generation of semantically invalid intervention patterns. Using this constrained language and an interface that enables coupling with agent-based simulations, ADIOS adopts the GGGP approach for simulation-based optimization. Using the German Epidemic Micro-Simulation System (GEMS) as a case study, we demonstrate the potential of our approach to generate optimal interventions for realistic epidemiological models

AI.tldr: ADIOS系统使用语法引导的遗传编程自动优化非药物干预措施，通过领域特定语言结构化搜索空间，结合基于智能体的传染病模拟进行决策支持
AI.motivation: 在缺乏药物选择时，非药物干预措施是控制传染病传播的重要工具，但识别既能有效控制疫情又能最小化社会干扰的干预措施具有挑战性。基于智能体的模拟常用于分析干预效果，但由于干预措施可以基于多个属性针对个体、影响分层群体结构（如学校、工作场所、家庭）并可任意组合，导致搜索空间巨大甚至无限，自动优化NPIs成为一个复杂问题
AI.method: 开发了基于智能体的传染病干预优化系统（ADIOS），采用语法引导的遗传编程（GGGP）优化非药物干预措施。核心是用于表达基于智能体模拟中NPIs的领域特定语言，通过上下文无关语法结构化干预搜索空间。通过定义约束防止生成语义无效的干预模式来进一步减少搜索空间。使用这种受约束的语言和与基于智能体模拟的接口，ADIOS采用GGGP方法进行基于模拟的优化
AI.result: 以德国流行病微观模拟系统（GEMS）为案例研究，展示了该方法为现实流行病学模型生成最优干预措施的潜力
AI.conclusion: ADIOS系统通过语法引导的遗传编程和领域特定语言，能够有效优化基于智能体模拟中的非药物干预措施，为决策者提供支持，在复杂搜索空间中识别最优干预策略

title: A Self-Rotating Tri-Rotor UAV for Field of View Expansion and Autonomous Flight
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) perception relies on onboard sensors like cameras and LiDAR, which are limited by the narrow field of view (FoV). We present Self-Perception INertial Navigation Enabled Rotorcraft (SPINNER), a self-rotating tri-rotor UAV for the FoV expansion and autonomous flight. Without adding extra sensors or energy consumption, SPINNER significantly expands the FoV of onboard camera and LiDAR sensors through continuous spin motion, thereby enhancing environmental perception efficiency. SPINNER achieves full 3-dimensional position and roll--pitch attitude control using only three brushless motors, while adjusting the rotation speed via anti-torque plates design. To address the strong coupling, severe nonlinearity, and complex disturbances induced by spinning flight, we develop a disturbance compensation control framework that combines nonlinear model predictive control (MPC) with incremental nonlinear dynamic inversion. Experimental results demonstrate that SPINNER maintains robust flight under wind disturbances up to 4.8 \,m/s and achieves high-precision trajectory tracking at a maximum speed of 2.0\,m/s. Moreover, tests in parking garages and forests show that the rotational perception mechanism substantially improves FoV coverage and enhances perception capability of SPINNER.

AI.tldr: SPINNER是一种自旋转三旋翼无人机，通过持续旋转运动扩展机载传感器视场，无需额外传感器或能耗，同时实现三维位置和姿态控制
AI.motivation: 传统无人机感知系统受限于机载传感器（如相机和LiDAR）的狭窄视场，需要在不增加额外传感器或能耗的情况下扩展感知范围
AI.method: 设计自旋转三旋翼无人机，通过连续旋转运动扩展传感器视场；使用三个无刷电机实现三维位置和滚转-俯仰姿态控制；采用反扭矩板设计调整转速；开发结合非线性模型预测控制（MPC）和增量非线性动态反演的扰动补偿控制框架
AI.result: SPINNER在风速高达4.8 m/s的风扰动下保持稳健飞行，最大速度2.0 m/s时实现高精度轨迹跟踪；在停车场和森林环境测试中，旋转感知机制显著提高了视场覆盖范围和感知能力
AI.conclusion: SPINNER通过自旋转机制有效扩展了无人机传感器视场，增强了环境感知能力，同时通过先进控制算法解决了旋转飞行带来的强耦合、严重非线性和复杂扰动问题

title: MiCA Learns More Knowledge Than LoRA and Full Fine-Tuning
summary: Minor Component Adaptation (MiCA) is a novel parameter-efficient fine-tuning method for large language models that focuses on adapting underutilized subspaces of model representations. Unlike conventional methods such as Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), which target dominant subspaces, MiCA leverages Singular Value Decomposition to identify subspaces related to minor singular vectors associated with the least significant singular values and constrains the update of parameters during fine-tuning to those directions. This strategy leads to up to 5.9x improvement in knowledge acquisition under optimized training hyperparameters and a minimal parameter footprint of 6-60% compared to LoRA. These results suggest that constraining adaptation to minor singular directions provides a more efficient and stable mechanism for integrating new knowledge into pre-trained language models.

AI.tldr: MiCA是一种新颖的参数高效微调方法，专注于适应模型表示中未充分利用的子空间，通过约束参数更新到次要奇异向量方向，相比LoRA在知识获取上提升5.9倍，参数占用仅6-60%。
AI.motivation: 传统参数高效微调方法如LoRA主要针对模型表示中的主导子空间，但作者认为适应未充分利用的次要子空间可能更有效地整合新知识到预训练语言模型中。
AI.method: 利用奇异值分解识别与最小奇异值相关的次要奇异向量子空间，在微调过程中约束参数更新到这些次要奇异方向，从而实现对模型表示中未充分利用子空间的适应。
AI.result: 在优化训练超参数下，MiCA在知识获取方面相比LoRA提升高达5.9倍，同时参数占用仅为LoRA的6-60%，表明约束适应到次要奇异方向提供了更高效稳定的知识整合机制。
AI.conclusion: 约束适应到次要奇异方向为预训练语言模型整合新知识提供了更高效稳定的机制，MiCA方法在参数效率和知识获取性能方面均优于传统方法。

title: Ultrasound-CLIP: Semantic-Aware Contrastive Pre-training for Ultrasound Image-Text Understanding
summary: Ultrasound imaging is widely used in clinical diagnostics due to its real-time capability and radiation-free nature. However, existing vision-language pre-training models, such as CLIP, are primarily designed for other modalities, and are difficult to directly apply to ultrasound data, which exhibit heterogeneous anatomical structures and diverse diagnostic attributes. To bridge this gap, we construct US-365K, a large-scale ultrasound image-text dataset containing 365k paired samples across 52 anatomical categories. We establish Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Taxonomy (UDT) containing two hierarchical knowledge frameworks. Ultrasonographic Hierarchical Anatomical Taxonomy standardizes anatomical organization, and Ultrasonographic Diagnostic Attribute Framework formalizes nine diagnostic dimensions, including body system, organ, diagnosis, shape, margins, echogenicity, internal characteristics, posterior acoustic phenomena, and vascularity. Building upon these foundations, we propose Ultrasound-CLIP, a semantic-aware contrastive learning framework that introduces semantic soft labels and semantic loss to refine sample discrimination. Moreover, we construct a heterogeneous graph modality derived from UDAF's textual representations, enabling structured reasoning over lesion-attribute relations. Extensive experiments with patient-level data splitting demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on classification and retrieval benchmarks, while also delivering strong generalization to zero-shot, linear probing, and fine-tuning tasks.

AI.tldr: 该研究构建了US-365K超声图像-文本数据集，提出超声诊断分类学(UDT)和Ultrasound-CLIP框架，通过语义感知对比学习提升超声图像理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练模型（如CLIP）主要针对其他模态设计，难以直接应用于超声数据，因为超声图像具有异质性解剖结构和多样化诊断属性。需要专门针对超声模态的预训练方法。
AI.method: 1) 构建US-365K大规模超声图像-文本数据集（365k配对样本，52个解剖类别）；2) 建立超声诊断分类学(UDT)，包含超声分层解剖分类学和超声诊断属性框架；3) 提出Ultrasound-CLIP框架，引入语义软标签和语义损失进行样本区分；4) 构建基于UDAF文本表示的异构图模态，实现病变-属性关系的结构化推理。
AI.result: 在患者级数据分割的广泛实验中，该方法在分类和检索基准测试中达到最先进性能，同时在零样本学习、线性探测和微调任务中表现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过构建大规模超声数据集和专门设计的预训练框架，成功解决了现有视觉-语言模型在超声模态上的应用限制，为超声图像理解提供了有效的解决方案。

title: ProCeedRL: Process Critic with Exploratory Demonstration Reinforcement Learning for LLM Agentic Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) significantly enhances the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs), yet applying it to multi-turn agentic tasks remains challenging due to the long-horizon nature of interactions and the stochasticity of environmental feedback. We identify a structural failure mode in agentic exploration: suboptimal actions elicit noisy observations into misleading contexts, which further weaken subsequent decision-making, making recovery increasingly difficult. This cumulative feedback loop of errors renders standard exploration strategies ineffective and susceptible to the model's reasoning and the environment's randomness. To mitigate this issue, we propose ProCeedRL: Process Critic with Explorative Demonstration RL, shifting exploration from passive selection to active intervention. ProCeedRL employs a process-level critic to monitor interactions in real time, incorporating reflection-based demonstrations to guide agents in stopping the accumulation of errors. We find that this approach significantly exceeds the model's saturated exploration performance, demonstrating substantial exploratory benefits. By learning from exploratory demonstrations and on-policy samples, ProCeedRL significantly improves exploration efficiency and achieves superior performance on complex deep search and embodied tasks.

AI.tldr: ProCeedRL：一种针对多轮智能体任务的强化学习方法，通过过程级批评家和探索性演示来防止错误累积，显著提升探索效率和任务性能
AI.motivation: 强化学习能增强大语言模型的推理能力，但在多轮智能体任务中存在挑战：长时程交互和环境反馈的随机性导致探索失败。研究发现存在结构性失败模式：次优动作产生误导性观察，进一步削弱后续决策，形成错误累积的恶性循环，使标准探索策略失效。
AI.method: 提出ProCeedRL（Process Critic with Explorative Demonstration RL），将探索从被动选择转向主动干预。采用过程级批评家实时监控交互，结合基于反思的演示来指导智能体停止错误累积。通过学习探索性演示和在线策略样本，提升探索效率。
AI.result: 该方法显著超越了模型的饱和探索性能，展现出实质性的探索优势。在复杂的深度搜索和具身任务中，ProCeedRL显著提高了探索效率并实现了卓越的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: ProCeedRL通过主动干预的探索策略和过程级监控，有效解决了多轮智能体任务中的错误累积问题，为强化学习在复杂智能体任务中的应用提供了有效解决方案。

title: Unifying UAV Cross-View Geo-Localization via 3D Geometric Perception
summary: Cross-view geo-localization for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) operating in GNSS-denied environments remains challenging due to the severe geometric discrepancy between oblique UAV imagery and orthogonal satellite maps. Most existing methods address this problem through a decoupled pipeline of place retrieval and pose estimation, implicitly treating perspective distortion as appearance noise rather than an explicit geometric transformation. In this work, we propose a geometry-aware UAV geo-localization framework that explicitly models the 3D scene geometry to unify coarse place recognition and fine-grained pose estimation within a single inference pipeline. Our approach reconstructs a local 3D scene from multi-view UAV image sequences using a Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT), and renders a virtual Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation that orthorectifies the UAV perspective to align with satellite imagery. This BEV serves as a geometric intermediary that enables robust cross-view retrieval and provides spatial priors for accurate 3 Degrees of Freedom (3-DoF) pose regression. To efficiently handle multiple location hypotheses, we introduce a Satellite-wise Attention Block that isolates the interaction between each satellite candidate and the reconstructed UAV scene, preventing inter-candidate interference while maintaining linear computational complexity. In addition, we release a recalibrated version of the University-1652 dataset with precise coordinate annotations and spatial overlap analysis, enabling rigorous evaluation of end-to-end localization accuracy. Extensive experiments on the refined University-1652 benchmark and SUES-200 demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving robust meter-level localization accuracy and improved generalization in complex urban environments.

AI.tldr: 提出几何感知的无人机地理定位框架，通过3D场景重建和鸟瞰图渲染统一粗粒度地点识别与细粒度姿态估计，在GNSS拒止环境中实现米级定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机地理定位方法通常采用解耦的检索-姿态估计流程，将透视畸变视为外观噪声而非显式几何变换，难以处理倾斜无人机图像与正交卫星地图之间的严重几何差异。
AI.method: 1) 使用视觉几何基础Transformer从多视角无人机图像序列重建局部3D场景；2) 渲染虚拟鸟瞰图表示，将无人机透视正交化以对齐卫星图像；3) 引入卫星注意力块隔离候选位置交互，防止干扰同时保持线性计算复杂度；4) 发布重新校准的University-1652数据集，包含精确坐标标注和空间重叠分析。
AI.result: 在重新校准的University-1652基准和SUES-200数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法显著优于现有最先进基线，实现鲁棒的米级定位精度，并在复杂城市环境中表现出更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的几何感知框架通过显式建模3D场景几何，统一了粗粒度地点识别和细粒度姿态估计，有效解决了无人机倾斜视角与卫星正交视图之间的几何差异问题，为GNSS拒止环境下的无人机定位提供了有效解决方案。

title: StreamingVLA: Streaming Vision-Language-Action Model with Action Flow Matching and Adaptive Early Observation
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have demonstrated exceptional performance in natural language-driven perception and control. However, the high computational cost of VLA models poses significant efficiency challenges, particularly for resource-constrained edge platforms in real-world deployments. However, since different stages of VLA (observation, action generation and execution) must proceed sequentially, and wait for the completion of the preceding stage, the system suffers from frequent halting and high latency. To address this, We conduct a systematic analysis to identify the challenges for fast and fluent generation, and propose enabling VLAs with the ability to asynchronously parallelize across VLA stages in a "streaming" manner. First, we eliminate the reliance on action chunking and adopt action flow matching, which learns the trajectory of action flows rather than denoising chunk-wise actions. It overlaps the latency of action generation and execution. Second, we design an action saliency-aware adaptive observation mechanism, thereby overlapping the latency of execution and observation. Without sacrificing performance, StreamingVLA achieves substantial speedup and improves the fluency of execution. It achieves a 2.4 $\times$ latency speedup and reduces execution halting by 6.5 $\times$.

AI.tldr: StreamingVLA：一种通过异步并行化VLA各阶段实现流式处理的视觉-语言-动作模型，显著降低延迟并提升执行流畅性
AI.motivation: 传统VLA模型存在高计算成本和顺序执行导致的频繁停顿与高延迟问题，尤其在资源受限的边缘平台上部署时效率挑战显著
AI.method: 1) 采用动作流匹配替代动作分块，学习动作流轨迹而非分块去噪，实现动作生成与执行的延迟重叠；2) 设计动作显著性感知的自适应观测机制，实现执行与观测的延迟重叠
AI.result: 在不牺牲性能的前提下，StreamingVLA实现了2.4倍的延迟加速，并将执行停顿减少了6.5倍
AI.conclusion: 通过流式异步并行化VLA各阶段，StreamingVLA显著提升了模型效率与执行流畅性，为资源受限环境下的VLA部署提供了有效解决方案

title: Cognitive Energy Modeling for Neuroadaptive Human-Machine Systems using EEG and WGAN-GP
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides a non-invasive insight into the brain's cognitive and emotional dynamics. However, modeling how these states evolve in real time and quantifying the energy required for such transitions remains a major challenge. The Schrödinger Bridge Problem (SBP) offers a principled probabilistic framework to model the most efficient evolution between the brain states, interpreted as a measure of cognitive energy cost. While generative models such as GANs have been widely used to augment EEG data, it remains unclear whether synthetic EEG preserves the underlying dynamical structure required for transition-based analysis. In this work, we address this gap by using SBP-derived transport cost as a metric to evaluate whether GAN-generated EEG retains the distributional geometry necessary for energy-based modeling of cognitive state transitions. We compare transition energies derived from real and synthetic EEG collected during Stroop tasks and demonstrate strong agreement across group and participant-level analyses. These results indicate that synthetic EEG preserves the transition structure required for SBP-based modeling, enabling its use in data-efficient neuroadaptive systems. We further present a framework in which SBP-derived cognitive energy serves as a control signal for adaptive human-machine systems, supporting real-time adjustment of system behavior in response to user cognitive and affective state.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用薛定谔桥问题（SBP）的传输成本作为度量，评估GAN生成的EEG是否保留了认知状态转换所需的分布几何结构，并证明合成EEG保留了SBP建模所需的转换结构，可用于数据高效的神经自适应系统。
AI.motivation: 虽然GAN等生成模型已广泛用于增强EEG数据，但尚不清楚合成EEG是否保留了基于转换分析所需的底层动态结构。需要评估合成EEG是否保持了分布几何结构，以支持基于能量的认知状态转换建模。
AI.method: 使用SBP衍生的传输成本作为度量，比较真实和GAN生成的EEG在Stroop任务中的转换能量。在群体和参与者层面进行分析，验证合成EEG是否保留了SBP建模所需的转换结构。
AI.result: 真实和合成EEG在Stroop任务中衍生的转换能量在群体和参与者层面分析中表现出强烈一致性，表明合成EEG保留了SBP建模所需的转换结构。
AI.conclusion: 合成EEG保留了SBP建模所需的转换结构，可用于数据高效的神经自适应系统。进一步提出了一个框架，其中SBP衍生的认知能量作为自适应人机系统的控制信号，支持根据用户认知和情感状态实时调整系统行为。

title: Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization with Reinforced Point Selection for Crowd Instance Segmentation
summary: Crowd instance segmentation is a crucial task with a wide range of applications, including surveillance and transportation. Currently, point labels are common in crowd datasets, while region labels (e.g., boxes) are rare and inaccurate. The masks obtained through segmentation help to improve the accuracy of region labels and resolve the correspondence between individual location coordinates and crowd density maps. However, directly applying currently popular large foundation models such as SAM does not yield ideal results in dense crowds. To this end, we first propose Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization (DPMO), which integrates SAM with the Nearest Neighbor Exclusive Circle (NNEC) constraint to generate dense instance segmentation from point annotations. With DPMO and manual correction, we obtain mask annotations from the existing point annotations for traditional crowd datasets. Then, to predict instance segmentation in dense crowds, we propose a Reinforced Point Selection (RPS) framework trained with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which selects the best predicted point from a sampling of the initial point prediction. Through extensive experiments, we achieve state-of-the-art crowd instance segmentation performance on ShanghaiTech, UCF-QNRF, JHU-CROWD++, and NWPU-Crowd datasets. Furthermore, we design new loss functions supervised by masks that boost counting performance across different models, demonstrating the significant role of mask annotations in enhancing counting accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出DPMO方法将点标注转换为掩码标注，并设计RPS框架进行密集人群实例分割，在多个数据集上达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 当前人群数据集主要使用点标注，而区域标注（如边界框）稀少且不准确。直接应用SAM等大型基础模型在密集人群场景效果不佳，需要专门的方法处理密集人群实例分割问题。
AI.method: 1. 提出Dense Point-to-Mask Optimization (DPMO)，结合SAM和最近邻互斥圆约束，从点标注生成密集实例分割掩码；2. 提出Reinforced Point Selection (RPS)框架，使用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)训练，从初始点预测采样中选择最佳预测点；3. 设计基于掩码监督的新损失函数提升计数性能。
AI.result: 在ShanghaiTech、UCF-QNRF、JHU-CROWD++和NWPU-Crowd数据集上实现了最先进的密集人群实例分割性能。基于掩码监督的损失函数在不同模型上显著提升了计数准确率。
AI.conclusion: DPMO方法能够从点标注生成高质量的掩码标注，RPS框架有效解决了密集人群实例分割问题，掩码标注对提升计数准确率具有重要作用。

title: GenGait: A Transformer-Based Model for Human Gait Anomaly Detection and Normative Twin Generation
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. Preprint submitted to a journal
summary: Gait analysis provides an objective characterization of locomotor function and is widely used to support diagnosis and rehabilitation monitoring across neurological and orthopedic disorders. Deep learning has been increasingly applied to this domain, yet most approaches rely on supervised classifiers trained on disease-labeled data, limiting generalization to heterogeneous pathological presentations. This work proposes a label-free framework for joint-level anomaly detection and kinematic correction based on a Transformer masked autoencoder trained exclusively on normative gait sequences from 150 adults, acquired with a markerless multi-camera motion-capture system. At inference, a two-pass procedure is applied to potentially pathological input sequences, first it estimates joint inconsistency scores by occluding individual joints and measuring deviations from the learned normative prior. Then, it withholds the flagged joints from the encoder input and reconstructs the full skeleton from the remaining spatiotemporal context, yielding corrected kinematic trajectories at the flagged positions. Validation on 10 held-out normative participants, who mimicked seven simulated gait abnormalities, showed accurate localization of biomechanically inconsistent joints, a significant reduction in angular deviation across all analyzed joints with large effect sizes, and preservation of normative kinematics. The proposed approach enables interpretable, subject-specific localization of gait impairments without requiring disease labels. Video is available at https://youtu.be/Rcm3jqR5pN4.

AI.tldr: 基于Transformer掩码自编码器的无标签步态异常检测与运动学校正框架，仅使用正常步态数据训练，通过两阶段推理定位异常关节并生成校正轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的步态分析方法大多依赖有监督分类器，需要疾病标签数据，难以泛化到异质性病理表现。需要一种无需疾病标签、能定位个体特异性步态异常的方法。
AI.method: 提出基于Transformer掩码自编码器的无标签框架：1) 仅使用150名成年人的正常步态序列训练；2) 推理时采用两阶段流程：先通过遮挡单个关节计算不一致性分数，然后从剩余时空上下文重建完整骨架，生成校正后的运动学轨迹。
AI.result: 在10名模拟七种步态异常的参与者上验证：准确定位生物力学不一致关节，所有分析关节的角度偏差显著减少（大效应量），同时保持正常运动学特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需疾病标签的可解释、个体特异性步态损伤定位，为步态分析和康复监测提供了新的无监督解决方案。

title: Label Shift Estimation With Incremental Prior Update
summary: An assumption often made in supervised learning is that the training and testing sets have the same label distribution. However, in real-life scenarios, this assumption rarely holds. For example, medical diagnosis result distributions change over time and across locations; fraud detection models must adapt as patterns of fraudulent activity shift; the category distribution of social media posts changes based on trending topics and user demographics. In the task of label shift estimation, the goal is to estimate the changing label distribution $p_t(y)$ in the testing set, assuming the likelihood $p(x|y)$ does not change, implying no concept drift. In this paper, we propose a new approach for post-hoc label shift estimation, unlike previous methods that perform moment matching with confusion matrix estimated from a validation set or maximize the likelihood of the new data with an expectation-maximization algorithm. We aim to incrementally update the prior on each sample, adjusting each posterior for more accurate label shift estimation. The proposed method is based on intuitive assumptions on classifiers that are generally true for modern probabilistic classifiers. The proposed method relies on a weaker notion of calibration compared to other methods. As a post-hoc approach for label shift estimation, the proposed method is versatile and can be applied to any black-box probabilistic classifier. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and MNIST show that the proposed method consistently outperforms the current state-of-the-art maximum likelihood-based methods under different calibrations and varying intensities of label shift.

AI.tldr: 提出一种后验标签分布偏移估计新方法，通过增量更新每个样本的先验概率来调整后验，优于现有最大似然方法
AI.motivation: 现实场景中训练集和测试集的标签分布往往不同（如医疗诊断、欺诈检测、社交媒体分类），但传统监督学习假设两者分布相同。标签偏移估计旨在估计测试集中变化的标签分布p_t(y)，同时假设似然p(x|y)不变（无概念漂移）。
AI.method: 提出后验标签偏移估计方法，通过增量更新每个样本的先验概率来调整后验分布。该方法基于对现代概率分类器的直观假设，相比其他方法依赖更弱的校准概念，可作为黑盒概率分类器的通用后处理方法。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和MNIST数据集上的实验表明，该方法在不同校准程度和不同强度的标签偏移下，始终优于当前最先进的最大似然方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为标签偏移估计提供了一种有效且通用的后处理方法，能够适应现实世界中标签分布变化的场景，优于现有方法。

title: SAFE: Stepwise Atomic Feedback for Error correction in Multi-hop Reasoning
summary: Multi-hop QA benchmarks frequently reward Large Language Models (LLMs) for spurious correctness, masking ungrounded or flawed reasoning steps. To shift toward rigorous reasoning, we propose SAFE, a dynamic benchmarking framework that replaces the ungrounded Chain-of-Thought (CoT) with a strictly verifiable sequence of grounded entities. Our framework operates across two phases: (1) train-time verification, where we establish an atomic error taxonomy and a Knowledge Graph (KG)-grounded verification pipeline to eliminate noisy supervision in standard benchmarks, identifying up to 14% of instances as unanswerable, and (2) inference-time verification, where a feedback model trained on this verified dataset dynamically detects ungrounded steps in real-time. Experimental results demonstrate that SAFE not only exposes the critical flaws of existing benchmarks at train-time, but also significantly outperforms standard baselines, achieving an average accuracy gain of 8.4 pp while guaranteeing verifiable trajectories at inference-time.

AI.tldr: SAFE框架通过可验证的实体序列替换无根据的思维链，在训练时验证消除噪声监督，在推理时动态检测无根据步骤，显著提升多跳QA的严谨性。
AI.motivation: 现有多跳QA基准测试经常奖励大型语言模型的虚假正确性，掩盖了无根据或有缺陷的推理步骤，需要转向更严谨的推理验证框架。
AI.method: 提出SAFE动态基准测试框架，包含两个阶段：1) 训练时验证：建立原子错误分类法和知识图谱验证管道，消除标准基准中的噪声监督；2) 推理时验证：在已验证数据集上训练反馈模型，实时动态检测无根据的推理步骤。
AI.result: 识别出高达14%的实例为不可回答，显著优于标准基线，平均准确率提升8.4个百分点，同时在推理时保证可验证的推理轨迹。
AI.conclusion: SAFE框架不仅暴露了现有基准测试的关键缺陷，还通过严格的验证机制显著提升了多跳QA的推理严谨性和准确性。

title: ManipArena: Comprehensive Real-world Evaluation of Reasoning-Oriented Generalist Robot Manipulation
comment: Technical report for CVPR 2026 Challenge ManipArena
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models and world models have recently emerged as promising paradigms for general-purpose robotic intelligence, yet their progress is hindered by the lack of reliable evaluation protocols that reflect real-world deployment. Existing benchmarks are largely simulator-centric, which provide controllability but fail to capture the reality gap caused by perception noise, complex contact dynamics, hardware constraints, and system latency. Moreover, fragmented real-world evaluations across different robot platforms prevent fair and reproducible comparison. To address these challenges, we introduce ManipArena, a standardized evaluation framework designed to bridge simulation and real-world execution. ManipArena comprises 20 diverse tasks across 10,812 expert trajectories emphasizing reasoning-oriented manipulation tasks requiring semantic and spatial reasoning, supports multi-level generalization through controlled out-of-distribution settings, and incorporates long-horizon mobile manipulation beyond tabletop scenarios. The framework further provides rich sensory diagnostics, including low-level motor signals, and synchronized real-to-sim environments constructed via high-quality 3D scanning. Together, these features enable fair, realistic, and reproducible evaluation for both VLA and world model approaches, providing a scalable foundation for diagnosing and advancing embodied intelligence systems.

AI.tldr: ManipArena是一个标准化评估框架，旨在弥合仿真与现实世界执行之间的差距，为VLA模型和世界模型提供公平、真实、可复现的评估。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要基于仿真器，虽然提供可控性但无法捕捉由感知噪声、复杂接触动力学、硬件约束和系统延迟造成的现实差距。此外，不同机器人平台上的碎片化现实世界评估阻碍了公平和可复现的比较。
AI.method: ManipArena包含20个多样化任务，涵盖10,812条专家轨迹，强调需要语义和空间推理的推理导向操作任务。通过受控的分布外设置支持多级泛化，并超越桌面场景包含长时程移动操作。框架提供丰富的感官诊断（包括低级运动信号）和通过高质量3D扫描构建的同步实-仿真环境。
AI.result: 该框架为VLA和世界模型方法提供了公平、真实、可复现的评估，为诊断和推进具身智能系统提供了可扩展的基础。
AI.conclusion: ManipArena通过标准化评估框架解决了仿真与现实世界执行之间的差距问题，为VLA模型和世界模型的进展提供了可靠的评估协议，有助于推动通用机器人智能的发展。

title: CRIT: Graph-Based Automatic Data Synthesis to Enhance Cross-Modal Multi-Hop Reasoning
summary: Real-world reasoning often requires combining information across modalities, connecting textual context with visual cues in a multi-hop process. Yet, most multimodal benchmarks fail to capture this ability: they typically rely on single images or set of images, where answers can be inferred from a single modality alone. This limitation is mirrored in the training data, where interleaved image-text content rarely enforces complementary, multi-hop reasoning. As a result, Vision-Language Models (VLMs) frequently hallucinate and produce reasoning traces poorly grounded in visual evidence. To address this gap, we introduce CRIT, a new dataset and benchmark built with a graph-based automatic pipeline for generating complex cross-modal reasoning tasks. CRIT consists of diverse domains ranging from natural images, videos, and text-rich sources, and includes a manually verified test set for reliable evaluation. Experiments on this benchmark reveal that even state-of-the-art models struggle on such reasoning tasks. Models trained on CRIT show significant gains in cross-modal multi-hop reasoning, including strong improvements on SPIQA and other standard multimodal benchmarks.

AI.tldr: CRIT是一个新的多模态推理数据集和基准测试，通过图基自动流水线生成复杂的跨模态多跳推理任务，解决现有基准测试中单模态推理的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现实世界推理需要跨模态信息整合和多跳推理过程，但现有多模态基准测试通常依赖单图像或图像集，答案可以从单一模态推断，训练数据中交错的图像-文本内容也很少强制互补的多跳推理，导致视觉语言模型经常产生幻觉，推理轨迹缺乏视觉证据基础。
AI.method: 使用图基自动流水线生成复杂的跨模态推理任务，构建CRIT数据集，涵盖自然图像、视频和文本丰富来源等多个领域，并包含手动验证的测试集以确保可靠评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使是当前最先进的模型在这类推理任务上也表现不佳。在CRIT上训练的模型在跨模态多跳推理方面显示出显著提升，包括在SPIQA和其他标准多模态基准测试上的明显改进。
AI.conclusion: CRIT填补了多模态推理评估的空白，揭示了现有模型的局限性，并展示了通过针对性训练可以显著提升跨模态多跳推理能力，为更复杂的现实世界推理任务提供了新的评估框架。

title: SteerFlow: Steering Rectified Flows for Faithful Inversion-Based Image Editing
summary: Recent advances in flow-based generative models have enabled training-free, text-guided image editing by inverting an image into its latent noise and regenerating it under a new target conditional guidance. However, existing methods struggle to preserve source fidelity: higher-order solvers incur additional model inferences, truncated inversion constrains editability, and feature injection methods lack architectural transferability. To address these limitations, we propose SteerFlow, a model-agnostic editing framework with strong theoretical guarantees on source fidelity. In the forward process, we introduce an Amortized Fixed-Point Solver that implicitly straightens the forward trajectory by enforcing velocity consistency across consecutive timesteps, yielding a high-fidelity inverted latent. In the backward process, we introduce Trajectory Interpolation, which adaptively blends target-editing and source-reconstruction velocities to keep the editing trajectory anchored to the source. To further improve background preservation, we introduce an Adaptive Masking mechanism that spatially constrains the editing signal with concept-guided segmentation and source-target velocity differences. Extensive experiments on FLUX.1-dev and Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium demonstrate that SteerFlow consistently achieves better editing quality than existing methods. Finally, we show that SteerFlow extends naturally to a complex multi-turn editing paradigm without accumulating drift.

AI.tldr: SteerFlow是一个模型无关的文本引导图像编辑框架，通过隐式拉直前向轨迹和自适应混合编辑速度来保证源图像保真度，无需额外模型推理。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的生成模型在文本引导图像编辑中存在源图像保真度不足的问题：高阶求解器需要额外模型推理，截断反演限制可编辑性，特征注入方法缺乏架构可迁移性。
AI.method: 提出三个核心组件：1) 摊销定点求解器，通过强制连续时间步的速度一致性隐式拉直前向轨迹；2) 轨迹插值，自适应混合目标编辑和源重建速度；3) 自适应掩码，通过概念引导分割和源-目标速度差异空间约束编辑信号。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium上的实验表明，SteerFlow比现有方法获得更好的编辑质量，并能自然扩展到多轮编辑范式而不累积漂移。
AI.conclusion: SteerFlow是一个具有强理论保证的模型无关编辑框架，通过隐式轨迹拉直和自适应速度混合解决了源图像保真度问题，在单轮和多轮编辑中均表现出色。

title: A Generalized Matrix Inverse that is Consistent with Respect to Diagonal Transformations
comment: This reflects the 2018 SIMAX publication. (The 1604.08476 preprint has a comment saying that its content is contained in the SIMAX paper, but the two are quite distinct.)
summary: A new generalized matrix inverse is derived which is consistent with respect to arbitrary nonsingular diagonal transformations, e.g., it preserves units associated with variables under state space transformations, thus providing a general solution to a longstanding open problem relevant to a wide variety of applications in robotics, tracking, and control systems. The new inverse complements the Drazin inverse (which is consistent with respect to similarity transformations) and the Moore-Penrose inverse (which is consistent with respect to unitary/orthonormal transformations) to complete a trilogy of generalized matrix inverses that exhausts the standard family of analytically-important linear system transformations. Results are generalized to obtain unit-consistent and unit-invariant matrix decompositions and examples of their use are described.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的广义矩阵逆，对任意非奇异对角变换保持一致性，解决了机器人学、跟踪和控制系统中长期存在的单位一致性开放问题
AI.motivation: 解决在状态空间变换中变量单位保持一致的长期开放问题，该问题在机器人学、跟踪和控制系统中具有广泛应用需求
AI.method: 推导出一种新的广义矩阵逆，该逆对任意非奇异对角变换具有一致性，并推广到单位一致和单位不变的矩阵分解
AI.result: 新逆与Drazin逆（对相似变换一致）和Moore-Penrose逆（对酉/正交变换一致）形成完整的三部曲，涵盖了分析上重要的线性系统变换标准族
AI.conclusion: 新广义矩阵逆填补了理论空白，提供了单位一致性的通用解决方案，完成了广义矩阵逆的三部曲体系

title: Expert-Choice Routing Enables Adaptive Computation in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) enable parallel, non-autoregressive text generation, yet existing DLM mixture-of-experts (MoE) models inherit token-choice (TC) routing from autoregressive systems, leading to load imbalance and rigid computation allocation. We show that expert-choice (EC) routing is a better fit for DLMs: it provides deterministic load balancing by design, yielding higher throughput and faster convergence than TC. Building on the property that EC capacity is externally controllable, we introduce timestep-dependent expert capacity, which varies expert allocation according to the denoising step. We find that allocating more capacity to low-mask-ratio steps consistently achieves the best performance under matched FLOPs, and provide a mechanistic explanation: tokens in low-mask-ratio contexts exhibit an order-of-magnitude higher learning efficiency, so concentrating compute on these steps yields the largest marginal return. Finally, we show that existing pretrained TC DLMs can be retrofitted to EC by replacing only the router, achieving faster convergence and improved accuracy across diverse downstream tasks. Together, these results establish EC routing as a superior paradigm for DLM MoE models and demonstrate that computation in DLMs can be treated as an adaptive policy rather than a fixed architectural constant. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangshuibai/EC-DLM.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将专家选择路由应用于扩散语言模型，通过时间步相关的专家容量分配优化计算效率，相比传统令牌选择路由实现更好的负载均衡和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型的混合专家模型沿用了自回归系统中的令牌选择路由机制，导致负载不平衡和计算分配僵化。作者发现专家选择路由更适合扩散语言模型，因为它能提供确定性的负载均衡。
AI.method: 1) 采用专家选择路由替代令牌选择路由；2) 引入时间步相关的专家容量分配，根据去噪步骤调整专家分配；3) 在低掩码率步骤分配更多容量；4) 通过仅替换路由器将预训练的令牌选择扩散语言模型改造为专家选择版本。
AI.result: 专家选择路由在扩散语言模型中实现了更高的吞吐量和更快的收敛速度；时间步相关的容量分配在相同FLOPs下获得最佳性能；预训练模型通过路由器替换即可实现性能提升，在多种下游任务中达到更快的收敛和更高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 专家选择路由是扩散语言模型混合专家系统的优越范式，证明了扩散语言模型中的计算可以视为自适应策略而非固定的架构常数。

title: End-to-End Shared Attention Estimation via Group Detection with Feedback Refinement
summary: This paper proposes an end-to-end shared attention estimation method via group detection. Most previous methods estimate shared attention (SA) without detecting the actual group of people focusing on it, or assume that there is a single SA point in a given image. These issues limit the applicability of SA detection in practice and impact performance. To address them, we propose to simultaneously achieve group detection and shared attention estimation using a two step process: (i) the generation of SA heatmaps relying on individual gaze attention heatmaps and group membership scalars estimated in a group inference; (ii) a refinement of the initial group memberships allowing to account for the initial SA heatmaps, and the final prediction of the SA heatmap. Experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms other methods in group detection and shared attention estimation. Additional analyses validate the effectiveness of the proposed components. Code: https://github.com/chihina/sagd-CVPRW2026.

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端的共享注意力估计方法，通过群体检测同时实现群体识别和共享注意力估计，解决了现有方法不检测实际关注群体或假设单点共享注意力的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有共享注意力估计方法存在两个主要问题：1）不检测实际关注该共享注意力的群体；2）假设图像中只有一个共享注意力点。这些问题限制了共享注意力检测的实际应用并影响性能。
AI.method: 采用两步处理：1）基于个体注视注意力热图和群体推断中估计的群体成员标量生成共享注意力热图；2）根据初始共享注意力热图细化初始群体成员关系，并最终预测共享注意力热图。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在群体检测和共享注意力估计方面优于其他方法。附加分析验证了所提出组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的端到端方法通过同时进行群体检测和共享注意力估计，解决了现有方法的局限性，提高了共享注意力检测的实用性和性能。

title: SenseMath: Do LLMs Have Number Sense? Evaluating Shortcut Use, Judgment, and Generation
summary: Large language models often default to step-by-step computation even when efficient numerical shortcuts are available. This raises a basic question: do they exhibit number sense in a human-like behavioral sense, i.e., the ability to recognize numerical structure, apply shortcuts when appropriate, and avoid them when they are not? We introduce SenseMath, a controlled benchmark for evaluating structure-sensitive numerical reasoning in LLMs. SenseMath contains 4,800 items spanning eight shortcut categories and four digit scales, with matched strong-shortcut, weak-shortcut, and control variants. It supports three evaluation settings of increasing cognitive demand: Shortcut Use (whether models can apply shortcuts on shortcut-amenable problems); Applicability Judgment (whether they can recognize when a shortcut is appropriate or misleading); and Problem Generation (whether they can generate new problem items that correctly admit a given type of shortcut). Our evaluation across five LLMs, ranging from GPT-4o-mini to Llama-3.1-8B, shows a consistent pattern: when explicitly prompted, models readily adopt shortcut strategies and achieve substantial accuracy gains on shortcut-amenable items (up to 15%), yet under standard chain-of-thought prompting they spontaneously employ such strategies in fewer than 40% of cases, even when they demonstrably possess the requisite capability. Moreover, this competence is confined to the Use level; models systematically over-generalise shortcuts to problems where they do not apply, and fail to generate valid shortcut-bearing problems from scratch. Together, these results suggest that current LLMs exhibit procedural shortcut fluency without the structural understanding of when and why shortcuts work that underlies human number sense.

AI.tldr: SenseMath基准测试评估LLMs的数字结构敏感性推理能力，发现模型能应用计算捷径但缺乏人类数字直觉的结构性理解
AI.motivation: 研究LLMs是否具有类似人类的数字直觉能力，即识别数字结构、在适当时应用捷径、在不适用时避免使用捷径的能力
AI.method: 引入SenseMath基准测试，包含4,800个项目，涵盖八个捷径类别和四个数字规模，支持三个评估设置：捷径使用、适用性判断和问题生成
AI.result: LLMs在明确提示下能应用捷径策略（准确率提升达15%），但在标准思维链提示下自发使用率低于40%；模型过度泛化捷径到不适用的问题，且无法生成有效的捷径问题
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs表现出程序性捷径流畅性，但缺乏支撑人类数字直觉的结构性理解，即理解捷径何时及为何有效的深层认知

title: Feel Robot Feels: Tactile Feedback Array Glove for Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Teleoperation is a key approach for collecting high-quality, physically consistent demonstrations for robotic manipulation. However, teleoperation for dexterous manipulation remains constrained by: (i) inaccurate hand-robot motion mapping, which limits teleoperated dexterity, and (ii) limited tactile feedback that forces vision-dominated interaction and hinders perception of contact geometry and force variation. To address these challenges, we present TAG, a low-cost glove system that integrates precise hand motion capture with high-resolution tactile feedback, enabling effective tactile-in-the-loop dexterous teleoperation. For motion capture, TAG employs a non-contact magnetic sensing design that provides drift-free, electromagnetically robust 21-DoF joint tracking with joint angle estimation errors below 1 degree. Meanwhile, to restore tactile sensation, TAG equips each finger with a 32-actuator tactile array within a compact 2 cm^2 module, allowing operators to directly feel physical interactions at the robot end-effector through spatial activation patterns. Through real-world teleoperation experiments and user studies, we show that TAG enables reliable real-time perception of contact geometry and dynamic force, improves success rates in contact-rich teleoperation tasks, and increases the reliability of demonstration data collection for learning-based manipulation.

AI.tldr: TAG系统：低成本手套集成精确手部运动捕捉与高分辨率触觉反馈，提升灵巧遥操作性能
AI.motivation: 解决灵巧遥操作的两个主要限制：1）不准确的手-机器人运动映射限制了遥操作灵巧性；2）有限的触觉反馈迫使视觉主导交互，阻碍接触几何和力变化的感知
AI.method: TAG系统采用非接触式磁感应设计实现21自由度无漂移关节跟踪（角度误差<1度），每个手指配备32个执行器的触觉阵列（2cm²模块），通过空间激活模式让操作者直接感受机器人末端执行器的物理交互
AI.result: 通过真实世界遥操作实验和用户研究，TAG能够可靠实时感知接触几何和动态力，提高接触密集遥操作任务的成功率，增强基于学习的操作演示数据收集的可靠性
AI.conclusion: TAG系统通过集成精确运动捕捉和高分辨率触觉反馈，有效解决了灵巧遥操作的关键限制，为机器人操作提供了高质量的触觉闭环遥操作解决方案

title: RAD-LAD: Rule and Language Grounded Autonomous Driving in Real-Time
summary: We present LAD, a real-time language--action planner with an interruptible architecture that produces a motion plan in a single forward pass (~20 Hz) or generates textual reasoning alongside a motion plan (~10 Hz). LAD is fast enough for real-time closed-loop deployment, achieving ~3x lower latency than prior driving language models while setting a new learning-based state of the art on nuPlan Test14-Hard and InterPlan. We also introduce RAD, a rule-based planner designed to address structural limitations of PDM-Closed. RAD achieves state-of-the-art performance among rule-based planners on nuPlan Test14-Hard and InterPlan. Finally, we show that combining RAD and LAD enables hybrid planning that captures the strengths of both approaches. This hybrid system demonstrates that rules and learning provide complementary capabilities: rules support reliable maneuvering, while language enables adaptive and explainable decision-making.

AI.tldr: LAD是一种实时语言-动作规划器，具有可中断架构，能以20Hz生成运动规划或以10Hz生成文本推理和运动规划。RAD是基于规则的规划器，用于解决PDM-Closed的结构限制。两者结合形成混合规划系统，结合了规则和学习的优势。
AI.motivation: 开发一个能够在实时闭环部署中工作的自动驾驶规划系统，结合语言模型的适应性和可解释性优势与基于规则系统的可靠性，以在nuPlan等基准测试中实现最先进的性能。
AI.method: 提出LAD（实时语言-动作规划器），采用可中断架构，在单次前向传递中生成运动规划（20Hz）或同时生成文本推理和运动规划（10Hz）。同时提出RAD（基于规则的规划器）来解决PDM-Closed的结构限制。最后将两者结合形成混合规划系统。
AI.result: LAD实现了比先前驾驶语言模型低约3倍的延迟，在nuPlan Test14-Hard和InterPlan上创造了新的基于学习的最先进性能。RAD在基于规则的规划器中在相同基准上达到最先进性能。混合系统结合了两者的优势，规则支持可靠机动，语言支持自适应和可解释的决策。
AI.conclusion: 规则和学习在自动驾驶规划中具有互补能力：规则提供可靠的机动支持，而语言模型支持自适应和可解释的决策。混合规划系统能够充分利用两者的优势，在实时性能、可靠性和可解释性方面取得平衡。

title: Random Coordinate Descent on the Wasserstein Space of Probability Measures
summary: Optimization over the space of probability measures endowed with the Wasserstein-2 geometry is central to modern machine learning and mean-field modeling. However, traditional methods relying on full Wasserstein gradients often suffer from high computational overhead in high-dimensional or ill-conditioned settings. We propose a randomized coordinate descent framework specifically designed for the Wasserstein manifold, introducing both Random Wasserstein Coordinate Descent (RWCD) and Random Wasserstein Coordinate Proximal{-Gradient} (RWCP) for composite objectives. By exploiting coordinate-wise structures, our methods adapt to anisotropic objective landscapes where full-gradient approaches typically struggle. We provide a rigorous convergence analysis across various landscape geometries, establishing guarantees under non-convex, Polyak-Łojasiewicz, and geodesically convex conditions. Our theoretical results mirror the classic convergence properties found in Euclidean space, revealing a compelling symmetry between coordinate descent on vectors and on probability measures. The developed techniques are inherently adaptive to the Wasserstein geometry and offer a robust analytical template that can be extended to other optimization solvers within the space of measures. Numerical experiments on ill-conditioned energies demonstrate that our framework offers significant speedups over conventional full-gradient methods.

AI.tldr: 提出针对Wasserstein流形的随机坐标下降框架(RWCD和RWCP)，通过利用坐标结构适应各向异性目标函数，相比全梯度方法显著加速收敛
AI.motivation: 传统基于全Wasserstein梯度的优化方法在高维或病态设置中计算开销大，需要开发更高效的优化算法来适应Wasserstein几何结构
AI.method: 提出随机Wasserstein坐标下降(RWCD)和随机Wasserstein坐标近端梯度(RWCP)方法，利用坐标结构适应各向异性目标函数，在概率测度空间上进行坐标优化
AI.result: 在非凸、Polyak-Łojasiewicz和测地凸条件下建立了严格的收敛性保证，数值实验显示在病态能量问题上相比传统全梯度方法有显著加速
AI.conclusion: 该框架揭示了向量空间与概率测度空间上坐标下降的对称性，为测度空间优化提供了自适应Wasserstein几何的鲁棒分析模板，可扩展到其他优化求解器

title: Tac2Real: Reliable and GPU Visuotactile Simulation for Online Reinforcement Learning and Zero-Shot Real-World Deployment
summary: Visuotactile sensors are indispensable for contact-rich robotic manipulation tasks. However, policy learning with tactile feedback in simulation, especially for online reinforcement learning (RL), remains a critical challenge, as it demands a delicate balance between physics fidelity and computational efficiency. To address this challenge, we present Tac2Real, a lightweight visuotactile simulation framework designed to enable efficient online RL training. Tac2Real integrates the Preconditioned Nonlinear Conjugate Gradient Incremental Potential Contact (PNCG-IPC) method with a multi-node, multi-GPU high-throughput parallel simulation architecture, which can generate marker displacement fields at interactive rates. Meanwhile, we propose a systematic approach, TacAlign, to narrow both structured and stochastic sources of domain gap, ensuring a reliable zero-shot sim-to-real transfer. We further evaluate Tac2Real on the contact-rich peg insertion task. The zero-shot transfer results achieve a high success rate in the real-world scenario, verifying the effectiveness and robustness of our framework. The project page is: https://ningyurichard.github.io/tac2real-project-page/

AI.tldr: Tac2Real：轻量级视觉触觉仿真框架，集成PNCG-IPC方法和多节点多GPU并行架构，支持高效在线强化学习训练，通过TacAlign方法实现零样本仿真到真实迁移
AI.motivation: 触觉反馈在接触丰富的机器人操作任务中至关重要，但在仿真中进行在线强化学习训练面临物理保真度与计算效率之间的平衡挑战，需要解决仿真到真实迁移的领域差距问题
AI.method: 提出Tac2Real轻量级视觉触觉仿真框架，集成PNCG-IPC接触处理方法与多节点多GPU高吞吐并行架构；提出TacAlign方法系统性地缩小结构性和随机性领域差距
AI.result: 在插孔任务中实现零样本仿真到真实迁移，在真实场景中达到高成功率，验证了框架的有效性和鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: Tac2Real框架成功解决了触觉仿真中物理保真度与计算效率的平衡问题，通过系统性的领域差距缩小方法实现了可靠的零样本仿真到真实迁移

title: Training In-Context and In-Weights Mixtures Via Contrastive Context Sampling
summary:
We investigate training strategies that co-develop in-context learning (ICL) and in-weights learning (IWL), and the ability to switch between them based on context relevance. Although current LLMs exhibit both modes, standard task-specific fine-tuning often erodes ICL, motivating IC-Train - fine-tuning with in-context examples. Prior work has shown that emergence of ICL after IC-Train depends on factors such as task diversity and training duration.
  In this paper we show that the similarity structure between target inputs and context examples also plays an important role. Random context leads to loss of ICL and IWL dominance, while only similar examples in context causes ICL to degenerate to copying labels without regard to relevance. To address this, we propose a simple Contrastive-Context which enforces two types of contrasts: (1) mix of similar and random examples within a context to evolve a correct form of ICL, and (2) varying grades of similarity across contexts to evolve ICL-IWL mixtures. We present insights on the importance of such contrast with theoretical analysis of a minimal model. We validate with extensive empirical evaluation on four LLMs and several tasks. Diagnostic probes confirm that contrasted contexts yield stable ICL-IWL mixtures, avoiding collapse into pure ICL, IWL, or copying.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了上下文学习(ICL)和权重学习(IWL)的协同训练策略，发现上下文示例与目标输入的相似性结构对ICL演化至关重要，并提出对比上下文训练方法来解决ICL退化问题。
AI.motivation: 当前LLMs虽然同时具备上下文学习和权重学习能力，但标准任务特定微调往往会侵蚀ICL能力。虽然已有IC-Train方法通过上下文示例进行微调，但ICL的出现取决于任务多样性和训练时长等因素。本文发现上下文示例与目标输入的相似性结构也起着关键作用，需要解决随机上下文导致ICL丧失和相似上下文导致ICL退化为简单标签复制的问题。
AI.method: 提出对比上下文训练方法，包含两种对比：(1)在单个上下文中混合相似和随机示例，以演化正确的ICL形式；(2)在不同上下文中使用不同相似度级别，以演化ICL-IWL混合。通过最小模型的理论分析提供见解，并在四个LLM和多个任务上进行广泛实证评估。
AI.result: 诊断探针确认对比上下文能够产生稳定的ICL-IWL混合，避免纯ICL、纯IWL或简单复制的崩溃。随机上下文导致ICL丧失和IWL主导，而仅相似示例导致ICL退化为不考虑相关性的标签复制。
AI.conclusion: 上下文示例与目标输入的相似性结构对ICL演化至关重要，提出的对比上下文训练方法能够有效协同发展ICL和IWL能力，并实现基于上下文相关性的模式切换，避免各种退化情况。

title: From Understanding to Erasing: Towards Complete and Stable Video Object Removal
summary: Video object removal aims to eliminate target objects from videos while plausibly completing missing regions and preserving spatio-temporal consistency. Although diffusion models have recently advanced this task, it remains challenging to remove object-induced side effects (e.g., shadows, reflections, and illumination changes) without compromising overall coherence. This limitation stems from the insufficient physical and semantic understanding of the target object and its interactions with the scene. In this paper, we propose to introduce understanding into erasing from two complementary perspectives. Externally, we introduce a distillation scheme that transfers the relationships between objects and their induced effects from vision foundation models to video diffusion models. Internally, we propose a framewise context cross-attention mechanism that grounds each denoising block in informative, unmasked context surrounding the target region. External and internal guidance jointly enable our model to understand the target object, its induced effects, and the global background context, resulting in clear and coherent object removal. Extensive experiments demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance, and we establish the first real-world benchmark for video object removal to facilitate future research and community progress. Our code, data, and models are available at: https://github.com/WeChatCV/UnderEraser.

AI.tldr: 提出UnderEraser方法，通过外部知识蒸馏和内部帧间上下文交叉注意力机制，在视频对象移除中同时消除目标对象及其引发的副作用（阴影、反射、光照变化），实现清晰连贯的视频修复。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的视频对象移除方法难以消除对象引发的副作用（如阴影、反射、光照变化），同时保持时空一致性。这一局限源于对目标对象及其与场景交互的物理和语义理解不足。
AI.method: 提出双视角理解方法：1) 外部：通过知识蒸馏方案，将视觉基础模型中对象与其引发效果的关系迁移到视频扩散模型；2) 内部：提出帧间上下文交叉注意力机制，使每个去噪块基于目标区域周围未掩码的上下文信息进行修复。
AI.result: 大量实验证明该方法达到最先进性能，并建立了首个真实世界视频对象移除基准，促进未来研究和社区发展。代码、数据和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过外部和内部引导的联合作用，使模型能够理解目标对象、其引发效果及全局背景上下文，从而实现清晰连贯的视频对象移除。该方法为视频修复任务提供了新的理解视角。

title: Communications-Aware NMPC for Multi-Rotor Aerial Relay Networks Under Jamming Interference
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Multi-Rotor Aerial Vehicles (MRAVs) are increasingly used in communication-dependent missions where connectivity loss directly compromises task execution. Existing anti-jamming strategies often decouple motion from communication, overlooking that link quality depends on vehicle attitude and antenna orientation. In coplanar platforms, "tilt-to-translate" maneuvers can inadvertently align antenna nulls with communication partners, causing severe degradation under interference. This paper presents a modular communications-aware control framework that combines a high-level max-min trajectory generator with an actuator-level Nonlinear Model Predictive Controller (NMPC). The trajectory layer optimizes the weakest link under jamming, while the NMPC enforces vehicle dynamics, actuator limits, and antenna-alignment constraints. Antenna directionality is handled geometrically, avoiding explicit radiation-pattern parametrization. The method is evaluated in a relay scenario with an active jammer and compared across coplanar and tilted-propeller architectures. Results show a near two-order-of-magnitude increase in minimum end-to-end capacity, markedly reducing outage events, with moderate average-capacity gains. Tilted platforms preserve feasibility and link quality, whereas coplanar vehicles show recurrent degradation. These findings indicate that full actuation is a key enabler of reliable communications-aware operation under adversarial directional constraints.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通信感知的模块化控制框架，用于多旋翼飞行器在干扰环境下的可靠通信，通过结合高层轨迹优化和底层非线性模型预测控制，显著提升了最小端到端通信容量。
AI.motivation: 多旋翼飞行器在依赖通信的任务中，现有抗干扰策略通常将运动与通信解耦，忽略了链路质量与飞行器姿态和天线方向之间的依赖关系。在共面平台中，"倾斜平移"机动可能无意中将天线零点对准通信伙伴，导致在干扰下通信严重恶化。
AI.method: 提出模块化通信感知控制框架：高层采用最大-最小轨迹生成器优化最弱链路，底层采用非线性模型预测控制器(NMPC)强制执行飞行器动力学、执行器限制和天线对准约束。天线方向性通过几何方法处理，避免显式辐射模式参数化。
AI.result: 在具有主动干扰器的中继场景中评估，结果显示最小端到端容量提升近两个数量级，显著减少中断事件，平均容量增益适中。倾斜平台保持可行性和链路质量，而共面飞行器显示周期性退化。
AI.conclusion: 全驱动是实现可靠通信感知操作的关键使能因素，特别是在对抗性方向约束下。倾斜平台架构相比传统共面平台在通信可靠性方面具有显著优势。

title: Learning from the Right Rollouts: Data Attribution for PPO-based LLM Post-Training
summary: Traditional RL algorithms like Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) typically train on the entire rollout buffer, operating under the assumption that all generated episodes provide a beneficial optimization signal. However, these episodes frequently contain noisy or unfaithful reasoning, which can degrade model performance and slow down training. In this paper, we propose \textbf{Influence-Guided PPO (I-PPO)}, a novel framework that integrates data attribution into the RL post-training loop. By calculating an influence score for each episode using a gradient-based approximation, I-PPO identifies and eliminates episodes that are anti-aligned with a validation gradient. Our experiments demonstrate that I-PPO consistently outperforms SFT and PPO baselines. We show that our filtering process acts as an intrinsic early stopping mechanism, accelerating training efficiency while effectively reducing unfaithful CoT reasoning.

AI.tldr: I-PPO通过梯度影响评分筛选训练数据，去除噪声推理轨迹，提升PPO训练效率和模型性能
AI.motivation: 传统RL算法（如PPO）假设所有生成轨迹都提供有益优化信号，但实际上许多轨迹包含噪声或不忠实推理，这会降低模型性能并减慢训练速度
AI.method: 提出Influence-Guided PPO (I-PPO)框架，将数据归因集成到RL后训练循环中。通过基于梯度的近似计算每个轨迹的影响分数，识别并消除与验证梯度反对齐的轨迹
AI.result: I-PPO在实验中持续优于SFT和PPO基线。筛选过程充当内在的早停机制，加速训练效率，同时有效减少不忠实的CoT推理
AI.conclusion: 通过数据影响评分进行选择性训练可以显著提升RL训练效果，减少噪声轨迹对模型性能的负面影响

title: Do We Need Bigger Models for Science? Task-Aware Retrieval with Small Language Models
summary: Scientific knowledge discovery increasingly relies on large language models, yet many existing scholarly assistants depend on proprietary systems with tens or hundreds of billions of parameters. Such reliance limits reproducibility and accessibility for the research community. In this work, we ask a simple question: do we need bigger models for scientific applications? Specifically, we investigate to what extent carefully designed retrieval pipelines can compensate for reduced model scale in scientific applications. We design a lightweight retrieval-augmented framework that performs task-aware routing to select specialized retrieval strategies based on the input query. The system further integrates evidence from full-text scientific papers and structured scholarly metadata, and employs compact instruction-tuned language models to generate responses with citations. We evaluate the framework across several scholarly tasks, focusing on scholarly question answering (QA), including single- and multi-document scenarios, as well as biomedical QA under domain shift and scientific text compression. Our findings demonstrate that retrieval and model scale are complementary rather than interchangeable. While retrieval design can partially compensate for smaller models, model capacity remains important for complex reasoning tasks. This work highlights retrieval and task-aware design as key factors for building practical and reproducible scholarly assistants.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨检索增强能否弥补小型语言模型在科学应用中的不足，发现检索与模型规模是互补而非替代关系。
AI.motivation: 当前科学知识发现过度依赖大型专有语言模型，限制了研究的可复现性和可访问性。本文旨在探究精心设计的检索流程能否在科学应用中补偿模型规模的减小。
AI.method: 设计轻量级检索增强框架，采用任务感知路由选择专门检索策略，整合全文科学论文和结构化学术元数据，使用紧凑的指令调优语言模型生成带引用的回答。
AI.result: 在多个学术任务（单/多文档问答、领域转移下的生物医学问答、科学文本压缩）上的评估表明，检索设计可以部分补偿小型模型，但模型容量对复杂推理任务仍然重要。
AI.conclusion: 检索和模型规模是互补而非可互换的，检索设计和任务感知是构建实用且可复现学术助手的关键因素。

title: A Predictive Control Strategy to Offset-Point Tracking for Agricultural Mobile Robots
comment: Accepted in the journal IEEE Transaction on Field Robotics
summary: Robots are increasingly being deployed in agriculture to support sustainable practices and improve productivity. They offer strong potential to enable precise, efficient, and environmentally friendly operations. However, most existing path-following controllers focus solely on the robot's center of motion and neglect the spatial footprint and dynamics of attached implements. In practice, implements such as mechanical weeders or spring-tine cultivators are often large, rigidly mounted, and directly interacting with crops and soil; ignoring their position can degrade tracking performance and increase the risk of crop damage. To address this limitation, we propose a closed-form predictive control strategy extending the approach introduced in [1]. The method is developed specifically for Ackermann-type agricultural vehicles and explicitly models the implement as a rigid offset point, while accounting for lateral slip and lever-arm effects. The approach is benchmarked against state-of-the-art baseline controllers, including a reactive geometric method, a reactive backstepping method, and a model-based predictive scheme. Real-world agricultural experiments with two different implements show that the proposed method reduces the median tracking error by 24% to 56%, and decreases peak errors during curvature transitions by up to 70%. These improvements translate into enhanced operational safety, particularly in scenarios where the implement operates in close proximity to crop rows.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于阿克曼型农业车辆的闭环预测控制策略，显式建模农具为刚性偏移点，考虑侧滑和杠杆臂效应，显著降低跟踪误差
AI.motivation: 现有路径跟踪控制器主要关注机器人运动中心，忽略了农具的空间足迹和动力学特性。农具通常体积大、刚性安装，直接与作物和土壤相互作用，忽略其位置会降低跟踪性能并增加作物损伤风险
AI.method: 提出闭环预测控制策略，扩展[1]中的方法，专门针对阿克曼型农业车辆开发，显式建模农具为刚性偏移点，同时考虑侧滑和杠杆臂效应
AI.result: 与最先进的基准控制器（包括反应式几何方法、反应式反步法和基于模型的预测方案）相比，真实农业实验显示：中位跟踪误差降低24%-56%，曲率过渡期间的峰值误差降低高达70%
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提高了农业机器人的跟踪性能，特别是在农具靠近作物行操作的场景中，增强了操作安全性，为精确农业应用提供了更可靠的解决方案

title: Director: Instance-aware Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Modeling and Understanding
summary: Volumetric video seeks to model dynamic scenes as temporally coherent 4D representations. While recent Gaussian-based approaches achieve impressive rendering fidelity, they primarily emphasize appearance but are largely agnostic to instance-level structure, limiting stable tracking and semantic reasoning in highly dynamic scenarios. In this paper, we present Director, a unified spatio-temporal Gaussian representation that jointly models human performance, high-fidelity rendering, and instance-level semantics. Our key insight is that embedding instance-consistent semantics naturally complements 4D modeling, enabling more accurate scene decomposition while supporting robust dynamic scene understanding. To this end, we leverage temporally aligned instance masks and sentence embeddings derived from Multimodal Large Language Models to supervise the learnable semantic features of each Gaussian via two MLP decoders, enabling language-aligned 4D representations and enforcing identity consistency over time. To enhance temporal stability, we bridge 2D optical flow with 4D Gaussians and finetune their motions, yielding reliable initialization and reducing drift. For the training, we further introduce a geometry-aware SDF constraints, along with regularization terms that enforces surface continuity, enhancing temporal coherence in dynamic foreground modeling. Experiments demonstrate that Director achieves temporally coherent 4D reconstructions while simultaneously enabling instance segmentation and open-vocabulary querying.

AI.tldr: Director提出了一种统一的时空高斯表示方法，联合建模人体表演、高保真渲染和实例级语义，通过嵌入实例一致性语义增强4D建模，实现更准确的场景分解和动态场景理解。
AI.motivation: 当前基于高斯的方法在动态场景建模中主要关注外观渲染，但缺乏对实例级结构的感知，这限制了在高度动态场景中的稳定跟踪和语义推理能力。需要一种能够同时处理高质量渲染和语义理解的统一表示方法。
AI.method: 1) 利用时间对齐的实例掩码和来自多模态大语言模型的句子嵌入，通过两个MLP解码器监督每个高斯可学习语义特征；2) 将2D光流与4D高斯桥接并微调其运动，提高时间稳定性；3) 引入几何感知的SDF约束和正则化项，增强动态前景建模的时间一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明Director能够实现时间一致的4D重建，同时支持实例分割和开放词汇查询，在动态场景理解方面表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入实例一致性语义自然补充了4D建模，实现了更准确的场景分解，同时支持鲁棒的动态场景理解，为动态场景的语义感知重建提供了有效解决方案。

title: Tele-Catch: Adaptive Teleoperation for Dexterous Dynamic 3D Object Catching
summary: Teleoperation is a key paradigm for transferring human dexterity to robots, yet most prior work targets objects that are initially static, such as grasping or manipulation. Dynamic object catch, where objects move before contact, remains underexplored. Pure teleoperation in this task often fails due to timing, pose, and force errors, highlighting the need for shared autonomy that combines human input with autonomous policies. To this end, we present Tele-Catch, a systematic framework for dexterous hand teleoperation in dynamic object catching. At its core, we design DAIM, a dynamics-aware adaptive integration mechanism that realizes shared autonomy by fusing glove-based teleoperation signals into the diffusion policy denoising process. It adaptively modulates control based on the interaction object state. To improve policy robustness, we introduce DP-U3R, which integrates unsupervised geometric representations from point cloud observations into diffusion policy learning, enabling geometry-aware decision making. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Tele-Catch significantly improves accuracy and robustness in dynamic catching tasks, while also exhibiting consistent gains across distinct dexterous hand embodiments and previously unseen object categories.

AI.tldr: Tele-Catch：用于动态物体抓取的灵巧手遥操作框架，通过DAIM机制实现共享自主权，结合DP-U3R提升策略鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 传统遥操作主要针对静态物体（如抓取和操纵），而动态物体抓取（物体在接触前移动）研究不足。纯遥操作在该任务中常因时序、姿态和力误差而失败，需要结合人类输入与自主策略的共享自主权方法。
AI.method: 提出Tele-Catch框架，核心是DAIM（动态感知自适应集成机制），将基于手套的遥操作信号融合到扩散策略去噪过程中，实现共享自主权。引入DP-U3R（扩散策略-无监督3D表示），将点云观测的无监督几何表示集成到扩散策略学习中，实现几何感知决策。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，Tele-Catch在动态抓取任务中显著提高了准确性和鲁棒性，同时在不同的灵巧手实体和未见过的物体类别上表现出一致的增益。
AI.conclusion: Tele-Catch通过共享自主权框架成功解决了动态物体抓取问题，DAIM机制和DP-U3R的结合实现了人类遥操作与自主策略的有效融合，为动态交互任务提供了系统化解决方案。

title: Qiana: A First-Order Formalism to Quantify over Contexts and Formulas with Temporality
summary: We introduce Qiana, a logic framework for reasoning on formulas that are true only in specific contexts. In Qiana, it is possible to quantify over both formulas and contexts to express, e.g., that ``everyone knows everything Alice says''. Qiana also permits paraconsistent logics within contexts, so that contexts can contain contradictions. Furthermore, Qiana is based on first-order logic, and is finitely axiomatizable, so that Qiana theories are compatible with pre-existing first-order logic theorem provers. We show how Qiana can be used to represent temporality, event calculus, and modal logic. We also discuss different design alternatives of Qiana.

AI.tldr: Qiana是一个用于在特定上下文中推理的逻辑框架，支持对公式和上下文进行量化，允许上下文内包含矛盾，基于一阶逻辑且可有限公理化，兼容现有定理证明器。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够表达"在特定上下文中为真"的公式的逻辑框架，支持对公式和上下文进行量化（如"每个人都知道Alice说的一切"），同时允许上下文内存在矛盾（支持次协调逻辑），并与现有一阶逻辑定理证明器兼容。
AI.method: 基于一阶逻辑构建逻辑框架，支持对公式和上下文进行量化，允许上下文内使用次协调逻辑处理矛盾，设计为可有限公理化，确保与现有一阶逻辑定理证明器的兼容性。
AI.result: 成功开发了Qiana逻辑框架，能够表示时间性、事件演算和模态逻辑，讨论了不同的设计替代方案，展示了框架的表达能力和实用性。
AI.conclusion: Qiana提供了一个强大而灵活的逻辑框架，用于在特定上下文中进行推理，支持量化、矛盾处理和与现有工具的兼容性，适用于多种逻辑表示需求。

title: Active Stereo-Camera Outperforms Multi-Sensor Setup in ACT Imitation Learning for Humanoid Manipulation
summary: The complexity of teaching humanoid robots new tasks is one of the major reasons hindering their widespread adoption in the industry. While Imitation Learning (IL), particularly Action Chunking with Transformers (ACT), enables rapid task acquisition, there is no consensus yet on the optimal sensory hardware required for manipulation tasks. This paper benchmarks 14 sensor combinations on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot equipped with three-finger hands for two manipulation tasks. We explicitly evaluate the integration of tactile and proprioceptive modalities alongside active vision. Our analysis demonstrates that strategic sensor selection can outperform complex configurations in data-limited regimes while reducing computational overhead. We develop an open-source Unified Ablation Framework that utilizes sensor masking on a comprehensive master dataset. Results indicate that additional modalities often degrade performance for IL with limited data. A minimal active stereo-camera setup outperformed complex multi-sensor configurations, achieving 87.5% success in a spatial generalization task and 94.4% in a structured manipulation task. Conversely, adding pressure sensors to this setup reduced success to 67.3% in the latter task due to a low signal-to-noise ratio. We conclude that in data-limited regimes, active vision offers a superior trade-off between robustness and complexity. While tactile modalities may require larger datasets to be effective, our findings validate that strategic sensor selection is critical for designing an efficient learning process.

AI.tldr: 在数据有限条件下，主动立体视觉配置优于复杂多传感器组合，而触觉传感器因信噪比低反而降低性能
AI.motivation: 解决人形机器人任务学习中的传感器选择问题，探索在数据有限条件下，哪些传感器组合能为模仿学习提供最优的性能与复杂度平衡
AI.method: 在Unitree G1人形机器人上对14种传感器组合进行基准测试，使用三指手执行两个操作任务；开发开源统一消融框架，通过传感器掩码在综合主数据集上进行评估；评估触觉、本体感觉与主动视觉的集成效果
AI.result: 最小主动立体相机配置在空间泛化任务中达到87.5%成功率，在结构化操作任务中达到94.4%；添加压力传感器后成功率降至67.3%；额外模态在数据有限条件下通常降低性能；战略传感器选择可减少计算开销
AI.conclusion: 在数据有限条件下，主动视觉在鲁棒性与复杂度之间提供了更优的权衡；触觉模态可能需要更大数据集才能有效；战略传感器选择对于设计高效学习过程至关重要

title: Thinking While Listening: Fast-Slow Recurrence for Long-Horizon Sequential Modeling
summary: We extend the recent latent recurrent modeling to sequential input streams. By interleaving fast, recurrent latent updates with self-organizational ability between slow observation updates, our method facilitates the learning of stable internal structures that evolve alongside the input. This mechanism allows the model to maintain coherent and clustered representations over long horizons, improving out-of-distribution generalization in reinforcement learning and algorithmic tasks compared to sequential baselines such as LSTM, state space models, and Transformer variants.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合快速循环潜在更新与自组织能力的序列建模方法，通过交错快速潜在更新与慢速观测更新，学习稳定内部结构以提升长序列表示一致性和分布外泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有序列模型（如LSTM、状态空间模型、Transformer变体）在处理长序列时难以维持一致的内部表示，导致分布外泛化能力有限。需要一种能学习稳定演化内部结构的机制。
AI.method: 扩展潜在循环建模，在慢速观测更新之间交错快速循环潜在更新，赋予模型自组织能力。这种机制使模型能够学习随输入演化的稳定内部结构，维持长期一致且聚类的表示。
AI.result: 在强化学习和算法任务中，相比LSTM、状态空间模型和Transformer变体等序列基线，该方法在分布外泛化方面表现更优，能维持更一致和聚类的长期表示。
AI.conclusion: 通过交错快速循环潜在更新与自组织能力，可以学习稳定演化的内部结构，提升序列模型的长程表示一致性和分布外泛化性能，为复杂序列建模提供新思路。

title: HOT: Harmonic-Constrained Optimal Transport for Remote Photoplethysmography Domain Adaptation
summary: Remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables non-contact physiological measurement from facial videos; however, its practical deployment is often hindered by substantial performance degradation under domain shift. While recent deep learning-based rPPG methods have achieved strong performance on individual datasets, they frequently overfit to appearance-related factors, such as illumination, camera characteristics, and color response, that vary significantly across domains. To address this limitation, we introduce frequency domain adaptation (FDA) as a principled strategy for modeling appearance variation in rPPG. By transferring low-frequency spectral components that encode domain-dependent appearance characteristics, FDA encourages rPPG models to learn invariance to appearance variations while retaining cardiac-induced signals. To further support physiologically consistent alignment under such appearance variation, we propose Harmonic-Constrained Optimal Transport (HOT), which leverages the harmonic property of cardiac signals to guide alignment between original and FDA-transferred representations. Extensive cross-dataset experiments demonstrate that the proposed FDA and HOT framework effectively enhances the robustness and generalization of rPPG models across diverse datasets.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出频率域适应(FDA)和谐波约束最优传输(HOT)框架，通过转移低频光谱成分来建模外观变化，提高远程光电容积描记(rPPG)模型在跨域场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 远程光电容积描记(rPPG)技术在实际部署中面临严重的域偏移问题，现有深度学习方法容易过拟合于光照、相机特性、色彩响应等外观相关因素，导致跨域性能显著下降。
AI.method: 提出频率域适应(FDA)策略，通过转移低频光谱成分来编码域依赖的外观特征，使模型学习对外观变化的不变性。进一步提出谐波约束最优传输(HOT)，利用心脏信号的谐波特性指导原始表示和FDA转移表示之间的对齐。
AI.result: 广泛的跨数据集实验表明，FDA和HOT框架有效提升了rPPG模型在不同数据集间的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过频率域适应和谐波约束对齐的方法，为解决rPPG模型在实际部署中的域偏移问题提供了有效的解决方案，显著提升了模型的跨域性能。

title: Critic-Free Deep Reinforcement Learning for Maritime Coverage Path Planning on Irregular Hexagonal Grids
summary: Maritime surveillance missions, such as search and rescue and environmental monitoring, rely on the efficient allocation of sensing assets over vast and geometrically complex areas. Traditional Coverage Path Planning (CPP) approaches depend on decomposition techniques that struggle with irregular coastlines, islands, and exclusion zones, or require computationally expensive re-planning for every instance. We propose a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) framework to solve CPP on hexagonal grid representations of irregular maritime areas. Unlike conventional methods, we formulate the problem as a neural combinatorial optimization task where a Transformer-based pointer policy autoregressively constructs coverage tours. To overcome the instability of value estimation in long-horizon routing problems, we implement a critic-free Group-Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) scheme. This method estimates advantages through within-instance comparisons of sampled trajectories rather than relying on a value function. Experiments on 1,000 unseen synthetic maritime environments demonstrate that a trained policy achieves a 99.0% Hamiltonian success rate, more than double the best heuristic (46.0%), while producing paths 7% shorter and with 24% fewer heading changes than the closest baseline. All three inference modes (greedy, stochastic sampling, and sampling with 2-opt refinement) operate under 50~ms per instance on a laptop GPU, confirming feasibility for real-time on-board deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出基于深度强化学习的六边形网格覆盖路径规划框架，使用Transformer指针策略自回归构建覆盖路径，通过组相对策略优化解决长时程路由问题中的价值估计不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 传统覆盖路径规划方法在处理不规则海岸线、岛屿和禁区时依赖分解技术，效果不佳或需要昂贵的重新规划计算。海上监视任务需要在几何复杂的广阔区域高效分配传感资产。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习框架，在六边形网格表示的不规则海域上解决覆盖路径规划问题。将问题表述为神经组合优化任务，使用基于Transformer的指针策略自回归构建覆盖路径。实施无评论家的组相对策略优化方案，通过实例内采样轨迹比较来估计优势，而非依赖价值函数。
AI.result: 在1000个未见过的合成海上环境测试中，训练策略达到99.0%的哈密顿成功率，是最佳启发式方法（46.0%）的两倍多。生成的路径比最接近的基线短7%，航向变化少24%。三种推理模式（贪婪、随机采样和带2-opt优化的采样）在笔记本电脑GPU上每个实例运行时间均低于50毫秒。
AI.conclusion: 提出的DRL框架能够有效处理不规则海域的覆盖路径规划问题，显著优于传统方法，计算效率高，适合实时机载部署。

title: Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation for Autonomy-Preserving Supportive Dialogue Agents
summary: Large language models deployed in supportive or advisory roles must balance helpfulness with preservation of user autonomy, yet standard alignment methods primarily optimize for helpfulness and harmlessness without explicitly modeling relational risks such as dependency reinforcement, overprotection, or coercive guidance. We introduce Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation (CCN), a state-dependent control framework in which a learned scalar signal derived from structured user state and dialogue context conditions response generation and candidate selection. We formalize this setting as an autonomy-preserving alignment problem and define a utility function that rewards autonomy support and helpfulness while penalizing dependency and coercion. We also construct a benchmark of relational failure modes in multi-turn dialogue, including reassurance dependence, manipulative care, overprotection, and boundary inconsistency. On this benchmark, care-conditioned candidate generation combined with utility-based reranking improves autonomy-preserving utility by +0.25 over supervised fine-tuning and +0.07 over preference optimization baselines while maintaining comparable supportiveness. Pilot human evaluation and zero-shot transfer to real emotional-support conversations show directional agreement with automated metrics. These results suggest that state-dependent control combined with utility-based selection is a practical approach to multi-objective alignment in autonomy-sensitive dialogue.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation (CCN)框架，通过基于用户状态和对话上下文的学习标量信号来调节响应生成和候选选择，以在保持帮助性的同时保护用户自主性。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型对齐方法主要优化帮助性和无害性，但忽视了关系风险（如依赖性强化、过度保护、强制性指导），这些风险会损害用户自主性。需要开发能平衡帮助性和自主性保护的对齐框架。
AI.method: 提出Care-Conditioned Neuromodulation (CCN)框架：1）将问题形式化为自主性保护对齐问题；2）定义奖励自主性支持和帮助性、惩罚依赖性和强制性的效用函数；3）构建结构化用户状态和对话上下文的学习标量信号来调节响应生成；4）结合基于效用的重排序进行候选选择。
AI.result: 在构建的关系失败模式基准测试中，CCN框架比监督微调基线提高自主性保护效用+0.25，比偏好优化基线提高+0.07，同时保持相当的帮助性。初步人工评估和零样本迁移到真实情感支持对话显示与自动化指标的方向一致性。
AI.conclusion: 状态依赖控制结合基于效用的选择是处理自主性敏感对话中多目标对齐的实用方法，能够有效平衡帮助性和自主性保护，减少关系风险。

title: Robust Embodied Perception in Dynamic Environments via Disentangled Weight Fusion
summary: Embodied perception systems face severe challenges of dynamic environment distribution drift when they continuously interact in open physical spaces. However, the existing domain incremental awareness methods often rely on the domain id obtained in advance during the testing phase, which limits their practicability in unknown interaction scenarios. At the same time, the model often overfits to the context-specific perceptual noise, which leads to insufficient generalization ability and catastrophic forgetting. To address these limitations, we propose a domain-id and exemplar-free incremental learning framework for embodied multimedia systems, which aims to achieve robust continuous environment adaptation. This method designs a disentangled representation mechanism to remove non-essential environmental style interference, and guide the model to focus on extracting semantic intrinsic features shared across scenes, thereby eliminating perceptual uncertainty and improving generalization. We further use the weight fusion strategy to dynamically integrate the old and new environment knowledge in the parameter space, so as to ensure that the model adapts to the new distribution without storing historical data and maximally retains the discrimination ability of the old environment. Extensive experiments on multiple standard benchmark datasets show that the proposed method significantly reduces catastrophic forgetting in a completely exemplar-free and domain-id free setting, and its accuracy is better than the existing state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需领域ID和示例的无监督增量学习框架，用于具身多媒体系统在动态环境中的连续适应，通过解耦表示和权重融合策略解决灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 具身感知系统在开放物理空间中持续交互时面临动态环境分布漂移的挑战。现有领域增量感知方法通常依赖测试阶段预先获得的领域ID，限制了在未知交互场景中的实用性。同时，模型容易过拟合到特定上下文感知噪声，导致泛化能力不足和灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出领域ID和示例自由的增量学习框架：1）设计解耦表示机制，去除非必要的环境风格干扰，引导模型专注于提取跨场景共享的语义内在特征；2）采用权重融合策略，在参数空间中动态整合新旧环境知识，无需存储历史数据，同时最大化保留旧环境的判别能力。
AI.result: 在多个标准基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在完全无示例和无领域ID的设置下显著减少了灾难性遗忘，其准确率优于现有的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为具身多媒体系统提供了鲁棒的连续环境适应能力，解决了现有方法对领域ID依赖和示例存储的限制，同时有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题，提升了模型在动态开放环境中的实用性和泛化性能。

title: A Foldable and Agile Soft Electromagnetic Robot for Multimodal Navigation in Confined and Unstructured Environments
summary: Multimodal locomotion is crucial for an animal's adaptability in unstructured wild environments. Similarly, in the human gastrointestinal tract, characterized by viscoelastic mucus, complex rugae, and narrow sphincters like the cardia, multimodal locomotion is also essential for a small-scale soft robot to conduct tasks. Here, we introduce a small-scale compact, foldable, and robust soft electromagnetic robot (M-SEMR) with more than nine locomotion modes designed for such a scenario. Featuring a six-spoke elastomer body embedded with liquid metal channels and driven by Laplace forces under a static magnetic field, the M-SEMR is capable of rapid transitions (< 0.35 s) among different locomotion modes. It achieves exceptional agility, including high-speed rolling (818 mm/s, 26 BL/s), omnidirectional crawling, jumping, and swimming. Notably, the robot can fold to reduce its volume by 79%, enabling it to traverse confined spaces. We further validate its navigation capabilities on complex terrains, including discrete obstacles, viscoelastic gelatin surfaces, viscous fluids, and simulated biological tissues. This system offers a versatile strategy for developing high-mobility soft robots for future biomedical applications.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种小型、可折叠、多模态软电磁机器人，能在胃肠道等复杂环境中实现9种以上运动模式，包括高速滚动、爬行、跳跃和游泳
AI.motivation: 胃肠道等生物环境具有粘弹性黏液、复杂皱襞和狭窄括约肌等特征，需要小型软机器人具备多模态运动能力以适应这种复杂环境
AI.method: 设计了一种六辐条弹性体结构的软电磁机器人，内部嵌入液态金属通道，在静磁场下通过洛伦兹力驱动，实现快速模式切换
AI.result: 机器人实现了高速滚动（818 mm/s，26 BL/s）、全向爬行、跳跃和游泳等多种运动模式，可在0.35秒内完成模式切换，并能折叠减少79%体积
AI.conclusion: 该系统为未来生物医学应用的高机动性软机器人开发提供了多功能策略，验证了在复杂地形和模拟生物组织中的导航能力

title: Does Your Optimizer Care How You Normalize? Normalization-Optimizer Coupling in LLM Training
summary: In LLM training, normalization layers and optimizers are typically treated as independent design choices. In a 3x2 factorial at 1B parameters and 1000 training steps, we show this assumption can fail: Dynamic Erf (Derf; Chen & Liu, 2025) suffers a large negative interaction with Muon (Jordan, 2024), with its gap to RMSNorm growing from +0.31 nats under AdamW to +0.97 under Muon, approximately three times larger. Dynamic Tanh (DyT; Zhu et al., 2025), included as a bounded-normalizer control, shows no such penalty. Our evidence points to two failure modes of erf under Muon's faster spectral-norm growth: saturation (lossy compression) and scale blindness (discarding activation magnitude). An EMA-blend that reintroduces running scale estimates recovers ~84% of the gap. Separately, reducing Derf's alpha from its published default (0.5 to 0.3) recovers ~80% by keeping erf in its near-linear regime, where it approximately preserves relative scale; this setting is not the published default of Chen & Liu (2025). Using Derf's published default alpha with Muon incurs a 0.66-nat interaction penalty without producing NaNs or divergence, making the failure easy to miss in short pilot runs.

AI.tldr: 研究发现LLM训练中归一化层和优化器并非独立设计选择，Derf归一化与Muon优化器存在显著负交互作用，导致性能下降0.66 nats，而DyT归一化无此问题
AI.motivation: 传统上LLM训练中将归一化层和优化器视为独立设计选择，但本研究通过实验发现这种假设可能不成立，特别是Derf归一化与Muon优化器之间存在显著的负交互作用，这种失败模式在短时间试运行中容易被忽略
AI.method: 采用3x2因子设计实验，在10亿参数规模和1000训练步数下，测试不同归一化层（Derf、RMSNorm、DyT）与优化器（AdamW、Muon）的组合。通过分析Derf在Muon下的失败模式，提出两种解决方案：EMA混合重新引入运行尺度估计，以及降低Derf的alpha参数
AI.result: Derf与Muon组合存在显著负交互作用，性能差距从AdamW下的+0.31 nats扩大到Muon下的+0.97 nats（约3倍）。DyT作为有界归一化对照组无此惩罚。Derf在Muon下的失败模式包括饱和（有损压缩）和尺度盲区（丢弃激活幅度）。EMA混合恢复约84%性能差距，降低alpha参数从0.5到0.3恢复约80%性能
AI.conclusion: 归一化层和优化器设计不能视为独立选择，存在显著的交互作用。Derf与Muon组合的失败模式源于Muon更快的谱范数增长导致Derf饱和和尺度盲区。通过调整参数或引入尺度估计可缓解问题，但使用Derf默认参数与Muon组合会导致0.66 nats的性能损失且不易被发现

title: Proposing a Game Theory Approach to Explore Group Dynamics with Social Robot
comment: Honorable Mention at HRI Pioneers 2025. Peer-reviewed. https://hripioneers.org/archives/hri25/participants/
summary: Integrating social robots in our group-based society, beyond the technical challenges, requires considering the social group dynamics. Following the results from preliminary exploratory studies on the influence of social robots on group decisions, the proposed research investigates whether social robots can foster cooperation among group members. To achieve this, I propose a game theory approach, employing the Public Good Game to recreate a simplified and controlled social situation where the robot's influence can be evaluated. Clarifying the role of robots in promoting collaboration among humans might have a significant impact in educational environments, enhancing student learning, as well as in workplace settings, where they could facilitate problem-solving and lead to shared solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究社交机器人能否促进群体成员间的合作，采用博弈论方法和公共物品游戏来评估机器人在简化社会情境中的影响
AI.motivation: 将社交机器人整合到群体社会中需要考虑社会群体动态，前期探索性研究表明社交机器人对群体决策有影响，因此研究机器人是否能促进群体合作具有重要意义
AI.method: 采用博弈论方法，使用公共物品游戏来重现简化和受控的社会情境，评估机器人在其中的影响
AI.result: 论文摘要未提供具体实验结果，但研究旨在通过实验评估机器人对群体合作的影响
AI.conclusion: 阐明机器人在促进人类协作方面的作用可能对教育环境（增强学生学习）和工作场所（促进问题解决和共享解决方案）产生重要影响

title: EXHIB: A Benchmark for Realistic and Diverse Evaluation of Function Similarity in the Wild
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures. This is a technical report for the EXHIB benchmark. Code and data are available at https://github.com/fan1192/bfsd-anon-artifact
summary:
Binary Function Similarity Detection (BFSD) is a core problem in software security, supporting tasks such as vulnerability analysis, malware classification, and patch provenance. In the past few decades, numerous models and tools have been developed for this application; however, due to the lack of a comprehensive universal benchmark in this field, researchers have struggled to compare different models effectively. Existing datasets are limited in scope, often focusing on a narrow set of transformations or types of binaries, and fail to reflect the full diversity of real-world applications.
  We introduce EXHIB, a benchmark comprising five realistic datasets collected from the wild, each highlighting a distinct aspect of the BFSD problem space.
