We evaluate 9 representative models spanning multiple BFSD paradigms on EXHIB and observe performance degradations of up to 30% on firmware and semantic datasets compared to standard settings, revealing substantial generalization gaps. Our results show that robustness to low- and mid-level binary variations does not generalize to high-level semantic differences, underscoring a critical blind spot in current BFSD evaluation practices.

AI.tldr: EXHIB是一个用于二进制函数相似性检测的综合性基准测试，包含5个真实世界数据集，揭示了现有模型在固件和语义数据集上存在高达30%的性能下降，暴露了当前评估方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 二进制函数相似性检测是软件安全的核心问题，但缺乏全面的通用基准测试。现有数据集范围有限，无法反映真实世界应用的多样性，导致研究人员难以有效比较不同模型。
AI.method: 引入EXHIB基准测试，包含5个从真实世界收集的数据集，每个数据集突出BFSD问题空间的不同方面。在EXHIB上评估了9个代表多种BFSD范式的模型。
AI.result: 在固件和语义数据集上观察到高达30%的性能下降，揭示了显著的泛化差距。结果表明，对低层和中层二进制变异的鲁棒性无法泛化到高层语义差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前BFSD评估实践存在关键盲点，需要更全面的基准测试来评估模型在真实世界场景中的泛化能力。EXHIB为领域提供了更现实的评估框架。

title: DynaVid: Learning to Generate Highly Dynamic Videos using Synthetic Motion Data
summary: Despite recent progress, video diffusion models still struggle to synthesize realistic videos involving highly dynamic motions or requiring fine-grained motion controllability. A central limitation lies in the scarcity of such examples in commonly used training datasets. To address this, we introduce DynaVid, a video synthesis framework that leverages synthetic motion data in training, which is represented as optical flow and rendered using computer graphics pipelines. This approach offers two key advantages. First, synthetic motion offers diverse motion patterns and precise control signals that are difficult to obtain from real data. Second, unlike rendered videos with artificial appearances, rendered optical flow encodes only motion and is decoupled from appearance, thereby preventing models from reproducing the unnatural look of synthetic videos. Building on this idea, DynaVid adopts a two-stage generation framework: a motion generator first synthesizes motion, and then a motion-guided video generator produces video frames conditioned on that motion. This decoupled formulation enables the model to learn dynamic motion patterns from synthetic data while preserving visual realism from real-world videos. We validate our framework on two challenging scenarios, vigorous human motion generation and extreme camera motion control, where existing datasets are particularly limited. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DynaVid improves the realism and controllability in dynamic motion generation and camera motion control.

AI.tldr: DynaVid：利用合成光流数据增强视频扩散模型动态运动生成能力的框架，通过两阶段生成（先运动后视频）解决真实数据中动态运动样本稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散模型在处理高度动态运动和精细运动控制方面存在困难，主要原因是常用训练数据集中这类样本稀缺。需要一种方法既能利用合成数据的丰富运动模式，又能避免合成视频不自然的视觉外观。
AI.method: 提出DynaVid框架：1）使用计算机图形流水线渲染合成光流数据，光流仅编码运动信息，与外观解耦；2）采用两阶段生成：运动生成器先合成运动（光流），然后运动引导的视频生成器基于该运动生成视频帧。这样可以从合成数据学习动态运动模式，同时从真实视频保持视觉真实感。
AI.result: 在剧烈人体运动生成和极端相机运动控制两个具有挑战性的场景上验证了框架有效性。大量实验表明，DynaVid在动态运动生成和相机运动控制方面显著提升了真实感和可控性。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用合成光流数据并采用解耦的两阶段生成框架，DynaVid成功解决了视频扩散模型在动态运动生成方面的局限性，实现了从合成数据学习丰富运动模式同时保持真实视觉外观的目标。

title: Reliable News or Propagandist News? A Neurosymbolic Model Using Genre, Topic, and Persuasion Techniques to Improve Robustness in Classification
summary:
Among news disorders, propagandist news are particularly insidious, because they tend to mix oriented messages with factual reports intended to look like reliable news. To detect propaganda, extant approaches based on Language Models such as BERT are promising but often overfit their training datasets, due to biases in data collection. To enhance classification robustness and improve generalization to new sources, we propose a neurosymbolic approach combining non-contextual text embeddings (fastText) with symbolic conceptual features such as genre, topic, and persuasion techniques. Results show improvements over equivalent text-only methods, and ablation studies as well as explainability analyses confirm the benefits of the added features.
  Keywords: Information disorder, Fake news, Propaganda, Classification, Topic modeling, Hybrid method, Neurosymbolic model, Ablation, Robustness

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合非上下文文本嵌入（fastText）与符号概念特征（体裁、主题、说服技巧）的神经符号方法，用于检测宣传性新闻，提高分类鲁棒性和对新来源的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于BERT等语言模型的宣传检测方法容易在训练数据上过拟合，因为数据收集存在偏差。宣传性新闻特别隐蔽，因为它们倾向于将带有导向性的信息与看似可靠的事实报道混合在一起。
AI.method: 提出神经符号方法，结合非上下文文本嵌入（fastText）与符号概念特征，包括体裁、主题和说服技巧。这种混合方法旨在增强分类鲁棒性并提高对新数据源的泛化能力。
AI.result: 结果显示该方法优于等效的纯文本方法。消融研究和可解释性分析证实了添加的特征（体裁、主题、说服技巧）确实带来了性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号方法结合文本嵌入和符号概念特征能够有效提高宣传性新闻检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力，避免现有语言模型方法容易过拟合训练数据偏差的问题。

title: Users and Wizards in Conversations: How WoZ Interface Choices Define Human-Robot Interactions
comment: Published in Robotics: Science and Systems (2025)
summary: In this paper, we investigated how the choice of a Wizard-of-Oz (WoZ) interface affects communication with a robot from both the user's and the wizard's perspective. In a conversational setting, we used three WoZ interfaces with varying levels of dialogue input and output restrictions: a) a restricted perception GUI that showed fixed-view video and ASR transcripts and let the wizard trigger pre-scripted utterances and gestures; b) an unrestricted perception GUI that added real-time audio from the participant and the robot c) a VR telepresence interface that streamed immersive stereo video and audio to the wizard and forwarded the wizard's spontaneous speech, gaze and facial expressions to the robot. We found that the interaction mediated by the VR interface was preferred by users in terms of robot features and perceived social presence. For the wizards, the VR condition turned out to be the most demanding but elicited a higher social connection with the users. VR interface also induced the most connected interaction in terms of inter-speaker gaps and overlaps, while Restricted GUI induced the least connected flow and the largest silences. Given these results, we argue for more WoZ studies using telepresence interfaces. These studies better reflect the robots of tomorrow and offer a promising path to automation based on naturalistic contextualized verbal and non-verbal behavioral data.

AI.tldr: 研究比较了三种Wizard-of-Oz界面（受限GUI、非受限GUI、VR远程呈现）对用户与机器人交互体验的影响，发现VR界面在用户偏好、社交临场感和交互连接性方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探究不同Wizard-of-Oz界面的选择如何从用户和操作者（wizard）两个角度影响与机器人的通信质量，为未来机器人交互研究提供更优的实验方法。
AI.method: 在对话场景中使用三种不同输入输出限制级别的WoZ界面：受限感知GUI（固定视角视频+ASR转录+预设话语手势）、非受限感知GUI（增加实时音频）、VR远程呈现界面（沉浸式立体视频音频+操作者自发语音、注视和面部表情传输）。
AI.result: VR界面在用户对机器人特性和感知社交临场感方面最受青睐；对操作者而言VR条件最具挑战性但能建立更强的社交连接；VR界面在说话者间间隔和重叠方面产生最连贯的交互，而受限GUI导致最不连贯的交互流程和最长沉默。
AI.conclusion: 研究主张更多使用远程呈现界面的WoZ研究，这些研究能更好地反映未来机器人特性，并为基于自然情境化言语和非言语行为数据的自动化提供有前景的路径。

title: Automatic Image-Level Morphological Trait Annotation for Organismal Images
summary: Morphological traits are physical characteristics of biological organisms that provide vital clues on how organisms interact with their environment. Yet extracting these traits remains a slow, expert-driven process, limiting their use in large-scale ecological studies. A major bottleneck is the absence of high-quality datasets linking biological images to trait-level annotations. In this work, we demonstrate that sparse autoencoders trained on foundation-model features yield monosemantic, spatially grounded neurons that consistently activate on meaningful morphological parts. Leveraging this property, we introduce a trait annotation pipeline that localizes salient regions and uses vision-language prompting to generate interpretable trait descriptions. Using this approach, we construct Bioscan-Traits, a dataset of 80K trait annotations spanning 19K insect images from BIOSCAN-5M. Human evaluation confirms the biological plausibility of the generated morphological descriptions. We assess design sensitivity through a comprehensive ablation study, systematically varying key design choices and measuring their impact on the quality of the resulting trait descriptions. By annotating traits with a modular pipeline rather than prohibitively expensive manual efforts, we offer a scalable way to inject biologically meaningful supervision into foundation models, enable large-scale morphological analyses, and bridge the gap between ecological relevance and machine-learning practicality.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种利用稀疏自编码器和基础模型特征自动提取昆虫形态特征的管道，构建了包含8万条注释的Bioscan-Traits数据集，为大规模生态研究提供了可扩展的形态特征标注方法。
AI.motivation: 形态特征是生物与环境相互作用的重要指标，但传统提取方法依赖专家标注，过程缓慢且成本高昂，限制了其在大规模生态研究中的应用。主要瓶颈在于缺乏连接生物图像与特征级别标注的高质量数据集。
AI.method: 1. 在基础模型特征上训练稀疏自编码器，获得单语义、空间定位的神经元，这些神经元能一致地在有意义的形态部位激活；2. 构建特征标注管道：先定位显著区域，再使用视觉语言提示生成可解释的特征描述；3. 应用该方法构建Bioscan-Traits数据集，包含19K昆虫图像的80K特征标注。
AI.result: 1. 人类评估确认了生成形态描述的生物合理性；2. 通过全面的消融研究评估设计敏感性，系统变化关键设计选择并测量其对特征描述质量的影响；3. 成功构建了Bioscan-Traits数据集，为大规模形态分析提供了资源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过模块化管道而非昂贵的人工标注来注释特征，为向基础模型注入生物学意义监督提供了可扩展方法，实现了大规模形态分析，弥合了生态相关性与机器学习实用性之间的差距。

title: Non-monotonicity in Conformal Risk Control
summary:
Conformal risk control (CRC) provides distribution-free guarantees for controlling the expected loss at a user-specified level. Existing theory typically assumes that the loss decreases monotonically with a tuning parameter that governs the size of the prediction set. This assumption is often violated in practice, where losses may behave non-monotonically due to competing objectives such as coverage and efficiency.
  We study CRC under non-monotone loss functions when the tuning parameter is selected from a finite grid, a common scenario in thresholding or discretized decision rules. Revisiting a known counterexample, we show that the validity of CRC without monotonicity depends on the relationship between the calibration sample size and the grid resolution. In particular, risk control can still be achieved when the calibration sample is sufficiently large relative to the grid.
  We provide a finite-sample guarantee for bounded losses over a grid of size $m$, showing that the excess risk above the target level $α$ is of order $\sqrt{\log(m)/n}$, where $n$ is the calibration sample size. A matching lower bound shows that this rate is minimax optimal. We also derive refined guarantees under additional structural conditions, including Lipschitz continuity and monotonicity, and extend the analysis to settings with distribution shift via importance weighting.
  Numerical experiments on synthetic multilabel classification and real object detection data illustrate the practical impact of non-monotonicity. Methods that account for finite-sample deviations achieve more stable risk control than approaches based on monotonicity transformations, while maintaining competitive prediction-set sizes.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究非单调损失函数下的保形风险控制，证明了在有限网格参数选择下，当校准样本足够大时仍可实现风险控制，并给出了最优收敛速率。
AI.motivation: 现有保形风险控制理论通常假设损失随调参参数单调递减，但实践中损失可能因覆盖率和效率等竞争目标而呈现非单调性。本文旨在研究非单调损失函数下的风险控制问题，特别是在参数从有限网格中选择的常见场景。
AI.method: 研究非单调损失函数下保形风险控制的理论性质，分析校准样本大小与网格分辨率的关系。提供有限样本保证，推导出有界损失在大小为m的网格上的超额风险上界为√(log(m)/n)。建立匹配的下界证明该速率是最小极大最优的。在Lipschitz连续性和单调性等附加结构条件下推导细化保证，并通过重要性加权扩展到分布偏移设置。
AI.result: 理论分析表明：当校准样本大小n相对于网格大小m足够大时，即使损失非单调仍可实现风险控制；超额风险上界为√(log(m)/n)，且该速率是最优的；在合成多标签分类和真实目标检测数据的实验中，考虑有限样本偏差的方法比基于单调性变换的方法实现了更稳定的风险控制，同时保持了竞争力的预测集大小。
AI.conclusion: 保形风险控制在非单调损失函数下仍然有效，关键在于校准样本大小与网格分辨率的相对关系。有限样本偏差的考虑对于实际应用中的稳定风险控制至关重要，特别是在损失函数呈现复杂非单调行为时。

title: Combating Data Laundering in LLM Training
summary: Data rights owners can detect unauthorized data use in large language model (LLM) training by querying with proprietary samples. Often, superior performance (e.g., higher confidence or lower loss) on a sample relative to the untrained data implies it was part of the training corpus, as LLMs tend to perform better on data they have seen during training. However, this detection becomes fragile under data laundering, a practice of transforming the stylistic form of proprietary data, while preserving critical information to obfuscate data provenance. When an LLM is trained exclusively on such laundered variants, it no longer performs better on originals, erasing the signals that standard detections rely on. We counter this by inferring the unknown laundering transformation from black-box access to the target LLM and, via an auxiliary LLM, synthesizing queries that mimic the laundered data, even if rights owners have only the originals. As the search space of finding true laundering transformations is infinite, we abstract such a process into a high-level transformation goal (e.g., "lyrical rewriting") and concrete details (e.g., "with vivid imagery"), and introduce synthesis data reversion (SDR) that instantiates this abstraction. SDR first identifies the most probable goal for synthesis to narrow the search; it then iteratively refines details so that synthesized queries gradually elicit stronger detection signals from the target LLM. Evaluated on the MIMIR benchmark against diverse laundering practices and target LLM families (Pythia, Llama2, and Falcon), SDR consistently strengthens data misuse detection, providing a practical countermeasure to data laundering.

AI.tldr: 提出SDR方法对抗数据清洗攻击，通过推断未知的数据清洗变换并合成类似清洗数据的查询，增强LLM训练数据滥用检测。
AI.motivation: 数据清洗攻击通过变换专有数据的风格形式（保留关键信息但模糊数据来源）来规避标准检测方法，使得LLM在原始数据上不再表现出更好的性能，从而消除检测信号。
AI.method: 提出合成数据还原(SDR)方法：1) 将清洗过程抽象为高层变换目标（如"抒情重写"）和具体细节（如"使用生动意象"）；2) 首先识别最可能的合成目标以缩小搜索空间；3) 迭代优化细节，使合成查询逐渐从目标LLM中引出更强的检测信号。
AI.result: 在MIMIR基准测试中，针对多种清洗实践和目标LLM家族（Pythia、Llama2、Falcon），SDR始终能增强数据滥用检测效果，为数据清洗提供了实用的对抗措施。
AI.conclusion: SDR方法通过推断未知的清洗变换并合成类似清洗数据的查询，能够有效对抗数据清洗攻击，增强LLM训练数据滥用的检测能力，为数据权利所有者提供了实用的保护工具。

title: Reducing Mental Workload through On-Demand Human Assistance for Physical Action Failures in LLM-based Multi-Robot Coordination
comment: Under review in IEEE RO-MAN 2026. Project page is https://emergentsystemlabstudent.github.io/REPAIR/
summary: Multi-robot coordination based on large language models (LLMs) has attracted growing attention, since LLMs enable the direct translation of natural language instructions into robot action plans by decomposing tasks and generating high-level plans. However, recovering from physical execution failures remains difficult, and tasks often stagnate due to the repetition of the same unsuccessful actions. While frameworks for remote robot operation using Mixed Reality were proposed, there have been few attempts to implement remote error resolution specifically for physical failures in multi-robot environments. In this study, we propose REPAIR (Robot Execution with Planned And Interactive Recovery), a human-in-the-loop framework that integrates remote error resolution into LLM-based multi-robot planning. In this method, robots execute tasks autonomously; however, when an irrecoverable failure occurs, the LLM requests assistance from an operator, enabling task continuity through remote intervention. Evaluations using a multi-robot trash collection task in a real-world environment confirmed that REPAIR significantly improves task progress (the number of items cleared within a time limit) compared to fully autonomous methods. Furthermore, for easily collectable items, it achieved task progress equivalent to full remote control. The results also suggested that the mental workload on the operator may differ in terms of physical demand and effort. The project website is https://emergentsystemlabstudent.github.io/REPAIR/.

AI.tldr: REPAIR是一个结合大语言模型多机器人规划与远程人工干预的人机协同框架，用于解决物理执行失败问题，显著提升任务完成度
AI.motivation: 当前基于大语言模型的多机器人协调系统虽然能将自然语言指令转化为行动规划，但在物理执行失败时难以恢复，任务常因重复失败动作而停滞。现有混合现实远程操作框架很少专门针对多机器人环境中的物理失败进行远程错误解决。
AI.method: 提出REPAIR（Robot Execution with Planned And Interactive Recovery）人机协同框架，将远程错误解决集成到基于LLM的多机器人规划中。机器人自主执行任务，当发生不可恢复的失败时，LLM向操作员请求协助，通过远程干预实现任务连续性。
AI.result: 在真实环境的多机器人垃圾收集任务评估中，REPAIR相比完全自主方法显著提高了任务进度（时间限制内清理的物品数量）。对于易收集物品，其任务进度与完全远程控制相当。结果还表明操作员在物理需求和努力方面的心理负荷可能存在差异。
AI.conclusion: REPAIR框架成功将远程人工干预集成到LLM驱动的多机器人系统中，有效解决了物理执行失败问题，在保持自主性的同时通过适时的人工协助显著提升了任务完成度。

title: Matching Accuracy, Different Geometry: Evolution Strategies vs GRPO in LLM Post-Training
summary: Evolution Strategies (ES) have emerged as a scalable gradient-free alternative to reinforcement learning based LLM fine-tuning, but it remains unclear whether comparable task performance implies comparable solutions in parameter space. We compare ES and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) across four tasks in both single-task and sequential continual-learning settings. ES matches or exceeds GRPO in single-task accuracy and remains competitive sequentially when its iteration budget is controlled. Despite this similarity in task performance, the two methods produce markedly different model updates: ES makes much larger changes and induces broader off-task KL drift, whereas GRPO makes smaller, more localized updates. Strikingly, the ES and GRPO solutions are linearly connected with no loss barrier, even though their update directions are nearly orthogonal. We develop an analytical theory of ES that explains all these phenomena within a unified framework, showing how ES can accumulate large off-task movement on weakly informative directions while still making enough progress on the task to match gradient-based RL in downstream accuracy. These results show that gradient-free and gradient-based fine-tuning can reach similarly accurate yet geometrically distinct solutions, with important consequences for forgetting and knowledge preservation. The source code is publicly available: https://github.com/Bhoy1/ESvsGRPO.

AI.tldr: ES与GRPO在LLM微调中任务性能相似但参数空间解不同：ES产生更大更新和更广泛KL漂移，GRPO更新更局部化，但两者解线性连接无损失障碍
AI.motivation: 研究进化策略(ES)与基于梯度的强化学习(GRPO)在LLM微调中是否产生相似参数空间解，尽管任务性能可比
AI.method: 在四个任务上比较ES和GRPO，包括单任务和顺序持续学习设置；开发ES分析理论解释观察现象
AI.result: ES在单任务准确率上匹配或超过GRPO，顺序学习预算控制时保持竞争力；两者更新方向差异显著但解线性连接无损失障碍
AI.conclusion: 梯度自由与基于梯度的微调可达到相似准确率但几何结构不同的解，这对遗忘和知识保存有重要影响

title: A Position Statement on Endovascular Models and Effectiveness Metrics for Mechanical Thrombectomy Navigation, on behalf of the Stakeholder Taskforce for AI-assisted Robotic Thrombectomy (START)
comment: Published in Journal of the American Heart Association
summary: While we are making progress in overcoming infectious diseases and cancer; one of the major medical challenges of the mid-21st century will be the rising prevalence of stroke. Large vessels occlusions are especially debilitating, yet effective treatment (needed within hours to achieve best outcomes) remains limited due to geography. One solution for improving timely access to mechanical thrombectomy in geographically diverse populations is the deployment of robotic surgical systems. Artificial intelligence (AI) assistance may enable the upskilling of operators in this emerging therapeutic delivery approach. Our aim was to establish consensus frameworks for developing and validating AI-assisted robots for thrombectomy. Objectives included standardizing effectiveness metrics and defining reference testbeds across in silico, in vitro, ex vivo, and in vivo environments. To achieve this, we convened experts in neurointervention, robotics, data science, health economics, policy, statistics, and patient advocacy. Consensus was built through an incubator day, a Delphi process, and a final Position Statement. We identified that the four essential testbed environments each had distinct validation roles. Realism requirements vary: simpler testbeds should include realistic vessel anatomy compatible with guidewire and catheter use, while standard testbeds should incorporate deformable vessels. More advanced testbeds should include blood flow, pulsatility, and disease features. There are two macro-classes of effectiveness metrics: one for in silico, in vitro, and ex vivo stages focusing on technical navigation, and another for in vivo stages, focused on clinical outcomes. Patient safety is central to this technology's development. One requisite patient safety task needed now is to correlate in vitro measurements to in vivo complications.

AI.tldr: 该论文建立了AI辅助机器人用于血栓切除术的开发和验证共识框架，包括标准化有效性指标和定义跨计算、体外、离体和体内环境的参考测试平台。
AI.motivation: 中风是21世纪中叶的主要医学挑战之一，大血管闭塞尤其具有致残性。由于地理限制，机械取栓的有效治疗（需要在数小时内进行以获得最佳结果）仍然有限。机器人手术系统的部署可以改善地理多样化人群及时获得机械取栓的机会，而AI辅助可能使操作者在这种新兴治疗方式中提升技能。
AI.method: 通过召集神经介入、机器人、数据科学、卫生经济学、政策、统计学和患者倡导等领域的专家，采用孵化日、德尔菲过程和最终立场声明的方式建立共识。确定了四种基本测试环境（计算、体外、离体、体内）及其不同的验证作用。
AI.result: 确定了四种测试环境各有不同的验证作用：简单测试平台应包括与导丝和导管使用兼容的真实血管解剖结构；标准测试平台应包含可变形血管；更先进的测试平台应包括血流、搏动性和疾病特征。有效性指标分为两大类：一类针对计算、体外和离体阶段，侧重于技术导航；另一类针对体内阶段，侧重于临床结果。
AI.conclusion: 患者安全是该技术发展的核心。当前必要的患者安全任务是将体外测量与体内并发症相关联。建立的共识框架为AI辅助机器人用于血栓切除术的开发和验证提供了标准化指导，有助于推动这一新兴治疗方式的发展。

title: $AutoDrive\text{-}P^3$: Unified Chain of Perception-Prediction-Planning Thought via Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026 (International Conference on Learning Representations)
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly being adopted for end-to-end autonomous driving systems due to their exceptional performance in handling long-tail scenarios. However, current VLM-based approaches suffer from two major limitations: 1) Some VLMs directly output planning results without chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, bypassing crucial perception and prediction stages which creates a significant domain gap and compromises decision-making capability; 2) Other VLMs can generate outputs for perception, prediction, and planning tasks but employ a fragmented decision-making approach where these modules operate separately, leading to a significant lack of synergy that undermines true planning performance. To address these limitations, we propose ${AutoDrive\text{-}P^3}$, a novel framework that seamlessly integrates $\textbf{P}$erception, $\textbf{P}$rediction, and $\textbf{P}$lanning through structured reasoning. We introduce the ${P^3\text{-}CoT}$ dataset to facilitate coherent reasoning and propose ${P^3\text{-}GRPO}$, a hierarchical reinforcement learning algorithm that provides progressive supervision across all three tasks. Specifically, ${AutoDrive\text{-}P^3}$ progressively generates CoT reasoning and answers for perception, prediction, and planning, where perception provides essential information for subsequent prediction and planning, while both perception and prediction collectively contribute to the final planning decisions, enabling safer and more interpretable autonomous driving. Additionally, to balance inference efficiency with performance, we introduce dual thinking modes: detailed thinking and fast thinking. Extensive experiments on both open-loop (nuScenes) and closed-loop (NAVSIMv1/v2) benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in planning tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/haha-yuki-haha/AutoDrive-P3.

AI.tldr: AutoDrive-P³是一个用于自动驾驶的视觉语言模型框架，通过结构化推理无缝整合感知、预测和规划，解决了现有VLM方法中缺乏链式思维推理和模块协同的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的自动驾驶方法存在两个主要限制：1）一些VLM直接输出规划结果而跳过感知和预测阶段，导致领域差距和决策能力下降；2）其他VLM虽然能生成感知、预测和规划输出，但采用碎片化的决策方式，各模块独立运行，缺乏协同效应，影响真正的规划性能。
AI.method: 提出AutoDrive-P³框架，通过结构化推理无缝整合感知、预测和规划。引入P³-CoT数据集促进连贯推理，并提出P³-GRPO分层强化学习算法，为所有三个任务提供渐进式监督。框架逐步生成感知、预测和规划的链式思维推理和答案，其中感知为后续预测和规划提供关键信息，而感知和预测共同贡献于最终规划决策。还引入了双思维模式（详细思考和快速思考）以平衡推理效率与性能。
AI.result: 在开环（nuScenes）和闭环（NAVSIMv1/v2）基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法在规划任务中实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: AutoDrive-P³通过结构化推理整合感知、预测和规划，解决了现有VLM方法的局限性，实现了更安全、更可解释的自动驾驶，并在多个基准测试中展示了优越的规划性能。

title: The topological gap at criticality: scaling exponent d + η, universality, and scope
summary: The topological gap $Δ= TP_{H_1}^{real} - TP_{H_1}^{shuf}$ -- the excess $H_1$ total persistence of the majority-spin alpha complex over a density-matched null -- encodes critical correlations in spin models. We establish finite-size scaling: $Δ(L,T) = A L^{d+η} G_-(L|t/T_c|)$, with $G_-(x) \sim (1+x/x_0)^{-(1+β/ν)}$. For 2D Ising, $α= 2.249 \pm 0.038$, matching $d+η= 9/4$ to $0.03σ$; the $G_-$ exponent $γ= 1.089 \pm 0.077$ is consistent with $1+β/ν= 9/8$ ($ΔR^2 < 10^{-5}$). For 2D Potts $q=3$ with $L$ up to 1024, $α= 2.272 \pm 0.024$ ($0.2σ$ from $d+η= 2.267$), with two-term corrections to scaling ($R^2 = 0.9999$). The $G_-$ exponent $γ= 1.114$ (68% CI $[1.053, 1.173]$) matches $1+β/ν= 17/15$. Scope boundaries: the law fails for 2D Potts $q=4$ ($α= 2.347 \pm 0.017$, $9.3σ$ from $d+η= 5/2$) where logarithmic corrections prevent convergence, and for raw 3D Ising ($4σ$ from $d+η$), but density normalization $Δ/|M|^{1/2}$ recovers $α= 3.06 \pm 0.04$ ($0.6σ$). The framework fails for first-order, BKT, and percolation. The criterion: $α= d+η$ holds when corrections to scaling are algebraic ($ω> 0$) but fails when logarithmic ($ω\to 0$).

AI.tldr: 拓扑间隙Δ作为多数自旋α复形的H1总持续度与密度匹配零模型的差值，编码了自旋模型中的临界关联。研究发现Δ满足有限尺寸标度律Δ(L,T)=AL^(d+η)G_-(L|t/T_c|)，其中G_-(x)∼(1+x/x_0)^(-(1+β/ν))。该标度律在二维Ising模型和q=3 Potts模型中成立，但在q=4 Potts模型和原始三维Ising模型中失效，需密度归一化修正。
AI.motivation: 研究拓扑数据分析方法在临界现象中的应用，特别是通过拓扑间隙Δ来表征自旋模型的临界行为。探索Δ的有限尺寸标度行为及其与临界指数的关系，验证拓扑方法在识别和量化相变中的有效性。
AI.method: 使用拓扑数据分析方法，计算多数自旋α复形的H1总持续度TP_H1^real与密度匹配零模型TP_H1^shuf的差值Δ。通过有限尺寸标度分析，拟合Δ(L,T)=AL^(d+η)G_-(L|t/T_c|)的标度形式。在二维Ising模型、二维q=3 Potts模型、二维q=4 Potts模型和三维Ising模型中进行数值模拟验证。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑间隙Δ的标度指数α=d+η在标度修正为代数型（ω>0）时成立，但在对数修正（ω→0）时失效。该方法适用于二维Ising和q=3 Potts模型等具有代数修正的临界系统，但不适用于q=4 Potts模型（对数修正）、一级相变、BKT相变和渗流问题。密度归一化可扩展方法至三维Ising模型。

title: Efficient Constraint Generation for Stochastic Shortest Path Problems
summary: Stochastic Shortest Path problems (SSPs) are traditionally solved by computing each state's cost-to-go by applying Bellman backups. A Bellman backup updates a state's cost-to-go by iterating through every applicable action, computing the cost-to-go after applying each one, and selecting a minimal action's cost-to-go. State-of-the-art algorithms use heuristic functions; these give an initial estimate of costs-to-go, and lets the algorithm apply Bellman backups only to promising states, determined by low estimated costs-to-go. However, each Bellman backup still considers all applicable actions, even if the heuristic tells us that some of these actions are too expensive, with the effect that such algorithms waste time on unhelpful actions. To address this gap we present a technique that uses the heuristic to avoid expensive actions, by reframing heuristic search in terms of linear programming and introducing an efficient implementation of constraint generation for SSPs. We present CG-iLAO*, a new algorithm that adapts iLAO* with our novel technique, and considers only 40% of iLAO*'s actions on many problems, and as few as 1% on some. Consequently, CG-iLAO* computes on average 3.5x fewer costs-to-go for actions than the state-of-the-art iLAO* and LRTDP, enabling it to solve problems faster an average of 2.8x and 3.7x faster, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出CG-iLAO*算法，通过线性规划和约束生成技术避免考虑昂贵的动作，显著减少Bellman备份中需要评估的动作数量，加速随机最短路径问题求解。
AI.motivation: 传统SSP算法使用启发式函数指导状态选择，但Bellman备份仍需考虑所有适用动作，即使启发式表明某些动作成本过高，导致计算资源浪费。
AI.method: 将启发式搜索重新表述为线性规划问题，引入约束生成技术，开发CG-iLAO*算法，在iLAO*基础上集成该技术，动态排除昂贵动作。
AI.result: CG-iLAO*仅考虑iLAO* 40%的动作（某些问题低至1%），平均减少3.5倍动作成本计算，比iLAO*和LRTDP分别快2.8倍和3.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过约束生成技术避免昂贵动作能显著提升SSP求解效率，CG-iLAO*在减少计算量的同时保持解质量，为启发式搜索提供新方向。

title: SHARP: Short-Window Streaming for Accurate and Robust Prediction in Motion Forecasting
summary: In dynamic traffic environments, motion forecasting models must be able to accurately estimate future trajectories continuously. Streaming-based methods are a promising solution, but despite recent advances, their performance often degrades when exposed to heterogeneous observation lengths. To address this, we propose a novel streaming-based motion forecasting framework that explicitly focuses on evolving scenes. Our method incrementally processes incoming observation windows and leverages an instance-aware context streaming to maintain and update latent agent representations across inference steps. A dual training objective further enables consistent forecasting accuracy across diverse observation horizons. Extensive experiments on Argoverse 2, nuScenes, and Argoverse 1 demonstrate the robustness of our approach under evolving scene conditions and also on the single-agent benchmarks. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance in streaming inference on the Argoverse 2 multi-agent benchmark, while maintaining minimal latency, highlighting its suitability for real-world deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新颖的流式运动预测框架，专注于动态交通环境中的场景演化，通过实例感知上下文流和双重训练目标解决异构观测长度下的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 在动态交通环境中，运动预测模型需要能够连续准确地估计未来轨迹。现有的流式方法尽管有进展，但在面对异构观测长度时性能往往会下降，因此需要一种能够明确处理场景演化的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出了一种流式运动预测框架，增量处理输入观测窗口，利用实例感知上下文流在推理步骤间维护和更新智能体潜在表示，并通过双重训练目标确保在不同观测视野下保持一致的预测准确性。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 2、nuScenes和Argoverse 1数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在场景演化条件下具有鲁棒性，在Argoverse 2多智能体基准测试中实现了流式推理的最先进性能，同时保持最小延迟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过显式关注场景演化，有效解决了流式运动预测中的异构观测长度问题，在多个基准测试中表现出色，延迟低，适合实际部署。

title: Control Without Control: Defining Implicit Interaction Paradigms for Autonomous Assistive Robots
summary: Assistive robotic systems have shown growing potential to improve the quality of life of those with disabilities. As researchers explore the automation of various caregiving tasks, considerations for how the technology can still preserve the user's sense of control become paramount to ensuring that robotic systems are aligned with fundamental user needs and motivations. In this work, we present two previously developed systems as design cases through which to explore an interaction paradigm that we call implicit control, where the behavior of an autonomous robot is modified based on users' natural behavioral cues, instead of some direct input. Our selected design cases, unlike systems in past work, specifically probe users' perception of the interaction. We find, from a new thematic analysis of qualitative feedback on both cases, that designing for effective implicit control enables both a reduction in perceived workload and the preservation of the users' sense of control through the system's intuitiveness and responsiveness, contextual awareness, and ability to adapt to preferences. We further derive a set of core guidelines for designers in deciding when and how to apply implicit interaction paradigms for their assistive applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过两个设计案例探讨了"隐式控制"交互范式，即基于用户自然行为线索而非直接输入来修改自主机器人行为，旨在降低感知工作量并保持用户控制感。
AI.motivation: 随着辅助机器人系统在改善残疾人生活质量方面潜力日益增长，研究人员在探索各种护理任务自动化的同时，需要确保技术能够保留用户的控制感，使机器人系统与用户基本需求和动机保持一致。
AI.method: 通过两个先前开发的系统作为设计案例，探索隐式控制交互范式。这些案例专门探究用户对交互的感知，并对两个案例的定性反馈进行新的主题分析。
AI.result: 研究发现，为有效隐式控制而设计能够通过系统的直观性和响应性、上下文意识以及适应偏好的能力，既降低感知工作量，又保持用户的控制感。
AI.conclusion: 研究进一步为设计师制定了一套核心指南，用于决定何时以及如何将隐式交互范式应用于辅助应用，确保机器人系统既自动化又尊重用户自主权。

title: Soft MPCritic: Amortized Model Predictive Value Iteration
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) and model predictive control (MPC) offer complementary strengths, yet combining them at scale remains computationally challenging. We propose soft MPCritic, an RL-MPC framework that learns in (soft) value space while using sample-based planning for both online control and value target generation. soft MPCritic instantiates MPC through model predictive path integral control (MPPI) and trains a terminal Q-function with fitted value iteration, aligning the learned value function with the planner and implicitly extending the effective planning horizon. We introduce an amortized warm-start strategy that recycles planned open-loop action sequences from online observations when computing batched MPPI-based value targets. This makes soft MPCritic computationally practical, while preserving solution quality. soft MPCritic plans in a scenario-based fashion with an ensemble of dynamic models trained for next-step prediction accuracy. Together, these ingredients enable soft MPCritic to learn effectively through robust, short-horizon planning on classic and complex control tasks. These results establish soft MPCritic as a practical and scalable blueprint for synthesizing MPC policies in settings where policy extraction and direct, long-horizon planning may fail.

AI.tldr: Soft MPCritic：一种结合强化学习与模型预测控制的框架，通过在软价值空间学习并使用基于样本的规划进行在线控制和价值目标生成，实现高效计算和长视野规划。
AI.motivation: 强化学习（RL）和模型预测控制（MPC）各有优势但难以大规模结合，现有方法在计算上具有挑战性。需要一种既能利用MPC的规划能力，又能通过RL学习价值函数，同时保持计算效率的框架。
AI.method: 1. 使用模型预测路径积分控制（MPPI）实例化MPC；2. 通过拟合价值迭代训练终端Q函数，使学习到的价值函数与规划器对齐，隐式扩展有效规划视野；3. 引入摊销预热策略，重用在线观测的计划开环动作序列计算批量MPPI价值目标；4. 使用基于场景的规划，训练动态模型集合进行下一步预测。
AI.result: Soft MPCritic在经典和复杂控制任务上通过鲁棒的短视野规划有效学习，在保持解质量的同时实现计算可行性，为在策略提取和直接长视野规划可能失败的场景中合成MPC策略提供了实用且可扩展的蓝图。
AI.conclusion: Soft MPCritic成功地将RL与MPC结合，通过软价值空间学习和基于样本的规划解决了计算挑战，为在复杂控制任务中实现高效、长视野的规划控制提供了实用框架。

title: Mitigating the ID-OOD Tradeoff in Open-Set Test-Time Adaptation
summary: Open-set test-time adaptation (OSTTA) addresses the challenge of adapting models to new environments where out-of-distribution (OOD) samples coexist with in-distribution (ID) samples affected by distribution shifts. In such settings, covariate shift-for example, changes in weather conditions such as snow-can alter ID samples, reducing model reliability. Consequently, models must not only correctly classify covariate-shifted ID (csID) samples but also effectively reject covariate-shifted OOD (csOOD) samples. Entropy minimization is a common strategy in test-time adaptation to maintain ID performance under distribution shifts, while entropy maximization is widely applied to enhance OOD detection. Several studies have sought to combine these objectives to tackle the challenges of OSTTA. However, the intrinsic conflict between entropy minimization and maximization inevitably leads to a trade-off between csID classification and csOOD detection. In this paper, we first analyze the limitations of entropy maximization in OSTTA and then introduce an angular loss to regulate feature norm magnitudes, along with a feature-norm loss to suppress csOOD logits, thereby improving OOD detection. These objectives form ROSETTA, a $\underline{r}$obust $\underline{o}$pen-$\underline{se}$t $\underline{t}$est-$\underline{t}$ime $\underline{a}$daptation. Our method achieves strong OOD detection while maintaining high ID classification performance on CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-100-C, Tiny-ImageNet-C and ImageNet-C. Furthermore, experiments on the Cityscapes validate the method's effectiveness in real-world semantic segmentation, and results on the HAC dataset demonstrate its applicability across different open-set TTA setups.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROSETTA方法，通过角度损失和特征范数损失解决开放集测试时适应中ID分类与OOD检测的权衡问题
AI.motivation: 开放集测试时适应中，协变量偏移会影响ID样本，同时存在OOD样本。熵最小化用于保持ID性能，熵最大化用于增强OOD检测，但两者存在内在冲突，导致csID分类与csOOD检测之间的权衡问题
AI.method: 提出ROSETTA方法：1）分析熵最大化在OSTTA中的局限性；2）引入角度损失调节特征范数大小；3）使用特征范数损失抑制csOOD logits；4）在CIFAR-10-C、CIFAR-100-C、Tiny-ImageNet-C、ImageNet-C等数据集验证
AI.result: 方法在多个数据集上实现了强大的OOD检测能力，同时保持了高ID分类性能。在Cityscapes数据集上验证了其在真实世界语义分割中的有效性，在HAC数据集上证明了其在不同开放集TTA设置中的适用性
AI.conclusion: ROSETTA通过角度损失和特征范数损失有效解决了开放集测试时适应中ID分类与OOD检测的权衡问题，在多种数据集和实际应用中表现出色

title: A Classification of Heterogeneity in Uncrewed Vehicle Swarms and the Effects of Its Inclusion on Overall Swarm Resilience
summary: Combining different types of agents in uncrewed vehicle (UV) swarms has emerged as an approach to enhance mission resilience and operational capabilities across a wide range of applications. This study offers a systematic framework for grouping different types of swarms based on three main factors: agent nature (behavior and function), hardware structure (physical configuration and sensing capabilities), and operational space (domain of operation). A literature review indicates that strategic heterogeneity significantly improves swarm performance. Operational challenges, including communication architecture constraints, energy-aware coordination strategies, and control system integration, are also discussed. The analysis shows that heterogeneous swarms are more resilient because they can leverage diverse capabilities, adapt roles on the fly, and integrate data from multidimensional sensor feeds. Some important factors to consider when implementing are sim-to-real-world transfer for learned policies, standardized evaluation metrics, and control architectures that can work together. Learning-based coordination, GPS (Global Positioning System)-denied multi-robot SLAM (Simultaneous Localization and Mapping), and domain-specific commercial deployments collectively demonstrate that heterogeneous swarm technology is moving closer to readiness for high-value applications. This study offers a single taxonomy and evidence-based observations on methods for designing mission-ready heterogeneous swarms that balance complexity and increased capability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个系统框架，用于对异构无人机集群进行分类，基于三个主要因素：智能体性质、硬件结构和操作空间，并分析了异构集群在提升任务弹性和性能方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 在无人机集群中结合不同类型的智能体已成为增强任务弹性和操作能力的重要方法。然而，目前缺乏一个系统性的框架来分类和分析不同类型的异构集群，以及如何有效设计和实施这些系统。
AI.method: 提出基于三个主要因素的分类框架：1) 智能体性质（行为和功能），2) 硬件结构（物理配置和感知能力），3) 操作空间（操作领域）。通过文献综述分析异构集群的性能优势，并讨论操作挑战如通信架构约束、能量感知协调策略和控制系统集成。
AI.result: 分析表明异构集群具有更高的弹性，因为它们能够利用多样化的能力、动态适应角色并整合多维传感器数据。战略异构性显著提升集群性能。学习型协调、GPS拒止环境下的多机器人SLAM以及特定领域的商业部署表明异构集群技术正接近高价值应用的准备状态。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一个统一的分类法和基于证据的观察，用于设计任务就绪的异构集群，平衡复杂性和增强能力。实施时需要考虑的关键因素包括：学习策略的仿真到现实转移、标准化评估指标以及可互操作的控制架构。

title: SHOE: Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation Metric
comment: Accepted to GRAIL-V Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: Open-vocabulary human-object interaction (HOI) detection is a step towards building scalable systems that generalize to unseen interactions in real-world scenarios and support grounded multimodal systems that reason about human-object relationships. However, standard evaluation metrics, such as mean Average Precision (mAP), treat HOI classes as discrete categorical labels and fail to credit semantically valid but lexically different predictions (e.g., "lean on couch" vs. "sit on couch"), limiting their applicability for evaluating open-vocabulary predictions that go beyond any predefined set of HOI labels. We introduce SHOE (Semantic HOI Open-Vocabulary Evaluation), a new evaluation framework that incorporates semantic similarity between predicted and ground-truth HOI labels. SHOE decomposes each HOI prediction into its verb and object components, estimates their semantic similarity using the average of multiple large language models (LLMs), and combines them into a similarity score to evaluate alignment beyond exact string match. This enables a flexible and scalable evaluation of both existing HOI detection methods and open-ended generative models using standard benchmarks such as HICO-DET. Experimental results show that SHOE scores align more closely with human judgments than existing metrics, including LLM-based and embedding-based baselines, achieving an agreement of 85.73% with the average human ratings. Our work underscores the need for semantically grounded HOI evaluation that better mirrors human understanding of interactions. We will release our evaluation metric to the public to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: SHOE：一种新的开放词汇人-物交互检测评估框架，通过语义相似度而非精确字符串匹配来评估预测质量
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标（如mAP）将HOI类别视为离散分类标签，无法识别语义有效但词汇不同的预测（如"靠在沙发上" vs. "坐在沙发上"），限制了开放词汇预测的评估能力
AI.method: SHOE将每个HOI预测分解为动词和对象组件，使用多个大语言模型（LLMs）的平均值估计它们的语义相似度，并将它们组合成相似度分数，实现超越精确字符串匹配的评估
AI.result: SHOE得分与人类判断的一致性达到85.73%，比现有指标（包括基于LLM和嵌入的基线）更接近人类评估，在HICO-DET等标准基准上实现了灵活可扩展的评估
AI.conclusion: 需要语义基础的HOI评估来更好地反映人类对交互的理解，SHOE框架为开放词汇HOI检测提供了更符合人类认知的评估方法，将公开发布以促进未来研究

title: Retrieval-aligned Tabular Foundation Models Enable Robust Clinical Risk Prediction in Electronic Health Records Under Real-world Constraints
summary: Clinical prediction from structured electronic health records (EHRs) is challenging due to high dimensionality, heterogeneity, class imbalance, and distribution shift. While tabular in-context learning (TICL) and retrieval-augmented methods perform well on generic benchmarks, their behavior in clinical settings remains unclear. We present a multi-cohort EHR benchmark comparing classical, deep tabular, and TICL models across varying data scale, feature dimensionality, outcome rarity, and cross-cohort generalization. PFN-based TICL models are sample-efficient in low-data regimes but degrade under naive distance-based retrieval as heterogeneity and imbalance increase. We propose AWARE, a task-aligned retrieval framework using supervised embedding learning and lightweight adapters. AWARE improves AUPRC by up to 12.2% under extreme imbalance, with gains increasing with data complexity. Our results identify retrieval quality and retrieval-inference alignment as key bottlenecks for deploying tabular in-context learning in clinical prediction.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了AWARE框架，通过监督嵌入学习和轻量级适配器改进临床电子健康记录预测中的表格上下文学习，在极端类别不平衡下显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 临床电子健康记录预测面临高维度、异质性、类别不平衡和分布偏移等挑战。虽然表格上下文学习和检索增强方法在通用基准上表现良好，但它们在临床环境中的行为尚不明确，需要系统评估和改进。
AI.method: 提出了AWARE框架，包含两个关键组件：1) 监督嵌入学习用于任务对齐的检索，2) 轻量级适配器用于检索-推断对齐。该方法在多队列电子健康记录基准上评估，比较了经典模型、深度表格模型和表格上下文学习模型。
AI.result: AWARE在极端类别不平衡下将AUPRC提升高达12.2%，且随着数据复杂性增加，性能提升更加明显。研究发现基于PFN的表格上下文学习模型在低数据量下样本效率高，但在异质性和不平衡增加时，基于朴素距离的检索会性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 检索质量和检索-推断对齐是部署表格上下文学习于临床预测的关键瓶颈。AWARE框架通过任务对齐的检索和监督嵌入学习有效解决了这些问题，为临床电子健康记录预测提供了改进方案。

title: CARLA-Air: Fly Drones Inside a CARLA World -- A Unified Infrastructure for Air-Ground Embodied Intelligence
comment: Prebuilt binaries, project page, full source code, and community discussion group are all available at: https://github.com/louiszengCN/CarlaAir
summary:
The convergence of low-altitude economies, embodied intelligence, and air-ground cooperative systems creates growing demand for simulation infrastructure capable of jointly modeling aerial and ground agents within a single physically coherent environment. Existing open-source platforms remain domain-segregated: driving simulators lack aerial dynamics, while multirotor simulators lack realistic ground scenes. Bridge-based co-simulation introduces synchronization overhead and cannot guarantee strict spatial-temporal consistency.
  We present CARLA-Air, an open-source infrastructure that unifies high-fidelity urban driving and physics-accurate multirotor flight within a single Unreal Engine process. The platform preserves both CARLA and AirSim native Python APIs and ROS 2 interfaces, enabling zero-modification code reuse. Within a shared physics tick and rendering pipeline, CARLA-Air delivers photorealistic environments with rule-compliant traffic, socially-aware pedestrians, and aerodynamically consistent UAV dynamics, synchronously capturing up to 18 sensor modalities across all platforms at each tick. The platform supports representative air-ground embodied intelligence workloads spanning cooperation, embodied navigation and vision-language action, multi-modal perception and dataset construction, and reinforcement-learning-based policy training. An extensible asset pipeline allows integration of custom robot platforms into the shared world. By inheriting AirSim's aerial capabilities -- whose upstream development has been archived -- CARLA-Air ensures this widely adopted flight stack continues to evolve within a modern infrastructure.
  Released with prebuilt binaries and full source: https://github.com/louiszengCN/CarlaAir

AI.tldr: CARLA-Air是一个开源仿真基础设施，将CARLA的高保真城市驾驶与AirSim的物理精确多旋翼飞行统一在单个Unreal Engine进程中，解决了现有仿真平台领域隔离的问题。
AI.motivation: 低空经济、具身智能和空地协同系统的发展需要能够联合建模空中和地面智能体的仿真基础设施。现有开源平台存在领域隔离问题：驾驶仿真器缺乏空中动力学，多旋翼仿真器缺乏真实地面场景，而基于桥接的协同仿真存在同步开销且无法保证严格的时空一致性。
AI.method: 在单个Unreal Engine进程中统一CARLA和AirSim，保留两者的原生Python API和ROS 2接口，实现零修改代码复用。通过共享物理时钟和渲染管线，提供包含规则合规交通、社会感知行人和空气动力学一致的UAV动态的光照真实环境，每时钟同步捕获多达18种传感器模态。
AI.result: CARLA-Air支持代表性的空地具身智能工作负载，包括协同、具身导航和视觉语言动作、多模态感知与数据集构建、基于强化学习的策略训练。可扩展的资产管道允许将自定义机器人平台集成到共享世界中，并继承了AirSim的空中能力。
AI.conclusion: CARLA-Air提供了一个统一的仿真平台，解决了现有平台领域隔离的问题，支持空地协同智能系统的开发和研究，确保广泛采用的飞行堆栈在现代基础设施中持续演进。

title: Satellite-Free Training for Drone-View Geo-Localization
summary: Drone-view geo-localization (DVGL) aims to determine the location of drones in GPS-denied environments by retrieving the corresponding geotagged satellite tile from a reference gallery given UAV observations of a location. In many existing formulations, these observations are represented by a single oblique UAV image. In contrast, our satellite-free setting is designed for multi-view UAV sequences, which are used to construct a geometry-normalized UAV-side location representation before cross-view retrieval. Existing approaches rely on satellite imagery during training, either through paired supervision or unsupervised alignment, which limits practical deployment when satellite data are unavailable or restricted. In this paper, we propose a satellite-free training (SFT) framework that converts drone imagery into cross-view compatible representations through three main stages: drone-side 3D scene reconstruction, geometry-based pseudo-orthophoto generation, and satellite-free feature aggregation for retrieval. Specifically, we first reconstruct dense 3D scenes from multi-view drone images using 3D Gaussian splatting and project the reconstructed geometry into pseudo-orthophotos via PCA-guided orthographic projection. This rendering stage operates directly on reconstructed scene geometry without requiring camera parameters at rendering time. Next, we refine these orthophotos with lightweight geometry-guided inpainting to obtain texture-complete drone-side views. Finally, we extract DINOv3 patch features from the generated orthophotos, learn a Fisher vector aggregation model solely from drone data, and reuse it at test time to encode satellite tiles for cross-view retrieval. Experimental results on University-1652 and SUES-200 show that our SFT framework substantially outperforms satellite-free generalization baselines and narrows the gap to methods trained with satellite imagery.

AI.tldr: 提出卫星图像无关训练框架SFT，通过无人机多视角序列重建3D场景并生成伪正射影像，实现无卫星数据训练的跨视图地理定位
AI.motivation: 现有无人机地理定位方法依赖卫星图像进行训练，但在卫星数据不可用或受限的实际部署中面临限制，需要开发不依赖卫星数据的训练方法
AI.method: 三阶段框架：1) 使用3D高斯溅射从多视角无人机图像重建密集3D场景；2) 通过PCA引导的正射投影生成几何归一化的伪正射影像，并用轻量级几何引导修复完善纹理；3) 从无人机数据学习Fisher向量聚合模型，用于提取特征并进行跨视图检索
AI.result: 在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上，SFT框架显著优于卫星无关泛化基线，缩小了与使用卫星图像训练方法的性能差距
AI.conclusion: 提出的卫星无关训练框架能够在不依赖卫星图像的情况下实现有效的跨视图地理定位，为GPS拒止环境中的无人机定位提供了实用的解决方案

title: Not All Tokens See Equally: Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization for Large Vision-Language Models
summary: While Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has advanced reasoning in Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), prevailing frameworks suffer from a foundational methodological flaw: by distributing identical advantages across all generated tokens, these methods inherently dilute the learning signals essential for optimizing the critical, visually-grounded steps of multimodal reasoning. To bridge this gap, we formulate \textit{Token Visual Dependency}, quantifying the causal information gain of visual inputs via the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between visual-conditioned and text-only predictive distributions. Revealing that this dependency is highly sparse and semantically pivotal, we introduce Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization (PGPO), which is a novel fine-grained credit assignment framework that dynamically reshapes advantages at the token level. Through a threshold-gated, mass-conserving mechanism, PGPO actively amplifies learning signals for visually-dependent tokens while suppressing gradient noise from linguistic priors. Extensive experiments based on the Qwen2.5-VL series across seven challenging multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that PGPO boosts models by 18.7% on average. Both theoretical and empirical analyses confirm that PGPO effectively reduces gradient variance, prevents training collapse, and acts as a potent regularizer for robust, perception-grounded multimodal reasoning. Code will be published on https://github.com/Yzk1114/PGPO.

AI.tldr: 提出PGPO框架，通过细粒度token级信用分配解决多模态强化学习中视觉依赖token学习信号稀释问题，在7个基准测试上平均提升18.7%
AI.motivation: 现有基于可验证奖励的强化学习框架存在方法学缺陷：将所有生成token分配相同优势值，稀释了多模态推理中关键视觉依赖步骤的学习信号，阻碍了感知基础推理的优化
AI.method: 提出Token Visual Dependency概念，通过KL散度量视觉输入的信息增益；开发Perception-Grounded Policy Optimization框架，采用阈值门控、质量守恒机制动态重塑token级优势，放大视觉依赖token学习信号，抑制语言先验梯度噪声
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-VL系列模型上，基于7个挑战性多模态推理基准测试，PGPO平均提升18.7%；理论和实证分析证实PGPO有效降低梯度方差，防止训练崩溃，作为感知基础多模态推理的强正则化器
AI.conclusion: PGPO通过细粒度token级信用分配解决了多模态强化学习中的关键问题，显著提升视觉语言模型的感知基础推理能力，为稳健的多模态推理提供了有效框架

title: Effort-Based Criticality Metrics for Evaluating 3D Perception Errors in Autonomous Driving
summary: Criticality metrics such as time-to-collision (TTC) quantify collision urgency but conflate the consequences of false-positive (FP) and false-negative (FN) perception errors. We propose two novel effort-based metrics: False Speed Reduction (FSR), the cumulative velocity loss from persistent phantom detections, and Maximum Deceleration Rate (MDR), the peak braking demand from missed objects under a constant-acceleration model. These longitudinal metrics are complemented by Lateral Evasion Acceleration (LEA), adapted from prior lateral evasion kinematics and coupled with reachability-based collision timing to quantify the minimum steering effort to avoid a predicted collision. A reachability-based ellipsoidal collision filter ensures only dynamically plausible threats are scored, with frame-level matching and track-level aggregation. Evaluation of different perception pipelines on nuScenes and Argoverse~2 shows that 65-93% of errors are non-critical, and Spearman correlation analysis confirms that all three metrics capture safety-relevant information inaccessible to established time-based, deceleration-based, or normalized criticality measures, enabling targeted mining of the most critical perception failures.

AI.tldr: 提出基于努力的感知错误关键性度量：FSR（虚假减速累积速度损失）、MDR（漏检对象最大减速率）和LEA（横向规避加速度），结合可达性碰撞过滤，能更准确识别安全相关感知失败。
AI.motivation: 现有关键性度量（如TTC）混淆了假阳性（FP）和假阴性（FN）感知错误的后果，无法准确量化感知错误对安全的影响程度。
AI.method: 提出三个基于努力的度量：FSR（累积速度损失）、MDR（最大减速率需求）、LEA（最小转向努力）。结合可达性椭球碰撞过滤器确保仅评估动态可行威胁，采用帧级匹配和轨迹级聚合。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse~2数据集上评估不同感知流水线，发现65-93%的错误是非关键的。Spearman相关性分析证实三个新度量能捕获现有时间基、减速率基或归一化关键性度量无法获取的安全相关信息。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于努力的关键性度量能有效区分感知错误的严重程度，为目标挖掘最关键的感知失败提供工具，有助于改进感知系统的安全评估。

title: Harmonized Tabular-Image Fusion via Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning
summary: Multimodal tabular-image fusion is an emerging task that has received increasing attention in various domains. However, existing methods may be hindered by gradient conflicts between modalities, misleading the optimization of the unimodal learner. In this paper, we propose a novel Gradient-Aligned Alternating Learning (GAAL) paradigm to address this issue by aligning modality gradients. Specifically, GAAL adopts an alternating unimodal learning and shared classifier to decouple the multimodal gradient and facilitate interaction. Furthermore, we design uncertainty-based cross-modal gradient surgery to selectively align cross-modal gradients, thereby steering the shared parameters to benefit all modalities. As a result, GAAL can provide effective unimodal assistance and help boost the overall fusion performance. Empirical experiments on widely used datasets reveal the superiority of our method through comparison with various state-of-the-art (SoTA) tabular-image fusion baselines and test-time tabular missing baselines. The source code is available at https://github.com/njustkmg/ICME26-GAAL.

AI.tldr: 提出梯度对齐交替学习（GAAL）范式，通过模态梯度对齐解决多模态表格-图像融合中的梯度冲突问题
AI.motivation: 现有多模态表格-图像融合方法存在模态间梯度冲突问题，这会误导单模态学习器的优化，影响融合性能
AI.method: 采用交替单模态学习和共享分类器来解耦多模态梯度；设计基于不确定性的跨模态梯度手术，选择性对齐跨模态梯度，使共享参数对所有模态都有利
AI.result: 在广泛使用的数据集上，与多种最先进的表格-图像融合基线和测试时表格缺失基线相比，该方法表现出优越性
AI.conclusion: GAAL能够提供有效的单模态辅助，有助于提升整体融合性能，解决了多模态融合中的梯度冲突问题

title: Flip Stunts on Bicycle Robots using Iterative Motion Imitation
comment: 8 Pages, Accepted to the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2026
summary: This work demonstrates a front-flip on bicycle robots via reinforcement learning, particularly by imitating reference motions that are infeasible and imperfect. To address this, we propose Iterative Motion Imitation(IMI), a method that iteratively imitates trajectories generated by prior policy rollouts. Starting from an initial reference that is kinematically or dynamically infeasible, IMI helps train policies that lead to feasible and agile behaviors. We demonstrate our method on Ultra-Mobility Vehicle (UMV), a bicycle robot that is designed to enable agile behaviors. From a self-colliding table-to-ground flip reference generated by a model-based controller, we are able to train policies that enable ground-to-ground and ground-to-table front-flips. We show that compared to a single-shot motion imitation, IMI results in policies with higher success rates and can transfer robustly to the real world. To our knowledge, this is the first unassisted acrobatic flip behavior on such a platform.

AI.tldr: 通过强化学习实现自行车机器人前空翻，提出迭代运动模仿(IMI)方法，从不可行的参考运动开始迭代训练，最终实现地面到地面和地面到桌面的前空翻
AI.motivation: 解决在自行车机器人上实现敏捷特技动作（如前空翻）的挑战，特别是当参考运动存在运动学或动力学不可行性时，需要一种能够从不可行参考中学习可行策略的方法
AI.method: 提出迭代运动模仿(IMI)方法，通过迭代模仿先前策略rollout生成的轨迹，从初始不可行的参考运动开始，逐步训练出可行的策略；应用于超移动车辆(UMV)自行车机器人
AI.result: 成功训练出能够实现地面到地面和地面到桌面前空翻的策略；相比单次运动模仿，IMI方法获得更高成功率，并能鲁棒地迁移到真实世界；这是该平台上首次实现无辅助的特技空翻行为
AI.conclusion: IMI方法能够从不可行和不完美的参考运动中学习，成功实现自行车机器人的敏捷特技动作，为从次优参考中学习复杂运动技能提供了有效途径

title: VideoZeroBench: Probing the Limits of Video MLLMs with Spatio-Temporal Evidence Verification
summary: Recent video multimodal large language models achieve impressive results across various benchmarks. However, current evaluations suffer from two critical limitations: (1) inflated scores can mask deficiencies in fine-grained visual understanding and reasoning, and (2) answer correctness is often measured without verifying whether models identify the precise spatio-temporal evidence supporting their predictions. To address this, we present VideoZeroBench, a hierarchical benchmark designed for challenging long-video question answering that rigorously verifies spatio-temporal evidence. It comprises 500 manually annotated questions across 13 domains, paired with temporal intervals and spatial bounding boxes as evidence. To disentangle answering generation, temporal grounding, and spatial grounding, we introduce a five-level evaluation protocol that progressively tightens evidence requirements. Experiments show that even Gemini-3-Pro correctly answers fewer than 17% of questions under the standard end-to-end QA setting (Level-3). When grounding constraints are imposed, performance drops sharply: No model exceeds 1% accuracy when both correct answering and accurate spatio-temporal localization are required (Level-5), with most failing to achieve any correct grounded predictions. These results expose a significant gap between surface-level answer correctness and genuine evidence-based reasoning, revealing that grounded video understanding remains a bottleneck for long-video QA. We further analyze performance across minimal evidence spans, atomic abilities, and inference paradigms, providing insights for future research in grounded video reasoning. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: VideoZeroBench：一个用于长视频问答的分层基准测试，通过严格的时空证据验证来评估视频多模态大语言模型的细粒度视觉理解和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 当前视频多模态大语言模型评估存在两个关键局限：(1) 夸大的分数掩盖了细粒度视觉理解和推理的缺陷；(2) 答案正确性评估通常不验证模型是否识别了支持其预测的精确时空证据。需要开发能够严格验证时空证据的评估基准。
AI.method: 提出VideoZeroBench，一个分层基准测试，包含500个手动标注的问题，覆盖13个领域，每个问题都配有作为证据的时间区间和空间边界框。引入五级评估协议，逐步收紧证据要求，以区分答案生成、时间定位和空间定位能力。
AI.result: 实验显示，即使在标准端到端QA设置（Level-3）下，Gemini-3-Pro的正确回答率也低于17%。当施加定位约束时，性能急剧下降：当同时要求正确答案和准确的时空定位时（Level-5），没有模型超过1%的准确率，大多数模型无法实现任何正确的定位预测。这些结果暴露了表面答案正确性与真正基于证据的推理之间的显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 基于证据的视频理解仍然是长视频QA的瓶颈。VideoZeroBench揭示了当前模型的局限性，并为未来基于证据的视频推理研究提供了见解。该基准测试和代码将公开提供。

title: Safety Guardrails in the Sky: Realizing Control Barrier Functions on the VISTA F-16 Jet
summary: The advancement of autonomous systems -- from legged robots to self-driving vehicles and aircraft -- necessitates executing increasingly high-performance and dynamic motions without ever putting the system or its environment in harm's way. In this paper, we introduce Guardrails -- a novel runtime assurance mechanism that guarantees dynamic safety for autonomous systems, allowing them to safely evolve on the edge of their operational domains. Rooted in the theory of control barrier functions, Guardrails offers a control strategy that carefully blends commands from a human or AI operator with safe control actions to guarantee safe behavior. To demonstrate its capabilities, we implemented Guardrails on an F-16 fighter jet and conducted flight tests where Guardrails supervised a human pilot to enforce g-limits, altitude bounds, geofence constraints, and combinations thereof. Throughout extensive flight testing, Guardrails successfully ensured safety, keeping the pilot in control when safe to do so and minimally modifying unsafe pilot inputs otherwise.

AI.tldr: Guardrails是一种基于控制屏障函数的运行时安全保障机制，用于确保自主系统在操作域边缘的动态安全性，已在F-16战斗机上成功测试。
AI.motivation: 随着自主系统（从腿式机器人到自动驾驶车辆和飞机）的发展，需要执行越来越高性能和动态的运动，同时确保系统及其环境的安全。现有方法难以在保持高性能的同时保证动态安全性。
AI.method: 基于控制屏障函数理论，Guardrails提出了一种控制策略，将人类或AI操作员的命令与安全控制动作精心混合，以保证安全行为。这是一种运行时安全保障机制。
AI.result: 在F-16战斗机上进行飞行测试，Guardrails成功监督人类飞行员执行g限制、高度边界、地理围栏约束及其组合。在广泛的飞行测试中，Guardrails确保了安全性，在安全时保持飞行员控制，在飞行员输入不安全时进行最小化修改。
AI.conclusion: Guardrails是一种有效的运行时安全保障机制，能够保证自主系统的动态安全性，使系统能够在操作域边缘安全运行，同时最小化对操作员意图的干扰。

title: Infeasibility Aware Large Language Models for Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored for NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems, but most existing methods emphasize feasible-instance solution generation and do not explicitly address infeasibility detection. We propose an infeasibility-aware framework that combines certifiable dataset construction, supervised fine-tuning, and LLM-assisted downstream search. For the minor-embedding problem, we introduce a new mathematical programming formulation together with provable zero-phase infeasibility screening, which enables scalable construction of training instances labeled either as feasible with structured certificates or as certifiably infeasible. Using training data generated through this exact optimization pipeline, we show that an 8B-parameter LLM can be fine-tuned to jointly perform solution generation and infeasibility detection. We further utilize LLM outputs as warm starts for downstream local search, providing a practical way to accelerate optimization even when the LLM outputs are imperfect. Experiments show that our fine-tuned model improves overall accuracy by up to 30\% over GPT-5.2; meanwhile LLM-guided warm starts provide up to $2\times$ speedup compared with starting from scratch in downstream local search.

AI.tldr: 提出一个不可行性感知框架，结合可验证数据集构建、监督微调和LLM辅助下游搜索，用于组合优化问题，特别关注不可行性检测
AI.motivation: 现有LLM方法主要关注可行实例的解决方案生成，缺乏对不可行性检测的显式处理，需要开发能同时处理可行性和不可行性检测的框架
AI.method: 1) 提出不可行性感知框架；2) 针对minor-embedding问题引入新的数学规划公式和可证明的零阶段不可行性筛选；3) 构建可验证的训练数据集；4) 对8B参数LLM进行监督微调；5) 将LLM输出作为下游局部搜索的预热启动
AI.result: 微调模型相比GPT-5.2整体准确率提升达30%；LLM引导的预热启动在下游局部搜索中相比从零开始提供高达2倍的加速
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架成功解决了LLM在组合优化中不可行性检测的不足，通过可验证数据生成和微调实现了同时进行解决方案生成和不可行性检测，并通过LLM辅助预热启动加速了优化过程

title: ReFlow: Self-correction Motion Learning for Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: We present ReFlow, a unified framework for monocular dynamic scene reconstruction that learns 3D motion in a novel self-correction manner from raw video. Existing methods often suffer from incomplete scene initialization for dynamic regions, leading to unstable reconstruction and motion estimation, which often resorts to external dense motion guidance such as pre-computed optical flow to further stabilize and constrain the reconstruction of dynamic components. However, this introduces additional complexity and potential error propagation. To address these issues, ReFlow integrates a Complete Canonical Space Construction module for enhanced initialization of both static and dynamic regions, and a Separation-Based Dynamic Scene Modeling module that decouples static and dynamic components for targeted motion supervision. The core of ReFlow is a novel self-correction flow matching mechanism, consisting of Full Flow Matching to align 3D scene flow with time-varying 2D observations, and Camera Flow Matching to enforce multi-view consistency for static objects. Together, these modules enable robust and accurate dynamic scene reconstruction. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios demonstrate that ReFlow achieves superior reconstruction quality and robustness, establishing a novel self-correction paradigm for monocular 4D reconstruction.

AI.tldr: ReFlow是一个用于单目动态场景重建的统一框架，通过自校正流匹配机制从原始视频中学习3D运动，无需外部密集运动引导，实现了鲁棒准确的动态场景重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态区域初始化不完整，导致重建和运动估计不稳定，通常需要依赖外部密集运动引导（如预计算光流）来稳定动态组件重建，但这引入了额外复杂性和潜在误差传播。
AI.method: 1) 完整规范空间构建模块：增强静态和动态区域的初始化；2) 基于分离的动态场景建模模块：解耦静态和动态组件以实现针对性运动监督；3) 自校正流匹配机制：包括全流匹配（对齐3D场景流与时间变化的2D观测）和相机流匹配（强制静态对象的多视图一致性）。
AI.result: 在多种场景下的广泛实验表明，ReFlow实现了优越的重建质量和鲁棒性，为单目4D重建建立了新的自校正范式。
AI.conclusion: ReFlow通过自校正流匹配机制，无需外部密集运动引导，实现了鲁棒准确的动态场景重建，为单目4D重建提供了新的解决方案。

title: Domain-constrained knowledge representation: A modal framework
summary: Knowledge graphs store large numbers of relations efficiently, but they remain weak at representing a quieter difficulty: the meaning of a concept often shifts with the domain in which it is used. A triple such as Apple, instance-of, Company may be acceptable in one setting while being misleading or unusable in another. In most current systems, domain information is attached as metadata, qualifiers, or graph-level organization. These mechanisms help with filtering and provenance, but they usually do not alter the formal status of the assertion itself. This paper argues that domain should be treated as part of knowledge representation rather than as supplementary annotation. It introduces the Domain-Contextualized Concept Graph (DCG), a framework in which domain is written into the relation and interpreted as a modal world constraint. In the DCG form (C, R at D, C'), the marker at D identifies the world in which the relation holds. Formally, the relation is interpreted through a domain-indexed necessity operator, so that truth, inference, and conflict checking are all scoped to the relevant world. This move has three consequences: ambiguous concepts can be disambiguated at the point of representation; invalid assertions can be challenged against their domain; cross-domain relations can be connected through explicit predicates. The paper develops this claim through a Kripke-style semantics, a compact predicate system, a Prolog implementation, and mappings to RDF, OWL, and relational databases. The contribution is a representational reinterpretation of domain itself. The central claim is that many practical failures in knowledge systems begin when domain is treated as external to the assertion. DCG addresses that by giving domain a structural and computable role inside the representation.

AI.tldr: 论文提出领域上下文概念图(DCG)框架，将领域作为知识表示的内在组成部分而非外部元数据，通过模态世界约束解决概念在不同领域中的语义漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱能高效存储大量关系，但难以处理概念在不同领域中语义漂移的问题。现有系统将领域信息作为元数据、限定符或图级组织，这些机制仅用于过滤和溯源，不改变断言的形式状态，导致知识系统在实际应用中经常失败。
AI.method: 提出领域上下文概念图(DCG)框架，将领域写入关系并解释为模态世界约束。采用(C, R at D, C')形式，其中at D标识关系成立的世界。形式化上，关系通过领域索引的必要性算子解释，使真值、推理和冲突检查都限定在相关世界内。开发了Kripke风格语义、紧凑谓词系统、Prolog实现，并映射到RDF、OWL和关系数据库。
AI.result: DCG框架实现了三个关键结果：1) 模糊概念可在表示时消歧；2) 无效断言可针对其领域进行挑战；3) 跨领域关系可通过显式谓词连接。为领域在知识表示中提供了结构和可计算的角色。
AI.conclusion: 领域应被视为知识表示的内在组成部分而非补充注释。DCG通过将领域作为结构性和可计算元素纳入表示内部，解决了知识系统中因领域被外部化处理而导致的许多实际失败问题。这是对领域本身的表示重新解释。

title: Data is All You Need: Markov Chain Car-Following (MC-CF) Model
summary: Car-following behavior is fundamental to traffic flow theory, yet traditional models often fail to capture the stochasticity of naturalistic driving. This paper introduces a new car-following modeling category called the empirical probabilistic paradigm, which bypasses conventional parametric assumptions. Within this paradigm, we propose the Markov Chain Car-Following (MC-CF) model, which represents state transitions as a Markov process and predicts behavior by randomly sampling accelerations from empirical distributions within discretized state bins. Evaluation of the MC-CF model trained on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset (WOMD) demonstrates that its variants significantly outperform physics-based models including IDM, Gipps, FVDM, and SIDM in both one-step and open-loop trajectory prediction accuracy. Statistical analysis of transition probabilities confirms that the model-generated trajectories are indistinguishable from real-world behavior, successfully reproducing the probabilistic structure of naturalistic driving across all interaction types. Zero-shot generalization on the Naturalistic Phoenix (PHX) dataset further confirms the model's robustness. Finally, microscopic ring road simulations validate the framework's scalability. By incrementally integrating unconstrained free-flow trajectories and high-speed freeway data (TGSIM) alongside a conservative inference strategy, the model drastically reduces collisions, achieving zero crashes in multiple equilibrium and shockwave scenarios, while successfully reproducing naturalistic and stochastic shockwave propagation. Overall, the proposed MC-CF model provides a robust, scalable, and calibration-free foundation for high-fidelity stochastic traffic modeling, uniquely suited for the data-rich future of intelligent transportation.

AI.tldr: 提出基于经验概率范式的马尔可夫链跟驰模型(MC-CF)，通过从离散状态箱的经验分布中随机采样加速度来预测驾驶行为，在轨迹预测精度和微观交通仿真中显著优于传统物理模型。
AI.motivation: 传统跟驰模型难以捕捉自然驾驶的随机性，且依赖参数化假设。需要一种能直接利用丰富驾驶数据、无需校准的随机建模框架来适应智能交通数据丰富的未来。
AI.method: 提出经验概率范式，其中MC-CF模型将状态转移建模为马尔可夫过程，在离散化的状态箱中从经验加速度分布随机采样。通过整合无约束自由流轨迹和高速公路数据(TGSIM)以及保守推理策略来减少碰撞。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上训练的MC-CF变体在一步和开环轨迹预测精度上显著优于IDM、Gipps等物理模型；统计检验证实生成轨迹与真实行为无法区分；在PHX数据集上实现零样本泛化；微观环形路仿真实现零碰撞，成功复现随机冲击波传播。
AI.conclusion: MC-CF模型为高保真随机交通建模提供了稳健、可扩展且无需校准的基础框架，特别适合数据丰富的智能交通系统未来。

title: When AI Gets it Wrong: Reliability and Risk in AI-Assisted Medication Decision Systems
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure. Position paper with simulated experimental analysis of AI reliability in medication decision systems. Minor Correction to Title Metadata (Typo Fix)
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly integrated into healthcare and pharmacy workflows, supporting tasks such as medication recommendations, dosage determination, and drug interaction detection. While these systems often demonstrate strong performance under standard evaluation metrics, their reliability in real-world decision-making remains insufficiently understood. In high-risk domains such as medication management, even a single incorrect recommendation can result in severe patient harm. This paper examines the reliability of AI-assisted medication systems by focusing on system failures and their potential clinical consequences. Rather than evaluating performance solely through aggregate metrics, this work shifts attention towards how errors occur and what happens when AI systems produce incorrect outputs. Through a series of controlled, simulated scenarios involving drug interactions and dosage decisions, we analyse different types of system failures, including missed interactions, incorrect risk flagging, and inappropriate dosage recommendations. The findings highlight that AI errors in medication-related contexts can lead to adverse drug reactions, ineffective treatment, or delayed care, particularly when systems are used without sufficient human oversight. Furthermore, the paper discusses the risks of over-reliance on AI recommendations and the challenges posed by limited transparency in decision-making processes. This work contributes a reliability-focused perspective on AI evaluation in healthcare, emphasising the importance of understanding failure behavior and real-world impact. It highlights the need to complement traditional performance metrics with risk-aware evaluation approaches, particularly in safety-critical domains such as pharmacy practice.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了AI辅助用药系统的可靠性，重点关注系统故障类型及其临床后果，强调需要超越传统性能指标，采用风险感知的评估方法。
AI.motivation: AI系统在医疗和药房工作流程中日益普及，用于药物推荐、剂量确定和药物相互作用检测等任务。虽然这些系统在标准评估指标下表现良好，但其在现实世界决策中的可靠性仍未被充分理解。在用药管理等高风险领域，即使是单个错误推荐也可能导致严重的患者伤害。
AI.method: 通过一系列涉及药物相互作用和剂量决策的受控模拟场景，分析不同类型的系统故障，包括遗漏相互作用、错误风险标记和不适当的剂量推荐。研究重点从聚合性能指标转向错误发生方式和AI系统产生不正确输出时的后果。
AI.result: 研究发现，在用药相关情境中，AI错误可能导致药物不良反应、治疗无效或延迟护理，特别是在没有足够人工监督的情况下使用系统时。研究还揭示了过度依赖AI推荐的风险以及决策过程透明度有限带来的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为医疗AI评估提供了以可靠性为中心的视角，强调理解故障行为和现实世界影响的重要性。在药房实践等安全关键领域，需要将传统性能指标与风险感知评估方法相结合，并确保足够的人工监督和系统透明度。

title: MPC as a Copilot: A Predictive Filter Framework with Safety and Stability Guarantees
summary: Ensuring both safety and stability remains a fundamental challenge in learning-based control, where goal-oriented policies often neglect system constraints and closed-loop state convergence. To address this limitation, this paper introduces the Predictive Safety--Stability Filter (PS2F), a unified predictive filter framework that guarantees constraint satisfaction and asymptotic stability within a single architecture. The PS2F framework comprises two cascaded optimal control problems: a nominal model predictive control (MPC) layer that serves solely as a copilot, implicitly defining a Lyapunov function and generating safety- and stability-certified predicted trajectories, and a secondary filtering layer that adjusts external command to remain within a provably safe and stable region. This cascaded structure enables PS2F to inherit the theoretical guarantees of nominal MPC while accommodating goal-oriented external commands. Rigorous analysis establishes recursive feasibility and asymptotic stability of the closed-loop system without introducing additional conservatism beyond that associated with the nominal MPC. Furthermore, a time-varying parameterisation allows PS2F to transition smoothly between safety-prioritised and stability-oriented operation modes, providing a principled mechanism for balancing exploration and exploitation. The effectiveness of the proposed framework is demonstrated through comparative numerical experiments.

AI.tldr: 提出PS2F预测安全-稳定性滤波器，通过双层级联最优控制结构保证约束满足和渐近稳定性，统一处理安全与稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 学习型控制中，面向目标的策略常忽视系统约束和闭环状态收敛，安全与稳定性难以同时保证，需要统一框架解决这一基本挑战。
AI.method: 采用双层级联最优控制结构：第一层为名义MPC作为"副驾驶"，隐式定义李雅普诺夫函数并生成安全稳定认证轨迹；第二层为滤波层，调整外部指令使其保持在可证明安全稳定区域内。
AI.result: 理论分析证明闭环系统的递归可行性和渐近稳定性，不引入超出名义MPC的额外保守性；时变参数化使PS2F能在安全优先和稳定性导向模式间平滑切换。
AI.conclusion: PS2F框架统一处理安全与稳定性，继承名义MPC理论保证同时适应外部指令，通过比较数值实验验证了有效性，为平衡探索与利用提供原则性机制。

title: Generative Profiling for Soft Real-Time Systems and its Applications to Resource Allocation
summary: Modern real-time systems require accurate characterization of task timing behavior to ensure predictable performance, particularly on complex hardware architectures. Existing methods, such as worst-case execution time analysis, often fail to capture the fine-grained timing behaviors of a task under varying resource contexts (e.g., an allocation of cache, memory bandwidth, and CPU frequency), which is necessary to achieve efficient resource utilization. In this paper, we introduce a novel generative profiling approach that synthesizes context-dependent, fine-grained timing profiles for real-time tasks, including those for unmeasured resource allocations. Our approach leverages a nonparametric, conditional multi-marginal Schrödinger Bridge (MSB) formulation to generate accurate execution profiles for unseen resource contexts, with maximum likelihood guarantees. We demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our approach through real-world benchmarks, and showcase its practical utility in a representative case study of adaptive multicore resource allocation for real-time systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于多边际薛定谔桥的生成式分析方法，为实时任务合成细粒度、上下文相关的时序剖面，包括未测量的资源分配情况。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如最坏情况执行时间分析）无法捕捉任务在不同资源上下文（缓存、内存带宽、CPU频率等）下的细粒度时序行为，这限制了复杂硬件架构上实时系统的可预测性能和资源利用效率。
AI.method: 采用非参数、条件多边际薛定谔桥（MSB）公式化方法，生成未见资源上下文下的精确执行剖面，具有最大似然保证。
AI.result: 通过真实世界基准测试验证了方法的效率和有效性，并在自适应多核资源分配的典型案例研究中展示了其实用价值。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够为实时任务生成上下文相关的细粒度时序剖面，包括未测量的资源分配，从而支持复杂硬件架构上更高效、可预测的资源分配。

title: Prototype-Based Low Altitude UAV Semantic Segmentation
summary: Semantic segmentation of low-altitude UAV imagery presents unique challenges due to extreme scale variations, complex object boundaries, and limited computational resources on edge devices. Existing transformer-based segmentation methods achieve remarkable performance but incur high computational overhead, while lightweight approaches struggle to capture fine-grained details in high-resolution aerial scenes. To address these limitations, we propose PBSeg, an efficient prototype-based segmentation framework tailored for UAV applications. PBSeg introduces a novel prototype-based cross-attention (PBCA) that exploits feature redundancy to reduce computational complexity while maintaining segmentation quality. The framework incorporates an efficient multi-scale feature extraction module that combines deformable convolutions (DConv) with context-aware modulation (CAM) to capture both local details and global semantics. Experiments on two challenging UAV datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. PBSeg achieves 71.86\% mIoU on UAVid and 80.92\% mIoU on UDD6, establishing competitive performance while maintaining computational efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/zhangda1018/PBSeg.

AI.tldr: PBSeg：一种针对无人机图像语义分割的高效原型分割框架，通过原型交叉注意力减少计算复杂度，在保持分割质量的同时实现计算效率
AI.motivation: 无人机低空图像语义分割面临极端尺度变化、复杂物体边界和边缘设备计算资源有限等挑战。现有基于Transformer的分割方法计算开销大，而轻量级方法难以捕捉高分辨率航拍场景的细粒度细节。
AI.method: 提出PBSeg框架，包含：1）原型交叉注意力（PBCA），利用特征冗余减少计算复杂度；2）高效多尺度特征提取模块，结合可变形卷积（DConv）和上下文感知调制（CAM）来捕获局部细节和全局语义。
AI.result: 在两个挑战性无人机数据集上验证：UAVid数据集达到71.86% mIoU，UDD6数据集达到80.92% mIoU，在保持计算效率的同时建立了有竞争力的性能。
AI.conclusion: PBSeg为无人机图像语义分割提供了一种高效解决方案，通过原型交叉注意力和多尺度特征提取，在计算效率和分割质量之间取得了良好平衡，特别适合边缘设备部署。

title: Know Your Streams: On the Conceptualization, Characterization, and Generation of Intentional Event Streams
summary: The shift toward IoT-enabled, sensor-driven systems has transformed how operational data is generated, favoring continuous, real-time event streams (ES) over static event logs. This evolution presents new challenges for Streaming Process Mining (SPM), which must cope with out-of-order events, concurrent activities, incomplete cases, and concept drifts. Yet, the evaluation of SPM algorithms remains rooted in outdated practices, relying on static logs or artificially streamified data that fail to reflect the complexities of real-world streams. To address this gap, we first perform a comprehensive review of data stream literature to identify stream characteristics currently not reflected in the SPM community. Next, we use this information to extend the conceptual foundation for ES. Finally, we propose Stream of Intent, a prototype generator to produce ES with specific features. Our evaluation shows excellence in producing reproducible, intentional ES for targeted benchmarking and adaptive algorithm development in SPM.

AI.tldr: 该论文针对流式过程挖掘(SPM)领域缺乏真实流数据评估的问题，提出了Stream of Intent原型生成器，用于生成具有特定特征的、可复现的事件流，以支持SPM算法的针对性基准测试和自适应开发。
AI.motivation: 物联网和传感器驱动系统产生了连续、实时的流式数据，但流式过程挖掘(SPM)算法的评估仍依赖于静态日志或人工流化的数据，这些数据无法反映真实事件流的复杂性（如乱序事件、并发活动、不完整案例和概念漂移），导致评估不准确。
AI.method: 1) 对数据流文献进行全面综述，识别当前SPM社区未反映的流特征；2) 基于这些信息扩展事件流的概念基础；3) 提出Stream of Intent原型生成器，用于生成具有特定特征的事件流。
AI.result: Stream of Intent在生成可复现、具有特定意图的事件流方面表现出色，能够为SPM的针对性基准测试和自适应算法开发提供高质量的评估数据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了SPM评估方法的空白，通过提供能够反映真实世界复杂性的流数据生成工具，促进了更准确、更有效的流式过程挖掘算法评估和发展。

title: Universal computational thermal imaging overcoming the ghosting effect
summary: Thermal imaging is crucial for night vision but fundamentally hampered by the ghosting effect, a loss of detailed texture in cluttered photon streams. While conventional ghosting mitigation has relied on data post-processing, the recent breakthrough in heat-assisted detection and ranging (HADAR) opens a promising frontier for hyperspectral computational thermal imaging that produces night vision with day-like visibility. However, universal anti-ghosting imaging remains elusive, as state-of-the-art HADAR applies only to limited scenes with uniform materials, whereas material non-uniformity is ubiquitous in the real world. Here, we propose a universal computational thermal imaging framework, TAG (thermal anti-ghosting), to address material non-uniformity and overcome ghosting for high-fidelity night vision. TAG takes hyperspectral photon streams for nonparametric texture recovery, enabling our experimental demonstration of unprecedented expression recovery in thus-far-elusive ghostly human faces -- the archetypal, long-recognized ghosting phenomenon. Strikingly, TAG not only universally outperforms HADAR across various scenes, but also reveals the influence of material non-uniformity, shedding light on HADAR's effectiveness boundary. We extensively test facial texture and expression recovery across day and night, and demonstrate, for the first time, thermal 3D topological alignment and mood detection. This work establishes a universal foundation for high-fidelity computational night vision, with potential applications in autonomous navigation, reconnaissance, healthcare, and wildlife monitoring.

AI.tldr: 提出TAG（热反鬼影）通用计算热成像框架，解决材料非均匀性问题，实现高保真夜视，首次恢复鬼影人脸的表情细节
AI.motivation: 传统热成像存在鬼影效应（纹理细节丢失），现有HADAR技术仅适用于均匀材料场景，而现实世界中材料非均匀性普遍存在，需要开发通用抗鬼影成像方法
AI.method: 提出TAG框架，利用高光谱光子流进行非参数纹理恢复，解决材料非均匀性问题，实现热3D拓扑对齐和情绪检测
AI.result: TAG在多种场景下普遍优于HADAR，首次实现鬼影人脸表情恢复，揭示材料非均匀性对HADAR有效边界的影响，实现昼夜面部纹理和表情恢复
AI.conclusion: 建立了高保真计算夜视的通用基础，在自主导航、侦察、医疗保健和野生动物监测等领域具有应用潜力

title: Benchmarking Multi-View BEV Object Detection with Mixed Pinhole and Fisheye Cameras
comment: 8 pages,5 figures, IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA),Vienna, Austria, 1-5 June 2026
summary: Modern autonomous driving systems increasingly rely on mixed camera configurations with pinhole and fisheye cameras for full view perception. However, Bird's-Eye View (BEV) 3D object detection models are predominantly designed for pinhole cameras, leading to performance degradation under fisheye distortion. To bridge this gap, we introduce a multi-view BEV detection benchmark with mixed cameras by converting KITTI-360 into nuScenes format. Our study encompasses three adaptations: rectification for zero-shot evaluation and fine-tuning of nuScenes-trained models, distortion-aware view transformation modules (VTMs) via the MEI camera model, and polar coordinate representations to better align with radial distortion. We systematically evaluate three representative BEV architectures, BEVFormer, BEVDet and PETR, across these strategies. We demonstrate that projection-free architectures are inherently more robust and effective against fisheye distortion than other VTMs. This work establishes the first real-data 3D detection benchmark with fisheye and pinhole images and provides systematic adaptation and practical guidelines for designing robust and cost-effective 3D perception systems. The code is available at https://github.com/CesarLiu/FishBEVOD.git.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了首个包含鱼眼和针孔相机的真实数据3D检测基准，系统评估了BEV架构在混合相机配置下的性能，发现无投影架构对鱼眼畸变更鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 现代自动驾驶系统越来越多地使用混合相机配置（针孔+鱼眼）实现全视角感知，但现有的BEV 3D目标检测模型主要针对针孔相机设计，在鱼眼畸变下性能下降。需要填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 1) 通过将KITTI-360转换为nuScenes格式，创建了首个混合相机的多视角BEV检测基准；2) 评估了三种适应策略：零样本评估和微调的校正方法、基于MEI相机模型的畸变感知视角变换模块、以及更符合径向畸变的极坐标表示；3) 系统评估了三种代表性BEV架构（BEVFormer、BEVDet、PETR）。
AI.result: 研究表明，无投影架构（如PETR）相比其他视角变换模块对鱼眼畸变更具鲁棒性和有效性。为设计鲁棒且经济高效的3D感知系统提供了系统性的适应策略和实践指南。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了首个包含鱼眼和针孔相机的真实数据3D检测基准，证明了无投影架构在应对鱼眼畸变方面的优势，为混合相机配置的自动驾驶感知系统设计提供了重要指导。

title: Improving Latent Generalization Using Test-time Compute
summary: Language Models (LMs) exhibit two distinct mechanisms for knowledge acquisition: in-weights learning (i.e., encoding information within the model weights) and in-context learning (ICL). Although these two modes offer complementary strengths, in-weights learning frequently struggles to facilitate deductive reasoning over the internalized knowledge. We characterize this limitation as a deficit in latent generalization, of which the reversal curse is one example. Conversely, in-context learning demonstrates highly robust latent generalization capabilities.
