To improve latent generalization from in-weights knowledge, prior approaches rely on train-time data augmentation, yet these techniques are task-specific, scale poorly, and fail to generalize to out-of-distribution knowledge. To overcome these shortcomings, this work studies how models can be taught to use test-time compute, or 'thinking', specifically to improve latent generalization. We use Reinforcement Learning (RL) from correctness feedback to train models to produce long chains-of-thought (CoTs) to improve latent generalization. Our experiments show that this thinking approach not only resolves many instances of latent generalization failures on in-distribution knowledge but also, unlike augmentation baselines, generalizes to new knowledge for which no RL was performed. Nevertheless, on pure reversal tasks, we find that thinking does not unlock direct knowledge inversion, but the generate-and-verify ability of thinking models enables them to get well above chance performance. The brittleness of factual self-verification means thinking models still remain well below the performance of in-context learning for this task. Overall, our results establish test-time thinking as a flexible and promising direction for improving the latent generalization of LMs.

AI.tldr: 使用强化学习训练语言模型生成长思维链，通过测试时计算改善权重内知识的潜在泛化能力
AI.motivation: 语言模型的权重内学习在内部化知识的演绎推理方面存在局限（如反转诅咒），而上下文学习则表现出强大的潜在泛化能力。现有基于训练时数据增强的方法存在任务特定性、扩展性差且难以泛化到分布外知识的问题。
AI.method: 使用基于正确性反馈的强化学习训练模型生成长思维链，通过测试时计算（"思考"）来改善潜在泛化。该方法不依赖任务特定的数据增强，而是教导模型利用推理过程。
AI.result: 思考方法不仅解决了分布内知识的许多潜在泛化失败案例，还能泛化到未进行强化学习的新知识。在纯反转任务中，思考虽不能直接实现知识反转，但通过生成-验证能力使性能显著高于随机水平，但仍远低于上下文学习。
AI.conclusion: 测试时思考是改善语言模型潜在泛化能力的灵活且有前景的方向，为权重内知识的推理能力提升提供了新途径。

title: UniRecGen: Unifying Multi-View 3D Reconstruction and Generation
summary: Sparse-view 3D modeling represents a fundamental tension between reconstruction fidelity and generative plausibility. While feed-forward reconstruction excels in efficiency and input alignment, it often lacks the global priors needed for structural completeness. Conversely, diffusion-based generation provides rich geometric details but struggles with multi-view consistency. We present UniRecGen, a unified framework that integrates these two paradigms into a single cooperative system. To overcome inherent conflicts in coordinate spaces, 3D representations, and training objectives, we align both models within a shared canonical space. We employ disentangled cooperative learning, which maintains stable training while enabling seamless collaboration during inference. Specifically, the reconstruction module is adapted to provide canonical geometric anchors, while the diffusion generator leverages latent-augmented conditioning to refine and complete the geometric structure. Experimental results demonstrate that UniRecGen achieves superior fidelity and robustness, outperforming existing methods in creating complete and consistent 3D models from sparse observations. Code is available at https://github.com/zsh523/UniRecGen.

AI.tldr: UniRecGen是一个统一框架，将前馈重建与扩散生成相结合，通过共享规范空间和对齐学习，在稀疏视图3D建模中平衡重建保真度与生成合理性。
AI.motivation: 稀疏视图3D建模面临重建保真度与生成合理性之间的根本矛盾：前馈重建方法虽然高效且与输入对齐，但缺乏全局先验导致结构不完整；而基于扩散的生成方法能提供丰富几何细节，但难以保持多视图一致性。
AI.method: 提出UniRecGen统一框架，将重建和生成模型集成到共享规范空间中。采用解耦协同学习，在保持训练稳定的同时实现推理时的无缝协作。重建模块提供规范几何锚点，扩散生成器利用潜在增强条件来细化和补全几何结构。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，UniRecGen在创建完整且一致的3D模型方面实现了卓越的保真度和鲁棒性，优于现有方法。代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过将前馈重建与扩散生成统一到共享规范空间，UniRecGen成功解决了稀疏视图3D建模中的保真度-合理性权衡问题，实现了更完整和一致的3D重建。

title: Reliability-Aware Geometric Fusion for Robust Audio-Visual Navigation
comment: Main paper (6 pages). Accepted for publication by the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)
summary: Audio-Visual Navigation (AVN) requires an embodied agent to navigate toward a sound source by utilizing both vision and binaural audio. A core challenge arises in complex acoustic environments, where binaural cues become intermittently unreliable, particularly when generalizing to previously unheard sound categories. To address this, we propose RAVN (Reliability-Aware Audio-Visual Navigation), a framework that conditions cross-modal fusion on audio-derived reliability cues, dynamically calibrating the integration of audio and visual inputs. RAVN introduces an Acoustic Geometry Reasoner (AGR) that is trained with geometric proxy supervision. Using a heteroscedastic Gaussian NLL objective, AGR learns observation-dependent dispersion as a practical reliability cue, eliminating the need for geometric labels during inference. Additionally, we introduce Reliability-Aware Geometric Modulation (RAGM), which converts the learned cue into a soft gate to modulate visual features, thereby mitigating cross-modal conflicts. We evaluate RAVN on SoundSpaces using both Replica and Matterport3D environments, and the results show consistent improvements in navigation performance, with notable robustness in the challenging unheard sound setting.

AI.tldr: RAVN框架通过音频可靠性感知的跨模态融合，解决复杂声学环境中双耳音频线索不可靠的问题，提升未见声音类别下的音频-视觉导航性能。
AI.motivation: 音频-视觉导航在复杂声学环境中面临核心挑战：双耳音频线索会间歇性不可靠，特别是在泛化到先前未听过的声音类别时。需要动态校准音频和视觉输入的融合。
AI.method: 提出RAVN框架，包含声学几何推理器（AGR）和可靠性感知几何调制（RAGM）。AGR通过异方差高斯NLL目标学习观测相关的离散度作为可靠性线索，无需推理时的几何标签。RAGM将学习到的线索转换为软门控来调制视觉特征，缓解跨模态冲突。
AI.result: 在SoundSpaces数据集（Replica和Matterport3D环境）上的评估显示，导航性能持续提升，在具有挑战性的未听过声音设置中表现出显著的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: RAVN通过可靠性感知的跨模态融合有效解决了复杂声学环境中的音频-视觉导航问题，特别是在泛化到未听过声音类别时表现出优越性能。

title: Heracles: Bridging Precise Tracking and Generative Synthesis for General Humanoid Control
summary: Achieving general-purpose humanoid control requires a delicate balance between the precise execution of commanded motions and the flexible, anthropomorphic adaptability needed to recover from unpredictable environmental perturbations. Current general controllers predominantly formulate motion control as a rigid reference-tracking problem. While effective in nominal conditions, these trackers often exhibit brittle, non-anthropomorphic failure modes under severe disturbances, lacking the generative adaptability inherent to human motor control. To overcome this limitation, we propose Heracles, a novel state-conditioned diffusion middleware that bridges precise motion tracking and generative synthesis. Rather than relying on rigid tracking paradigms or complex explicit mode-switching, Heracles operates as an intermediary layer between high-level reference motions and low-level physics trackers. By conditioning on the robot's real-time state, the diffusion model implicitly adapts its behavior: it approximates an identity map when the state closely aligns with the reference, preserving zero-shot tracking fidelity. Conversely, when encountering significant state deviations, it seamlessly transitions into a generative synthesizer to produce natural, anthropomorphic recovery trajectories. Our framework demonstrates that integrating generative priors into the control loop not only significantly enhances robustness against extreme perturbations but also elevates humanoid control from a rigid tracking paradigm to an open-ended, generative general-purpose architecture.

AI.tldr: Heracles：一种基于状态条件扩散模型的中间件，桥接精确运动跟踪与生成式合成，提升人形机器人控制的鲁棒性和适应性
AI.motivation: 当前通用控制器将运动控制视为刚性参考跟踪问题，在标称条件下有效，但在严重扰动下表现出脆性、非拟人化的失效模式，缺乏人类运动控制固有的生成适应性
AI.method: 提出Heracles状态条件扩散中间件，作为高层参考运动与低层物理跟踪器之间的中介层。通过基于机器人实时状态的条件化，扩散模型隐式适应行为：状态与参考对齐时近似恒等映射保持跟踪保真度；状态显著偏离时无缝转换为生成合成器产生自然拟人恢复轨迹
AI.result: 框架证明将生成先验集成到控制回路中不仅显著增强对极端扰动的鲁棒性，还将人形控制从刚性跟踪范式提升为开放式、生成式的通用架构
AI.conclusion: Heracles通过状态条件扩散模型实现了精确运动跟踪与生成式合成的统一，为人形机器人控制提供了兼具高保真跟踪和自然适应性恢复的通用解决方案

title: EgoFlow: Gradient-Guided Flow Matching for Egocentric 6DoF Object Motion Generation
summary: Understanding and predicting object motion from egocentric video is fundamental to embodied perception and interaction. However, generating physically consistent 6DoF trajectories remains challenging due to occlusions, fast motion, and the lack of explicit physical reasoning in existing generative models. We present EgoFlow, a flow-matching framework that synthesizes realistic and physically plausible trajectories conditioned on multimodal egocentric observations. EgoFlow employs a hybrid Mamba-Transformer-Perceiver architecture to jointly model temporal dynamics, scene geometry, and semantic intent, while a gradient-guided inference process enforces differentiable physical constraints such as collision avoidance and motion smoothness. This combination yields coherent and controllable motion generation without post-hoc filtering or additional supervision. Experiments on real-world datasets HD-EPIC, EgoExo4D, and HOT3D show that EgoFlow outperforms diffusion-based and transformer baselines in accuracy, generalization, and physical realism, reducing collision rates by up to 79%, and strong generalization to unseen scenes. Our results highlight the promise of flow-based generative modeling for scalable and physically grounded egocentric motion understanding.

AI.tldr: EgoFlow：基于流匹配的框架，从第一人称视角视频生成物理一致的6DoF物体轨迹，通过混合架构和梯度引导推理实现物理约束，在多个数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 从第一人称视角视频理解和预测物体运动是具身感知和交互的基础，但现有生成模型缺乏显式物理推理，难以生成物理一致的6DoF轨迹，主要挑战包括遮挡、快速运动和物理约束缺失。
AI.method: 提出EgoFlow流匹配框架，采用混合Mamba-Transformer-Perceiver架构联合建模时间动态、场景几何和语义意图，通过梯度引导推理过程强制执行可微物理约束（如碰撞避免和运动平滑性）。
AI.result: 在HD-EPIC、EgoExo4D和HOT3D等真实数据集上，EgoFlow在准确性、泛化性和物理真实性方面优于基于扩散和Transformer的基线方法，碰撞率降低高达79%，对未见场景具有强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于流的生成建模在可扩展和物理基础的自我中心运动理解方面具有前景，EgoFlow无需后处理滤波或额外监督即可生成连贯可控的运动轨迹。

title: TerraSkipper: A Centimeter-Scale Robot for Multi-Terrain Skipping and Crawling
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, Accepted - IEEE International Conference on Robotics & Automation (ICRA), Vienna, Austria, 2026
summary: Mudskippers are unique amphibious fish capable of locomotion in diverse environments, including terrestrial surfaces, aquatic habitats, and highly viscous substrates such as mud. This versatile locomotion is largely enabled by their powerful tail, which stores and rapidly releases energy to produce impulsive jumps. Inspired by this biological mechanism, we present the design and development of a multi-terrain centimeter-scale skipping and crawling robot. The robot is predominantly 3D printed and features onboard sensing, computation, and power. It is equipped with two side fins for crawling, each integrated with a hall effect sensor for gait control, while a rotary springtail driven by a 10mm planetary gear motor enables continuous impulsive skipping across a range of substrates to achieve multi-terrain locomotion. We modeled and experimentally characterized the tail, identifying an optimal length of 25mm that maximizes the mean propulsive force (4N, peaks up to 6N) for forward motion. In addition, we evaluated skipping on substrates where fin based crawling alone fails, and varied the moisture content of uniform sand and bentonite clay powder to compare skipping with crawling. Skipping consistently produced higher mean velocities than crawling, particularly on viscous and granular media. Finally, outdoor tests on grass, loose sand, and hard ground confirmed that combining skipping on entangling and granular terrain with crawling on firm ground extends the operational range of the robot in real-world environments.

AI.tldr: 受弹涂鱼尾鳍储能跳跃机制启发，开发了厘米级多地形跳跃爬行机器人，通过旋转弹簧尾实现连续跳跃，结合侧鳍爬行，在粘性/颗粒介质上跳跃比爬行速度更快。
AI.motivation: 弹涂鱼能够在陆地、水域和粘性泥浆等多种环境中运动，主要依靠其强大的尾鳍储能和快速释放能量实现跳跃。受此生物机制启发，开发能够在多地形环境中运动的机器人，特别是在传统爬行方式失效的粘性和颗粒介质上实现高效运动。
AI.method: 设计并制造了主要采用3D打印的厘米级机器人，配备机载传感、计算和电源系统。机器人具有两个带霍尔效应传感器的侧鳍用于爬行步态控制，以及一个由10mm行星齿轮电机驱动的旋转弹簧尾，实现连续跳跃运动。对尾鳍进行建模和实验表征，确定了25mm的最佳长度以最大化推进力。
AI.result: 实验确定了25mm尾长可产生4N平均推进力（峰值达6N）。在均匀沙土和膨润土粉末中，跳跃始终比爬行产生更高的平均速度，特别是在粘性和颗粒介质上。户外测试（草地、松散沙土、硬地面）表明，在缠绕和颗粒地形上跳跃与在坚实地面爬行相结合，可扩展机器人在真实环境中的操作范围。
AI.conclusion: 受弹涂鱼尾鳍跳跃机制启发的多地形机器人成功实现了跳跃和爬行相结合的运动模式。跳跃在粘性和颗粒介质上比传统爬行更有效，这种混合运动策略显著扩展了机器人在复杂真实环境中的操作能力。

title: Malliavin Calculus for Counterfactual Gradient Estimation in Adaptive Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) recovers the loss function of a forward learner from its observed responses adaptive IRL aims to reconstruct the loss function of a forward learner by passively observing its gradients as it performs reinforcement learning (RL). This paper proposes a novel passive Langevin-based algorithm that achieves adaptive IRL. The key difficulty in adaptive IRL is that the required gradients in the passive algorithm are counterfactual, that is, they are conditioned on events of probability zero under the forward learner's trajectory. Therefore, naive Monte Carlo estimators are prohibitively inefficient, and kernel smoothing, though common, suffers from slow convergence. We overcome this by employing Malliavin calculus to efficiently estimate the required counterfactual gradients. We reformulate the counterfactual conditioning as a ratio of unconditioned expectations involving Malliavin quantities, thus recovering standard estimation rates. We derive the necessary Malliavin derivatives and their adjoint Skorohod integral formulations for a general Langevin structure, and provide a concrete algorithmic approach which exploits these for counterfactual gradient estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Malliavin微积分的被动Langevin算法，用于自适应逆强化学习，通过有效估计反事实梯度来克服传统方法的低效问题。
AI.motivation: 自适应逆强化学习(IRL)旨在通过被动观察前向学习者的梯度来重建其损失函数。主要困难在于所需梯度是反事实的（基于概率为零的事件），传统蒙特卡洛估计效率低下，核平滑方法收敛缓慢。
AI.method: 提出被动Langevin算法，利用Malliavin微积分将反事实条件化为涉及Malliavin量的无条件期望之比，从而获得标准估计速率。推导了一般Langevin结构的Malliavin导数及其伴随Skorohod积分公式，并提供了具体的算法实现。
AI.result: 该方法能够高效估计反事实梯度，克服了传统方法（朴素蒙特卡洛和核平滑）的低效和收敛缓慢问题，实现了自适应逆强化学习。
AI.conclusion: 通过Malliavin微积分方法，成功解决了自适应逆强化学习中的反事实梯度估计难题，为被动观察前向学习者梯度并重建其损失函数提供了有效的算法框架。

title: LESV: Language Embedded Sparse Voxel Fusion for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Understanding
summary: Recent advancements in open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding heavily rely on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to register vision-language features into 3D space. However, we identify two critical limitations in these approaches: the spatial ambiguity arising from unstructured, overlapping Gaussians which necessitates probabilistic feature registration, and the multi-level semantic ambiguity caused by pooling features over object-level masks, which dilutes fine-grained details. To address these challenges, we present a novel framework that leverages Sparse Voxel Rasterization (SVRaster) as a structured, disjoint geometry representation. By regularizing SVRaster with monocular depth and normal priors, we establish a stable geometric foundation. This enables a deterministic, confidence-aware feature registration process and suppresses the semantic bleeding artifact common in 3DGS. Furthermore, we resolve multi-level ambiguity by exploiting the emerging dense alignment properties of foundation model AM-RADIO, avoiding the computational overhead of hierarchical training methods. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on Open Vocabulary 3D Object Retrieval and Point Cloud Understanding benchmarks, particularly excelling on fine-grained queries where registration methods typically fail.

AI.tldr: 提出SVRaster框架解决3DGS在开放词汇3D场景理解中的空间模糊性和多级语义模糊性问题，通过结构化几何表示和确定性特征注册实现更精细的场景理解
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D高斯泼溅的开放词汇3D场景理解方法存在两个关键限制：1) 非结构化重叠高斯分布导致的空间模糊性，需要概率特征注册；2) 基于对象级掩码池化特征导致的多级语义模糊性，稀释了细粒度细节
AI.method: 采用稀疏体素光栅化作为结构化、不相交的几何表示，通过单目深度和法线先验进行正则化，建立稳定几何基础。利用确定性、置信度感知的特征注册过程，并利用基础模型AM-RADIO的密集对齐特性解决多级模糊性，避免分层训练的计算开销
AI.result: 在开放词汇3D对象检索和点云理解基准测试中达到最先进性能，特别是在细粒度查询任务上表现优异，而传统注册方法通常在此类任务上失败
AI.conclusion: SVRaster框架通过结构化几何表示和确定性特征注册，有效解决了3DGS在开放词汇3D场景理解中的空间和语义模糊性问题，实现了更精细的场景理解能力

title: Spatial-Aware Conditioned Fusion for Audio-Visual Navigation
comment: Main paper (6 pages). Accepted for publication by the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)
summary: Audio-visual navigation tasks require agents to locate and navigate toward continuously vocalizing targets using only visual observations and acoustic cues. However, existing methods mainly rely on simple feature concatenation or late fusion, and lack an explicit discrete representation of the target's relative position, which limits learning efficiency and generalization. We propose Spatial-Aware Conditioned Fusion (SACF). SACF first discretizes the target's relative direction and distance from audio-visual cues, predicts their distributions, and encodes them as a compact descriptor for policy conditioning and state modeling. Then, SACF uses audio embeddings and spatial descriptors to generate channel-wise scaling and bias to modulate visual features via conditional linear transformation, producing target-oriented fused representations. SACF improves navigation efficiency with lower computational overhead and generalizes well to unheard target sounds.

AI.tldr: SACF通过离散化目标相对位置并编码为空间描述符，结合条件线性变换调制视觉特征，提升视听导航效率与泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现有视听导航方法主要依赖简单的特征拼接或后期融合，缺乏对目标相对位置的显式离散表示，限制了学习效率和泛化能力
AI.method: SACF首先从视听线索离散化目标的相对方向和距离，预测其分布并编码为紧凑描述符；然后使用音频嵌入和空间描述符生成通道级缩放和偏置，通过条件线性变换调制视觉特征，产生目标导向的融合表示
AI.result: SACF提高了导航效率且计算开销更低，对未听过目标声音具有良好的泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 通过显式离散化目标空间位置并采用条件融合机制，SACF在视听导航任务中实现了更高效的学习和更好的泛化性能

title: ProgressVLA: Progress-Guided Diffusion Policy for Vision-Language Robotic Manipulation
summary: Most existing vision-language-action (VLA) models for robotic manipulation lack progress awareness, typically relying on hand-crafted heuristics for task termination. This limitation is particularly severe in long-horizon tasks involving cascaded sub-goals. In this work, we investigate the estimation and integration of task progress, proposing a novel model named {\textbf \vla}. Our technical contributions are twofold: (1) \emph{robust progress estimation}: We pre-train a progress estimator on large-scale, unsupervised video-text robotic datasets. This estimator achieves a low prediction residual (0.07 on a scale of $[0, 1]$) in simulation and demonstrates zero-shot generalization to unseen real-world samples, and (2) \emph{differentiable progress guidance}: We introduce an inverse dynamics world model that maps predicted action tokens into future latent visual states. These latents are then processed by the progress estimator; by applying a maximal progress regularization, we establish a differentiable pipeline that provides progress-piloted guidance to refine action tokens. Extensive experiments on the CALVIN and LIBERO benchmarks, alongside real-world robot deployment, consistently demonstrate substantial improvements in success rates and generalization over strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出VLA模型，通过预训练进度估计器和可微分进度指导，解决机器人操作任务中缺乏进度感知的问题，显著提升长时程任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型缺乏进度感知能力，通常依赖手工设计的启发式规则进行任务终止判断，这在涉及级联子目标的长时程任务中尤为严重。
AI.method: 1) 鲁棒进度估计：在大规模无监督视频-文本机器人数据集上预训练进度估计器；2) 可微分进度指导：引入逆动力学世界模型，将预测的动作标记映射到未来潜在视觉状态，通过进度估计器处理并应用最大进度正则化，建立可微分管道为动作标记提供进度引导。
AI.result: 进度估计器在模拟中实现低预测残差（0.07，范围[0,1]），对未见过的真实世界样本具有零样本泛化能力。在CALVIN和LIBERO基准测试及真实机器人部署中，相比强基线在成功率和泛化能力方面均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 提出的VLA模型通过集成进度估计和可微分进度指导，有效解决了机器人操作任务中的进度感知问题，在长时程任务中表现出优越性能。

title: Massively Parallel Exact Inference for Hawkes Processes
summary: Multivariate Hawkes processes are a widely used class of self-exciting point processes, but maximum likelihood estimation naively scales as $O(N^2)$ in the number of events. The canonical linear exponential Hawkes process admits a faster $O(N)$ recurrence, but prior work evaluates this recurrence sequentially, without exploiting parallelization on modern GPUs. We show that the Hawkes process intensity can be expressed as a product of sparse transition matrices admitting a linear-time associative multiply, enabling computation via a parallel prefix scan. This yields a simple yet massively parallelizable algorithm for maximum likelihood estimation of linear exponential Hawkes processes. Our method reduces the computational complexity to approximately $O(N/P)$ with $P$ parallel processors, and naturally yields a batching scheme to maintain constant memory usage, avoiding GPU memory constraints. Importantly, it computes the exact likelihood without any additional assumptions or approximations, preserving the simplicity and interpretability of the model. We demonstrate orders-of-magnitude speedups on simulated and real datasets, scaling to thousands of nodes and tens of millions of events, substantially beyond scales reported in prior work. We provide an open-source PyTorch library implementing our optimizations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于并行前缀扫描的线性指数Hawkes过程最大似然估计算法，将计算复杂度从O(N²)降至O(N/P)，实现GPU加速，可处理千万级事件
AI.motivation: 传统多元Hawkes过程最大似然估计计算复杂度为O(N²)，现有线性指数Hawkes过程的O(N)递归算法无法利用GPU并行计算，限制了处理大规模事件数据的能力
AI.method: 将Hawkes过程强度表示为稀疏转移矩阵的乘积，利用线性时间关联乘法，通过并行前缀扫描计算，实现完全并行的最大似然估计算法，支持批处理以保持恒定内存使用
AI.result: 在模拟和真实数据集上实现数量级的加速，可扩展到数千个节点和数千万个事件，远超先前工作规模，提供开源PyTorch库
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种简单而高度并行化的算法，精确计算线性指数Hawkes过程似然，无需额外假设或近似，保持模型简洁性和可解释性，显著扩展了可处理的数据规模

title: GRAZE: Grounded Refinement and Motion-Aware Zero-Shot Event Localization
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, accepted to the CVPR 2026 Workshop on Computer Vision in Sports (CVSports) code: https://github.com/AhsanZaidi12/GRAZE
summary: American football practice generates video at scale, yet the interaction of interest occupies only a brief window of each long, untrimmed clip. Reliable biomechanical analysis, therefore, depends on spatiotemporal localization that identifies both the interacting entities and the onset of contact. We study First Point of Contact (FPOC), defined as the first frame in which a player physically touches a tackle dummy, in unconstrained practice footage with camera motion, clutter, multiple similarly equipped athletes, and rapid pose changes around impact. We present GRAZE, a training-free pipeline for FPOC localization that requires no labeled tackle-contact examples. GRAZE uses Grounding DINO to discover candidate player-dummy interactions, refines them with motion-aware temporal reasoning, and uses SAM2 as an explicit pixel-level verifier of contact rather than relying on detection confidence alone. This separation between candidate discovery and contact confirmation makes the approach robust to cluttered scenes and unstable grounding near impact. On 738 tackle-practice videos, GRAZE produces valid outputs for 97.4% of clips and localizes FPOC within $\pm$ 10 frames on 77.5% of all clips and within $\pm$ 20 frames on 82.7% of all clips. These results show that frame-accurate contact onset localization in real-world practice footage is feasible without task-specific training.

AI.tldr: GRAZE：无需训练、无需标注接触示例的FPOC定位方法，在美式足球训练视频中实现帧级准确的首次接触点定位
AI.motivation: 美式足球训练产生大量视频，但关键交互只占长视频的短暂窗口。可靠的生物力学分析需要时空定位来识别交互实体和接触起始点。现有方法面临相机运动、杂乱场景、多个相似装备运动员以及冲击时快速姿态变化等挑战。
AI.method: GRAZE训练自由流水线：1) 使用Grounding DINO发现候选球员-假人交互；2) 运动感知时序推理精炼候选；3) 使用SAM2作为显式像素级接触验证器，不依赖检测置信度。候选发现与接触确认分离使方法对杂乱场景和冲击附近不稳定接地具有鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在738个擒抱训练视频上：GRAZE对97.4%的片段产生有效输出；77.5%的所有片段中FPOC定位在±10帧内；82.7%的所有片段中FPOC定位在±20帧内。证明无需任务特定训练即可实现真实训练视频中的帧级准确接触起始定位。
AI.conclusion: 在真实世界美式足球训练视频中，无需任务特定训练即可实现帧级准确的首次接触点定位。GRAZE通过分离候选发现与接触确认，对杂乱场景和冲击附近不稳定接地具有鲁棒性，为生物力学分析提供可靠基础。

title: Regularizing Attention Scores with Bootstrapping
summary:
Vision transformers (ViT) rely on attention mechanism to weigh input features, and therefore attention scores have naturally been considered as explanations for its decision-making process. However, attention scores are almost always non-zero, resulting in noisy and diffused attention maps and limiting interpretability. Can we quantify uncertainty measures of attention scores and obtain regularized attention scores? To this end, we consider attention scores of ViT in a statistical framework where independent noise would lead to insignificant yet non-zero scores. Leveraging statistical learning techniques, we introduce the bootstrapping for attention scores which generates a baseline distribution of attention scores by resampling input features. Such a bootstrap distribution is then used to estimate significances and posterior probabilities of attention scores. In natural and medical images, the proposed \emph{Attention Regularization} approach demonstrates a straightforward removal of spurious attention arising from noise, drastically improving shrinkage and sparsity. Quantitative evaluations are conducted using both simulation and real-world datasets. Our study highlights bootstrapping as a practical regularization tool when using attention scores as explanations for ViT.
  Code available: https://github.com/ncchung/AttentionRegularization

AI.tldr: 提出Attention Regularization方法，通过自助法(bootstrapping)对ViT注意力分数进行统计显著性检验，去除噪声产生的虚假注意力，提高注意力图的稀疏性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: ViT的注意力分数通常非零，导致注意力图噪声大、扩散性强，限制了其作为决策过程解释的可解释性。需要量化注意力分数的不确定性并获取正则化的注意力分数。
AI.method: 将ViT注意力分数置于统计框架中，通过自助法对输入特征重采样生成注意力分数的基线分布，利用该分布估计注意力分数的显著性和后验概率，实现注意力正则化。
AI.result: 在自然图像和医学图像上，该方法能有效去除噪声产生的虚假注意力，显著提高注意力图的收缩性和稀疏性。通过模拟和真实数据集进行了定量评估。
AI.conclusion: 自助法可作为实用的正则化工具，用于提升ViT注意力分数作为解释的可信度，为注意力机制提供统计显著性检验框架。

title: Audio Spatially-Guided Fusion for Audio-Visual Navigation
comment: Main paper (6 pages). Accepted for publication by the International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026)
summary: Audio-visual Navigation refers to an agent utilizing visual and auditory information in complex 3D environments to accomplish target localization and path planning, thereby achieving autonomous navigation. The core challenge of this task lies in the following: how the agent can break free from the dependence on training data and achieve autonomous navigation with good generalization performance when facing changes in environments and sound sources. To address this challenge, we propose an Audio Spatially-Guided Fusion for Audio-Visual Navigation method. First, we design an audio spatial feature encoder, which adaptively extracts target-related spatial state information through an audio intensity attention mechanism; based on this, we introduce an Audio Spatial State Guided Fusion (ASGF) to achieve dynamic alignment and adaptive fusion of multimodal features, effectively alleviating noise interference caused by perceptual uncertainty. Experimental results on the Replica and Matterport3D datasets indicate that our method is particularly effective on unheard tasks, demonstrating improved generalization under unknown sound source distributions.

AI.tldr: 提出ASGF方法用于音频-视觉导航，通过音频空间特征编码和引导融合机制，提升在未知声音源分布下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 解决音频-视觉导航中智能体对训练数据的过度依赖问题，使其在面对环境变化和声音源分布变化时仍能保持良好的泛化性能，实现自主导航。
AI.method: 设计音频空间特征编码器，通过音频强度注意力机制自适应提取目标相关的空间状态信息；引入音频空间状态引导融合（ASGF）机制，实现多模态特征的动态对齐和自适应融合，有效缓解感知不确定性带来的噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在Replica和Matterport3D数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法在未听过任务上表现尤为有效，在未知声音源分布下展现出改进的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ASGF方法通过音频空间引导融合机制，有效提升了音频-视觉导航系统在未知环境中的泛化能力，为解决感知不确定性和数据依赖问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: LLM-Enabled Low-Altitude UAV Natural Language Navigation via Signal Temporal Logic Specification Translation and Repair
summary: Natural language (NL) navigation for low-altitude unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) offers an intelligent and convenient solution for low-altitude aerial services by enabling an intuitive interface for non-expert operators. However, deploying this capability in urban environments necessitates the precise grounding of underspecified instructions into safety-critical, dynamically feasible motion plans subject to spatiotemporal constraints. To address this challenge, we propose a unified framework that translates NL instructions into Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications and subsequently synthesizes trajectories via mixed-integer linear programming (MILP). Specifically, to generate executable STL formulas from free-form NL, we develop a reasoning-enhanced large language model (LLM) leveraging chain-of-thought (CoT) supervision and group-relative policy optimization (GRPO), which ensures high syntactic validity and semantic consistency. Furthermore, to resolve infeasibilities induced by stringent logical or spatial requirements, we introduce a specification repair mechanism. This module combines MILP-based diagnosis with LLM-guided semantic reasoning to selectively relax task constraints while strictly enforcing safety guarantees. Extensive simulations and real-world flight experiments demonstrate that the proposed closed-loop framework significantly improves NL-to-STL translation robustness, enabling safe, interpretable, and adaptable UAV navigation in complex scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出一个统一框架，将自然语言指令转换为信号时序逻辑规范，并通过混合整数线性规划合成无人机轨迹，实现城市环境中安全、可解释的无人机导航。
AI.motivation: 自然语言导航为低空无人机提供智能便捷的解决方案，但在城市环境中需要将不明确的指令精确转换为满足时空约束的安全关键运动规划。
AI.method: 开发推理增强的大型语言模型，利用思维链监督和组相对策略优化生成可执行的STL公式；引入规范修复机制，结合MILP诊断和LLM引导的语义推理来选择性放松任务约束。
AI.result: 大量仿真和真实飞行实验表明，该闭环框架显著提高了NL到STL翻译的鲁棒性，实现了复杂场景中安全、可解释和自适应的无人机导航。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一框架成功解决了城市环境中自然语言无人机导航的挑战，通过STL规范翻译和MILP轨迹合成，确保了安全关键约束下的动态可行运动规划。

title: SECURE: Stable Early Collision Understanding via Robust Embeddings in Autonomous Driving
summary: While deep learning has significantly advanced accident anticipation, the robustness of these safety-critical systems against real-world perturbations remains a major challenge. We reveal that state-of-the-art models like CRASH, despite their high performance, exhibit significant instability in predictions and latent representations when faced with minor input perturbations, posing serious reliability risks. To address this, we introduce SECURE - Stable Early Collision Understanding Robust Embeddings, a framework that formally defines and enforces model robustness. SECURE is founded on four key attributes: consistency and stability in both prediction space and latent feature space. We propose a principled training methodology that fine-tunes a baseline model using a multi-objective loss, which minimizes divergence from a reference model and penalizes sensitivity to adversarial perturbations. Experiments on DAD and CCD datasets demonstrate that our approach not only significantly enhances robustness against various perturbations but also improves performance on clean data, achieving new state-of-the-art results.

AI.tldr: SECURE框架通过定义和执行预测空间与特征空间的一致性、稳定性，提升事故预测模型的鲁棒性，在对抗扰动下保持稳定，同时在干净数据上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有事故预测模型（如CRASH）在微小输入扰动下表现出显著的预测和潜在表示不稳定性，这对安全关键系统的可靠性构成严重风险，需要增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出SECURE框架，基于预测空间和潜在特征空间的一致性和稳定性四个关键属性，采用多目标损失函数微调基线模型，最小化与参考模型的差异并惩罚对抗扰动的敏感性。
AI.result: 在DAD和CCD数据集上的实验表明，该方法不仅显著增强了针对各种扰动的鲁棒性，还提高了在干净数据上的性能，取得了新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: SECURE框架通过形式化定义和执行模型鲁棒性，成功解决了事故预测模型在现实扰动下的不稳定性问题，为安全关键系统提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: Development and multi-center evaluation of domain-adapted speech recognition for human-AI teaming in real-world gastrointestinal endoscopy
comment: Under review at npj Digital Medicine
summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) is a critical interface for human-AI interaction in gastrointestinal endoscopy, yet its reliability in real-world clinical settings is limited by domain-specific terminology and complex acoustic conditions. Here, we present EndoASR, a domain-adapted ASR system designed for real-time deployment in endoscopic workflows. We develop a two-stage adaptation strategy based on synthetic endoscopy reports, targeting domain-specific language modeling and noise robustness. In retrospective evaluation across six endoscopists, EndoASR substantially improves both transcription accuracy and clinical usability, reducing character error rate (CER) from 20.52% to 14.14% and increasing medical term accuracy (Med ACC) from 54.30% to 87.59%. In a prospective multi-center study spanning five independent endoscopy centers, EndoASR demonstrates consistent generalization under heterogeneous real-world conditions. Compared with the baseline Paraformer model, CER is reduced from 16.20% to 14.97%, while Med ACC is improved from 61.63% to 84.16%, confirming its robustness in practical deployment scenarios. Notably, EndoASR achieves a real-time factor (RTF) of 0.005, significantly faster than Whisper-large-v3 (RTF 0.055), while maintaining a compact model size of 220M parameters, enabling efficient edge deployment. Furthermore, integration with large language models demonstrates that improved ASR quality directly enhances downstream structured information extraction and clinician-AI interaction. These results demonstrate that domain-adapted ASR can serve as a reliable interface for human-AI teaming in gastrointestinal endoscopy, with consistent performance validated across multi-center real-world clinical settings.

AI.tldr: EndoASR是一个针对胃肠内窥镜领域优化的自动语音识别系统，通过两阶段适应策略显著提升转录准确性和临床可用性，在多中心真实世界环境中验证了其鲁棒性和实时性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ASR系统在胃肠内窥镜临床环境中可靠性有限，主要受限于领域特定术语和复杂声学条件，需要专门优化的ASR接口来支持人机协作。
AI.method: 开发了两阶段适应策略：基于合成内窥镜报告进行领域特定语言建模和噪声鲁棒性优化，构建了EndoASR系统，参数规模为220M，支持边缘部署。
AI.result: 在回顾性评估中，CER从20.52%降至14.14%，Med ACC从54.30%提升至87.59%；前瞻性多中心研究中，CER从16.20%降至14.97%，Med ACC从61.63%提升至84.16%；实时因子为0.005，显著优于Whisper-large-v3。
AI.conclusion: 领域适应的ASR系统可作为胃肠内窥镜中人机协作的可靠接口，在多中心真实临床环境中验证了其一致性能，且改进的ASR质量直接增强了下游结构化信息提取和临床医生-AI交互。

title: Structured Observation Language for Efficient and Generalizable Vision-Language Navigation
summary: Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) requires an embodied agent to navigate complex environments by following natural language instructions, which typically demands tight fusion of visual and language modalities. Existing VLN methods often convert raw images into visual tokens or implicit features, requiring large-scale visual pre-training and suffering from poor generalization under environmental variations (e.g., lighting, texture). To address these issues, we propose SOL-Nav (Structured Observation Language for Navigation), a novel framework that translates egocentric visual observations into compact structured language descriptions for efficient and generalizable navigation. Specifically, we divide RGB-D images into a N*N grid, extract representative semantic, color, and depth information for each grid cell to form structured text, and concatenate this with the language instruction as pure language input to a pre-trained language model (PLM). Experimental results on standard VLN benchmarks (R2R, RxR) and real-world deployments demonstrate that SOL-Nav significantly reduces the model size and training data dependency, fully leverages the reasoning and representation capabilities of PLMs, and achieves strong generalization to unseen environments.

AI.tldr: SOL-Nav将视觉导航任务转化为纯语言任务，通过将RGB-D图像转换为结构化语言描述，与语言指令一起输入预训练语言模型，实现高效且泛化性强的导航。
AI.motivation: 现有VLN方法通常将原始图像转换为视觉标记或隐式特征，需要大规模视觉预训练，且在环境变化（如光照、纹理）下泛化能力差。需要一种更高效、泛化性更强的导航方法。
AI.method: 将RGB-D图像划分为N*N网格，为每个网格单元提取代表性语义、颜色和深度信息，形成结构化文本描述。将此结构化描述与语言指令拼接，作为纯语言输入到预训练语言模型（PLM）中。
AI.result: 在标准VLN基准测试（R2R、RxR）和实际部署中，SOL-Nav显著减少了模型大小和训练数据依赖，充分利用了PLM的推理和表示能力，在未见环境中表现出强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SOL-Nav通过将视觉观察转换为结构化语言，成功将视觉语言导航任务转化为纯语言任务，实现了高效、泛化性强的导航，为VLN领域提供了新的解决方案。

title: Perceptual misalignment of texture representations in convolutional neural networks
summary: Mathematical modeling of visual textures traces back to Julesz's intuition that texture perception in humans is based on local correlations between image features. An influential approach for texture analysis and generation generalizes this notion to linear correlations between the nonlinear features computed by convolutional neural networks (CNNs), compiled into Gram matrices. Given that CNNs are often used as models for the visual system, it is natural to ask whether such "texture representations" spontaneously align with the textures' perceptual content, and in particular whether those CNNs that are regarded as better models for the visual system also possess more human-like texture representations. Here we compare the perceptual content captured by feature correlations computed for a diverse pool of CNNs, and we compare it to the models' perceptual alignment with the mammalian visual system as measured by Brain-Score. Surprisingly, we find that there is no connection between conventional measures of CNN quality as a model of the visual system and its alignment with human texture perception. We conclude that texture perception involves mechanisms that are distinct from those that are commonly modeled using approaches based on CNNs trained on object recognition, possibly depending on the integration of contextual information.

AI.tldr: 研究发现CNN在物体识别任务上的表现与其纹理感知能力与人类对齐程度无关，表明纹理感知机制与CNN建模的视觉系统机制不同
AI.motivation: 探究CNN作为视觉系统模型时，其纹理表示是否与人类纹理感知对齐，以及更好的视觉系统模型是否具有更接近人类的纹理表示
AI.method: 比较不同CNN模型的特征相关性（Gram矩阵）捕捉的纹理感知内容，并与Brain-Score测量的模型与哺乳动物视觉系统对齐程度进行对比
AI.result: 令人惊讶的是，CNN作为视觉系统模型的传统质量指标与其与人类纹理感知的对齐程度之间没有关联
AI.conclusion: 纹理感知涉及与基于物体识别训练的CNN建模机制不同的机制，可能依赖于上下文信息的整合

title: Learning Smooth and Robust Space Robotic Manipulation of Dynamic Target via Inter-frame Correlation
summary: On-orbit servicing represents a critical frontier in future aerospace engineering, with the manipulation of dynamic non-cooperative targets serving as a key technology. In microgravity environments, objects are typically free-floating, lacking the support and frictional constraints found on Earth, which significantly escalates the complexity of tasks involving space robotic manipulation. Conventional planning and control-based methods are primarily limited to known, static scenarios and lack real-time responsiveness. To achieve precise robotic manipulation of dynamic targets in unknown and unstructured space environments, this letter proposes a data-driven space robotic manipulation approach that integrates historical temporal information and inter-frame correlation mechanisms. By exploiting the temporal correlation between historical and current frames, the system can effectively capture motion features within the scene, thereby producing stable and smooth manipulation trajectories for dynamic targets. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, we developed a ground-based experimental platform consisting of a PIPER X robotic arm and a dual-axis linear stage, which accurately simulates micro-gravity free-floating motion in a 2D plane.

AI.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动的空间机器人操纵方法，通过整合历史时间信息和帧间相关机制，实现对动态非合作目标的精确操纵
AI.motivation: 在轨服务是未来航空航天工程的关键前沿，动态非合作目标的操纵是关键技术。微重力环境中物体自由漂浮，缺乏地面支撑和摩擦约束，显著增加了空间机器人操纵任务的复杂性。传统规划控制方法主要局限于已知静态场景，缺乏实时响应能力。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的空间机器人操纵方法，整合历史时间信息和帧间相关机制。通过利用历史帧与当前帧之间的时间相关性，系统能有效捕捉场景中的运动特征，从而为动态目标生成稳定平滑的操纵轨迹。
AI.result: 开发了基于地面的实验平台，包含PIPER X机械臂和双轴线性平台，精确模拟二维平面中的微重力自由漂浮运动，用于验证所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够实现对未知非结构化空间环境中动态目标的精确机器人操纵，解决了传统方法在实时响应和动态场景适应性方面的局限性。

title: Evolutionary Multi-Objective Fusion of Deepfake Speech Detectors
summary: While deepfake speech detectors built on large self-supervised learning (SSL) models achieve high accuracy, employing standard ensemble fusion to further enhance robustness often results in oversized systems with diminishing returns. To address this, we propose an evolutionary multi-objective score fusion framework that jointly minimizes detection error and system complexity. We explore two encodings optimized by NSGA-II: binary-coded detector selection for score averaging and a real-valued scheme that optimizes detector weights for a weighted sum. Experiments on the ASVspoof 5 dataset with 36 SSL-based detectors show that the obtained Pareto fronts outperform simple averaging and logistic regression baselines. The real-valued variant achieves 2.37% EER (0.0684 minDCF) and identifies configurations that match state-of-the-art performance while significantly reducing system complexity, requiring only half the parameters. Our method also provides a diverse set of trade-off solutions, enabling deployment choices that balance accuracy and computational cost.

AI.tldr: 提出进化多目标分数融合框架，在深度伪造语音检测中联合优化检测误差和系统复杂度，相比标准集成方法实现更优的精度-复杂度权衡
AI.motivation: 基于大型自监督学习模型的深度伪造语音检测器虽然精度高，但标准集成融合方法通常导致系统过大且收益递减，需要更高效的融合策略
AI.method: 提出进化多目标分数融合框架，采用NSGA-II优化两种编码方案：二进制编码的检测器选择用于分数平均，实值编码优化检测器权重用于加权求和
AI.result: 在ASVspoof 5数据集上，使用36个基于SSL的检测器，该方法获得的Pareto前沿优于简单平均和逻辑回归基线，实值变体达到2.37% EER和0.0684 minDCF，仅需一半参数即可匹配最先进性能
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供多样化的权衡解决方案，使部署选择能够在精度和计算成本之间取得平衡，显著降低系统复杂度同时保持高性能

title: Scale over Preference: The Impact of AI-Generated Content on Online Content Ecology
summary: The rapid proliferation of Artificial Intelligence-Generated Content (AIGC) is fundamentally restructuring online content ecologies, necessitating a rigorous examination of its behavioral and distributional implications. Leveraging a comprehensive longitudinal dataset comprising tens of millions of users from a leading Chinese video-sharing platform, this study elucidated the distinct creation and consumption behaviors characterizing AIGC versus Human-Generated Content (HGC). We identified a prevalent scale-over-preference dynamic, wherein AIGC creators achieve aggregate engagement comparable to HGC creators through high-volume production, despite a marked consumer preference for HGC. Deeper analysis uncovered the ability of the algorithmic content distribution mechanism in moderating these competing interests regarding AIGC. These findings advocated for the implementation of AIGC-sensitive distribution algorithms and precise governance frameworks to ensure the long-term health of the online content platforms.

AI.tldr: 研究基于中国视频平台数据，发现AIGC通过高产量获得与HGC相当的总体参与度，但消费者更偏好HGC，算法分发机制能调节这种矛盾。
AI.motivation: AIGC的快速普及正在重构在线内容生态，需要系统研究其行为特征和分发影响，为平台治理提供依据。
AI.method: 利用中国领先视频分享平台的纵向数据集，包含数千万用户，对比分析AIGC与HGC的创作和消费行为特征。
AI.result: 发现"规模压倒偏好"现象：AIGC创作者通过高产获得与HGC相当的总体参与度，但消费者明显更偏好HGC；算法分发机制能调节这种矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 建议实施AIGC敏感的分发算法和精准治理框架，以确保在线内容平台的长期健康发展。

title: S3KF: Spherical State-Space Kalman Filtering for Panoramic 3D Multi-Object Tracking
summary: Panoramic multi-object tracking is important for industrial safety monitoring, wide-area robotic perception, and infrastructure-light deployment in large workspaces. In these settings, the sensing system must provide full-surround coverage, metric geometric cues, and stable target association under wide field-of-view distortion and occlusion. Existing image-plane trackers are tightly coupled to the camera projection and become unreliable in panoramic imagery, while conventional Euclidean 3D formulations introduce redundant directional parameters and do not naturally unify angular, scale, and depth estimation. In this paper, we present $\mathbf{S^3KF}$, a panoramic 3D multi-object tracking framework built on a motorized rotating LiDAR and a quad-fisheye camera rig. The key idea is a geometry-consistent state representation on the unit sphere $\mathbb{S}^2$, where object bearing is modeled by a two-degree-of-freedom tangent-plane parameterization and jointly estimated with box scale and depth dynamics. Based on this state, we derive an extended spherical Kalman filtering pipeline that fuses panoramic camera detections with LiDAR depth observations for multimodal tracking. We further establish a map-based ground-truth generation pipeline using wearable localization devices registered to a shared global LiDAR map, enabling quantitative evaluation without motion-capture infrastructure. Experiments on self-collected real-world sequences show decimeter-level planar tracking accuracy, improved identity continuity over a 2D panoramic baseline in dynamic scenes, and real-time onboard operation on a Jetson AGX Orin platform. These results indicate that the proposed framework is a practical solution for panoramic perception and industrial-scale multi-object tracking.The project page can be found at https://kafeiyin00.github.io/S3KF/.

AI.tldr: 提出S³KF框架，基于旋转LiDAR和四鱼眼相机实现全景3D多目标跟踪，采用球面几何一致状态表示和扩展球面卡尔曼滤波
AI.motivation: 现有图像平面跟踪器在全景图像中不可靠，传统欧几里得3D表示引入冗余方向参数，无法自然统一角度、尺度和深度估计，需要适用于工业安全监控和大范围机器人感知的全景多目标跟踪解决方案
AI.method: 使用电机驱动旋转LiDAR和四鱼眼相机系统；在单位球面S²上建立几何一致状态表示，采用两自由度切平面参数化建模目标方位，联合估计边界框尺度和深度动态；推导扩展球面卡尔曼滤波管道，融合全景相机检测和LiDAR深度观测；建立基于地图的地面真值生成管道
AI.result: 在自采集的真实世界序列上实现分米级平面跟踪精度，在动态场景中相比2D全景基线有更好的身份连续性，在Jetson AGX Orin平台上实现实时板载操作
AI.conclusion: S³KF框架是全景感知和工业规模多目标跟踪的实用解决方案，通过球面几何表示和扩展卡尔曼滤波有效解决了全景跟踪中的几何一致性和多模态融合问题

title: Model Merging via Data-Free Covariance Estimation
summary: Model merging provides a way of cheaply combining individual models to produce a model that inherits each individual's capabilities. While some merging methods can approach the performance of multitask training, they are often heuristically motivated and lack theoretical justification. A principled alternative is to pose model merging as a layer-wise optimization problem that directly minimizes interference between tasks. However, this formulation requires estimating per-layer covariance matrices from data, which may not be available when performing merging. In contrast, many of the heuristically-motivated methods do not require auxiliary data, making them practically advantageous. In this work, we revisit the interference minimization framework and show that, under certain conditions, covariance matrices can be estimated directly from difference matrices, eliminating the need for data while also reducing computational costs. We validate our approach across vision and language benchmarks on models ranging from 86M parameters to 7B parameters, outperforming previous data-free state-of-the-art merging methods

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需数据即可估计协方差矩阵的模型融合方法，通过差异矩阵直接估计协方差，在视觉和语言基准测试中优于现有无数据融合方法
AI.motivation: 现有模型融合方法存在理论缺陷：基于干扰最小化的原则性方法需要数据来估计协方差矩阵，而无需数据的启发式方法缺乏理论依据。需要一种既无需数据又有理论保证的融合方法
AI.method: 重新审视干扰最小化框架，证明在特定条件下可以直接从差异矩阵估计协方差矩阵，无需辅助数据，同时降低计算成本
AI.result: 在从8600万到70亿参数的视觉和语言模型基准测试中，该方法优于先前最先进的无数据融合方法
AI.conclusion: 通过从差异矩阵直接估计协方差矩阵，实现了无需数据且具有理论保证的模型融合，在性能和实用性上超越了现有方法

title: Copilot-Assisted Second-Thought Framework for Brain-to-Robot Hand Motion Decoding
summary: Motor kinematics prediction (MKP) from electroencephalography (EEG) is an important research area for developing movement-related brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). While traditional methods often rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) or recurrent neural networks (RNNs), Transformer-based models have shown strong ability in modeling long sequential EEG data. In this study, we propose a CNN-attention hybrid model for decoding hand kinematics from EEG during grasp-and-lift tasks, achieving strong performance in within-subject experiments. We further extend this approach to EEG-EMG multimodal decoding, which yields substantially improved results. Within-subject tests achieve PCC values of 0.9854, 0.9946, and 0.9065 for the X, Y, and Z axes, respectively, computed on the midpoint trajectory between the thumb and index finger, while cross-subject tests result in 0.9643, 0.9795, and 0.5852. The decoded trajectories from both modalities are then used to control a Franka Panda robotic arm in a MuJoCo simulation. To enhance trajectory fidelity, we introduce a copilot framework that filters low-confidence decoded points using a motion-state-aware critic within a finite-state machine. This post-processing step improves the overall within-subject PCC of EEG-only decoding to 0.93 while excluding fewer than 20% of the data points.

AI.tldr: 提出CNN-注意力混合模型用于从EEG解码手部运动学，并在抓握任务中实现高性能；进一步扩展到EEG-EMG多模态解码，显著提升结果；引入副驾驶框架通过运动状态感知批评器过滤低置信度解码点，提高轨迹保真度。
AI.motivation: 从脑电图（EEG）解码运动学对于开发运动相关脑机接口（BCIs）至关重要。传统方法主要依赖CNN或RNN，而Transformer模型在处理长序列EEG数据方面表现出色，但需要更高效的方法来解码手部运动学，特别是在抓握任务中。
AI.method: 1. 提出CNN-注意力混合模型用于从EEG解码手部运动学；2. 扩展到EEG-EMG多模态解码；3. 引入副驾驶框架，使用有限状态机内的运动状态感知批评器过滤低置信度解码点；4. 在MuJoCo模拟中使用解码轨迹控制Franka Panda机械臂。
AI.result: 1. 被试内测试：X、Y、Z轴的PCC值分别为0.9854、0.9946、0.9065；2. 被试间测试：PCC值分别为0.9643、0.9795、0.5852；3. 副驾驶框架后处理将EEG-only解码的总体被试内PCC提升至0.93，同时排除少于20%的数据点。
AI.conclusion: CNN-注意力混合模型在EEG运动学解码中表现优异，EEG-EMG多模态解码进一步显著提升性能。副驾驶框架通过过滤低置信度点有效提高轨迹保真度，为脑机接口控制机械臂提供了实用解决方案。

title: D-SPEAR: Dual-Stream Prioritized Experience Adaptive Replay for Stable Reinforcement Learning in Robotic Manipulation
comment: Accepted at IEEE 11th International Conference on Control and Robotics Engineering (ICCRE 2026)
summary: Robotic manipulation remains challenging for reinforcement learning due to contact-rich dynamics, long horizons, and training instability. Although off-policy actor-critic algorithms such as SAC and TD3 perform well in simulation, they often suffer from policy oscillations and performance collapse in realistic settings, partly due to experience replay strategies that ignore the differing data requirements of the actor and the critic. We propose D-SPEAR: Dual-Stream Prioritized Experience Adaptive Replay, a replay framework that decouples actor and critic sampling while maintaining a shared replay buffer. The critic leverages prioritized replay for efficient value learning, whereas the actor is updated using low-error transitions to stabilize policy optimization. An adaptive anchor mechanism balances uniform and prioritized sampling based on the coefficient of variation of TD errors, and a Huber-based critic objective further improves robustness under heterogeneous reward scales. We evaluate D-SPEAR on challenging robotic manipulation tasks from the robosuite benchmark, including Block-Lifting and Door-Opening. Results demonstrate that D-SPEAR consistently outperforms strong off-policy baselines, including SAC, TD3, and DDPG, in both final performance and training stability, with ablation studies confirming the complementary roles of the actorside and critic-side replay streams.

AI.tldr: D-SPEAR：一种双流优先经验自适应回放框架，通过解耦actor和critic的采样来提升机器人操作任务的强化学习性能
AI.motivation: 现有off-policy actor-critic算法（如SAC、TD3）在机器人操作任务中常出现策略振荡和性能崩溃问题，部分原因是经验回放策略忽略了actor和critic不同的数据需求
AI.method: 提出D-SPEAR框架：1）解耦actor和critic采样但共享回放缓冲区；2）critic使用优先回放进行高效价值学习；3）actor使用低误差转移稳定策略优化；4）自适应锚机制基于TD误差变异系数平衡均匀和优先采样；5）Huber-based critic目标提升异构奖励尺度下的鲁棒性
AI.result: 在robosuite基准的Block-Lifting和Door-Opening等挑战性机器人操作任务上，D-SPEAR在最终性能和训练稳定性方面均优于SAC、TD3、DDPG等强基线方法
AI.conclusion: D-SPEAR通过解耦actor和critic的采样需求，结合优先回放和自适应机制，有效解决了机器人操作任务中强化学习的训练不稳定问题，消融研究证实了actor侧和critic侧回放流的互补作用

title: Forecasting Supply Chain Disruptions with Foresight Learning
summary:
Anticipating supply chain disruptions before they materialize is a core challenge for firms and policymakers alike. A key difficulty is learning to reason reliably about infrequent, high-impact events from noisy and unstructured inputs - a setting where general-purpose models struggle without task-specific adaptation. We introduce an end-to-end framework that trains LLMs to produce calibrated probabilistic forecasts using realized disruption outcomes as supervision. The resulting model substantially outperforms strong baselines - including GPT-5 - on accuracy, calibration, and precision. We also show that training induces more structured and reliable probabilistic reasoning without explicit prompting. These results suggest a general pathway for training domain-specific forecasting models that produce decision-ready signals. To support transparency we open-source the evaluation dataset used in this study.
  Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/LightningRodLabs/supply-chain-predictions

AI.tldr: 提出端到端框架训练LLM生成校准概率预测，显著优于GPT-5等基线，在供应链中断预测任务中实现更结构化可靠的推理
AI.motivation: 预测供应链中断是企业和政策制定者的核心挑战，但通用模型难以从噪声和非结构化输入中可靠推理低频高影响事件，需要任务特定适应
AI.method: 引入端到端框架，使用已实现中断结果作为监督训练LLM生成校准概率预测，无需显式提示即可诱导结构化概率推理
AI.result: 模型在准确性、校准性和精确度上显著优于GPT-5等强基线，训练诱导出更结构化可靠的概率推理，开源评估数据集支持透明度
AI.conclusion: 为训练领域特定预测模型提供通用路径，可产生决策就绪信号，支持供应链中断预测等实际应用

title: LAtent Phase Inference from Short time sequences using SHallow REcurrent Decoders (LAPIS-SHRED)
summary: Reconstructing full spatio-temporal dynamics from sparse observations in both space and time remains a central challenge in complex systems, as measurements can be spatially incomplete and can be also limited to narrow temporal windows. Yet approximating the complete spatio-temporal trajectory is essential for mechanistic insight and understanding, model calibration, and operational decision-making. We introduce LAPIS-SHRED (LAtent Phase Inference from Short time sequence using SHallow REcurrent Decoders), a modular architecture that reconstructs and/or forecasts complete spatiotemporal dynamics from sparse sensor observations confined to short temporal windows. LAPIS-SHRED operates through a three-stage pipeline: (i) a SHRED model is pre-trained entirely on simulation data to map sensor time-histories into a structured latent space, (ii) a temporal sequence model, trained on simulation-derived latent trajectories, learns to propagate latent states forward or backward in time to span unobserved temporal regions from short observational time windows, and (iii) at deployment, only a short observation window of hyper-sparse sensor measurements from the true system is provided, from which the frozen SHRED model and the temporal model jointly reconstruct or forecast the complete spatiotemporal trajectory. The framework supports bidirectional inference, inherits data assimilation and multiscale reconstruction capabilities from its modular structure, and accommodates extreme observational constraints including single-frame terminal inputs. We evaluate LAPIS-SHRED on six experiments spanning complex spatio-temporal physics: turbulent flows, multiscale propulsion physics, volatile combustion transients, and satellite-derived environmental fields, highlighting a lightweight, modular architecture suited for operational settings where observation is constrained by physical or logistical limitations.

AI.tldr: LAPIS-SHRED：一种从短时稀疏传感器观测中重建完整时空动态的模块化架构，通过预训练模拟数据、学习潜在空间传播，实现双向推理和多尺度重建。
AI.motivation: 从空间和时间上都稀疏的观测中重建完整的时空动态是复杂系统研究的核心挑战，这对于机制理解、模型校准和操作决策至关重要。现有方法难以处理空间不完整且时间窗口狭窄的观测数据。
AI.method: 采用三阶段模块化架构：1) 在模拟数据上预训练SHRED模型，将传感器时间序列映射到结构化潜在空间；2) 训练时序模型学习在潜在空间中向前或向后传播状态，以覆盖未观测的时间区域；3) 部署时，仅需提供真实系统的短时超稀疏传感器测量，冻结的SHRED模型和时序模型联合重建或预测完整时空轨迹。
AI.result: 在六个复杂时空物理实验中验证了有效性，包括湍流、多尺度推进物理、挥发性燃烧瞬变和卫星环境场等场景。该架构支持双向推理，继承数据同化和多尺度重建能力，并能处理极端观测约束（如单帧终端输入）。
AI.conclusion: LAPIS-SHRED提供了一种轻量级、模块化的解决方案，适用于物理或后勤限制导致观测受限的操作环境，能够从短时稀疏观测中有效重建完整时空动态。

title: ContextBudget: Budget-Aware Context Management for Long-Horizon Search Agents
summary: LLM-based agents show strong potential for long-horizon reasoning, yet their context size is limited by deployment factors (e.g., memory, latency, and cost), yielding a constrained context budget. As interaction histories grow, this induces a trade-off between retaining past information and staying within the context limit. To address this challenge, we propose Budget-Aware Context Management (BACM), which formulates context management as a sequential decision problem with a context budget constraint. It enables agents to assess the available budget before incorporating new observations and decide when and how much of the interaction history to compress. We further develop BACM-RL, an end-to-end curriculum-based reinforcement learning approach that learns compression strategies under varying context budgets. Experiments on compositional multi-objective QA and long-horizon web browsing benchmarks show that BACM-RL consistently outperforms prior methods across model scales and task complexities, achieving over $1.6\times$ gains over strong baselines in high-complexity settings, while maintaining strong advantages as budgets shrink, where most methods exhibit a downward performance trend.

AI.tldr: BACM-RL：一种基于强化学习的上下文预算感知管理框架，用于解决LLM智能体在长时程推理中的上下文限制问题
AI.motivation: LLM智能体在长时程推理中表现出强大潜力，但部署因素（内存、延迟、成本）限制了其上下文大小，形成了有限的上下文预算。随着交互历史的增长，需要在保留历史信息和遵守上下文限制之间做出权衡。
AI.method: 提出预算感知上下文管理（BACM），将上下文管理形式化为具有上下文预算约束的顺序决策问题。开发了BACM-RL，一种端到端的基于课程的强化学习方法，学习在不同上下文预算下的压缩策略。
AI.result: 在组合多目标QA和长时程网页浏览基准测试中，BACM-RL在不同模型规模和任务复杂度下始终优于先前方法，在高复杂度设置中实现了超过1.6倍的性能提升。当预算缩减时，大多数方法性能下降，而BACM-RL仍保持显著优势。
AI.conclusion: BACM-RL通过将上下文管理形式化为顺序决策问题，并采用强化学习优化压缩策略，有效解决了LLM智能体在有限上下文预算下的长时程推理挑战，在各种预算条件下都表现出优越性能。

title: Where-to-Learn: Analytical Policy Gradient Directed Exploration for On-Policy Robotic Reinforcement Learning
summary: On-policy reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have demonstrated great potential in robotic control, where effective exploration is crucial for efficient and high-quality policy learning. However, how to encourage the agent to explore the better trajectories efficiently remains a challenge. Most existing methods incentivize exploration by maximizing the policy entropy or encouraging novel state visiting regardless of the potential state value. We propose a new form of directed exploration that uses analytical policy gradients from a differentiable dynamics model to inject task-aware, physics-guided guidance, thereby steering the agent towards high-reward regions for accelerated and more effective policy learning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于可微分动力学模型的定向探索方法，通过分析性策略梯度引导智能体向高奖励区域探索，加速策略学习
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习探索方法（如最大化策略熵或鼓励访问新状态）缺乏任务导向性，无法高效引导智能体探索高价值区域，限制了策略学习的效率和质量
AI.method: 提出一种定向探索方法，利用可微分动力学模型的分析性策略梯度，注入任务感知、物理引导的指导，将智能体引导至高奖励区域
AI.result: 该方法能够加速策略学习并提高学习效果，相比传统探索方法能更有效地发现高质量轨迹
AI.conclusion: 通过可微分动力学模型的分析性策略梯度实现定向探索，为机器人控制中的强化学习提供了更高效、任务感知的探索机制

title: TRACE: High-Fidelity 3D Scene Editing via Tangible Reconstruction and Geometry-Aligned Contextual Video Masking
summary: We present TRACE, a mesh-guided 3DGS editing framework that achieves automated, high-fidelity scene transformation. By anchoring video diffusion with explicit 3D geometry, TRACE uniquely enables fine-grained, part-level manipulatio--such as local pose shifting or component replacemen--while preserving the structural integrity of the central subject, a capability largely absent in existing editing methods. Our approach comprises three key stages: (1) Multi-view 3D-Anchor Synthesis, which leverages a sparse-view editor trained on our MV-TRACE datase--the first multi-view consistent dataset dedicated to scene-coherent object addition and modificatio--to generate spatially consistent 3D-anchors; (2) Tangible Geometry Anchoring (TGA), which ensures precise spatial synchronization between inserted meshes and the 3DGS scene via two-phase registration; and (3) Contextual Video Masking (CVM), which integrates 3D projections into an autoregressive video pipeline to achieve temporally stable, physically-grounded rendering. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TRACE consistently outperforms existing methods especially in editing versatility and structural integrity.

AI.tldr: TRACE是一个基于网格引导的3D高斯泼溅编辑框架，通过显式3D几何锚定实现自动化、高保真的场景变换，支持局部姿态调整和组件替换等细粒度编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有3D编辑方法缺乏对中央主体结构完整性的保护能力，难以实现局部、细粒度的场景变换。需要一种能够保持主体结构完整性的自动化编辑框架。
AI.method: 采用三阶段方法：1) 多视角3D锚点合成，利用MV-TRACE数据集训练稀疏视角编辑器生成空间一致的3D锚点；2) 有形几何锚定，通过两阶段配准确保插入网格与3DGS场景的精确空间同步；3) 上下文视频掩码，将3D投影集成到自回归视频管道中实现时间稳定、物理基础的渲染。
AI.result: TRACE在编辑多样性和结构完整性方面显著优于现有方法，能够实现局部姿态调整、组件替换等细粒度编辑，同时保持中央主体的结构完整性。
AI.conclusion: TRACE通过显式3D几何锚定和网格引导，实现了自动化、高保真的3D场景编辑，填补了现有方法在局部细粒度编辑和结构完整性保护方面的空白。

title: Ontology-Aware Design Patterns for Clinical AI Systems: Translating Reification Theory into Software Architecture
comment: 7 design patterns, 3 tables, 1 figure, arXiv cs.AI preprint
summary: Clinical AI systems routinely train on health data structurally distorted by documentation workflows, billing incentives, and terminology fragmentation. Prior work has characterised the mechanisms of this distortion: the three-forces model of documentary enactment, the reification feedback loop through which AI may amplify coding artefacts, and terminology governance failures that allow semantic drift to accumulate. Yet translating these insights into implementable software architecture remains an open problem. This paper proposes seven ontology-aware design patterns in Gang-of-Four pattern language for building clinical AI pipelines resilient to ontological distortion. The patterns address data ingestion validation (Ontological Checkpoint), low-frequency signal preservation (Dormancy-Aware Pipeline), continuous drift monitoring (Drift Sentinel), parallel representation maintenance (Dual-Ontology Layer), feedback loop interruption (Reification Circuit Breaker), terminology evolution management (Terminology Version Gate), and pluggable regulatory compliance (Regulatory Compliance Adapter). Each pattern is specified with Problem, Forces, Solution, Consequences, Known Uses, and Related Patterns. We illustrate their composition in a reference architecture for a primary care AI system and provide a walkthrough tracing all seven patterns through a diabetes risk prediction scenario. This paper does not report empirical validation; it offers a design vocabulary grounded in theoretical analysis, subject to future evaluation in production systems. Three patterns have partial precedent in existing systems; the remaining four have not been formally described. Limitations include the absence of runtime benchmarks and restriction to the German and EU regulatory context.

AI.tldr: 提出七种面向临床AI系统的本体感知设计模式，用于构建能够抵抗本体扭曲的AI管道，包括数据验证、信号保留、漂移监控等模式，并提供了参考架构和糖尿病风险预测案例说明。
AI.motivation: 临床AI系统训练数据因文档工作流、计费激励和术语碎片化而存在结构性扭曲，现有理论分析（如三力模型、具体化反馈循环）尚未转化为可实施的软件架构，需要解决这一转化问题。
AI.method: 采用Gang-of-Four模式语言提出七种本体感知设计模式：本体检查点、休眠感知管道、漂移哨兵、双本体层、具体化断路器、术语版本门、监管合规适配器。每种模式包含问题、力量、解决方案、后果、已知用途和相关模式等规范，并通过初级保健AI系统参考架构和糖尿病风险预测场景进行说明。
AI.result: 建立了七种设计模式的完整规范，其中三种在现有系统中有部分先例，四种为首次正式描述。提供了可组合的参考架构，展示了模式在具体临床场景中的应用方式。但未进行实证验证，缺乏运行时基准测试，且仅限于德国和欧盟监管环境。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为构建抗本体扭曲的临床AI系统提供了基于理论分析的设计词汇和架构模式，填补了理论洞察到可实施软件架构之间的转化空白，为未来生产系统评估奠定了基础。

title: MetaTune: Adjoint-based Meta-tuning via Robotic Differentiable Dynamics
summary: Disturbance observer-based control has shown promise in robustifying robotic systems against uncertainties. However, tuning such systems remains challenging due to the strong coupling between controller gains and observer parameters. In this work, we propose MetaTune, a unified framework for joint auto-tuning of feedback controllers and disturbance observers through differentiable closed-loop meta-learning. MetaTune integrates a portable neural policy with physics-informed gradients derived from differentiable system dynamics, enabling adaptive gain across tasks and operating conditions. We develop an adjoint method that efficiently computes the meta-gradients with respect to adaptive gains backward in time to directly minimize the cost-to-go. Compared to existing forward methods, our approach reduces the computational complexity to be linear in the data horizon. Experimental results on quadrotor control show that MetaTune achieves consistent improvements over state-of-the-art differentiable tuning methods while reducing gradient computation time by more than 50 percent. In high-fidelity PX4-Gazebo hardware-in-the-loop simulation, the learned adaptive policy yields 15-20 percent average tracking error reduction at aggressive flight speeds and up to 40 percent improvement under strong disturbances, while demonstrating zero-shot sim-to-sim transfer without fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: MetaTune：基于可微分闭环元学习的统一框架，用于联合自动调优反馈控制器和扰动观测器，通过便携式神经策略和物理信息梯度实现跨任务和工况的自适应增益调节。
AI.motivation: 基于扰动观测器的控制在增强机器人系统鲁棒性方面表现出潜力，但由于控制器增益和观测器参数之间的强耦合，这类系统的调优仍然具有挑战性。需要一种能够联合自动调优反馈控制器和扰动观测器的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出MetaTune框架，通过可微分闭环元学习实现反馈控制器和扰动观测器的联合自动调优。框架集成便携式神经策略和从可微分系统动力学导出的物理信息梯度，实现跨任务和工况的自适应增益调节。开发伴随方法，通过时间反向传播高效计算关于自适应增益的元梯度，直接最小化代价函数。相比现有前向方法，将计算复杂度降低到与数据时域呈线性关系。
AI.result: 在四旋翼控制实验中，MetaTune相比最先进的可微分调优方法实现了持续改进，同时将梯度计算时间减少50%以上。在高保真PX4-Gazebo硬件在环仿真中，学习到的自适应策略在激进飞行速度下平均跟踪误差减少15-20%，在强扰动下改进高达40%，同时展示了无需微调的零样本仿真到仿真迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: MetaTune为基于扰动观测器的控制系统提供了一种高效的联合自动调优框架，通过可微分闭环元学习和伴随方法实现了计算效率的提升和性能的显著改进，展示了在实际机器人控制任务中的有效性和迁移能力。

title: Descending into the Modular Bootstrap
comment: 57 pages, 23 figures, 4 tables; code available at http://github.com/jdthaler/modular-bootstrap
summary: In this paper, we attempt to explore the landscape of two-dimensional conformal field theories (2d CFTs) by efficiently searching for numerical solutions to the modular bootstrap equation using machine-learning-style optimization. The torus partition function of a 2d CFT is fixed by the spectrum of its primary operators and its chiral algebra, which we take to be the Virasoro algebra with $c>1$. We translate the requirement that this partition function is modular invariant into a loss function, which we then minimize to identify possible primary spectra. Our approach involves two technical innovations that facilitate finding reliable candidate CFTs. The first is a strategy to estimate the uncertainty associated with truncating the spectrum to the lowest dimension operators. The second is the use of a new singular-value-based optimizer (Sven) that is more effective than gradient descent at navigating the hierarchical structure of the loss landscape. We numerically construct candidate truncated CFT partition functions with central charges between 1 and $\frac{8}{7}$, a range devoid of known examples, and argue that these candidates likely come from a continuous space of modular bootstrap solutions. We also provide evidence for a more stringent constraint on the spectral gap near $c = 1$ than the existing bound of $Δ_{\rm gap} \le \frac{c}{6} + \frac{1}{3}$.

AI.tldr: 使用机器学习优化方法搜索二维共形场论的数值解，通过构建损失函数最小化实现模不变性，在c=1到8/7范围内发现候选连续解空间
AI.motivation: 探索二维共形场论（2d CFTs）的景观，特别是在中心荷c>1且缺乏已知例子的区域（c=1到8/7），寻找可能的理论解
AI.method: 1. 将模不变性要求转化为损失函数；2. 开发谱截断不确定性估计策略；3. 使用基于奇异值的新优化器（Sven）处理损失函数的层次结构；4. 数值构造截断的CFT配分函数
AI.result: 在c=1到8/7范围内成功构造了候选截断CFT配分函数，发现这些候选解可能来自连续的模自举解空间，并提供了在c=1附近谱隙更严格约束的证据
AI.conclusion: 机器学习优化方法能有效探索CFT解空间，在缺乏已知理论的区域发现了可能的连续解，为理解二维共形场论的全景提供了新视角

title: CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based evolution is a promising approach for open-ended discovery, where progress requires sustained search and knowledge accumulation. Existing methods still rely heavily on fixed heuristics and hard-coded exploration rules, which limit the autonomy of LLM agents. We present CORAL, the first framework for autonomous multi-agent evolution on open-ended problems. CORAL replaces rigid control with long-running agents that explore, reflect, and collaborate through shared persistent memory, asynchronous multi-agent execution, and heartbeat-based interventions. It also provides practical safeguards, including isolated workspaces, evaluator separation, resource management, and agent session and health management. Evaluated on diverse mathematical, algorithmic, and systems optimization tasks, CORAL sets new state-of-the-art results on 10 tasks, achieving 3-10 times higher improvement rates with far fewer evaluations than fixed evolutionary search baselines across tasks. On Anthropic's kernel engineering task, four co-evolving agents improve the best known score from 1363 to 1103 cycles. Mechanistic analyses further show how these gains arise from knowledge reuse and multi-agent exploration and communication. Together, these results suggest that greater agent autonomy and multi-agent evolution can substantially improve open-ended discovery. Code is available at https://github.com/Human-Agent-Society/CORAL.

AI.tldr: CORAL是一个用于开放性问题自主多智能体进化的框架，通过持久记忆、异步执行和心跳干预实现智能体自主探索、反思和协作，在多种任务上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的进化方法主要依赖固定启发式和硬编码探索规则，限制了智能体的自主性。需要开发能够实现持续搜索和知识积累的自主进化框架来解决开放性问题。
AI.method: CORAL框架采用长周期运行的智能体，通过共享持久记忆、异步多智能体执行和基于心跳的干预实现自主探索、反思和协作。提供隔离工作空间、评估器分离、资源管理、智能体会话和健康管理等安全保障机制。
AI.result: 在数学、算法和系统优化等多样化任务上，CORAL在10个任务上创造了新的最先进结果，相比固定进化搜索基线实现了3-10倍的改进率，且评估次数更少。在Anthropic内核工程任务中，四个协同进化智能体将最佳得分从1363周期提升到1103周期。
AI.conclusion: CORAL展示了增强的智能体自主性和多智能体进化能够显著改善开放性问题发现。机制分析表明这些收益来自知识重用和多智能体探索与通信。

title: Uni-World VLA: Interleaved World Modeling and Planning for Autonomous Driving
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to ECCV 2026. Code will be released
summary: Autonomous driving requires reasoning about how the environment evolves and planning actions accordingly. Existing world-model-based approaches typically predict future scenes first and plan afterwards, resulting in open-loop imagination that may drift from the actual decision process. In this paper, we present Uni-World VLA, a unified vision-language-action (VLA) model that tightly interleaves future frame prediction and trajectory planning. Instead of generating a full world rollout before planning, our model alternates between predicting future frames and ego actions step by step, allowing planning decisions to be continuously conditioned on the imagined future observations. This interleaved generation forms a closed-loop interaction between world modeling and control, enabling more adaptive decision-making in dynamic traffic scenarios. In addition, we incorporate monocular depth information into frames to provide stronger geometric cues for world modeling, improving long-horizon scene prediction. Experiments on the NAVSIM benchmark show that our approach achieves competitive closed-loop planning performance while producing high-fidelity future frame predictions. These results demonstrate that tightly coupling world prediction and planning is a promising direction for scalable VLA driving systems.

AI.tldr: Uni-World VLA：统一视觉-语言-动作模型，通过交替预测未来帧和规划轨迹实现世界建模与控制的闭环交互，提升自动驾驶决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于世界模型的方法通常先预测未来场景再规划动作，导致开环想象可能偏离实际决策过程。需要更紧密地结合世界建模与控制，实现更自适应的动态交通场景决策。
AI.method: 提出Uni-World VLA统一模型，交替进行未来帧预测和自车动作规划，形成世界建模与控制的闭环交互。同时将单目深度信息融入帧中，为世界建模提供更强的几何线索，改善长时域场景预测。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM基准测试中，该方法实现了具有竞争力的闭环规划性能，同时生成高保真的未来帧预测。结果表明紧密耦合世界预测与规划是构建可扩展VLA驾驶系统的有前景方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过交替生成未来帧和动作轨迹，Uni-World VLA实现了世界建模与控制的闭环交互，在动态交通场景中实现了更自适应的决策，证明了紧密耦合世界预测与规划的有效性。

title: True (VIS) Lies: Analyzing How Generative AI Recognizes Intentionality, Rhetoric, and Misleadingness in Visualization Lies
summary: This study investigates the ability of multimodal Large Language Models (LLMs) to identify and interpret misleading visualizations, and recognize these observations along with their underlying causes and potential intentionality. Our analysis leverages concepts from visualization rhetoric and a newly developed taxonomy of authorial intents as explanatory lenses. We formulated three research questions and addressed them experimentally using a dataset of 2,336 COVID-19-related tweets, half of which contain misleading visualizations, and supplemented it with real-world examples of perceptual, cognitive, and conceptual errors drawn from VisLies, the IEEE VIS community event dedicated to showcasing deceptive and misleading visualizations. To ensure broad coverage of the current LLM landscape, we evaluated 16 state-of-the-art models. Among them, 15 are open-weight models, spanning a wide range of model sizes, architectural families, and reasoning capabilities. The selection comprises small models, namely Nemotron-Nano-V2-VL (12B parameters), Mistral-Small-3.2 (24B), DeepSeek-VL2 (27B), Gemma3 (27B), and GTA1 (32B); medium-sized models, namely Qianfan-VL (70B), Molmo (72B), GLM-4.5V (108B), LLaVA-NeXT (110B), and Pixtral-Large (124B); and large models, namely Qwen3-VL (235B), InternVL3.5 (241B), Step3 (321B), Llama-4-Maverick (400B), and Kimi-K2.5 (1000B). In addition, we employed OpenAI GPT-5.4, a frontier proprietary model. To establish a human perspective on these tasks, we also conducted a user study with visualization experts to assess how people perceive rhetorical techniques and the authorial intentions behind the same misleading visualizations. This allows comparison between model and expert behavior, revealing similarities and differences that provide insights into where LLMs align with human judgment and where they diverge.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了16种多模态大语言模型识别和解释误导性可视化的能力，使用COVID-19推文数据集和VisLies示例，并与可视化专家的人类判断进行比较。
AI.motivation: 随着多模态LLMs在视觉内容理解方面的应用日益广泛，需要评估它们在识别误导性可视化方面的能力。这类可视化在社交媒体（如COVID-19相关推文）中普遍存在，可能有意或无意地误导公众。了解LLMs如何解释这些可视化及其背后的作者意图，对于评估其在实际应用中的可靠性和局限性至关重要。
AI.method: 研究采用实验方法，基于2,336条COVID-19相关推文（一半包含误导性可视化）和VisLies的真实示例。评估了16种最先进的模型，包括15个开源模型（涵盖不同规模、架构和推理能力）和1个专有模型（GPT-5.4）。同时进行了用户研究，邀请可视化专家评估相同的误导性可视化，以建立人类视角的基准。
AI.result: 研究评估了16种模型在识别误导性可视化、解释其观察结果、分析潜在原因和意图方面的表现。通过比较模型输出与专家判断，揭示了LLMs与人类在哪些方面一致，在哪些方面存在差异。具体结果显示了不同规模、架构模型之间的性能差异，以及模型在理解可视化修辞技巧和作者意图方面的能力。
AI.conclusion: 多模态LLMs在识别和解释误导性可视化方面展现出一定的能力，但与人类专家相比仍存在差异。研究为理解LLMs在可视化分析任务中的优势和局限性提供了重要见解，强调了将可视化修辞和作者意图分类作为解释框架的价值。这些发现对开发更可靠的可视化分析工具和评估LLMs在现实世界应用中的表现具有重要意义。

title: Moiré Video Authentication: A Physical Signature Against AI Video Generation
summary: Recent advances in video generation have made AI-synthesized content increasingly difficult to distinguish from real footage. We propose a physics-based authentication signature that real cameras produce naturally, but that generative models cannot faithfully reproduce. Our approach exploits the Moiré effect: the interference fringes formed when a camera views a compact two-layer grating structure. We derive the Moiré motion invariant, showing that fringe phase and grating image displacement are linearly coupled by optical geometry, independent of viewing distance and grating structure. A verifier extracts both signals from video and tests their correlation. We validate the invariant on both real-captured and AI-generated videos from multiple state-of-the-art generators, and find that real and AI-generated videos produce significantly different correlation signatures, suggesting a robust means of differentiating them. Our work demonstrates that deterministic optical phenomena can serve as physically grounded, verifiable signatures against AI-generated video.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于物理的认证方法，利用莫尔效应区分真实相机拍摄的视频与AI生成的视频
AI.motivation: 随着视频生成技术的进步，AI合成内容越来越难以与真实视频区分，需要开发可靠的认证方法来检测AI生成的视频
AI.method: 利用莫尔效应：当相机拍摄紧凑双层光栅结构时产生的干涉条纹。推导莫尔运动不变量，证明条纹相位与光栅图像位移通过光学几何线性耦合，与观察距离和光栅结构无关。验证器从视频中提取两种信号并测试其相关性
AI.result: 在真实拍摄和多个最先进AI生成器的视频上进行验证，发现真实视频和AI生成视频产生显著不同的相关特征，表明该方法能有效区分两者
AI.conclusion: 确定性光学现象可以作为物理基础的可验证签名来对抗AI生成的视频，为视频认证提供了基于物理的可靠方法

title: HiFlow: Tokenization-Free Scale-Wise Autoregressive Policy Learning via Flow Matching
summary: Coarse-to-fine autoregressive modeling has recently shown strong promise for visuomotor policy learning, combining the inference efficiency of autoregressive methods with the global trajectory coherence of diffusion-based policies. However, existing approaches rely on discrete action tokenizers that map continuous action sequences to codebook indices, a design inherited from image generation where learned compression is necessary for high-dimensional pixel data. We observe that robot actions are inherently low-dimensional continuous vectors, for which such tokenization introduces unnecessary quantization error and a multi-stage training pipeline. In this work, we propose Hierarchical Flow Policy (HiFlow), a tokenization-free coarse-to-fine autoregressive policy that operates directly on raw continuous actions. HiFlow constructs multi-scale continuous action targets from each action chunk via simple temporal pooling. Specifically, it averages contiguous action windows to produce coarse summaries that are refined at finer temporal resolutions. The entire model is trained end-to-end in a single stage, eliminating the need for a separate tokenizer. Experiments on MimicGen, RoboTwin 2.0, and real-world environments demonstrate that HiFlow consistently outperforms existing methods including diffusion-based and tokenization-based autoregressive policies.

AI.tldr: HiFlow提出了一种无需标记化的从粗到细自回归策略，直接在连续动作上操作，通过简单的时间池化构建多尺度动作目标，实现端到端单阶段训练，在多个机器人任务中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有从粗到细自回归方法依赖离散动作标记器，这继承了图像生成中高维像素数据压缩的需求。但机器人动作本质上是低维连续向量，标记化会引入不必要的量化误差和多阶段训练流程。
AI.method: HiFlow直接在原始连续动作上操作，通过简单的时间池化构建多尺度连续动作目标：对连续动作窗口进行平均以产生粗粒度摘要，然后在更细的时间分辨率上进行细化。整个模型采用端到端单阶段训练，无需单独的标记器。
AI.result: 在MimicGen、RoboTwin 2.0和真实世界环境中的实验表明，HiFlow始终优于现有方法，包括基于扩散的策略和基于标记化的自回归策略。
AI.conclusion: HiFlow证明了对于低维连续机器人动作，直接操作原始连续动作的从粗到细自回归策略比依赖离散标记化的方法更有效，简化了训练流程并提高了性能。

title: The Recipe Matters More Than the Kitchen:Mathematical Foundations of the AI Weather Prediction Pipeline
summary: AI weather prediction has advanced rapidly, yet no unified mathematical framework explains what determines forecast skill. Existing theory addresses specific architectural choices rather than the learning pipeline as a whole, while operational evidence from 2023-2026 demonstrates that training methodology, loss function design, and data diversity matter at least as much as architecture selection. This paper makes two interleaved contributions. Theoretically, we construct a framework rooted in approximation theory on the sphere, dynamical systems theory, information theory, and statistical learning theory that treats the complete learning pipeline (architecture, loss function, training strategy, data distribution) rather than architecture alone. We establish a Learning Pipeline Error Decomposition showing that estimation error (loss- and data-dependent) dominates approximation error (architecture-dependent) at current scales. We develop a Loss Function Spectral Theory formalizing MSE-induced spectral blurring in spherical harmonic coordinates, and derive Out-of-Distribution Extrapolation Bounds proving that data-driven models systematically underestimate record-breaking extremes with bias growing linearly in record exceedance. Empirically, we validate these predictions via inference across ten architecturally diverse AI weather models using NVIDIA Earth2Studio with ERA5 initial conditions, evaluating six metrics across 30 initialization dates spanning all seasons. Results confirm universal spectral energy loss at high wavenumbers for MSE-trained models, rising Error Consensus Ratios showing that the majority of forecast error is shared across architectures, and linear negative bias during extreme events. A Holistic Model Assessment Score provides unified multi-dimensional evaluation, and a prescriptive framework enables mathematical evaluation of proposed pipelines before training.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个统一的数学框架来分析AI天气预报系统的预测能力，发现训练方法、损失函数设计和数据多样性比架构选择更重要，并建立了学习管道误差分解理论。
AI.motivation: AI天气预报发展迅速，但缺乏统一的数学框架来解释预测能力的关键决定因素。现有理论主要关注特定架构选择，而2023-2026年的实际证据表明训练方法、损失函数设计和数据多样性至少与架构选择同等重要。
AI.method: 理论部分：基于球面近似理论、动力系统理论、信息论和统计学习理论构建完整学习管道框架；建立学习管道误差分解；发展损失函数谱理论；推导出分布外外推边界。实证部分：使用NVIDIA Earth2Studio和ERA5初始条件，对10种架构各异的AI天气模型进行推理评估，涵盖30个初始化日期和6个指标。
AI.result: 确认了MSE训练模型在高波数处的普遍谱能量损失；误差共识比率上升表明大部分预测误差在不同架构间共享；极端事件期间存在线性负偏差；提出了整体模型评估分数和多维评估框架。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了一个统一的数学框架来分析AI天气预报系统，证明估计误差（损失和数据相关）在当前规模下主导近似误差（架构相关），并提供了在训练前数学评估提议管道的规范性框架。

title: Robust Global-Local Behavior Arbitration via Continuous Command Fusion Under LiDAR Errors
summary: Modular autonomous driving systems must coordinate global progress objectives with local safety-driven reactions under imperfect sensing and strict real-time constraints. This paper presents a ROS2-native arbitration module that continuously fuses the outputs of two unchanged and interpretable controllers: a global reference-tracking controller based on Pure Pursuit and a reactive LiDAR-based Gap Follow controller. At each control step, both controllers propose Ackermann commands, and a PPO-trained policy predicts a continuous gate from a compact feature observation to produce a single fused drive command, augmented with practical safety checks. For comparison under identical ROS topic inputs and control rate, we implement a lightweight sampling-based predictive baseline. Robustness is evaluated using a ROS2 impairment protocol that injects LiDAR noise, delay, and dropout, and additionally sweeps forward-cone false short-range outliers. In a repeatable close-proximity passing scenario, we report safe success and failure rates together with per-step end-to-end controller runtime as sensing stress increases. The study is intended as a command-level robustness evaluation in a modular ROS2 setting, not as a replacement for planning-level interaction reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种ROS2原生仲裁模块，融合全局参考跟踪控制器和局部反应式Gap Follow控制器的输出，通过PPO训练的策略预测连续门控值生成融合驱动命令，并在ROS2感知压力测试下评估其鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 模块化自动驾驶系统需要在全局进度目标和局部安全驱动反应之间协调，同时面临不完美感知和严格实时约束的挑战。需要一种能够在保持控制器可解释性的同时，在复杂感知条件下实现鲁棒决策的仲裁机制。
AI.method: 设计ROS2原生仲裁模块，融合两个未修改的可解释控制器：基于Pure Pursuit的全局参考跟踪控制器和基于LiDAR的反应式Gap Follow控制器。在每个控制步骤中，两个控制器提出Ackermann命令，通过PPO训练的策略从紧凑特征观察预测连续门控值，生成单一融合驱动命令，并加入实际安全检查。同时实现轻量级基于采样的预测基线作为对比。
AI.result: 使用ROS2损伤协议评估鲁棒性，注入LiDAR噪声、延迟和丢包，并扫描前向锥形虚假短程异常值。在可重复的近距离通过场景中，报告安全成功率和失败率，以及随着感知压力增加时每步端到端控制器运行时间。结果表明该仲裁方法在感知压力下的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究作为模块化ROS2设置中的命令级鲁棒性评估，而非规划级交互推理的替代方案。提出的仲裁模块能够在保持控制器可解释性的同时，在复杂感知条件下实现鲁棒决策协调。

title: Open-Set Supervised 3D Anomaly Detection: An Industrial Dataset and a Generalisable Framework for Unknown Defects
summary: Although self-supervised 3D anomaly detection assumes that acquiring high-precision point clouds is computationally expensive, in real manufacturing scenarios it is often feasible to collect a limited number of anomalous samples.
