Therefore, we study open-set supervised 3D anomaly detection, where the model is trained with only normal samples and a small number of known anomalous samples, aiming to identify unknown anomalies at test time. We present Open-Industry, a high-quality industrial dataset containing 15 categories, each with five real anomaly types collected from production lines. We first adapt general open-set anomaly detection methods to accommodate 3D point cloud inputs better. Building upon this, we propose Open3D-AD, a point-cloud-oriented approach that leverages normal samples, simulated anomalies, and partially observed real anomalies to model the probability density distributions of normal and anomalous data. Then, we introduce a simple Correspondence Distributions Subsampling to reduce the overlap between normal and non-normal distributions, enabling stronger dual distributions modeling. Based on these contributions, we establish a comprehensive benchmark and evaluate the proposed method extensively on Open-Industry as well as established datasets including Real3D-AD and Anomaly-ShapeNet. Benchmark results and ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of Open3D-AD and further reveal the potential of open-set supervised 3D anomaly detection.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种开放集监督的3D异常检测方法Open3D-AD，利用正常样本、模拟异常和部分真实异常样本建模正常与异常数据的概率密度分布，并在新构建的工业数据集Open-Industry上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 在真实制造场景中，虽然获取高精度点云数据成本较高，但通常可以收集到少量异常样本。因此，研究开放集监督的3D异常检测，即仅使用正常样本和少量已知异常样本进行训练，旨在测试时识别未知异常。
AI.method: 首先将通用开放集异常检测方法适配到3D点云输入；然后提出Open3D-AD方法，利用正常样本、模拟异常和部分真实异常样本建模正常与异常数据的概率密度分布；引入对应分布子采样技术减少正常与非正常分布的重叠，实现更强的双分布建模。
AI.result: 在Open-Industry数据集（包含15个类别，每个类别有5种真实异常类型）以及Real3D-AD和Anomaly-ShapeNet等现有数据集上建立了全面基准。基准测试和消融研究证明了Open3D-AD的有效性，并揭示了开放集监督3D异常检测的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了在工业制造场景中利用少量异常样本进行开放集监督3D异常检测的可行性，提出的Open3D-AD方法通过建模双分布和减少分布重叠，在多个数据集上取得了良好效果，为实际工业应用提供了有价值的解决方案。

title: AromaGen: Interactive Generation of Rich Olfactory Experiences with Multimodal Language Models
summary: Smell's deep connection with food, memory, and social experience has long motivated researchers to bring olfaction into interactive systems. Yet most olfactory interfaces remain limited to fixed scent cartridges and pre-defined generation patterns, and the scarcity of large-scale olfactory datasets has further constrained AI-based approaches. We present AromaGen, an AI-powered wearable interface capable of real-time, general-purpose aroma generation from free-form text or visual inputs. AromaGen is powered by a multimodal LLM that leverages latent olfactory knowledge to map semantic inputs to structured mixtures of 12 carefully selected base odorants, released through a neck-worn dispenser. Users can iteratively refine generated aromas through natural language feedback via in-context learning. Through a controlled user study ($N = 26$), AromaGen matches human-composed mixtures in zero-shot generation and significantly surpasses them after iterative refinement, achieving a median similarity of 8/10 to real food aromas and reducing perceived artificiality to levels comparable to real food. AromaGen is a step towards real-world interactive aroma generation, opening new possibilities for communication, wellbeing, and immersive technologies.

AI.tldr: AromaGen：基于多模态大语言模型的实时通用气味生成可穿戴系统，支持文本/视觉输入到12种基础气味混合物的映射，并通过自然语言反馈迭代优化
AI.motivation: 气味与食物、记忆和社交体验的深度联系促使研究者将其引入交互系统，但现有嗅觉接口局限于固定气味盒和预定义生成模式，且大规模嗅觉数据稀缺限制了AI方法发展
AI.method: 开发AI驱动的可穿戴接口AromaGen，采用多模态大语言模型利用潜在嗅觉知识将语义输入映射到12种精选基础气味的结构化混合物，通过颈戴式分配器释放，支持自然语言反馈的上下文学习进行迭代优化
AI.result: 用户研究（N=26）显示：AromaGen在零样本生成中匹配人工调配混合物，迭代优化后显著超越，达到与真实食物气味8/10的中位数相似度，将人工感降低至与真实食物相当水平
AI.conclusion: AromaGen是实现现实世界交互式气味生成的重要一步，为通信、健康福祉和沉浸式技术开辟了新可能性

title: LLM REgression with a Latent Iterative State Head
summary: We present RELISH (REgression with a Latent Iterative State Head), a novel, lightweight architecture designed for text regression with large language models. Rather than decoding numeric targets as text or aggregating multiple generated outputs, RELISH predicts scalar values directly from frozen LLM representations by iteratively refining a learned latent state through cross-attention over token-level representations, and then mapping the final state to a point estimate with a linear regressor. Across five datasets, four LLM backbones, and two LLM training regimes, RELISH consistently outperforms prior baselines from all three major LLM regression families, including autoregressive decoding, regression-aware inference, and existing predictive head methods. Despite these gains, RELISH remains highly parameter-efficient, requiring only 3.4-3.7M trainable parameters across frozen LLM backbones (only 0.01-0.04% additional overhead), far less than LoRA-based alternatives that grow with model size (0.26-0.42%).

AI.tldr: RELISH是一种用于大语言模型文本回归的轻量级架构，通过迭代精炼潜在状态并映射到标量值，在多个数据集和模型上优于现有方法，且参数效率极高。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM回归方法存在局限性：自回归解码将数值目标作为文本处理效率低，回归感知推理需要多次生成输出，预测头方法通常简单且性能有限。需要一种既高效又准确的轻量级回归架构。
AI.method: RELISH通过交叉注意力在冻结的LLM表示上迭代精炼学习到的潜在状态，然后通过线性回归器将最终状态映射到点估计。该方法直接预测标量值，避免了文本解码或多输出聚合。
AI.result: 在五个数据集、四个LLM主干和两种LLM训练机制上，RELISH始终优于所有三大类LLM回归基线方法（自回归解码、回归感知推理和现有预测头方法）。
AI.conclusion: RELISH提供了一种参数效率极高的LLM回归解决方案，仅需3.4-3.7M可训练参数（仅增加0.01-0.04%开销），远少于LoRA等随模型大小增长的方法，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了计算成本。

title: AdaLoRA-QAT: Adaptive Low-Rank and Quantization-Aware Segmentation
summary: Chest X-ray (CXR) segmentation is an important step in computer-aided diagnosis, yet deploying large foundation models in clinical settings remains challenging due to computational constraints. We propose AdaLoRA-QAT, a two-stage fine-tuning framework that combines adaptive low-rank encoder adaptation with full quantization-aware training. Adaptive rank allocation improves parameter efficiency, while selective mixed-precision INT8 quantization preserves structural fidelity crucial for clinical reliability. Evaluated across large-scale CXR datasets, AdaLoRA-QAT achieves 95.6% Dice, matching full-precision SAM decoder fine-tuning while reducing trainable parameters by 16.6\times and yielding 2.24\times model compression. A Wilcoxon signed-rank test confirms that quantization does not significantly degrade segmentation accuracy. These results demonstrate that AdaLoRA-QAT effectively balances accuracy, efficiency, and structural trust-worthiness, enabling compact and deployable foundation models for medical image segmentation. Code and pretrained models are available at: https://prantik-pdeb.github.io/adaloraqat.github.io/

AI.tldr: AdaLoRA-QAT：一种结合自适应低秩适配与量化感知训练的两阶段微调框架，用于胸部X光分割，在保持95.6% Dice准确率的同时，大幅减少参数和模型大小。
AI.motivation: 在临床环境中部署大型基础模型面临计算资源限制的挑战，需要开发既能保持分割精度又具备高效部署能力的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出两阶段微调框架：1）自适应低秩编码器适配（AdaLoRA），通过动态分配秩来提高参数效率；2）全量化感知训练（QAT），采用选择性混合精度INT8量化以保持结构保真度。
AI.result: 在大规模CXR数据集上达到95.6% Dice分数，与全精度SAM解码器微调相当，同时训练参数减少16.6倍，模型压缩2.24倍。Wilcoxon符号秩检验证实量化未显著降低分割精度。
AI.conclusion: AdaLoRA-QAT在准确性、效率和结构可信度之间取得了有效平衡，为医学图像分割提供了紧凑且可部署的基础模型解决方案。

title: Exploring Robust Multi-Agent Workflows for Environmental Data Management
summary: Embedding LLM-driven agents into environmental FAIR data management is compelling - they can externalize operational knowledge and scale curation across heterogeneous data and evolving conventions. However, replacing deterministic components with probabilistic workflows changes the failure mode: LLM pipelines may generate plausible but incorrect outputs that pass superficial checks and propagate into irreversible actions such as DOI minting and public release. We introduce EnviSmart, a production data management system deployed on campus-wide storage infrastructure for environmental research. EnviSmart treats reliability as an architectural property through two mechanisms: a three-track knowledge architecture that externalizes behaviors (governance constraints), domain knowledge (retrievable context), and skills (tool-using procedures) as persistent, interlocking artifacts; and a role-separated multi-agent design where deterministic validators and audited handoffs restore fail-stop semantics at trust boundaries before irreversible steps. We compare two production deployments. The University's GIS Center Ecological Archive (849 curated datasets) serves as a single-agent baseline. SF2Bench, a compound flooding benchmark comprising 2,452 monitoring stations and 8,557 published files spanning 39 years, validates the multi-agent workflow. The multi-agent approach improved both efficiency - completed by a single operator in two days with repeated artifact reuse across deployments - and reliability: audited handoffs detected and blocked a coordinate transformation error affecting all 2,452 stations before publication. A representative incident (ISS-004) demonstrated boundary-based containment with 10-minute detection latency, zero user exposure, and 80-minute resolution. This paper has been accepted at PEARC 2026.

AI.tldr: EnviSmart是一个用于环境FAIR数据管理的生产系统，通过三轨知识架构和角色分离的多智能体设计，在LLM驱动的概率性工作流中确保可靠性，防止错误传播到不可逆操作。
AI.motivation: 将LLM驱动的智能体嵌入环境FAIR数据管理具有吸引力，因为它们能够外部化操作知识并在异构数据和不断发展的规范中扩展数据管理。然而，用概率性工作流替代确定性组件改变了故障模式：LLM管道可能生成看似合理但错误的输出，这些输出通过表面检查并传播到不可逆操作（如DOI分配和公开发布）。
AI.method: EnviSmart通过两种机制将可靠性作为架构属性：1) 三轨知识架构，将行为（治理约束）、领域知识（可检索上下文）和技能（工具使用程序）外部化为持久、互锁的工件；2) 角色分离的多智能体设计，其中确定性验证器和审计交接在不可逆步骤前的信任边界恢复故障停止语义。
AI.result: 在两个生产部署中验证：大学GIS中心生态档案（849个数据集）作为单智能体基线；SF2Bench复合洪水基准（2,452个监测站和8,557个文件，跨越39年）验证多智能体工作流。多智能体方法提高了效率（单个操作员在两天内完成，跨部署重复使用工件）和可靠性：审计交接检测并阻止了影响所有2,452个站的坐标转换错误。代表性事件（ISS-004）展示了基于边界的遏制，检测延迟10分钟，零用户暴露，80分钟解决。
AI.conclusion: EnviSmart通过架构机制在LLM驱动的环境数据管理中实现了可靠性，将概率性智能体的优势与确定性验证和审计交接相结合，防止错误传播到不可逆操作。该系统已在PEARC 2026被接受。

title: Autonomous overtaking trajectory optimization using reinforcement learning and opponent pose estimation
comment: The paper is accepted and presented on the 35th International Conference on Robotics in Alpe-Adria-Danube Region, RAAD 2026, Bratislava, Slovakia
summary: Vehicle overtaking is one of the most complex driving maneuvers for autonomous vehicles. To achieve optimal autonomous overtaking, driving systems rely on multiple sensors that enable safe trajectory optimization and overtaking efficiency. This paper presents a reinforcement learning mechanism for multi-agent autonomous racing environments, enabling overtaking trajectory optimization, based on LiDAR and depth image data. The developed reinforcement learning agent uses pre-generated raceline data and sensor inputs to compute the steering angle and linear velocity for optimal overtaking. The system uses LiDAR with a 2D detection algorithm and a depth camera with YOLO-based object detection to identify the vehicle to be overtaken and its pose. The LiDAR and the depth camera detection data are fused using a UKF for improved opponent pose estimation and trajectory optimization for overtaking in racing scenarios. The results show that the proposed algorithm successfully performs overtaking maneuvers in both simulation and real-world experiments, with pose estimation RMSE of (0.0816, 0.0531) m in (x, y).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的多智能体自主赛车超车轨迹优化方法，融合LiDAR和深度相机数据，通过UKF进行数据融合以改进对手姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 车辆超车是自动驾驶中最复杂的驾驶操作之一，需要多传感器支持以实现安全的轨迹优化和超车效率。现有系统需要更精确的对手车辆姿态估计和轨迹优化方法。
AI.method: 开发强化学习智能体，使用预生成的赛道线数据和传感器输入计算转向角和线速度。系统采用LiDAR（2D检测算法）和深度相机（YOLO目标检测）识别待超车辆及其姿态，通过UKF融合两种传感器数据以改进姿态估计和轨迹优化。
AI.result: 提出的算法在仿真和真实世界实验中成功执行超车操作，姿态估计RMSE在(x, y)方向上分别为0.0816米和0.0531米。
AI.conclusion: 基于强化学习的多传感器融合方法能够有效优化自主赛车超车轨迹，提高超车效率和安全性，在姿态估计精度方面表现良好。

title: Seclens: Role-specific Evaluation of LLM's for security vulnerablity detection
summary:
Existing benchmarks for LLM-based vulnerability detection compress model performance into a single metric, which fails to reflect the distinct priorities of different stakeholders. For example, a CISO may emphasize high recall of critical vulnerabilities, an engineering leader may prioritize minimizing false positives, and an AI officer may balance capability against cost. To address this limitation, we introduce SecLens-R, a multi-stakeholder evaluation framework structured around 35 shared dimensions grouped into 7 measurement categories. The framework defines five role-specific weighting profiles: CISO, Chief AI Officer, Security Researcher, Head of Engineering, and AI-as-Actor. Each profile selects 12 to 16 dimensions with weights summing to 80, yielding a composite Decision Score between 0 and 100.
  We apply SecLens-R to evaluate 12 frontier models on a dataset of 406 tasks derived from 93 open-source projects, covering 10 programming languages and 8 OWASP-aligned vulnerability categories. Evaluations are conducted across two settings: Code-in-Prompt (CIP) and Tool-Use (TU). Results show substantial variation across stakeholder perspectives, with Decision Scores differing by as much as 31 points for the same model. For instance, Qwen3-Coder achieves an A (76.3) under the Head of Engineering profile but a D (45.2) under the CISO profile, while GPT-5.4 shows a similar disparity. These findings demonstrate that vulnerability detection is inherently a multi-objective problem and that stakeholder-aware evaluation provides insights that single aggregated metrics obscure.

AI.tldr: SecLens-R是一个多利益相关者评估框架，用于LLM漏洞检测，通过35个维度、7个类别和5种角色特定权重配置，替代单一指标评估，揭示不同利益相关者视角下的模型性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM漏洞检测基准将模型性能压缩为单一指标，无法反映不同利益相关者（如CISO、工程负责人、AI负责人）的优先级差异。例如，CISO关注关键漏洞的高召回率，工程负责人优先减少误报，AI负责人需平衡能力与成本。
AI.method: 提出SecLens-R框架，包含35个共享维度，分为7个测量类别。定义5种角色特定权重配置（CISO、首席AI官、安全研究员、工程负责人、AI-as-Actor），每种配置选择12-16个维度，权重总和为80，生成0-100的决策分数。在406个任务（来自93个开源项目，覆盖10种编程语言和8种OWASP漏洞类别）上评估12个前沿模型，采用代码提示和工具使用两种设置。
AI.result: 不同利益相关者视角下模型性能差异显著，同一模型的决策分数最大相差31分。例如，Qwen3-Coder在工程负责人配置下得A（76.3），但在CISO配置下得D（45.2）；GPT-5.4也显示类似差异。这证明漏洞检测本质上是多目标问题，利益相关者感知评估能提供单一聚合指标无法揭示的洞察。
AI.conclusion: 漏洞检测评估需要多利益相关者视角，单一指标无法充分反映不同角色的优先级。SecLens-R框架通过角色特定权重配置，为不同决策者提供更有意义的性能评估，有助于在实际部署中做出更明智的选择。

title: Learning and Generating Mixed States Prepared by Shallow Channel Circuits
summary: Learning quantum states from measurement data is a central problem in quantum information and computational complexity. In this work, we study the problem of learning to generate mixed states on a finite-dimensional lattice. Motivated by recent developments in mixed state phases of matter, we focus on arbitrary states in the trivial phase. A state belongs to the trivial phase if there exists a shallow preparation channel circuit under which local reversibility is preserved throughout the preparation. We prove that any mixed state in this class can be efficiently learned from measurement access alone. Specifically, given copies of an unknown trivial phase mixed state, our algorithm outputs a shallow local channel circuit that approximately generates this state in trace distance. The sample complexity and runtime are polynomial (or quasi-polynomial) in the number of qubits, assuming constant (or polylogarithmic) circuit depth and gate locality. Importantly, the learner is not given the original preparation circuit and relies only on its existence. Our results provide a structural foundation for quantum generative models based on shallow channel circuits. In the classical limit, our framework also inspires an efficient algorithm for classical diffusion models using only a polynomial overhead of training and generation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种高效学习量子混合态的方法，特别针对平凡相中的任意混合态，通过测量数据学习浅层局部信道电路来生成这些态。
AI.motivation: 量子信息中从测量数据学习量子态是一个核心问题。近年来混合态物质相的发展激发了对平凡相中混合态学习的研究需求，旨在为基于浅层信道电路的量子生成模型提供理论基础。
AI.method: 研究平凡相中的混合态，这些态存在浅层制备信道电路且在整个制备过程中保持局部可逆性。提出算法从测量访问中学习，给定未知平凡相混合态的副本，输出近似生成该态的浅层局部信道电路。
AI.result: 证明了平凡相中的任意混合态都可以仅从测量访问中高效学习。样本复杂度和运行时间在量子比特数上是多项式（或拟多项式）的，假设电路深度和门局域性是常数（或多对数）。算法不依赖原始制备电路，仅需其存在性。
AI.conclusion: 结果为基于浅层信道电路的量子生成模型提供了结构基础。在经典极限下，该框架还启发了一种仅需多项式训练和生成开销的高效经典扩散模型算法。

title: Toward Personalized Darts Training: A Data-Driven Framework Based on Skeleton-Based Biomechanical Analysis and Motion Modeling
summary: As sports training becomes more data-driven, traditional dart coaching based mainly on experience and visual observation is increasingly inadequate for high-precision, goal-oriented movements. Although prior studies have highlighted the importance of release parameters, joint motion, and coordination in dart throwing, most quantitative methods still focus on local variables, single-release metrics, or static template matching. These approaches offer limited support for personalized training and often overlook useful movement variability. This paper presents a data-driven dart training assistance system. The system creates a closed-loop framework spanning motion capture, feature modeling, and personalized feedback. Dart-throwing data were collected in markerless conditions using a Kinect 2.0 depth sensor and an optical camera. Eighteen kinematic features were extracted from four biomechanical dimensions: three-link coordination, release velocity, multi-joint angular configuration, and postural stability. Two modules were developed: a personalized optimal throwing trajectory model that combines historical high-quality samples with the minimum jerk criterion, and a motion deviation diagnosis and recommendation model based on z-scores and hierarchical logic. A total of 2,396 throwing samples from professional and non-professional athletes were collected. Results show that the system generates smooth personalized reference trajectories consistent with natural human movement. Case studies indicate that it can detect poor trunk stability, abnormal elbow displacement, and imbalanced velocity control, then provide targeted recommendations. The framework shifts dart evaluation from deviation from a uniform standard to deviation from an individual's optimal control range, improving personalization and interpretability for darts training and other high-precision target sports.

AI.tldr: 提出基于数据驱动的飞镖训练辅助系统，通过无标记运动捕捉、特征建模和个性化反馈形成闭环框架，从统一标准偏差转向个体最优控制范围偏差评估。
AI.motivation: 传统飞镖训练主要依赖经验和视觉观察，难以满足高精度、目标导向动作的需求。现有量化方法多关注局部变量、单次释放指标或静态模板匹配，对个性化训练支持有限且忽视有用的运动变异性。
AI.method: 使用Kinect 2.0深度传感器和光学相机在无标记条件下采集飞镖投掷数据，从三链协调、释放速度、多关节角度配置和姿势稳定性四个生物力学维度提取18个运动学特征。开发两个模块：结合历史高质量样本和最小急动度准则的个性化最优投掷轨迹模型，以及基于z分数和分层逻辑的运动偏差诊断与推荐模型。
AI.result: 收集了专业和非专业运动员共2,396个投掷样本。系统能生成符合自然人体运动的平滑个性化参考轨迹。案例研究表明系统可检测躯干稳定性差、肘部位移异常和速度控制不平衡等问题，并提供针对性建议。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将飞镖评估从偏离统一标准转向偏离个体最优控制范围，提高了飞镖训练及其他高精度目标运动的个性化和可解释性。

title: Screening Is Enough
summary: A core limitation of standard softmax attention is that it does not define a notion of absolute query--key relevance: attention weights are obtained by redistributing a fixed unit mass across all keys according to their relative scores. As a result, relevance is defined only relative to competing keys, and irrelevant keys cannot be explicitly rejected. We introduce Multiscreen, a language-model architecture built around a mechanism we call screening, which enables absolute query--key relevance. Instead of redistributing attention across all keys, screening evaluates each key against an explicit threshold, discarding irrelevant keys and aggregating the remaining keys, thereby removing global competition among keys. Across experiments, Multiscreen achieves comparable validation loss with approximately 40% fewer parameters than a Transformer baseline, enables stable optimization at substantially larger learning rates, maintains strong performance in long-context perplexity, shows little to no degradation in retrieval performance even far beyond the training context length, and reduces inference latency by up to 3.2$\times$ at 100K context length.

AI.tldr: Multiscreen是一种新的语言模型架构，通过引入screening机制实现绝对查询-键相关性，替代传统的softmax注意力，能够显式拒绝无关键值，消除键之间的全局竞争。
AI.motivation: 标准softmax注意力的核心限制在于它只定义相对查询-键相关性，注意力权重通过在所有键之间重新分配固定单位质量获得，因此相关性仅相对于竞争键定义，无法显式拒绝无关键。
AI.method: 引入Multiscreen架构，围绕screening机制构建。screening机制通过显式阈值评估每个键，丢弃无关键并聚合剩余键，从而消除键之间的全局竞争。该方法替代了传统的softmax注意力机制。
AI.result: Multiscreen在验证损失上与Transformer基线相当的情况下，参数减少约40%；支持显著更大的学习率进行稳定优化；在长上下文困惑度上保持强性能；在远超出训练上下文长度时检索性能几乎没有退化；在100K上下文长度下推理延迟降低高达3.2倍。
AI.conclusion: Multiscreen通过引入screening机制解决了标准softmax注意力的核心限制，实现了绝对查询-键相关性，在参数效率、训练稳定性、长上下文性能和推理延迟方面都表现出显著优势。

title: ReinDriveGen: Reinforcement Post-Training for Out-of-Distribution Driving Scene Generation
summary: We present ReinDriveGen, a framework that enables full controllability over dynamic driving scenes, allowing users to freely edit actor trajectories to simulate safety-critical corner cases such as front-vehicle collisions, drifting cars, vehicles spinning out of control, pedestrians jaywalking, and cyclists cutting across lanes. Our approach constructs a dynamic 3D point cloud scene from multi-frame LiDAR data, introduces a vehicle completion module to reconstruct full 360° geometry from partial observations, and renders the edited scene into 2D condition images that guide a video diffusion model to synthesize realistic driving videos. Since such edited scenarios inevitably fall outside the training distribution, we further propose an RL-based post-training strategy with a pairwise preference model and a pairwise reward mechanism, enabling robust quality improvement under out-of-distribution conditions without ground-truth supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ReinDriveGen outperforms existing approaches on edited driving scenarios and achieves state-of-the-art results on novel ego viewpoint synthesis.

AI.tldr: ReinDriveGen是一个可控的动态驾驶场景编辑框架，允许用户自由编辑参与者轨迹以模拟安全关键场景，并通过RL后训练策略提升分布外条件下的合成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在动态驾驶场景中实现完全可控的编辑，特别是模拟安全关键场景（如碰撞、失控车辆、行人乱穿马路等），这些场景通常超出训练数据分布，需要专门的解决方案。
AI.method: 1) 从多帧LiDAR数据构建动态3D点云场景；2) 引入车辆补全模块从部分观测重建完整360°几何；3) 将编辑后的场景渲染为2D条件图像，引导视频扩散模型合成真实驾驶视频；4) 提出基于RL的后训练策略，使用成对偏好模型和成对奖励机制，在无地面真值监督下提升分布外条件下的合成质量。
AI.result: 实验表明ReinDriveGen在编辑驾驶场景上优于现有方法，并在新颖的自我视角合成任务上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: ReinDriveGen实现了对动态驾驶场景的完全可控编辑，能够模拟各种安全关键场景，并通过创新的RL后训练策略有效解决了分布外条件下的合成质量挑战，为自动驾驶测试和评估提供了强大工具。

title: OSCAR: Orchestrated Self-verification and Cross-path Refinement
summary: Diffusion language models (DLMs) expose their denoising trajectories, offering a natural handle for inference-time control; accordingly, an ideal hallucination mitigation framework should intervene during generation using this model-native signal rather than relying on an externally trained hallucination classifier. Toward this, we formulate commitment uncertainty localization: given a denoising trajectory, identify token positions whose cross-chain entropy exceeds an unsupervised threshold before factually unreliable commitments propagate into self-consistent but incorrect outputs. We introduce a suite of trajectory-level assessments, including a cross-chain divergence-at-hallucination (CDH) metric, for principled comparison of localization methods. We also introduce OSCAR, a training-free inference-time framework operationalizing this formulation. OSCAR runs N parallel denoising chains with randomized reveal orders, computes cross-chain Shannon entropy to detect high-uncertainty positions, and then performs targeted remasking conditioned on retrieved evidence. Ablations confirm that localization and correction contribute complementary gains, robust across N in {4, 8, 16}. On TriviaQA, HotpotQA, RAGTruth, and CommonsenseQA using LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, OSCAR enhances generation quality by significantly reducing hallucinated content and improving factual accuracy through uncertainty-guided remasking, which also facilitates more effective integration of retrieved evidence. Its native entropy-based uncertainty signal surpasses that of specialized trained detectors, highlighting an inherent capacity of diffusion language models to identify factual uncertainty that is not present in the sequential token commitment structure of autoregressive models.

AI.tldr: OSCAR：基于扩散语言模型轨迹的推理时幻觉缓解框架，通过并行去噪链检测不确定性位置并进行针对性重掩码
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLMs）的去噪轨迹为推理时控制提供了天然接口，理想的幻觉缓解框架应利用这一模型原生信号进行干预，而非依赖外部训练的幻觉分类器
AI.method: 提出承诺不确定性定位：给定去噪轨迹，识别交叉链熵超过无监督阈值的token位置；开发OSCAR框架：运行N条并行去噪链（随机揭示顺序），计算交叉链香农熵检测高不确定性位置，然后基于检索证据进行针对性重掩码
AI.result: 在TriviaQA、HotpotQA、RAGTruth和CommonsenseQA上使用LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B，OSCAR显著减少幻觉内容并提高事实准确性；消融实验确认定位和校正的互补增益，在N∈{4,8,16}时保持鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: OSCAR基于熵的不确定性信号优于专门的训练检测器，突显了扩散语言模型识别事实不确定性的内在能力，这是自回归模型顺序token承诺结构所不具备的

title: Path-Following Guidance for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle with Bounded Lateral Acceleration
summary: This paper addresses the three-dimensional path-following guidance problem for unmanned aerial vehicles under explicit actuator constraints. Unlike conventional approaches that assume unbounded control inputs or handle saturation heuristically, the proposed method incorporates bounded lateral acceleration directly into the guidance design. A nonlinear guidance framework is developed employing a nested saturation-based control technique. The proposed guidance strategy guarantees bounded control inputs while ensuring exponential convergence of cross-track errors to zero. The formulation is applicable to general smooth paths and is systematically extended from planar to three-dimensional scenarios using a path-tangent coordinate framework. Rigorous stability analysis based on Lyapunov theory establishes convergence and feasibility properties of the closed-loop system. Numerical simulations on representative paths, including straight-line, circular, and sinusoidal paths, demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior tracking performance, reduced control effort, and robustness against disturbances compared to existing guidance laws. The simplicity of the design and its compatibility with practical actuator limits make it suitable for real-world UAV applications.

AI.tldr: 提出一种考虑执行器约束的三维无人机路径跟随制导方法，采用嵌套饱和控制技术保证控制输入有界，同时实现横向误差指数收敛
AI.motivation: 传统路径跟随制导方法通常假设控制输入无界或采用启发式方法处理饱和问题，而实际无人机执行器存在物理限制，需要将执行器约束直接纳入制导设计
AI.method: 基于嵌套饱和控制技术开发非线性制导框架，采用路径切线坐标系将二维设计扩展到三维场景，通过Lyapunov理论进行严格的稳定性分析
AI.result: 提出的方法在直线、圆形和正弦路径上表现出优越的跟踪性能，控制量更小，对扰动具有鲁棒性，同时保证控制输入始终在物理限制范围内
AI.conclusion: 该方法将执行器约束直接纳入制导设计，保证了控制输入的有界性，设计简单且与实际情况兼容，适合实际无人机应用

title: NeuroDDAF: Neural Dynamic Diffusion-Advection Fields with Evidential Fusion for Air Quality Forecasting
summary: Accurate air quality forecasting is crucial for protecting public health and guiding environmental policy, yet it remains challenging due to nonlinear spatiotemporal dynamics, wind-driven transport, and distribution shifts across regions. Physics-based models are interpretable but computationally expensive and often rely on restrictive assumptions, whereas purely data-driven models can be accurate but may lack robustness and calibrated uncertainty. To address these limitations, we propose Neural Dynamic Diffusion-Advection Fields (NeuroDDAF), a physics-informed forecasting framework that unifies neural representation learning with open-system transport modeling. NeuroDDAF integrates (i) a GRU-Graph Attention encoder to capture temporal dynamics and wind-aware spatial interactions, (ii) a Fourier-domain diffusion-advection module with learnable residuals, (iii) a wind-modulated latent Neural ODE to model continuous-time evolution under time-varying connectivity, and (iv) an evidential fusion mechanism that adaptively combines physics-guided and neural forecasts while quantifying uncertainty. Experiments on four urban datasets (Beijing, Shenzhen, Tianjin, and Ancona) across 1-3 day horizons show that NeuroDDAF consistently outperforms strong baselines, including AirPhyNet, achieving up to 9.7% reduction in RMSE and 9.4% reduction in MAE on long-term forecasts. On the Beijing dataset, NeuroDDAF attains an RMSE of 41.63 $μ$g/m$^3$ for 1-day prediction and 48.88 $μ$g/m$^3$ for 3-day prediction, representing the best performance among all compared methods. In addition, NeuroDDAF improves cross-city generalization and yields well-calibrated uncertainty estimates, as confirmed by ensemble variance analysis and case studies under varying wind conditions.

AI.tldr: NeuroDDAF：一种融合神经表示学习与开放系统输运模型的物理信息空气质量预测框架，通过GRU-图注意力编码器、傅里叶域扩散-平流模块、风调制潜神经ODE和证据融合机制，在多个城市数据集上显著提升预测精度和不确定性量化能力。
AI.motivation: 空气质量预测对公共卫生和环保政策至关重要，但面临非线性时空动态、风驱动传输和区域分布偏移等挑战。物理模型可解释但计算昂贵且依赖限制性假设，纯数据驱动模型可能准确但缺乏鲁棒性和校准的不确定性。
AI.method: 提出NeuroDDAF框架，包含四个核心组件：1) GRU-图注意力编码器捕捉时间动态和风感知空间交互；2) 傅里叶域扩散-平流模块，带可学习残差；3) 风调制潜神经ODE，在时变连接下建模连续时间演化；4) 证据融合机制，自适应结合物理引导和神经预测并量化不确定性。
AI.result: 在四个城市数据集（北京、深圳、天津、安科纳）的1-3天预测中，NeuroDDAF持续优于包括AirPhyNet在内的强基线，长期预测RMSE降低达9.7%，MAE降低达9.4%。在北京数据集上，1天预测RMSE为41.63 μg/m³，3天预测为48.88 μg/m³，在所有对比方法中表现最佳。此外，NeuroDDAF改善了跨城市泛化能力，并产生良好校准的不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: NeuroDDAF成功统一了神经表示学习和开放系统输运建模，通过物理信息框架显著提升了空气质量预测的准确性、鲁棒性和不确定性量化能力，为复杂时空动态系统的建模提供了有效解决方案。

title: DWDP: Distributed Weight Data Parallelism for High-Performance LLM Inference on NVL72
summary: Large language model (LLM) inference increasingly depends on multi-GPU execution, yet existing inference parallelization strategies require layer-wise inter-rank synchronization, making end-to-end performance sensitive to workload imbalance. We present DWDP (Distributed Weight Data Parallelism), an inference parallelization strategy that preserves data-parallel execution while offloading MoE weights across peer GPUs and fetching missing experts on demand. By removing collective inter-rank synchronization, DWDP allows each GPU to progress independently. We further address the practical overheads of this design with two optimizations for split-weight management and asynchronous remote-weight prefetch. Implemented in TensorRT-LLM and evaluated with DeepSeek-R1 on GB200 NVL72, DWDP improves end-to-end output TPS/GPU by 8.8% at comparable TPS/user in the 20-100 TPS/user serving range under 8K input sequence length and 1K output sequence length.

AI.tldr: DWDP是一种新的LLM推理并行化策略，通过分布式权重数据并行消除层间同步，在保持数据并行执行的同时跨GPU卸载MoE权重并按需获取缺失专家，提升推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推理并行化策略需要层间跨秩同步，使得端到端性能对工作负载不平衡敏感，限制了多GPU推理的效率。
AI.method: 提出DWDP策略：1）保持数据并行执行，将MoE权重卸载到对等GPU；2）按需获取缺失专家；3）消除集体跨秩同步；4）通过分割权重管理和异步远程权重预取优化实际开销。
AI.result: 在TensorRT-LLM中实现，使用DeepSeek-R1在GB200 NVL72上评估，在8K输入序列长度和1K输出序列长度下，20-100 TPS/用户服务范围内，DWDP将端到端输出TPS/GPU提升8.8%，同时保持可比的TPS/用户。
AI.conclusion: DWDP通过消除层间同步并优化权重管理，有效解决了多GPU LLM推理中的负载不平衡问题，显著提升了推理性能。

title: Safe learning-based control via function-based uncertainty quantification
summary: Uncertainty quantification is essential when deploying learning-based control methods in safety-critical systems. This is commonly realized by constructing uncertainty tubes that enclose the unknown function of interest, e.g., the reward and constraint functions or the underlying dynamics model, with high probability. However, existing approaches for uncertainty quantification typically rely on restrictive assumptions on the unknown function, such as known bounds on functional norms or Lipschitz constants, and struggle with discontinuities. In this paper, we model the unknown function as a random function from which independent and identically distributed realizations can be generated, and construct uncertainty tubes via the scenario approach that hold with high probability and rely solely on the sampled realizations. We integrate these uncertainty tubes into a safe Bayesian optimization algorithm, which we then use to safely tune control parameters on a real Furuta pendulum.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于场景方法的不确定性量化框架，通过随机函数建模未知函数，构建高概率不确定性管，并集成到安全贝叶斯优化中，在真实Furuta摆上验证
AI.motivation: 在安全关键系统中部署基于学习的控制方法时，不确定性量化至关重要。现有方法通常依赖对未知函数的严格假设（如已知函数范数或Lipschitz常数边界），且难以处理不连续性，需要更通用的不确定性量化方法
AI.method: 将未知函数建模为随机函数，从中可生成独立同分布实现；使用场景方法构建不确定性管，仅依赖采样实现即可保证高概率覆盖；将此不确定性管集成到安全贝叶斯优化算法中
AI.result: 开发了基于场景方法的不确定性量化框架，构建了仅依赖采样实现的高概率不确定性管；实现了安全贝叶斯优化算法，并在真实Furuta摆上成功用于安全调整控制参数
AI.conclusion: 提出的场景方法为不确定性量化提供了更通用的框架，不依赖传统方法的严格假设，能够处理不连续性，并在真实控制系统中验证了有效性，为安全关键系统中的学习控制提供了可靠的不确定性量化工具

title: ProTPS: Prototype-Guided Text Prompt Selection for Continual Learning
summary: For continual learning, text-prompt-based methods leverage text encoders and learnable prompts to encode semantic features for sequentially arrived classes over time. A common challenge encountered by existing works is how to learn unique text prompts, which implicitly carry semantic information of new classes, so that the semantic features of newly arrived classes do not overlap with those of trained classes, thereby mitigating the catastrophic forgetting problem. To address this challenge, we propose a novel approach Prototype-guided Text Prompt Selection (ProTPS)'' to intentionally increase the training flexibility thus encouraging the learning of unique text prompts. Specifically, our ProTPS learns class-specific vision prototypes and text prompts. Vision prototypes guide the selection and learning of text prompts for each class. We first evaluate our ProTPS in both class incremental (CI) setting and cross-datasets continual (CDC) learning setting. Because our ProTPS achieves performance close to the upper bounds, we further collect a real-world dataset with 112 marine species collected over a span of six years, named Marine112, to bring new challenges to the community. Marine112 is authentically suited for the class and domain incremental (CDI) learning setting and is under natural long-tail distribution. The results under three settings show that our ProTPS performs favorably against the recent state-of-the-art methods. The implementation code and Marine112 dataset will be released upon the acceptance of our paper.

AI.tldr: ProTPS是一种基于原型引导的文本提示选择方法，通过视觉原型指导文本提示的学习，解决持续学习中语义特征重叠导致的灾难性遗忘问题，并在多个设置下超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本提示的持续学习方法面临如何学习独特文本提示的挑战，这些提示隐式携带新类的语义信息，以避免新类语义特征与已训练类重叠，从而缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 提出原型引导的文本提示选择（ProTPS）方法，学习类特定的视觉原型和文本提示。视觉原型指导每个类的文本提示的选择和学习，通过增加训练灵活性来鼓励学习独特的文本提示。
AI.result: ProTPS在类增量（CI）和跨数据集持续（CDC）学习设置中性能接近理论上限。进一步在真实世界数据集Marine112（112个海洋物种，6年收集）上评估，该数据集适用于类和域增量（CDI）学习设置且呈自然长尾分布。在三种设置下，ProTPS均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ProTPS通过视觉原型引导文本提示学习，有效解决了持续学习中的语义特征重叠问题，在多个现实场景中表现出色，为社区带来了新的挑战和数据集资源。

title: Online Reasoning Calibration: Test-Time Training Enables Generalizable Conformal LLM Reasoning
summary: While test-time scaling has enabled large language models to solve highly difficult tasks, state-of-the-art results come at exorbitant compute costs. These inefficiencies can be attributed to the miscalibration of post-trained language models, and the lack of calibration in popular sampling techniques. Here, we present Online Reasoning Calibration (ORCA), a framework for calibrating the sampling process that draws upon conformal prediction and test-time training. Specifically, we introduce a meta-learning procedure that updates the calibration module for each input. This allows us to provide valid confidence estimates under distributional shift, e.g. in thought patterns that occur across different stages of reasoning, or in prompt distributions between model development and deployment. ORCA not only provides theoretical guarantees on conformal risks, but also empirically shows higher efficiency and generalization across different reasoning tasks. At risk level $δ=0.1$, ORCA improves Qwen2.5-32B efficiency on in-distribution tasks with savings up to 47.5% with supervised labels and 40.7% with self-consistency labels. Under zero-shot out-of-domain settings, it improves MATH-500 savings from 24.8% of the static calibration baseline to 67.0% while maintaining a low empirical error rate, and the same trend holds across model families and downstream benchmarks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/wzekai99/ORCA.

AI.tldr: ORCA是一个在线推理校准框架，通过元学习更新每个输入的校准模块，提供有效的置信度估计，显著降低大型语言模型推理时的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在测试时扩展虽然能解决高难度任务，但需要极高的计算成本。这种低效性源于后训练语言模型的校准不足以及流行采样技术缺乏校准。
AI.method: ORCA结合了共形预测和测试时训练，引入元学习过程为每个输入更新校准模块，能够在分布偏移下提供有效的置信度估计。
AI.result: 在风险水平δ=0.1时，ORCA在分布内任务上为Qwen2.5-32B节省高达47.5%（监督标签）和40.7%（自一致性标签）的计算成本；在零样本分布外设置中，将MATH-500的节省率从基线24.8%提升到67.0%，同时保持低经验错误率。
AI.conclusion: ORCA不仅提供共形风险的理论保证，而且在实践中展示了更高的效率和在不同推理任务上的泛化能力，显著降低了大型语言模型的推理计算成本。

title: TRACE: Training-Free Partial Audio Deepfake Detection via Embedding Trajectory Analysis of Speech Foundation Models
summary: Partial audio deepfakes, where synthesized segments are spliced into genuine recordings, are particularly deceptive because most of the audio remains authentic. Existing detectors are supervised: they require frame-level annotations, overfit to specific synthesis pipelines, and must be retrained as new generative models emerge. We argue that this supervision is unnecessary. We hypothesize that speech foundation models implicitly encode a forensic signal: genuine speech forms smooth, slowly varying embedding trajectories, while splice boundaries introduce abrupt disruptions in frame-level transitions. Building on this, we propose TRACE (Training-free Representation-based Audio Countermeasure via Embedding dynamics), a training-free framework that detects partial audio deepfakes by analyzing the first-order dynamics of frozen speech foundation model representations without any training, labeled data, or architectural modification. We evaluate TRACE on four benchmarks that span two languages using six speech foundation models. In PartialSpoof, TRACE achieves 8.08% EER, competitive with fine-tuned supervised baselines. In LlamaPartialSpoof, the most challenging benchmark featuring LLM-driven commercial synthesis, TRACE surpasses a supervised baseline outright (24.12% vs. 24.49% EER) without any target-domain data. These results show that temporal dynamics in speech foundation models provide an effective, generalize signal for training-free audio forensics.

AI.tldr: TRACE：一种无需训练、无标签数据的检测框架，通过分析冻结语音基础模型表征的一阶动态来检测部分音频深度伪造，在多个基准测试中表现优于或媲美监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有部分音频深度伪造检测器需要帧级标注、对特定合成流程过拟合，且需随新生成模型出现而重新训练。作者认为这种监督是不必要的，并提出语音基础模型隐式编码了法证信号：真实语音形成平滑、缓慢变化的嵌入轨迹，而拼接边界引入了帧级转换的突然中断。
AI.method: 提出TRACE（Training-free Representation-based Audio Countermeasure via Embedding dynamics）框架：通过分析冻结语音基础模型表征的一阶动态来检测部分音频深度伪造，无需任何训练、标记数据或架构修改。该方法基于语音基础模型隐含的法证信号假设。
AI.result: 在涵盖两种语言的四个基准测试中使用六个语音基础模型进行评估。在PartialSpoof上达到8.08% EER，与微调的监督基线相当。在最具挑战性的LlamaPartialSpoof基准（包含LLM驱动的商业合成）上，TRACE直接超越监督基线（24.12% vs. 24.49% EER），且无需任何目标域数据。
AI.conclusion: 语音基础模型中的时间动态为无需训练的音频法证提供了有效、可泛化的信号。TRACE框架展示了无需监督训练即可检测部分音频深度伪造的可行性，克服了现有监督方法的局限性。

title: UMI-Underwater: Learning Underwater Manipulation without Underwater Teleoperation
summary: Underwater robotic grasping is difficult due to degraded, highly variable imagery and the expense of collecting diverse underwater demonstrations. We introduce a system that (i) autonomously collects successful underwater grasp demonstrations via a self-supervised data collection pipeline and (ii) transfers grasp knowledge from on-land human demonstrations through a depth-based affordance representation that bridges the on-land-to-underwater domain gap and is robust to lighting and color shift. An affordance model trained on on-land handheld demonstrations is deployed underwater zero-shot via geometric alignment, and an affordance-conditioned diffusion policy is then trained on underwater demonstrations to generate control actions. In pool experiments, our approach improves grasping performance and robustness to background shifts, and enables generalization to objects seen only in on-land data, outperforming RGB-only baselines. Code, videos, and additional results are available at https://umi-under-water.github.io.

AI.tldr: 提出一种水下机器人抓取系统，通过自监督数据收集管道自动收集成功的水下抓取演示，并利用基于深度的可供性表示将陆上人类演示知识迁移到水下，克服视觉退化、光照变化等挑战。
AI.motivation: 水下机器人抓取面临两大挑战：1) 水下图像质量退化且变化大，2) 收集多样化水下演示数据成本高昂。需要一种能够利用陆上演示数据并适应水下环境的解决方案。
AI.method: 系统包含两个核心组件：1) 自监督数据收集管道，自动收集成功的水下抓取演示；2) 基于深度的可供性表示，通过几何对齐实现陆上到水下领域的零样本迁移。使用可供性条件扩散策略在水下演示上训练生成控制动作。
AI.result: 在池实验中，该方法提高了抓取性能和背景变化的鲁棒性，能够泛化到仅在陆上数据中见过的物体，性能优于仅使用RGB的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的系统通过结合自监督水下数据收集和基于深度的跨领域知识迁移，有效解决了水下机器人抓取的挑战，实现了从陆上演示到水下环境的成功知识转移。

title: Bridging the Simulation-to-Experiment Gap with Generative Models using Adversarial Distribution Alignment
summary: A fundamental challenge in science and engineering is the simulation-to-experiment gap. While we often possess prior knowledge of physical laws, these physical laws can be too difficult to solve exactly for complex systems. Such systems are commonly modeled using simulators, which impose computational approximations. Meanwhile, experimental measurements more faithfully represent the real world, but experimental data typically consists of observations that only partially reflect the system's full underlying state. We propose a data-driven distribution alignment framework that bridges this simulation-to-experiment gap by pre-training a generative model on fully observed (but imperfect) simulation data, then aligning it with partial (but real) observations of experimental data. While our method is domain-agnostic, we ground our approach in the physical sciences by introducing Adversarial Distribution Alignment (ADA). This method aligns a generative model of atomic positions -- initially trained on a simulated Boltzmann distribution -- with the distribution of experimental observations. We prove that our method recovers the target observable distribution, even with multiple, potentially correlated observables. We also empirically validate our framework on synthetic, molecular, and experimental protein data, demonstrating that it can align generative models with diverse observables. Our code is available at https://kaityrusnelson.com/ada/.

AI.tldr: 提出对抗分布对齐(ADA)框架，通过预训练生成模型于仿真数据，然后与实验观测数据对齐，弥合仿真-实验差距
AI.motivation: 解决科学与工程中的仿真-实验差距问题：物理定律难以精确求解复杂系统，仿真包含计算近似，而实验数据仅部分反映系统状态
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的分布对齐框架：1)在完全观测但存在缺陷的仿真数据上预训练生成模型；2)使用对抗分布对齐(ADA)方法将模型与部分但真实的实验观测数据对齐；特别针对原子位置生成模型，从模拟玻尔兹曼分布开始对齐实验观测分布
AI.result: 理论证明方法能恢复目标观测分布，即使存在多个潜在相关观测；在合成数据、分子数据和实验蛋白质数据上实证验证，展示能对齐具有多样观测的生成模型
AI.conclusion: ADA框架成功弥合仿真-实验差距，通过结合仿真数据的完全状态信息和实验数据的真实性，为物理科学等领域提供有效的分布对齐方法

title: ReMoGen: Real-time Human Interaction-to-Reaction Generation via Modular Learning from Diverse Data
summary: Human behaviors in real-world environments are inherently interactive, with an individual's motion shaped by surrounding agents and the scene. Such capabilities are essential for applications in virtual avatars, interactive animation, and human-robot collaboration. We target real-time human interaction-to-reaction generation, which generates the ego's future motion from dynamic multi-source cues, including others' actions, scene geometry, and optional high-level semantic inputs. This task is fundamentally challenging due to (i) limited and fragmented interaction data distributed across heterogeneous single-person, human-human, and human-scene domains, and (ii) the need to produce low-latency yet high-fidelity motion responses during continuous online interaction. To address these challenges, we propose ReMoGen (Reaction Motion Generation), a modular learning framework for real-time interaction-to-reaction generation. ReMoGen leverages a universal motion prior learned from large-scale single-person motion datasets and adapts it to target interaction domains through independently trained Meta-Interaction modules, enabling robust generalization under data-scarce and heterogeneous supervision. To support responsive online interaction, ReMoGen performs segment-level generation together with a lightweight Frame-wise Segment Refinement module that incorporates newly observed cues at the frame level, improving both responsiveness and temporal coherence without expensive full-sequence inference. Extensive experiments across human-human, human-scene, and mixed-modality interaction settings show that ReMoGen produces high-quality, coherent, and responsive reactions, while generalizing effectively across diverse interaction scenarios.

AI.tldr: ReMoGen：用于实时交互到反应生成的模块化学习框架，利用通用运动先验和元交互模块，在数据稀缺和异构监督下实现鲁棒泛化，支持响应式在线交互。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的人类行为本质上是交互式的，个体的运动受到周围智能体和场景的影响。这种能力对于虚拟化身、交互式动画和人机协作应用至关重要。当前挑战包括：(1) 交互数据有限且分散在异构的单人、人-人和人-场景领域；(2) 需要在连续在线交互中产生低延迟且高保真的运动响应。
AI.method: 提出ReMoGen（反应运动生成）框架：1) 从大规模单人运动数据集中学习通用运动先验；2) 通过独立训练的元交互模块将其适应到目标交互领域；3) 采用分段级生成结合轻量级帧级分段细化模块，在帧级别融入新观察到的线索，提高响应性和时间连贯性，避免昂贵的全序列推理。
AI.result: 在人-人、人-场景和混合模态交互设置下的广泛实验表明，ReMoGen能够生成高质量、连贯且响应迅速的反应，同时在多样化的交互场景中有效泛化。
AI.conclusion: ReMoGen通过模块化设计解决了交互到反应生成中的数据稀缺和实时性挑战，实现了在异构监督下的鲁棒泛化和响应式在线交互，为虚拟化身、交互动画和人机协作等应用提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Analysis of LLM Performance on AWS Bedrock: Receipt-item Categorisation Case Study
comment: Preprint. Accepted to the 19th International Conference on Evaluation of Novel Approaches to Software Engineering (ENASE 2026). Final version to be published by SCITEPRESS, http://www.scitepress.org
summary: This paper presents a systematic, cost-aware evaluation of large language models (LLMs) for receipt-item categorisation within a production-oriented classification framework. We compare four instruction-tuned models available through AWS Bedrock: Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Claude 4 Sonnet, Mixtral 8x7B Instruct, and Mistral 7B Instruct. The aim of the study was (1) to assess performance across accuracy, response stability, and token-level cost, and (2) to investigate what prompting methods, zero-shot or few-shot, are especially appropriate both in terms of accuracy and in terms of incurred costs. Results of our experiments demonstrated that Claude 3.7 Sonnet achieves the most favourable balance between classification accuracy and cost efficiency.

AI.tldr: 该研究系统评估了四种AWS Bedrock上的LLM在收据项目分类任务中的性能与成本，发现Claude 3.7 Sonnet在准确性和成本效率方面达到最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是在生产导向的分类框架下，对大型语言模型进行系统、成本感知的评估，特别关注收据项目分类任务。研究旨在评估不同模型在准确性、响应稳定性和令牌级成本方面的表现，并探索零样本与少样本提示方法在准确性和成本方面的适用性。
AI.method: 研究方法包括：1）使用AWS Bedrock平台上的四种指令调优模型（Claude 3.7 Sonnet、Claude 4 Sonnet、Mixtral 8x7B Instruct、Mistral 7B Instruct）；2）在收据项目分类任务上进行系统评估；3）比较零样本和少样本提示方法；4）从准确性、响应稳定性和令牌级成本三个维度进行综合评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明：Claude 3.7 Sonnet在分类准确性和成本效率之间达到了最有利的平衡。研究还揭示了不同提示方法（零样本vs少样本）在准确性和成本方面的具体影响，为实际应用提供了指导。
AI.conclusion: 结论是Claude 3.7 Sonnet在收据项目分类任务中表现出最佳的准确性与成本效率平衡，为生产环境中的LLM选择提供了实证依据。研究强调了在实际应用中综合考虑性能指标和成本因素的重要性。

title: SCRAMPPI: Efficient Contingency Planning for Mobile Robot Navigation via Hamilton-Jacobi Reachability
summary: Autonomous robots commonly aim to complete a nominal behavior while minimizing a cost; this leaves them vulnerable to failure or unplanned scenarios, where a backup or contingency plan to a safe set is needed to avoid a total mission failure. This is formalized as a trajectory optimization problem over the nominal cost with a safety constraint: from any point along the nominal plan, a feasible trajectory to a designated safe set must exist. Previous methods either relax this hard constraint, or use an expensive sampling-based strategy to optimize for this constraint. Instead, we formalize this requirement as a reach-avoid problem and leverage Hamilton-Jacobi (HJ) reachability analysis to certify contingency feasibility. By computing the value function of our safe-set's backward reachable set online as the environment is revealed and integrating it with a sampling based planner (MPPI) via resampling based rollouts, we guarantee satisfaction of the hard constraint while greatly increasing sampling efficiency. Finally, we present simulated and hardware experiments demonstrating our algorithm generating nominal and contingency plans in real time on a mobile robot in an adversarial evasion task.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合哈密顿-雅可比可达性分析与采样规划器的实时应急规划方法，保证移动机器人在对抗性规避任务中的安全约束
AI.motivation: 自主机器人通常专注于最小化成本完成名义行为，但在故障或意外场景下需要应急计划以避免任务完全失败。现有方法要么放松硬约束，要么使用昂贵的基于采样策略，需要更高效的解决方案
AI.method: 将应急可行性要求形式化为可达-规避问题，利用哈密顿-雅可比可达性分析进行认证。在线计算安全集的后向可达集值函数，通过重采样滚动与基于采样的规划器（MPPI）集成，保证硬约束满足并提高采样效率
AI.result: 在模拟和硬件实验中，算法能够在移动机器人的对抗性规避任务中实时生成名义和应急计划，证明了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合哈密顿-雅可比可达性分析与采样规划器，在保证硬安全约束的同时显著提高了采样效率，为自主机器人的实时应急规划提供了有效解决方案

title: Reasoning Shift: How Context Silently Shortens LLM Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibiting test-time scaling behavior, such as extended reasoning traces and self-verification, have demonstrated remarkable performance on complex, long-term reasoning tasks. However, the robustness of these reasoning behaviors remains underexplored. To investigate this, we conduct a systematic evaluation of multiple reasoning models across three scenarios: (1) problems augmented with lengthy, irrelevant context; (2) multi-turn conversational settings with independent tasks; and (3) problems presented as a subtask within a complex task. We observe an interesting phenomenon: reasoning models tend to produce much shorter reasoning traces (up to 50%) for the same problem under different context conditions compared to the traces produced when the problem is presented in isolation. A finer-grained analysis reveals that this compression is associated with a decrease in self-verification and uncertainty management behaviors, such as double-checking. While this behavioral shift does not compromise performance on straightforward problems, it might affect performance on more challenging tasks. We hope our findings draw additional attention to both the robustness of reasoning models and the problem of context management for LLMs and LLM-based agents.

AI.tldr: 研究发现推理模型在不同上下文条件下会产生显著缩短的推理轨迹，这种压缩与自我验证和不确定性管理行为减少相关，可能影响复杂任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在复杂推理任务中表现出测试时扩展行为，但这些推理行为的鲁棒性尚未得到充分探索。研究旨在系统评估推理模型在不同上下文场景下的表现。
AI.method: 对多个推理模型在三种场景下进行系统评估：1）添加冗长无关上下文的问题；2）包含独立任务的多轮对话设置；3）作为复杂任务子任务呈现的问题。通过细粒度分析观察推理轨迹长度和行为变化。
AI.result: 发现推理模型在不同上下文条件下对同一问题产生的推理轨迹显著缩短（最多达50%），这种压缩与自我验证和不确定性管理行为（如双重检查）减少相关。虽然对简单问题性能无影响，但可能影响更具挑战性任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了推理模型在不同上下文条件下的行为变化，强调需要关注推理模型的鲁棒性和LLM及基于LLM的智能体的上下文管理问题。

title: PHASOR: Anatomy- and Phase-Consistent Volumetric Diffusion for CT Virtual Contrast Enhancement
summary: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CECT) is pivotal for highlighting tissue perfusion and vascularity, yet its clinical ubiquity is impeded by the invasive nature of contrast agents and radiation risks. While virtual contrast enhancement (VCE) offers an alternative to synthesizing CECT from non-contrast CT (NCCT), existing methods struggle with anatomical heterogeneity and spatial misalignment, leading to inconsistent enhancement patterns and incorrect details. This paper introduces PHASOR, a volumetric diffusion framework for high-fidelity CT VCE. By treating CT volumes as coherent sequences, we leverage a video diffusion model to enhance structural coherence and volumetric accuracy. To ensure anatomy-phase consistent synthesis, we introduce two complementary modules. First, anatomy-routed mixture-of-experts (AR-MoE) anchors distinct enhancement patterns to anatomical semantics, with organ-specific memory to capture salient details. Second, intensity-phase aware representation alignment (IP-REPA) highlights intricate contrast signals while mitigating the impact of imperfect spatial alignment. Extensive experiments across three datasets demonstrate that PHASOR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both synthesis quality and enhancement accuracy.

AI.tldr: PHASOR是一个用于CT虚拟对比增强的体扩散框架，通过视频扩散模型处理CT体积序列，引入解剖路由混合专家和强度相位感知表示对齐模块，显著提升合成质量和增强准确性。
AI.motivation: 对比增强CT在临床应用中受到对比剂侵入性和辐射风险的限制。现有虚拟对比增强方法在处理解剖异质性和空间错位方面存在困难，导致增强模式不一致和细节错误。
AI.method: PHASOR采用体扩散框架，将CT体积视为连贯序列，利用视频扩散模型增强结构一致性和体素精度。包含两个核心模块：1)解剖路由混合专家(AR-MoE)，将不同增强模式锚定到解剖语义，使用器官特定记忆捕获显著细节；2)强度相位感知表示对齐(IP-REPA)，突出复杂对比信号同时减轻不完美空间对齐的影响。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的广泛实验表明，PHASOR在合成质量和增强准确性方面显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PHASOR通过创新的体扩散框架和专门设计的模块，有效解决了CT虚拟对比增强中的解剖异质性和空间对齐问题，为无创对比增强提供了高质量解决方案。

title: GraphWalk: Enabling Reasoning in Large Language Models through Tool-Based Graph Navigation
summary: The use of knowledge graphs for grounding agents in real-world Q&A applications has become increasingly common. Answering complex queries often requires multi-hop reasoning and the ability to navigate vast relational structures. Standard approaches rely on prompting techniques that steer large language models to reason over raw graph context, or retrieval-augmented generation pipelines where relevant subgraphs are injected into the context. These, however, face severe limitations with enterprise-scale KGs that cannot fit in even the largest context windows available today. We present GraphWalk, a problem-agnostic, training-free, tool-based framework that allows off-the-shelf LLMs to reason through sequential graph navigation, dramatically increasing performance across different tasks. Unlike task-specific agent frameworks that encode domain knowledge into specialized tools, GraphWalk equips the LLM with a minimal set of orthogonal graph operations sufficient to traverse any graph structure. We evaluate whether models equipped with GraphWalk can compose these operations into correct multi-step reasoning chains, where each tool call represents a verifiable step creating a transparent execution trace. We first demonstrate our approach on maze traversal, a problem non-reasoning models are completely unable to solve, then present results on graphs resembling real-world enterprise knowledge graphs. To isolate structural reasoning from world knowledge, we evaluate on entirely synthetic graphs with random, non-semantic labels. Our benchmark spans 12 query templates from basic retrieval to compound first-order logic queries. Results show that tool-based traversal yields substantial and consistent gains over in-context baselines across all model families tested, with gains becoming more pronounced as scale increases, precisely where in-context approaches fail catastrophically.

AI.tldr: GraphWalk：无需训练的工具化框架，让现成LLM通过顺序图导航进行多跳推理，显著提升大规模知识图谱上的问答性能
AI.motivation: 企业级知识图谱规模庞大，无法放入现有最大上下文窗口，传统基于提示或检索增强的方法面临严重限制，需要新的方法让LLM能够在大规模图上进行多跳推理
AI.method: 提出GraphWalk框架，为LLM配备一组最小正交图操作工具，通过顺序图导航进行推理，每个工具调用代表可验证步骤，形成透明执行轨迹
AI.result: 在迷宫遍历和模拟企业知识图谱的合成图上测试，涵盖12种查询模板，工具化遍历相比上下文基线在所有模型家族中均获得显著一致提升，规模越大优势越明显
AI.conclusion: GraphWalk作为问题无关、无需训练的工具化框架，能够显著提升LLM在大规模图结构上的推理能力，特别是在传统上下文方法完全失效的大规模场景中表现优异

title: VLA-OPD: Bridging Offline SFT and Online RL for Vision-Language-Action Models via On-Policy Distillation
summary: Although pre-trained Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models exhibit impressive generalization in robotic manipulation, post-training remains crucial to ensure reliable performance during deployment. However, standard offline Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) suffers from distribution shifts and catastrophic forgetting of pre-trained capabilities, while online Reinforcement Learning (RL) struggles with sparse rewards and poor sample efficiency. In this paper, we propose On-Policy VLA Distillation (VLA-OPD), a framework bridging the efficiency of SFT with the robustness of RL. Instead of relying on sparse environmental rewards, VLA-OPD leverages an expert teacher to provide dense, token-level supervision on the student's self-generated trajectories. This enables active error correction on policy-induced states while preserving pre-trained general capabilities through gentle alignment. Crucially, we formulate VLA-OPD via a Reverse-KL objective. Unlike standard Forward-KL that induces mode-covering entropy explosion, or Hard-CE that causes premature entropy collapse, our bounded mode-seeking objective ensures stable policy learning by filtering out the teacher's epistemic uncertainty while maintaining action diversity. Experiments on LIBERO and RoboTwin2.0 benchmarks demonstrate that VLA-OPD significantly improves sample efficiency over RL and robustness over SFT, while effectively mitigating catastrophic forgetting during post-training.

AI.tldr: VLA-OPD：一种结合SFT效率和RL鲁棒性的框架，通过专家教师提供密集的token级监督，使用Reverse-KL目标实现稳定策略学习，有效解决分布偏移、灾难性遗忘和稀疏奖励问题。
AI.motivation: 预训练的视觉-语言-动作模型在机器人操作中表现出良好的泛化能力，但部署后仍需微调。标准离线监督微调存在分布偏移和灾难性遗忘问题，而在线强化学习则面临稀疏奖励和样本效率低下的挑战。需要一种既能保持预训练能力又能高效学习新任务的框架。
AI.method: 提出On-Policy VLA Distillation框架，利用专家教师对学生自生成轨迹提供密集的token级监督，实现主动错误纠正。采用Reverse-KL目标而非标准Forward-KL或Hard-CE，通过有界的模式寻求确保稳定策略学习，过滤教师认知不确定性同时保持动作多样性。
AI.result: 在LIBERO和RoboTwin2.0基准测试中，VLA-OPD显著提高了样本效率（优于RL）和鲁棒性（优于SFT），同时有效缓解了后训练过程中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: VLA-OPD成功桥接了监督微调的效率和强化学习的鲁棒性，通过密集的token级监督和Reverse-KL目标实现了稳定高效的后训练，为视觉-语言-动作模型的部署提供了有效解决方案。

title: Property-Level Flood Risk Assessment Using AI-Enabled Street-View Lowest Floor Elevation Extraction and ML Imputation Across Texas
summary: This paper argues that AI-enabled analysis of street-view imagery, complemented by performance-gated machine-learning imputation, provides a viable pathway for generating building-specific elevation data at regional scale for flood risk assessment. We develop and apply a three-stage pipeline across 18 areas of interest (AOIs) in Texas that (1) extracts LFE and the height difference between street grade and the lowest floor (HDSL) from Google Street View imagery using the Elev-Vision framework, (2) imputes missing HDSL values with Random Forest and Gradient Boosting models trained on 16 terrain, hydrologic, geographic, and flood-exposure features, and (3) integrates the resulting elevation dataset with Fathom 1-in-100 year inundation surfaces and USACE depth-damage functions to estimate property-specific interior flood depth and expected loss. Across 12,241 residential structures, street-view imagery was available for 73.4% of parcels and direct LFE/HDSL extraction was successful for 49.0% (5,992 structures). Imputation was retained for 13 AOIs where cross-validated performance was defensible, with selected models achieving R suqre values from 0.159 to 0.974; five AOIs were explicitly excluded from prediction because performance was insufficient. The results show that street-view-based elevation mapping is not universally available for every property, but it is sufficiently scalable to materially improve regional flood-risk characterization by moving beyond hazard exposure to structure-level estimates of interior inundation and expected damage. Scientifically, the study advances LFE estimation from a pilot-scale proof of concept to a regional, end-to-end workflow. Practically, it offers a replicable framework for jurisdictions that lack comprehensive Elevation Certificates but need parcel-level information to support mitigation, planning, and flood-risk management.

AI.tldr: 利用AI分析街景图像结合机器学习插补，为区域尺度洪水风险评估生成建筑物特定高程数据的方法
AI.motivation: 解决缺乏全面高程证书的地区在洪水风险评估中需要建筑物级别高程数据的问题，将洪水风险表征从灾害暴露扩展到建筑物内部淹没和预期损失估计
AI.method: 三阶段流程：1) 使用Elev-Vision框架从Google街景图像提取最低楼层高程和街道与最低楼层高度差；2) 用随机森林和梯度提升模型基于地形、水文、地理和洪水暴露特征插补缺失值；3) 整合高程数据与Fathom百年一遇淹没面和USACE深度-损失函数估计内部洪水深度和预期损失
AI.result: 在德克萨斯州18个区域分析12,241个住宅结构，街景图像覆盖73.4%地块，直接提取成功率为49.0%。插补在13个区域表现可接受(R²:0.159-0.974)，5个区域因性能不足被排除。方法能显著改进区域洪水风险表征
AI.conclusion: 街景图像高程测绘虽非普遍适用，但具有足够可扩展性，能实质性改进区域洪水风险表征，为缺乏高程证书但需要地块级别信息的地区提供可复制框架

title: A global dataset of continuous urban dashcam driving
summary: We introduce CROWD (City Road Observations With Dashcams), a manually curated dataset of ordinary, minute scale, temporally contiguous, unedited, front facing urban dashcam segments screened and segmented from publicly available YouTube videos. CROWD is designed to support cross-domain robustness and interaction analysis by prioritising routine driving and explicitly excluding crashes, crash aftermath, and other edited or incident-focused content. The release contains 51,753 segment records spanning 20,275.56 hours (42,032 videos), covering 7,103 named inhabited places in 238 countries and territories across all six inhabited continents (Africa, Asia, Europe, North America, South America and Oceania), with segment level manual labels for time of day (day or night) and vehicle type. To lower the barrier for benchmarking, we provide per-segment CSV files of machine-generated detections for all 80 MS-COCO classes produced with YOLOv11x, together with segment-local multi-object tracks (BoT-SORT); e.g. person, bicycle, motorcycle, car, bus, truck, traffic light, stop sign, etc. CROWD is distributed as video identifiers with segment boundaries and derived annotations, enabling reproducible research without redistributing the underlying videos.

AI.tldr: CROWD是一个从YouTube公开视频中筛选和分段的手动整理数据集，包含51,753个普通、分钟级、时间连续、未经编辑的城市行车记录仪片段，覆盖全球238个国家和地区，用于支持跨域鲁棒性和交互分析。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏专注于常规驾驶场景而非事故或编辑内容的行车记录仪数据集。现有数据集往往关注碰撞、事故后果或经过编辑的内容，这限制了跨域鲁棒性和交互分析的研究。CROWD旨在填补这一空白，提供反映日常驾驶场景的数据，以支持更真实的计算机视觉和自动驾驶研究。
AI.method: 从公开的YouTube视频中手动筛选和分段行车记录仪片段，排除事故、事故后果及其他编辑或事件聚焦内容。数据集包含51,753个片段记录，覆盖20,275.56小时（42,032个视频），涵盖238个国家和地区的7,103个命名居住地。提供手动标注的时间（白天/夜晚）和车辆类型标签，以及使用YOLOv11x生成的80个MS-COCO类别的机器检测结果和BoT-SORT多目标跟踪数据。
AI.result: 创建了CROWD数据集，包含51,753个片段记录，总时长20,275.56小时，覆盖全球238个国家和地区的7,103个命名居住地，涵盖所有六大有人居住的大洲。数据集提供了片段级别的手动标注（时间、车辆类型）和机器生成的检测与跟踪数据（80个MS-COCO类别）。数据集以视频标识符、片段边界和派生注释的形式分发，支持可重复研究而无需重新分发原始视频。
AI.conclusion: CROWD数据集填补了专注于常规驾驶场景的行车记录仪数据集的空白，通过排除事故和编辑内容，提供了反映真实日常驾驶环境的数据。该数据集支持跨域鲁棒性研究和交互分析，通过提供全球多样化的驾驶场景和丰富的标注信息，为计算机视觉和自动驾驶研究提供了有价值的资源。分发方式确保了研究的可重复性，同时避免了版权和存储问题。

title: From Multi-Agent to Single-Agent: When Is Skill Distillation Beneficial?
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) tackle complex tasks by distributing expertise, though this often comes at the cost of heavy coordination overhead, context fragmentation, and brittle phase ordering. Distilling a MAS into a single-agent skill can bypass these costs, but this conversion lacks a principled answer for when and what to distill. Instead, the empirical outcome is surprisingly inconsistent: skill lift ranges from a 28% improvement to a 2% degradation across metrics of the exact same task. In this work, we reveal that skill utility is governed not by the task, but by the evaluation metric. We introduce Metric Freedom ($F$), the first a priori predictor of skill utility. $F$ measures the topological rigidity of a metric's scoring landscape by quantifying how output diversity couples with score variance via a Mantel test. Guided by $F$, we propose a two-stage adaptive distillation framework. Stage 1 acts as a selective extraction mechanism, extracting tools and knowledge while discarding restrictive structures on "free" metrics to preserve exploration. Stage 2 targets computationally intensive iterative refinement exclusively toward "rigid" metrics ($F \lesssim 0.6$) to eliminate trajectory-local overfitting. Evaluating across 4 tasks, 11 datasets, and 6 metrics, $F$ strongly predicts skill utility ($ρ= -0.62$, $p < 0.05$). Strikingly, identical agent trajectories yield diametrically opposite skill lifts under rigid versus free metrics, demonstrating that skill utility is fundamentally a metric-level property. Driven by this signal, our adaptive agent matches or exceeds the original MAS while reducing cost up to 8$\times$ and latency by up to 15$\times$.

AI.tldr: 提出了Metric Freedom (F)作为技能效用的先验预测指标，通过度量评分景观的拓扑刚性来预测多智能体系统向单智能体技能蒸馏的效果，并基于此设计了自适应蒸馏框架。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在处理复杂任务时存在协调开销大、上下文碎片化和脆弱的阶段排序等问题。虽然将MAS蒸馏为单智能体技能可以规避这些成本，但缺乏原则性的指导来确定何时以及蒸馏什么，导致经验结果不一致（技能提升从28%改善到2%退化）。
AI.method: 引入Metric Freedom (F)作为技能效用的先验预测指标，通过Mantel测试量化输出多样性与得分方差之间的耦合关系来度量评分景观的拓扑刚性。基于F提出了两阶段自适应蒸馏框架：第一阶段作为选择性提取机制，在"自由"度量上提取工具和知识同时丢弃限制性结构以保持探索；第二阶段专门针对"刚性"度量（F≲0.6）进行计算密集的迭代优化以消除轨迹局部过拟合。
AI.result: 在4个任务、11个数据集和6个度量上的评估显示，F强烈预测技能效用（ρ=-0.62，p<0.05）。相同的智能体轨迹在刚性度量和自由度量下产生截然相反（对立）的技能提升效果，表明技能效用本质上是度量层面的属性。基于此信号的自适应智能体匹配或超越了原始MAS，同时将成本降低高达8倍，延迟降低高达15倍。
AI.conclusion: 技能效用不是由任务决定的，而是由评估度量决定的。Metric Freedom (F)作为第一个先验预测指标，能够有效预测技能蒸馏的效果。基于F的自适应蒸馏框架能够在保持或提升性能的同时显著降低多智能体系统的协调成本和延迟。

title: Ruka-v2: Tendon Driven Open-Source Dexterous Hand with Wrist and Abduction for Robot Learning
summary: Lack of accessible and dexterous robot hardware has been a significant bottleneck to achieving human-level dexterity in robots. Last year, we released Ruka, a fully open-sourced, tendon-driven humanoid hand with 11 degrees of freedom - 2 per finger and 3 at the thumb - buildable for under $1,300. It was one of the first fully open-sourced humanoid hands, and introduced a novel data-driven approach to finger control that captures tendon dynamics within the control system. Despite these contributions, Ruka lacked two degrees of freedom essential for closely imitating human behavior: wrist mobility and finger adduction/abduction. In this paper, we introduce Ruka-v2: a fully open-sourced, tendon-driven humanoid hand featuring a decoupled 2-DOF parallel wrist and abduction/adduction at the fingers. The parallel wrist adds smooth, independent flexion/extension and radial/ulnar deviation, enabling manipulation in confined environments such as cabinets. Abduction enables motions such as grasping thin objects, in-hand rotation, and calligraphy. We present the design of Ruka-v2 and evaluate it against Ruka through user studies on teleoperated tasks, finding a 51.3% reduction in completion time and a 21.2% increase in success rate. We further demonstrate its full range of applications for robot learning: bimanual and single-arm teleoperation across 13 dexterous tasks, and autonomous policy learning on 3 tasks. All 3D print files, assembly instructions, controller software, and videos are available at https://ruka-hand-v2.github.io/ .

AI.tldr: Ruka-v2是Ruka人形手的升级版，增加了手腕2自由度和平行手腕结构，以及手指的内收/外展功能，显著提升了操作能力和任务完成效率。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人硬件在可达性和灵巧性方面存在瓶颈，Ruka虽然实现了开源和低成本，但缺少模仿人类行为所需的关键自由度：手腕活动度和手指内收/外展功能。
AI.method: 设计了完全开源的肌腱驱动人形手Ruka-v2，采用解耦的2自由度平行手腕结构，增加手指内收/外展功能，并保持低成本（低于1300美元）和开源特性。
AI.result: 通过远程操作任务用户研究，相比Ruka，Ruka-v2完成任务时间减少51.3%，成功率提高21.2%；在13个灵巧任务中展示了双手和单臂远程操作能力，并在3个任务上实现了自主策略学习。
AI.conclusion: Ruka-v2通过增加关键自由度显著提升了机器人灵巧性，为机器人学习提供了完整的硬件平台，所有设计文件、软件和视频均已开源。

title: Detecting Multi-Agent Collusion Through Multi-Agent Interpretability
summary: As LLM agents are increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems, they introduce risks of covert coordination that may evade standard forms of human oversight. While linear probes on model activations have shown promise for detecting deception in single-agent settings, collusion is inherently a multi-agent phenomenon, and the use of internal representations for detecting collusion between agents remains unexplored. We introduce NARCBench, a benchmark for evaluating collusion detection under environment distribution shift, and propose five probing techniques that aggregate per-agent deception scores to classify scenarios at the group level. Our probes achieve 1.00 AUROC in-distribution and 0.60--0.86 AUROC when transferred zero-shot to structurally different multi-agent scenarios and a steganographic blackjack card-counting task. We find that no single probing technique dominates across all collusion types, suggesting that different forms of collusion manifest differently in activation space. We also find preliminary evidence that this signal is localised at the token level, with the colluding agent's activations spiking specifically when processing the encoded parts of their partner's message. This work takes a step toward multi-agent interpretability: extending white-box inspection from single models to multi-agent contexts, where detection requires aggregating signals across agents. These results suggest that model internals provide a complementary signal to text-level monitoring for detecting multi-agent collusion, particularly for organisations with access to model activations. Code and data are available at https://github.com/aaronrose227/narcbench.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了NARCBench基准，用于评估多智能体环境中分布偏移下的共谋检测，并开发了五种基于模型内部激活的探测技术来检测智能体间的协调行为。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体在多智能体系统中的部署增加，它们引入了可能逃避人类监督的隐蔽协调风险。虽然线性探测在单智能体欺骗检测中表现出潜力，但共谋本质上是一种多智能体现象，且利用内部表征检测智能体间共谋尚未被探索。
AI.method: 引入NARCBench基准评估分布偏移下的共谋检测；提出五种探测技术，通过聚合每个智能体的欺骗分数在群体层面分类场景；研究探测技术在结构不同的多智能体场景和隐写式21点算牌任务中的零样本迁移能力。
AI.result: 探测技术在分布内达到1.00 AUROC，在零样本迁移到结构不同的多智能体场景和隐写式21点算牌任务中达到0.60-0.86 AUROC；发现没有单一探测技术在所有共谋类型中占主导地位；初步证据表明信号在token级别局部化，共谋智能体的激活在处理伙伴消息的编码部分时特别显著。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作向多智能体可解释性迈出了一步：将白盒检查从单模型扩展到多智能体环境，其中检测需要跨智能体聚合信号。结果表明，模型内部为检测多智能体共谋提供了与文本级监控互补的信号，特别适用于能够访问模型激活的组织。

title: ONE-SHOT: Compositional Human-Environment Video Synthesis via Spatial-Decoupled Motion Injection and Hybrid Context Integration
summary: Recent advances in Video Foundation Models (VFMs) have revolutionized human-centric video synthesis, yet fine-grained and independent editing of subjects and scenes remains a critical challenge. Recent attempts to incorporate richer environment control through rigid 3D geometric compositions often encounter a stark trade-off between precise control and generative flexibility. Furthermore, the heavy 3D pre-processing still limits practical scalability. In this paper, we propose ONE-SHOT, a parameter-efficient framework for compositional human-environment video generation. Our key insight is to factorize the generative process into disentangled signals. Specifically, we introduce a canonical-space injection mechanism that decouples human dynamics from environmental cues via cross-attention. We also propose Dynamic-Grounded-RoPE, a novel positional embedding strategy that establishes spatial correspondences between disparate spatial domains without any heuristic 3D alignments. To support long-horizon synthesis, we introduce a Hybrid Context Integration mechanism to maintain subject and scene consistency across minute-level generations. Experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, offering superior structural control and creative diversity for video synthesis. Our project has been available on: https://martayang.github.io/ONE-SHOT/.

AI.tldr: ONE-SHOT是一个参数高效的组合式人-环境视频生成框架，通过解耦人类动态和环境线索，无需3D对齐即可实现细粒度控制
AI.motivation: 现有视频基础模型在人类中心视频合成方面取得进展，但细粒度和独立编辑主体与场景仍然面临挑战。现有方法通过刚性3D几何组合实现环境控制，但在精确控制和生成灵活性之间存在权衡，且3D预处理限制了实际可扩展性
AI.method: 提出参数高效的组合式人-环境视频生成框架，核心是将生成过程分解为解耦信号：1) 引入规范空间注入机制，通过交叉注意力将人类动态与环境线索解耦；2) 提出Dynamic-Grounded-RoPE位置嵌入策略，在不同空间域间建立对应关系而无需启发式3D对齐；3) 引入混合上下文集成机制以支持分钟级长时程合成，保持主体和场景一致性
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于最先进方法，在视频合成中提供卓越的结构控制和创意多样性
AI.conclusion: ONE-SHOT框架通过解耦人类动态和环境线索，无需复杂3D对齐即可实现细粒度组合式视频生成，在控制精度和生成灵活性之间取得良好平衡，具有实际可扩展性

title: ModTrans: Translating Real-world Models for Distributed Training Simulator
summary: Large-scale distributed training has been a research hot spot in machine learning systems for industry and academia in recent years. However, conducting experiments without physical machines and corresponding resources is difficult. One solution is to leverage distributed training simulators, but current ones like ASTRA-sim do not support importing real-world developed models, which poses challenges for ML researchers seeking to use them. Based on this challenge, we developed ModTrans, a translator supporting format translation from any real-world model to the ASTRA-sim simulator's input, removing the barrier between machine learning experts and machine learning system researchers. The experiment results show that ModTrans's cost is negligible.

AI.tldr: 开发了ModTrans工具，支持将真实世界模型转换为ASTRA-sim模拟器输入格式，消除ML专家与系统研究人员之间的障碍
AI.motivation: 大规模分布式训练是机器学习系统研究热点，但缺乏物理机器和资源难以进行实验。现有模拟器如ASTRA-sim不支持导入真实世界开发的模型，给ML研究人员使用带来挑战
AI.method: 开发ModTrans翻译器，支持从任何真实世界模型到ASTRA-sim模拟器输入格式的转换
AI.result: 实验结果表明ModTrans的成本可以忽略不计
AI.conclusion: ModTrans消除了机器学习专家与机器学习系统研究人员之间的障碍，解决了真实世界模型导入分布式训练模拟器的问题

title: Partial Motion Imitation for Learning Cart Pushing with Legged Manipulators
summary: Loco-manipulation is a key capability for legged robots to perform practical mobile manipulation tasks, such as transporting and pushing objects, in real-world environments. However, learning robust loco-manipulation skills remains challenging due to the difficulty of maintaining stable locomotion while simultaneously performing precise manipulation behaviors. This work proposes a partial imitation learning approach that transfers the locomotion style learned from a locomotion task to cart loco-manipulation. A robust locomotion policy is first trained with extensive domain and terrain randomization, and a loco-manipulation policy is then learned by imitating only lower-body motions using a partial adversarial motion prior. We conduct experiments demonstrating that the learned policy successfully pushes a cart along diverse trajectories in IsaacLab and transfers effectively to MuJoCo. We also compare our method to several baselines and show that the proposed approach achieves more stable and accurate loco-manipulation behaviors.

AI.tldr: 提出一种部分模仿学习方法，将四足机器人从纯运动任务学到的步态风格迁移到推车移动操作任务中，通过仅模仿下半身运动实现稳定且精确的移动操作
AI.motivation: 移动操作是四足机器人在实际环境中执行运输、推物体等任务的关键能力，但学习稳健的移动操作技能面临挑战，因为需要在保持稳定运动的同时执行精确操作行为
AI.method: 采用部分模仿学习方法：1) 首先通过大量领域和地形随机化训练稳健的运动策略；2) 然后使用部分对抗运动先验，仅模仿下半身运动来学习移动操作策略
AI.result: 学习的策略成功在IsaacLab中沿多样化轨迹推车，并有效迁移到MuJoCo；与多个基线方法相比，该方法实现了更稳定和精确的移动操作行为
AI.conclusion: 部分模仿学习方法能够有效将运动风格从纯运动任务迁移到移动操作任务，实现四足机器人稳健的移动操作能力，为实际应用提供可行方案

title: CRaFT: Circuit-Guided Refusal Feature Selection via Cross-Layer Transcoders
summary: As safety concerns around large language models (LLMs) grow, understanding the internal mechanisms underlying refusal behavior has become increasingly important. Recent work has studied this behavior by identifying internal features associated with refusal and manipulating them to induce compliance with harmful requests. However, existing refusal feature selection methods rely on how strongly features activate on harmful prompts, which tends to capture superficial signals rather than the causal factors underlying the refusal decision. We propose CRaFT, a circuit-guided refusal feature selection framework that ranks features by their influence on the model's refusal-compliance decision using prompts near the refusal boundary. On Gemma-3-1B-it, CRaFT improves attack success rate (ASR) from 6.7% to 48.2% and outperforms baseline methods across multiple jailbreak benchmarks. These results suggest that circuit influence is a more reliable criterion than activation magnitude for identifying features that causally mediate refusal behavior.

AI.tldr: CRaFT：基于电路引导的拒绝特征选择框架，通过边界附近提示评估特征对拒绝-顺从决策的影响，相比基于激活强度的基线方法显著提升攻击成功率
AI.motivation: 现有拒绝特征选择方法依赖特征在有害提示上的激活强度，这倾向于捕捉表面信号而非拒绝决策的因果因素。需要更可靠的方法来识别因果介导拒绝行为的特征。
AI.method: 提出CRaFT框架，通过评估特征在拒绝边界附近提示上对模型拒绝-顺从决策的影响来排序特征，使用电路引导的方法识别因果相关特征。
AI.result: 在Gemma-3-1B-it模型上，CRaFT将攻击成功率从6.7%提升至48.2%，在多个越狱基准测试中优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 电路影响是比激活强度更可靠的标准，能更有效地识别因果介导拒绝行为的特征，为理解LLM拒绝机制提供了新视角。

title: Drive-Through 3D Vehicle Exterior Reconstruction via Dynamic-Scene SfM and Distortion-Aware Gaussian Splatting
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, Submitted to IEEE IROS 2026 (under review)
summary: High-fidelity 3D reconstruction of vehicle exteriors improves buyer confidence in online automotive marketplaces, but generating these models in cluttered dealership drive-throughs presents severe technical challenges. Unlike static-scene photogrammetry, this setting features a dynamic vehicle moving against heavily cluttered, static backgrounds. This problem is further compounded by wide-angle lens distortion, specular automotive paint, and non-rigid wheel rotations that violate classical epipolar constraints. We propose an end-to-end pipeline utilizing a two-pillar camera rig. First, we resolve dynamic-scene ambiguities by coupling SAM 3 for instance segmentation with motion-gating to cleanly isolate the moving vehicle, explicitly masking out non-rigid wheels to enforce strict epipolar geometry. Second, we extract robust correspondences directly on raw, distorted 4K imagery using the RoMa v2 learned matcher guided by semantic confidence masks. Third, these matches are integrated into a rig-aware SfM optimization that utilizes CAD-derived relative pose priors to eliminate scale drift. Finally, we use a distortion-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting framework (3DGUT) coupled with a stochastic Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) densification strategy to render reflective surfaces. Evaluations on 25 real-world vehicles across 10 dealerships demonstrate that our full pipeline achieves a PSNR of 28.66 dB, an SSIM of 0.89, and an LPIPS of 0.21 on held-out views, representing a 3.85 dB improvement over standard 3D-GS, delivering inspection-grade interactive 3D models without controlled studio infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 提出一个端到端流水线，用于在杂乱经销商环境中重建高保真3D车辆模型，通过运动门控、语义分割、CAD先验和3D高斯泼溅等技术解决动态场景挑战。
AI.motivation: 在线汽车市场需要高质量的3D车辆模型来增强买家信心，但在杂乱的经销商环境中重建动态车辆面临技术挑战，包括动态场景、广角镜头畸变、镜面反射漆面和非刚性车轮旋转等问题。
AI.method: 1) 使用双支柱相机架；2) 结合SAM 3实例分割和运动门控隔离移动车辆，掩码非刚性车轮；3) 在原始畸变4K图像上使用RoMa v2学习匹配器提取对应关系；4) 集成到利用CAD先验姿态的SfM优化中；5) 使用畸变感知3D高斯泼溅框架(3DGUT)和MCMC致密化策略渲染反射表面。
AI.result: 在10个经销商的25辆真实车辆上评估，完整流水线在保留视图上达到PSNR 28.66 dB、SSIM 0.89和LPIPS 0.21，比标准3D-GS提高3.85 dB，无需受控工作室基础设施即可生成检查级交互式3D模型。
AI.conclusion: 该流水线成功解决了在杂乱经销商环境中重建动态车辆的挑战，通过结合运动门控、语义分割、CAD先验和3D高斯泼溅等技术，实现了高质量3D重建，为在线汽车市场提供了实用的解决方案。

title: Sub-metre Lunar DEM Generation and Validation from Chandrayaan-2 OHRC Multi-View Imagery Using Open-Source Photogrammetry
summary: High-resolution digital elevation models (DEMs) of the lunar surface are essential for surface mobility planning, landing site characterization, and planetary science. The Orbiter High Resolution Camera (OHRC) on board Chandrayaan-2 has the best ground sampling capabilities of any lunar orbital imaging currently in use by acquiring panchromatic imagery at a resolution of roughly 20-30 cm per pixel. This work presents, for the first time, the generation of sub-metre DEMs from OHRC multi-view imagery using an exclusively open-source pipeline. Candidate stereo pairs are identified from non-paired OHRC archives through geometric analysis of image metadata, employing baseline-to-height (B/H) ratio computation and convergence angle estimation. Dense stereo correspondence and ray triangulation are then applied to generate point clouds, which are gridded into DEMs at effective spatial resolutions between approximately 24 and 54 cm across five geographically distributed lunar sites. Absolute elevation consistency is established through Iterative Closest Point (ICP) alignment against Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter Narrow Angle Camera (NAC) Digital Terrain Models, followed by constant-bias offset correction. Validation against NAC reference terrain yields a vertical RMSE of 5.85 m (at native OHRC resolution), and a horizontal accuracy of less than 30 cm assessed by planimetric feature matching.

AI.tldr: 首次使用开源流程从Chandrayaan-2 OHRC多视角影像生成亚米级月球DEM，通过几何分析筛选立体像对，生成24-54厘米分辨率DEM，并通过ICP配准和偏移校正实现与LRO NAC参考地形5.85米垂直精度和30厘米水平精度。
AI.motivation: 月球高分辨率DEM对于表面移动规划、着陆点表征和行星科学研究至关重要。Chandrayaan-2的OHRC相机具有当前月球轨道成像中最佳的地面采样能力（20-30厘米/像素），但尚未有研究利用开源流程从OHRC多视角影像生成亚米级DEM。
AI.method: 1. 通过几何分析从非配对的OHRC档案中筛选候选立体像对，计算基线高度比和收敛角；2. 应用密集立体匹配和光线三角测量生成点云；3. 将点网格化为DEM；4. 通过ICP配准和恒定偏差偏移校正，与LRO NAC DTM建立绝对高程一致性；5. 通过平面特征匹配评估水平精度。
AI.result: 在五个地理分布的月球站点生成了有效空间分辨率约24-54厘米的DEM。与NAC参考地形验证显示：垂直RMSE为5.85米（在原生OHRC分辨率下），通过平面特征匹配评估的水平精度小于30厘米。
AI.conclusion: 成功开发了首个完全开源的OHRC亚米级DEM生成流程，证明了从非配对OHRC档案中生成高质量月球地形数据的技术可行性，为月球探测任务提供了重要的地形数据支持。

title: MM-ReCoder: Advancing Chart-to-Code Generation with Reinforcement Learning and Self-Correction
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated promising capabilities in multimodal coding tasks such as chart-to-code generation. However, existing methods primarily rely on supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which requires the model to learn code patterns through chart-code pairs but does not expose the model to a code execution environment. Moreover, while self-correction through execution feedback offers a potential route to improve coding quality, even state-of-the-art MLLMs have been shown to struggle with effective self-correction. In this work, we introduce MM-ReCoder, a chart-to-code generation model trained with reinforcement learning (RL) and equipped with self-correction ability. We propose a two-stage multi-turn self-correction RL strategy based on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). The first stage enhances the model's self-correction ability via rolling out a shared first turn, while the second stage improves the coding capability with full-trajectory optimization. MM-ReCoder learns to produce more accurate and executable code through the interaction with the environment and by iteratively correcting its own outputs. Our results on three chart-to-code benchmarks demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of MM-ReCoder.

AI.tldr: MM-ReCoder：一种基于强化学习和自校正能力的图表到代码生成模型，采用两阶段多轮自校正RL策略，在三个基准测试中达到SOTA性能
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs主要依赖监督微调，缺乏代码执行环境暴露，且即使最先进的MLLMs也难以有效进行自校正。需要一种能够通过环境交互和迭代自校正来生成更准确、可执行代码的方法。
AI.method: 提出MM-ReCoder模型，采用基于GRPO的两阶段多轮自校正强化学习策略：第一阶段通过共享首轮增强模型自校正能力；第二阶段通过全轨迹优化提升编码能力。模型通过与环境的交互和迭代自校正学习生成更优代码。
AI.result: 在三个图表到代码基准测试中展示了最先进的性能，证明模型能够生成更准确和可执行的代码。
AI.conclusion: MM-ReCoder通过强化学习和自校正能力有效解决了现有MLLMs在图表到代码生成任务中的局限性，为多模态编码任务提供了新的解决方案。

title: Meta-Adaptive Beam Search Planning for Transformer-Based Reinforcement Learning Control of UAVs with Overhead Manipulators under Flight Disturbances
