AI.method: 提出Magic, Madness, Heaven, Sin框架，将输出变化建模为同质-异质连续轴。将任务组织为四个规范上下文：认知（事实性）、交互（用户效用）、社会（代表性）、安全（鲁棒性）。分析每个上下文的失败模式和术语，并应用框架分析所有成对跨上下文交互。
AI.result: 框架揭示了优化单一目标（如提升安全性）可能无意中损害人口统计代表性或创意多样性。提供了分析输出变化作为任务目标塑造属性而非模型内在特性的系统方法。
AI.conclusion: 需要基于上下文评估输出变化，将其视为由任务目标塑造的属性而非模型内在特征。框架有助于理解不同规范目标间的权衡关系，促进更全面的LLM评估和开发。

title: SpatialAnt: Autonomous Zero-Shot Robot Navigation via Active Scene Reconstruction and Visual Anticipation
summary: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) has recently benefited from Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), enabling zero-shot navigation. While recent exploration-based zero-shot methods have shown promising results by leveraging global scene priors, they rely on high-quality human-crafted scene reconstructions, which are impractical for real-world robot deployment. When encountering an unseen environment, a robot should build its own priors through pre-exploration. However, these self-built reconstructions are inevitably incomplete and noisy, which severely degrade methods that depend on high-quality scene reconstructions. To address these issues, we propose SpatialAnt, a zero-shot navigation framework designed to bridge the gap between imperfect self-reconstructions and robust execution. SpatialAnt introduces a physical grounding strategy to recover the absolute metric scale for monocular-based reconstructions. Furthermore, rather than treating the noisy self-reconstructed scenes as absolute spatial references, we propose a novel visual anticipation mechanism. This mechanism leverages the noisy point clouds to render future observations, enabling the agent to perform counterfactual reasoning and prune paths that contradict human instructions. Extensive experiments in both simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that SpatialAnt significantly outperforms existing zero-shot methods. We achieve a 66% Success Rate (SR) on R2R-CE and 50.8% SR on RxR-CE benchmarks. Physical deployment on a Hello Robot further confirms the efficiency and efficacy of our framework, achieving a 52% SR in challenging real-world settings.

AI.tldr: SpatialAnt是一个零样本视觉语言导航框架，通过物理接地策略和视觉预期机制，解决了基于不完整、噪声自建场景重建的导航问题，在模拟和真实环境中均表现出色。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多模态大语言模型的零样本导航方法依赖高质量人工场景重建，这在真实机器人部署中不实用。机器人遇到未见环境时需要自建先验，但这些自建重建往往不完整且噪声严重，导致依赖高质量场景重建的方法性能下降。
AI.method: 1) 物理接地策略：为单目重建恢复绝对度量尺度；2) 视觉预期机制：利用噪声点云渲染未来观测，使智能体能够进行反事实推理，剪枝与人类指令矛盾的路径。
AI.result: 在R2R-CE基准上达到66%成功率，在RxR-CE基准上达到50.8%成功率。在Hello Robot上的物理部署在挑战性真实环境中达到52%成功率，显著优于现有零样本方法。
AI.conclusion: SpatialAnt通过物理接地和视觉预期机制，有效弥合了不完美自建重建与鲁棒执行之间的差距，为真实世界机器人导航提供了实用解决方案。

title: Multi-Mode Quantum Annealing for Variational Autoencoders with General Boltzmann Priors
summary: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) learn compact latent representations of complex data, but their generative capacity is fundamentally constrained by the choice of prior distribution over the latent space. Energy-based priors offer a principled way to move beyond factorized assumptions and capture structured interactions among latent variables, yet training such priors at scale requires accurate and efficient sampling from intractable distributions. Here we present Boltzmann-machine--prior VAEs (BM-VAEs) trained using quantum annealing--based sampling in three distinct operational modes within a single generative system. During training, diabatic quantum annealing (DQA) provides unbiased Boltzmann samples for gradient estimation of the energy-based prior; for unconditional generation, slower quantum annealing (QA) concentrates samples near low-energy minima; for conditional generation, bias fields are added to direct sampling toward attribute-specific regions of the energy landscape (c-QA). Using up to 2000 qubits on a D-Wave Advantage2 processor, we demonstrate stable and efficient training across multiple datasets, with faster convergence and lower reconstruction loss than a Gaussian-prior VAE. The learned Boltzmann prior enables unconditional generation by sampling directly from the energy-based latent distribution, a capability that plain autoencoders lack, and conditional generation through latent biasing that leverages the learned pairwise interactions.

AI.tldr: BM-VAEs使用量子退火采样训练玻尔兹曼机先验，在单个生成系统中实现三种操作模式：训练时用快速量子退火获取无偏样本，无条件生成时用慢速量子退火聚焦低能区域，条件生成时通过偏置场引导采样。
AI.motivation: 变分自编码器的生成能力受限于潜在空间的先验分布选择。玻尔兹曼机先验能够超越因子化假设并捕捉潜在变量间的结构化交互，但大规模训练需要从难解分布中进行准确高效的采样。
AI.method: 提出玻尔兹曼机先验VAE，使用量子退火采样在三种操作模式下训练：1) 训练时使用快速量子退火获取无偏玻尔兹曼样本用于梯度估计；2) 无条件生成时使用慢速量子退火使样本集中于低能极小值；3) 条件生成时添加偏置场引导采样至属性特定区域。在D-Wave Advantage2处理器上使用多达2000个量子比特。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上展示了稳定高效训练，相比高斯先验VAE具有更快收敛速度和更低重构损失。学习的玻尔兹曼先验支持直接从基于能量的潜在分布采样进行无条件生成，并通过利用学习到的成对交互的潜在偏置实现条件生成。
AI.conclusion: BM-VAEs通过量子退火采样有效训练能量基先验，超越了传统因子化先验的限制，在单个生成系统中实现了训练、无条件生成和条件生成的统一框架，展示了量子计算在机器学习中的实用价值。

title: GeoReFormer: Geometry-Aware Refinement for Lane Segment Detection and Topology Reasoning
summary: Accurate 3D lane segment detection and topology reasoning are critical for structured online map construction in autonomous driving. Recent transformer-based approaches formulate this task as query-based set prediction, yet largely inherit decoder designs originally developed for compact object detection. However, lane segments are continuous polylines embedded in directed graphs, and generic query initialization and unconstrained refinement do not explicitly encode this geometric and relational structure. We propose GeoReFormer (Geometry-aware Refinement Transformer), a unified query-based architecture that embeds geometry- and topology-aware inductive biases directly within the transformer decoder. GeoReFormer introduces data-driven geometric priors for structured query initialization, bounded coordinate-space refinement for stable polyline deformation, and per-query gated topology propagation to selectively integrate relational context. On the OpenLane-V2 benchmark, GeoReFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance with 34.5% mAP while improving topology consistency over strong transformer baselines, demonstrating the utility of explicit geometric and relational structure encoding.

AI.tldr: GeoReFormer：一种用于3D车道段检测和拓扑推理的几何感知Transformer架构，通过结构化查询初始化、有界坐标空间细化和门控拓扑传播，在OpenLane-V2基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的方法将3D车道段检测和拓扑推理视为查询式集合预测任务，但主要继承为紧凑目标检测设计的解码器。然而，车道段是嵌入有向图中的连续折线，通用的查询初始化和无约束细化未能显式编码这种几何和关系结构。
AI.method: 提出GeoReFormer（几何感知细化Transformer），一种统一的查询式架构，直接在Transformer解码器中嵌入几何和拓扑感知的归纳偏置。包括：1）结构化查询初始化的数据驱动几何先验；2）稳定折线变形的有界坐标空间细化；3）选择性整合关系上下文的每查询门控拓扑传播。
AI.result: 在OpenLane-V2基准上，GeoReFormer达到34.5% mAP的SOTA性能，同时相比强大的Transformer基线提高了拓扑一致性。
AI.conclusion: GeoReFormer通过显式编码几何和关系结构，在3D车道段检测和拓扑推理任务上取得了显著改进，证明了显式几何和关系结构编码的有效性。

title: Policy-Guided World Model Planning for Language-Conditioned Visual Navigation
summary: Navigating to a visually specified goal given natural language instructions remains a fundamental challenge in embodied AI. Existing approaches either rely on reactive policies that struggle with long-horizon planning, or employ world models that suffer from poor action initialization in high-dimensional spaces. We present PiJEPA, a two-stage framework that combines the strengths of learned navigation policies with latent world model planning for instruction-conditioned visual navigation. In the first stage, we finetune an Octo-based generalist policy, augmented with a frozen pretrained vision encoder (DINOv2 or V-JEPA-2), on the CAST navigation dataset to produce an informed action distribution conditioned on the current observation and language instruction. In the second stage, we use this policy-derived distribution to warm-start Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) planning over a separately trained JEPA world model, which predicts future latent states in the embedding space of the same frozen encoder. By initializing the MPPI sampling distribution from the policy prior rather than from an uninformed Gaussian, our planner converges faster to high-quality action sequences that reach the goal. We systematically study the effect of the vision encoder backbone, comparing DINOv2 and V-JEPA-2, across both the policy and world model components. Experiments on real-world navigation tasks demonstrate that PiJEPA significantly outperforms both standalone policy execution and uninformed world model planning, achieving improved goal-reaching accuracy and instruction-following fidelity.

AI.tldr: PiJEMA：结合学习导航策略与潜在世界模型规划的两阶段框架，用于指令条件视觉导航，通过策略先验初始化MPPI规划，显著提升目标到达准确率
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视觉导航任务中存在局限性：反应式策略难以进行长时程规划，而世界模型在高维空间中动作初始化效果差。需要结合两者的优势来解决指令条件视觉导航的挑战。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段微调基于Octo的通用策略，结合冻结预训练视觉编码器（DINOv2或V-JEPA-2），在CAST导航数据集上训练；第二阶段使用策略导出的分布来初始化MPPI规划，在单独训练的JEPA世界模型上进行潜在状态预测规划。
AI.result: 实验表明PiJEMA显著优于独立策略执行和无信息世界模型规划，实现了更高的目标到达准确率和指令跟随保真度。通过策略先验初始化MPPI采样分布，规划器能更快收敛到高质量动作序列。
AI.conclusion: PiJEMA成功结合了学习策略与世界模型规划的优势，通过策略先验初始化MPPI规划，有效解决了指令条件视觉导航中的长时程规划和动作初始化问题，为具身AI导航提供了有效解决方案。

title: Can Vision Foundation Models Navigate? Zero-Shot Real-World Evaluation and Lessons Learned
summary: Visual Navigation Models (VNMs) promise generalizable, robot navigation by learning from large-scale visual demonstrations. Despite growing real-world deployment, existing evaluations rely almost exclusively on success rate, whether the robot reaches its goal, which conceals trajectory quality, collision behavior, and robustness to environmental change. We present a real-world evaluation of five state-of-the-art VNMs (GNM, ViNT, NoMaD, NaviBridger, and CrossFormer) across two robot platforms and five environments spanning indoor and outdoor settings. Beyond success rate, we combine path-based metrics with vision-based goal-recognition scores and assess robustness through controlled image perturbations (motion blur, sunflare). Our analysis uncovers three systematic limitations: (a) even architecturally sophisticated diffusion and transformer-based models exhibit frequent collisions, indicating limited geometric understanding; (b) models fail to discriminate between different locations that are perceptually similar, however some semantics differences are present, causing goal prediction errors in repetitive environments; and (c) performance degrades under distribution shift. We will publicly release our evaluation codebase and dataset to facilitate reproducible benchmarking of VNMs.

AI.tldr: 该论文对五种最先进的视觉导航模型进行了真实世界评估，揭示了系统性的局限性：频繁碰撞、重复环境中目标识别错误、以及分布偏移下的性能下降。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉导航模型的评估主要依赖成功率指标，这掩盖了轨迹质量、碰撞行为和鲁棒性等关键问题。需要更全面的评估方法来揭示模型的系统性缺陷。
AI.method: 在真实世界环境中评估五种SOTA视觉导航模型（GNM、ViNT、NoMaD、NaviBridger、CrossFormer），使用两种机器人平台和五个室内外环境。除了成功率，还结合路径指标、视觉目标识别分数，并通过受控图像扰动（运动模糊、太阳耀斑）评估鲁棒性。
AI.result: 发现了三个系统性局限：1）即使架构复杂的扩散和Transformer模型也频繁碰撞，表明几何理解有限；2）模型无法区分感知相似但语义不同的位置，导致重复环境中目标预测错误；3）在分布偏移下性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: 视觉导航模型在真实世界部署中仍存在显著缺陷，需要更全面的评估标准。作者将公开评估代码库和数据集，以促进可重复的基准测试。

title: Orthogonal Learner for Estimating Heterogeneous Long-Term Treatment Effects
summary: Estimation of heterogeneous long-term treatment effects (HLTEs) is widely used for personalized decision-making in marketing, economics, and medicine, where short-term randomized experiments are often combined with long-term observational data. However, HLTE estimation is challenging due to limited overlap in treatment or in observing long-term outcomes for certain subpopulations, which can lead to unstable HLTE estimates with large finite-sample variance. To address this challenge, we introduce the LT-O-learners (Long-Term Orthogonal Learners), a set of novel orthogonal learners for HLTE estimation. The learners are designed for the canonical HLTE setting that combines a short-term randomized dataset $\mathcal{D}_1$ with a long-term historical dataset $\mathcal{D}_2$. The key idea of our LT-O-Learners is to retarget the learning objective by introducing custom overlap weights that downweight samples with low overlap in treatment or in long-term observation. We show that the retargeted loss is equivalent to the weighted oracle loss and satisfies Neyman-orthogonality, which means our learners are robust to errors in the nuisance estimation. We further provide a general error bound for the LT-O-Learners and give the conditions under which quasi-oracle rate can be achieved. Finally, our LT-O-learners are model-agnostic and can thus be instantiated with arbitrary machine learning models. We conduct empirical evaluations on synthetic and semi-synthetic benchmarks to confirm the theoretical properties of our LT-O-Learners, especially the robustness in low-overlap settings. To the best of our knowledge, ours are the first orthogonal learners for HLTE estimation that are robust to low overlap that is common in long-term outcomes.

AI.tldr: 提出LT-O-learners用于估计异质性长期处理效应，通过引入自定义重叠权重解决短期随机实验与长期观测数据结合中的低重叠问题，具有正交性、模型无关性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 异质性长期处理效应估计在个性化决策中很重要，但短期随机实验与长期观测数据结合时，某些子群体在治疗或长期结果观测上存在有限重叠，导致估计不稳定、方差大。
AI.method: 提出LT-O-learners正交学习器，通过引入自定义重叠权重重新定位学习目标，降低低重叠样本权重。该方法具有Neyman正交性，对干扰参数估计误差鲁棒，且模型无关，可用任意机器学习模型实例化。
AI.result: 理论证明重新定位的损失等价于加权oracle损失并满足正交性，提供了一般误差界，给出了达到准oracle率的条件。实验在合成和半合成基准上验证了理论性质，特别是在低重叠设置中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: LT-O-learners是首个针对HLTE估计的正交学习器，能有效处理长期结果中常见的低重叠问题，为个性化决策提供稳定可靠的异质性长期处理效应估计。

title: Chasing Autonomy: Dynamic Retargeting and Control Guided RL for Performant and Controllable Humanoid Running
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Humanoid robots have the promise of locomoting like humans, including fast and dynamic running. Recently, reinforcement learning (RL) controllers that can mimic human motions have become popular as they can generate very dynamic behaviors, but they are often restricted to single motion play-back which hinders their deployment in long duration and autonomous locomotion. In this paper, we present a pipeline to dynamically retarget human motions through an optimization routine with hard constraints to generate improved periodic reference libraries from a single human demonstration. We then study the effect of both the reference motion and the reward structure on the reference and commanded velocity tracking, concluding that a goal-conditioned and control-guided reward which tracks dynamically optimized human data results in the best performance. We deploy the policy on hardware, demonstrating its speed and endurance by achieving running speeds of up to 3.3 m/s on a Unitree G1 robot and traversing hundreds of meters in real-world environments. Additionally, to demonstrate the controllability of the locomotion, we use the controller in a full perception and planning autonomy stack for obstacle avoidance while running outdoors.

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过优化重定向人类运动生成周期性参考库的流程，结合目标条件和控制引导的奖励函数，在Unitree G1机器人上实现3.3m/s的跑步速度和数百米户外自主避障
AI.motivation: 当前强化学习控制器虽然能模仿人类动态运动，但通常局限于单一运动回放，难以实现长时间自主运动。需要开发能够生成改进参考运动库并实现可控自主运动的方法。
AI.method: 1) 通过带硬约束的优化流程动态重定向人类运动，从单次演示生成改进的周期性参考库；2) 研究参考运动和奖励结构对速度跟踪的影响；3) 采用目标条件和控制引导的奖励函数，跟踪动态优化的人类数据
AI.result: 在Unitree G1机器人上实现最高3.3m/s的跑步速度，在真实环境中穿越数百米。控制器在完整感知和规划自主系统中成功实现户外跑步时的障碍物避让。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态重定向人类运动生成改进参考库，结合目标条件和控制引导的奖励函数，能够实现高性能、可控的人形机器人跑步，为长期自主运动提供有效解决方案。

title: Fatigue-Aware Learning to Defer via Constrained Optimisation
summary: Learning to defer (L2D) enables human-AI cooperation by deciding when an AI system should act autonomously or defer to a human expert. Existing L2D methods, however, assume static human performance, contradicting well-established findings on fatigue-induced degradation. We propose Fatigue-Aware Learning to Defer via Constrained Optimisation (FALCON), which explicitly models workload-varying human performance using psychologically grounded fatigue curves. FALCON formulates L2D as a Constrained Markov Decision Process (CMDP) whose state includes both task features and cumulative human workload, and optimises accuracy under human-AI cooperation budgets via PPO-Lagrangian training. We further introduce FA-L2D, a benchmark that systematically varies fatigue dynamics from near-static to rapidly degrading regimes. Experiments across multiple datasets show that FALCON consistently outperforms state-of-the-art L2D methods across coverage levels, generalises zero-shot to unseen experts with different fatigue patterns, and demonstrates the advantage of adaptive human-AI collaboration over AI-only or human-only decision-making when coverage lies strictly between 0 and 1.

AI.tldr: FALCON：一种疲劳感知的学习延迟方法，通过约束优化建模人类性能随工作负荷变化，在人类-AI协作中实现自适应决策
AI.motivation: 现有学习延迟方法假设人类性能是静态的，这与疲劳导致性能下降的心理学发现相矛盾。需要开发能够建模工作负荷变化的人类性能的学习延迟方法。
AI.method: 提出FALCON方法，使用心理学基础的疲劳曲线建模工作负荷变化的人类性能。将学习延迟问题表述为约束马尔可夫决策过程，状态包括任务特征和累积人类工作负荷，通过PPO-Lagrangian训练在人类-AI协作预算下优化准确性。
AI.result: FALCON在多个数据集上始终优于最先进的学习延迟方法，在不同覆盖水平下表现优异，能够零样本泛化到具有不同疲劳模式的未见专家，并展示了在覆盖严格介于0和1之间时自适应人类-AI协作相对于纯AI或纯人类决策的优势。
AI.conclusion: FALCON通过显式建模疲劳动态，实现了更现实和有效的人类-AI协作，为学习延迟领域提供了重要的理论和方法进展，并创建了FA-L2D基准来系统评估疲劳感知方法。

title: SelfGrader: Stable Jailbreak Detection for Large Language Models using Token-Level Logits
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are powerful tools for answering user queries, yet they remain highly vulnerable to jailbreak attacks. Existing guardrail methods typically rely on internal features or textual responses to detect malicious queries, which either introduce substantial latency or suffer from the randomness in text generation. To overcome these limitations, we propose SelfGrader, a lightweight guardrail method that formulates jailbreak detection as a numerical grading problem using token-level logits. Specifically, SelfGrader evaluates the safety of a user query within a compact set of numerical tokens (NTs) (e.g., 0-9) and interprets their logit distribution as an internal safety signal. To align these signals with human intuition of maliciousness, SelfGrader introduces a dual-perspective scoring rule that considers both the maliciousness and benignness of the query, yielding a stable and interpretable score that reflects harmfulness and reduces the false positive rate simultaneously. Extensive experiments across diverse jailbreak benchmarks, multiple LLMs, and state-of-the-art guardrail baselines demonstrate that SelfGrader achieves up to a 22.66% reduction in ASR on LLaMA-3-8B, while maintaining significantly lower memory overhead (up to 173x) and latency (up to 26x).

AI.tldr: SelfGrader：一种基于token级logits的轻量级越狱检测方法，将越狱检测转化为数值评分问题，通过双视角评分规则实现高效安全防护
AI.motivation: 现有LLM防护方法依赖内部特征或文本响应，存在延迟高或受文本生成随机性影响的问题，需要更轻量、稳定的越狱检测方案
AI.method: 将越狱检测转化为数值评分问题，使用token级logits评估查询安全性；引入双视角评分规则，同时考虑查询的恶意性和良性，生成稳定可解释的安全分数
AI.result: 在多种越狱基准测试、多个LLM和现有防护基线中，SelfGrader在LLaMA-3-8B上实现ASR降低22.66%，内存开销降低173倍，延迟降低26倍
AI.conclusion: SelfGrader提供了一种轻量、高效、稳定的越狱检测方法，显著降低攻击成功率同时保持低资源消耗，为LLM安全防护提供了新思路

title: Massive Parallel Deep Reinforcement Learning for Active SLAM
summary: Recent advances in parallel computing and GPU acceleration have created new opportunities for computation-intensive learning problems such as Active SLAM -- where actions are selected to reduce uncertainty and improve joint mapping and localization. However, existing DRL-based approaches remain constrained by the lack of scalable parallel training. In this work, we address this challenge by proposing a scalable end-to-end DRL framework for Active SLAM that enables massively parallel training. Compared with the state of the art, our method significantly reduces training time, supports continuous action spaces and facilitates the exploration of more realistic scenarios. It is released as an open-source framework to promote reproducibility and community adoption.

AI.tldr: 提出一个可扩展的端到端深度强化学习框架，用于主动SLAM，支持大规模并行训练，显著减少训练时间并支持连续动作空间
AI.motivation: 现有基于DRL的主动SLAM方法受限于缺乏可扩展的并行训练能力，而并行计算和GPU加速的进展为计算密集型学习问题创造了新机会
AI.method: 开发了一个可扩展的端到端深度强化学习框架，支持大规模并行训练，能够处理连续动作空间，并探索更真实的场景
AI.result: 与现有技术相比，该方法显著减少了训练时间，支持连续动作空间，并促进了更真实场景的探索，已作为开源框架发布
AI.conclusion: 提出的可扩展DRL框架解决了主动SLAM中并行训练的挑战，为社区提供了可复现的开源解决方案，推动了主动SLAM技术的发展

title: Super-Resolving Coarse-Resolution Weather Forecasts With Flow Matching
summary: Machine learning-based weather forecasting models now surpass state-of-the-art numerical weather prediction systems, but training and operating these models at high spatial resolution remains computationally expensive. We present a modular framework that decouples forecasting from spatial resolution by applying learned generative super-resolution as a post-processing step to coarse-resolution forecast trajectories. We formulate super-resolution as a stochastic inverse problem, using a residual formulation to preserve large-scale structure while reconstructing unresolved variability. The model is trained with flow matching exclusively on reanalysis data and is applied to global medium-range forecasts. We evaluate (i) design consistency by re-coarsening super-resolved forecasts and comparing them to the original coarse trajectories, and (ii) high-resolution forecast quality using standard ensemble verification metrics and spectral diagnostics. Results show that super-resolution preserves large-scale structure and variance after re-coarsening, introduces physically consistent small-scale variability, and achieves competitive probabilistic forecast skill at 0.25° resolution relative to an operational ensemble baseline, while requiring only a modest additional training cost compared with end-to-end high-resolution forecasting.

AI.tldr: 提出模块化框架，将天气预报与空间分辨率解耦，通过学习生成式超分辨率作为粗分辨率预报轨迹的后处理步骤，实现高效高分辨率天气预报。
AI.motivation: 机器学习天气预报模型虽超越传统数值预报系统，但在高空间分辨率下训练和运行计算成本高昂，需要更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用模块化框架，将粗分辨率预报轨迹通过学习的生成式超分辨率进行后处理；将超分辨率建模为随机逆问题，使用残差公式保持大尺度结构同时重建未解析变率；基于流匹配在再分析数据上训练，应用于全球中期预报。
AI.result: 超分辨率保持了大尺度结构和方差（通过再粗化验证），引入了物理一致的小尺度变率，在0.25°分辨率下相对于业务集合预报基准具有竞争力的概率预报技巧，且训练成本仅比端到端高分辨率预报略有增加。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模块化框架通过解耦预报与分辨率，实现了计算高效的高分辨率天气预报，为机器学习天气预报的实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Vega: Learning to Drive with Natural Language Instructions
summary: Vision-language-action models have reshaped autonomous driving to incorporate languages into the decision-making process. However, most existing pipelines only utilize the language modality for scene descriptions or reasoning and lack the flexibility to follow diverse user instructions for personalized driving. To address this, we first construct a large-scale driving dataset (InstructScene) containing around 100,000 scenes annotated with diverse driving instructions with the corresponding trajectories. We then propose a unified Vision-Language-World-Action model, Vega, for instruction-based generation and planning. We employ the autoregressive paradigm to process visual inputs (vision) and language instructions (language) and the diffusion paradigm to generate future predictions (world modeling) and trajectories (action). We perform joint attention to enable interactions between the modalities and use individual projection layers for different modalities for more capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method not only achieves superior planning performance but also exhibits strong instruction-following abilities, paving the way for more intelligent and personalized driving systems.

AI.tldr: 提出Vega模型，一个统一的视觉-语言-世界-动作模型，用于基于指令的自动驾驶轨迹生成和规划，通过构建大规模指令驾驶数据集InstructScene实现个性化驾驶
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型主要将语言用于场景描述或推理，缺乏根据多样化用户指令进行个性化驾驶的灵活性，需要解决指令跟随能力不足的问题
AI.method: 构建包含约10万个场景的大规模驾驶数据集InstructScene，提出Vega统一模型，采用自回归范式处理视觉输入和语言指令，扩散范式生成未来预测和轨迹，通过联合注意力实现多模态交互，不同模态使用独立投影层
AI.result: 实验表明该方法不仅实现了优越的规划性能，还展现出强大的指令跟随能力，为更智能和个性化的驾驶系统铺平了道路
AI.conclusion: Vega模型通过统一的视觉-语言-世界-动作架构，成功解决了自动驾驶中个性化指令跟随的问题，为智能驾驶系统提供了新的解决方案

title: OkanNet: A Lightweight Deep Learning Architecture for Classification of Brain Tumor from MRI Images
summary: Medical imaging techniques, especially Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), are accepted as the gold standard in the diagnosis and treatment planning of neurological diseases. However, the manual analysis of MRI images is a time-consuming process for radiologists and is prone to human error due to fatigue. In this study, two different Deep Learning approaches were developed and analyzed comparatively for the automatic detection and classification of brain tumors (Glioma, Meningioma, Pituitary, and No Tumor). In the first approach, a custom Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture named "OkanNet", which has a low computational cost and fast training time, was designed from scratch. In the second approach, the Transfer Learning method was applied using the 50-layer ResNet-50 [1] architecture, pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset. In experiments conducted on an extended dataset compiled by Masoud Nickparvar containing a total of $7,023$ MRI images, the Transfer Learning-based ResNet-50 model exhibited superior classification performance, achieving $96.49\%$ Accuracy and $0.963$ Precision. In contrast, the custom OkanNet architecture reached an accuracy rate of $88.10\%$; however, it proved to be a strong alternative for mobile and embedded systems with limited computational power by yielding results approximately $3.2$ times faster ($311$ seconds) than ResNet-50 in terms of training time. This study demonstrates the trade-off between model depth and computational efficiency in medical image analysis through experimental data.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发并比较了两种深度学习方法来自动检测和分类脑肿瘤（胶质瘤、脑膜瘤、垂体瘤和无肿瘤），其中迁移学习的ResNet-50模型在准确率上表现更优（96.49%），而自定义的OkanNet架构虽然准确率较低（88.10%），但训练速度快3.2倍，更适合计算资源有限的移动和嵌入式系统。
AI.motivation: MRI图像的手动分析耗时且易受人为疲劳影响，因此需要开发自动化的脑肿瘤检测和分类系统来提高诊断效率和准确性。
AI.method: 采用两种深度学习方法：1）从头设计的轻量级自定义CNN架构"OkanNet"；2）基于ImageNet预训练的ResNet-50架构的迁移学习方法。在包含7,023张MRI图像的扩展数据集上进行实验比较。
AI.result: ResNet-50模型在分类性能上表现更优，达到96.49%的准确率和0.963的精确率。OkanNet架构准确率为88.10%，但训练时间仅需311秒，比ResNet-50快约3.2倍。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了医学图像分析中模型深度与计算效率之间的权衡：ResNet-50在准确性上更优，而OkanNet在计算资源有限的环境中具有实用价值，为移动和嵌入式系统提供了可行的替代方案。

title: A Dynamic Atlas of Persian Poetic Symbolism: Families, Fields, and the Historical Rewiring of Meaning
summary: Persian poetry is often remembered through recurrent symbols before it is remembered through plot. Wine vessels, gardens, flames, sacred titles, bodily beauty, and courtly names return across centuries, yet computational work still tends to flatten this material into isolated words or broad document semantics. That misses a practical unit of organization in Persian poetics: related forms travel as families and gain force through recurring relations. Using a corpus of 129,451 poems, we consolidate recurrent forms into traceable families, separate imagistic material from sacred and courtly reference, and map their relations in a multi-layer graph. The symbolic core is relatively sparse, the referential component much denser, and the attachment zone between them selective rather than diffuse. Across 11 Hijri-century bins, some families remain widely distributed, especially Shab (Night), Ruz (Day), and Khaak (Earth). Wine vessels, garden space, flame, and lyric sound strengthen later, while prestige-coded and heroic-courtly vocabulary is weighted earlier. Century-specific graphs show change in arrangement as well as membership. Modularity rises, cross-scope linkage declines, courtly bridges weaken, and sacred bridges strengthen. Hub positions shift too: Kherqe (Sufi Robe) gains late prominence, Farkhondeh {Blessed} and Banafsheh (Violet) recede, and Saaghar (Wine Cup) stays central across the chronology. In this corpus, Persian symbolism appears less as a fixed repertory than as a long-lived system whose internal weights and connections change over time.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过计算分析波斯诗歌中的象征体系，发现波斯诗歌象征不是固定不变的，而是随时间变化的动态系统，其内部权重和连接关系会发生演变。
AI.motivation: 传统计算分析往往将波斯诗歌材料简化为孤立的词语或宽泛的文档语义，忽略了波斯诗学中一个实用的组织单位：相关形式以家族形式传播，并通过重复关系获得力量。研究旨在捕捉这种象征体系的动态演变。
AI.method: 使用包含129,451首诗歌的语料库，将重复形式整合为可追踪的家族，将意象材料与神圣和宫廷参照分离，并在多层图中映射它们的关系。按11个希吉拉世纪分箱进行分析。
AI.result: 象征核心相对稀疏，参照部分更密集，两者之间的连接区域是选择性的而非扩散的。某些家族（如夜、日、土）广泛分布，酒器、花园空间、火焰和抒情声音在后期增强，而声望编码和英雄宫廷词汇权重较早。模块性上升，跨范围连接减少，宫廷桥梁减弱，神圣桥梁增强。枢纽位置也发生变化。
AI.conclusion: 波斯诗歌象征体系不是一个固定的剧目，而是一个长期存在的系统，其内部权重和连接关系随时间变化。研究揭示了波斯诗歌象征体系的动态演变特征。

title: Drive My Way: Preference Alignment of Vision-Language-Action Model for Personalized Driving
comment: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR 2026); Project website: https://dmw-cvpr.github.io/
summary: Human driving behavior is inherently personal, which is shaped by long-term habits and influenced by short-term intentions. Individuals differ in how they accelerate, brake, merge, yield, and overtake across diverse situations. However, existing end-to-end autonomous driving systems either optimize for generic objectives or rely on fixed driving modes, lacking the ability to adapt to individual preferences or interpret natural language intent. To address this gap, we propose Drive My Way (DMW), a personalized Vision-Language-Action (VLA) driving framework that aligns with users' long-term driving habits and adapts to real-time user instructions. DMW learns a user embedding from our personalized driving dataset collected across multiple real drivers and conditions the policy on this embedding during planning, while natural language instructions provide additional short-term guidance. Closed-loop evaluation on the Bench2Drive benchmark demonstrates that DMW improves style instruction adaptation, and user studies show that its generated behaviors are recognizable as each driver's own style, highlighting personalization as a key capability for human-centered autonomous driving. Our data and code are available at https://dmw-cvpr.github.io/.

AI.tldr: Drive My Way (DMW) 是一个个性化的视觉-语言-动作驾驶框架，能够同时适应驾驶员的长期习惯和实时语言指令，实现个性化自动驾驶。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统要么优化通用目标，要么依赖固定驾驶模式，缺乏适应个体偏好或解释自然语言意图的能力。人类驾驶行为具有固有的个性化特征，受长期习惯和短期意图共同影响。
AI.method: 提出DMW框架：1) 从多驾驶员个性化驾驶数据集中学习用户嵌入；2) 在规划时以该嵌入为条件；3) 自然语言指令提供额外的短期指导；4) 采用视觉-语言-动作架构。
AI.result: 在Bench2Drive基准测试中，DMW改善了风格指令适应能力。用户研究表明，其生成的行为可被识别为每个驾驶员自身的风格，证明了个性化作为以人为中心的自动驾驶的关键能力。
AI.conclusion: 个性化是以人为中心的自动驾驶的关键能力。DMW框架通过结合长期驾驶习惯学习和实时语言指令适应，实现了有效的个性化驾驶行为生成。

title: KUET at StanceNakba Shared Task: StanceMoE: Mixture-of-Experts Architecture for Stance Detection
comment: Accepted for workshop proceedings of the 15th International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC'26)
summary: Actor-level stance detection aims to determine an author expressed position toward specific geopolitical actors mentioned or implicated in a text. Although transformer-based models have achieved relatively good performance in stance classification, they typically rely on unified representations that may not sufficiently capture heterogeneous linguistic signals, such as contrastive discourse structures, framing cues, and salient lexical indicators. This motivates the need for adaptive architectures that explicitly model diverse stance-expressive patterns. In this paper, we propose StanceMoE, a context-enhanced Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture built upon a fine-tuned BERT encoder for actor-level stance detection. Our model integrates six expert modules designed to capture complementary linguistic signals, including global semantic orientation, salient lexical cues, clause-level focus, phrase-level patterns, framing indicators, and contrast-driven discourse shifts. A context-aware gating mechanism dynamically weights expert contributions, enabling adaptive routing based on input characteristics. Experiments are conducted on the StanceNakba 2026 Subtask A dataset, comprising 1,401 annotated English texts where the target actor is implicit in the text. StanceMoE achieves a macro-F1 score of 94.26%, outperforming traditional baselines, and alternative BERT-based variants.

AI.tldr: 提出StanceMoE模型，一种基于BERT的混合专家架构，用于演员级立场检测，通过六个专家模块捕获互补的语言信号，在StanceNakba 2026数据集上达到94.26%的宏F1分数。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的立场检测模型依赖统一表示，未能充分捕捉对比性话语结构、框架线索和显著词汇指示符等异质语言信号，需要能够显式建模多样化立场表达模式的自适应架构。
AI.method: 提出StanceMoE架构：基于微调BERT编码器，集成六个专家模块（全局语义导向、显著词汇线索、从句级焦点、短语级模式、框架指示符、对比驱动的话语转移），采用上下文感知门控机制动态加权专家贡献，实现基于输入特征的自适应路由。
AI.result: 在StanceNakba 2026 Subtask A数据集（1,401个英文文本，目标演员隐含）上，StanceMoE获得94.26%的宏F1分数，优于传统基线和替代BERT变体。
AI.conclusion: StanceMoE通过混合专家架构有效捕获多样化的立场表达模式，上下文感知门控机制实现自适应专家组合，显著提升演员级立场检测性能，验证了显式建模异质语言信号的价值。

title: SoftMimicGen: A Data Generation System for Scalable Robot Learning in Deformable Object Manipulation
summary: Large-scale robot datasets have facilitated the learning of a wide range of robot manipulation skills, but these datasets remain difficult to collect and scale further, owing to the intractable amount of human time, effort, and cost required. Simulation and synthetic data generation have proven to be an effective alternative to fuel this need for data, especially with the advent of recent work showing that such synthetic datasets can dramatically reduce real-world data requirements and facilitate generalization to novel scenarios unseen in real-world demonstrations. However, this paradigm has been limited to rigid-body tasks, which are easy to simulate. Deformable object manipulation encompasses a large portion of real-world manipulation and remains a crucial gap to address towards increasing adoption of the synthetic simulation data paradigm. In this paper, we introduce SoftMimicGen, an automated data generation pipeline for deformable object manipulation tasks. We introduce a suite of high-fidelity simulation environments that encompasses a wide range of deformable objects (stuffed animal, rope, tissue, towel) and manipulation behaviors (high-precision threading, dynamic whipping, folding, pick-and-place), across four robot embodiments: a single-arm manipulator, bimanual arms, a humanoid, and a surgical robot. We apply SoftMimicGen to generate datasets across the task suite, train high-performing policies from the data, and systematically analyze the data generation system. Project website: \href{https://softmimicgen.github.io}{softmimicgen.github.io}.

AI.tldr: SoftMimicGen：用于可变形物体操作的自动化数据生成管道，通过高保真仿真环境生成合成数据集，减少真实世界数据需求
AI.motivation: 大规模机器人数据集收集成本高昂且难以扩展，现有合成数据方法主要局限于刚体任务，而可变形物体操作在真实世界操作中占很大比例，是合成仿真数据范式需要解决的关键缺口
AI.method: 开发SoftMimicGen自动化数据生成管道，创建包含多种可变形物体（毛绒玩具、绳索、纸巾、毛巾）和操作行为（高精度穿线、动态挥动、折叠、拾放）的高保真仿真环境套件，支持四种机器人构型：单臂机械手、双臂、人形机器人和手术机器人
AI.result: 成功生成跨任务套件的数据集，训练出高性能策略，并系统分析了数据生成系统的性能
AI.conclusion: SoftMimicGen填补了可变形物体操作在合成仿真数据范式中的关键空白，为机器人学习提供了可扩展的自动化数据生成解决方案

title: Accurate and Scalable Matrix Mechanisms via Divide and Conquer
summary:
Matrix mechanisms are often used to provide unbiased differentially private query answers when publishing statistics or creating synthetic data. Recent work has developed matrix mechanisms, such as ResidualPlanner and Weighted Fourier Factorizations, that scale to high dimensional datasets while providing optimality guarantees for workloads such as marginals and circular product queries. They operate by adding noise to a linearly independent set of queries that can compactly represent the desired workloads.
  In this paper, we present QuerySmasher, an alternative scalable approach based on a divide-and-conquer strategy. Given a workload that can be answered from various data marginals, QuerySmasher splits each query into sub-queries and re-assembles the pieces into mutually orthogonal sub-workloads. These sub-workloads represent small, low-dimensional problems that can be independently and optimally answered by existing low-dimensional matrix mechanisms. QuerySmasher then stitches these solutions together to answer queries in the original workload.
  We show that QuerySmasher subsumes prior work, like ResidualPlanner (RP), ResidualPlanner+ (RP+), and Weighted Fourier Factorizations (WFF). We prove that it can dominate those approaches, under sum squared error, for all workloads. We also experimentally demonstrate the scalability and accuracy of QuerySmasher.

AI.tldr: QuerySmasher：一种基于分治策略的可扩展矩阵机制，通过将查询分解为子查询并重组为相互正交的子工作负载，利用现有低维矩阵机制独立优化求解，最终拼接结果回答原始工作负载查询。
AI.motivation: 现有矩阵机制（如ResidualPlanner、Weighted Fourier Factorizations）虽然能扩展到高维数据集并为边际查询和循环乘积查询等工作负载提供最优性保证，但仍需开发更通用、可扩展的替代方法。QuerySmasher旨在通过分治策略提供更灵活、可扩展的解决方案。
AI.method: QuerySmasher采用分治策略：1) 将每个查询分解为子查询；2) 将片段重组为相互正交的子工作负载；3) 这些子工作负载代表小型低维问题，可由现有低维矩阵机制独立优化求解；4) 最后将这些解决方案拼接起来回答原始工作负载中的查询。
AI.result: 理论证明QuerySmasher包含并优于先前工作（ResidualPlanner、ResidualPlanner+、Weighted Fourier Factorizations），在平方和误差下对所有工作负载具有支配性。实验验证了QuerySmasher的可扩展性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: QuerySmasher提供了一种可扩展的分治方法，能够处理高维数据集中的差分隐私查询回答，不仅包含并优于现有方法，还展示了实际的可扩展性和准确性优势。

title: Reducing Hallucinations in LLM-based Scientific Literature Analysis Using Peer Context Outlier Detection
summary: Reducing hallucinations in Large Language Models (LLMs) is essential for improving the accuracy of data extraction from large text corpora. Current methods, like prompt engineering and chain-of-thought prompting, focus on individual documents but fail to consider relationships across a corpus. This paper introduces Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD), a novel approach that uses the relationships between documents to improve extraction accuracy. Our application domain is in scientific literature summarization, where papers with similar experiment settings should draw similar conclusions. By comparing extracted data to validated peer information within the corpus, we adjust confidence scores and flag low-confidence results for expert review. High-confidence results, supported by peer validation, are considered reliable. Our experiments demonstrate up to 98% precision in outlier detection across 6 domains of science, demonstrating that our design reduces hallucinations, enhances trust in automated systems, and allows researchers to focus on ambiguous cases, streamlining the data extraction workflows.

AI.tldr: P-COD方法通过文档间关系检测异常值，减少LLM幻觉，在科学文献摘要中实现高达98%的异常检测精度
AI.motivation: 当前方法（如提示工程、思维链）仅关注单个文档，忽略了文档间关系，导致大型语言模型在从大规模文本语料库中提取数据时产生幻觉，需要改进提取准确性
AI.method: 提出Peer Context Outlier Detection (P-COD)方法，利用文档间关系改进提取准确性。在科学文献摘要应用中，通过比较提取数据与语料库中已验证的同行信息，调整置信度分数并标记低置信结果供专家审查
AI.result: 实验表明，在6个科学领域中，异常检测精度高达98%。该方法减少了幻觉，增强了对自动化系统的信任，使研究人员能够专注于模糊案例
AI.conclusion: P-COD通过利用文档间关系显著提高了数据提取准确性，减少了LLM幻觉，优化了数据提取工作流程，使研究人员能够专注于需要人工审查的模糊案例

title: Intelligent Navigation and Obstacle-Aware Fabrication for Mobile Additive Manufacturing Systems
summary: As the demand for mass customization increases, manufacturing systems must become more flexible and adaptable to produce personalized products efficiently. Additive manufacturing (AM) enhances production adaptability by enabling on-demand fabrication of customized components directly from digital models, but its flexibility remains constrained by fixed equipment layouts. Integrating mobile robots addresses this limitation by allowing manufacturing resources to move and adapt to changing production requirements. Mobile AM Robots (MAMbots) combine AM with mobile robotics to produce and transport components within dynamic manufacturing environments. However, the dynamic manufacturing environments introduce challenges for MAMbots. Disturbances such as obstacles and uneven terrain can disrupt navigation stability, which in turn affects printing accuracy and surface quality. This work proposes a universal mobile printing-and-delivery platform that couples navigation and material deposition, addressing the limitations of earlier frameworks that treated these processes separately. A real-time control framework is developed to plan and control the robot's navigation, ensuring safe motion, obstacle avoidance, and path stability while maintaining print quality. The closed-loop integration of sensing, mobility, and manufacturing provides real-time feedback for motion and process control, enabling MAMbots to make autonomous decisions in dynamic environments. The framework is validated through simulations and real-world experiments that test its adaptability to trajectory variations and external disturbances. Coupled navigation and printing together enable MAMbots to plan safe, adaptive trajectories, improving flexibility and adaptability in manufacturing.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种将导航与材料沉积耦合的通用移动打印配送平台，通过实时控制框架确保动态制造环境中的安全运动、避障和打印质量
AI.motivation: 增材制造虽然提高了生产适应性，但固定设备布局限制了灵活性。移动AM机器人结合了增材制造与移动机器人技术，可在动态制造环境中生产和运输组件，但动态环境中的障碍物和不平坦地形等干扰会影响导航稳定性和打印精度
AI.method: 开发了一个实时控制框架，将导航与材料沉积过程耦合，通过闭环集成传感、移动和制造，为运动和过程控制提供实时反馈，使MAMbots能在动态环境中自主决策
AI.result: 通过仿真和真实世界实验验证了框架的适应性，能够应对轨迹变化和外部干扰，耦合导航和打印使MAMbots能够规划安全、自适应的轨迹
AI.conclusion: 提出的通用移动打印配送平台通过耦合导航和材料沉积，解决了早期框架将这两个过程分开处理的局限性，提高了制造系统的灵活性和适应性

title: Persistent Robot World Models: Stabilizing Multi-Step Rollouts via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Action-conditioned robot world models generate future video frames of the manipulated scene given a robot action sequence, offering a promising alternative for simulating tasks that are difficult to model with traditional physics engines. However, these models are optimized for short-term prediction and break down when deployed autoregressively: each predicted clip feeds back as context for the next, causing errors to compound and visual quality to rapidly degrade. We address this through the following contributions. First, we introduce a reinforcement learning (RL) post-training scheme that trains the world model on its own autoregressive rollouts rather than on ground-truth histories. We achieve this by adapting a recent contrastive RL objective for diffusion models to our setting and show that its convergence guarantees carry over exactly. Second, we design a training protocol that generates and compares multiple candidate variable-length futures from the same rollout state, reinforcing higher-fidelity predictions over lower-fidelity ones. Third, we develop efficient, multi-view visual fidelity rewards that combine complementary perceptual metrics across camera views and are aggregated at the clip level for dense, low-variance training signal. Fourth, we show that our approach establishes a new state-of-the-art for rollout fidelity on the DROID dataset, outperforming the strongest baseline on all metrics (e.g., LPIPS reduced by 14% on external cameras, SSIM improved by 9.1% on the wrist camera), winning 98% of paired comparisons, and achieving an 80% preference rate in a blind human study.

AI.tldr: 提出一种强化学习后训练方案，通过自回归滚动的对比RL目标训练世界模型，结合多视图视觉保真度奖励，显著提升机器人世界模型的长时预测质量
AI.motivation: 基于动作的机器人世界模型在自回归部署时存在误差累积问题：每个预测片段作为下一个片段的上下文，导致视觉质量迅速退化，需要解决长时预测的稳定性问题
AI.method: 1) 引入RL后训练方案，在自回归滚动而非真实历史上训练世界模型；2) 采用对比RL目标并证明其收敛性保证；3) 设计训练协议生成并比较同一状态下的多个候选变长未来；4) 开发高效的多视图视觉保真度奖励，结合互补感知指标
AI.result: 在DROID数据集上建立新的最先进水平：LPIPS降低14%（外部相机），SSIM提升9.1%（腕部相机），赢得98%的配对比较，在盲人研究中获得80%偏好率
AI.conclusion: 通过强化学习后训练和精心设计的视觉保真度奖励，显著提升了机器人世界模型的自回归预测质量，解决了长时预测中的误差累积问题

title: A Multi-Agent Human-LLM Collaborative Framework for Closed-Loop Scientific Literature Summarization
summary: Scientific discovery is slowed by fragmented literature that requires excessive human effort to gather, analyze, and understand. AI tools, including autonomous summarization and question answering, have been developed to aid in understanding scientific literature. However, these tools lack the structured, multi-step approach necessary for extracting deep insights from scientific literature. Large Language Models (LLMs) offer new possibilities for literature analysis, but remain unreliable due to hallucinations and incomplete extraction. We introduce Elhuyar, a multi-agent, human-in-the-loop system that integrates LLMs, structured AI, and human scientists to extract, analyze, and iteratively refine insights from scientific literature. The framework distributes tasks among specialized agents for filtering papers, extracting data, fitting models, and summarizing findings, with human oversight ensuring reliability. The system generates structured reports with extracted data, visualizations, model equations, and text summaries, enabling deeper inquiry through iterative refinement. Deployed in materials science, it analyzed literature on tungsten under helium-ion irradiation, showing experimentally correlated exponential helium bubble growth with irradiation dose and temperature, offering insight for plasma-facing materials (PFMs) in fusion reactors. This demonstrates how AI-assisted literature review can uncover scientific patterns and accelerate discovery.

AI.tldr: Elhuyar是一个多智能体、人机协同系统，结合LLM、结构化AI和人类科学家，从科学文献中提取、分析和迭代精炼见解，应用于材料科学领域。
AI.motivation: 科学发现受到碎片化文献的限制，需要大量人力收集、分析和理解。现有AI工具缺乏结构化、多步骤的方法来从科学文献中提取深度见解，而LLM存在幻觉和不完整提取的问题。
AI.method: 开发了多智能体、人机协同系统Elhuyar，集成LLM、结构化AI和人类科学家。系统通过专门智能体分配任务：过滤论文、提取数据、拟合模型和总结发现，人类监督确保可靠性。系统生成结构化报告，包含提取数据、可视化、模型方程和文本摘要，支持通过迭代精炼进行深度探究。
AI.result: 在材料科学中部署，分析了钨在氦离子辐照下的文献，发现氦气泡生长与辐照剂量和温度呈指数相关，为聚变反应堆中的等离子体面向材料提供了见解。展示了AI辅助文献综述如何发现科学模式并加速发现。
AI.conclusion: Elhuyar系统通过结合LLM、结构化AI和人类监督，能够从科学文献中提取深度见解，加速科学发现，特别是在材料科学等复杂领域。

title: Can Users Specify Driving Speed? Bench2Drive-Speed: Benchmark and Baselines for Desired-Speed Conditioned Autonomous Driving
summary: End-to-end autonomous driving (E2E-AD) has achieved remarkable progress. However, one practical and useful function has been long overlooked: users may wish to customize the desired speed of the policy or specify whether to allow the autonomous vehicle to overtake. To bridge this gap, we present Bench2Drive-Speed, a benchmark with metrics, dataset, and baselines for desired-speed conditioned autonomous driving. We introduce explicit inputs of users' desired target-speed and overtake/follow instructions to driving policy models. We design quantitative metrics, including Speed-Adherence Score and Overtake Score, to measure how faithfully policies follow user specifications, while remaining compatible with standard autonomous driving metrics. To enable training of speed-conditioned policies, one approach is to collect expert demonstrations that strictly follow speed requirements, an expensive and unscalable process in the real world. An alternative is to adapt existing regular driving data by treating the speed observed in future frames as the target speed for training. To investigate this, we construct CustomizedSpeedDataset, composed of 2,100 clips annotated with experts demonstrations, enabling systematic investigation of supervision strategies. Our experiments show that, under proper re-annotation, models trained on regular driving data perform comparably to on expert demonstrations, suggesting that speed supervision can be introduced without additional complex real-world data collection. Furthermore, we find that while target-speed following can be achieved without degrading regular driving performance, executing overtaking commands remains challenging due to the inherent difficulty of interactive behaviors. All code, datasets and baselines are available at https://github.com/Thinklab-SJTU/Bench2Drive-Speed

AI.tldr: 提出了Bench2Drive-Speed基准，用于评估自动驾驶策略在用户指定速度和超车指令下的表现，通过重新标注常规驾驶数据实现速度监督，无需额外数据收集。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶研究忽视了用户自定义速度和超车偏好的功能需求，需要建立能够评估策略遵循用户指令能力的基准。
AI.method: 构建Bench2Drive-Speed基准，包含评估指标、数据集和基线模型；引入用户期望速度和超车/跟随指令作为模型输入；设计速度遵循分数和超车分数等量化指标；创建CustomizedSpeedDataset（2100个专家标注片段）；通过重新标注常规驾驶数据将未来帧速度作为训练目标。
AI.result: 经适当重新标注后，在常规驾驶数据上训练的模型表现与专家演示相当，表明无需额外复杂数据收集即可实现速度监督；速度跟随功能不影响常规驾驶性能，但执行超车指令仍具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 通过重新标注现有驾驶数据可实现用户速度定制功能，为自动驾驶系统引入用户偏好控制提供了可行路径，但交互性行为（如超车）仍需进一步研究。

title: Fast-dVLA: Accelerating Discrete Diffusion VLA to Real-Time Performance
summary: This paper proposes a novel approach to address the challenge that pretrained VLA models often fail to effectively improve performance and reduce adaptation costs during standard supervised finetuning (SFT). Some advanced finetuning methods with auxiliary training objectives can improve performance and reduce the number of convergence steps. However, they typically incur significant computational overhead due to the additional losses from auxiliary tasks. To simultaneously achieve the enhanced capabilities of auxiliary training with the simplicity of standard SFT, we decouple the two objectives of auxiliary task training within the parameter space, namely, enhancing general capabilities and fitting task-specific action distributions. To deliver this goal, we only need to train the model to converge on a small-scale task set using two distinct training strategies. The difference between the resulting model parameters can then be interpreted as capability vectors provided by auxiliary tasks. These vectors are then merged with pretrained parameters to form a capability-enhanced meta model. Moreover, when standard SFT is augmented with a lightweight orthogonal regularization loss, the merged model attains performance comparable to auxiliary finetuned baselines with reduced computational overhead. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach is highly effective across diverse robot tasks. Project page: https://chris1220313648.github.io/Fast-dVLA/

AI.tldr: 提出Fast-dVLA方法，通过解耦辅助任务训练的两个目标（增强通用能力和拟合任务特定分布），在小规模任务集上训练获得能力向量，与预训练参数合并形成能力增强的元模型，结合轻量正交正则化实现高效微调。
AI.motivation: 预训练的视觉语言动作模型在标准监督微调中往往无法有效提升性能且适应成本高。现有带辅助训练目标的微调方法虽能提升性能并减少收敛步数，但会因额外的辅助任务损失带来显著计算开销。
AI.method: 1. 在参数空间中解耦辅助任务训练的两个目标：增强通用能力和拟合任务特定动作分布；2. 在小规模任务集上使用两种不同训练策略训练模型收敛；3. 将得到的模型参数差异解释为辅助任务提供的能力向量；4. 将这些向量与预训练参数合并形成能力增强的元模型；5. 标准SFT结合轻量正交正则化损失。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该方法在多种机器人任务中高度有效，合并模型在减少计算开销的同时，性能可与辅助微调基线相媲美。
AI.conclusion: Fast-dVLA方法能够同时实现辅助训练增强能力和标准SFT简单性的优势，通过解耦训练目标、提取能力向量和参数合并，在降低计算成本的同时提升模型性能。

title: DySCo: Dynamic Semantic Compression for Effective Long-term Time Series Forecasting
summary: Time series forecasting (TSF) is critical across domains such as finance, meteorology, and energy. While extending the lookback window theoretically provides richer historical context, in practice, it often introduces irrelevant noise and computational redundancy, preventing models from effectively capturing complex long-term dependencies. To address these challenges, we propose a Dynamic Semantic Compression (DySCo) framework. Unlike traditional methods that rely on fixed heuristics, DySCo introduces an Entropy-Guided Dynamic Sampling (EGDS) mechanism to autonomously identify and retain high-entropy segments while compressing redundant trends. Furthermore, we incorporate a Hierarchical Frequency-Enhanced Decomposition (HFED) strategy to separate high-frequency anomalies from low-frequency patterns, ensuring that critical details are preserved during sparse sampling. Finally, a Cross-Scale Interaction Mixer(CSIM) is designed to dynamically fuse global contexts with local representations, replacing simple linear aggregation. Experimental results demonstrate that DySCo serves as a universal plug-and-play module, significantly enhancing the ability of mainstream models to capture long-term correlations with reduced computational cost.

AI.tldr: DySCo是一个动态语义压缩框架，通过熵引导动态采样、分层频率增强分解和跨尺度交互混合器，有效提升时间序列预测模型的长时依赖捕捉能力，同时降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 时间序列预测中，延长回望窗口理论上能提供更丰富的历史上下文，但实践中常引入无关噪声和计算冗余，阻碍模型有效捕捉复杂的长时依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出动态语义压缩框架DySCo，包含三个核心组件：1) 熵引导动态采样机制，自主识别并保留高熵片段同时压缩冗余趋势；2) 分层频率增强分解策略，分离高频异常与低频模式；3) 跨尺度交互混合器，动态融合全局上下文与局部表示。
AI.result: 实验结果表明DySCo可作为通用即插即用模块，显著提升主流模型捕捉长时相关性的能力，同时降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: DySCo框架通过动态语义压缩有效解决了时间序列预测中长时依赖捕捉的挑战，在保持计算效率的同时提升了预测性能。

title: arg-VU: Affordance Reasoning with Physics-Aware 3D Geometry for Visual Understanding in Robotic Surgery
summary: Affordance reasoning provides a principled link between perception and action, yet remains underexplored in surgical robotics, where tissues are highly deformable, compliant, and dynamically coupled with tool motion. We present arg-VU, a physics-aware affordance reasoning framework that integrates temporally consistent geometry tracking with constraint-induced mechanical modeling for surgical visual understanding. Surgical scenes are reconstructed using 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) and converted into a temporally tracked surface representation. Extended Position-Based Dynamics (XPBD) embeds local deformation constraints and produces representative geometry points (RGPs) whose constraint sensitivities define anisotropic stiffness metrics capturing the local constraint-manifold geometry. Robotic tool poses in SE(3) are incorporated to compute rigidly induced displacements at RGPs, from which we derive two complementary measures: a physics-aware compliance energy that evaluates mechanical feasibility with respect to local deformation constraints, and a positional agreement score that captures motion alignment (as kinematic motion baseline). Experiments on surgical video datasets show that arg-VU yields more stable, physically consistent, and interpretable affordance predictions than kinematic baselines. These results demonstrate that physics-aware geometric representations enable reliable affordance reasoning for deformable surgical environments and support embodied robotic interaction.

AI.tldr: arg-VU是一个物理感知的affordance推理框架，将时间一致的几何跟踪与约束诱导的机械建模相结合，用于手术视觉理解，在可变形手术环境中实现可靠的affordance推理。
AI.motivation: affordance推理为感知和行动提供了原则性联系，但在手术机器人领域尚未充分探索，因为手术组织具有高度可变形性、柔顺性，且与工具运动动态耦合。需要物理感知的方法来处理这些复杂特性。
AI.method: 使用3D高斯泼溅(3DGS)重建手术场景并转换为时间跟踪的表面表示；扩展位置动力学(XPBD)嵌入局部变形约束并生成代表性几何点(RGPs)，其约束敏感性定义了各向异性刚度度量；结合SE(3)中的机器人工具位姿计算RGPs处的刚性诱导位移，推导出物理感知的顺应性能量和位置一致性分数。
AI.result: 在手术视频数据集上的实验表明，arg-VU相比运动学基线方法产生了更稳定、物理一致且可解释的affordance预测。物理感知的几何表示能够实现可变形手术环境的可靠affordance推理。
AI.conclusion: 物理感知的几何表示使可变形手术环境的可靠affordance推理成为可能，并支持具身机器人交互。arg-VU框架为手术机器人中的affordance推理提供了物理一致的方法。

title: Optimal Brain Decomposition for Accurate LLM Low-Rank Approximation
summary: Low-rank decomposition has emerged as an important problem in Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning and inference. Through Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), the weight matrix can be factorized into low-rank spaces optimally. Previously, a common practice was to decompose the weight in the activation-whitened space, and then achieve satisfying results. In this work, we propose Optimal Brain Decomposition LLM (OBD-LLM), which studies the decomposition problem in the model space by utilizing second-order Hessian information. Through a rigorous Kronecker-factorization of the Hessian, we show that the decomposition needs to consider both input and output information of the layer, and achieves much better decomposition results compared to input only method. Our loss-aware decomposition method involves a bi-directional whitening on the weight matrix. As a result, OBD-LLM is a closed-form solution for the optimal decomposition of weights in the language model. Remarkably, we achieve ~20-40\% better results than previous state-of-the-art decomposition methods, the SVD-LLM.

AI.tldr: OBD-LLM提出了一种基于二阶Hessian信息的低秩分解方法，通过双向白化权重矩阵，在模型空间中实现最优分解，相比仅考虑输入信息的SVD-LLM方法提升20-40%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM微调和推理中的低秩分解方法主要基于奇异值分解(SVD)，通常在激活白化空间中进行分解。这些方法主要考虑输入信息，未能充分利用模型空间的二阶信息，导致分解结果不够优化。
AI.method: 提出OBD-LLM方法：1) 在模型空间中研究分解问题，利用二阶Hessian信息；2) 通过Hessian的Kronecker分解，证明分解需要同时考虑层的输入和输出信息；3) 采用损失感知的分解方法，对权重矩阵进行双向白化；4) 为语言模型中的权重分解提供闭式最优解。
AI.result: OBD-LLM相比先前最先进的分解方法SVD-LLM，取得了约20-40%的性能提升，证明了同时考虑输入和输出信息的双向白化方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用二阶Hessian信息和双向白化策略，OBD-LLM为LLM权重分解提供了最优闭式解，显著优于仅考虑输入信息的传统SVD方法，为高效模型压缩和加速提供了新思路。

title: All Substitution Is Local
summary: When does consulting one information source raise the value of another, and when does it diminish it? We study this question for Bayesian decision-makers facing finite actions. The interaction decomposes into two opposing forces: a complement force, measuring how one source moves beliefs to where the other becomes more useful, and a substitute force, measuring how much the current decision is resolved. Their balance obeys a localization principle: substitution requires an observation to cross a decision boundary, though crossing alone does not guarantee it. Whenever posteriors remain inside the current decision region, the substitute force vanishes, and sources are guaranteed to complement each other, even when one source cannot, on its own, change the decision. The results hold for arbitrarily correlated sources and are formalized in Lean 4. Substitution is confined to the thin boundaries where decisions change. Everywhere else, information cooperates. Code and proofs: https://github.com/nidhishs/all-substitution-is-local.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了信息源之间的互补与替代关系，提出了一个分解框架：互补力衡量一个信息源如何将信念移动到另一个信息源更有用的区域，替代力衡量当前决策被解决的程度。两者平衡遵循局部化原则：替代仅发生在观测跨越决策边界时。
AI.motivation: 研究信息源何时相互补充、何时相互替代的基本问题。对于面临有限行动的贝叶斯决策者，理解信息交互的机制有助于设计更有效的信息获取策略和系统。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯决策理论框架，将信息交互分解为互补力和替代力两个对立力量。提出局部化原则：替代仅发生在观测跨越决策边界时。方法适用于任意相关的信息源，并在Lean 4中形式化验证。
AI.result: 当后验保持在当前决策区域内时，替代力消失，信息源保证相互补充，即使单个信息源无法单独改变决策。替代被限制在决策改变的薄边界上，其他所有区域信息都相互合作。
AI.conclusion: 信息源之间的替代关系是局部现象，仅发生在决策边界附近。在绝大多数决策区域内，信息源总是相互补充的。这一发现为理解信息价值交互提供了新的理论框架。

title: A Mentalistic Interface for Probing Folk-Psychological Attribution to Non-Humanoid Robots
comment: Preprint submitted to IEEE. 8 pages, 21 figures
summary: This paper presents an experimental platform for studying intentional-state attribution toward a non-humanoid robot. The system combines a simulated robot, realistic task environments, and large language model-based explanatory layers that can express the same behavior in mentalistic, teleological, or mechanistic terms. By holding behavior constant while varying the explanatory frame, the platform provides a controlled way to investigate how language and framing shape the adoption of the intentional stance in robotics.

AI.tldr: 开发了一个实验平台，用于研究人类对非人形机器人意向状态归因，通过保持行为不变但改变解释框架（心理主义、目的论、机械论）来探究语言和框架如何影响意向立场的采用。
AI.motivation: 研究人类如何将意向状态归因于非人形机器人，以及语言和解释框架如何影响这种归因过程。目前缺乏能够系统研究意向立场采用机制的可控实验平台。
AI.method: 开发了一个结合模拟机器人、真实任务环境和基于大语言模型的解释层的实验平台。平台能够用心理主义、目的论和机械论三种不同术语描述相同行为，保持行为不变的同时改变解释框架。
AI.result: 创建了一个可控的实验平台，能够系统研究语言和框架如何塑造机器人学中意向立场的采用。平台提供了研究人类对非人形机器人意向状态归因的新方法。
AI.conclusion: 该平台为研究意向立场在机器人学中的采用提供了有价值的工具，通过控制解释框架的变化，能够深入理解语言和认知框架如何影响人类对机器人行为的解释和归因。

title: Cost-Penalized Fitness in FMA-Orchestrated Mixture of Experts: Experimental Evidence for Molecular Memory in Domain Adaptation
summary: We present experimental results from seven controlled runs of nanoFMT, a Free-Market Algorithm (FMA) orchestrated transformer with dynamic Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) management. The experiments address a fundamental question for advanced LLM development: how should an MoE system manage its expert pool when operating at full capacity under changing data distributions? We demonstrate that cost-penalized fitness metrics, combined with a linear grace period for newborn experts, produce a system that accumulates domain expertise through diversification rather than replacement. The central result is a round-trip domain shift experiment showing 9-11x faster recovery when returning to a previously learned domain, with zero expert births or replacements required. This "molecular memory" effect -- where dormant experts survive and reactivate when their domain returns -- has no analogue in current MoE management approaches. A preliminary cost analysis estimates annual savings of $39.1M and 27.1 GWh energy reduction for an OpenAI-scale provider under a moderate scenario.

AI.tldr: nanoFMT是一种采用自由市场算法和动态MoE管理的Transformer，实验显示通过成本惩罚适应度指标和专家新生宽限期，系统能够通过多样化而非替换积累领域专长，在领域轮换实验中实现9-11倍的恢复速度提升。
AI.motivation: 解决高级LLM开发中的核心问题：当MoE系统在满负荷运行且数据分布变化时，应如何管理其专家池？探索在容量限制下如何优化专家管理策略。
AI.method: 使用nanoFMT（自由市场算法编排的Transformer）进行七次受控实验，采用成本惩罚适应度指标结合新生专家的线性宽限期，通过动态MoE管理实现专家池的优化。
AI.result: 在领域轮换实验中，返回先前学习过的领域时恢复速度快9-11倍，无需专家新生或替换。系统表现出"分子记忆"效应，休眠专家在领域回归时能够存活并重新激活。初步成本分析显示，在中等规模场景下，OpenAI级别的提供商每年可节省3910万美元并减少27.1GWh能耗。
AI.conclusion: 成本惩罚适应度指标与专家新生宽限期相结合的系统能够通过多样化而非替换积累领域专长，实现高效的专家池管理，在领域变化时表现出显著的恢复优势，具有重要的实际应用价值。

title: Accurate Surface and Reflectance Modelling from 3D Radar Data with Neural Radiance Fields
summary: Robust scene representation is essential for autonomous systems to safely operate in challenging low-visibility environments. Radar has a clear advantage over cameras and lidars in these conditions due to its resilience to environmental factors such as fog, smoke, or dust. However, radar data is inherently sparse and noisy, making reliable 3D surface reconstruction challenging. To address these challenges, we propose a neural implicit approach for 3D mapping from radar point clouds, which jointly models scene geometry and view-dependent radar intensities. Our method leverages a memory-efficient hybrid feature encoding to learn a continuous Signed Distance Field (SDF) for surface reconstruction, while also capturing radar-specific reflective properties. We show that our approach produces smoother, more accurate 3D surface reconstructions compared to existing lidar-based reconstruction methods applied to radar data, and can reconstruct view-dependent radar intensities. We also show that in general, as input point clouds get sparser, neural implicit representations render more faithful surfaces, compared to traditional explicit SDFs and meshing techniques.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经隐式表示的雷达点云3D建图方法，联合建模场景几何和视角相关的雷达强度，在低可见度环境下实现鲁棒的表面重建。
AI.motivation: 雷达在雾、烟、尘等低可见度环境下比相机和激光雷达更具优势，但雷达数据固有的稀疏性和噪声特性使得可靠的3D表面重建具有挑战性。需要开发能够处理雷达数据特性的重建方法。
AI.method: 采用神经隐式方法从雷达点云进行3D建图，联合建模场景几何和视角相关的雷达强度。使用内存高效的混合特征编码学习连续的符号距离场(SDF)进行表面重建，同时捕获雷达特定的反射特性。
AI.result: 相比现有的激光雷达重建方法应用于雷达数据，该方法能够产生更平滑、更准确的3D表面重建，并能重建视角相关的雷达强度。当输入点云变得更稀疏时，神经隐式表示相比传统的显式SDF和网格化技术能够渲染更真实的表面。
AI.conclusion: 神经隐式表示方法能够有效处理雷达数据的稀疏性和噪声特性，在低可见度环境下实现鲁棒的3D表面重建，为自动驾驶系统在恶劣环境下的安全运行提供了可靠的环境感知能力。

title: Deconfounding Scores and Representation Learning for Causal Effect Estimation with Weak Overlap
summary: Overlap, also known as positivity, is a key condition for causal treatment effect estimation. Many popular estimators suffer from high variance and become brittle when features differ strongly across treatment groups. This is especially challenging in high dimensions: the curse of dimensionality can make overlap implausible. To address this, we propose a class of feature representations called deconfounding scores, which preserve both identification and the target of estimation; the classical propensity and prognostic scores are two special cases. We characterize the problem of finding a representation with better overlap as minimizing an overlap divergence under a deconfounding score constraint. We then derive closed-form expressions for a class of deconfounding scores under a broad family of generalized linear models with Gaussian features and show that prognostic scores are overlap-optimal within this class. We conduct extensive experiments to assess this behavior empirically.

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为"去混淆分数"的特征表示方法，用于改善因果效应估计中的重叠性问题，证明了在广义线性模型下预后分数是最优的
AI.motivation: 因果效应估计中的重叠性（正性）是关键条件，但许多流行估计器在治疗组特征差异大时方差高且脆弱，高维情况下维度灾难使重叠性难以满足
AI.method: 提出去混淆分数作为特征表示，保持识别性和估计目标；将寻找更好重叠性的表示问题形式化为在去混淆分数约束下最小化重叠散度；推导了高斯特征广义线性模型下的一类去混淆分数的闭式解
AI.result: 证明了在广义线性模型类中，预后分数是重叠最优的去混淆分数；通过大量实验验证了这一理论结果
AI.conclusion: 去混淆分数为解决高维因果推断中的重叠性问题提供了理论框架，预后分数在该框架下被证明是最优表示，为改进因果效应估计提供了新方向

title: Reproducible, Explainable, and Effective Evaluations of Agentic AI for Software Engineering
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, accepted to the 2nd International Workshop on Responsible Software Engineering (ResponsibleSE 2026), co-located with FSE
summary: With the advancement of Agentic AI, researchers are increasingly leveraging autonomous agents to address challenges in software engineering (SE). However, the large language models (LLMs) that underpin these agents often function as black boxes, making it difficult to justify the superiority of Agentic AI approaches over baselines. Furthermore, missing information in the evaluation design description frequently renders the reproduction of results infeasible. To synthesize current evaluation practices for Agentic AI in SE, this study analyzes 18 papers on the topic, published or accepted by ICSE 2026, ICSE 2025, FSE 2025, ASE 2025, and ISSTA 2025. The analysis identifies prevailing approaches and their limitations in evaluating Agentic AI for SE, both in current research and potential future studies. To address these shortcomings, this position paper proposes a set of guidelines and recommendations designed to empower reproducible, explainable, and effective evaluations of Agentic AI in software engineering. In particular, we recommend that Agentic AI researchers make their Thought-Action-Result (TAR) trajectories and LLM interaction data, or summarized versions of these artifacts, publicly accessible. Doing so will enable subsequent studies to more effectively analyze the strengths and weaknesses of different Agentic AI approaches. To demonstrate the feasibility of such comparisons, we present a proof-of-concept case study that illustrates how TAR trajectories can support systematic analysis across approaches.

AI.tldr: 该立场论文分析了软件工程中Agentic AI的评估实践，识别了现有方法的局限性，并提出了一套提高评估可复现性、可解释性和有效性的指南，特别建议公开Thought-Action-Result轨迹和LLM交互数据。
AI.motivation: Agentic AI在软件工程中的应用日益增多，但支撑这些智能体的LLM通常作为黑盒运行，难以证明其相对于基线的优越性。此外，评估设计描述中信息缺失导致结果难以复现，需要系统分析当前评估实践并提出改进方案。
AI.method: 分析了ICSE 2026、ICSE 2025、FSE 2025、ASE 2025和ISSTA 2025等顶级会议中18篇关于Agentic AI在软件工程中应用的论文，识别了当前评估实践的方法和局限性。基于分析结果，提出了一套评估指南和推荐做法。
AI.result: 分析揭示了当前Agentic AI评估实践中的主要问题：LLM黑盒特性导致难以解释结果、评估设计信息不完整阻碍复现、缺乏系统性比较框架。提出了具体的改进建议，包括公开TAR轨迹和LLM交互数据，并通过概念验证案例展示了如何利用这些数据进行系统性分析。
AI.conclusion: 为提高软件工程中Agentic AI评估的质量，需要采用更透明、可复现的评估方法。公开TAR轨迹和LLM交互数据将促进更有效的比较分析，推动该领域向更严谨、可解释的研究方向发展。提出的指南为未来研究提供了实用框架。

title: Towards Generalizable Robotic Data Flywheel: High-Dimensional Factorization and Composition
summary: The lack of sufficiently diverse data, coupled with limited data efficiency, remains a major bottleneck for generalist robotic models, yet systematic strategies for collecting and curating such data are not fully explored. Task diversity arises from implicit factors that are sparsely distributed across multiple dimensions and are difficult to define explicitly. To address this challenge, we propose F-ACIL, a heuristic factor-aware compositional iterative learning framework that enables structured data factorization and promotes compositional generalization. F-ACIL decomposes the data distribution into structured factor spaces such as object, action, and environment. Based on the factorized formulation, we develop a factor-wise data collection and an iterative training paradigm that promotes compositional generalization over the high-dimensional factor space, leading to more effective utilization of real-world robotic demonstrations. With extensive real-world experiments, we show that F-ACIL can achieve more than 45% performance gains with 5-10$\times$ fewer demonstrations comparing to that of which without the strategy. The results suggest that structured factorization offers a practical pathway toward efficient compositional generalization in real-world robotic learning. We believe F-ACIL can inspire more systematic research on building generalizable robotic data flywheel strategies. More demonstrations can be found at: https://f-acil.github.io/

AI.tldr: F-ACIL是一个启发式因子感知的组合迭代学习框架，通过结构化数据分解和组合泛化来解决机器人学习中的数据多样性和效率问题。
AI.motivation: 机器人通用模型面临的主要瓶颈是缺乏足够多样化的数据以及有限的数据效率。任务多样性源于多个维度上稀疏分布的隐式因素，这些因素难以明确定义，而系统化的数据收集和整理策略尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出F-ACIL框架，将数据分布分解为结构化因子空间（如物体、动作、环境）。基于这种因子化表示，开发了因子级数据收集和迭代训练范式，促进高维因子空间上的组合泛化，从而更有效地利用真实世界机器人演示数据。
AI.result: 通过大量真实世界实验表明，F-ACIL相比无策略方法，使用5-10倍更少的演示数据即可实现超过45%的性能提升。结构化因子分解为真实世界机器人学习中的高效组合泛化提供了实用途径。
AI.conclusion: 结构化因子分解为机器人学习中的高效组合泛化提供了实用途径。F-ACIL能够激发更多关于构建可泛化机器人数据飞轮策略的系统性研究。

title: Routing-Free Mixture-of-Experts
summary: Standard Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models rely on centralized routing mechanisms that introduce rigid inductive biases. We propose Routing-Free MoE which eliminates any hard-coded centralized designs including external routers, Softmax, Top-K and load balancing, instead encapsulating all activation functionalities within individual experts and directly optimized through continuous gradient flow, enabling each expert to determine its activation entirely on its own. We introduce a unified adaptive load-balancing framework to simultaneously optimize both expert-balancing and token-balancing objectives through a configurable interpolation, allowing flexible and customizable resource allocation. Extensive experiments show that Routing-Free MoE can consistently outperform baselines with better scalability and robustness. We analyze its behavior in detail and offer insights that may facilitate future MoE design ad optimization.

AI.tldr: 提出Routing-Free MoE，消除集中式路由机制，将激活功能封装在专家内部，通过连续梯度流优化，实现专家自主决定激活
AI.motivation: 标准MoE模型依赖集中式路由机制，引入了刚性的归纳偏置。现有方法存在外部路由器、Softmax、Top-K和负载平衡等硬编码设计，限制了模型的灵活性和优化潜力
AI.method: 1. 提出Routing-Free MoE，消除所有硬编码的集中式设计；2. 将激活功能封装在个体专家内部；3. 通过连续梯度流直接优化；4. 引入统一自适应负载平衡框架，通过可配置插值同时优化专家平衡和令牌平衡目标
AI.result: 广泛实验表明Routing-Free MoE能够持续超越基线方法，具有更好的可扩展性和鲁棒性。详细分析了其行为特征，为未来MoE设计和优化提供了见解
AI.conclusion: Routing-Free MoE通过消除集中式路由设计，实现了更灵活、可定制的资源分配，为MoE架构提供了新的设计范式，具有更好的性能和可扩展性

title: Leveraging the Value of Information in POMDP Planning
summary: Partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) offer a principled formalism for planning under state and transition uncertainty. Despite advances made towards solving large POMDPs, obtaining performant policies under limited planning time remains a major challenge due to the curse of dimensionality and the curse of history. For many POMDP problems, the value of information (VOI) - the expected performance gain from reasoning about observations - varies over the belief space. We introduce a dynamic programming framework that exploits this structure by conditionally processing observations based on the value of information at each belief. Building on this framework, we propose Value of Information Monte Carlo planning (VOIMCP), a Monte Carlo Tree Search algorithm that allocates computational effort more efficiently by selectively disregarding observation information when the VOI is low, avoiding unnecessary branching of observations. We provide theoretical guarantees on the near-optimality of our VOI reasoning framework and derive non-asymptotic convergence bounds for VOIMCP. Simulation evaluations demonstrate that VOIMCP outperforms baselines on several POMDP benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出基于信息价值(VOI)的POMDP规划框架VOIMCP，通过选择性忽略低VOI观测来提升计算效率
AI.motivation: 解决POMDP规划中计算效率低下的问题，特别是面对维度灾难和历史灾难时，利用信息价值在信念空间中的变化特性来优化计算资源分配
AI.method: 提出动态规划框架，基于信念空间中的信息价值有条件地处理观测；在此基础上开发VOIMCP算法，这是一种蒙特卡洛树搜索算法，在信息价值低时选择性忽略观测信息，避免不必要的观测分支
AI.result: 提供了VOI推理框架的近似最优性理论保证，推导了VOIMCP的非渐近收敛边界；仿真评估显示VOIMCP在多个POMDP基准测试中优于基线方法
AI.conclusion: 通过利用信息价值在信念空间中的变化特性，选择性处理观测信息可以显著提高POMDP规划的计算效率，VOIMCP算法在实际应用中表现出优越性能

title: MIRANDA: MId-feature RANk-adversarial Domain Adaptation toward climate change-robust ecological forecasting with deep learning
summary: Plant phenology modelling aims to predict the timing of seasonal phases, such as leaf-out or flowering, from meteorological time series. Reliable predictions are crucial for anticipating ecosystem responses to climate change. While phenology modelling has traditionally relied on mechanistic approaches, deep learning methods have recently been proposed as flexible, data-driven alternatives with often superior performance. However, mechanistic models tend to outperform deep networks when data distribution shifts are induced by climate change. Domain Adaptation (DA) techniques could help address this limitation. Yet, unlike standard DA settings, climate change induces a temporal continuum of domains and involves both a covariate and label shift, with warmer records and earlier start of spring. To tackle this challenge, we introduce Mid-feature Rank-adversarial Domain Adaptation (MIRANDA). Whereas conventional adversarial methods enforce domain invariance on final latent representations, an approach that does not explicitly address label shift, we apply adversarial regularization to intermediate features. Moreover, instead of a binary domain-classification objective, we employ a rank-based objective that enforces year-invariance in the learned meteorological representations. On a country-scale dataset spanning 70 years and comprising 67,800 phenological observations of 5 tree species, we demonstrate that, unlike conventional DA approaches, MIRANDA improves robustness to climatic distribution shifts and narrows the performance gap with mechanistic models.

AI.tldr: 提出MIRANDA方法，通过中间特征对抗正则化和基于排序的目标函数，解决气候变化引起的分布偏移问题，提升物候模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统物候模型在气候变化导致的分布偏移下表现不佳，而深度学习模型虽然灵活但同样面临这一问题。领域自适应技术可能解决此限制，但气候变化带来的时间连续域变化以及协变量和标签同时偏移的特殊性需要新的方法。
AI.method: 提出Mid-feature Rank-adversarial Domain Adaptation (MIRANDA)方法：1) 在中间特征而非最终潜在表示上应用对抗正则化；2) 使用基于排序的目标函数而非二元域分类目标，强制学习到的气象表示具有年份不变性。
AI.result: 在包含70年数据、67,800个物候观测的5种树木物种的国家尺度数据集上，MIRANDA相比传统领域自适应方法提高了对气候分布偏移的鲁棒性，缩小了与机理模型的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: MIRANDA通过中间特征对抗正则化和排序目标函数，有效解决了气候变化引起的分布偏移问题，为物候建模提供了更鲁棒的深度学习解决方案。

title: Semantically Annotated Multimodal Dataset for RF Interpretation and Prediction
summary: Current limitations in wireless modeling and radio frequency (RF)-based AI are primarily driven by a lack of high-quality, measurement-based datasets that connect RF signals to their physical environments. RF heatmaps, the typical form of such data, are high-dimensional and complex but lack the geometric and semantic context needed for interpretation, constraining the development of supervised machine learning models. To address this bottleneck, we propose a new class of multimodal datasets that combines RF measurements with auxiliary modalities like high-resolution cameras and lidar to bridge the gap between RF signals and their physical causes. The proposed data collection will span diverse indoor and outdoor environments, featuring both static and dynamic scenarios, including human activities ranging from walking to subtle gestures. By achieving precise spatial and temporal co-registration and creating digital replicas for voxel-level annotation, this dataset will enable transformative AI research. Key tasks include the forward problem of predicting RF heatmaps from visual data to revolutionize wireless system design, and the inverse problem of inferring scene semantics from RF signals, creating a new form of RF-based perception.

AI.tldr: 提出新型多模态数据集，结合RF测量与视觉/激光雷达数据，解决无线建模和RF AI中高质量数据集缺乏的问题，支持RF信号与物理环境的关联研究。
AI.motivation: 当前无线建模和RF AI面临的主要限制是缺乏高质量、基于测量的数据集，这些数据集需要将RF信号与其物理环境连接起来。现有的RF热图虽然高维复杂，但缺乏几何和语义上下文，限制了监督机器学习模型的发展。
AI.method: 提出新型多模态数据集，结合RF测量与辅助模态（如高分辨率相机和激光雷达），跨越多样化的室内外环境，包括静态和动态场景以及人类活动。通过实现精确的空间和时间配准，并创建用于体素级标注的数字副本。
AI.result: 该数据集将支持变革性AI研究，包括两个关键任务：1）前向问题：从视觉数据预测RF热图，革新无线系统设计；2）逆问题：从RF信号推断场景语义，创建新型RF感知能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建连接RF信号与物理环境的多模态数据集，解决了无线建模和RF AI中的关键瓶颈，为无线系统设计和RF感知开辟了新的研究方向。

title: Multimodal Language Models Cannot Spot Spatial Inconsistencies
summary: Spatial consistency is a fundamental property of the visual world and a key requirement for models that aim to understand physical reality. Despite recent advances, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often struggle to reason about 3D geometry across multiple views. Rather than asking models to describe scene attributes, we introduce a more challenging task: given two views of the same scene, identify the object that violates 3D motion consistency. We propose a simple and scalable method for generating realistic, spatially inconsistent image pairs from multi-view scenes, enabling systematic evaluation of this capability. Our results show that state-of-the-art MLLMs significantly underperform human observers and exhibit substantial variability across different scene attributes, revealing a fragile and incomplete understanding of 3D structure. We hope our findings underscore the need for approaches that develop a more deeply grounded understanding of the physical world.

AI.tldr: 论文提出评估多模态大语言模型3D空间一致性推理能力的新任务：给定同一场景的两个视图，识别违反3D运动一致性的物体，并开发了生成空间不一致图像对的方法进行系统评估。
AI.motivation: 空间一致性是视觉世界的基本属性，也是理解物理现实模型的关键要求。尽管多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）最近取得进展，但它们在多视图间的3D几何推理方面仍存在困难。现有研究主要关注场景属性描述，缺乏对3D运动一致性推理能力的系统评估。
AI.method: 提出一个更具挑战性的任务：给定同一场景的两个视图，识别违反3D运动一致性的物体。开发了一种简单且可扩展的方法，从多视图场景生成真实的空间不一致图像对，从而能够系统评估模型的这种能力。
AI.result: 评估结果显示，最先进的多模态大语言模型在3D运动一致性推理任务上显著低于人类观察者表现，且在不同场景属性上表现出巨大变异性，表明模型对3D结构的理解是脆弱且不完整的。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在3D空间一致性推理方面的严重不足，强调了需要开发对物理世界有更深入基础理解的方法。该工作为评估和改进模型的物理理解能力提供了新的基准和方向。

title: Temporally Decoupled Diffusion Planning for Autonomous Driving
summary: Motion planning in dynamic urban environments requires balancing immediate safety with long-term goals. While diffusion models effectively capture multi-modal decision-making, existing approaches treat trajectories as monolithic entities, overlooking heterogeneous temporal dependencies where near-term plans are constrained by instantaneous dynamics and far-term plans by navigational goals. To address this, we propose Temporally Decoupled Diffusion Model (TDDM), which reformulates trajectory generation via a noise-as-mask paradigm. By partitioning trajectories into segments with independent noise levels, we implicitly treat high noise as information voids and weak noise as contextual cues. This compels the model to reconstruct corrupted near-term states by leveraging internal correlations with better-preserved temporal contexts. Architecturally, we introduce a Temporally Decoupled Adaptive Layer Normalization (TD-AdaLN) to inject segment-specific timesteps. During inference, our Asymmetric Temporal Classifier-Free Guidance utilizes weakly noised far-term priors to guide immediate path generation. Evaluations on the nuPlan benchmark show TDDM approaches or exceeds state-of-the-art baselines, particularly excelling in the challenging Test14-hard subset.

AI.tldr: TDDM通过时间解耦的扩散模型和噪声掩码范式，解决了动态城市环境中运动规划中近期与远期决策的异质时间依赖性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型将轨迹视为整体实体，忽略了异质时间依赖关系：近期规划受瞬时动态约束，远期规划受导航目标约束。需要一种能区分处理不同时间尺度决策的方法。
AI.method: 提出时间解耦扩散模型(TDDM)，采用噪声即掩码范式，将轨迹划分为具有独立噪声水平的段。引入时间解耦自适应层归一化(TD-AdaLN)注入段特定时间步长。推理时使用非对称时间分类器自由引导，利用弱噪声远期先验指导近期路径生成。
AI.result: 在nuPlan基准测试中，TDDM接近或超过最先进基线，在具有挑战性的Test14-hard子集上表现尤为出色。
AI.conclusion: TDDM通过时间解耦的扩散建模有效解决了运动规划中的异质时间依赖问题，噪声掩码范式使模型能利用更好的时间上下文重建近期状态，提高了动态城市环境中的规划性能。

title: Preference Guided Iterated Pareto Referent Optimisation for Accessible Route Planning
summary: We propose the Preference Guided Iterated Pareto Referent Optimisation (PG-IPRO) for urban route planning for people with different accessibility requirements and preferences. With this algorithm the user can interact with the system by giving feedback on a route, i.e., the user can say which objective should be further minimized, or conversely can be relaxed. This leads to intuitive user interaction, that is especially effective during early iterations compared to information-gain-based interaction. Furthermore, due to PG-IPRO's iterative nature, the full set of alternative, possibly optimal policies (the Pareto front), is never computed, leading to higher computational efficiency and shorter waiting times for users.

AI.tldr: PG-IPRO算法用于具有不同可达性需求和偏好的城市路径规划，通过用户对路线的反馈进行交互式优化
AI.motivation: 为满足不同可达性需求和偏好的用户提供直观的城市路径规划交互系统，解决传统方法在早期迭代中交互效果不佳的问题
AI.method: 提出偏好引导的迭代帕累托参考优化算法，用户通过反馈指定哪些目标应进一步最小化或可放松，避免计算完整的帕累托前沿
AI.result: 相比基于信息增益的交互方法，PG-IPRO在早期迭代中提供更直观有效的用户交互，计算效率更高，用户等待时间更短
AI.conclusion: PG-IPRO为具有不同可达性需求的用户提供了高效、直观的城市路径规划交互解决方案，平衡了用户偏好与计算效率

title: Visualizing Impedance Control in Augmented Reality for Teleoperation: Design and User Evaluation
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, submitted to IEEE RO-MAN 2026
summary: Teleoperation for contact-rich manipulation remains challenging, especially when using low-cost, motion-only interfaces that provide no haptic feedback. Virtual reality controllers enable intuitive motion control but do not allow operators to directly perceive or regulate contact forces, limiting task performance. To address this, we propose an augmented reality (AR) visualization of the impedance controller's target pose and its displacement from each robot end effector. This visualization conveys the forces generated by the controller, providing operators with intuitive, real-time feedback without expensive haptic hardware. We evaluate the design in a dual-arm manipulation study with 17 participants who repeatedly reposition a box with and without the AR visualization. Results show that AR visualization reduces completion time by 24% for force-critical lifting tasks, with no significant effect on sliding tasks where precise force control is less critical. These findings indicate that making the impedance target visible through AR is a viable approach to improve human-robot interaction for contact-rich teleoperation.

AI.tldr: AR可视化阻抗控制器目标位姿及其与机器人末端位移的差异，为无触觉反馈的遥操作提供力感知，提升接触丰富任务的性能
AI.motivation: 低成本、仅有运动控制的遥操作接口缺乏触觉反馈，限制了接触丰富操作任务的性能。虚拟现实控制器虽然提供直观运动控制，但无法让操作者直接感知或调节接触力。
AI.method: 提出增强现实(AR)可视化方法，显示阻抗控制器的目标位姿及其与每个机器人末端执行器的位移差异。这种可视化传达了控制器产生的力，为操作者提供直观的实时反馈，无需昂贵的触觉硬件。
